title: Thinking and feeling about novelty: How cognition and emotion shape investment in novel ideas
abstract: Abstract While prior research on the strategic framing of innovation highlights the cognitive mechanisms underlying novelty evaluation, we know little about the corresponding emotional mechanisms. Drawing on appraisal theory, construal level theory, and the literature on emotions, we theorize two distinct appraisal‐emotion pathways through which the framing of novel ideas evokes hope and awe among investors with different motives. We argue that high‐construal framing supplements economically motivated investors' low‐level feasibility orientation, which evokes hope and increases their willingness to invest. By contrast, low‐construal framing supplements non‐economically motivated investors' high‐level desirability orientation, which evokes awe and increases their willingness to invest. We test and find some support for these within‐motive pathways across three studies. Our study offers new theoretical and practical insights on the strategic framing of novel ideas.
title_cn: 思考与感受新颖性：认知与情感如何影响对新想法的投资
abstract_cn: 摘要 以往关于创新战略框架的研究强调了新颖性评估背后的认知机制，但我们对相应的情感机制知之甚少。借助评估理论、构念层次理论以及情感文献，我们理论化了两条不同的评估-情感路径，通过这些路径，新颖想法的框架会在具有不同动机的投资者中激发希望和敬畏。我们认为，高层次框架补充了受经济动机驱动的投资者的低层次可行性导向，进而激发希望并增加他们的投资意愿。相反，低层次框架则补充了非经济动机驱动的投资者的高层次期望导向，激发敬畏并增加他们的投资意愿。我们在三项研究中进行了验证，并发现对这些动机内路径有一定支持。我们的研究为新颖想法的战略框架提供了新的理论和实践见解。

title: Do Carbon Emissions Affect Stock Returns? Causal Evidence from a Supreme Court Ruling
abstract: Considering the importance of corporate carbon emissions, the Supreme Court of the United States ruled against the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and curtailed EPA’s regulatory powers by unprecedentedly invoking the “major questions doctrine” in its judgment of West Virginia v. EPA in 2022. We find that the stock prices of firms with greater exposure to carbon risk increased relative to firms with lower exposure after the Supreme Court verdict. The results are more pronounced for firms subject to higher federal climate enforcement intensity prior to the court ruling. Long-term climate commitments by state governments and carbon-sensitive institutional investors attenuate the effect. Both cash flow and discount rate contribute to the climate risk effect in firm value. Overall, our findings from this landmark climate litigation suggest that climate transition risks can affect stock prices. This paper was accepted by Lin William Cong, finance. Funding: Funding support by Hong Kong General Research Fund [Grant 17501825] is gratefully acknowledged. This work was supported by National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72172082 and 72342021 (C. Shan)]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06732 .
title_cn: 碳排放是否影响股票回报？来自最高法院裁决的因果证据
abstract_cn: 考虑到企业碳排放的重要性，美国最高法院在2022年在西弗吉尼亚州诉环境保护局（EPA）案中裁定反对EPA，并以史无前例的方式引用“重大问题理论”来限制其监管权力。我们发现，在最高法院裁决后，暴露于碳风险较高的公司的股价相对于暴露于碳风险较低的公司有所上升。对于在法院裁决之前受到更高联邦气候执法强度影响的公司，这一结果更加明显。各州政府的长期气候承诺和对碳敏感的机构投资者降低了这一效果。现金流和贴现率共同影响公司价值中的气候风险效应。总体而言，我们在这一里程碑式气候诉讼中的发现表明，气候转型风险可以影响股价。本文由林威廉·康（Lin William Cong）接受，研究领域为财务管理。资金支持来自香港一般研究基金[拨款17501825]，在此表示感谢。本研究还得到了中国国家自然科学基金[拨款72172082和72342021（阚晨）]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06732获取。

title: Private Equity, Consumers, and Competition: Evidence from the Nursing Home Industry
abstract: This paper studies how product market competition shapes the impact of private equity (PE) acquisitions on consumers. We examine nursing home buyouts and observe that PE-owned facilities exhibit greater competitive sensitivity: competing more aggressively when competitive incentives are strong and exploiting market power more aggressively when competitive incentives are weak. We find that PE-owned facilities are more sensitive to local market competition—even when comparing effects only across facilities purchased as part of the same acquisition—and are more responsive to a pro-competitive policy helping consumers compare facilities. This suggests that regulators should attend to the competitive sensitivity of acquirers and the concentration of markets where acquisitions occur, as well as consider pro-competitive policies to mitigate or even reverse PE’s potentially adverse consequences. This paper was accepted by Carrie Chan, healthcare management. Funding: This work was supported by the UCLA Price Center for Entrepreneurship and Innovation and the UCLA Fink Center for Finance and Investment. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01486 .
title_cn: 私募股权、消费者与竞争：来自养老行业的证据
abstract_cn: 本文研究了产品市场竞争如何影响私募股权（PE）收购对消费者的影响。我们考察了养老院的收购案例，观察到PE拥有的设施表现出更强的竞争敏感性：在竞争激励强烈时更具攻击性地竞争，而在竞争激励较弱时更加积极地利用市场力量。我们发现，PE拥有的设施对地方市场竞争的敏感度更高——即使仅在同一收购中购买的设施之间进行比较——并且它们对有利于消费者比较设施的竞争政策更具响应性。这表明监管机构应关注收购方的竞争敏感性以及收购发生地市场的集中度，同时考虑实施促进竞争的政策，以减轻甚至逆转PE可能带来的不利后果。本文由Carrie Chan（医疗管理）接受。资助：本研究得到加州大学洛杉矶分校Price创业与创新中心以及Fink金融与投资中心的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01486获取。

title: Tobin Tax Policy, Housing Speculation, and Property Market Dynamics
abstract: Hong Kong introduced a Tobin property tax—the Special Stamp Duty (SSD)—in 2010, which substantially increased the selling costs of short-term residential property holders. This study examines the effectiveness of this Tobin tax in curbing speculation and cooling down the housing market. We find that the SSD effectively curtails flippers who hold homes for less than two years and reduces their market presence from 23.2% in 2009% to 2.4% in 2011 and 0.9% in 2013. However, one year after implementing the tax, housing prices grow by 12.64% and 15.76% in the primary and secondary markets, respectively, indicating a lack of a market cooling effect. Flippers strategically defer sales to circumvent the SSD charges, resulting in the sharp bunching of urgent sales immediately after the lock-in period ends. Further, the SSD effectively increases selling costs and prolongs potential sellers’ holding periods, thereby significantly reducing liquidity and driving up prices in the secondary market. The unintended externality is that the unmet housing demand from the secondary market triggers a buying frenzy in the primary market, which increases the prices in the primary market as well. Our findings have policy implications for the viability of Tobin taxes for regulating real estate markets. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Funding: S. Agarwal was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72495154]. Supplemental Material: The internet appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.00370 .
title_cn: 托宾税政策、住房投机与房地产市场动态
abstract_cn: 香港于2010年引入了一种托宾税——特别印花税（SSD），这大幅增加了短期住宅物业持有者的出售成本。本研究考察了这一托宾税在遏制投机和降温房地产市场方面的有效性。我们的研究发现，SSD有效地抑制了持有房产不足两年的房产投机者（flippers），其市场占比从2009年的23.2%降至2011年的2.4%和2013年的0.9%。然而，在实施税收一年后，初级和次级市场的房价分别增长了12.64%和15.76%，这表明未能达到降温市场的效果。投机者通过战略性地推迟销售来规避SSD费用，导致在锁定期结束后迫切出售的现象明显增加。此外，SSD有效地提升了销售成本，延长了潜在卖家的持有期，从而显著降低了流动性并推高了次级市场的价格。其意外的外部性是，次级市场未满足的住房需求引发了初级市场的抢购狂潮，进一步推动了初级市场的价格上涨。我们的研究结果对托宾税在调控房地产市场的可行性提供了政策启示。本文被Agostino Capponi接受，涉及金融领域。资助信息：S. Agarwal得到中国国家自然科学基金[拨款号72495154]的支持。补充材料：互联网附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.00370获取。

title: Exchange-Traded Funds and the Wash Sale Loophole
abstract: Tax wash sale rules prohibit the recognition of capital losses when substantially identical securities are sold and immediately repurchased within short windows. This study examines whether institutional investors use exchange-traded funds (ETFs) to circumvent wash sale rules. Consistent with tax-motivated demand for ETFs, incumbent ETFs both create more shares and experience more trading volume upon the introduction of nearly identical ETFs, particularly when recent returns are negative. We show that tax-sensitive institutions’ investment in highly correlated ETFs has proliferated in recent years, exceeding a quarter of their assets under management. Furthermore, tax-sensitive institutions holding more ETFs are significantly more likely to engage in swapping nearly identical ETFs. This swapping behavior has become widespread, with tax-sensitive institutional investors swapping $417 billion of nearly identical ETFs since 2001. We estimate that tax-sensitive institutions realized more than $84 billion dollars in losses in highly correlated ETFs associated with the swapping activity since 2001. This paper was accepted by Shiva Rajgopal, accounting. Funding: The authors thank their institutions for financial support. M. Dambra thanks the Kenneth W. Colwell endowment for research support, C. M. C. Lee thanks the Kermit O. Hanson endowment for research support, and P. J. Quinn thanks PricewaterhouseCoopers for research support. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06944 .
title_cn: 交易所交易基金与洗售漏洞
abstract_cn: 税收洗售规则禁止在短期内出售并立即回购实质相同证券时确认资本损失。本研究考察了机构投资者是否利用交易所交易基金（ETF）规避洗售规则。与出于税务动机对ETF的需求一致，现有ETF在引入几乎相同的ETF时不仅创造了更多的份额，而且交易量也随之增加，尤其是在近期收益为负时。我们表明，税务敏感型机构对高度相关ETF的投资在近年来激增，超过其管理资产的四分之一。此外，持有更多ETF的税务敏感型机构更可能进行几乎相同ETF的置换。这种置换行为已变得普遍，自2001年以来，税务敏感型机构投资者已对几乎相同的ETF进行了4170亿美元的置换。我们估计，自2001年以来，税务敏感型机构在与置换活动相关的高度相关ETF中实现的损失超过840亿美元。本文被Shiva Rajgopal接受，专注于会计。资助：作者感谢其所在机构的财务支持。M. Dambra感谢Kenneth W. Colwell基金会的研究支持，C. M. C. Lee感谢Kermit O. Hanson基金会的研究支持，P. J. Quinn感谢普华永道的研究支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06944获得。

title: EXPRESS: Will Machines Take Over? Algorithms for Human-Machine Collaborative Decision Making in Healthcare
abstract: Despite significant advancements in predictive artificial intelligence (AI), organizations continue to grapple with determining the most effective integration of AI into their operations, particularly in combining AI with human capabilities in task execution. This paper introduces a diagnostic system aimed at minimizing costs while maintaining patient safety in hospitals by efficiently allocating mammography interpretation tasks between AI algorithms and radiologists. The optimal diagnostic system employs algorithm-generated risk scores for mammograms to determine if additional assessment by a radiologist is necessary. It evaluates the costs of two approaches—automation, where AI completely replaces human interpretation, and delegation, where AI and radiologists share interpretation tasks–compared to the current expert-alone strategy. When AI performance does not exceed that of radiologists, the optimal design is a simple two-threshold policy: AI recommends no follow-up for low-risk cases, recommends follow-up for high-risk cases, and delegates ambiguous cases in between to radiologists; the thresholds are analytically derived and state-independent. This two-threshold policy is state-independent and that optimal thresholds are not contingent on the diagnostic system’s prior history. We demonstrate our system’s performance by back-testing against real-life scenarios, utilizing data from a mammography AI contest and real-world cost and performance metrics. Backtesting demonstrates potential cost savings of up to 20.9% compared to the expert-alone approach. Beyond radiology imaging, our work holds significant implications for the design of workflows in the AI era and human-machine collaboration contexts.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 表达：机器会接管吗？医疗保健中人机协作决策的算法
abstract_cn: 尽管预测人工智能（AI）取得了显著进展，组织在确定将AI有效整合到运营中的方法方面仍面临挑战，尤其是在任务执行中将AI与人类能力相结合方面。本文介绍了一种诊断系统，旨在通过有效分配乳腺X光检查的解读任务在AI算法和放射科医师之间来降低成本，同时维护医院中的患者安全。该最佳诊断系统利用算法生成的乳腺X光检查风险评分来判断是否需要放射科医师进行额外评估。它评估了两种方法的成本——自动化，即AI完全取代人类解读；以及委托，即AI和放射科医师共享解读任务——与目前的专家独立解读策略进行比较。当AI的表现未能超过放射科医师时，最佳设计是一种简单的双阈值策略：对低风险病例，AI建议无需后续跟进；对高风险病例，建议进行后续跟进；对于存在歧义的病例，则委托给放射科医师；这些阈值是通过分析推导得出的，并且与状态无关。这种双阈值政策与状态无关，即最优阈值不依赖于诊断系统的历史记录。我们通过回测真实场景，利用乳腺X光AI竞赛的数据及现实中的成本和性能指标，来展示我们系统的性能。回测结果显示，与专家独立解读方法相比，潜在的成本节约可高达20.9%。超越放射影像学，我们的研究对于AI时代工作流程的设计及人机协作背景下具有重要意义。

title: To Adopt or Not: The Paradox of AR Fitting Technology in Retail Channels
abstract: As brick-and-mortar retail rebounds, congestion in fitting rooms has reemerged as a critical operational challenge. Augmented reality (AR) fitting applications offer a scalable solution by enabling rapid virtual trials and reducing in-store delays, yet imperfect assessments may increase product mismatches. This study provides actionable guidance for retailers on AR adoption and pricing strategies by clarifying the economic roles of the substitution and complementarity effects. Our findings underscore the importance of a market-contingent approach to AR adoption and system upgrades. Rather than presuming that improvements in accuracy or usability will uniformly enhance performance, retailers and IT managers should rigorously evaluate how technological capabilities interact with market size, price fluctuations, and congestion dynamics. We also inform targeted marketing by demonstrating how heterogeneity in consumer technology preferences shapes channel selection and effective transaction outcomes. More broadly, our results caution policymakers that emerging digital technologies—while intended to reduce friction—may generate unintended welfare losses if mismatch risks and strategic responses are overlooked. These insights provide actionable guidance for digital transformation initiatives in retail and other capacity-constrained service systems characterized by heterogeneous consumers.
title_cn: 采用与否：零售渠道中增强现实适配技术的悖论
abstract_cn: 随着实体零售的复苏，试衣间拥堵再次成为一项关键的运营挑战。增强现实（AR）试衣应用提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，通过快速进行虚拟试穿和减少店内延误，但不完美的评估可能增加产品不匹配的风险。本研究通过澄清替代效应和互补效应的经济角色，为零售商在AR采纳和定价策略上提供了可行的指导。我们的研究结果强调了根据市场情况调整AR采纳和系统升级的重要性。零售商和IT经理不应假定精度或易用性的提升会均匀地提高性能，而应严谨评估技术能力如何与市场规模、价格波动和拥堵动态相互作用。我们还通过展示消费者技术偏好的异质性如何影响渠道选择和有效交易结果，为针对性市场营销提供了指导。更广泛地说，我们的结果提醒政策制定者，尽管新兴数字技术旨在减少摩擦，但如果忽视不匹配风险和战略反应，它们可能会产生意想不到的福利损失。这些洞见为零售和其他以服务容量受限且消费者异质性显著的系统中的数字化转型倡议提供了可行的指导。

title: More Can Be Less: The Economics of Answer Viewing on Paid Q&A Platforms
abstract: Paid Q&A platforms increasingly experiment with an answer-viewing feature that allows users to pay a small fee to access answers already given to others. At first glance, this model appears to expand access and create new revenue streams. Our research, however, shows that the reality is more complex. Using a game-theoretic model, we demonstrate that answer viewing can sometimes harm platform profits due to market cannibalization: Users who might have paid for personalized answers switch to cheaper viewing options. Surprisingly, we find that answerers may raise their consulting fees when platforms share a large portion of viewing revenue with them, and users do not always benefit because personalized answers become more expensive. These results reveal a central paradox—more can be less—as adding another monetization channel may backfire. For practice, our findings highlight the need for Q&A platforms to carefully calibrate revenue-sharing policies to avoid undermining their core market. For policy, the study underscores the importance of safeguards to protect small knowledge providers when platform incentives diverge from those of answerers and users. Beyond Q&A, the insights apply to broader contexts where platforms repackage personalized services into standardized products.
title_cn: 更多可能意味着更少：付费问答平台上回答查看的经济学
abstract_cn: 付费问答平台越来越多地试验一种回答查看功能，允许用户支付少量费用以访问其他人已给出的答案。乍看之下，这一模式似乎可以扩大访问范围并创造新的收入来源。然而，我们的研究表明，现实情况要复杂得多。通过使用博弈论模型，我们展示了答案查看在某些情况下可能会对平台利润造成损害，原因在于市场的自我侵蚀：本可能支付个性化答案费用的用户转而选择更便宜的查看选项。令人惊讶的是，我们发现，当平台与回答者分享大量查看收入时，回答者可能会提高咨询费用，而用户并不总能受益，因为个性化答案变得更昂贵。这些结果揭示了一个核心悖论——更多可能意味着更少——因为增加另一个盈利渠道可能会适得其反。在实践中，我们的发现突显了问答平台需要仔细校准收入分享政策，以避免削弱其核心市场。在政策层面，本研究强调了在平台激励与回答者和用户的激励出现偏离时，保护小型知识提供者的保障措施的重要性。更广泛地说，这些洞察适用于将个性化服务重新包装为标准化产品的更广泛背景。

title: Other People’s Children: How Diversity Without Inclusion Impacts Community Support for Public Schools
abstract: Organizations pursuing activities that advance the public interest often require support from their local communities, but such support may be harder to come by in more racially diverse communities. In this study, we argue that this negative effect of racial diversity on support for organizations serving the public interest will be weaker the more inclusive the community, especially where community inclusion is accompanied by shared values among members of different groups and where the organizations themselves are racially representative. We test and find support for these predictions by looking at one specific type of public service organization: public schools in the United States. Specifically, we find that community support for public schools—both generally in terms of local spending per pupil and specifically as the bond amounts residents vote to approve—is negatively associated with racial diversity within a school district, but this negative relation only holds for less inclusive communities where members of different groups are less likely to live close to each other or to have social ties with each other. We further find that this moderating effect of community inclusion is complemented by shared values and organizational representativeness, so that diversity has the most negative effect in less inclusive communities where members of different races differ in their political beliefs and schools are relatively segregated, and no significant effect in inclusive communities with shared values and integrated schools. Our study sheds new light on the conditions under which organizations seeking to address grand challenges can benefit from strong community support. Funding: This work was supported by the Carlson School of Management [DEI Research Grant] and the Responsible Research in Business and Management [Dare to Care Scholorship]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19351 .
title_cn: 他人的孩子：缺乏包容的多样性如何影响公众对公立学校的支持
abstract_cn: 追求促进公共利益活动的组织通常需要当地社区的支持，但在种族多样性更高的社区中，这种支持可能更难获得。在本研究中，我们论证了种族多样性对支持公共利益组织的负面影响在社区包容性越强的情况下会减弱，特别是在不同群体成员之间存在共同价值观的情况下，以及这些组织本身具有种族代表性的情况下。我们通过关注美国的一种特定类型公共服务组织——公立学校，来测试并支持这些预测。具体而言，我们发现社区对公立学校的支持——无论是就每位学生的地方支出而言，还是居民投票批准的债券金额而言——与学校区内的种族多样性存在负相关关系，但这种负相关关系仅在包容性较差的社区中成立，这些社区中不同群体的成员不太可能住得很近或拥有社会联系。我们进一步发现，社区包容性的调节效应与共同价值观和组织代表性互为补充，造成了在包容性较差的社区中，不同种族成员在政治信仰上的差异以及学校相对隔离的情况下，种族多样性对支持的负面影响最为明显，而在拥有共同价值观和融合学校的包容性强的社区中则没有显著的影响。我们的研究为寻求应对重大挑战的组织在何种条件下能够从强大的社区支持中受益提供了新的视角。资助：本研究得到了卡尔森管理学院[DEI研究资助]和负责任的商业与管理研究[敢于关怀奖学金]的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19351获取。

title: Waiting for the Right Offer: Laboratory Evidence on How News Affects Bargaining
abstract: We conduct a series of laboratory experiments to examine whether the gradual exogenous revelation of sellers’ private information influences the occurrence of trades in a bilateral bargaining setting with a static lemon condition. We find that, although information does not increase efficiency, it reduces the likelihood that buyers incur losses when trading with low-quality sellers. Anticipating that additional signals will arrive, buyers hesitate to finalize deals immediately and exhibit a “waiting for news” effect, making sizable offer adjustments only when sufficient positive signals have accumulated. In contrast, informed sellers are less sensitive to news but appear to wait for the offer that they deem acceptable. This paper was accepted by Dorothea Kübler, behavioral economics and decision analysis. Funding: T. Ding initiated this project while at the Shanghai University of Finance and Economics and thanks the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72173076] for financial support. S. F. Lehrer thanks the Social Science and Humanities Research Council of Canada for research support. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07224 .
title_cn: 等待合适的报价：关于新闻如何影响谈判的实验室证据
abstract_cn: 我们进行了一系列实验室实验，研究卖方私人信息的逐步外生揭示是否会影响在静态柠檬条件下双边讨价还价设置中的交易发生。我们的发现是，尽管信息并未提高效率，但它降低了买方与低质量卖方交易时遭受损失的可能性。买方预期会收到额外信号，因此在交易上犹豫不决，展现出“等待消息”的效应，仅在积累了足够的正面信号后才会进行较大幅度的出价调整。相比之下，知情卖方对消息的敏感度较低，但似乎在等待他们认为可接受的报价。本文由多萝西娅·库布勒接受，涉及行为经济学和决策分析。资助信息：丁腾在上海财经大学启动了这个项目，感谢中国国家自然科学基金[资助编号72173076]的资金支持。S. F. 莱赫尔感谢加拿大社会科学与人文科学研究委员会提供的研究支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07224 获取。

title: Beyond O(T) Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming
abstract: Breaking the [Formula: see text] Barrier in Online Linear Programming How can fast first-order methods for online linear programming (OLP) match the performance of more computationally intensive LP-based approaches? In the paper “Beyond [Formula: see text] Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming,” the authors develop a new framework that improves the regret guarantees of scalable first-order algorithms for online linear programming. They show that when the dual problem satisfies a mild error bound condition, first-order methods can achieve [Formula: see text] regret, including [Formula: see text] in continuous support settings and [Formula: see text] in finite support settings. The key insight is to decouple learning and decision making. The algorithm first learns an approximate dual solution and then localizes decisions to a neighborhood around that solution using an adaptive procedure. This decoupling narrows the gap between efficient gradient-based methods and LP-based benchmarks, providing strong theoretical guarantees while maintaining scalability for applications such as revenue management, online advertising, and cloud computing.
title_cn: 超越O(T)的遗憾：在线线性规划中学习与决策的解耦
abstract_cn: 在在线线性规划中打破[公式：见文本]的限制：快速的一阶方法如何在性能上与更为计算密集的基于线性规划的方法相匹配？在论文“超越[公式：见文本]后悔：在线线性规划中的学习与决策解耦”中，作者提出了一种新的框架，提升了可扩展的一阶算法在在线线性规划中的后悔保证。他们表明，当对偶问题满足温和的误差界限条件时，一阶方法可以实现[公式：见文本]的后悔，包括在连续支持环境中的[公式：见文本]和在有限支持环境中的[公式：见文本]。关键洞察在于将学习与决策解耦。算法首先学习一个近似的对偶解，然后使用自适应程序将决策定位于该解周围的邻域。这种解耦缩小了有效的基于梯度的方法与基于线性规划的基准之间的差距，提供了强有力的理论保证，同时保持了在收益管理、在线广告和云计算等应用中的可扩展性。

title: EXPRESS: Waiting Time Externality Awareness in Socially Responsible Queueing
abstract: In service systems, customers tend to overutilize resources, resulting in high congestion. We study a noncoercive way to alleviate congestion based on customers’ awareness of the negative waiting externalities they impose. To this end, we revisit Naor’s rational-queue model by adding a term that captures the cost a customer associates with the waiting time generated for other customers encountered during their sojourn. First, we show that this modification preserves the threshold structure of customers’ joining strategy. Using lattice-path counting techniques, we derive a closedform expression for the expected generated waiting time, conditional on the number of customers observed upon arrival. The generated wait is increasing and concave in the queue length at arrival. Viewing expected waiting time as allocated across arrivals, the queue length associated with an arbitrary unit of expected generated waiting time is first-order stochastically lower than the queue length associated with a unit of expected personal waiting time. We prove that the maximum generated wait is increasing and convex in the joining threshold and provide tight bounds with exact light/heavy traffic asymptotics. Internalizing social awareness (weight on generated wait) lowers the joining threshold and reduces waiting; in high-demand regimes, it can also increase social welfare. When the operator can also influence the weight on personal wait, that lever reduces congestion more strongly than waiting externality awareness. Finally, we quantify the awareness level needed to reach Naor’s social threshold and show that it is lowest at a non-extreme demand level.
title_cn: 表达：社会责任排队中的等待时间外部性意识
abstract_cn: 在服务系统中，顾客往往过度利用资源，导致高拥堵。我们研究了一种非强制性的方法，以减轻拥堵，基于顾客对他们所施加的负等待外部性意识。为此，我们重新审视了Naor的理性排队模型，通过添加一个术语来捕捉顾客在逗留期间为其他顾客产生的等待时间所关联的成本。首先，我们显示这一修改保留了顾客加入策略的阈值结构。利用格子路径计数技术，我们推导出一种封闭形式的表达式，用于表示在到达时观察到的顾客数量条件下，期望产生的等待时间。所产生的等待时间在到达时与队列长度呈递增并凹形关系。在将期望等待时间视为在到达之间分配时，与任意单位的期望产生的等待时间相关联的队列长度在第一阶上随机低于与单位期望个人等待时间相关联的队列长度。我们证明最大产生的等待时间在加入阈值上是递增和凸的，并提供了具有精确轻/重交通渐近的紧界限。将社会意识（对产生等待的权重）内化降低了加入阈值并减少了等待；在高需求情况下，这也可以增加社会福利。当运营者还可以影响个人等待的权重时，这一杠杆对减少拥堵的效果比等待外部性意识更强。最后，我们量化了达到Naor的社会阈值所需的意识水平，并表明在非极端需求水平下该水平是最低的。

title: EXPRESS: Scheduling Additive Manufacturing Systems: Complexity and Algorithms to Minimize the Number of Late Parts
abstract: Additive Manufacturing (AM) is a process by which three-dimensional products are made via the addition of material in a layer-by-layer fashion. This manufacturing technique is growing in commercial usage given its advantages in creating very dense or complex geometries as well as highly customizable components. In healthcare, for example, AM can be used to improve patient outcomes by providing timely medical devices (or parts) required for treatments. Minimizing the number of late parts in this context will directly improve the patients’ welfare. This paper studies the nesting and scheduling problem within the AM context and shows the problem of minimizing the number of late parts is strongly NP-hard even if the nesting of parts-into-jobs is given. We also develop efficient algorithms to minimize the number of late parts, both when nesting is fixed beforehand and when nesting is part of the algorithm. The theoretical results, including algorithm performance bounds, developed in this paper are new contributions to the literature. An extensive computational study evaluates the performance of both algorithms. The nesting and scheduling algorithm performs within 7% of the lower bound on average and shows an effective way to nest and schedule systems containing challenging problem instances. Providing efficient, high-performing algorithms such as these will allow AM managers to quickly schedule parts for AM production with a minimum number of late parts and consequently improve both customer satisfaction and profitability of the firm.
title_cn: 调度增材制造系统：复杂性与算法以最小化延迟零件数量
abstract_cn: 增材制造（AM）是通过逐层添加材料来制造三维产品的一种工艺。这种制造技术因其在创建非常致密或复杂几何形状以及高度可定制组件方面的优势而在商业使用中不断增长。在医疗保健领域，例如，增材制造可以通过提供治疗所需的及时医疗设备（或零部件）来改善患者的结果。在这种情况下，减少迟交零件的数量将直接改善患者的福祉。本文研究了增材制造背景下的嵌套与调度问题，并表明即使在零部件已嵌入任务的情况下，最小化迟交零件数量的问题也是强 NP-hard。我们还开发了有效的算法，以最小化迟交零件的数量，既适用于嵌套事先固定的情况，也适用于嵌套作为算法的一部分的情况。本文发展出的理论结果，包括算法性能界限，是对现有文献的新贡献。一项广泛的计算研究评估了这两种算法的性能。嵌套与调度算法的平均表现接近于下界的7%，并展示了在含有挑战性问题实例的系统中嵌套和调度的有效方法。提供这种高效、表现优异的算法将使增材制造管理者能够快速安排零件进行增材生产，最小化迟交零件的数量，从而改善客户满意度和公司盈利能力。

title: The duality of duality: Generative and disruptive climate configurations for innovation
abstract: Organizational climate is seen as a key driver of organizational performance, including sustained innovation. However, there is limited work on the effects of climate duality on innovation. The co-existence of two distinct climate dimensions (duality) in an organization creates the potential for both generative and disruptive dualities. By dividing the innovation process into an idea generation stage and an innovation implementation stage, we develop a theory linking climate duality and the generative–disruptive dichotomy at each stage of the innovation process. In particular, we argue that climate duality should be generative at the idea stage and disruptive at the implementation stage. Using data from the 2018 Australian Public Service Employee Census ( N = 59,870), we test the distinct effects of climate duality at each stage. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of these findings for theories of work climate and innovation. • Advance workplace climate research with a configurational approach examining interactions among multiple workplace climates • Theorize relationship between duality (co-existence of go-getter and inclusive climates) and stages of innovation process • Use Australian Public Service Employee Census to show climate duality benefits idea generation (a divergent process) • Find climate duality hinders implementation (a convergent process), revealing paradoxical effects on innovation • Extend theories of climate duality and innovation to public organizations, contributing to cross-sector understanding
title_cn: 双重性之双重性：创新的生成性和破坏性气候配置
abstract_cn: 组织气候被视为组织绩效的一个关键驱动因素，包括持续的创新。然而，关于气候二元性对创新影响的研究相对有限。组织中两种不同气候维度的共存（称为二元性）为生成和破坏性二元性都创造了潜力。通过将创新过程分为创意生成阶段和创新实施阶段，我们提出了一种理论，联系气候二元性与创新过程每个阶段的生成–破坏二分法。具体而言，我们认为，在创意阶段，气候二元性应表现为生成性，而在实施阶段则应表现为破坏性。我们利用2018年澳大利亚公共服务员工普查的数据（N = 59,870），测试了气候二元性在每个阶段的不同影响。最后，我们讨论了这些发现对工作气候与创新理论的启示。 • 提升工作场所气候研究，采用配置方法考察多种工作场所气候之间的互动 • 理论化二元性（积极进取和包容性气候的共存）与创新过程阶段之间的关系 • 利用澳大利亚公共服务员工普查数据展示气候二元性促进创意生成（一个发散过程） • 发现气候二元性阻碍实施（一个收敛过程），揭示了对创新的矛盾影响 • 将气候二元性和创新理论扩展到公共组织，促进跨部门理解。

title: Pathways to upscaling: aligning capabilities with supply chain design in automotive manufacturing
abstract: Purpose Taking innovation to scale and accelerating the development of new technologies puts pressure on manufacturers to perform frequent ramp-ups in increasingly volatile markets. Such pressures inevitably bring the role of supply chain right at the centre of the challenge to design supply chains that are ready to upscale. This research aims to explore how manufacturers can design their supply chain and deploy the required capabilities to respond to the upscaling demands. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on the dynamic capabilities (DCs) theory, this study develops a conceptual framework which is validated through multiple case studies. Data was collected and analysed from 14 upscaling projects in automotive manufacturing. Findings This study identified specific DCs (e.g. dynamic relational capabilities) that manufacturers deployed in their upscaling projects, explored their micro-foundations, showed how these are coupled with different supply chain designs (SCDs) and how those matches evolve over time. A distinctive finding is the need for automotive manufacturers involved in innovative and technological upscaling projects, to move away from the traditional binary SCD choice (i.e. modular vs integral) to a less rigid SCD which we called “evolving SCD” and proved to be particularly valuable for companies with limited resources and evolving market positions. Practical implications This research outlines actionable pathways for upscaling and offers guidance on aligning SCD with capabilities. The findings also illustrate how managers can leverage temporal configurational shifts to strategically address evolving priorities from initial market entry concerns like IP protection and capability access, to later-stage challenges around supplier reliability and volume capacity. Originality/value This study introduces the concept of the evolving SCD which is particularly suitable for start-up companies in meeting the upscaling requirements. This research enriches the understanding on how to manage upscaling projects by offering fresh empirical insights into how manufacturers can successfully upscale by streamlining the SCD with capabilities.
title_cn: 向规模化迈进的路径：在汽车制造中将能力与供应链设计对齐
abstract_cn:
目的：将创新规模化和加速新技术的发展使制造商面临在日益动荡的市场中进行频繁提升的压力。这种压力必然将供应链的角色置于设计可准备好扩大的供应链这一挑战的中心。该研究旨在探讨制造商如何设计他们的供应链并部署所需的能力以响应扩大需求。

设计/方法论：本研究基于动态能力理论，开发了一个概念框架，并通过多案例研究进行了验证。数据从14个汽车制造业的扩展项目中收集并分析。

发现：本研究识别出制造商在扩展项目中部署的特定动态能力（如动态关系能力），探讨了它们的微观基础，展示了这些能力如何与不同的供应链设计相结合，以及这些匹配如何随着时间的推移而演变。一个独特的发现是，参与创新和技术扩展项目的汽车制造商需要摆脱传统的二元供应链设计选择（即模块化与整体化），转而采用一种较不严格的供应链设计，称为“演变型供应链设计”，这对资源有限且市场地位不断变化的公司尤其有价值。

实践意义：本研究勾勒了可实施的扩展路径，并提供了在能力与供应链设计对齐方面的指导。研究结果还展示了管理者如何利用时间上的配置变化，战略性地应对从市场初期进入时如知识产权保护和能力获取等问题，到后期围绕供应商可靠性和产能的挑战。

独创性/价值：本研究引入了“演变型供应链设计”的概念，这对于满足扩展要求的初创公司尤其适用。此研究通过提供新鲜的实证见解，丰富了如何管理扩展项目的理解，展示了制造商如何通过将供应链设计与能力简化整合，从而成功实现规模化。

title: Battlelines of Accountability: The Discursive Production of Digital Responsibility
abstract: Abstract Public inquiries have become pivotal arenas in which the ethical responsibilities of digital platforms are publicly constructed and contested. Yet scholarship has paid limited attention to the linguistic mechanisms through which these contests unfold. This paper examines the 2024 Australian Joint Select Committee on Social Media and Australian Society as a high-stakes moral forum in which technology firms, regulators, and civil society actors engage in discursive struggles over adolescent harm and platform responsibility. Drawing on a qualitative analysis of more than 3000 pages of submissions and hearing transcripts, we show that accountability in this setting is not simply revealed but actively produced through language. Extending prior research on dialogic accountability, we incorporate Searle’s speech act theory to identify how presuppositions and indirect speech acts function as micro-level tools for shaping epistemic contests about what harms occur and responsibility contests about who ought to be held to account. Our findings demonstrate that corporate actors often deploy these linguistic devices to maintain ambiguity, diffuse blame, or perform symbolic responsibility, while legislators and advocates use them to assert duties, establish harms, and press for substantive accountability. We argue that “digital responsibility” emerges as a contingent discursive accomplishment rather than an intrinsic organizational property, highlighting the performative and strategic nature of ethical claims in contemporary platform governance. By theorizing accountability as a linguistically mediated moral practice, the paper advances business ethics scholarship on discursive legitimation, contributing to ongoing debates about how societies should evaluate and regulate the conduct of powerful digital firms.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 问责的战线：数字责任的话语生产
abstract_cn: 摘要 公众调查已成为数字平台伦理责任在公众中构建与争论的重要舞台。然而，学术界对这些争论展开的语言机制关注有限。本文考察了2024年澳大利亚社会传媒联合特别委员会，作为一个高风险的道德论坛，技术公司、监管机构和民间社会参与者在此进行关于青少年伤害和平台责任的论述斗争。通过对超过3000页的提交材料和听证会记录的定性分析，我们展示了在这种情境中，问责制并非简单地被揭示，而是通过语言积极生产的。我们在对话问责的先前研究基础上，引入塞尔的言语行为理论，以识别预设和间接言语行为如何作为微观层面的工具，塑造关于发生何种伤害的认知争论，以及关于谁应承担责任的责任争论。我们的研究结果表明，企业参与者常常利用这些语言手段来保持模糊性、分散责任或展现象征性的责任，而立法者和倡导者则用其来主张义务、建立伤害并推动实质性问责。我们认为，“数字责任”应被视为一种依赖于话语的临时性成果，而非固有的组织特性，突显了当代平台治理中伦理主张的表演性和战略性。通过将问责理论化为一种语言中介的道德实践，本文推进了关于话语合法化的企业伦理学术研究，促进了关于社会应如何评估和监管强大数字公司的行为的持续辩论。

title: The Trade-Offs of Letting Local Managers Make Hiring Decisions
abstract: Letting managers have more authority over hiring decisions is becoming an increasingly common management practice among business chains worldwide, yet both theoretical and empirical evidence on its effects remains limited. Local manager hiring (LMH) refers to decentralizing hiring decisions to local business unit managers, rather than relying on the headquarters’ human resource department to make decisions. To assess the impacts of LMH on employee recruitment, productivity, and firm performance, we partnered with a large Chinese firm operating 111 retail stores through a twelve-month field experiment. Results show that LMH leads to an increase in both the mean and variance of individual productivity, yielding a boost in store-level sales of approximately 7%–8%. Store-level performance gains were driven by both the direct effects of recruiting higher-performing workers and the indirect effects of positive spillovers from new hires to existing employees. In line with our theory, LMH achieved superior outcomes in stores with better-aligned managerial incentives, more repeat customers, and lower levels of busyness. However, the rise in variance indicates greater inconsistency in hiring outcomes, which led to worse outcomes in some stores. These findings highlight the central trade-off of decentralized hiring: While it can improve average performance by leveraging local knowledge, it also increases the risk of costly hiring mistakes. This paper was accepted by Isabel Fernandez-Mateo, organizations. Funding: This work was supported by The Chiang Ching-Kuo Foundation [Grant DD086-A-18]; Stanford Center at Peking University; Stanford King Center on Global Poverty and Development. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2020.03837 .
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 让地方经理做招聘决策的权衡利弊
abstract_cn: 让管理者在招聘决策中拥有更多权力已经成为全球商业链中一种日益普遍的管理实践，但关于其影响的理论和实证证据仍然有限。地方经理招聘（LMH）是指将招聘决策下放给地方业务单元经理，而不是依赖总部的人力资源部门来做决策。为了评估LMH对员工招聘、生产力和公司绩效的影响，我们与一家在中国运营111家零售店的大型企业合作，进行了为期十二个月的实地实验。结果表明，LMH导致个体生产力的均值和方差均有所增加，从而使门店销售额约提升了7%-8%。门店层面的绩效增长既受益于招聘高效能员工的直接效应，又受到新员工对现有员工的积极溢出效应的间接驱动。与我们的理论一致，LMH在管理激励对齐程度更高、回头客更多和忙碌程度更低的门店中取得了更优的结果。然而，方差的上升表明招聘结果的不一致性增加，这导致部分门店的结果更差。这些发现凸显了去中心化招聘的核心权衡：虽然它可以通过利用地方知识提高平均绩效，但同时也增加了发生昂贵招聘错误的风险。本文被伊莎贝尔·费ernandez-Mateo 接收。资助：本研究得到了蒋经国基金会[资助编号 DD086-A-18]的支持；北京大学斯坦福中心；斯坦福全球贫困与发展研究中心的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2020.03837 获取。

title: Within–Bank Holding Company Accounting Information and Internal Capital Allocation
abstract: We examine whether loan loss provision validity (i.e., the extent of loan loss provisions mapping into future charge offs) within the bank holding company (BHC) is associated with internal capital allocation efficiency. Exploiting the filing requirements for subsidiary banks, we find that within-BHC provision validity, our measure of internal information quality, is positively associated with internal capital market efficiency. We also find that this association is concentrated in BHCs more likely to allocate capital to take advantage of subsidiary lending opportunities and BHCs with higher internal information asymmetry. These findings suggest that within-BHC accounting information that better reflects subsidiary bank loan performance mitigates information problems between headquarters and subsidiary managers in internal capital allocation. This study contributes to our understanding of how loan loss provision information of lower-level entities within the organization is associated with headquarters capital allocation and helps mitigate internal information asymmetry within banking organizations. This paper was accepted by Ranjani Krishnan, accounting. Funding: The authors thank the University of Toronto, Wharton School, and Temple University for financial support. A. Nicoletti gratefully acknowledges financial support from the Alfred H. Williams Faculty Scholar Award. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05313 .
title_cn: 银行控股公司内部会计信息与内部资本分配
abstract_cn: 我们研究了银行控股公司（BHC）中贷款损失准备的有效性（即贷款损失准备与未来核销程度之间的关系）是否与内部资本配置效率相关。通过利用子银行的报送要求，我们发现BHC内部的准备有效性，我们的内部信息质量衡量标准，与内部资本市场效率呈正相关。我们还发现这种关系主要集中在那些更可能将资本分配以利用子公司放贷机会的BHC，以及那些具有更高内部信息不对称的BHC。这些发现表明，在BHC内部，更能反映子银行贷款表现的会计信息能够减轻总部与子公司经理之间在内部资本配置中的信息问题。本研究有助于我们理解组织内较低层次实体的贷款损失准备信息如何与总部资本分配相关，并有助于减少银行组织内部的信息不对称。本文被Ranjani Krishnan接受，涉及会计领域。资金支持：作者感谢多伦多大学、沃顿商学院和天普大学的财政支持。A. Nicoletti感激阿尔弗雷德·H·威廉姆斯教授奖学金所提供的资金支持。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05313获得。

title: The Effects of Personal Data Management on Competition and Welfare
abstract: This study examines the impact of consumers’ personal data management on firm competition in the data collection and application markets, as well as on welfare outcomes. Consumers purchase products from differentiated firms in these two markets. Initially, in the data collection market, firms compete to collect consumer data to predict preferences in the data application market, enabling them to offer personalized prices to their targeted customers. Before firms set prices in the data application market, targeted consumers can erase their data at a fixed cost, thereby becoming untargeted. We show that personal data management leads to higher prices, lower firm profits, negative externalities among consumers, and reduced consumer surplus in the data application market. In the data collection market, personal data management intensifies competition and improves consumer surplus. Our analysis further explores extended scenarios of personal data management—including the rights to opt out of data collection, data portability, and data ownership—and reveals that firms’ two-market profits and total consumer surplus change nonmonotonically with consumers’ data rights. Specifically, granting consumers data rights beyond simple data erasure can reverse the effects of erasure alone, benefiting firms while harming consumers. Moreover, data management influences cross-market competition quite differently depending on which market consumers exercise their data rights. Finally, we discuss proactive strategies firms can employ to maintain profitability under personal data laws. This paper was accepted by Dmitri Kuksov, marketing. Funding: J. Cong acknowledges the financial support from National Natural Science Foundation of China (Projects 72473024, 72192845) and support from the Shenzhen Research Institute, City University of Hong Kong. The authors gratefully acknowledge the financial support from the Japan Society for the Promotion of Science (JSPS), KAKENHI [Grants JP19H01483, JP20H05631, JP21H00702, JP21K01452, JP21K18430, JP23K20593, and JP23K25515], Nomura Foundation, the International Joint Research Promotion Program at University of Osaka, and the program of the Joint Usage/Research Center for “Behavioral Economics” at ISER, University of Osaka. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.08024 .
topics: Personal Information Management and User Behavior
title_cn: 个人数据管理对竞争与福利的影响
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了消费者个人数据管理对数据收集和应用市场中企业竞争及福利结果的影响。在这两个市场中，消费者从差异化的企业购买产品。最初，在数据收集市场中，企业竞争以收集消费者数据，以预测数据应用市场中的偏好，从而使其能够向目标客户提供个性化价格。在企业设定数据应用市场的价格之前，目标消费者可以以固定成本删除他们的数据，进而变为非目标客户。我们发现，个人数据管理导致数据应用市场的价格上涨、企业利润下降、消费者之间负外部性增加以及消费者剩余减少。在数据收集市场中，个人数据管理加剧了竞争并改善了消费者剩余。我们的分析进一步探讨了个人数据管理的扩展场景，包括选择退出数据收集权、数据可携带性和数据所有权，并揭示了企业在两个市场中的利润和总消费者剩余与消费者数据权利的关系呈非单调变化。具体而言，授予消费者超出简单数据删除的数据权利可能会逆转仅删除数据的效果，从而使企业受益而使消费者受损。此外，数据管理对跨市场竞争的影响因消费者在不同市场中行使其数据权利而异。最后，我们讨论了企业在个人数据法律框架下维持盈利能力的积极策略。本文由市场营销领域的Dmitri Kuksov接受。资金支持：J. Cong感谢中国国家自然科学基金（项目72473024, 72192845）的财政支持，以及香港城市大学深圳研究院的支持。作者们衷心感谢日本学术促进会（JSPS）、科学研究费助成金（KAKENHI）[资助JP19H01483, JP20H05631, JP21H00702, JP21K01452, JP21K18430, JP23K20593, 和JP23K25515]、野村基金会、大阪大学国际联合研究促进计划以及大阪大学ISER“行为经济学”联合使用/研究中心的项目的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.08024获取。

title: Through the Lens of Clarity: Perceived Organizational Tightness Boosts Creativity for Men, but Not for Women
abstract: A commonly held perspective in the cultural tightness literature is that cultural tightness tends to negatively impact creativity. Yet some findings indicate that this relationship is not strictly negative and that a more nuanced perspective should be considered. Drawing on social information processing (SIP) theory and social role theory, we build theory on how the perception of organizational cultural tightness can increase creativity for some employees, but not for others. Specifically, we propose that perceived organizational tightness—the extent to which one perceives that an organization is characterized by strong norms and sanctions for deviation—increases clarity on creativity evaluation standards and that gender moderates this relationship such that the effect is stronger for men than for women. Clarity on creativity evaluation standards subsequently enhances creative self-efficacy, which, in turn, boosts employee creativity. Across four studies (a two-wave online study, a two-wave multisource field study, and two online experiments), we found evidence supporting our theory. This research extends our understanding of when, how, and why the perceived tightness of an organization’s culture influences employee creativity. Theoretical and practical implications are discussed. Funding: This research was supported by the Nanyang Technological University Start-Up Grant awarded to G. J. H. Lim and the Singapore Ministry of Education (MOE) Academic Research Fund (AcRF) Tier 2 [Grant T2EP40120-0001] awarded to R. Y. J. Chua. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.17571 .
title_cn: 通过清晰度的视角：感知的组织紧密性提升了男性的创造力，但对女性则没有这种效果
abstract_cn: 在文化紧密度文献中，一个普遍的观点是文化紧密度倾向于对创造力产生负面影响。然而，一些研究结果表明这种关系并非完全负面，应该考虑更为细致的视角。基于社会信息处理（SIP）理论和社会角色理论，我们建立了理论，探讨组织文化紧密度的感知如何在某些员工中提高创造力，而在其他员工中则没有这种效果。具体而言，我们提出感知的组织紧密度——即个体对组织强烈规范和偏差惩罚的感知程度——增加了对创造力评估标准的明确性，而性别在这段关系中起到调节作用，男性的影响更为显著。创造力评估标准的明确性随后增强了创造性自我效能感，进而提升了员工的创造力。在四项研究中（包括一项两波次在线研究、一项两波次多源实地研究，以及两项在线实验），我们发现了支持我们理论的证据。这项研究拓展了对组织文化感知紧密度何时、如何以及为什么影响员工创造力的理解。我们讨论了理论和实践的启示。资金支持：本研究得到南洋理工大学颁发给G. J. H. Lim的启动基金和新加坡教育部（MOE）学术研究基金（AcRF）第2级资金[Grant T2EP40120-0001]的支持，颁发给R. Y. J. Chua。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.17571 上获取。

title: The Resource Insecurity Mindset: Why CEOs from Lower-Class Origins Are Both Greedier and More Generous
abstract: Understanding how executives’ backgrounds influence corporate behavior is essential for organizational science and society. Previous research offers conflicting predictions about whether childhood resource scarcity leads to self-focused or prosocial tendencies, with evolutionary theories predicting greed and social psychology theories pointing to generosity. This contradiction is especially relevant for chief executive officers (CEOs), whose decisions significantly impact stakeholders. Here, we show that CEOs from lower social class origins engage in both more greedy behaviors (e.g., pursuing excessive compensation) and more prosocial behaviors (e.g., internal corporate social responsibility) than their higher-class counterparts. Using survey data from 135 S&P 1500 CEOs, we demonstrate that both behaviors stem from the same psychological mechanism: a resource insecurity mindset formed during childhood. This mindset makes lower-class origin CEOs simultaneously vigilant about personal resource accumulation and compassionate toward others facing constraints. We examine how CEO job insecurity and overconfidence influence these effects. Through experiments, coded CEO interviews, and executive qualitative interviews, we find broad support for our theory. These findings resolve a significant theoretical contradiction by showing that self-serving and other-serving behaviors can coexist and share common roots. Understanding these dual behavioral tendencies has important implications for corporate governance, executive selection, and organizational inequality.
title_cn: 资源不安全心态：为什么来自低阶层背景的首席执行官既更贪婪又更慷慨
abstract_cn: 了解高管背景如何影响企业行为对于组织科学和社会至关重要。以往研究对儿童时期资源匮乏是否导致自我中心或利他倾向提供了相互矛盾的预测：进化理论预测贪婪，而社会心理学理论则指出慷慨。这种矛盾在首席执行官（CEO）身上尤为突出，因为他们的决策对利益相关者有着显著影响。在此，我们显示来自低社会阶层背景的CEO在行为上既表现出更强的贪婪行为（例如，追求过高的薪酬），也表现出更强的利他行为（例如，内部企业社会责任），与高阶层同行相比。通过对135位标准普尔1500指数的CEO进行调查数据分析，我们证明这两种行为源于相同的心理机制：儿童时期形成的资源不安全感心态。这种心态使得来自低阶层背景的CEO在个人资源积累上保持警觉，同时对面临困境的他人充满同情。我们探讨了CEO工作不安全感和过度自信如何影响这些作用。通过实验研究、编码的CEO访谈和高管定性访谈，我们发现广泛支持我们的理论。这些发现通过表明自利和利他行为可以共存并共享共同根源，解决了一个重大的理论矛盾。理解这两种行为倾向对于公司治理、高管选拔和组织不平等具有重要的意义。

title: Privacy-Preserving Data Fusion
abstract: This paper proposes a generative methodology enabling companies to combine data sets with strong privacy guarantees and near-optimal performance in customer analytics.
title_cn: 隐私保护的数据融合
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种生成性方法，使公司能够将具有强隐私保障的数据集结合起来，从而在客户分析中实现接近最优的性能。

title: Replication Studies in Entrepreneurship: Mapping Current Efforts and Identifying Future Opportunities
abstract: Although scholars recognize the importance of replication for advancing scientific progress, little is known about the extent to which replication efforts have informed entrepreneurship research. This research brief systematically reviews the body of replication studies in the field, examining which replication designs have been employed and where future efforts could be directed. We find that conceptual extension and empirical generalization replication designs dominate, while checking of analysis and exact replications remain rare. We advocate for greater use of diverse replication designs, highlight promising avenues for future replication efforts, and propose specific practices to strengthen transparency, documentation, and reproducibility.
title_cn: 创业领域的复制研究：当前努力的梳理与未来机会的识别
abstract_cn: 虽然学者们认识到复制在推动科学进步中的重要性，但对于复制工作在创业研究中的影响程度知之甚少。本研究简报系统性地回顾了该领域的复制研究，考察了采用了哪些复制设计以及未来的努力可以指向何处。我们发现，概念扩展和经验概括的复制设计占主导地位，而分析检查和精确复制仍然较为稀缺。我们建议更广泛地采用多样化的复制设计，强调了未来复制工作的有希望的方向，并提出了具体做法，以增强透明度、文档记录和可重复性。

title: Is My Boss Gaslighting Me? Uncovering the Nomological Network of Gaslighting In Leader-Employee Relationships
abstract: The term gaslighting is widely used today to describe deliberate attempts to undermine a person’s sense of reality. Although predominantly studied in romantic relationships, research suggests that gaslighting can occur in any context where a power imbalance exists. In this research, we provide a theoretical framework for understanding gaslighting in the workplace, highlighting its unique position within the workplace mistreatment literature. Next, focusing on the leader-employee dyad, we differentiate between the gaslighting tactics leaders employ (leader gaslighting) and target employees’ psychological experience of being gaslit (employee-experienced gaslighting). We also examine whether the consequences of leader gaslighting are conditional on the (in)formal power imbalance between the employee and leader. To test our conceptual model, we first develop separate measures of leader gaslighting tactics and employee-experienced gaslighting and accumulate construct validity evidence across multiple studies (Studies 1a-c, 3). Notably, we find consistent evidence of a bi-factor structure with a “global” destructive leadership factor, and “specific” leader gaslighting, abusive supervision, and social undermining factors. In Study 2, we show that leader gaslighting is positively associated with employee-experienced gaslighting, which in turn adversely impacts self-focused (organizational-based self-esteem and turnover intentions), performance-focused (task performance and workplace deviance), and leader-focused (impression management and affective commitment) outcomes. In Study 4, we show that the direct and indirect negative effects of leader gaslighting are weaker for employees who have relatively greater (versus less) informal (referent and expert) power than their leaders. We conclude with theoretical and practical implications of gaslighting in organizations.
title_cn: 我的老板是在对我进行煤气灯效应吗？揭示领导与员工关系中的煤气灯效应的名义网络
abstract_cn: “煤气灯效应”这一术语如今广泛应用于形容明确企图削弱个人现实感的行为。尽管主要在浪漫关系中进行研究，研究表明煤气灯效应可以发生在任何存在权力不平衡的情境中。在本研究中，我们提供了一个理论框架，以理解职场中的煤气灯效应，强调其在职场不当行为文献中的独特地位。接着，聚焦于领导与员工之间的双边关系，我们区分了领导者所采用的煤气灯策略（领导煤气灯效应）与目标员工经历的被煤气灯效应影响的心理体验（员工体验的煤气灯效应）。我们还考察了领导煤气灯效应的后果是否依赖于员工与领导之间的（非）正式权力不平衡。为了测试我们的概念模型，我们首先分别开发了领导煤气灯策略和员工体验的煤气灯效应的测量工具，并在多项研究中积累了构建有效性证据（研究1a-c，3）。值得注意的是，我们发现了一致的双因素结构证据，其中包括一个“全球性”的破坏性领导因素，以及“特定”的领导煤气灯效应、虐待性监督和社会削弱因素。在研究2中，我们展示了领导煤气灯效应与员工体验的煤气灯效应之间的正相关关系，而后者又对以自我为中心的（组织基础的自尊与离职意图）、以绩效为中心的（任务绩效与职场越轨行为）以及以领导为中心的（形象管理与情感承诺）结果产生负面影响。在研究4中，我们表明，领导煤气灯效应的直接和间接负面影响对于那些相较于领导拥有相对更大（而非更少）非正式（参照和专家）权力的员工来说较弱。最后，我们总结了职场中煤气灯效应的理论与实践意义。

title: EXPRESS: Empowering Supply Chain Energy Efficiency: Merits and Pitfalls of Buyer Collaboration
abstract: Government environmental agencies are increasingly partnering with large, foreign corporate buyers in the energy efficiency improvement process to encourage investments at small manufacturers that can enhance the value of local manufacturing. Using a stylized supply chain model, we show that while buyer collaboration enhances energy efficiency investments, its impact on the value of local manufacturing varies. Specifically, buyer collaboration improves the value of local manufacturing only when both the cost of the buyer’s outside sourcing option and the environmental impact of energy are either high or low. In cases where one factor is high and the other is low, buyer collaboration reduces the value of local manufacturing. Moreover, we find that the higher penetration of renewable sources in the energy mix can either amplify or mitigate the beneficial impact of buyer collaboration. When the manufacturer is more competitive in the global market, a greener energy mix can negate the beneficial impacts of buyer collaboration on the value of local manufacturing. Our study provides valuable insights for designing environmental initiatives and policies to boost both energy efficiency and local manufacturing, underscoring the importance of supply chain interactions in synchronizing climate change policies.
title_cn: EXPRESS：提升供应链能源效率：买方合作的优点与缺陷
abstract_cn: 政府环保机构越来越多地与大型外资企业合作，促进能源效率改进，旨在鼓励对小型制造商的投资，从而提升当地制造业的价值。通过一个简化的供应链模型，我们表明，尽管买方合作可以增强能源效率投资，但其对当地制造业价值的影响却有所不同。具体而言，只有在买方的外部采购选项成本与能源的环境影响要么都高，要么都低时，买方合作才会提升当地制造业的价值。而在一种因素高而另一种因素低的情况下，买方合作则会降低当地制造业的价值。此外，我们发现可再生能源在能源结构中的渗透率越高，可能会放大或减弱买方合作的有益影响。当制造商在全球市场竞争力较强时，更加环保的能源结构可能会抵消买方合作对当地制造业价值的有利影响。本研究为设计环保举措和政策以提升能源效率及当地制造业提供了宝贵的见解，强调了供应链互动在同步气候变化政策中的重要性。

title: EXPRESS: The Negative Spillover Effect of Electronic Prescribing for Controlled Substances on the Opioid Epidemic
abstract: The opioid epidemic poses widespread societal challenges. In response, electronic prescribing for controlled substances (EPCS), which requires prescribers to use the e-prescribing system, has begun attracting attention to combat the opioid epidemic by helping prescribers detect doctor shoppers and prevent forged prescriptions. However, a concern is that limited access to opioids after EPCS mandates may cause drug users to cross borders and travel to other areas without EPCS. Grounded in the tension on the efficacy of EPCS, this study aims to assess the impact of EPCS on the opioid dispensing rate. Leveraging a US county-level data set from 2010 to 2020 and employing a quasi-experiment setup with matching, we find that counties without an EPCS mandate but adjacent to a state with an EPCS mandate experience an increase in opioid dispensing rates. Specifically, a neighboring-state EPCS mandate is associated with a 7.56% increase in the opioid dispensing rate in an adjacent county on average. The findings reveal that the negative spillover effect spreads deeper in areas with lenient illicit drug controls, in urban regions, and in areas with high poverty levels. Moreover, we estimate the overall efficacy of EPCS mandates by combining both the positive direct effect and the negative spillover effect of EPCS. We discuss theoretical and policy insights for the effective operation of EPCS mandates.
title_cn: 电子处方对管制物质的负面溢出效应及其对阿片类药物流行病的影响
abstract_cn: 阿片类药物危机带来了广泛的社会挑战。针对这一问题，控制物质的电子处方（EPCS）开始引起关注，这要求开处方的医生使用电子处方系统，以帮助识别“医生购物者”并防止伪造处方，从而应对阿片类药物危机。然而，一个令人担忧的问题是，在实施EPCS后，有限的阿片类药物获取可能导致药物使用者跨越州界，前往其他没有EPCS的地区。基于对EPCS有效性争论的研究，本研究旨在评估EPCS对阿片类药物发放率的影响。我们利用2010年至2020年的美国县级数据集，并采用匹配的准实验设置，发现没有EPCS强制要求但邻近有EPCS强制要求的州的县，阿片类药物发放率有所上升。具体来说，邻州实施EPCS强制要求与相邻县的阿片类药物发放率平均增加7.56%相关联。研究结果揭示，消极溢出效应在药物管控宽松的地区、城市区域及贫困水平高的地区表现得更为明显。此外，我们通过结合EPCS的正向直接效应和负向溢出效应，估计了EPCS强制要求的整体有效性。我们讨论了有关EPCS强制要求有效运作的理论和政策启示。

title: EXPRESS: Turbocharging the Competitor: Unintended Spillovers of Personnel On-road Insurance Implementation in Ride-sourcing Industry
abstract: In response to social protests, transportation network companies introduced incentive programs to improve hourly utilization and retain drivers. While such initiatives assume increased driver commitment, their impact on labor allocation across competing gig economy platforms remains unexplored. This study uses a quasi-experimental design and analyzes 20 weeks of data comprising over 75 million trips to examine spill-over effects of an East Asian platform’s comprehensive personnel on-road insurance (PI) policy on a competitor platform. The research uncovers significant changes in labor allocation patterns by identifying multi-homing and dedicated drivers through license plate matches. A difference-in-difference analysis provides evidence of cross-platform spillovers of PI: multi-homing drivers allocated 16.4% more hours to food delivery and reduced ride-hailing hours by 10.69% on the competitor platform, while dedicated drivers reduced food-delivery hours by 34.6% but added 12.81% more ride-hailing hours. These shifts in hours corresponded to changes in earnings. To explore the mechanisms of such spill-over effects, the study observes multi-homing drivers’ labor allocation patterns on the implementing platform: Multi-homing drivers shifted toward food delivery, increasing hours by 17.3% and decreasing ride-hailing hours by 11.2% on the platform. The study further links such cross-platform shifts in drivers’ labor allocation by estimating job aggregation among multi-homing drivers and provides multiple robustness analyses to validate these effects. The study highlights the interconnectedness of gig economy stakeholders by empirically linking policy changes on one platform to cross-platform labor dynamics. Practical insights are provided on how the PI policy influenced platform utilization, driver behavior, and productivity, emphasizing that gig-economy platforms operate within a highly interdependent ecosystem rather than in isolation.
title_cn: EXPRESS: 给竞争对手加速：人员道路保险实施在网约车行业的意外溢出效应
abstract_cn: 针对社会抗议活动，交通网络公司推出了激励计划，以提高小时利用率并留住司机。尽管此类举措假设会增强司机的承诺，但它们对竞争性零工经济平台之间的劳动分配影响尚未得到探索。本研究采用准实验设计，分析了为期20周的超过7500万次出行的数据，以检验一个东亚平台全面人员道路保险（PI）政策对竞争平台的溢出效应。研究通过车牌匹配识别多主业和专职司机，揭示了劳动分配模式的显著变化。差异中的差异分析提供了PI跨平台溢出的证据：多主业司机在竞争平台上将16.4%的时间分配给食品配送，同时减少了10.69%的打车时长，而专职司机则减少了34.6%的食品配送时长，但增加了12.81%的打车时长。这些时间的变化与收入变化相对应。为了探讨这种溢出效应的机制，研究观察了实施平台上多主业司机的劳动分配模式：多主业司机向食品配送移动，食品配送时长增加了17.3%，而打车时长减少了11.2%。该研究进一步通过估算多主业司机之间的工作聚合，连接了这种平台间司机劳动分配的转变，并提供了多项稳健性分析以验证这些效应。研究强调了零工经济利益相关者之间的互联性，通过实证链接一个平台上政策变化与跨平台劳动动态。提供了关于PI政策如何影响平台利用、司机行为和生产力的实际见解，强调零工经济平台在高度相互依赖的生态系统中运作，而非孤立存在。

title: EXPRESS: Why Full Refunds Prevail: A Product Fit Perspective
abstract: This paper studies how an online seller designs a menu of return contracts to manage consumer heterogeneity arising from product misfit risk. In the model, informed consumers know the product fits, whereas uninformed consumers face uncertainty about fit. We show that when only misfit risk exists, a single full-refund contract can implement the optimal menu. The return price insures consumers against misfit, and the selling price extracts full surplus. This finding aligns with the widespread adoption of lenient return policies and demonstrates that uniform contracts can emerge endogenously from incentive compatibility rather than as ad hoc assumptions. Introducing quality risk—an additional source of uncertainty in the valuation of fit products—fundamentally changes this outcome. The seller then shifts from full to partial refunds. Under high quality risk, the optimal menu becomes differentiated: a low-price, no-frills option for informed consumers and a high-price, insurance-heavy option for uninformed consumers. To induce self-selection, the seller distorts the return price upward for uninformed consumers to strengthen the insurance effect, trading off allocative efficiency for screening. Interestingly, when quality risk becomes extreme, refunds not only mitigate information rents but also enhance social surplus by preventing consumers from retaining low-quality products. Extensions incorporating misfit valuation, seller-side costs, and return hassle costs show that the uniform contract remains robust when only misfit risk is present, rationalizing diverse return policy practices in online markets.
title_cn: 表达：为何全额退款占主导地位：一种产品适配的视角
abstract_cn: 本文研究了一位在线卖家如何设计一系列退货合同，以管理因产品不匹配风险带来的消费者异质性。在模型中，知情消费者了解产品的适配情况，而不知情消费者则面临适配的不确定性。我们表明，当仅存在不匹配风险时，一份全额退款合同可以实现最佳菜单。退货价格为消费者提供了对不匹配的保障，而销售价格则能充分提取消费剩余。这一发现与宽松的退货政策的广泛采用相一致，并且表明均匀合同可以内生地从激励相容性中产生，而不是作为臆测假设。引入质量风险——适配产品评估中的另一种不确定性来源——根本改变了这一结果。此时，卖家将退货政策从全额退款转变为部分退款。在高质量风险下，最佳菜单变得差异化：为知情消费者提供低价、简单的选项，为不知情消费者提供高价、保险性强的选项。为了促使自我选择，卖家提高了不知情消费者的退货价格，以增强保险效应，权衡配置效率与筛选之间的关系。有趣的是，当质量风险极端时，退款不仅缓解了信息租金，还通过防止消费者保留低质量产品来提高社会剩余。考虑到不匹配估值、卖方成本和退货麻烦成本的扩展表明，当仅存在不匹配风险时，均匀合同依然是稳健的，从而合理化了在线市场中多样化的退货政策实践。

title: Dinosaurs of the organizational landscape facing technological disruption: Liability of aging and exaptation in monastic orders
abstract: Some organizations remain adaptable across centuries while others struggle to evolve and ultimately fade into irrelevance. Only a handful of theories can explain this extraordinary adaptability. We test two competing theoretical perspectives in imprinting research: Liability of aging suggests that older organizations are at greater risk of disruption by modern technologies, but older organizations can also repurpose their imprinted structures and processes to their advantage in a process termed exaptation. To resolve this contradiction, we analyze Catholic religious orders and their monasteries. They represent the oldest extant organizations, were founded in various historical eras, and are facing contemporary challenges posed by digitalization. Our quantitative and qualitative findings indicate that the orders with historically decentralized imprints show higher adaptability in embracing digital innovation. Our results confirm that long-term adaptability is increased in organizations whose imprinted decentralized logics provide a propensity for exaptation. However, these long-standing organizations are also more wary of the negative effects of digital disruption and appear to shield their organizational core more strongly. We contribute to imprinting research by shedding light on the intricate relationship between historically imprinted organizational logics and contemporary organizational practice and highlight the often-underappreciated importance of exaptation for long-term adaptability. • Imprinting theory implies that aging organizations are less able to react to changes. • However, structures adapted for initial conditions may be repurposed. • We test both these assumptions in the organizational logics of Catholic orders. • Catholic orders were founded in diverse eras and face challenges with digitalization. • Historically decentralized organizational logics adapt best to digital innovation.
title_cn: 面对技术颠覆的组织生态中的恐龙：在修道院秩序中老化的负担与再适应性
abstract_cn: 有些组织在几个世纪中保持适应性，而其他组织则在演变过程中努力挣扎，最终沦为无关紧要。只有少数理论能够解释这种非凡的适应性。我们测试了印记研究中的两种相互竞争的理论视角：老化负担理论认为，年长的组织在面对现代技术时更易受到干扰，但年长组织也可以将其印记结构和流程重新利用以获得优势，这一过程称为外适应。为了调和这一矛盾，我们分析了天主教修道院及其修道团体。这些组织是现存最古老的组织，成立于不同的历史时代，并面临数字化带来的当代挑战。我们的定量和定性研究结果表明，具有历史上分散印记的修道团体在接受数字创新方面表现出更高的适应性。我们的结果证实，长期适应性在那些印记的分散逻辑能够促进外适应的组织中得到了提高。然而，这些历史悠久的组织也对数字干扰的负面影响更加警惕，并似乎更强烈地保护其组织核心。我们通过揭示历史印记的组织逻辑与当代组织实践之间复杂的关系，为印记研究做出了贡献，并强调外适应对长期适应性的重要性，这一重要性往往被低估。 • 印记理论意味着老化的组织对变化的反应能力较差。 • 然而，为初始条件而适应的结构可能被重新利用。 • 我们在天主教修道团体的组织逻辑中测试这两种假设。 • 天主教修道团体成立于不同的时代，并面临数字化的挑战。 • 历史上分散的组织逻辑更能适应数字创新。

title: Games on Multiplex Networks
abstract: We develop a simple multilayer network model in which agents allocate effort across layers with heterogeneous structures, subject to an aggregate effort constraint. Incentives are shaped by agents’ network positions within each layer, and equilibrium behavior reflects both within- and cross-layer interactions. We analyze how shocks propagate through the network and characterize optimal targeting interventions. Our results show that effective policy design must account for effort allocation across layers. We also demonstrate that predictions from monolayer models can diverge sharply from those of multilayer models, underscoring the importance of accounting for network complexity in both empirical and policy analyses. (JEL C70, D78, D82, D85, H41, Z13)
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 多重网络上的博弈
abstract_cn: 我们开发了一个简单的多层网络模型，其中代理人根据异质结构在各层之间分配努力，受到整体努力约束的限制。激励机制由代理人在每一层中的网络位置形塑，均衡行为反映了层内和层间的相互作用。我们分析了冲击如何在网络中传播，并描述了最优的针对性干预措施。我们的研究结果表明，有效的政策设计必须考虑到不同层之间的努力分配。我们还展示了单层模型的预测可能与多层模型的预测显著偏离，这强调了在实证分析和政策分析中考虑网络复杂性的重要性。（JEL C70, D78, D82, D85, H41, Z13）

title: Similarity of Information and Collective Action
abstract: We study a canonical collective action game with incomplete information. Individuals attempt to coordinate to achieve a shared goal, while also facing a temptation to free-ride. More similar information can help them coordinate, but it can also exacerbate free-riding. Our main result shows that more similar information facilitates (impedes) achieving the common goal when it is sufficiently challenging (easy). We apply this insight to show why less powerful authoritarian governments may face larger protests if they restrict press freedom, when committee diversity is beneficial in costly voting, and when a more diverse community contributes more to public good provision. (JEL C71, D71, D72, D81, D82, D83, H41)
title_cn: 信息的相似性与集体行动
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一个具有不完全信息的经典集体行动游戏。个体试图协调以实现共同目标，同时也面临搭便车的诱惑。更相似的信息可以帮助他们协调，但也可能加剧搭便车现象。我们的主要结果表明，当共同目标足够具有挑战性（简单）时，更相似的信息有助于（妨碍）实现这一目标。我们运用这一见解来说明，如果较弱的威权政府限制新闻自由，它们可能面临更大规模的抗议，当委员会多样性在有成本的投票中具有好处时，以及当更具多样性的社区在公共产品提供上贡献更多时的情形。（JEL C71, D71, D72, D81, D82, D83, H41）

title: Market Power and Capital Constraints
abstract: We explore how traders’ equity capitalization influences asset prices in a framework that accounts for market power. In our model, traders with capital constraints engage in transactions in an imperfectly competitive market. We demonstrate that looser capital constraints elevate both asset prices and price impact, the latter diminishing market liquidity. Using Canadian Treasury auction data, we illustrate how to apply our model to quantify these effects. We estimate the shadow costs of capital constraints by leveraging a temporary policy exemption during 2020–2021. We show that while these constraints are only infrequently binding, their relative impact when activated can be sizable. (JEL E63, G12, G14, G23, G41, L13)
title_cn: 市场势力与资本约束
abstract_cn: 我们探讨了交易者的股本资本化如何在考虑市场力量的框架中影响资产价格。在我们的模型中，受资本约束的交易者在一个不完全竞争的市场中进行交易。我们证明了资本约束放松会同时提高资产价格和价格影响，后者又会减少市场流动性。通过使用加拿大国债拍卖的数据，我们展示了如何应用我们的模型来量化这些效应。我们利用2020-2021年期间的一项临时政策豁免来估计资本约束的隐性成本。我们显示，尽管这些约束仅在少数情况下会形成约束，但一旦生效，其相对影响可能是相当大的。（JEL E63，G12，G14，G23，G41，L13）

title: Negative Control Falsification Tests for Instrumental Variable Designs
abstract: The validity of instrumental variable (IV) designs is typically tested using two types of falsification tests. We characterize these tests as conditional independence tests between negative control variables—proxies for unobserved variables posing a threat to the identification—and the IV or the outcome. We describe the conditions variables must satisfy in order to serve as negative controls. We show these falsification tests examine not only independence and the exclusion restriction but also functional form assumptions. Our analysis reveals conventional applications of these tests may flag problems even in valid IV designs. We offer implementation guidance to address these issues. (JEL C12, C18, C26, C52)
title_cn: 工具变量设计的负控制虚假检验测试
abstract_cn: 工具变量（IV）设计的有效性通常通过两种类型的虚假检验进行测试。我们将这些测试归类为负面控制变量之间的条件独立性测试——这些变量是无法观察的变量的代理，构成了识别的威胁——与IV或结果之间的关系。我们描述了作为负面控制所需满足的条件。我们展示了这些虚假检验不仅检查独立性和排除限制，还考察了功能形式假设。我们的分析显示，传统的测试应用可能在有效的IV设计中也会出现问题。我们提供了实施指导来解决这些问题。（JEL C12, C18, C26, C52）

title: Making Bricks from Straw: Resources and Productivity in Health Care
abstract: Why do health facilities in developing countries do so poorly? This paper examines the role of financial constraints. I describe an experiment in which we surprised health workers in randomly selected public health clinics in Nigeria with a N600,000 grant paid out in installments over one year. Its administration was left entirely to health workers. I show that the award led to large productivity gains. Using expenditure data combined with novel textual data I provide an explanation for these effects. I show that the award increased investments in physical and human capital, led to lower prices for patients and inspired health workers to do better.
title_cn: 用稻草制造砖块：医疗保健中的资源与生产力
abstract_cn: 为什么发展中国家的医疗设施表现如此不佳？本文探讨了财务限制的作用。我描述了一项实验，我们在尼日利亚随机选取的公共卫生诊所向卫生工作者提供了一项分期支付的60万奈拉的资助。资助的管理完全由卫生工作者自行负责。研究表明，这一资助带来了显著的生产力提升。通过将支出数据与新颖的文本数据相结合，我为这些效果提供了解释。我发现该资助增加了对物质和人力资本的投资，降低了患者的费用，并激励卫生工作者表现得更好。

title: Spillovers in State Capacity Building: Evidence from the Digitization of Land Records in Pakistan
abstract: Digitization reforms have been hailed as an effective way of strengthening state capacity. However, digitization can also fundamentally reshape the organization of bureaucracies. Using a unique administrative dataset on agricultural taxation and surveys of local bureaucrats from Punjab, Pakistan, we show that digitization reforms can have unintended consequences for state capacity. We exploit the staggered rollout of the digitization of land records in Punjab to show that digitization had a negative effect on tax collection. The fall in taxes was not due to a decrease in the tax base. Instead, digitization affected the bureaucrats’ capacity to collect taxes. (JEL D73, H11, H71, O12, O17)
title_cn: 国家能力建设中的溢出效应：来自巴基斯坦土地记录数字化的证据
abstract_cn: 数字化改革被认为是加强国家能力的有效方式。然而，数字化也可能从根本上重塑官僚机构的组织。通过使用来自巴基斯坦旁遮普地区的独特农业税收行政数据集和地方官僚的调查，我们展示了数字化改革可能对国家能力产生意想不到的影响。我们利用旁遮普地区土地记录数字化的逐步展开，表明数字化对税收征集产生了负面影响。税收的下降并非由于税基的减少。相反，数字化影响了官僚征收税款的能力。(JEL D73, H11, H71, O12, O17)

title: A Long and a Short Leg Make for a Wobbly Equilibrium
abstract: We provide a model to explain how the interaction between the spot and lending markets for stocks can lead to abrupt changes in short selling activity. Furthermore, rational short sellers may choose to abandon the market even as mispricing widens. We document empirically that the dynamics of short selling are fat tailed and subject to abrupt changes, especially for the stocks that the model identifies as susceptible to such dynamics. (JEL G11, G12, G14, G41)
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 长腿与短腿造成不稳定的平衡
abstract_cn: 我们提供了一个模型，解释了股票现货市场与借贷市场之间的互动如何导致短线卖空活动的突然变化。此外，理性的卖空者可能会选择在价格错误加大时退出市场。我们通过实证研究记录显示，卖空活动的动态具有厚尾特征，并且容易发生突然变化，特别是对于模型识别出的易受这种动态影响的股票。 (JEL G11, G12, G14, G41)

title: Abundance from Abroad: Migrant Income and Long-Run Economic Development
abstract: We study how international migrant income prospects affect long-run development in origin areas. We leverage the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis exchange rate shocks in a shift-share identification strategy across Philippine provinces. Initial migrant income shocks are magnified six-fold over time, increasing domestic income, education levels, migrant skills, and high-skilled migration. Remarkably, 74.9 percent of long-run income gains come from domestic rather than migrant income. Trade driven impacts of exchange rate shocks are orthogonal to effects via migrant income. A structural model reveals that 19.7 percent of long-run income gains stem from educational investments. International migration fosters broad economic development in origin communities. (JEL F22, F31, G01, J24, J82, O15, O16)
title_cn: 来自国外的富裕：移民收入与长期经济发展
abstract_cn: 我们研究国际移民收入前景如何影响原籍地区的长期发展。我们利用1997年亚洲金融危机的汇率冲击，采用跨菲律宾省份的转移份额识别策略。最初的移民收入冲击随着时间的推移扩大了六倍，提升了国内收入、教育水平、移民技能以及高技能移民比例。值得注意的是，74.9%的长期收入增加来源于国内收入，而非移民收入。汇率冲击带来的贸易驱动影响与移民收入的影响是正交的。结构模型显示，19.7%的长期收入增益源于教育投资。国际移民促进了原籍社区的广泛经济发展。（JEL F22, F31, G01, J24, J82, O15, O16）

title: Robust Misspecified Models
abstract: This paper studies which misspecified models are likely to persist when decision-makers compare them with competing models. The main result characterizes such models based on two features that can be derived from primitives: The model’s asymptotic accuracy in predicting the equilibrium distribution of observed outcomes and the “tightness” of the prior around such equilibria. Misspecified models can be robust, persisting against any arbitrary competing model—including the true model—despite decision-makers observing an infinite amount of data. Moreover, simple misspecified models equipped with entrenched priors can be more robust than complex correctly specified models. (JEL C11, C52, D11, L82)
title_cn: 稳健的错设模型
abstract_cn: 本文研究了在决策者将某些不规范模型与竞争模型进行比较时，哪些不规范模型可能会持续存在。主要结果基于两个可以从基本原理推导出的特征来表征这些模型：模型在预测观察结果的均衡分布方面的渐近准确性，以及围绕这些均衡的先验的“紧凑性”。不规范模型可以是稳健的，尽管决策者观察到了无限量的数据，但仍然能够抵御任何任意的竞争模型，包括真实模型。此外，配备有根深蒂固的先验的简单不规范模型可能比复杂的正确规范模型更加稳健。（JEL C11, C52, D11, L82）

title: Real Credit Cycles
abstract: We embed diagnostic expectations in a workhorse neoclassical model with heterogeneous firms and risky debt. A realistic degree of overreaction estimated from US firms’ earnings forecasts generates realistic credit cycles. Good times produce economic and financial fragility, predicting future disappointment of expectations, low bond returns, and investment declines. To generate the size of spread increases observed during 2007–2009, the model requires only moderate negative shocks. Diagnostic expectations offer a realistic, parsimonious way to produce financial reversals in business cycle models. (JEL D84, E13, E22, E32, E44, G12, G32)
topics: Italy: Economic History and Contemporary Issues
title_cn: 真实信用周期
abstract_cn: 我们在一个包含异质企业和高风险债务的经典新古典模型中嵌入了诊断预期。根据美国公司收益预测估算的现实程度的过度反应生成了逼真的信用周期。繁荣时期会带来经济和金融脆弱性，预测未来的预期失望、低债券收益和投资下降。为了产生2007年至2009年期间观察到的利差扩大幅度，该模型仅需适度的负冲击。诊断预期为商业周期模型中的金融逆转提供了一种现实且简洁的方法。(JEL D84, E13, E22, E32, E44, G12, G32)

title: Risk Minimization as a Framework for Online Allocation in Display Advertising
abstract: “Risk Minimization as a Framework for Online Allocation in Display Advertising,” by Davood Shamsi, Robert Luenberger, and Yinyu Ye, revisits a foundational approach to real-time resource allocation. The study draws a conceptual bridge between earlier risk minimization models and more recent dual mirror descent methods, two influential paradigms in online optimization. Although both frameworks generate similar exponential price update rules, this research shows they arise from distinct modeling perspectives: one grounded in convex risk minimization and the other in Bregman divergence and mirror descent. By framing dual updates through a risk-aware lens, the authors recover widely used allocation strategies—including greedy, linear, and multiplicative weights—as special cases. The paper broadens the theoretical toolkit for online resource allocation and highlights how incorporating uncertainty directly into the optimization framework can yield flexible, interpretable, and robust algorithms across stochastic and adversarial settings.
title_cn: 风险最小化作为在线展示广告投放的框架
abstract_cn: 《风险最小化作为展示广告在线分配的框架》，作者为达沃德·沙姆西、罗伯特·吕恩伯格和叶银宇，重新审视了实时资源分配的基础方法。该研究在早期风险最小化模型与最近的双重镜像下降方法之间架起了概念桥梁，这两种方法都是在线优化中的重要范式。尽管这两种框架生成了类似的指数价格更新规则，但研究表明它们源于不同的建模视角：一个基于凸风险最小化，另一个基于布雷格曼散度和镜像下降。通过风险感知的视角来框定双重更新，作者恢复了广泛使用的分配策略——包括贪婪策略、线性权重和乘法权重——作为特殊情况。该论文扩展了在线资源分配的理论工具箱，并强调了将不确定性直接纳入优化框架如何在随机和对抗环境中产生灵活、可解释和稳健的算法。

title: Dynamic Programming in Ordered Vector Space
abstract: Dynamic Programming in Ordered Vector Space
title_cn: 有序向量空间中的动态规划
abstract_cn: 有序向量空间中的动态规划

title: Erratum to Online Allocation and Pricing: Constant Regret via Bellman Inequalities
abstract: Theorem 3 of the paper Online Allocation and Pricing: Constant Regret via Bellman Inequalities (Operations Research 69(3):821–840) states a constant regret result for a menu-pricing problem. In this erratum, the authors correct the theorem’s proof.
title_cn: 《在线分配与定价的更正：通过贝尔曼不等式实现恒定遗憾》
abstract_cn: 论文《在线分配与定价：通过贝尔曼不等式实现恒定后悔》（运营研究 69(3):821–840）的定理3给出了菜单定价问题的恒定后悔结果。在此更正中，作者修正了该定理的证明。

title: Assortment and Price Optimization Under a Multiattribute (Contextual) Choice Model
abstract: Context-Dependent Choice and Retail Decisions Traditional assortment models assume that consumers evaluate products independently of the alternatives available (i.e., the “context”). In “Assortment and Price Optimization Under a Multiattribute (Contextual) Choice Model,” the authors challenge this assumption by analyzing assortment and pricing decisions under a context-dependent choice framework known as the contextual concavity (CC) model. The CC model incorporates reference dependence across multiple attributes, such as price and quality, and captures well-documented context effects, including compromise and decoy effects. The study makes several contributions. It characterizes the structure of optimal assortments under multiattribute loss aversion, develops a polynomial-size mixed-integer linear programming formulation for solving the general problem, and analyzes the joint assortment and pricing decision. Numerical experiments show that ignoring context effects, by relying on standard context-independent models such as the multinomial logit, can lead to substantial profit losses, with gaps ranging from 3% to 63%. These findings highlight the strategic importance of incorporating contextual effects into retail decisions.
title_cn: 多属性（情境）选择模型下的品类和价格优化
abstract_cn:
情境依赖选择与零售决策

传统的产品组合模型假设消费者在评估产品时独立于可用替代品（即“情境”）。在《多属性（情境）选择模型下的组合与价格优化》一文中，作者对这一假设提出挑战，通过分析在被称为情境凹性（CC）模型下的组合与定价决策。CC模型融合了多个属性（如价格和质量）之间的参考依赖性，并有效捕捉了经充分记录的情境效应，包括妥协效应和诱饵效应。研究作出了多项贡献。它描述了在多属性损失厌恶下最优组合的结构，开发了用于解决一般问题的多项式规模混合整数线性编程模型，并分析了组合与定价的联合决策。数值实验表明，忽视情境效应，依赖标准的独立情境模型（如多项式逻辑回归），可能导致相当大的利润损失，差距介于3%到63%之间。这些发现突显了将情境效应纳入零售决策中的战略重要性。

title: Forget Me If You Can: Auditing User Data Revocation in Recommendation Systems
abstract: Research Spotlight: Auditing the “Right to Be Forgotten” in AI Recommender Systems Personalized recommendation systems power today’s e-commerce and streaming platforms, but they also raise regulatory concerns about user privacy. Under regulations such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), individuals have the “right to be forgotten.” Whereas companies can remove user records from databases, it remains unclear whether trained AI models truly forget the behavioral patterns or preferences learned from that data. If not, platforms may continue profiling users even after deletion requests. This study introduces RecAudit, a practical auditing tool that tests whether a recommender system has genuinely removed a user’s influence from its trained model. RecAudit acts as an independent verification mechanism that identifies users whose behavioral traces persist after data deletion. Across multiple real-world data sets, RecAudit substantially outperforms existing auditing and membership inference methods. By enabling organizations to detect high-risk cases and target corrective machine unlearning efforts, RecAudit provides a concrete technical pathway to operationalize data revocation rights. The framework supports platform operators and regulators in strengthening accountability and ensuring AI systems comply with evolving data protection laws.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 如果可以的话请忘记我：推荐系统中用户数据撤回的审计
abstract_cn:
研究聚焦：审计人工智能推荐系统中的“被遗忘权”

个性化推荐系统为当今的电子商务和流媒体平台提供动力，但也引发了关于用户隐私的监管担忧。在《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）等法规下，个人享有“被遗忘权”。虽然公司可以从数据库中删除用户记录，但尚不清楚经过训练的人工智能模型是否真正忘记了从这些数据中学习到的行为模式或偏好。如果没有，平台可能在删除请求后仍会继续对用户进行画像。本研究介绍了RecAudit，这是一种实用的审计工具，用于测试推荐系统是否真正从其训练模型中移除了用户的影响。RecAudit充当独立的验证机制，识别在数据删除后仍然存在行为痕迹的用户。在多个真实世界数据集上，RecAudit的性能显著优于现有的审计和成员推断方法。通过使组织能够检测高风险案例并针对性地进行纠正性机器遗忘努力，RecAudit提供了一条具体的技术路径，以落实数据撤回权。该框架支持平台运营商和监管机构加强问责制，确保人工智能系统遵守不断发展的数据保护法律。

title: When creation and capture diverge: Why breakthrough inventions do not break through alike
abstract: Abstract Reserch Summary Breakthrough inventions are central to firms' competitive advantage, yet what constitutes a breakthrough remains unclear. We examine the relationship between technological quality (measured by forward citations) and economic value (measured by grant‐day abnormal stock‐returns) of patents. Using U.S. patents assigned to publicly listed firms, we find that among the most exceptional inventions—that is, breakthroughs—the correlation between these two measures disappears: technologically outstanding patents are not necessarily the most economically valuable. We attribute this divergence to a structural tension between value creation and value capture in patenting, driven by novelty, the availability of complementary assets, and competitive dynamics. Firms that successfully manage both dimensions earn a disproportionate market premium. This outcome is often associated with firms that diversify their technological portfolios asynchronously across technology S‐curves. Managerial Summary Breakthrough innovations are widely viewed as the lifeblood of corporate success. Yet what truly defines a breakthrough—and how its value should be assessed—remains unclear. Companies typically rely on two indicators: technological quality (measured by forward citations) and economic value (captured by stock market reactions at patent grant).
