abstract: We recognize the longstanding debate about whether (or not) religion is required for ethics.Instead, we focus on the notion religion can serve as a mechanism for ethics in certain situations and highlight its relevance in the relationship between ethics and creativity.
title_cn: 神圣的限制还是促进者？理解宗教如何影响伦理与创造力之间的关系
abstract_cn: 我们承认关于宗教是否必要于伦理的长期争论。相反，我们关注宗教在某些情况下可以作为伦理机制的观念，并强调其在伦理与创造力之间关系中的相关性。

title: On the Quality of Cryptocurrency Markets: Centralized vs. Decentralized Exchanges
abstract: We analyze the market quality of centralized crypto exchanges and decentralized blockchain-based venues (DEXs) using a unique and comprehensive data set. Focusing on two fundamental aspects, transaction costs and deviations from the no-arbitrage condition, we estimate the causal effect of gas fees on DEX market quality. We show that these fixed costs impose a significant burden on relatively small trades and cause persistent arbitrage deviations. Conversely, DEXs offer more competitive transaction costs for larger trades, offering a more favorable environment for institutional investors. Furthermore, we provide causal evidence that innovations aimed at enhancing the flexibility of liquidity provision in DEX markets lead to sizeable improvements in market quality. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Funding: A. Ranaldo acknowledges financial support from the Swiss National Science Foundation nccr–on the move [Grant 204721]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07703 .
title_cn: 关于加密货币市场的质量：中心化交易所与去中心化交易所
abstract_cn: 我们使用独特而全面的数据集分析了中心化加密交易所和基于区块链的去中心化交易场所（DEX）的市场质量。关注交易成本和无套利条件偏离这两个基本方面，我们估计了燃气费用对DEX市场质量的因果影响。我们展示了这些固定成本对相对较小的交易造成了显著负担，并导致了持续的套利偏离。相反，对于较大交易，DEX提供了更具竞争力的交易成本，为机构投资者提供了更有利的环境。此外，我们提供了因果证据，表明旨在增强DEX市场流动性提供灵活性的创新会显著改善市场质量。本文由Agostino Capponi接受，研究领域为金融。资助：A. Ranaldo 感谢瑞士国家科学基金会nccr–on the move [资助号204721]的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07703 获得。

title: Improving Cash-Constrained Smallholder Farmers’ Revenue: The Role of Government Loans
abstract: This paper examines how the need for immediate cash by smallholder farmers may lead to undesirable selling decisions that hurt their revenue and analyzes the efficacy of government loan policies in tackling this challenge. We develop a game-theoretic model to characterize the base scenario of no loan, uncovering the impacts of cash needs on farmers’ revenue. We then examine how a government loan, under which farmers store some of their production at government warehouses in exchange for immediate cash, may counteract these negative impacts. We analyze and optimize two types of policies: one in which all farmers are eligible (a homogeneous loan) and another in which the loan is offered only to farmers whose production is below a certain threshold (a heterogeneous loan). Our results demonstrate that, when designed properly, both loans simultaneously increase aggregate farmer revenue and generate a more equitable revenue distribution among farmers. Nonetheless, overly generous loans can be counterproductive and harm farmers. We further show that heterogeneous loans achieve optimal market outcomes with lower government expenditure when cash needs are moderately high. We then contrast the two policies across key metrics related to farmers. Whereas the homogeneous loan better mitigates inequity among farmers, the heterogeneous loan helps more farmers meet cash needs. These results underscore that government loan design must carefully account for farmers’ strategic responses to the policy to generate positive societal outcomes. Finally, we use field data from India to numerically illustrate our insights and demonstrate the economic impacts of the policies studied. This paper was accepted by Jeannette Song, operations management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06206 .
title_cn: 改善资金不足的小农户收入：政府贷款的作用
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了小农户对即时现金的需求如何导致不理想的销售决策，进而损害他们的收入，并分析了政府贷款政策在应对这一挑战中的有效性。我们开发了一个博弈论模型，以描述没有贷款的基本情境，揭示现金需求对农民收入的影响。接着，我们考察了政府贷款的模式，该贷款允许农民将部分农产品存放在政府仓库以换取即时现金，从而抵消这些负面影响。我们分析并优化了两种政策：一种是所有农民均可申请的贷款（同质贷款），另一种是仅提供给生产低于特定阈值的农民的贷款（异质贷款）。我们的研究结果表明，如果设计得当，这两种贷款能够同时提高农民的总收入，并在农民之间产生更公平的收入分配。然而，过于慷慨的贷款可能适得其反，反而损害农民的利益。我们进一步展示了在现金需求适中较高的情况下，异质贷款能够实现更优的市场结果，同时降低政府支出。随后，我们在与农民相关的关键指标上对两项政策进行了对比。尽管同质贷款更好地缓解了农民之间的不平等，但异质贷款则有助于更多农民满足现金需求。这些结果强调了政府贷款设计必须谨慎考虑农民对政策的战略反应，以产生积极的社会成果。最后，我们利用印度的实地数据对我们的见解进行了数值说明，并展示了所研究政策的经济影响。本论文已被运营管理领域的Jeannette Song接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06206 获得。

title: Cancer Screening Outreach Guided by Machine Learning: The Benefits of Proactive Care
abstract: Problem definition: With the advance of data analytics, many disease prediction models have been developed with the intent of detecting diseases earlier and improving patient outcomes through earlier treatment. The operationalization of interventions and care based on these predictive models is critical to attaining these goals. We study the real-world effects of a machine learning-guided colorectal cancer screening outreach program deployed at a health system in Pennsylvania. Methodology/results: Using a regression discontinuity design based on the predicted risk score for having cancer, we find that the program increases the likelihood of colonoscopy uptake in three and six months by 6.0 percentage points (214% increase relative to the control sample within the bandwidth) and 6.9 percentage points (117% increase), respectively. Importantly, we also find significant effects on mortality. We estimate that the program decreases two-year mortality by 6.2 percentage points (43% decrease). Managerial implications: Our finding suggests that a proactive cancer screening outreach program where individuals are selected for intervention based on a machine learning algorithm could significantly improve patient outcomes in addition to achieving higher disease detection rates. Our analysis demonstrates an analytical framework for rigorously evaluating machine learning-aided outreach programs for other cancers and diseases. Establishing unbiased estimates of the impact of machine learning-aided screening outreach is critical for capacity planning of screening resources, such as colonoscopies. History: This paper has been accepted as part of the 2025 Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Practice-Based Research Competition. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1353 .
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 基于机器学习的癌症筛查推广：主动护理的益处
abstract_cn: 问题定义：随着数据分析技术的进步，许多疾病预测模型相继被开发，旨在及早检测疾病并通过早期治疗改善患者结果。基于这些预测模型实施的干预措施和护理对实现这些目标至关重要。我们研究了一项在宾夕法尼亚州健康系统中部署的机器学习指导的结直肠癌筛查推广项目的实际效果。 方法论/结果：基于预测的癌症风险评分采用回归不连续性设计，我们发现该项目在三个月和六个月后分别提高了结肠镜检查的接受率6.0个百分点（相对于对照样本在带宽内的214%增加）和6.9个百分点（117%的增加）。重要的是，我们还发现对死亡率有显著影响。我们估计，该项目将两年死亡率降低了6.2个百分点（减少43%）。 管理启示：我们的研究结果表明，基于机器学习算法选择个体进行干预的积极癌症筛查推广项目不仅可以显著改善患者结果，还可以实现更高的疾病检测率。我们的分析展示了一个严格评估机器学习辅助的筛查推广项目对于其他癌症和疾病的分析框架。建立机器学习辅助筛查推广影响的无偏估计对于筛查资源的容量规划（例如结肠镜检查）至关重要。 历史：本文已被接受，作为2025年制造与服务运营管理实践研究竞赛的一部分。 附加材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1353获取。

title: Robust Predictive Modeling Under Unseen Data Distribution Shifts: A Methodological Commentary
abstract: Predictive models are widely used to support decision making, yet they are typically built assuming that future data will follow the same distribution as the training data. In practice, data distributions often change in unseen ways, leading to poor model performance and reduced reliability. This methodological commentary highlights the risks of unseen data distribution shifts and shows how they are frequently overlooked in predictive modeling practice. Drawing on transfer learning, domain generalization, and distributionally robust optimization, we organize existing approaches to handling data shifts and illustrate how uncertainty-aware modeling can be implemented in practice. We conclude with actionable recommendations to guide the design, evaluation, and use of predictive models in uncertain data environments. Our work has implications for policy and practice related to trustworthy and responsible artificial intelligence (AI), predictive modeling, and AI risk management.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 在未见数据分布变化下的稳健预测建模：方法论评论
abstract_cn: 预测模型广泛用于支持决策，然而它们通常是在假设未来数据将遵循与训练数据相同的分布的前提下构建的。在实际应用中，数据分布常常以未被发现的方式发生变化，导致模型性能下降和可靠性降低。这一方法论评论强调了数据分布变化的风险，并指出在预测建模实践中，这一问题常常被忽视。通过借鉴迁移学习、领域泛化和分布鲁棒优化，我们整理了处理数据变化的现有方法，并阐述了如何在实践中实施考虑不确定性的建模。最后，我们提出可操作性的建议，以指导在不确定数据环境中预测模型的设计、评估和使用。我们的研究对相关政策和实践在可信赖和负责任的人工智能（AI）、预测建模以及AI风险管理方面具有重要影响。

title: Algorithmic Targeting and the Precision-Recall Tradeoff
abstract: We examine the implications of competitive algorithmic targeting when outcomes of targeting algorithms are the individual consumer-level predicted probabilities of conversion. In these situations, firms implicitly face the well-known precision-recall tradeoff while choosing their targeting strategies. They can choose to target a smaller set of consumers with a high probability of conversion (precision) but miss out on many consumers who might still be interested in their product. Conversely, firms can target a larger set of consumers (recall), but this results in a greater probability that their targeting is wasted on uninterested consumers. We analyze this precision-recall tradeoff under competition between firms that strategically choose their algorithmic targeting policies. We show that competing firms favor a targeting policy that has higher precision but lower recall compared with a monopoly. Firms target fewer consumers when their algorithms are more correlated. They also have the incentive to strategically decrease the precision of their targeting policies in order to reduce competition. If firms endogenously choose their algorithmic correlation, then there is an equilibrium incentive to decrease the correlation. History: Anthony Dukes served as the senior editor for this article. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mksc.2024.0930 .
title_cn: 算法定向与精确率-召回率权衡
abstract_cn: 我们考察了在竞争性算法定位中，定位算法结果为个体消费者转化预测概率时的影响。在这种情况下，企业在选择其定位策略时隐含地面临着著名的精准度与召回率的权衡。企业可以选择针对具有高转化概率的少量消费者（精准度），但这将导致错过大量可能仍对其产品感兴趣的消费者。相反，企业可以针对更多消费者（召回率），但这会导致其定位更有可能浪费在对其产品不感兴趣的消费者身上。我们分析了在企业之间竞争的情况下这一精准度与召回率的权衡，企业在此过程中战略性地选择其算法定位政策。我们表明，竞争企业倾向于选择一种精准度更高但召回率更低的定位政策，与垄断情况下相比。当企业的算法相关性更高时，它们会针对更少的消费者。企业还会有动力在战略上降低其定位政策的精准度，以减少竞争。如果企业内生选择其算法的相关性，那么就会出现降低相关性的均衡激励。历史：安东尼·杜克斯担任本文的资深编辑。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mksc.2024.0930 获取。

title: Advertiser Learning in Direct Advertising Markets
abstract: By pooling information across many advertisers, direct buy ad networks can alleviate advertiser uncertainty about where to place ads, increasing publisher revenue and advertiser welfare.
title_cn: 直接广告市场中的广告主学习
abstract_cn: 通过整合众多广告主的信息，直接购买广告网络可以减轻广告主对广告投放位置的不确定性，从而增加出版商的收入和广告主的福利。

title: Startup Evaluations with Generative Artificial Intelligence: An Exploratory Study on Early-Stage Investments and Survival Predictions by Large Language Models
abstract: We examine the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in evaluating early-stage ventures. In pre-registered experiments, we prompt selected LLMs to generate investment evaluations and survival predictions for an archival dataset of 171 new venture pitches under systematically varied information cues. We compare these LLM-generated evaluations with realized fundraising outcomes, post-campaign survival rates, and evaluations provided by a benchmark sample of human investors. LLMs show strong capabilities in mirroring real fundraising outcomes. In contrast, their apparent accuracy in predicting venture survival largely reflects prior exposure to some ventures’ digital footprints rather than genuine reasoning under uncertainty. Providing LLMs with scientific, contextual, and social information cues can improve their evaluations, but can also activate human-like heuristics, including anchoring and herding. Our study highlights LLMs’ potential in venture evaluations while cautioning that unobserved influences can mislead interpretations of their capabilities.
title_cn: 使用生成性人工智能的创业评估：关于早期投资和大型语言模型生存预测的探索性研究
abstract_cn: 我们研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在评估早期创业公司方面的能力。在预注册实验中，我们提示选定的LLMs生成对171个新创企业提案的投资评估和存活预测，这些提案的数据在系统变化的信息提示下进行分析。我们将LLM生成的评估与实际募资结果、筹款后存活率以及一组基准人类投资者提供的评估进行比较。LLMs在反映实际募资结果方面表现出强大的能力。相比之下，它们在预测企业存活方面的准确性主要反映了对某些企业数字足迹的先前接触，而非在不确定性下的真实推理。为LLMs提供科学、背景和社会信息提示可以改善它们的评估，但也可能激活类人启发式，包括锚定效应和从众效应。我们的研究强调了LLMs在创业评估中的潜力，同时警示说，未观察到的影响可能会误导对其能力的解读。

title: Accent Discrimination in Entrepreneurial Fundraising
abstract: Accent is a powerful, yet still socially acceptable, basis of discrimination that shapes interpersonal evaluations and access to opportunities, potentially disadvantaging entrepreneurs seeking funding. Bridging role congruity theory with sociolinguistic literature, we hypothesize that entrepreneurs whose regional accents align with the stereotypical entrepreneur are more likely to secure funding. We test this hypothesis in entrepreneurial pitching contexts using an observational study and two pre-registered experiments that manipulate entrepreneurs’ accents in pitch videos through a professional voice actor and AI. Across the UK, Italy, and the United States, the results support our hypothesis, providing robust evidence of accent-based discrimination in entrepreneurial fundraising.
title_cn: 创业融资中的口音歧视
abstract_cn: 口音是一个强有力却又社会上被接受的歧视基础，它影响人际评估和机会获取，可能使寻求资金的创业者处于不利地位。将角色一致性理论与社会语言学文献相结合，我们假设，区域口音与刻板印象中的创业者相符的创业者更有可能获得资金支持。我们在创业推介的背景下，通过一项观察研究和两项预注册实验来检验这一假设，这些研究通过专业配音演员和人工智能操控创业者在推介视频中的口音。在英国、意大利和美国，结果支持了我们的假设，提供了强有力的证据，表明创业融资中存在基于口音的歧视。

title: The importance of not looking the other way: Prehire on- and off-the-job misbehavior predicts subsequent police misconduct.
abstract: This research addresses an often-overlooked opportunity for police reform: the predictive value of prehire misbehavior data for reducing posthire police misconduct. While most reform efforts focus on officers' actions after they are hired, our findings highlight the impact of rigorous screening before hire. We examined how specific prior employment and nonwork misbehaviors related to general occupational instability, trouble in previous law enforcement roles, prior temper problems and violence, and irresponsible behaviors predicted future misconduct among 6,075 police officers tracked over 5 years. Notably, some prehire behaviors significantly elevated risks of citizen complaints and misconduct-related lawsuits, with hazard ratios up to 14.59. Contrary to common assumptions, candidates with prior law enforcement experience showed increased liability, including excessive use of force, suggesting that this background does not inherently reduce misconduct risk. After identifying the strongest predictors of police misconduct, we also examined their relation to termination for cause and assessed how agency decision makers respond differently to prehire versus posthire misbehaviors. By integrating findings on the predictive value of specific prehire misbehaviors, we offer targeted, evidence-based guidance and actionable recommendations for police agencies and policymakers. This work provides a scientifically grounded foundation for effective and consistent police screening decisions, offering a framework for establishing long-overdue national police hiring standards. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 不视而不见的重要性：入职前的工作内外不当行为预测后续的警察不当行为。
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了警察改革中一个常被忽视的机会：预雇不当行为数据在减少雇后警察不当行为方面的预测价值。尽管大多数改革努力集中于警员被雇后所采取的行为，我们的发现强调了在雇佣之前进行严格筛查的影响。我们研究了特定的先前就业和非工作不当行为如何与一般职业不稳定性、以往执法角色中的麻烦、之前的情绪问题和暴力记录，以及不负责任行为相关，并预测在追踪的6,075名警察中未来不当行为的发生，这一过程中持续时间为5年。值得注意的是，某些预雇行为显著提高了公民投诉和与不当行为相关的诉讼风险，风险比高达14.59。与常见假设相反，具有以往执法经验的候选人显示出更高的责任，包括过度使用武力，表明这种背景并不自然降低不当行为风险。在识别出警察不当行为的最强预测因素后，我们还考察了这些因素与因故解雇的关系，并评估了机构决策者在应对预雇与雇后不当行为时的不同反应。通过整合关于特定预雇不当行为的预测价值的发现，我们为警察机构和政策制定者提供了针对性的、基于证据的指导和可操作性建议。这项工作为有效且一致的警察筛选决策提供了科学基础，并为建立长期以来应当制定的国家警察招聘标准提供了框架。

title: Success and Failure in Blockchain-Based Interorganizational Ecosystems: A Governance Perspective
abstract: Interorganizational ecosystems require governance arrangements that can align diverse and often competing organizations around a shared value proposition. Although blockchain, as a form of digital governance, promises to facilitate large-scale collaboration by codifying and enforcing rules, decentralizing control, and ensuring verifiable data exchange, many blockchain-based interorganizational ecosystems nevertheless fail. Leveraging 155 interviews and detailed internal records from a large technology provider covering 81 interorganizational blockchain projects across 25 industries, supplemented by archival evidence on the trajectories of 196 projects and 70 podcast interviews, we develop a grounded theory explaining how governance misalignments trigger collaboration breakdowns. Specifically, we identify three underlying governance tradeoffs that expose tensions between blockchain’s network-centric rules and actor-centric needs: consistency versus flexibility in coordination, system reliance versus actor reliance in trust and control, and ecosystem utility versus member utility in incentives. These tradeoffs are amplified or attenuated by corresponding boundary conditions related to scale and cohesion (for coordination), co-opetition (for trust and control), and value logics (for incentives). Our study advances governance theory by explaining how blockchain interacts with traditional governance, shapes critical tradeoffs, and influences ecosystem success and failure. We also offer design principles to help managers navigate the inherent governance tradeoffs in ecosystem collaboration.
title_cn: 区块链基础的跨组织生态系统中的成功与失败：治理视角
abstract_cn: 跨组织生态系统需要治理安排，以便将多样化且常常存在竞争关系的组织围绕共同的价值主张进行协调。尽管区块链作为一种数字治理形式，承诺通过规范和强制执行规则、去中心化控制以及确保可验证的数据交换来促进大规模协作，但许多基于区块链的跨组织生态系统依然失败。通过对来自一家大型技术提供商的155次访谈及详细的内部记录进行研究，涵盖了25个行业中的81个跨组织区块链项目，并辅以196个项目的档案证据和70次播客访谈，我们制定了一种扎根理论，解释了治理不对齐如何触发协作崩溃。具体而言，我们识别出三种潜在的治理权衡，揭示了区块链网络中心规则与参与者中心需求之间的紧张关系：协调中的一致性与灵活性权衡、信任与控制中的系统依赖与参与者依赖权衡，以及激励中的生态系统效用与成员效用权衡。这些权衡受到与规模和凝聚力（协调）、共竞争（信任和控制）以及价值逻辑（激励）相关的边界条件的放大或减弱。我们的研究推进了治理理论，解释了区块链如何与传统治理互动、塑造关键权衡，并影响生态系统的成功与失败。同时，我们还提供了设计原则，以帮助管理者在生态系统协作中应对固有的治理权衡。

title: Founders for hire? The role of venture studios in breaking the individual-opportunity nexus
abstract: Entrepreneurship theory has often posited the founder as the central agent of venture creation; from identifying opportunities, to mobilizing resources, and driving execution. We examine how venture studios – organizations that systematically create new ventures by taking over traditionally founder-led processes – challenge this assumption. Drawing on an inductive multiple case study of 16 venture studios with 50 primary and secondary interviews, we reveal how venture studios develop and validate ideas independently from founders prior to recruiting them, and how they coordinate the entrepreneurial process when these functions are separated. Our findings contribute to the literature on the individual-opportunity nexus, the entrepreneurial process and open the research agenda on venture studios as a new phenomenon in entrepreneurship. • Venture studios challenge the assumption that founder and idea are connected. • We provide qualitative evidence from 16 venture studios using 50 interviews. • Venture studios disentangle opportunity discovery from venture creation. • They coordinate the entrepreneurial process through managerial mechanisms. • Venture studios shift entrepreneurial agency from individual to the organization.
title_cn: 创始人出租？创业工作室在打破个人与机会之间联系中的角色
abstract_cn:
创业理论常常将创始人视为企业创建的核心主体；从识别机会、动员资源到推动执行。我们考察了创业工作室——一种通过接管传统创始人主导的流程系统性地创建新企业的组织——如何挑战这一假设。通过对16个创业工作室进行的归纳性多案例研究，以及50次主要和次要访谈，我们揭示了创业工作室如何在招募创始人之前独立开发和验证创意，以及在这些职能分离时如何协调创业过程。我们的研究结果为个体与机会的关系、创业过程的文献做出了贡献，并为创业工作室作为创业新现象的研究议程开辟了新的方向。 
• 创业工作室挑战了创始人与创意之间相互关联的假设。 
• 我们提供了来自16个创业工作室的定性证据，基于50次访谈。 
• 创业工作室将机会发现与企业创建分开。 
• 它们通过管理机制协调创业过程。 
• 创业工作室将创业主体性从个体转移到组织。

title: Asset Pricing in a World of Imperfect Foresight
abstract: A key assumption of dynamic asset pricing theory is that agents have perfect foresight: for all future contingencies, they correctly foresee the corresponding equilibrium prices. Is it possible for prices to still reflect perfect foresight even if agents have imperfect foresight? We answer affirmatively, provided agents exhibit a mild form of narrow framing, which we refer to as dynamic narrow framing: while accounting for future endowments, agents ignore retrading opportunities. This behavior vastly simplifies computation of optimal choices because it obviates the need to form beliefs about future prices. Obviously, choices will generally be different, and hence, suboptimal, compared with those that obtain if agents were to optimize dynamically using perfect foresight about future prices. With a controlled experiment, we verify that our behavioral assumption explains both prices and choices. Our findings allow us to reinterpret the successes (when evaluating prices only) and failures (when evaluating prices against choices) of traditional tests of asset pricing theory on historical data from the field. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Funding: P. Bossaerts acknowledges funding from the Australian Research Council [Grant DP180102284], from a R@MAP Chair at the University of Melbourne, and from The Leverhulme Trust. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.03690 .
title_cn: 不完全预见世界中的资产定价
abstract_cn: 动态资产定价理论的一个关键假设是，代理人拥有完美的前瞻性：对于所有未来的情境，他们能够正确预见相应的均衡价格。那么，即便代理人对未来的预判并不完美，价格仍然能够反映完美的前瞻性吗？我们对此给出了肯定的回答，前提是代理人展示出一种温和形式的狭隘框架，我们称之为动态狭隘框架：在考虑未来的禀赋时，代理人忽视了重新交易的机会。这种行为大大简化了最优选择的计算，因为它消除了形成对未来价格的信念的必要性。显然，与如果代理人能够利用对未来价格的完美前瞻性进行动态优化时的选择相比，选择通常会有所不同，因此不够最优。通过一个受控实验，我们验证了我们的行为假设能够解释价格和选择。我们的发现使我们能够重新解读传统资产定价理论在基于历史数据的测试中的成功（当仅仅评估价格）和失败（当将价格与选择进行比较时）。本文已被金融学者卢卡斯·施密德接受。资助：P. Bossaerts 感谢澳大利亚研究委员会 [资助 DP180102284]、墨尔本大学的 R@MAP 主席以及利弗休姆信托的资助。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.03690 获得。

title: Collaborative Work Management Technologies and Managerial Intensity in U.S. Corporations: An Examination
abstract: Do digital technologies reinforce managerial hierarchies or, instead, make them less relevant? We propose that the answer to this question depends on the nature of the technology: specifically, its relative impact on managers’ capacity to supervise and on subordinates’ need for supervision. Applying this framework to collaborative work management (CWM) technologies that facilitate real-time collaboration, communication, and task coordination, we predict that the adoption of such technologies should reduce managerial intensity and increase decentralization in organizations. To test this prediction, we use a difference-in-differences design on a novel data set built from over 26 million job listings (Lightcast) and over 20 million social profiles (Revelio) matched to 3,017 U.S. public firms in Compustat, which we track over the period from 2010 to 2019. We find that over the observation window, CWM technology adopters show a 3% reduction in managerial intensity and a 5%–7% increase in nonmanagerial skills linked to decentralization in their job postings in the years following adoption. The pattern of results is robust to a battery of validations, alternative measures, and specifications, and it strongly supports the idea that these technologies enable collaboration and make organizations less hierarchical along the dimensions that we studied. This paper was accepted by Sameer Srivastava, organizations. Funding: P. Gulati acknowledges financial support from the UCL School of Management, the Ian Potter ‘93 PhD Award at INSEAD, and the Will Mitchell Dissertation Research Grant. P. Puranam acknowledges financial support from the Desmarais Fund at INSEAD for the Organizations & Algorithms Project. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.04127 .
title_cn: 美国企业中的协作工作管理技术与管理强度的研究
abstract_cn: 数字技术是强化管理层级，还是使其变得不那么相关？我们提出，这个问题的答案取决于技术的性质：具体而言，它对管理者监督能力的相对影响以及对下属监督需求的影响。将这一框架应用于促进实时协作、沟通和任务协调的协作工作管理（CWM）技术，我们预测，采用此类技术应当减少管理强度，并增加组织中的去中心化。为了验证这一预测，我们使用了差异中的差异设计，基于一个新颖的数据集，该数据集由超过2600万个职位列表（Lightcast）和超过2000万个社交档案（Revelio）构成，并与Compustat中3017家美国上市公司匹配，跟踪时间范围为2010年至2019年。我们发现，在观察窗口内，CWM技术的采用者在管理强度上减少了3%，在与去中心化相关的职位发布中，非管理技能增加了5%至7%。这一结果模式在多项验证、替代测量和规范下均表现出稳健性，强有力地支持了这些技术促进协作并使组织在我们研究的维度上变得不那么层级化的观点。本文由Sameer Srivastava接受，研究领域为组织。资助：P. Gulati感谢UCL管理学院、INSEAD的Ian Potter ‘93博士奖和Will Mitchell论文研究资助的财务支持。P. Puranam感谢INSEAD的Desmarais基金对“组织与算法项目”的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.04127获取。

title: No-Regret Bayesian Recommendation to Homogeneous Users
abstract: No-Regret Bayesian Recommendation to Homogeneous Users We introduce and study the online Bayesian recommendation problem for a recommender system platform. The platform has the privilege to privately observe a utility-relevant state of a product at each round and uses this information to make online recommendations to a stream of myopic users. This paradigm is common in a wide range of scenarios in the current internet economy. The platform commits to an online recommendation policy that utilizes its information advantage on the product state to persuade self-interested users to follow the recommendation. Because the platform does not know users’ preferences or beliefs in advance, we study the platform’s online learning problem of designing an adaptive recommendation policy to persuade users while gradually learning users’ preferences and beliefs en route. Specifically, we aim to design online learning policies with no Stackelberg regret for the platform, that is, against the optimal benchmark policy in hindsight under the assumption that users will correspondingly adapt their responses to the benchmark policy. Our first result is an online policy that achieves double logarithmic regret dependence on the number of rounds. We also present an information-theoretic lower bound showing that no adaptive online policy can achieve regret with better dependency on the number of rounds. Finally, by formulating the platform’s problem as optimizing a linear program with membership oracle access, we present our second online recommendation policy that achieves regret with polynomial dependence on the number of states but logarithmic dependence on the number of rounds.
title_cn: 无悔贝叶斯推荐给同质用户
abstract_cn:
无悔贝叶斯推荐至同质用户

我们引入并研究了一个推荐系统平台的在线贝叶斯推荐问题。该平台有特权在每轮私下观察产品的效用相关状态，并利用这些信息对一系列短视用户进行在线推荐。这种范式在当前互联网经济的广泛场景中都很常见。该平台承诺采用一种在线推荐策略，利用其在产品状态方面的信息优势， persuading 利益相关的用户遵循推荐。由于平台事先并不知道用户的偏好或信念，我们研究了平台的在线学习问题，即设计一种自适应推荐策略来说服用户，同时在这个过程中逐渐学习用户的偏好和信念。具体而言，我们旨在为平台设计无斯塔克尔博悔的在线学习策略，即在假设用户会相应调整其对基准策略的反应的情况下，与既往的最优基准策略相比。我们的第一个结果是一个在线策略，其悔恨在轮数上的依赖性是双对数级的。我们还提出了一个信息论下界，显示没有任何自适应在线策略能够在对轮数的依赖性方面实现更优的悔恨。最后，通过将平台的问题形式化为优化一个具有成员资格 oracle 访问的线性程序，我们提出了第二个在线推荐策略，其悔恨在状态数量上具有多项式依赖性，但在轮数上具有对数依赖性。

title: EXPRESS: Customer Acquisition Through Intermediaries (vs. Brand) Shapes Lifetime Value: Evidence from the Hotel Industry
abstract: Third-party distribution channels or intermediaries have become ubiquitous across a wide range of industries, offering firms access to new prospects and an opportunity to expand their customer base. Although prior work has investigated the short-term aggregate demand implications of intermediaries, the long-term customer relationship perspective has remained unexplored. Using customer-level data from a large U.S. hotel brand, we show that customers acquired via travel intermediaries (such as online travel agents or OTAs) have persistently different behaviors on several dimensions that matter for long-term value. Compared to customers acquired through brand-owned (direct) channels, intermediary-acquired customers spend 4.1% less per stay and purchase 3.8% less frequently. Intermediary-acquired customers, while displaying stronger channel inertia and lower multichannel engagement, purchase across a wider variety of brands (multi-brand behavior). When we combine these behavioral estimates into a customer lifetime value (CLV) computation, we find that while intermediary-acquired customers have positive CLV, their CLV is 19.94% lower than customers acquired through brand-owned channels, revealing, for the first time, the long-term implications of such customer acquisition strategies. Through an optimal allocation model we show that, although the CLVs are lower for intermediaries, a CLV-maximizing firm typically invests in both channels: the optimal share allocated to intermediaries rising proportionally with the intermediary’s acquisition efficiency and accessible prospect pool, and falling when the hotel is operating at capacity. In sum, our results show that although using intermediaries may be a viable strategy for customer acquisition, the purchase behaviors of these customers are significantly and meaningfully different from customers acquired via brand-owned channels, thus urging managers to adopt a more nuanced ‘frenemies’ approach to building a channel portfolio.
title_cn: 通过中介（与品牌相比）获取客户的方式影响客户终身价值：来自酒店行业的证据
abstract_cn: 第三方分销渠道或中介在各种行业中已变得无处不在，为企业提供了接触新客户的机会和拓展客户基础的可能性。尽管之前的研究探讨了中介对短期总体需求的影响，但长远的客户关系视角仍然未得到充分研究。通过对一家大型美国酒店品牌的客户层级数据进行分析，我们发现通过旅游中介（如在线旅游代理商或OTA）获得的客户在多个与长期价值相关的维度上表现出持续的差异。与通过品牌自有（直接）渠道获得的客户相比，中介获得的客户每次入住的消费低了4.1%，购买频率低了3.8%。尽管中介获得的客户表现出更强的渠道惯性和较低的多渠道参与度，但他们在多个品牌间的购买行为更加广泛（即多品牌行为）。当我们将这些行为估计结合到客户生命周期价值（CLV）的计算中时，我们发现尽管中介获得的客户的CLV为正，但其CLV比通过品牌自有渠道获得的客户低19.94%，首次揭示了这种客户获取策略的长期影响。通过一个最佳分配模型，我们显示出，尽管中介的CLV较低，最大化CLV的企业通常会在两个渠道上进行投资：分配给中介的最优份额与中介的获取效率和可接触的潜在客户池成正比，而在酒店达到运营能力极限时则会下降。总之，我们的研究结果表明，尽管使用中介可能是一个可行的客户获取策略，但这些客户的购买行为与通过品牌自有渠道获得的客户在显著且有意义的方面存在差异，因此呼吁管理者在建立渠道组合时采取更细致的“敌友关系”策略。

title: Please Arrive On Time: The Impact of Early and Delayed Delivery on Product Ratings
abstract: In digital marketplaces, product ratings play a critical role in shaping consumer demand and seller success, yet their relationship with logistical factors remains unexplored. This study investigates how deviations from promised delivery dates, whether early or delayed, influence product ratings. Using transaction-level data from a major e-commerce platform encompassing over 11M product purchases and 500K customers, we estimate the causal effect of deviating from the promised delivery time on both rating incidence and valence. To overcome the challenges of matching imposed by an unbalanced treatment and control distribution, we used a machine learning-based estimator, R-learner, to estimate the effects of interest. We find that both delayed and early deliveries increase customers’ likelihood of leaving a rating but reduce rating valence. Delayed deliveries lower rating valence by an average of 0.4, with some categories seeing a drop of up to 0.6. Early deliveries also reduce rating valence, with an average decrease of 0.2 and reductions of up to 0.5 depending on the product category. The negative effect of early delivery is consistent across all categories, except for food and beverages, where experienced customers show a small positive response. This is due to reduced uncertainty from reordering previously purchased products, a pattern that does not occur as often in other categories. We contribute to the service and logistics performance literature by establishing the causal link between delivery performance and product ratings by quantifying the direction and magnitude of these effects across various product categories and customer segments. We propose managerial implications for mitigating customer dissatisfaction arising from both early and delayed deliveries.
title_cn: 请准时到达：早期与延迟交付对产品评分的影响
abstract_cn: 在数字市场中，产品评价在塑造消费者需求和卖家成功方面扮演着关键角色，然而它与物流因素之间的关系尚未得到探索。本研究调查了承诺交货日期的偏差，无论是提前还是延迟，如何影响产品评价。我们使用来自一家大型电子商务平台的交易级数据，涵盖超过1100万的产品购买和50万客户，估计了与承诺交货时间偏差相关的因果效应，涉及评价的发生率和评价的正负面。为了克服由于不平衡的处理组和对照组分布所带来的匹配挑战，我们采用了一种基于机器学习的估计方法——R-learner，来估计感兴趣的效应。我们的研究发现，延迟和提前交货都会增加客户留下评价的可能性，但会降低评价的正面性。延迟交货的评价正面性平均降低0.4，其中某些类别的下降幅度甚至达到0.6。提前交货同样降低评价正面性，平均下降0.2，根据产品类别，下降幅度最高可达0.5。提前交货的负面效应在所有类别中均表现一致，唯独食品和饮料类别，由于有经验的客户对此显示出小幅的正面反应。这是因为重新订购以前购买产品所带来的不确定性降低，而在其他类别中这种模式并不常见。我们通过量化这些效应在不同产品类别和客户细分中的方向和幅度，建立了交付表现与产品评价之间的因果联系，从而对服务和物流绩效文献作出了贡献。我们还提出了管理启示，以减轻因提前和延迟交货而引发的客户不满。

title: EXPRESS: Faith in Disaster Preparedness: Insights on the Influence of Religion on Humanitarian Volunteer Relief Operations
abstract: Religious beliefs have often served as a lens through which communities interpret and cope with disasters. Not surprisingly, many non-governmental organizations (NGOs) that support disaster relief have roots in religious traditions. The religious orientation of an NGO is a key concern as it can influence volunteer outcomes and operational performance. This is important because volunteers are an indispensable asset for NGOs, playing a pivotal role in the efficacy of humanitarian aid efforts. This study employs social capital and person-organization fit theories to examine how NGO religiousness influences social capital, volunteer behaviors, and operational performance. It also analyzes how NGO and volunteer religiousness “fit” affects these relationships. The hypotheses were tested using two scenario-based video experiments: Experiment 1, which collected data from 100 students in a laboratory setting, and Experiment 2, which involved 198 online volunteers. Results from Tobit and Poisson regressions indicate that increased NGO religiousness may diminish volunteer social capital, commitment, and operational performance. However, NGO and volunteer religiousness “fit” mitigates the adverse effects of NGO religiousness, enhancing volunteer behaviors. A large-scale survey of 503 respondents supports these findings and provides insights to guide future research into volunteer motivations. This study contributes to the Humanitarian Operations Management literature and informs the strategies of NGOs regarding religious alignments, volunteer recruitment and retention, and operational performance.
title_cn: 信仰与灾难准备：宗教对人道主义志愿救援行动影响的洞察
abstract_cn: 宗教信仰常常作为社区解读和应对灾难的视角。不出所料，许多支持灾难救助的非政府组织（NGO）根植于宗教传统。NGO的宗教取向是一个关键问题，因为它可能影响志愿者的结果和运营绩效。这一点非常重要，因为志愿者是NGO不可或缺的资产，在人道主义援助工作中发挥着关键作用。本研究运用社会资本和人-组织契合理论，探讨NGO的宗教性如何影响社会资本、志愿者行为和运营绩效。同时，分析NGO与志愿者的宗教性“契合”如何影响这些关系。研究假设通过两个基于情境的视频实验进行了检验：实验1在实验室环境中收集了100名学生的数据，实验2则涉及198名在线志愿者。Tobit和Poisson回归的结果表明，NGO宗教性的增加可能会降低志愿者的社会资本、承诺和运营绩效。然而，NGO与志愿者宗教性的“契合”减轻了NGO宗教性的负面影响，增强了志愿者的行为。一项对503名受访者的大规模调查支持了这些发现，并为未来研究志愿者动机提供了见解。本研究为人道主义运营管理文献做出了贡献，并为NGO在宗教对齐、志愿者招募与留存及运营绩效方面的策略提供了参考。

title: EXPRESS: VotingWait Times and Political Misinformation on Social Media
abstract: The direct impacts of long wait times in elections, such as lost wages for voters and suppressed turnout, are well-documented. Drawing upon the service operations literature, we hypothesize that such operational inefficiencies may have far-reaching consequences beyond the immediate voter experience, in particular, the spread of political misinformation. Using a novel dataset that combines granular measures of voter wait times from cellphone location data, social media content, and demographic information at the county level, we find evidence that longer wait times are associated with greater sharing of political fake news on Reddit in the aftermath of the 2016 U.S. presidential election. Importantly, this relationship exhibits significant heterogeneity based on the racial composition of counties, with more diverse counties experiencing greater increases in misinformation spread due to wait times. To shed light on the mechanisms underlying this link, we leverage individual-level survey data on voters’ polling place experiences and perceptions of electoral integrity. Our analysis reveals that experiencing long wait times erodes voters’ confidence in the integrity of the election process, particularly at the local level. These findings underscore the societal importance of efficient election operations management and highlight how they can have profound implications for the health of democracy. Our work introduces a new factor—the operational efficiency of election administration—into the study of political misinformation, thus opening up avenues for operations management research to contribute to a pressing social challenge.
title_cn: 表达：投票等待时间与社交媒体上的政治虚假信息
abstract_cn: 选举中的长时间等待的直接影响，如选民的工资损失和投票率降低，已有充分的文献记录。基于服务运营文献，我们假设这种操作效率低下可能会产生超出直接选民体验的深远影响，特别是政治虚假信息的传播。利用一个新颖的数据集，该数据集结合了手机定位数据、社交媒体内容以及县级人口信息的细粒度选民等待时间度量，我们发现，在2016年美国总统选举后，更长的等待时间与在Reddit上分享政治虚假新闻的增加相关。值得注意的是，这一关系在县的种族构成上呈现显著异质性，种族多样性更高的县由于等待时间而经历更大幅度的信息传播增加。为了阐明这种联系背后的机制，我们利用个体层面的调查数据，分析选民在投票地点的经历和对选举公正性的看法。我们的分析显示，长时间的等待会削弱选民对选举过程完整性的信心，尤其是在地方层面。这些发现强调了高效选举运营管理的社会重要性，并突显其对民主健康的深远影响。我们的研究将选举管理的运营效率作为一个新因素引入政治虚假信息研究，从而为运营管理研究提供了贡献于这一紧迫社会挑战的机会。

title: Shaping expectations, losing flexibility: A study of <scp>CEO</scp> promises as strategic communication tools
abstract: Abstract Research Summary CEO promises are powerful but understudied communication tools. We develop a dual‐mechanism framework theorizing that while CEO promises elevate stakeholder expectations, they simultaneously constrain strategic flexibility. We argue that CEO promise‐making is shaped by two competing pressures: making more promises when the need to manage expectations upward is heightened and fewer promises when the need to preserve flexibility is increased. Further, we predict that under heightened uncertainty, CEOs preserve flexibility through strategic ambiguity (i.e., issuing promises with extended or vague time horizons and lower specificity). Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) to analyze over 69,000 earnings‐call transcripts from S&P 1500 firms (2010–2022), we identify 74,017 CEO promises and find support for our predictions. We contribute an original, publicly available dataset of CEO promises. Managerial Summary When CEOs publicly promise positive future results, they shape how investors and analysts view the company. These promises are a double‐edged sword: they can boost investor and stakeholder confidence, but they also lock the company into a pre‐determined path and make later shortfalls or pivots reputationally costly. Analyzing more than 69,000 earnings calls (2010–2022), we find that CEOs make more promises when needing to prove their legitimacy, such as during early tenure, when facing gender bias, or after missing earnings targets. However, in uncertain environments, CEOs often pull back from promise‐making or employ “strategic ambiguity” by making promises with vaguer timelines and details to maintain flexibility. Our analysis suggests that failing to deliver on these public commitments significantly increases the likelihood of CEO dismissal.
topics: Impact of AI and Big Data on Business and Society
title_cn: 塑造期望，失去灵活性：关于首席执行官承诺作为战略沟通工具的研究
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 首席执行官的承诺是一种强有力但尚未深入研究的沟通工具。我们发展了一个双机制框架，理论阐述了首席执行官的承诺虽然提升了利益相关者的期望，但同时也限制了战略灵活性。我们认为，首席执行官的承诺受两种竞争压力的影响：在需要提升期望管理时，做出更多承诺，而在需要保持灵活性时，则做出较少承诺。此外，我们预测，在高度不确定的情况下，首席执行官通过战略模糊性来保持灵活性（即，发布较长或模糊的时间框架和较低具体性的承诺）。利用大型语言模型（LLMs）分析来自S&P 1500公司的69,000多份财报电话会议记录（2010-2022），我们识别出74,017个首席执行官承诺，并发现支持我们预测的证据。我们贡献了一个原创、公开可用的首席执行官承诺数据集。 管理总结 当首席执行官公开承诺未来的积极成果时，他们塑造了投资者和分析师对公司的看法。这些承诺是一把双刃剑：它们可以提升投资者和利益相关者的信心，但也将公司锁定在一个预定的轨道上，使得后续的短期业绩不达标或战略转变在声誉上代价高昂。通过分析超过69,000个财报电话会议（2010-2022），我们发现当首席执行官需要证明他们的合法性时，例如在任期初、面临性别偏见或未能达成盈利目标之后，他们会做出更多承诺。然而，在不确定的环境中，首席执行官往往会减少承诺的数量，或者通过“战略模糊性”作出承诺，给出更模糊的时间框架和细节，以保持灵活性。我们的分析表明，未能履行这些公开承诺显著增加了首席执行官被解雇的可能性。

title: Patent regime shift and firm innovation strategy: Evidence from the Second Amendment to China's Patent Law
abstract: Abstract Research Summary While changes in intellectual property rights (IPR) protection significantly shape firm innovation, the mechanisms driving firms' responses remain poorly understood. Leveraging the Second Amendment to China's Patent Law, which strengthens appropriability particularly for state‐owned enterprises (SOEs), as a natural experiment, we show that stronger IPR has mixed effects on SOEs' innovation. While SOEs increase the rate of innovation subsequent to the Amendment, they shift the direction of innovation toward more familiar areas in which they face a lesser need to adjust existing routines. This directional change suggests a quality decline in SOEs' innovation that may be attributed to path dependence. We further show that this change varies systematically depending on different firm‐ and industry‐level characteristics that loosen or tighten the historical grip of path dependence. Managerial Summary This study offers valuable insights for corporate leaders navigating intellectual property rights (IPR) reforms and shaping their firms' innovation strategies, particularly in emerging economies. While stronger IPR protection can increase innovation output, it may also lead firms to concentrate on familiar technologies rather than pursue more novel ideas. Thus, corporate leaders should look beyond patent volume as a performance metric and instead foster creative thinking and engage in external collaborations to access new, cutting‐edge knowledge. Such efforts can help firms move beyond established routines and strengthen their long‐term competitiveness. To promote innovation of greater novelty, policymakers must complement stronger IPR protection with broader institutional support, including enhancing economic freedom, encouraging market competition, and cultivating a culture that values breakthrough innovation.
title_cn: 专利制度变迁与企业创新战略：来自中国专利法第二次修订的证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 尽管知识产权（IPR）保护的变化显著影响企业创新，但推动企业反应机制的原因却仍未被深入理解。本研究利用中国专利法第二修正案作为自然实验，该修正案特别增强了国有企业（SOEs）的可盈利性，我们发现更强的知识产权保护对国有企业的创新产生了混合影响。尽管国有企业在修正案之后的创新率有所提升，但它们的创新方向却转向了更为熟悉的领域，这些领域使它们在调整现有惯例方面的需求减小。这一方向性变化表明国有企业的创新质量可能下降，可能归因于路径依赖。我们进一步表明，这一变化在不同的企业及行业特征下系统性地变化，这些特征会削弱或加强历史路径依赖的影响。 管理摘要 本研究为企业领导者提供了在知识产权（IPR）改革中导航并塑造企业创新战略的宝贵见解，特别是在新兴经济体中。虽然更强的知识产权保护可以增加创新产出，但它也可能导致企业集中于熟悉的技术而非追求更具新颖性的想法。因此，企业领导者应超越专利数量这一绩效指标，而应鼓励创造性思维，并参与外部合作以获取新的前沿知识。这些努力可以帮助企业突破既有惯例，增强其长期竞争力。为促进更具新颖性的创新，政策制定者必须在加强知识产权保护的同时，提供更广泛的制度支持，包括增强经济自由、鼓励市场竞争，并培养重视突破性创新的文化。

title: Stylistic Differentiation in Cultural Markets: The Benefits of Conspicuous Category Spanning
abstract: A consistent finding in research on cultural markets is that innovation often involves recombining stylistic features across categorical boundaries. Cultural products routinely borrow features from other categories while maintaining their primary classification. However, we observe considerable variance in outcomes: Some borrowing achieves remarkable success, whereas others fail spectacularly. Existing theories of optimal differentiation and category spanning tell us that balancing familiarity and novelty matters and that improperly spanning categories can be costly, yet they provide limited guidance on how to differentiate effectively by borrowing features from alternative categories. Analyzing nearly 6,000 films and the narrative features they employ, I find that borrowing succeeds when products incorporate recognizable, familiar features from other categories. I further show that borrowing from sparsely populated categories provides greater benefits than borrowing from crowded ones, because audiences grow weary of features associated with oversaturated categories. These findings reconcile two influential but previously unconnected perspectives: the theory of optimal differentiation and the theory of category-spanning penalties. The results reveal conditions under which borrowing from other categories can enhance rather than diminish appeal and demonstrate that differentiation strategies succeed when borrowing is visible and interpretable to audiences. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.18354 .
topics: Consumer Behavior in Brand Consumption and Identification
title_cn: 文化市场中的风格差异化：显著跨类别的好处
abstract_cn: 关于文化市场的研究中，一个一致的发现是，创新往往涉及跨类别边界重新组合风格特征。文化产品通常在保持其主要分类的同时，从其他类别借用特征。然而，我们观察到结果存在显著差异：一些借用取得了显著成功，而另一些则惨遭失败。现有的最佳差异化和跨类别理论告诉我们，平衡熟悉感和新颖性是重要的，并且不当的跨类别可能会带来高昂的成本，但它们对如何通过借用其他类别的特征有效区分提供的指导有限。通过分析近6000部电影及其叙事特征，我发现，当产品融入来自其他类别的可识别、熟悉的特征时，借用会取得成功。我进一步表明，从人口稀少的类别借用比从拥挤的类别借用带来更大的好处，因为观众会对与过度饱和类别相关的特征感到厌倦。这些发现调和了两个之前未关联的影响力观点：最佳差异化理论和跨类别惩罚理论。研究结果揭示了借用其他类别特征能够增强而非削弱吸引力的条件，并表明，当借用对观众可见且可解释时，差异化策略会取得成功。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2023.18354 获取。

title: When the Headlines Fade, the Story Goes On: Investigating How Local Newspaper Decline Affects Firm CSR Engagement
abstract: We investigate how the decline of local newspapers affects firms’ corporate social responsibility (CSR) engagement. Historically, local newspapers have shaped firms’ informational environments by providing two interconnected functions that influence local stakeholders’ perceptions: external monitoring and enhanced visibility of corporate behaviors. Their decline weakens both functions simultaneously, creating uncertainty about how firms adjust behaviors sensitive to scrutiny and public recognition. We develop a contingency framework explaining how firms respond to this dual erosion depending on the broader informational environment. We theorize that nonlocal informational intermediaries—national newspapers, financial analysts, and credit rating agencies—shape whether firms continue to experience credible accountability pressures or opportunities for public visibility, and that firms respond differently to local newspaper decline based on the availability of these intermediaries. When such intermediaries remain active, firms face sustained evaluative scrutiny and retain channels through which CSR activities can be communicated, increasing the strategic value of CSR. When they are absent, diminished oversight and limited visibility reduce both the pressures and incentives to maintain CSR, making retrenchment more likely. Interviews with journalists and corporate executives contextualize and refine the proposed mechanisms by illustrating how firms interpret the erosion of local oversight and visibility and navigate evolving informational ecosystems. Using a staggered difference-in-differences design exploiting local newspaper declines across U.S. counties from 1996 to 2014, we find evidence consistent with these heterogeneous responses. Our theory advances understanding of how firms strategically adapt their CSR engagement to evolving informational environments. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18968 .
title_cn: 当头条逐渐褪色，故事仍在继续：调查地方报纸衰退如何影响企业的社会责任参与
abstract_cn: 我们探讨了地方报纸衰退如何影响企业的社会责任（CSR）参与。从历史上看，地方报纸通过提供影响地方利益相关者认知的两个相互关联的功能，塑造了企业的信息环境：外部监测和增强企业行为的可见性。地方报纸的衰退同时削弱了这两种功能，造成企业在应对敏感于审查和公众认同的行为调整时的不确定性。我们提出了一种应急框架，解释企业如何根据更广泛的信息环境对这两种功能的双重削弱作出反应。我们理论化了非地方信息中介（如全国报纸、金融分析师和信用评级机构）在塑造企业是否继续面临可信的问责压力或公众可见性机会方面的作用，并且企业在应对地方报纸衰退时对这些中介的可用性反应不同。当这些中介仍然活跃时，企业面临持续的评估审查，并保留可传达CSR活动的渠道，从而增加CSR的战略价值。而当它们缺席时，监督的减弱和可见性的限制则减少了维持CSR的压力和激励，使公司收缩的可能性更大。与记者和企业高管的访谈为所提机制提供了背景和细化，展示了企业如何解读地方监督和可见性的削弱，并导航不断演变的信息生态系统。利用1996年至2014年美国县域地方报纸衰退的分期差异法分析，我们发现了与这些异质性反应一致的证据。我们的理论推动了对企业如何战略性地调整其CSR参与以适应演变中的信息环境的理解。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18968 获取。

title: Leave It to Me: Overconfident <scp>CEOs</scp> ’ Lower Propensity to Delegate Acquisition Responsibility
abstract: Abstract Overconfident CEOs have been shown to lead their firms to achieve different outcomes, but the literature has only a limited understanding why this is the case. In this paper, we focus on whether overconfident CEOs run their firms differently, focusing on a key internal interaction: CEOs' choices regarding whether to delegate to other executives. Delegation is increasingly required given the growing size and complexity of public firms, yet surprisingly, most prior empirical work on delegation has been focused on lower‐level managers or non‐strategic tasks. We argue why overconfident CEOs would have a lower baseline tendency to delegate, and then posit how overconfidence interacts with contextual considerations, such that overconfident CEOs are less responsive to these cues than other CEOs. We test our hypotheses using a sample of 3690 merger and acquisition announcements and find evidence that overconfident CEOs are less likely to delegate compared to other CEOs and less responsive to multiple indicators at the task and firm level. Our paper's central contribution is that CEO overconfidence, a widely studied psychological trait in external risk‐taking and acquisitions, also shapes the internal management of firms via a different pattern and approach to delegating responsibility to other top executives.
title_cn: 把它留给我：过于自信的首席执行官较低的委托收购责任的倾向
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究表明，自信过度的首席执行官（CEO）会使其公司取得不同的结果，但文献对此现象的原因理解有限。本文关注自信过度的CEO是否以不同的方式管理公司，特别是关注一个关键的内部互动：CEO在是否向其他高管授权方面的决策。随着上市公司规模和复杂性不断增加，授权变得愈加必要，然而有趣的是，以往关于授权的实证研究大多集中在较低级别的管理者或非战略性任务上。我们辩论了自信过度的CEO在授权方面的基本倾向较低的原因，并提出自信过度如何与情境因素互动，使得自信过度的CEO对这些信号的反应程度低于其他CEO。我们使用3690则并购公告的样本测试我们的假设，发现自信过度的CEO相较于其他CEO更不可能进行授权，并且对多种任务和公司层面的指示反应较弱。我们论文的主要贡献是，自信过度的CEO这一在外部风险承担和并购中广泛研究的心理特质，同样通过不同的模式和方法影响公司内部管理，尤其是在向其他高层高管授权责任方面。

title: Hierarchical sequencing of resilience capabilities: a complex adaptive systems (CAS) analysis of Nigeria’s downstream oil and gas supply chain
abstract: Purpose The supply chain resilience (SCR) literature has largely conceptualised governance, technology and collaboration as parallel, independently deployable capabilities. This study aims to re-examines that assumption by investigating how resilience capabilities are hierarchically sequenced in supply chains (SCs). Focusing on the downstream oil and gas SC in Nigeria, the study enriches debates on the design and coordination of SCR capabilities. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on complex adaptive systems (CAS) theory, this study adopts a qualitative research design. Semi-structured interviews were conducted with key SC actors, including refinery operators, distributors and regulators, and were analysed thematically to examine how governance, technology and collaboration interact under conditions of institutional voids. Findings The findings reveal that SCR capabilities do not operate in parallel. Instead, resilience emerges through a hierarchical sequence in which macro-level governance stability enables meso-level technology adoption, which, in turn, facilitates micro-level collaboration. Resilience is therefore produced through bricolage that combines formal institutional arrangements with grassroots improvisation. Practical implications For SC managers and policymakers operating in volatile environments, the findings promote prioritising governance stability before advanced digital investments and recognising informal coordination mechanisms as foundational components of resilience. Originality/value This study conceptualises governance, technology and collaboration as an emergent, sequentially interdependent system of capabilities shaped by institutional constraints. By integrating CAS theory into SCR research, this approach extends the dominant parallel-capability perspective and offers new insights into how resilience develops in fragile and regulated SCs.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 韧性能力的层级序列：对尼日利亚下游石油和天然气供应链的复杂适应系统（CAS）分析
abstract_cn:
目的 供应链韧性（SCR）文献将治理、技术和协作大多视为平行的、可以独立部署的能力。本研究旨在重新审视这一假设，探讨韧性能力在供应链（SC）中的层次性顺序。本研究侧重于尼日利亚的下游石油和天然气供应链，丰富了关于SCR能力设计和协调的讨论。

设计/方法论/方法 本研究基于复杂自适应系统（CAS）理论，采用定性研究设计。对关键供应链参与者进行了半结构化访谈，包括炼油厂运营商、分销商和监管机构，并进行了主题分析，以探讨在制度空白条件下治理、技术和协作如何相互作用。

发现 研究结果揭示SCR能力并不是平行运作的。相反，韧性是通过一种层次顺序而实现的，其中宏观层面的治理稳定性促成了中观层面的技术采纳，而后者又为微观层面的协作提供了促进。因此，韧性是通过将正式的制度安排与草根即兴创作相结合的拼凑方式产生的。

实践意义 对于在动荡环境中运营的供应链管理者和政策制定者而言，这些发现强调了在进行先进数字化投资之前，应优先考虑治理稳定性，并将非正式协调机制视为韧性的基础组成部分。

原创性/价值 本研究将治理、技术和协作概念化为一个在制度约束下形成的渐进式、相互依赖的能力系统。通过将CAS理论融入SCR研究，这种方法扩展了主流的平行能力视角，并提供了对脆弱和受监管供应链中韧性发展的新见解。

title: Occupational Identity Formation in Unsaturated Spaces: The Layered Accretion of the American Astronaut’s Identity
abstract: How does the process of identity formation unfold in emerging occupations? While extant research has focused primarily on occupational identity formation through differentiation from other occupational groups, we theorize identity formation in occupations that emerge in unsaturated spaces, where competitive dynamics are less salient. We address this question through a qualitative historical analysis of American astronauts at the inception of space exploration (1958–1974). Our work theorizes layered accretion as a distinct identity formation process whereby a new occupation’s identity begins with importing an identity from an existing occupation (proto identity), refinement of the identity through work–identity alignment (core identity), and subsequent layering of new, distinct identities that are accreted on to the core. We specify the mechanisms underpinning layered accretion and contribute to deeper understanding of how multiple identities are managed in the early stages of identity formation in new occupations.
title_cn: 在未饱和空间中的职业身份形成：美国宇航员身份的分层积累
abstract_cn: 新兴职业中的身份形成过程是如何展开的？现有研究主要集中在通过与其他职业群体的差异化来探讨职业身份的形成，而我们理论化了在竞争动态不明显的未饱和领域中Emerging职业的身份形成过程。我们通过对美国宇航员在太空探索初期（1958年至1974年）的定性历史分析来探讨这一问题。我们的研究理论化了分层积累作为一种独特的身份形成过程，其中新职业的身份从现有职业（原型身份）中引入，经过工作与身份对齐的精炼（核心身份），并随后在核心身份上叠加新的、独特的身份。我们明确了支撑分层积累的机制，并有助于更深入地理解在新职业身份形成早期阶段如何管理多重身份。

title: Controlling the Control Condition: A Critical Methodological Review of Control Conditions in Experimental Management Research
abstract: Control conditions are essential to establishing causal relationships in experimental management research, yet they receive little attention compared to treatments. This study thus examines the current state of control-condition selection and design in top-tier management journals, reviewing 958 experiments from 421 study papers published from 2021 to 2023. Our review shows that researchers use true and pseudo-control conditions. True control conditions—such as no-treatment, all-but-treatment, and treatment-as-usual controls—provide a baseline for interpreting the effect of the treatment condition. In contrast, pseudo-control conditions (e.g., opposite-treatment-level or alternative-treatment designs) allow relative comparisons across conditions without providing a baseline. Notably, 20% of the studies we examined presented causal claims that were not supported by their designs, opening the risk of their results being misinterpreted and their effect sizes being exaggerated. These issues were further exacerbated by a lack of method transparency and construct validity. In response, we offer guidelines not only for primary study researchers to support the selection and design of control conditions, thereby enhancing transparency and yielding valid interpretations of causal claims, but also for research synthesists, reviewers, and editors to evaluate the same.
title_cn: 控制控制条件：实验管理研究中控制条件的批判性方法论回顾
abstract_cn: 控制条件在实验管理研究中建立因果关系至关重要，但相比于处理条件，它们却很少受到关注。本研究因此考察了在顶级管理期刊中控制条件的选择和设计的现状，回顾了从2021年到2023年间发表的421篇研究论文中的958个实验。我们的回顾显示，研究者使用了真实控制条件和伪控制条件。真实控制条件——如无处理、除治疗外的所有处理，以及通常治疗控制——为解释治疗条件的效果提供了基准。相对而言，伪控制条件（如相反治疗水平或替代治疗设计）则允许在条件之间进行相对比较，但并未提供基准。值得注意的是，我们考察的20%的研究提出了其设计不支持的因果主张，增加了其结果被误解及其效应大小被夸大的风险。这些问题因缺乏方法透明度和构念有效性而进一步加剧。对此，我们提出了指导原则，不仅为初级研究者提供支持，以帮助选择和设计控制条件，增强透明度并实现因果主张的有效解释，同时也为研究综合者、评审者和编辑提供评估的参考。

journal_name: Organizational Behavior and Human Decision Processes
title: The downside of generosity: How rare giving fosters stronger social connection
abstract: Giving serves not only to benefit others and society but also to foster social connections between givers and recipients. However, more giving is not necessarily merrier. This research finds that social connection depends not only on the act of giving but also on how many others receive the gesture from the same giver. Rare givers—those who give to fewer recipients—are perceived as more socially connected to each recipient than broad givers—those who give to many (the rare giving effect). This effect emerges across diverse contexts, including interpersonal gift exchanges in both new and existing relationships and corporate donations. As a result, rare givers enjoy a relational advantage: their gifts are valued more, and they are more likely to receive reciprocation (e.g., a gift in return or purchasing from the firm), even though they are perceived as less generous than broad givers. However, the negative effect of the number of recipients on perceived connection is attenuated when recipients are closely connected (e.g., donations to multiple charities supporting the same cause) or when gifts reinforce connections between recipients (e.g., friends sharing items in a matching set). These findings highlight an overlooked cost of broad generosity, with implications for managing interpersonal relationships and firms’ giving strategies.
title_cn: 慷慨的缺陷：稀有的给予如何促进更强的社会连接
abstract_cn: 给予不仅有利于他人和社会，还能促进给予者与接受者之间的社会联系。然而，更多的给予并不一定意味着更快乐。本研究发现，社会联系不仅依赖于给予的行为，还取决于同一给予者有多少其他人接受了这一举动。稀有的给予者——那些只向少数接受者施予的人——在每个接受者眼中被视为与其更具社会联系，而广泛的给予者——那些向许多人施予的人——则不然（即稀有给予效应）。这一效应在多种情境中显现，包括新旧关系中的人际礼物交换和企业捐赠。因此，稀有的给予者享有关系上的优势：他们的礼物更被重视，且更有可能获得回报（例如，收到回礼或从该公司购买），尽管他们被认为不如广泛的给予者慷慨。然而，当接受者之间关系密切时（例如，向多个支持同一事业的慈善机构捐款）或当礼物强化了接受者之间的联系时（例如，朋友们分享一套匹配的物品），接受者数量对感知联系的负面影响会减弱。这些发现突显了广泛慷慨的一个被忽视的成本，对管理人际关系和企业的给予策略具有重要启示。

title: “He gives me everything all the time, and I feel bad that I can’t even throw him the ball”: Relational care agency in interspecies care work
abstract: What might we learn about care and agency by attuning to the sensory dynamics of human-canine care collaborations? While most research on care focuses on humans, this paper extends the relational care work debate by engaging with interspecies care, foregrounding the nuanced relational care agency that entails nonhuman animal–human interdependency. Drawing on relational and interspecies care literature affording agency to nonhuman animals, we studied 13 assistance dog teams to explore how care is co-created between disabled humans and educated, yet vulnerable, animal workers. The empirical material includes ethnographic observations, interviews with human clients, and photographs. Our findings illustrate often invisible, nonverbal aspects of interspecies care, grounded in mutual trust and the aesthetic “reading” of one another, thereby contributing to a more granular understanding of relational care agency. Second, by showing how dogs, long understood through limited human conceptions, “shift” from care receivers to embodying agential care professionals who disrupt power dynamics and human-centered care norms, we nuance the carer–cared-for relationship in OS. Third, we offer novel insights into interspecies care, encompassing a broader range of animal-driven care practices than previous literature recognized. Finally, our study aims to foster more ethical relationships for working animals and humans alike.
title_cn: “他总是给我一切，我感到很愧疚，因为我连扔个球都做不到”：跨物种照护工作中的关系关怀能动性
abstract_cn: 我们通过调节人类与犬类关怀合作的感官动态，可能会学到关于关怀和代理的重要知识。尽管大多数关怀研究集中在人的身上，本文通过关注物种间的关怀，扩展了关系性关怀工作的辩论，突显了涉及非人类动物与人类间相互依赖的微妙关系性关怀代理。我们借鉴赋予非人类动物代理权的关系性和物种间关怀文献，研究了13个服务犬团队，以探讨残疾人类与受过教育但易受伤害的动物工作者之间是如何共同创造关怀的。实证材料包括民族志观察、人类客户的访谈和照片。我们的研究结果展示了物种间关怀中常常不被注意的非语言方面，这些方面建立在相互信任和对彼此的美学“解读”之上，从而为关系性关怀代理提供了更细致的理解。其次，通过展示狗狗如何从传统上被有限的人的概念理解为关怀接受者“转变”为体现代理关怀的专业工作者，这一转变扰乱了权力动态和以人为中心的关怀规范，我们对照顾者与被照顾者之间的关系进行了细致划分。第三，我们为物种间关怀提供了新颖的洞见，涵盖了比以往文献承认的更广泛的动物驱动关怀实践。最后，我们的研究旨在促进人类与工作动物之间建立更道德的关系。

title: TMT cognitive and affective trust, psychological safety and corporate entrepreneurship
abstract: What enables top management teams (TMTs) to turn trust into entrepreneurial action? This article answers this question by proposing a novel theoretical account to explain why and when trust-based relationships within TMTs create strategic benefits. Drawing on social exchange theory, we examine a moderated-mediation model that shows how: (a) TMT psychological safety mediates the effect of TMT cognitive and affective trust on corporate entrepreneurship (CE; the why ) and (b) social integration within TMTs moderates this mediated effect (the when ). We tested our model through a multi-wave survey of 372 TMT members in 124 established firms in Ghana. Our findings reveal that the two distinct dimensions of trust (i.e. cognitive and affective) influence CE through TMT psychological safety. Our results also demonstrate that the mediated effects are more pronounced when TMT social integration is high rather than low. Implications of these findings for theory and practice are discussed.
title_cn: 高管团队的认知与情感信任、心理安全与企业家精神
abstract_cn: 什么使高管团队（TMT）能够将信任转化为创业行动？本文通过提出一种新颖的理论解释，回答了这个问题，阐明了在何种情况下高管团队内的基于信任的关系能够产生战略利益。基于社会交换理论，我们考察了一个调节-中介模型，展示了：（a）高管团队的心理安全感在高管团队的认知信任和情感信任对企业创业（CE；即“为何”）影响之间起中介作用，以及（b）高管团队内的社会整合 moderates this mediated effect（即“何时”）。我们通过对加纳124家成熟企业中372名高管团队成员进行的多波次调查测试了我们的模型。研究结果显示，信任的两个不同维度（即认知信任和情感信任）通过高管团队的心理安全感影响企业创业。我们的结果还表明，当高管团队的社会整合程度较高时，这种中介效应更加显著。我们讨论了这些发现对理论和实践的影响。

title: Sourcing with Demand Updates
abstract: We study a two-stage newsvendor model where the initially uncertain mean demand is revealed midstream, allowing for a second, costlier order to be placed. The two-stage process is relevant to many retailers who have access to two supply options: a long-lead, low-cost option where orders need to be placed under much demand uncertainty, and a short-lead, high-cost option after a signal is revealed that updates the mean demand. We introduce a forecast evolution model that describes how the initial forecast for mean demand varies in response to the signal, which generalizes the popular additive and multiplicative martingale model of forecast evolution (MMFE). We show that the optimal first-stage order solves a simple ordinary differential equation (ODE), whereas the second-stage order is analytically available. We characterize asymptotics for the first-stage order and expected profit as the forecasted mean demand grows, and propose a simple, asymptotically optimal heuristic. We apply our study to data from a national retail chain, where we calibrate our model by maximum likelihood estimation (MLE). The comparison of several heuristic policies, as well as two benchmarks, shows the efficacy of our method. When the signal is more uncertain (e.g., for product lines with impulse- and trend-driven purchases), our heuristic with a simple adjusted critical fractile outperforms benchmarks; otherwise, the classic newsvendor solution performs well and is asymptotically optimal. We also extend the approach to distribution-free settings and capacitated systems. This paper was accepted by Jeannette Song, operations management. Funding: This work was supported by the Guangdong Key Lab of Mathematical Foundations for Artificial Intelligence [Grant 72192805], the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72401245], Imperial Business School (School Research Fund), and Shenzhen Stability Science Program 2022. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04692 .
title_cn: 带有需求更新的采购
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一种双阶段的新闻vendor模型，其中最初不确定的平均需求在中途被揭示，从而允许下达第二次成本更高的订单。这种双阶段过程对于许多零售商来说是相关的，他们有两种供应选项可供选择：一种是需要在需求不确定性较高的情况下下达的长期低成本选项，另一种是在信号揭示后更新平均需求的短期高成本选项。我们引入了一种预测演变模型，描述初始的平均需求预测如何响应信号变化，这一模型推广了流行的加法和乘法鞅模型（MMFE）。我们展示了第一阶段的最优订单解决了一个简单的常微分方程（ODE），而第二阶段的订单则可以解析获得。我们表征了第一阶段订单和期望利润的渐近特性，随着预测的平均需求增长，并提出了一种简单的渐近最优启发式方法。我们将研究应用于一个全国零售连锁的数据，通过最大似然估计（MLE）对模型进行了校准。对几种启发式策略和两个基准的比较显示了我们方法的有效性。当信号的不确定性较高时（例如，对于冲动购买和趋势驱动的产品线），我们使用简单调整的临界分位数的启发式方法优于基准；否则，经典的新闻vendor解决方案表现良好并且渐近最优。我们还将该方法扩展至无分布假设的设置和容量限制系统。本文已被运营管理领域的Jeannette Song接受。资助信息：本研究得到了广东省人工智能数学基础重点实验室（资助号72192805）、国家自然科学基金（资助号72401245）、帝国商学院（学校研究基金）以及2022年深圳稳定科学计划的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04692 上获取。

title: Frontiers in Operations: Last-Mile Delivery in Healthcare: Drone Delivery for Blood Products in Rwanda
abstract: Problem definition: Last-mile delivery is one of the most challenging and costly facets of the supply chain. Using data from Rwandan public hospitals that transfuse blood, we examine whether and the extent to which the adoption of a technological innovation—delivery drones—for the last-mile delivery of blood products impacts the way hospitals manage the inventory of these products and the downstream health outcomes for patients. Methodology/results: To estimate causal effects, we exploit the staggered rollout of the drone delivery system and use a generalized difference-in-differences approach. We find that all hospitals, regardless of their distance to the drone port, substantially decrease their on-hand inventory of red blood cells, most notably for the most flexible product (i.e., type O blood). Hospitals also meaningfully reduce their wastage of red blood cells, especially for “in-between” products that are neither the most flexible nor the least flexible (i.e., type B blood). With respect to patient health outcomes, we document large reductions in in-hospital mortality for two health conditions where timely access to blood is a critical input for treatment: postpartum hemorrhage and trauma. Interestingly, this change is concentrated among hospitals closer to the drone port, and these are the same set of hospitals that increase the transfusion of blood products. This increase is especially pronounced among blood products that cannot be held in stock at the hospital, including platelets and fresh frozen plasma. Managerial implications: Our results highlight key considerations for decision makers allocating scarce resources to improve hospital operations and health outcomes. Given that health improvements are not realized by all hospitals, operational decisions—such as the number and location of drone ports—should ensure clinically meaningful delivery windows for time-sensitive medical care. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Funding: This work was supported by the Wharton Dean’s Research Fund, Wharton Global Initiatives Research Program, Claude Marion Endowed Faculty Scholar Award, Mack Institute Research Fellowship, and Fishman-Davidson Center for Service and Operations Management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0055 .
title_cn: 运营前沿：医疗领域的最后一公里配送：卢旺达血液产品的无人机配送
abstract_cn: 问题定义：最后一公里配送是供应链中最具挑战性和成本最高的环节之一。我们利用来自卢旺达进行输血的公立医院的数据，研究采用技术创新——配送无人机——进行最后一公里血液产品配送是否以及在多大程度上影响医院对这些产品的库存管理以及对患者的下游健康结果。方法与结果：为了估计因果效应，我们利用无人机配送系统的分阶段推出，并采用广义差异中的差异法。我们发现所有医院，无论与无人机发射点的距离如何，都显著减少了手头的红细胞库存，尤其是对于灵活性最高的产品（即O型血）。医院还大幅减少了红细胞的浪费，尤其是对于那些既不是最灵活也不是最不灵活的“中间型”产品（即B型血）。关于患者健康结果，我们记录到两种健康状况下的院内死亡率大幅下降，其中及时获取血液是治疗的关键输入：产后出血和创伤。有趣的是，这一变化集中在靠近无人机发射点的医院，而这些医院同时也是增加输血产品输注的医院。血液产品的输注增加尤其明显，尤其是那些不能在医院储存的产品，包括血小板和新鲜冷冻血浆。管理启示：我们的结果强调了在分配稀缺资源以改善医院运营和健康结果时决策者需要考虑的关键因素。鉴于并非所有医院都能实现健康改善，运营决策——如无人机发射点的数量和位置——应确保时间敏感的医疗服务具备临床意义的配送窗口。历史：本论文已被《制造与服务运营管理》前沿运营倡议接受。资助：本研究得到了沃顿商学院院长研究基金、沃顿全球倡议研究项目、Claude Marion捐赠的教师学者奖、Mack研究所研究奖学金和Fishman-Davidson服务与运营管理中心的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0055获取。

title: Relationship Splintering and Repair: The Dynamics of Marginalization in Organizations
abstract: Drawing on a study of Syrian refugees engaged in informal work in Turkey, we examine how and why workplace relationships of marginalized groups break down and, in some cases, may be repaired. We develop a process model to explain the concept of relationship splintering—the gradual and recursive deterioration of relationships. We identify degrading, silencing, and distancing as key organizational mechanisms of splintering. These mechanisms are triggered by an attribution of blame and collectively constitute a system of organizational dehumanization. Over time, these mechanisms may cause complete relationship fracture, or, under certain conditions, be reversed to enable repair. Our work offers a more dynamic understanding of relationship processes extending theories of workplace marginalization. We also contribute to the literature on refugee workforce integration by foregrounding integration as a relational and processual phenomenon in organizational contexts characterized by structural inequality.
title_cn: 关系的分裂与修复：组织中边缘化的动态分析
abstract_cn: 基于对参与非正式工作的叙利亚难民在土耳其的研究，我们考察了边缘群体的工作场所关系是如何以及为何会破裂，并在某些情况下可能得到修复。我们提出了一个过程模型来解释关系分裂的概念——即关系的逐渐和递归恶化。我们识别出退化、沉默和疏离作为分裂的关键组织机制。这些机制由归责触发，并共同构成了一个组织非人化的系统。随着时间的推移，这些机制可能导致关系的完全破裂，或者在特定条件下得以逆转，从而实现修复。我们的研究提供了对关系过程的更动态理解，扩展了工作场所边缘化理论。我们还通过强调整合在结构性不平等背景下的组织环境中作为一种关系性和过程性现象，丰富了难民劳动力整合的文献。

title: Movin’ and Groovin’! Increased Prior Mobility Facilitates Newcomers’ Transitions Into Organizations
abstract: Integrating insights from research on newcomer socialization and generalization of learning, we theorize that individuals’ prior mobility across organizations may offer learning opportunities that mitigate the barriers they face as newcomers transitioning into subsequent employment contexts. Building on evidence that individuals experience a temporary decline in performance when they switch employers, we argue that more mobile individuals will experience a smaller performance decline and shorter time to performance recovery following entry into a new employer as they are better equipped to adapt to the norms, values, and expectations of new organizational social contexts. We further theorize that the benefits associated with prior mobility are likely to be greatest when newcomers’ social integration into a new organization is more challenging or more central to their new role. We find overall support for our theory using data on moves made by 8,693 hedge fund managers between 2,129 firms in the U.S. hedge fund industry from 2004 to 2019. We contribute to research on the influence of individuals’ career experiences on their transitions into new organizations, and offer insights to ongoing conversations related to the implications of employees’ investments in firm-specific human capital.
title_cn: 移动与活跃！提高的先前流动性促进新成员融入组织的过渡
abstract_cn: 通过整合对新员工社会化和学习一般化的研究成果，我们理论化认为，个人在组织间的先前流动可能提供学习机会，以减轻他们作为新员工在转入后续就业环境时所面临的障碍。基于证据表明，个人在更换雇主时会经历短期的绩效下降，我们认为，流动性较高的个体在进入新雇主后将经历更小的绩效下降和更短的绩效恢复时间，因为他们更能适应新组织社会语境中的规范、价值观和期望。我们进一步理论化，先前流动所带来的益处在新员工融入新组织的挑战性或对其新角色的重要性更大时，可能会更加显著。我们使用2004年至2019年间美国对冲基金行业中8,693名对冲基金经理在2,129家公司之间的流动数据，整体支持我们的理论。我们的研究为个体职业经历对其入职新组织的过渡影响提供了贡献，并为与员工在特定公司人力资本投资相关的持续讨论提供了见解。

title: AI users are not all alike: The characteristics of French firms buying and developing AI
abstract: In this work we characterise French firms using artificial intelligence (AI) in 2018 and explore the link between AI use and productivity. We distinguish AI users that source AI from external providers (AI buyers) from those developing their own AI systems (AI developers) based on the official French ICT survey, that provides information about the use of AI by firms. AI buyers tend to be larger than other firms, but this relation is explained by ICT-related variables. Conversely, AI developers are larger and younger beyond ICT. Other digital technologies, digital skills, and infrastructure play a key role for AI use, with AI developers leveraging more specialised ICT human capital than AI buyers. Overall, AI users tend to be more productive, however this is related to the self-selection of more productive and digital-intensive firms into AI use. This is not the case for AI developers, for which the positive link between AI use and productivity remains positive and significant. This relationship persists across multiple robustness checks, including analyses addressing endogeneity concerns. • We characterise French firms using AI, distinguishing buyers and developers. • AI developers are larger and younger, and leverage more specialised ICT skills. • Overall, AI users are more productive, but this appears driven by selection. • AI use positively affects developers’ productivity beyond such selection dynamics.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 人工智能用户并非都相同：购买和开发人工智能的法国企业特征
abstract_cn:
在本研究中，我们对2018年使用人工智能（AI）的法国企业进行特征分析，并探索AI使用与生产力之间的关系。我们根据法国官方信息与通信技术（ICT）调查区分了从外部供应商获取AI的用户（AI买家）和开发自身AI系统的用户（AI开发者）。AI买家的规模往往大于其他企业，但这种关系可以通过与ICT相关的变量来解释。相反，AI开发者在规模和年龄上都更大，这一现象超出了ICT的范畴。其他数字技术、数字技能和基础设施在AI使用中发挥了关键作用，AI开发者利用比AI买家更为专业的ICT人力资本。总体而言，AI用户的生产力往往更高，然而这与生产力更高且数字化程度更高的企业自我选择进入AI使用有关。对于AI开发者来说，这种情况则不同，AI使用与生产力之间的积极联系仍然显著且正面。这一关系在多项稳健性检查中得到持续验证，包括针对内生性问题的分析。
• 我们对使用AI的法国企业进行了特征分析，区分了买家和开发者。
• AI开发者的规模更大、年龄更小，并且利用了更为专业的ICT技能。
• 总体而言，AI用户的生产力更高，但这似乎是由选择驱动的。
• AI使用对开发者的生产力产生积极影响，超出了这种选择动态的影响。

title: Unlocking firm innovation under regional disadvantage: Can psychological openness compensate?
abstract: Firm innovation is strongly shaped by regional endowment – defined here as regional supply- and demand-side conditions for innovation – yet many regions are disadvantaged by having low levels of such endowment. While recent research increasingly emphasizes the role of regional soft factors , such as psychological openness, we still know relatively little about how such factors influence firm innovation under conditions of low structural endowment. Theoretically, we draw on Schmookler's scissors metaphor to conceptualize regional supply and demand conditions as hard, structural endowments of regions. We argue that favorable regional soft conditions – specifically psychological openness – can partially offset these structural constraints, but only for firms that possess sufficient absorptive capacity to recognize, absorb, and exploit such favorable regional conditions. Using longitudinal firm-level data on Swedish firms from 2004 to 2018, we show that regional psychological openness does not have a universal positive effect on product innovation. Instead, our results indicate that the benefits of regional openness are concentrated among firms with higher absorptive capacity operating in regions with low endowment, while firms in regions with higher endowment do not benefit in the same way. Implications for research and policymaking are discussed. • Regional soft factors are associated with firm innovation outcomes. • Regional psychological openness may offset regional structural disadvantages. • Firms need absorptive capacity to benefit from regional psychological openness. • Hard and soft factors at firm and region levels jointly shape firm innovation. • In high-endowment regions, psychological openness may coincide with lower innovation.
title_cn: 在区域劣势下激发企业创新：心理开放能否弥补？
abstract_cn: 企业创新受到区域财富的强烈影响——在此定义为创新的区域供给和需求条件——但许多地区因其低水平的财富而处于劣势。尽管近期研究越来越强调区域软因素的作用，例如心理开放性，但我们对于这些因素在低结构财富条件下如何影响企业创新仍知之甚少。从理论上讲，我们借用施穆克勒的剪刀隐喻，将区域供给和需求条件概念化为区域的硬性结构财富。我们认为，良好的区域软条件——特别是心理开放性——可以在一定程度上抵消这些结构性限制，但仅适用于那些拥有足够吸收能力的企业，这些企业能够识别、吸收并利用这些有利的区域条件。通过对2004年至2018年瑞典企业的纵向企业层面数据的分析，我们发现，区域心理开放性并不会对产品创新产生普遍的积极影响。相反，我们的结果表明，区域开放的好处主要集中在那些具有较高吸收能力的企业身上，这些企业在低财富地区运营，而在高财富地区的企业则没有以同样的方式受益。文中讨论了对研究和政策制定的启示。 • 区域软因素与企业创新结果相关。 • 区域心理开放性可能会抵消区域结构性劣势。 • 企业需要吸收能力才能从区域心理开放性中获益。 • 企业和区域层面的硬性与软性因素共同影响企业创新。 • 在高财富地区，心理开放性可能与较低的创新水平并存。

title: Family Ownership and CSR Overspending: Evidence from India on the Mediating Role of CSR Committee Composition
abstract: Abstract Why do some firms voluntarily exceed legally mandated requirements for corporate social responsibility (CSR)? We examine this question in the context of India, an emerging economy where the Companies Act of 2013 mandates eligible firms to spend 2% of profits on CSR. This institutional setting provides a clear benchmark for identifying firms’ CSR overspending, voluntary spending beyond the mandated threshold, as a substantive form of CSR engagement rather than compliance. Drawing on agency and stakeholder theories, we argue that family ownership influences CSR overspending through specific governance mechanisms: (a) overlapping membership between CSR and stakeholder relations committees and (b) female representation on the CSR committee. From an agency perspective, family owners pursue non-economic objectives such as preserving the family’s legacy and reputation. From a stakeholder perspective, they are particularly attentive to maintaining societal legitimacy. We propose that as family ownership increases, CSR governance becomes less oriented toward CSR spending compliance and more toward stakeholder preferences, leading to CSR overspending. Using panel data from 601 publicly listed Indian firms (2015–2024), we find robust empirical support for our research model. Our findings suggest that in a context where family ownership is widespread, CSR overspending represents a strategic choice shaped by family owners’ preferences and channeled through CSR governance mechanisms. This study contributes to research on family-firm ethics and CSR governance in emerging economies by clarifying how ownership and CSR committee composition influence CSR spending beyond compliance.
title_cn: 家族企业与企业社会责任过度支出：来自印度的关于企业社会责任委员会组成中介作用的证据
abstract_cn: 摘要：为什么一些公司自愿超越法律规定的企业社会责任（CSR）要求？我们在印度这一新兴经济体的背景下探讨这一问题。根据2013年的《公司法》，符合条件的企业必须将2%的利润用于CSR。这一制度环境为识别公司CSR超支提供了明确的基准，自愿支出超出法定门槛的部分，构成了一种实质性的CSR参与形式，而非单纯的合规。基于代理理论和利益相关者理论，我们认为家族所有权通过特定的治理机制影响CSR超支： (a) CSR委员会与利益相关者关系委员会之间的重叠成员资格，以及 (b) CSR委员会中的女性代表性。从代理理论的角度，家族所有者追求非经济目标，例如维护家族的遗产和声誉。从利益相关者的角度，他们特别关注维护社会合法性。我们提出，随着家族所有权的增加，CSR治理变得不再仅仅以CSR支出的合规性为导向，而是更多地关注利益相关者的偏好，从而导致CSR超支。通过分析来自601家印度上市公司的面板数据（2015-2024年），我们发现了对研究模型的强有力的实证支持。我们的研究结果表明，在家族所有权普遍存在的背景下，CSR超支代表了一种由家族所有者偏好塑造并通过CSR治理机制传递的战略选择。本研究通过澄清所有权结构和CSR委员会构成如何影响超出合规的CSR支出，为新兴经济体中的家族企业伦理和CSR治理研究作出了贡献。

title: Frozen-State Value Iteration: Faster Reinforcement Learning by Freezing Slow States
abstract: We study infinite-horizon Markov decision processes (MDPs) with fast–slow structure, in which some state variables evolve rapidly (fast states), whereas others change more gradually (slow states). This structure commonly arises in practice when decisions must be made at high frequencies over long horizons and when slowly changing information still plays a critical role in determining optimal actions. Examples include inventory control under slowly changing demand indicators or dynamic pricing with gradually shifting consumer behavior. Modeling the problem at the natural decision frequency leads to MDPs with discount factors close to one, making them computationally challenging. We propose a novel approximation strategy that freezes slow states during phases of lower level planning and subsequently applies value iteration to an auxiliary upper level MDP that evolves on a slower timescale. Freezing states for short periods of time leads to easier to solve lower level problems, whereas a slower upper level timescale allows for a more favorable discount factor. On the theoretical side, we analyze the regret incurred by our frozen-state approach, and this leads to simple insights on how to trade off regret versus computational cost. Empirically, we benchmark our new frozen-state methods on three domains: (i) inventory control with fixed order costs, (ii) a grid world problem with spatial tasks, and (iii) dynamic pricing with reference price effects. We demonstrate that the new methods produce high-quality policies with significantly less computation, and we show that simply omitting slow states is often a poor heuristic. This paper was accepted by J. George Shanthikumar, data science. Funding: This research is based upon work supported by the U.S. National Science Foundation [Grant 1807536]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00012 .
title_cn: 冻结状态值迭代：通过冻结慢状态加速强化学习
abstract_cn: 我们研究具有快慢结构的无限期马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs），其中一些状态变量快速演变（快状态），而其他状态则变化较为缓慢（慢状态）。这种结构在实践中常常出现，尤其是在需要在长时间范围内以高频率做出决策时，而缓慢变化的信息仍然在确定最佳行动中发挥着关键作用。例子包括在需求指标缓慢变化下的库存控制或消费者行为逐渐变化的动态定价。以自然决策频率建模问题会导致折扣因子接近于1的MDPs，使得计算上具有挑战性。我们提出了一种新颖的近似策略，在较低层次的规划阶段冻结慢状态，然后将价值迭代应用于在较慢时间尺度上演变的辅助上层MDP。短时间冻结状态使得较低层次的问题更易于解决，而较慢的上层时间尺度则允许更有利的折扣因子。在理论方面，我们分析了冻结状态方法所产生的遗憾，这为如何权衡遗憾与计算成本提供了简单的见解。在实证方面，我们在三个领域对我们的新冻结状态方法进行了基准测试：（i）具有固定订单成本的库存控制，（ii）具有空间任务的网格世界问题，以及（iii）具有参考价格效应的动态定价。我们证明了新方法能够在显著减少计算的情况下产生高质量的策略，并且我们展示了简单地忽略慢状态通常是一个较差的启发式方法。本文已被J. George Shanthikumar接受，数据科学。资助：本研究基于美国国家科学基金会支持的工作[资助号1807536]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00012获取。

title: Robust Allocation Policies for Distribution Inventory Systems with Replenishment
