abstract: Problem definition: This paper investigates a periodically reviewed distribution inventory system where a central warehouse replenishes multiple retailers facing uncertain demand. Only moment information about demand at each retailer is available, and unmet demand is backlogged. Methodology/results: We develop a robust multiperiod inventory model for the system based on the central limit theorem–based uncertainty set and transform the inventory planning problem into a transportation problem. We characterize two conditions under which a Monge sequence exists for the transportation problem and derive the optimal ordering decisions for the robust inventory model. Building on the robust optimal policy structure, we propose a priority-based inventory policy with look-up-to-k-period reservation. Under this policy, each retailer maintains both an order-up-to level and a reservation target based on the number of periods each retailer looks ahead. Managerial implications: Numerical experiments show that our policy outperforms the other benchmark policies from the literature. The advantage is particularly pronounced under robust performance measures and with real-world demand data that exhibit high variability, skewness, and tail risk. This highlights the strong ability of our policy to handle extreme cases in real-world data sets. Funding: L. Wang is supported by the Humanities and Social Science Research Project of Anhui Educational Committee [Grant 2024AH052105]. C. Yang is partially supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) [Grants NSFC-72531005, 72122012, and 72071126] and the Program for Innovative Research Team of Shanghai University of Finance and Economics. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0502 .
title_cn: 增补型配送库存系统的稳健分配政策
abstract_cn: 问题定义：本文研究了一个定期审查的分配库存系统，中央仓库为面临不确定需求的多个零售商进行补货。仅对每个零售商的需求moment信息可用，未满足的需求将被积压。方法论/结果：我们基于中心极限定理构建了一个强健的多期库存模型，并将库存规划问题转化为运输问题。我们描述了在两个条件下运输问题中存在Monge序列的情况，并推导出强健库存模型的最优订购决策。在强健最优政策结构的基础上，我们提出了一种基于优先级的库存政策，并实施向k期的预留。在该政策下，每个零售商根据其预期的前瞻期数维护一个补货水平和一个预留目标。管理启示：数值实验表明，我们的政策在性能上优于文献中的其他基准政策。这一点在强健性能度量和需求数据存在高度变异性、偏斜性和尾部风险的实际情况下尤为显著。这突显了我们政策处理实际数据集中极端情况的强大能力。资助：L. Wang获得了安徽省教育委员会人文社科研究项目的资助[资助号2024AH052105]。C. Yang部分获得了中国国家自然科学基金（NSFC）的资助[资助号NSFC-72531005, 72122012和72071126]及上海财经大学创新研究团队计划的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0502查阅。

title: Favorable Risk Selection in Medicare Advantage: The Effect of Allowing Non-Medical Services
abstract: Problem definition: Following recent legislation, private insurers participating in Medicare Advantage (MA) are allowed to expand their set of supplementary services to include benefits that are not primarily health related. This policy is meant to lead to lower costs and better care, but questions have been raised about how this affects the incentives of private insurers. We investigate the implications of the policy for MA offerings, beneficiary enrollment, and social welfare. Methodology/results: We develop a game-theoretical model of the interactions between a social planner, an MA insurer, and beneficiaries. We posit that, even after risk-adjustment based on clinical factors, the beneficiary population is heterogeneous in their vulnerability to severe health events due to social determinants of health (SDOH). Owing to this heterogeneity and the broadened remit of the new legislation, the insurer can therefore introduce (i) preventive supplementary services, reducing the risk of severe health events and therefore mostly benefiting vulnerable beneficiaries, or (ii) general well-being supplementary services that entail the same level of non-health-related utility for all beneficiaries. We demonstrate that the policy change incentivizes the insurer to provide preventive supplementary services—which have the largest health impact—if and only if it receives high capitation payments for enrolled beneficiaries. Otherwise, the insurer offers general well-being supplementary services at prices tailored to attract less vulnerable beneficiaries. Moreover, for intermediate values of the capitation payment, the insurer enrolls fewer beneficiaries than under status quo policies—highlighting how the policy change can backfire by exacerbating favorable beneficiary selection (cream skimming) issues inherent in capitation payment systems. Finally, we investigate whether the social planner can mitigate favorable selection by adjusting the capitation payment. We find that the planner may need to choose between inducing improved health outcomes at a high cost (via preventive services) and higher overall welfare (via general well-being services). Managerial implications: While allowing private insurers to offer a wider range of supplementary services has the potential to result in more preventive offerings (thereby lowering treatment costs), policymakers should be aware of the conditions under which the policy might, instead, increase cream skimming and reduce social welfare. Avoiding such outcomes may be costly. Funding: W. Hwang acknowledges support from the National Research Foundation of Korea (NRF) grant funded by the Korean government (MSIT) [Grant RS-2024-00410082]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0474 .
title_cn: 医疗保险优势计划中的有利风险选择：允许非医疗服务的影响
abstract_cn: 问题定义：根据近期的立法，参与医疗保险优势计划（Medicare Advantage, MA）的私人保险公司被允许扩展其附加服务的范围，包括那些主要不涉及健康的福利。这项政策旨在降低成本并改善医疗服务，但人们对这如何影响私人保险公司的激励机制提出了质疑。我们研究了这一政策对MA产品、受益人登记以及社会福利的影响。 方法论/结果：我们构建了一个关于社会规划者、MA保险公司和受益人之间互动的博弈理论模型。我们假设，即便在根据临床因素进行风险调整后，受益人群体在因社会健康决定因素（Social Determinants of Health, SDOH）而面临严重健康事件的脆弱性上仍然存在异质性。由于这种异质性以及新立法的扩展授权，保险公司因此能够推出（i）预防性附加服务，降低严重健康事件的风险，从而主要惠及脆弱的受益人，或（ii）涉及相同非健康相关效用的一般福祉附加服务。我们证明，只有当保险公司获得高额的登记受益人均额支付时，政策变化才能激励保险公司提供具有最大健康影响的预防性附加服务。否则，保险公司会提供一般福祉附加服务，价格调整以吸引脆弱性较低的受益人。此外，在均额支付的中间值下，保险公司的受益人登记人数少于现行政策下的情况，突显出政策变化可能适得其反，加剧了均额支付系统固有的有利受益人选择（即“优质选择”）问题。最后，我们研究社会规划者是否可以通过调整均额支付来缓解有利选择的问题。我们发现，规划者可能需要在以高成本改善健康结果（通过预防服务）与提高整体福利（通过一般福祉服务）之间做出选择。 管理启示：虽然允许私人保险公司提供更广泛的附加服务有可能导致更多的预防性产品（从而降低治疗成本），但政策制定者应当关注在何种条件下该政策可能会增加优质选择并降低社会福利。避免此类结果可能会导致高昂的成本。 资助：W. Hwang 感谢韩国政府（MSIT）资助的国家研究基金会（National Research Foundation of Korea, NRF）资助 [资助编号 RS-2024-00410082]。 附加材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0474 获取。

title: Hiring at the tip of the funnel: Externalizing the work of integrating and coordinating diverse human capital
abstract: Abstract Research Summary We adopt a network‐based perspective to examine the effects of hiring strategies in terms of the diversity of hiring sources. Considering the transferability of general and firm‐specific skills, we propose that firms can reduce integration costs while gaining diversity benefits when they hire from a focused set of firms that themselves hire broadly. We suggest that occupying this position in the mobility network enhances both innovation and productivity outcomes. Moreover, we posit that a strong cultural orientation, characterized by high intensity and consistency, further amplifies these benefits. Our analysis of mobility data from US public firms between 2005 and 2021 uncovers the pathways through which firms attain this position. Evidence from the panel matching method and fixed‐effects regressions provides support for our hypotheses. Managerial Summary We take a network perspective to understand how firms' hiring choices—particularly the range of companies they recruit from—shape their performance. We argue that firms can benefit when they hire from a small, consistent group of companies that themselves draw talent from many different firms. This approach allows firms to gain a wide variety of skills and experiences while keeping integration and onboarding challenges low, leading to more innovation and higher productivity. We also suggest that firms with a strong and consistent culture are even better positioned to take advantage of these benefits. Using data on employee movements among US public firms from 2005 to 2021, we show how firms attain this position, and find evidence in support of our hypotheses using panel matching and fixed effects models.
title_cn: 在漏斗尖端招聘：外部化整合与协调多样人力资本的工作
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究总结 我们采用网络视角来考察招聘策略对招聘来源多样性的影响。考虑到通用技能和公司特定技能的可转移性，我们提出，企业在从一个自己广泛招聘的集中公司群体中招聘时，可以降低整合成本，同时获得多样性收益。我们建议，处于这一流动网络中的位置能够提升创新和生产力成果。此外，我们认为，强烈的文化取向，特征为高强度和一致性，进一步放大了这些收益。我们对2005年至2021年美国上市公司流动数据的分析揭示了企业如何获得这一位置的路径。来自面板匹配方法和固定效应回归的证据支持了我们的假设。

管理总结 我们采用网络视角来理解企业的招聘选择——特别是他们招聘公司的范围——如何影响其绩效。我们认为，当企业从一个小而稳定的公司群体中招聘，这些公司自身又从许多不同的公司吸引人才时，企业可以受益。这种方法使企业能够获得多种技能和经验，同时降低整合和入职挑战，从而促进更多的创新和更高的生产力。我们还建议，拥有强大且一致文化的企业在利用这些收益方面处于更有利的位置。通过对2005年至2021年美国上市公司员工流动的数据分析，我们展示了企业如何获得这一位置，并使用面板匹配和固定效应模型找到了支持我们假设的证据。

title: Bricolage as Enacted Sensemaking in Emergent Response Groups: Organizing in Conditions of Extreme Equivocality
abstract: When crises strike, new forms of emergent organizing often arise to address urgent societal needs that formal institutions struggle to meet. Among these, emergent response groups (ERGs)—self-organized communities that form to respond to unexpected and extreme events—offer a particularly salient example of decentralized and nonhierarchical organizing. This multicase study investigates eight ERGs that formed during the COVID-19 pandemic to design and distribute critical medical supplies. Drawing on sensemaking theory, we show how bricolage—making do with at-hand resources—supports coordination and community structuring by reducing equivocality caused by distributed actors. Our findings describe how these ERGs grew rapidly by using bricolage to reduce action, goal, and resource equivocality, enabling coordinated and scalable crisis response efforts. We contribute to research on emergent organizing in crisis contexts by revealing how bricolage fosters coherence and rapid scaling in the absence of formal hierarchies. Our study also challenges the dominant assumption that bricolage is inherently limiting to organizational growth, showing that—in the context of self-organizing collectives—it offers a novel solution to the problem of coordinating action among distributed agents.
title_cn: 在紧急响应小组中的即时意义建构：在极端模糊性条件下的组织方式
abstract_cn: 当危机发生时，新的紧急组织形式常常出现，以满足正式机构难以应对的紧迫社会需求。在这些形式中，自组织社区（ERGs）作为响应突发和极端事件的团体，提供了一个特别突出的去中心化和非层级化组织的例子。本多案例研究考察了在COVID-19疫情期间成立的八个ERGs，这些组织致力于设计和分发关键的医疗用品。基于意义建构理论，我们展示了“构建性应变”——利用手头的资源应对挑战——如何通过降低分布式行为者带来的模糊性，支持协调和社区构建。我们的研究结果描述了这些ERGs如何通过使用构建性应变迅速增长，降低行动、目标和资源的模糊性，从而使得协调和可扩展的危机响应努力成为可能。我们首次揭示了在危机情境下涌现组织研究的新视角，表现出构建性应变如何在缺乏正式层级的情况下促进一致性和快速扩展。我们的研究还挑战了一个主流假设，即构建性应变本质上限制了组织增长，表明——在自组织集体的背景下——它为协调分布式代理人的行动问题提供了一种新颖的解决方案。

title: Short-Term Demands and Long-Term Commitments: A Temporal Model of Stakeholder Governance
abstract: Current scholarship offers divergent views on whether broadening stakeholder governance creates joint gains or redistributes value away from equity holders. To address this tension, we develop a temporal model of stakeholder governance that specifies how these gains are distributed over time. We argue that broadening stakeholder governance initially reduces rewards for equity stakeholders because coordination costs rise and value is reallocated toward contracted stakeholders. However, over time, diminishing coordination costs and increasing returns from firm-specific investments increase rewards for equity stakeholders. Additionally, because contracted stakeholders make firm-specific investments, they may be willing to compromise their claims on firm resources when their firms face economic difficulties. Given these dynamics, we argue that broadening stakeholder governance is likely to increase firm survival. To test these arguments, we analyze longitudinal data for French firms with varying governance structures. Overall, our findings suggest that broadening stakeholder governance produces a dynamic balance in which stakeholders protect their interests yet deepen their commitments over time. In this way, we elevate survival as a primary outcome of stakeholder governance and offer guidance on the design of resilient democratic governance.
title_cn: 短期需求与长期承诺：利益相关者治理的时间模型
abstract_cn: 当前的学术研究对拓宽利益相关者治理是否创造联合收益或将价值重新分配给股东存在不同观点。为了解决这一矛盾，我们提出了一个利益相关者治理的时间模型，明确了这些收益是如何随时间分配的。我们认为，拓宽利益相关者治理最初会减少股东的回报，因为协调成本上升，价值重新分配给合同利益相关者。然而，随着时间的推移，协调成本的降低和公司特定投资带来的增加回报会提高股东的收益。此外，由于合同利益相关者进行特定于公司的投资，他们可能会在公司面临经济困难时愿意妥协其对公司资源的索赔。考虑到这些动态，我们认为拓宽利益相关者治理可能会增加公司的生存能力。为了检验这些论点，我们分析了不同治理结构的法国公司的纵向数据。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，拓宽利益相关者治理产生了一种动态平衡，在这种平衡中，利益相关者保护自己的利益，同时随着时间的推移加深承诺。通过这种方式，我们将生存提升为利益相关者治理的主要结果，并为设计具有韧性的民主治理提供指导。

title: Civil Society, Multiple Publics, and Relational Recognition: Recognising Women Garment Workers and Organising Situated Responsibility in Bangladesh’s Apparel Industry
abstract: Abstract This research discusses relational recognition and the organisation of situated responsibility by exploring how diverse civil society actors from various local, national, and transnational levels, individually and collectively, facilitate safe and sustainable work for women workers in the Bangladeshi garment industry. Drawing on Nancy Fraser and Richa Nagar’s theoretical conversations into the mobilisation of publics and situated solidarity—where recognition is central to justice-seeking—we examine how public actions and debates within the gendered global apparel production network (GAPN) have the potential to democratise relations of recognition that can transcend the boundary for transformative changes to address equity. Through a 7-year qualitative, in-depth study, our analysis highlights how situated solidarity, rooted in a felt responsibility that entails accountability, is mobilised as collective “we”. This solidarity addresses struggles for recognition and offers a relational frame of recognition that integrates demands for redistribution—advancing equity, equality, and status for women workers within the GAPN—and representation, by promoting inclusion within production practices and institutional cultures. By examining the interplay between political-economic and localised conditions, alongside transnational dynamics involving multiple publics, we demonstrate how various actors situate their solidarity. This reveals how relational recognition, grounded in mutual recognition, contributes to the democratisation of GAPN governance by illustrating how accountability shapes the structuring of situated responsibilities.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 公民社会、多元公众与关系性认同：在孟加拉国服装行业识别女性服装工人并组织情境责任
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究探讨了关系性认同和情境责任的组织，通过分析来自不同地方、国家和跨国层面的多样化民间社会参与者如何个体与集体地促进孟加拉国服装行业女性工人的安全和可持续工作。基于南希·弗雷泽和里查·纳加尔关于公众动员和情境团结的理论对话——其中认同是追求正义的核心——我们考察了性别化全球服装生产网络（GAPN）内的公共行动和辩论如何具有民主化认同关系的潜力，这种潜力超越了变革性变化的边界，以应对公平问题。通过为期7年的质性深度研究，我们的分析突显了如何将根植于责任感的情境团结作为集体“我们”进行动员，这种责任感包含了问责机制。这种团结解决了对认同的斗争，并提供了一种包含再分配要求的关系性认同框架——推动在GAPN中女性工人的公平、平等和地位，及代表性，促进生产实践和制度文化中的包容性。通过考察政治经济和地方化条件之间的相互作用，以及涉及多个公众的跨国动态，我们展示了不同参与者如何定位他们的团结。这揭示了基于相互认同的关系性认同如何通过所阐明的责任感塑造情境责任的结构，进而促进GAPN治理的民主化。

title: Syncing Minds and Machines: Hybrid Cognitive Alignment as an Emergent Coordination Mechanism in Human–AI Collaboration
abstract: As humans and AI increasingly work together in organizations, how can they dynamically allocate tasks and roles amid evolving task demands? Humans and AI represent the world in distinct yet complementary ways, creating both performance opportunities and coordination challenges for human–AI collaboration (HAIC). Tackling this, we advance a novel theory of “hybrid cognitive alignment” (HCA) as an emergent coordination mechanism that explains microprocesses leading to a functional compatibility between human and AI, enabling both parties to anticipate and adapt to each other. We apply the taskwork–teamwork framework to explain what needs to align, and create an AI-typology to elucidate how HCA can be achieved. We delineate how humans collaborate with “tool-like,” “assistant-like,” “rigid-teammate-like,” and “teammate-like” AI through four distinct pathways to develop instrumental, contextualized, prescribed, and reciprocal alignments. Our theory complements the current top-down organization design approach with a bottom-up, emergent perspective. We highlight AI’s material properties as a distinctive driver of emergent coordination in HAIC, in parallel to human–AI’s iterative exchanges. Our work creates a new theoretical frontier for the coordination literature, helps to synthesize mixed findings regarding HAIC effectiveness, and generates implications for designing and deploying AI as a collaborator.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 心灵与机器的同步：混合认知对齐作为人机协作中的一种新兴协调机制
abstract_cn: 随着人类和人工智能在组织中愈加紧密地合作，如何在不断变化的任务需求中动态分配任务和角色？人类和人工智能以独特而互补的方式呈现世界，为人机协作（HAIC）创造了既有绩效机遇又有协调挑战。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种新颖的“混合认知协调”（HCA）理论，作为一种新兴的协调机制，解释了导致人类与人工智能之间功能兼容的微过程，使双方能够相互预期和适应。我们采用任务工作与团队工作的框架来说明需要协调的内容，并创建了一种人工智能类型学，以阐明如何实现HCA。我们 delineate 人类通过四种不同的路径与“工具型”、“助手型”、“刚性队友型”和“队友型”的人工智能进行协作，从而发展出工具性、情境性、规定性和互惠性协调。我们的理论以一种自下而上的新兴视角，补充了当前的自上而下的组织设计方法。我们强调人工智能的物质属性作为HAIC中新兴协调的一种独特驱动因素，与人类与人工智能的迭代交流相辅相成。我们的研究为协调文献开辟了新的理论前沿，有助于综合关于HAIC有效性的各种混合发现，并为设计和部署人工智能作为合作者提供了启示。

title: Venture Exits: A Review and Future Research Agenda
abstract: Exits are key events in the life cycles of entrepreneurial ventures. Venture exits have immense practical impacts on a variety of stakeholders, including founders, employees, organizations, resource providers, and broader ecosystems. As a result, the phenomenon of venture exits is of interest to a broad community of scholars across fields such as general management, entrepreneurship, finance and accounting, strategy, economics, organizational behavior, and psychology. We examine the multidisciplinary literature on venture exits, including initial public offerings, acquisitions, buy-outs, secondary sales, and related exit events, by analyzing 317 research articles published from 1991 to 2025. We integrate extant findings into a unified model describing the pre-exit, exit execution, and post-exit phases across multiple units of analysis: the individual, venture, resource provider, and environment. We identify common themes, predominant tensions, and important gaps, laying the foundation for a reinvigorated research agenda. Central to this agenda is embracing a process perspective that considers the fluidity of the actors, interests, and resources shaping venture exit decisions and outcomes. Grounded in our review, this perspective offers new insights into venture exits while creating opportunities to meaningfully challenge and advance existing approaches and theories.
title_cn: 创业退出：综述与未来研究议程
abstract_cn: 退出是创业企业生命周期中的关键事件。投资退出对创始人、员工、组织、资源提供者以及更广泛的生态系统等多方利益相关者有着巨大的现实影响。因此，投资退出现象引起了来自管理、创业、金融与会计、战略、经济学、组织行为学和心理学等多个领域的学者们的广泛关注。我们通过分析1991年至2025年间发布的317篇研究文章，探讨了关于投资退出的多学科文献，包括首次公开募股、收购、回购、二级销售及相关退出事件。我们将现有研究成果整合成一个统一模型，描述了多个分析单元（个人、企业、资源提供者和环境）在退出前、退出执行和退出后阶段的过程。我们识别出共同主题、主要矛盾和重要空白，为重新振兴的研究议程奠定基础。该议程的核心是采用过程视角，考虑塑造投资退出决策和结果的参与者、利益和资源的流动性。基于我们的评审，这一视角为投资退出提供了新的见解，同时创造了对现有方法和理论进行有意义挑战和推动的机会。

title: Dynamic Irrigation Management Under Weather Uncertainty and Soil Heterogeneity
abstract: Problem definition: This paper studies dynamic irrigation management under weather uncertainty and spatial soil heterogeneity of the field. Irrigation is a key method for increasing agricultural yield, addressing growing concerns about food insecurity in recent years. However, managing irrigation effectively is a complex task, particularly under uncertain weather conditions. With rising concerns about freshwater scarcity, increasing production costs, and the impacts of climate change, it is imperative to develop efficient and sustainable irrigation strategies. This paper proposes an (s, S)-type irrigation policy designed for farmers facing uncertain weather conditions and spatial soil heterogeneity. Methodologically, we build on and extend the existing operations management literature on the optimality of (s, S)-type policies by incorporating endogenous demand, providing a novel approach to irrigation management. Methodology/results: We formulate our problem as a stochastic dynamic program. We demonstrate that an (s, S)-type irrigation policy is optimal for an approximate system with homogeneous soil structure. Building on this foundation, we derive performance bounds and develop effective heuristic policies for the more general case that incorporates soil heterogeneity. Our numerical results reveal significant improvements over current irrigation management practices. Managerial implications: Our proposed policies could substantially enhance farmers’ profit margins and water savings compared with commonly used irrigation practices. Moreover, we demonstrate that the benefits of these policies become increasingly significant as water scarcity intensifies. Consequently, the proposed irrigation policies present a compelling option for farmers prioritizing profitability and sustainability. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2020.0187 .
title_cn: 天气不确定性与土壤异质性下的动态灌溉管理
abstract_cn: 问题定义：本文研究在天气不确定性和田间土壤空间异质性下的动态灌溉管理。灌溉是提高农业产量的一项关键方法，近年来，随之而来的对食品安全的日益担忧使得这一方法显得尤为重要。然而，在不确定的天气条件下，有效管理灌溉是一项复杂的任务。随着对淡水稀缺、生产成本上升以及气候变化影响的担忧加剧，开发高效且可持续的灌溉策略显得尤为重要。本文提出了一种针对面临不确定天气条件和土壤空间异质性的农民设计的(s, S)型灌溉政策。方法论：我们基于现有运营管理文献，扩展了关于(s, S)型政策最优性的研究，将内生需求纳入考虑，为灌溉管理提供了一种新的方法。方法/results：我们将问题表述为一个随机动态规划。我们证明了针对具有均匀土壤结构的近似系统，(s, S)型灌溉政策是最优的。在此基础上，我们推导出性能界限，并为更一般的包含土壤异质性的情况开发有效的启发式政策。我们的数值结果显示，与当前的灌溉管理实践相比，显著提高了灌溉管理效果。管理意义：与常用灌溉实践相比，我们提出的政策可能大幅提高农民的利润率和水资源节约。此外，我们证明了这些政策的益处在水资源短缺加剧时变得愈发重要。因此，所提出的灌溉政策为优先考虑盈利能力和可持续性的农民提供了一个引人注目的选择。附录材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2020.0187查看。

title: Leveraging Multiview Data Through Discrete and Regularized Deep Learning for Dynamic Financial Risk Prediction
abstract: Given the dramatic surge of demand for predictive insights into the dynamics of financial risk and the rich, yet entangled, information brought by proliferating multiview data, we propose a discrete and regularized deep learning (DRDL) method to better leverage such multiview data for dynamic financial risk prediction. Empirical evaluation demonstrates advantages of DRDL over benchmarked classic and state-of-the-art methods at both the model level (time-to-risk and out-of-time prediction performance) and the application level (identification and profitability performance). Besides performance gains, DRDL offers distinctive practical advantages. First, it enables explicit and controllable factor-level representations, allowing practitioners to inspect and regulate how cross-view signals are encoded. Second, it offers unique advantages in explicitly and precisely filtering out redundant information while extracting complementary information across heterogeneous data sources, allowing practitioners to better understand which unique informational components drive risk predictions. Third, it offers a practically viable and empirically effective way to promote functional disentanglement within a discrete and structured latent space. Fourth, it supports both time-wise and instance-wise monotonicity, aligning predictions with the cumulative and irreversible nature of financial risk escalation, which may be particularly valuable in risk monitoring and governance contexts.
title_cn: 通过离散和正则化深度学习利用多视角数据进行动态金融风险预测
abstract_cn: 鉴于对金融风险动态预测洞察的需求激增以及日益增多的多视角数据所带来的丰富但复杂的信息，我们提出了一种离散且正则化的深度学习（DRDL）方法，以更好地利用这些多视角数据进行动态金融风险预测。实证评估表明，DRDL在模型层面（风险时间和超时预测性能）及应用层面（识别和盈利性能）上相较于基准经典方法和最新方法具有优势。除了性能提升之外，DRDL还提供了显著的实际优势。首先，它能够实现明确且可控的因素级表示，允许实践者检查和调节跨视角信号的编码方式。其次，它在有效且精确地过滤冗余信息的同时，提取异构数据源中的互补信息方面具有独特优势，使实践者更好地理解哪些独特信息组成驱动风险预测。第三，它提供了一种在离散和结构化潜在空间内促进功能解耦的实用有效方式。第四，它支持时间和实例上的单调性，使预测与金融风险升级的累积和不可逆特性相一致，这在风险监测和治理背景下可能特别有价值。

title: The Role of the User Information Environment in mHealth Effectiveness
abstract: Despite the promise of mobile health (mHealth) systems, about half of interventions fail to show significant effects. We examine how users’ information environments—the sources from which they obtain health information—shape mHealth effectiveness. Using information integration theory, we ran a 25-month field experiment with 4,629 expectant mothers in rural China, testing an SMS intervention to reduce unnecessary C-sections. The intervention produced a 25.9% overall reduction, but effects depended on how mHealth information integrated with public and private sources. Public information, consistent with theory, overlaps with mHealth content and can complement it for unplanned pregnancies. In contrast, integrating mHealth with private information entails dynamics beyond simple information addition, including physician behavior. Results show that mHealth coupled with private information—especially care-seeking content—prompted more visits and inadvertently enabled provider-driven overtreatment rather than informed patient choice. For practice, mHealth efficacy is inseparable from social context. Providers should recognize that visits and decisions reflect family and peer influence and app design, not just clinical need, to avoid overtreatment. Developers should design with users’ existing information ecosystems rather than treat apps as isolated tools. Clinical guidelines should be updated to reflect mHealth-environment interactions, and patients should build media literacy to synthesize information from multiple sources.
title_cn: 用户信息环境在移动健康（mHealth）有效性中的作用
abstract_cn: 尽管移动健康（mHealth）系统具有潜力，但约一半的干预措施未能显示显著效果。我们考察了用户的信息环境——即他们获取健康信息的来源——如何影响mHealth的有效性。基于信息整合理论，我们在中国农村进行了为期25个月的现场实验，参与者为4,629名孕妇，旨在测试通过短信干预来减少不必要的剖宫产。该干预实现了25.9%的总体减少，但效果依赖于mHealth信息与公共和私人来源的整合方式。公共信息符合理论，与mHealth内容重叠，并能在意外怀孕时互补。相反，将mHealth与私人信息整合涉及超出简单信息叠加的动态，包括医生行为。结果表明，结合私人信息的mHealth——尤其是在寻求护理的内容方面——促使更多的就医次数，意外地导致提供者驱动的过度治疗，而非经过知情的患者选择。在实践中，mHealth的有效性与社会环境密不可分。提供者应意识到，就医和决策反映的不仅是临床需求，还包括家庭和同伴的影响以及应用设计，以避免过度治疗。开发者应基于用户现有的信息生态系统来设计应用，而不是将应用视为孤立的工具。临床指南应更新，以反映mHealth与环境的互动，而患者应提升媒体素养，以综合来自多个来源的信息。

title: Good Cops in a Greedy Institution? Dutch Police Officers’ Stories of Compound Moral Injury
abstract: Abstract The notion of moral injury is receiving considerable scholarly attention as a concept that can capture the lasting imprint of moral transgressions on frontline professionals and others. Whereas most studies adopt a clinical perspective to interpret this phenomenon, this study offers an inductive exploration of the organisational dimensions of moral injury in the context of police work, drawing on police officers’ stories of moral injury. To this end, in-depth interviews were conducted with morally injured police officers, which were analysed using narrative inquiry. This study shows that police moral injury needs to be understood in relation to the particularities of police work, its unique occupational culture, and circumstances. Thus, it shows the relevance of officers’ experiences of working in a ‘greedy institution’ that keeps demanding effort without providing the requisite trust or support. Theoretically, this study proposes the notion of ‘compound moral injury’ that was found to stem from multiple contributions, both on the frontline and in the organisation.
title_cn: 好警察在贪婪的机构中？荷兰警察的复合道德伤害故事
abstract_cn: 摘要 道德伤害的概念正在受到广泛的学术关注，作为一个能够捕捉前线专业人员及其他人道德越轨所留下持久印记的概念。虽然大多数研究采用临床视角来解释这一现象，本研究则在警务工作的背景下，基于警察的道德伤害故事，进行了一次归纳性的组织层面探索。为此，研究对受到道德伤害的警察进行了深入访谈，并运用叙事研究方法进行了分析。研究表明，警察的道德伤害需要与警务工作的特殊性、其独特的职业文化及相关环境联系起来理解。因此，这项研究凸显了警察在一个持续需求努力却又缺乏必要信任与支持的“贪婪机构”中工作的体验的重要性。从理论上讲，本研究提出了“复合道德伤害”这一概念，发现其源于前线和组织内多方面的贡献。

title: Large Language Models for Market Research: A Data-Augmentation Approach
abstract: This paper proposes a statistical data augmentation approach that efficiently integrates LLM-generated data with real data in conjoint analysis.
title_cn: 市场研究中的大型语言模型：一种数据增强方法
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种统计数据增强方法，能够高效地将大规模语言模型生成的数据与真实数据结合应用于联合分析。

title: Pricing Shared Rides
abstract: Pricing Based on Matching Outcomes Improves Shared Rides Operations Shared rides aspire to mitigate congestion and promote more sustainable urban transportation, but many platforms struggle to maintain a healthy and profitable shared rides product. Why have shared rides struggled, and how can platforms design a successful product? In “Pricing Shared Rides,” Chiwei Yan, Julia Yan, and Yifan Shen discuss the drawbacks of platforms’ existing pricing policies and show that a common approach to pricing suppresses demand and may even drive the platform out of the market. They then propose adjusting the price according to the extent she is matched with another rider—which proves to benefit both platform and riders alike in increased profitability and reduced payments. These benefits are especially pronounced in regimes with high cost and low demand, expanding shared rides access to areas where they have historically been most challenging to sustain.
title_cn: 共享乘车定价
abstract_cn: 基于匹配结果的定价改善了共享乘车的运营。共享乘车旨在缓解拥堵并促进更可持续的城市交通，但许多平台在维持健康和盈利的共享乘车产品方面面临困难。那么，为什么共享乘车会面临挑战，平台又该如何设计成功的产品呢？在《共享乘车定价》一文中，Chiwei Yan、Julia Yan 和 Yifan Shen 讨论了平台现有定价政策的缺陷，并指出一种普遍的定价方式抑制了需求，甚至可能使平台退出市场。接着，他们提出根据与其他乘客匹配的程度调整价格——这一做法被证明能为平台和乘客双方带来收益，实现盈利增加和支付减少。这些好处在高成本和低需求的环境中尤其显著，使共享乘车的覆盖面扩大到历史上最难以维持的区域。

title: Frontiers in Operations: When Does Schedule Consistency Improve Shift Worker Productivity?
abstract: Problem definition: Shift workers make up a significant portion of the labor force in major countries and are widespread across industries. Their work schedules often involve odd hours and inconsistencies over time, deviating from regular day workers. Lu et al. (2022) introduced a two-dimensional measure for shift worker schedule consistency, namely, the hour-of-the-day and the day-of-the-week consistencies, and demonstrated their efficacy in improving labor productivity for grocery store cashiers. We expand this nascent literature in several ways. Methodology/results: Using data collected from warehouse workers performing picking and loading tasks, our context is differentiated by the inclusion of night hours and a piece-rate pay structure. The former enables us to show that hour-of-the-day consistency improves productivity only during day hours; it is in fact detrimental to productivity, at an even larger magnitude, during sleep hours. We revise the rhythm-synchronizing theory proposed by Lu et al. (2022) to accommodate this heterogeneity. The latter affords a comparison of effect sizes across the two most common pay structures for shift workers. We demonstrate that hour-of-the-day and day-of-the-week consistencies’ impact on productivity are four and eight times larger, respectively, under piece-rate pay than under hourly pay. We further consider how two environmental factors, inclement weather and extreme temperature, both of which are easily accessible via weather forecasts by schedulers, attenuate hour-of-the-day consistency’s effect. Managerial implications: Departing from existing perspective that both schedule consistency dimensions are effective, we show robust evidence that day-of-the-week consistency not only has a larger impact, improving productivity by 9.20% for a first- to third-quartile change compared with hour-of-the-day consistency’s 2.03%, but is also relatively stable across days and resistant to moderation by environmental factors. Thus, it should be the primary operational lever for schedulers, especially given its relative ease of use in practice. We also find schedule consistency to be most beneficial for new hires, with its impact waning as workers accumulate experience. However, the speed of this attenuation is much slower than previously reported. We illustrate how these insights can be easily incorporated into a consistency-aware scheduling policy through numerical studies. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Funding: This study was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72172027, 72293563, and 72232001]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0019 .
title_cn: 运营前沿：何时调度一致性能够提高轮班工人的生产力？
abstract_cn: 问题定义：轮班工人在主要国家的劳动力中占有重要比例，并且在各行各业中普遍存在。他们的工作时间表通常涉及不规律的工作时间和随时间变化的不一致性，与常规日班员工有较大差异。Lu等（2022）提出了一种用于测量轮班工人工作时间表一致性的二维指标，分别是每天的时间一致性和每周的天数一致性，并展示了在提高杂货店收银员劳动生产率方面的有效性。我们从多个角度扩展这一新兴文献。 方法论/结果：利用收集自从事拣货和装载任务的仓库工人的数据，我们的研究背景因包含夜间工作时间和计件工资结构而有所不同。前者使我们能够表明，全天时一致性仅在白天有效提高生产率；在睡眠时间段内，实际上对生产率产生不利影响，且其影响程度更大。我们修订了Lu等（2022）提出的节奏同步理论，以适应这种异质性。后者则便于在轮班工人最常见的两种薪酬结构之间比较效应大小。我们证明，计件工资下的全天时一致性和每周天数一致性对生产率的影响，分别是时薪制下的四倍和八倍。我们进一步考虑了两种环境因素，恶劣天气和极端温度，这两者均可通过天气预报轻松获取，如何削弱全天时一致性的影响。 管理启示：与现有观点认为这两种时间表一致性维度都是有效的不同，我们提供了有力证据表明，每周天数一致性不仅影响更大，第一到第三四分位变化能使生产率提高9.20%，而全天时一致性仅为2.03%，而且在不同的工作日中相对稳定且不容易受到环境因素的调节。因此，它应成为调度者的主要操作杠杆，尤其考虑到其在实践中相对易于使用。我们还发现，时间表一致性对新员工最有利，随着工人经验的积累，其影响逐渐减弱。然而，这种减弱的速度远比之前报告的要慢。我们通过数值研究展示了如何将这些见解轻松纳入一致性意识调度政策之中。 历史：本文已被《制造与服务运营管理》接收，属于运作前沿倡议的一部分。 资金支持：本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号72172027、72293563和72232001]。 补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0019 获取。

title: Enhancing Volunteer Retention: The Role of Experienced Volunteers
abstract: Problem definition: Volunteers play a pivotal role in the daily operations of nonprofit organizations (NPOs). However, retaining volunteers remains a critical challenge for NPOs because of declining volunteering rates and high turnover. We explore a cost-effective approach to improving volunteer retention by leveraging the potential of experienced volunteers. Methodology/results: Using data from 49,378 volunteers at a food bank over a five-year period, we explore how interactions between experienced and new volunteers affect the latter’s retention. Our findings indicate that the presence of experienced volunteers on a shift increases new volunteer retention by 52%, with a substantially stronger effect (125% increase) for group volunteers. However, we find that increased familiarity among experienced volunteers negates this positive effect. This negative effect depends on the uncertainty inherent in the tasks undertaken by the volunteers. Managerial implications: Based on our findings, we propose a strategic reassignment policy for NPO managers. This approach involves reassigning willing experienced volunteers to concurrent shifts that lack experienced volunteer presence. With volunteer consent, this reassignment policy could mitigate the potential negative effects of strong social bonds among experienced volunteers while improving new volunteer retention by 14% on shifts that initially lacked an experienced volunteer, based on conservative estimates. History: This paper has been accepted as part of the 2025 Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Practice-Based Research Competition. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0327 .
title_cn: 增强志愿者留任率：资深志愿者的作用
abstract_cn: 问题定义：志愿者在非营利组织（NPO）的日常运营中发挥着关键作用。然而，由于志愿者参与率下降和高流失率，留住志愿者仍然是NPO面临的一项重大挑战。我们探讨了一种通过利用经验丰富的志愿者潜力来改善志愿者留存的成本效益方法。方法论/结果：通过分析来自一家食品银行的49,378名志愿者在五年期间的数据，我们研究了经验丰富的志愿者和新志愿者之间的互动如何影响后者的留存。我们的研究结果表明，经验丰富的志愿者在当班时，新志愿者的留存率提高了52%，而对于团体志愿者，其影响更为显著（提高125%）。然而，我们发现经验丰富的志愿者之间的熟悉度增加削弱了这一积极影响。该负面影响依赖于志愿者所承担任务的固有不确定性。管理启示：基于我们的研究结果，我们为NPO管理者提出了一项战略重新分配政策。该方法涉及将愿意的经验丰富的志愿者重新分配到缺乏经验丰富志愿者的同期班次。经志愿者同意，这一重新分配政策可以减轻经验丰富志愿者之间强社会联系可能带来的负面影响，同时在最初缺乏经验丰富志愿者的班次中，基于保守估计可将新志愿者的留存率提高14%。历史：本文已被接受为2025年制造与服务运营管理实践基础研究竞赛的一部分。补充材料：在线附录可访问 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0327。

title: Contribute to MY IT Service: Encouraging Technology Extra-Role Behaviors in User-Artifact Interactions from a Psychological Ownership Perspective
abstract: “Contribute to MY IT Service: Encouraging Technology Extra-Role Behaviors in User-Artifact Interactions from a Psychological Ownership Perspective” This research aims to investigate how interactions with IT artifacts can sustain users’ continuance usage of, and encourage their voluntary contributions to, access-based and algorithm-empowered IT services (e.g., Spotify and Duolingo). This question is particularly important because in such contexts, users often have limited interactions with other human users—traditionally the main driver of the target behaviors in virtual communities. In the results, we found that users are more willing to use the technology and perform extra-role behaviors that benefit the technology when they develop a user-artifact relationship, after controlling the alternative mechanisms. We further explain how customization and personalization features facilitate users’ development of such a relationship by co-constructing an extended self with the IT artifact. For practitioners, our study mobilizes the user resources and promotes user voluntary contributions that benefit the technology (e.g., knowledge contribution, user feedback, new user referral, and voluntary payment). By incorporating the algorithm into self-concept as an extended self, we propose a new way of human-algorithm interaction, and hence are able to advise on algorithm appreciation and AI adoption in the non-competitive consumer technology context and provide guidelines and use cases on IT design regarding customization and personalization.
title_cn: 为我的IT服务贡献：从心理所有权的角度鼓励用户与艺术品互动中的技术额外角色行为
abstract_cn: “为我的IT服务做贡献：从心理拥有感的角度鼓励用户与工件交互的技术额外角色行为”本研究旨在探讨与IT工件的交互如何维持用户的持续使用，并鼓励他们自愿为基于访问和强算法驱动的IT服务（例如Spotify和Duolingo）做出贡献。这个问题尤其重要，因为在此类情境中，用户与其他人类用户的互动往往有限，而后者传统上是虚拟社区中目标行为的主要驱动者。我们的研究结果表明，用户在发展了用户-工件关系后，更愿意使用技术并执行有利于技术的额外角色行为，这一发现是在控制了其他替代机制后得出的。我们进一步解释了定制和个性化功能如何通过与IT工件共同构建延伸自我来促进用户建立这种关系。对于从业者而言，我们的研究动员了用户资源，促进了用户自愿贡献，从而使技术受益（例如，知识贡献、用户反馈、新用户推荐和自愿支付）。通过将算法纳入自我概念作为一种延伸自我，我们提出了一种新的人的算法交互方式，并因此能够就算法欣赏和人工智能在非竞争性消费技术环境中的采用提供建议，同时提供关于IT设计中定制和个性化的指导和使用案例。

title: How Mega-threats Influence Workplace Cooperation: Effect of #BlackLivesMatter Salience on Cooperation among and between Black and White Coworkers
abstract: Mega-threats—public, shocking, and identity-relevant events involving violence or injustice—can disrupt organizational life. Yet, research has largely overlooked the fact that such events may create asymmetric identity-based threats for employees who share identities with victims versus those who share identities with perceived perpetrators, leading to divergent psychological responses and workplace cooperation within and between groups. We examine how the salience of a race-based mega-threat shapes cooperation between Black and White employees. Drawing on self-categorization theory and intergroup interaction research, we propose that mega-threat salience more strongly increases intra-racial cooperation among Black versus White employees, due to heightened in-group identification among the former. Conversely, we hypothesize that mega-threat salience more strongly reduces White employees’ willingness to initiate cooperation with Black colleagues, driven by perceptions of a morally tainted social identity and concerns about social rejection. We argue that this negative effect is attenuated when White employees hold relatively lower (vs. higher) professional status than their Black interaction partners. We find support for these predictions in over 124,000 dyadic interactions between Black and White players in the National Basketball Association during periods of heightened Black Lives Matter salience. Two experimental studies replicate these findings and provide evidence for the envisioned mechanisms.
title_cn: 巨型威胁如何影响职场合作：#BlackLivesMatter 重要性对黑人和白人同事之间及其内部合作的影响
abstract_cn: 巨型威胁——涉及暴力或不公正的公共、震惊和与身份相关的事件——可以破坏组织生活。然而，研究在很大程度上忽视了这样一个事实：这类事件可能为那些与受害者有相同身份的员工和与被视为加害者有相同身份的员工创造不对称的基于身份的威胁，导致心理反应和组织内外的合作出现分歧。我们考察了种族基础的巨型威胁的显著性如何影响黑人和白人员工之间的合作。基于自我分类理论和群体互动研究，我们提出，巨型威胁的显著性更强烈地增加黑人员工之间的同种族合作，而对白人员工的影响较小，这是由于前者的内群体认同感增强。相反，我们假设，巨型威胁的显著性更强烈地减少白人员工主动与黑人同事合作的意愿，这种现象源于对道德受污染的社会身份的感知和对社会排斥的担忧。我们认为，当白人员工的职业地位相对低于（而不是高于）黑人互动伙伴时，这种负面影响会减弱。我们在黑人与白人球员在国家篮球协会中进行的超过124,000次双人互动的研究中支持了这些预测，尤其是在黑人生命事务显著性提升的时期。两个实验研究复现了这些发现，并提供了预期机制的证据。

title: How Racial Minority Representation in Brand Communication Affects Social Media Engagement
abstract: Abstract Consumers increasingly appreciate racial diversity in brand communication, though the ultimate impact of racial minority representation remains ambiguous. Previous research typically finds a positive effect among racial minority target groups, but it generally ignores or offers conflicting effects for (larger) nonminority groups. We aim to address this gap by establishing the overall effect of racial minority models on social media engagement. Our multimethod approach combines large-scale field data (more than 14,000 posts by 75 brands) with a series of four experiments and a conjoint study ( N = 1,456) and offers consistent evidence of a positive relationship between racial minority representation and social media engagement, including among nonminority groups. The results also provide evidence for a mediating role of brand morality, such that consumers (regardless of racial background) perceive brands with greater minority representation as more moral. Brand motive acts as a boundary condition, such that the positive effect of racial minority representation disappears with an external (stakeholder-driven) motive. These findings provide compelling implications for the development of inclusive social media content.
topics: Consumer Behavior in Brand Consumption and Identification
title_cn: 品牌传播中种族少数群体代表性如何影响社交媒体互动
abstract_cn: 摘要 消费者越来越欣赏品牌传播中的种族多样性，尽管种族少数群体代表性的最终影响仍然模糊不清。以往的研究通常发现种族少数群体目标群体之间存在正面影响，但通常忽视或对于较大非少数群体提供互相矛盾的效果。我们旨在填补这一空白，明确种族少数模型对社交媒体参与度的整体影响。我们采用多种方法的研究，结合了大规模的实地数据（超过14,000条来自75个品牌的帖子）、四项实验和一项联合研究（N = 1,456），提供了一致的证据表明，种族少数代表性与社交媒体参与度之间存在正相关关系，包括在非少数群体中。结果还表明品牌道德在这一关系中起到了中介作用，即消费者（无论种族背景如何）认为具有更高少数群体代表性的品牌更具道德性。品牌动机作为一个边界条件，使得种族少数群体代表性的正面效果在外部（利益相关者驱动的）动机下消失。这些发现为 inclusive 的社交媒体内容的发展提供了重要的启示。

title: Lonely Work: Gig Work, Workplace Technology and Working-Class Loneliness
abstract: Abstract In this paper, I argue that changes in the structure of low-income work and developments in workplace technology have stripped away many of the essential social goods provided by such work. I identify the rise of platform gig work, adoption of automation tools, and use of employee efficiency monitoring technologies as developments that have both squeezed opportunities for socialization out of the workday and made it more difficult to find and plan social activities outside the workplace. I argue that the desocialization of work is a matter of justice that should concern states and suggest a number of potential regulations and pro-worker reforms to address the problem.
title_cn: 孤独的工作：零工、职场科技与工人阶级的孤独感
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文中，我论证了低收入工作的结构变化和工作场所技术的发展，剥夺了这种工作所提供的许多基本社会福利。我指出了平台零工经济的兴起、自动化工具的采用以及员工效率监测技术的使用，这些发展不仅压缩了工作日的社交机会，还使得在工作场所外寻找和规划社交活动变得更加困难。我认为，工作的去社交化是一个关乎正义的问题，应该引起国家的关注，并提出了一些潜在的法规和支持工人的改革措施，以应对这一问题。

title: A Review of Systems Perspectives in Sustainability: How Systems Properties Convey Systems-Wide Dynamics
abstract: As seven of nine planetary boundaries are breached, management scholars face an urgent challenge: how can organizations address complex social-ecological crises that transcend traditional organizational boundaries and objectives? Responding to this need, researchers have leveraged a plurality of systems perspectives, yet current approaches remain nascent and fragmented. In this paper, we review 25 years (2000–2024) of empirical sustainability management research across 17 leading journals. We identify core systems properties—interrelatedness, nestedness, non-linearity, and emergence—that collectively illuminate four critical systems-wide dynamics: equilibrium, disequilibrium, adaptation, and organized systems change. This systematic review offers scholars a unified framework for theorizing and addressing critical sustainability challenges facing organizations, society, and the planet.
title_cn: 可持续性的系统视角综述：系统属性如何传递系统整体动态
abstract_cn: 随着九大行星边界中已有七个被突破，管理学者面临着一个紧迫的挑战：组织如何应对超越传统组织边界和目标的复杂社会生态危机？为了回应这一需求，研究人员利用了多元的系统视角，然而当前的方法仍然处于初步和零散的阶段。在本文中，我们回顾了2000年至2024年间在17本领先期刊上发表的25年的实证可持续管理研究。我们识别出核心的系统特性——相互关联性、嵌套性、非线性和涌现性——这些特性共同揭示了四个关键的系统性动态：平衡、失衡、适应和有组织的系统变革。这一系统性综述为学者们提供了一个统一的框架，以理论化和应对组织、社会及地球面临的关键可持续性挑战。

title: The Need for Absorptive Capacity Alleviates the Free-Rider Problem in Knowledge Production
abstract: Knowledge sharing is central to strategy and organizational learning, yet its effect on knowledge production remains underexplored. When knowledge diffuses too easily, individuals may free ride on others’ costly knowledge production, creating a suboptimal equilibrium in which knowledge sharing persists but the average payoff is no greater than if everyone produced knowledge independently—the so-called Rogers’ paradox. We develop a game-theoretic model to re-examine this puzzle. In our baseline model, we reproduce Rogers’ paradox; frictionless sharing does not increase performance beyond individual knowledge production alone. We then extend the model to incorporate absorptive capacity—the need for prior investment in one’s own knowledge before learning from others. Absorptive capacity discourages pure free riding. Counterintuitively, although it introduces frictions in knowledge sharing, absorptive capacity increases collective knowledge production beyond the level attainable through individual knowledge production alone. This explains why extensive knowledge sharing in domains such as academia does not erode incentives for knowledge production. It also contributes to knowledge-based theories of the firm by showing that although hierarchical control may be crucial in contexts where knowledge is simple and codifiable, it may not be necessary where knowledge is complex and tacit. More broadly, our analysis illustrates how formal modeling can uncover overlooked mechanisms and integrate insights across cultural evolution, organizational learning, and strategy. This paper was accepted by Alfonso Gambardella, business strategy. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06471 .
title_cn: 吸收能力的需求缓解了知识生产中的搭便车问题
abstract_cn: 知识共享是战略和组织学习的核心，但其对知识生产的影响仍然没有得到足够的探讨。当知识传播过于容易时，个体可能会依赖他人付出代价的知识生产，导致一种次优均衡状态，即知识共享持续存在，但平均收益并不高于个体独立生产知识的水平——即所谓的罗杰斯悖论。我们构建了一个博弈论模型来重新审视这个难题。在我们的基线模型中，我们复现了罗杰斯悖论；无摩擦的分享并未提高超出个体知识生产的绩效。随后，我们扩展模型，引入了吸收能力——在从他人学习之前需要对自身知识进行投资的必要性。吸收能力抑制了纯粹的搭便车行为。出乎意料的是，尽管吸收能力在知识共享中引入了摩擦，但它却增加了集体知识生产的水平，超出了仅依赖个体知识生产所能达到的水平。这解释了为什么在学术等领域广泛的知识共享并未削弱知识生产的激励。同时，它也为基于知识的企业理论做出了贡献，显示出尽管在知识简单且可编码的情况下，层级控制可能至关重要，但在知识复杂且隐含的情况下则可能并不必要。更广泛地说，我们的分析阐明了正规建模如何揭示被忽视的机制，并整合跨文化演化、组织学习和战略的见解。本文已被阿方索·甘巴德拉（Alfonso Gambardella）接受，主题为商业战略。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06471 上获取。

title: Technology Development Outsourcing: When to Join Forces With a Rival?
abstract: ABSTRACT Knowing the challenges of collaborating with a competitor in developing new technologies, firms sometimes still choose a competitor instead of a noncompeting technology provider. To explore why, this study adopts an inter‐organizational trust view to explain the formation of a technology development outsourcing relationship. Using a vignette‐based experiment with procurement managers, results show how three product‐ and competitor‐related factors: product newness, competitor market size, and product substitutability, affect a purchasing manager's intention to choose a competitor. The post hoc analysis confirms the two sources of inter‐organizational trust, competence and integrity, in explaining the influences of the three factors. Using results from two waves of interviews, a behavioral experiment and a rational agent math model, this study explains competitor selection behaviors in a triadic context with a noncompeting provider as the default option. Contributing to the interface of technology outsourcing, co‐opetition in innovation, and supplier selection literature, these findings can help managers assess product and competitor attributes in deciding whether to collaborate with a competitor in a technology development outsourcing context.
title_cn: 技术开发外包：何时与竞争对手携手合作？
abstract_cn: 摘要 在了解与竞争对手合作开发新技术所面临的挑战后，企业有时仍然选择与竞争对手而不是非竞争性技术提供商合作。为探索其原因，本研究采用了跨组织信任的视角来解释技术开发外包关系的形成。通过对采购经理进行的短文实验，结果显示三种与产品及竞争对手相关的因素：产品新颖性、竞争对手市场规模和产品可替代性，如何影响采购经理选择竞争对手的意图。事后分析证实了在解释这三种因素影响时，跨组织信任的两个来源——能力和诚信。通过两轮访谈结果、一个行为实验和一个理性代理数学模型，本研究在非竞争性提供商作为默认选项的三方背景下解释了竞争对手选择行为。这些发现对技术外包、创新中的合作竞争以及供应商选择文献的交叉领域做出了贡献，可以帮助管理者在决定是否与竞争对手进行技术开发外包时评估产品和竞争对手的属性。

title: Beyond Truthful Reporting: Robust Strategies for Worst-Case Payoff Maximization in Large Markets
abstract: In many large-scale markets mediated by digital platforms, such as advertising, energy trading, transportation logistics, and spectrum auctions, platforms suggest that participants report true valuations to simplify strategic complexity. This recommendation is widely followed by smaller bidders who lack resources for sophisticated strategic analysis. This paper shows that simple deviations from truthful reporting can improve outcomes for such participants. Using a robust optimization framework, we derive practical bidding strategies for generalized first-price, generalized second-price, and core-selecting combinatorial auctions. Our distribution-free approach maximizes worst-case payoffs over a set of plausible competitor bids, without requiring detailed information about rival behavior. We demonstrate that simple strategies, specifically shading bids on preferred bundles, consistently outperform truthful bidding when bidders have straightforward valuation structures. This insight persists even in complex settings where closed-form optimal policies cannot be derived. The results provide actionable guidance for market participants with limited information who lack resources for deploying sophisticated bidding algorithms, while offering market designers insight into how participants might deviate from recommended strategies.
title_cn: 超越真实报告：在大型市场中实现最坏情况收益最大化的稳健策略
abstract_cn: 在许多由数字平台调解的大规模市场中，如广告、能源交易、运输物流和频谱拍卖，平台建议参与者报告真实的估值，以简化战略复杂性。这一建议被缺乏资源进行复杂战略分析的小型投标者广泛采纳。本文表明，轻微偏离真实报告实际上可以改善这些参与者的结果。利用稳健优化框架，我们推导出针对广义第一价格、广义第二价格和核心选择组合拍卖的实用投标策略。我们采用无分布的方法，最大化一组合理竞争对手出价下的最坏情况收益，而无需详细了解竞争对手的行为。我们证明，简单的策略，特别是在偏好组合上调低出价，在投标者具有简单估值结构时，始终优于真实出价。即使在无法推导封闭形式最优策略的复杂环境中，这一洞察依然有效。这些结果为资源有限、缺乏实施复杂投标算法的市场参与者提供了可行的指导，同时也为市场设计者提供了洞见，帮助其理解参与者可能如何偏离推荐策略。

title: Balancing Acts: Unveiling the Dynamics of Post Removal on Social Media User-Generated Content
abstract: Policy and Practice Abstract User-generated content (UGC) is central to engagement and value creation on social media platforms, but policy violations and low-quality posts create significant reputational, legal, and financial risks. Platforms commonly respond by removing posts that violate community standards, yet it remains unclear whether such actions deter users from contributing or instead improve subsequent behavior. Analyzing data from 40 Reddit communities using a difference-in-differences design, we examine how post removal influences users’ future contributions. We find that removing a user’s post reduces subsequent rule violations and increases the average number of upvotes their later posts receive, an indicator of improved content quality. These effects are stronger when users experience repeated removals and when they observe peers’ posts being removed, highlighting both direct and vicarious learning mechanisms. For platform operators, the findings suggest that targeted, consistent, and transparent post removal can serve as an effective governance tool, not merely to suppress harmful content but to foster higher-quality participation over time. For policymakers and regulators, the results underscore the importance of moderation frameworks that promote user learning, accountability, and procedural fairness. Well-designed moderation systems can enhance community standards while maintaining legitimacy and trust in digital governance.
title_cn: 平衡行为：揭示社交媒体用户生成内容的移除后动态
abstract_cn: 政策与实践摘要 用户生成内容（UGC）是社交媒体平台上参与和价值创造的核心，但政策违规和低质量帖子的出现带来了显著的声誉、法律和财务风险。平台通常通过删除违反社区标准的帖子来应对这些问题，但尚不清楚此类行动是否会阻止用户的贡献，或是改善其后续行为。我们采用差异中的差异设计，分析了来自40个Reddit社区的数据，研究帖子删除如何影响用户未来的贡献。我们的研究发现，删除用户的帖子会减少后续的规则违反，且增加他们后续帖子的平均点赞数，这被视为内容质量改善的指标。当用户经历多次删除或观察到同伴的帖子被删除时，这些影响更为明显，这突出了直接学习和间接学习机制。对于平台运营者而言，研究结果表明，针对性、一致性和透明的帖子删除能够作为一种有效的治理工具，不仅仅是为了压制有害内容，也能在长时间内促进更高质量的参与。对于政策制定者和监管机构而言，结果强调了促进用户学习、问责和程序公平的内容监管框架的重要性。设计良好的监管系统能够提升社区标准，同时维持数字治理的合法性与信任。

title: Resource redeployment in multi‐business firms: Centralized or decentralized?
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Although multi‐business firms can benefit from resource redeployment, we know little about the effects of alternative organizational arrangements on profits. This study examines a critical organizational choice, namely the centralization or decentralization of decision making. A formal model demonstrates that in the presence of business unit agency costs and costs of centralization, the profits from centralization versus decentralization depend not only on business relatedness—as emphasized in prior research—but also on return asymmetries between businesses. Moreover, in contrast with much of the research on contemporaneous resource sharing, the profitability of centralization does not increase monotonically with relatedness. The monotonic relationship holds only when relatedness leads to potential profits from redeployment in the intermediate range. As relatedness increases further, the advantage of centralization may decrease. Managerial Summary Diversified firms often redeploy resources from one business to another, and the firms must decide whether to centralize or decentralize their redeployment decisions. Much of the literature on related diversification in general, and with respect to redeployment in particular, suggests that related diversification will lead to higher profits when decisions are centralized. However, the analysis presented here shows that centralization may not lead to higher profits from redeployment for highly related diversification, and firms may be able to obtain equivalent or higher profits by decentralizing these decisions.
title_cn: 多业务公司的资源重新配置：集中化还是分散化？
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 尽管多业务企业能够从资源重新配置中受益，但我们对不同组织安排对利润的影响知之甚少。本研究考察了一个关键的组织选择，即决策的集中化或分散化。形式化模型表明，在存在业务单位代理成本和集中化成本的情况下，集中化与分散化带来的利润不仅依赖于业务相关性（正如先前研究所强调的），还依赖于业务之间的回报不对称性。此外，与许多关于同期资源共享的研究相反，集中化的盈利能力并不会随着相关性的增加而单调上升。单调关系只在相关性导致中间范围内的重新配置潜在利润时成立。随著相关性进一步增加，集中化的优势可能会减少。 管理摘要 多元化企业通常会将资源从一个业务重新配置到另一个业务，并且企业必须决定是集中化还是分散化这些重新配置决策。有关相关多样化的文献普遍认为，尤其是在重新配置方面，当决策集中化时，相关多样化将带来更高的利润。然而，此处的分析表明，对于高度相关的多样化，集中化可能并不会导致更高的重新配置利润，企业可能通过分散化这些决策获得相当或更高的利润。

title: When does category spanning hurt or help producers?
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Scholars have theorized many factors shaping whether category spanning helps or hurts producers. We first synthesize evidence by meta‐analyzing 25 years of empirical research, which reveals a null effect of spanning on average, yet with significant subsample heterogeneity. To unpack it, we theorize and find that spanning hurts producers more (i) when spanning occurs within bounded (vs. unbounded) category systems, (ii) when category associations are made by third parties (vs. insiders), (iii) when spanning is located at the product (vs. producer) level, and (iv) when spanning is occurring at once (vs. over time). Two mechanisms underpin these relationships: on the audience side, spanning influences evaluations when it is salient; on the producer side, spanning results in more positive outcomes when producers can control how their spanning behavior is conveyed to audiences. Because these two mechanisms operate jointly, their combined influence can result in spanning having a null, a positive, or a negative net effect. Our study identifies, across 16 theoretical configurations, where these three baseline effects should be expected and clarifies why. Managerial Summary Firms face a strategic dilemma: should they span across categories or stay focused? Prior studies show mixed results on whether spanning helps or hurts performance. Our findings suggest that outcomes depend on how salient spanning is to audiences and how controllable it is for producers. Spanning tends to hurt performance (i) when the categorization system is bounded (vs. unbounded), (ii) when third parties (vs. insiders) highlight the diversification, (iii) when individual products (vs. producers) span categories, and (iv) when spanning occurs simultaneously (vs. over time). Firms can benefit from spanning, but success depends on managing these four factors to reduce saliency and enhance controllability.
title_cn: 跨类别的产品对生产者何时有害，何时有利？
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 学者们理论化了许多影响跨类别行为对生产者是有帮助还是有害的因素。我们首先通过对25年实证研究的元分析综合证据，发现跨类别行为的平均效应为零，但存在显著的子样本异质性。为了深入理解这一现象，我们理论化并发现，当跨类别行为发生在有界（vs. 无界）分类系统内时、当类别关联由第三方（vs. 内部人）进行时、当跨类别行为发生在产品（vs. 生产者）层面时，以及当跨类别行为同时发生（vs. 随时间发生）时，会对生产者造成更大的伤害。这些关系背后有两个机制支撑：在受众方面，跨类别行为在显著时会影响评估；在生产者方面，当生产者能够控制如何将自己的跨类别行为传达给受众时，跨类别行为会导致更积极的结果。由于这两个机制共同作用，它们的综合影响可能导致跨类别行为的净效应为零、积极或消极。我们的研究确定了在16种理论配置中这些三种基线效应预计会出现的情境，并阐明了其原因。 管理总结 企业面临一个战略困境：是跨越类别还是保持专注？此前的研究在跨类别行为是否有助于提高业绩方面结果不一。我们的发现表明，结果取决于跨类别行为对受众的显著程度及其对于生产者的可控性。跨类别行为通常会伤害业绩（i）当分类系统是有界（vs. 无界）时，（ii）当第三方（vs. 内部人）突出多样化时，（iii）当个别产品（vs. 生产者）跨类别时，以及（iv）当跨类别行为同时发生（vs. 随时间发生）时。企业可以从跨类别行为中受益，但成功取决于管理这四个因素，以降低显著性并增强可控性。

title: Gendered Navigation of Advice and Suboptimal Behavior in Matching Algorithms: Evidence from the Residency Match
abstract: Two-sided matching algorithms have been deployed at an increasing rate in labor markets all over the world in part because they can result in more equitable labor market matches. To achieve this desirable result, institutions using these algorithms often engage in a translation process to provide advice to market participants about how to optimally interact with the algorithm. We draw on theories of gendered agency to theorize that men may be more likely than women to engage in independent advice seeking—an agentic way of navigating one’s understanding by seeking out additional advice about how the algorithm works to form their own understanding beyond the baseline advice provided by institutions—and that this tendency leads men to have more success with the algorithm because of their deeper understanding. We test these predictions in the context of the National Residency Matching Program (NRMP), which uses a two-sided matching algorithm to match graduating medical students to residencies in the United States. Using archival data of medical students’ responses in an incentivized simulation of the NRMP and 66 interviews with medical students going through the match, we find evidence supporting these hypotheses. Men are more likely than women to seek additional advice beyond the baseline guidance, improving their understanding and success with the algorithm. These findings advance prior literature by demonstrating that group-based disparities may occur even when the algorithm itself is unbiased because individuals navigate understanding of these novel algorithms in ways shaped by their identities (i.e., gender). Funding: The authors thank UCLA Anderson’s Morrison Center for Marketing and Data Analytics for financial support. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19652 .
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 性别化的建议获取与匹配算法中的次优行为：来自住院医师匹配的证据
abstract_cn: 双边匹配算法在全球劳动市场的应用速度不断加快，部分原因在于它们能够实现更公平的劳动市场匹配。为了达到这一理想结果，运用这些算法的机构往往会进行翻译过程，以向市场参与者提供有关如何与算法进行最佳互动的建议。我们借鉴性别化能动性理论来推测，男性比女性更有可能寻求独立建议——这是一种通过寻求额外建议来导航理解的一种能动方式，从而形成对算法运作的个人理解，超越机构提供的基础建议——而这种倾向使得男性在算法中获得更多成功，因为他们对算法的理解更为深刻。我们在国家住院医生匹配计划（NRMP）的背景下测试这些预测，该计划使用双边匹配算法将即将毕业的医学生与美国的住院医师项目匹配起来。通过对医学生在NRMP激励模拟中的回应的档案数据以及66位参与匹配的医学生的访谈，我们发现支持这些假设的证据。男性比女性更有可能在基础指导之外寻求额外建议，从而改善对算法的理解和在其中的成功。这些发现推进了先前文献的研究，表明即使算法本身没有偏见，基于群体的差异仍可能出现，因为个体在理解这些新型算法时，其方式受到身份（即性别）的影响。资金支持：作者感谢加州大学洛杉矶分校安德森商学院的莫里森市场与数据分析中心提供的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19652 获取。

title: Dynamic Demands versus Durable Skills: Career Dilemmas in Pharmaceutical R&D
abstract: Skill demands evolve over the course of individuals’ careers, as new roles demand different kinds of skills from previous jobs. Yet, skill portfolios can be slow to change. We posit that this tension between dynamic job demands and durable skills creates career dilemmas for building the right portfolio of skills for long-term success. Studying a group of scientists in the pharmaceuticals industry, we argue and find that while specialization helps scientists to advance faster initially, it holds scientists back once they reach managerial ranks where coordination skills are required. Within managerial ranks, scientists with broader experience will advance faster since their experience will develop broader knowledge and more diverse social capital, which in turn will help them build coordination skills. While we find some evidence that employees try to adapt to these changing needs over their careers, such efforts to adapt are insufficient. Instead, we find that the level of specialization acquired while working as a scientist continues to influence promotion rates after people are promoted into management. We thus show that a skill portfolio built to help advancement at one stage of the career may hold employees back at subsequent career stages.
title_cn: 动态需求与持久技能：制药研发中的职业困境
abstract_cn: 技能需求在个人职业生涯中不断演变，因为新角色需要的技能与以往工作中的技能不同。然而，技能组合的变化往往较慢。我们假设，动态的工作需求与持久的技能之间的这种紧张关系，给构建适合长期成功的技能组合带来了职业困境。通过研究制药行业中的一组科学家，我们认为并发现，虽然专业化可以帮助科学家在初期更快地晋升，但一旦他们晋升到需要协调技能的管理层，专业化反而会对他们造成阻碍。在管理层中，具有更广泛经验的科学家会更快晋升，因为他们的经历能够帮助他们发展更广泛的知识和更丰富的社会资本，这反过来又有助于他们建立协调技能。尽管我们发现一些证据表明员工在职业生涯中尝试适应这些变化的需求，但这种适应的努力仍然不足。相反，我们发现，在担任科学家的期间获得的专业化程度，继续影响人们在晋升到管理层后的晋升速度。因此，我们表明，为了在职业生涯某一阶段的晋升而构建的技能组合，可能会在后续的职业阶段限制员工的发展。

title: Motivations and institutional perspectives on Authorised Economic Operator certification
abstract: Purpose Companies certified under the Authorised Economic Operator Program (AEO) typically receive priority in customs control and access to additional trade facilitation when crossing borders. However, the cost-effectiveness of obtaining certification, such as AEO, remains unclear. Many companies do not participate because the benefits are neither clearly measured nor well defined. This research aims to examine the primary motivations driving companies to join the programme and evaluates operators’ perceptions of its effects. The research instrument was developed based on literature concerning ISO standards. Design/methodology/approach The methodology combined quantitative and qualitative methods, structured in four stages: (i) a survey of certified companies to identify internal and external motivations; (ii) interviews with experts during the AEO World Customs Organisation Conference; (iii) a seminar with representatives from the private sector, consultants and the Brazilian Customs administration; and (iv) a focus group involving the customs authority, consultants and representatives of certified companies. Findings The results indicate that motivations are linked to recognition as a secure operator, image enhancement, risk reduction and strengthening the culture of compliance. However, the perceptions reveal that not all expectations are met, especially regarding competitiveness, cost reduction and market share. Practical implications For companies, this study enhances understanding of the factors influencing AEO membership and may assist in evaluating the attractiveness of potential new members. For governments, the findings offer a strong justification for strengthening the programme. This research may affect society by providing a rationale for participation in the AEO programme. Originality/value The analysis, grounded in organisational isomorphism, shows that coercive, mimetic and normative institutional pressures shape motivations and perceptions. However, this study offers a new perspective on the interconnected concepts of the iron cage and institutional theory by providing a positive reinterpretation of the theoretical framework. AEO certification promotes organisational similarity, enhances supply chain predictability and demonstrates improvements in process efficiency.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 授权经济运营商认证的动机与制度视角
abstract_cn:
目的 根据授权经济运营商计划（AEO）获得认证的公司在跨境时通常会享有优先的海关控制和额外的贸易便利。然而，获得如AEO等认证的成本效益仍不明确。许多公司并未参与该计划，因为其收益既没有明确的衡量标准，也不够清晰。本研究旨在探讨推动公司加入该计划的主要动机，并评估运营商对其影响的看法。研究工具是基于关于ISO标准的文献开发的。

设计/方法论/方法 本研究的方法论结合了定量和定性方法，分为四个阶段：（i）对认证公司进行调查，以识别内部和外部动机；（ii）在AEO世界海关组织大会上与专家进行访谈；（iii）与私营部门代表、顾问和巴西海关管理部门举行研讨会；（iv）与海关部门、顾问和认证公司代表组成焦点小组进行讨论。

研究结果 结果表明，动机与作为安全运营商的认可、形象提升、风险降低以及加强合规文化相关。然而，调查结果显示，并非所有期望都得以实现，特别是在竞争力、成本降低和市场份额方面。

实践意义 对于公司而言，本研究增强了对影响AEO成员资格因素的理解，并可能有助于评估潜在新成员的吸引力。对政府而言，研究结果为加强该计划提供了有力的理由。本研究可能通过提供参与AEO计划的理据而影响社会。

原创性/价值 本分析基于组织同构理论，表明强制性、模仿性和规范性制度压力塑造了动机和感知。然而，本研究通过对理论框架的积极再解释，为铁笼与制度理论的相互关联概念提供了一种新的视角。AEO认证促进了组织相似性，增强了供应链的可预测性，并展示了流程效率的改善。

title: Corrective Governance in the Boardroom: A Negotiated Order Perspective
abstract: We leverage negotiated order theory to develop a model of board corrective governance concerning CEO leadership. We extend research on corporate governance to theorize that a board’s response to concerns about CEO leadership is a dynamic process of social order disruption and negotiation. When a disruption of an existing social order occurs, the CEO–board relationship is renegotiated by the board and, potentially, the CEO. We identify two critical relational dimensions—board affiliation with the CEO and board dependence on the CEO—that create four distinct negotiation conditions. Our model delineates the manner in which these negotiation conditions, in conjunction with the negotiation approach (cooperative or competitive) of the board and the CEO, give rise to a spectrum of first-order (i.e., retention, discipline, empowerment, dismissal) and second-order (i.e., changes to board dependence and affiliation) outcomes that influence the CEO–board relationship and subsequent corrective governance episodes. Our theoretical framework has important implications for governance research and practice, underscoring the need to view corrective governance decisions as interrelated negotiated outcomes shaped by evolving relational dynamics.
title_cn: 董事会中的纠正治理：一种协商秩序视角
abstract_cn: 我们利用协商秩序理论，发展了一种关于首席执行官（CEO）领导力的董事会纠正治理模型。我们扩展了对公司治理的研究，理论化董事会对CEO领导力担忧的回应是一个社会秩序破坏与谈判的动态过程。当现有社会秩序发生破坏时，董事会和可能的CEO之间的关系会被重新协商。我们识别出两个关键的关系维度——董事会与CEO的关联度以及董事会对CEO的依赖度——这形成了四种不同的谈判条件。我们的模型阐明了这些谈判条件如何与董事会和CEO的谈判方式（合作或竞争）相结合，从而产生一系列的一阶（即留任、纪律、赋权、解雇）和二阶（即董事会依赖度和关联度的变化）结果，这些结果影响着CEO与董事会之间的关系以及后续的纠正治理事件。我们的理论框架对治理研究与实践具有重要意义，强调需要将纠正治理决策视为受不断演变的关系动态影响的相互关联的谈判结果。

title: The Hidden Costs of Fairness in Platform Markets: The Dynamics of Lowering Developer Royalty Rates
abstract: Multisided platforms crucially rely on indirect network effects. When trying to strengthen these effects, platform owners face a fundamental challenge, namely, designing incentives to enhance developer effort and simultaneously ensuring the release of high-quality products on the platform. This paper highlights the costs associated with lowering royalty rates to boost developer effort, as such reductions increase the relative supply of lower-quality offerings, worsening information congestion problems and amplifying the importance of visibility-enhancing investments. We leverage the quasi random announcements made by Apple and Google, declaring their intention to reduce the royalty rate applied to small app developers from 30% to 15%. We analyze the implications of these reforms using a difference-in-differences approach, finding a substantial increase in small developers’ likelihood of releasing lower-quality and less original apps on iOS and Android after the announcements. These effects are neither paralleled by a comparable increase in high-quality app releases nor by an increase in small developers’ likelihood of launching venture-backed apps. Consistent with worsening information congestion problems because of an influx of low-quality apps, our findings show an increase in the marginal value of experienced user certifications and developers’ app store optimization efforts post announcement. Additionally, we observe that venture capitalists are increasingly concentrating their investments in ventures with higher (observable) quality. This paper was accepted by Anita McGahan, business strategy. Funding: This work was supported by the Spanish Ministry of Education [Project PID2022-138710NB-I00 funded by MCIU/AEI/10.13039/501100011033/FEDER, UE]. A. Conti acknowledges financial support from the Swiss National Science Foundation [Grant 100013_197807]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.0586 .
title_cn: 平台市场公平性的隐性成本：降低开发者版税率的动态分析
abstract_cn: 多方平台在很大程度上依赖于间接网络效应。在试图增强这些效应时，平台拥有者面临一个根本性挑战，即设计激励机制以提升开发者的努力，同时确保在平台上发布高质量的产品。本文强调了降低版税率以激励开发者努力所带来的成本，因为这样的下降会增加相对低质量产品的供应，从而加剧信息拥堵问题，并放大可见性增强投资的重要性。我们利用苹果和谷歌的准随机公告，即宣布将针对小型应用开发者的版税率从30%降低到15%的意图。我们采用差异中的差异方法分析这些改革的影响，发现公告后，小型开发者在iOS和Android平台上发布低质量和缺乏原创性的应用的可能性显著增加。这些效应并未伴随高质量应用发布的相应增长，也没有导致小型开发者推出风险投资支持应用的可能性增加。与低质量应用涌入导致的信息拥堵问题恶化一致，我们的研究结果显示，在公告之后，经验丰富的用户认证和开发者的应用商店优化努力的边际价值增加。此外，我们还观察到风险投资家正日益集中对更高（可观察）质量企业的投资。本文由安妮塔·麦加汉（Anita McGahan）接受，涉及商业战略。资助：本研究得到了西班牙教育部的支持 [项目PID2022-138710NB-I00，资助单位MCIU/AEI/10.13039/501100011033/FEDER, UE]。A. Conti 感谢瑞士国家科学基金会的财务支持 [拨款100013_197807]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.0586获取。

title: Flexible Data Aggregation for Prediction and Decision Making with Contextual Information: Applications in Retailing
abstract: Problem definition: How should online retailers make demand predictions or operational decisions with limited relevant data? Motivated by conventional data aggregation approaches, we develop a flexible data aggregation (FlexDA) framework to adapt to different degrees of heterogeneity across products, thereby striking a better balance between the bias and variance of data-driven predictions and decisions. Methodology/results: Under the FlexDA framework, we propose aggregating the individual data sets at different levels, potentially based on contextual information, and training submodels with each aggregated data set. A meta-model is trained to integrate the outputs of these submodels with a set of weights. For demand prediction tasks with linear models, we propose a consistent estimate of the optimal weight and theoretically demonstrate the advantage of the FlexDA approach over existing approaches under the small-data large-scale regime. For decision making with nonlinear feature-demand relationships, with a fixed sample size, we show that the optimality gap of the FlexDA approach decays near-linearly in the number of products with high probability. We further validate the FlexDA approach with synthetic data and real data from the Rossmann store. Building on theoretical development and empirical validation, we conducted an internal study with Meituan, focusing on ordering problems in their community group buying business. Our proposed approach achieves an average reduction of more than 10% in both lost sales ratio and inventory ratio for newly launched fresh products, as well as standard products compared with the algorithm implemented by Meituan. Managerial implications: Simply aggregating data from all products and training a shared model reduces the high variance caused by data scarcity but compromises the ability to capture heterogeneity across products. Our study highlights the value of flexible data aggregation for data-driven prediction and decision making, especially for large-scale applications with limited data, with both theoretical and empirical support. Funding: C. Li is supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72472098, 72102142, 72131010, and 72192833/72192830]. Y. Rong is supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72025201, 72331006, and 72221001]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0313 .
title_cn: 基于情境信息的灵活数据聚合用于预测和决策：在零售中的应用
abstract_cn: 问题定义：在线零售商如何在有限的相关数据下进行需求预测或运营决策？受到传统数据聚合方法的启发，我们开发了一个灵活的数据聚合（FlexDA）框架，以适应不同产品间的异质性，从而在数据驱动的预测和决策中更好地平衡偏差与方差。方法论/结果：在FlexDA框架下，我们建议在不同层次上聚合个体数据集，可能基于上下文信息，并利用每个聚合数据集训练子模型。一个元模型被训练用于整合这些子模型的输出，并赋予一组权重。针对线性模型的需求预测任务，我们提出了一种一致的最优权重估计，并从理论上证明了FlexDA方法在小数据大规模背景下优于现有方法的优势。对于具有非线性特征-需求关系的决策制定，在固定样本大小下，我们展示了FlexDA方法的最优性差距以高概率在产品数量增加时呈近线性衰减。我们进一步使用合成数据和来自Rossmann商店的真实数据验证了FlexDA方法。基于理论发展和实证验证，我们与美团进行了一项内部研究，专注于其社区团购业务中的订货问题。与美团实施的算法相比，我们提出的方法在新推出的新鲜产品及标准产品方面，均实现了超过10%的平均销售损失率和库存比率的降低。管理启示：简单地聚合所有产品的数据并训练一个共享模型虽然可以减少因数据稀缺引起的高方差，但却妥协了捕捉产品间异质性的能力。我们的研究强调灵活数据聚合在数据驱动的预测和决策中的价值，特别是在有限数据的大规模应用中，并得到了理论与实证的支持。资金支持：李某得到中国国家自然科学基金的资助[项目编号72472098、72102142、72131010和72192833/72192830]。荣某得到中国国家自然科学基金的资助[项目编号72025201、72331006和72221001]。补充材料：在线附录可访问https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0313。

title: You, Me, or We? Coproductive Principal-Agent Dynamics
abstract: Problem definition: Projects are often initiated by a single person—a principal—who then decides whether to form a team by sharing project value with an agent. We ask the following: When does a principal form a team, and which operating mode emerges in equilibrium—single execution by the principal, delegated execution to the agent, or joint execution? Methodology/results: We consider a coproductive principal-agent model with endogenous team formation. In the second best, joint execution is less frequent than optimal, whereas both single and delegated execution are chosen too much. With a linear contract, common with nonfinancial output (credits, coauthorship) or in entrepreneurial ventures, there is too much single execution; that is, the principal does not form a team often enough, and there is either too little joint execution when one of the workers has low productivity or too little delegation otherwise. Overall, the inefficiency in project execution (due to moral hazard) appears less severe than the inefficiency in the principal’s team formation decision (due to project hoarding). Managerial implications: Managerial under-delegation fundamentally stems from project hoarding; that is, principals do not partner enough. When principals choose to form a team, they then might delegate too much; paradoxically, this happens when agents have low productivity. Although the existing literature focuses on eliciting agent effort for a given operating mode, our analysis suggests the decision to form a team (or not) is a more critical issue. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0016 .
title_cn: 你、我还是我们？共生产的委托-代理动态
abstract_cn: 问题定义：项目通常由一个人——发起人——发起，随后决定是否通过与代理人共享项目价值来组建团队。我们提出以下问题：发起人何时会组建团队， equilibrium下会出现哪种运营模式——由发起人单独执行、将执行委托给代理人，还是联合执行？ 研究方法与结果：我们考虑一个具内生团队组建的共同产品发起人-代理人模型。在次优情况下，联合执行发生的频率低于最优水平，而单独执行和委托执行选择的次数过多。在一种常见的线性合同中（通常与非财务产出如学分、共同署名或创业项目相关），单独执行的情况过于频繁；也就是说，发起人并未足够频繁地组建团队，当某一位工作者生产力低时，联合执行的情况过少，或者在其他情况下委托执行不足。总体来看，项目执行中的效率低下（由于道德风险）似乎不如发起人的团队组建决策中的效率低下（由于项目囤积）严重。 管理启示：管理层过度委托的问题从根本上源于项目囤积；也就是说，发起人没有足够合作。当发起人选择组建团队时，可能会过度委托；悖论的是，这种情况发生在代理人生产力低下的情况下。尽管现有文献关注于在给定运营模式下引导代理人努力，但我们的分析表明，是否组建团队的决策更为关键。 历史：本文已被《制造与服务运营管理》接受，属于运营倡议前沿的研究。 附加材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0016获取。

title: Innovation Against Imitation: How to Compete with Crowdfunding Copycats
abstract: Problem definition: New product introductions frequently face retail imitation risks. When start-ups use crowdfunding to finance new products, they expose themselves to an even more severe imitation risk specific to crowdfunding platforms. To mitigate this risk, start-ups can employ a progressive launch strategy by initially offering a preliminary version with fewer features or functionalities. Alternatively, they may opt for traditional bank financing, which only carries retail imitation risk. This paper examines how start-ups can effectively compete with crowdfunding copycats through the aforementioned product launch and financing strategies. Methodology/results: We develop a game-theoretical model to analyze the strategic interactions between a start-up and a copycat. Our findings reveal that start-ups may strategically withhold product quality provision to deter or weaken crowdfunding copycats. The optimal quality provision in crowdfunding exhibits nonmonotonic relationships with both crowdfunding imitation efficiency and crowdfunding market share. We also evaluate the social impact of different financing strategies and reveal that the socially optimal funding choice depends on the implementation of the progressive launch strategy. Notably, contrary to conventional wisdom, increasing crowdfunding copycat efficiency does not consistently improve consumer surplus or social welfare. Managerial implications: Although crowdfunding offers numerous advantages, start-ups considering this approach must recognize and address the potential threats posed by copycat imitation. Our research indicates that start-ups seeking external financing can effectively use progressive launch strategies to counter crowdfunding copycats—an approach that generally requires less time and resources than traditional intellectual property protection methods. Funding: G. Xiao acknowledges support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72422016] and the Research Grants Council of Hong Kong [GRF Grant PolyU 15500923]. X. Guo acknowledges support from the Research Grants Council of Hong Kong [GRF Grant PolyU 15507318] and the National Natural Science Foundation of China (72293564/72293560). Z. Chen acknowledges support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [72542003]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0912 .
title_cn: 创新对抗模仿：如何与众筹拷贝者竞争
abstract_cn: 问题定义：新产品的推出经常面临零售模仿风险。当初创企业通过众筹来为新产品融资时，它们暴露于更严重的特定于众筹平台的模仿风险。为了降低这一风险，初创企业可以采用渐进式推出策略，最初提供一个具有较少特性或功能的初步版本。或者，它们也可以选择传统的银行融资，这仅涉及零售模仿风险。本文探讨了初创企业如何通过上述产品推出和融资策略有效应对众筹模仿者的竞争。方法论/结果：我们建立了一个博弈论模型，分析初创企业与模仿者之间的战略互动。我们的研究发现，初创企业可以通过战略性地限制产品质量的提供来威慑或削弱众筹模仿者。在众筹中的最佳质量提供与众筹模仿效率和众筹市场份额之间呈现出非单调的关系。我们还评估了不同融资策略的社会影响，揭示了社会最优融资选择取决于渐进式推出策略的实施。值得注意的是，与传统观念相反，提高众筹模仿效率并不一定会改善消费者盈余或社会福利。管理启示：尽管众筹提供诸多优势，但考虑此方法的初创企业必须认识并应对模仿可能带来的潜在威胁。我们的研究表明，寻求外部融资的初创企业可以有效利用渐进式推出策略来对抗众筹模仿者——这种方法通常比传统的知识产权保护方法所需的时间和资源更少。资助：G. Xiao感谢中国国家自然科学基金[资助号72422016]和香港研究资助局[GRF资助号PolyU 15500923]的支持。X. Guo感谢香港研究资助局[GRF资助号PolyU 15507318]和中国国家自然科学基金（72293564/72293560）的支持。Z. Chen感谢中国国家自然科学基金[72542003]的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0912获取。

title: EXPRESS: The Impact of Ecosystem Shocks on the Operational Performance of Worker-heavy Systems in the Agricultural Domain: The Role of Cognitive Load
abstract: Temporary economic shocks in local employment ecosystems – events that create temporary alternate employment opportunities for workers – tend to create operational challenges for firms. We investigate two dimensions of these challenges faced by firms that engage workers performing low-skilled tasks in the agricultural industry. We seek to understand (i) which workers leave during these shocks, and (ii) whether workers who choose to stay exhibit any change in their productivity. Both of these answers ultimately determine the resilience of firms during the shocks. We present data from a natural experiment in an agricultural company. The data is for two farms, where workers performed the same task but used two different protocols that differ in cognitive load – the mental effort required to manage and coordinate tasks – at two levels: Higher and Lower. Our findings indicate that, at an aggregate level, shocks in the labor ecosystem increase the strain on farming companies by increasing worker turnover rates. However, during the shock period, the workers who remained with the focal firm demonstrated increased productivity. In the subsequent post hoc analysis, we examine whether worker performance before a shock (as measured by pre-shock productivity) impacts turnover and productivity during shock periods. We find that workers following the lower cognitive load protocol were more likely to leave during the shock if their productivity was low. In contrast, workers following the higher cognitive load protocol were equally likely to leave at all productivity levels.
