topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 使用二手供应链数据的实证分析
abstract_cn: 摘要 随着供应链关系的二手数据日益可得，为供应链管理领域的实证研究创造了新的机会。来自布隆伯格SPLC、FactSet和CompuStat等来源的数据集可以支持对决策、战略行为、治理机制以及供应链间组织关系动态的实证分析。然而，供应链的复杂性和互联性，以及供应链数据来源的不一致质量和覆盖范围，给实证研究带来了挑战，限制了当前供应链研究的深度和广度。为了解决这些挑战，本研究对三种常用的供应链数据库进行调查和比较，并提出了一条以数据为中心的供应链研究路线图，利用二手数据来源。这条路线图呈现了一个过程，涵盖数据来源选择、分析单位决策以及适当的计量经济学处理，例如，供应链中的内生性、选择偏差和相关性误差，这为供应链管理文献贡献了通过提高实证供应链研究的一致性、可推广性和可靠性。

title: Navigating the Jagged Technological Frontier: Field Experimental Evidence of the Effects of Artificial Intelligence on Knowledge Worker Productivity and Quality
abstract: We introduce and study the concept of a “jagged technology frontier” to describe the uneven impact of artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities, where AI assistance improves performance for some tasks but worsens it for others, even within the same knowledge workflow and with a seemingly similar level of difficulty. In collaboration with the global management consulting firm Boston Consulting Group, we have developed realistic management consulting tasks and examined the human performance implications of using AI to perform complex and knowledge-intensive work. The preregistered experiment involved 758 knowledge workers. After establishing a performance baseline on similar tasks, subjects were randomly assigned to one of three conditions: no AI access, GPT-4 AI access, or GPT-4 AI access with a prompt engineering overview. For each one of a set of 18 realistic knowledge tasks within the frontier of AI capabilities ranging from creative to analytical tasks, subjects using AI outperformed those not using AI, completing 12.2% more tasks and completing them 25.1% more quickly on average while also delivering solutions of significantly improved quality. However, for a complex managerial task selected to be outside the frontier, subjects using AI were 19% less likely to produce correct solutions compared with those without AI, pointing to potential limitations of AI supporting knowledge workers. We discuss the positive and negative implications of AI-aided human performance in knowledge-intensive tasks. Funding: Financial support of the Harvard Business School Digital Data Design Institute and Division of Research and Faculty Development is acknowledged. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.21838 .
topics: Personal Information Management and User Behavior
Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 驾驭崎岖的技术前沿：人工智能对知识工作者生产力和质量影响的实地实验证据
abstract_cn: 我们引入并研究了“参差不齐的技术前沿”这一概念，以描述人工智能（AI）能力的不均匀影响，其中AI辅助在某些任务中提高表现，但在其他任务中却可能恶化表现，即使在相同的知识工作流程中，并且表面上看起来难度相似。在与全球管理咨询公司波士顿咨询集团的合作下，我们开发了现实的管理咨询任务，并检验了使用AI执行复杂且知识密集型工作的对人类表现的影响。预注册实验涉及758名知识工作者。在确立了相似任务的表现基线后，受试者被随机分配到三个条件中的一个：无AI访问、GPT-4 AI访问，或者带有提示工程概述的GPT-4 AI访问。在一组包含18个实际知识任务的任务中，这些任务位于AI能力的前沿，从创造性任务到分析性任务，使用AI的受试者在任务完成数量上比未使用AI的受试者多完成了12.2%，且平均完成速度快了25.1%，同时提供了显著提高质量的解决方案。然而，在选定的、认为处于前沿之外的复杂管理任务中，使用AI的受试者产生正确解决方案的可能性比未使用AI的受试者低19%，这突显了AI对知识工作者支持的潜在局限性。我们讨论了AI辅助人类在知识密集型任务中的表现的积极和消极影响。资助：感谢哈佛商学院数字数据设计研究所和研究与教师发展部门的资金支持。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.21838 获得。

title: VRscores: A New Measure and Data Set of Workforce Politics Using Voter Registrations
abstract: This paper introduces VRscores, a workplace-level measure of employee partisanship constructed by linking U.S. voter registrations to electronically available worker profiles covering 2012 to 2024. The resulting organizational-level data set captures the partisanship of 24.5 million workers across more than 534,000 employers with at least five matched employees. We release this employer-level data set along with parallel data sets reporting VRscores at the firm, occupation, industry, and metropolitan statistical area levels. We show that VRscores cover substantially more employees and organizations than donation-based approaches to measuring political ideology. We also show that VRscores are more representative of the U.S. workforce in terms of partisanship, seniority, occupation, and industry. Finally, we demonstrate that VRscores and donation-based measures are only moderately correlated ([Formula: see text]) and that they classify one in five organizations differently with respect to whether they lean Democratic or Republican. Funding: We acknowledge generous financial support from the University of Maryland Smith School of Business, the Michigan Ross School of Business, and J. Frake acknowledges funding from the University of Michigan’s Year of Democracy Research Grant. M. Kagan acknowledges funding from the National Science Foundation Graduate Research Fellowship Program (GRFP) [Grant 2146752] and the National Science Foundation Learning the Earth with Artificial Intelligence and Physics (LEAP) Science and Technology Center (STC) [Grant 2019625] and the Institute for Humane Studies [Grant 019144]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.20402 .
title_cn: VRscores：一种新的劳动力政治测量方法及其数据集，基于选民登记数据
abstract_cn: 本文介绍了VRscores，这是一种基于工作场所的员工党派倾向测量，通过将美国选民登记与2012年至2024年间电子可用的员工档案相结合而构建。所得的组织层级数据集涵盖了2450万名员工，涉及超过534,000个至少有五名匹配员工的雇主。我们发布这一雇主级数据集，同时提供报告公司、职业、行业和大都市统计区层级的VRscores平行数据集。我们显示，VRscores覆盖的员工和组织数量显著多于基于捐赠的政治意识形态测量方法。我们还表明，在党派倾向、资历、职业和行业等方面，VRscores更能代表美国劳动力。最后，我们证明VRscores与基于捐赠的测量方法之间仅存在中等相关性，并且在判断一个组织倾向于民主党或共和党方面，二者的分类结果存在五分之一的差异。资金支持：我们感谢马里兰大学史密斯商学院、密歇根大学罗斯商学院的慷慨资金支持，以及J. Frake感谢密歇根大学民主研究年度资助。M. Kagan感谢国家科学基金会研究生研究奖学金项目（GRFP）[资助编号2146752]和国家科学基金会使用人工智能和物理学学习地球（LEAP）科学与技术中心（STC）[资助编号2019625]以及人文研究所的资助[资助编号019144]。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2025.20402获取。

title: Unethical Organizational Practices as a Stressor, Mediated by Moral Emotions and Moderated by Ethical Leadership
abstract: Abstract Theory and research have focused on the well-being and attitudinal costs of unethical actions committed by individuals, yet increasingly workers may care about their organization’s unethical practices. Drawing from social identity theory and cognitive dissonance theory, we theorized that moral emotions elicited by unethical organizational practices would be associated with negative mental health symptoms (depression symptoms and psychological strain) and organizational attitudes (affective commitment and turnover intentions). We proposed that these relationships would be moderated by ethical leadership. We conducted two studies with participants working for organizations and recruited from Prolific to test relationships. Study 1 was a time-lagged survey ( N = 334), and Study 2 was a replication and extension recall experiment ( N = 713). Guilt, shame, and moral anger about unethical organizational practices were associated with greater psychological strain and depression symptoms. In both studies, ethical leadership strengthened some negative relationships between moral emotions and organizational attitudes. Results suggest that ethical leadership does not buffer employees’ negative attitudes in response to unethical organizational practices. Instead, the typical attitudinal benefits of ethical leadership may be nullified when employees perceive unethical organizational practices, possibly through a sense of moral hypocrisy. Results extend theory on unethical behavior and well-being to the organization as the transgressor and further indicate how employee perceptions of ethicality at multiple levels (organizational, leadership) inform attitudes. These studies underscore the need for organizations to prioritize ethical practices to avoid potential costs to employee mental health and highlight the nuanced role of ethical leadership, with practical implications.
title_cn: 不道德的组织行为作为压力源，通过道德情感调节，并受到伦理领导的调节
abstract_cn: 摘要 理论和研究主要关注个人不道德行为所带来的幸福感和态度成本，然而，越来越多的员工可能会关心组织的不道德行为。基于社会认同理论和认知失调理论，我们推测由不道德的组织行为引发的道德情感将与负面的心理健康症状（抑郁症状和心理压力）及组织态度（情感承诺和离职意向）相关联。我们提出这些关系将受到伦理领导的调节。我们进行了两项研究，参与者均为在职员工，来自Prolific以测试这些关系。研究1是一项时间延迟调查（N = 334），研究2是重复和扩展的回顾实验（N = 713）。对不道德组织行为的内疚、羞愧和道德愤怒与更大的心理压力和抑郁症状相关。在两项研究中，伦理领导加强了道德情感与组织态度之间某些负面关系。结果表明，伦理领导并未减轻员工对不道德组织行为的负面态度。相反，当员工感知到不道德的组织行为时，伦理领导的典型态度优势可能会被抵消，这可能与道德虚伪感有关。研究扩展了关于不道德行为与幸福感的理论，强调了作为过错者的组织，以及员工对多个层面（组织、领导）的伦理感知如何影响态度。这些研究突显了组织需优先考虑伦理实践，以避免对员工心理健康的潜在成本，并强调了伦理领导的微妙作用，具有实践意义。

journal_name: Organizational Behavior and Human Decision Processes
title: Responses to Outcome Disclosure: People Asymmetrically Disclose or Hide Their Outcomes to Protect Others’ Emotions
abstract: This paper examines how what people disclose about their successes or failures depends on what others have disclosed. We propose that these decisions are guided less by self-focused motives and more by a concern for how one’s words will affect the other person’s emotions. Across nine studies (N = 8,229, including preregistered experiments, 2,216 self-written responses, and 473 real conversation dyads), we find that responders are consistently more likely to disclose matching outcomes (e.g., failures in response to failures) than non-matching ones (e.g., failures in response to successes), but with two asymmetries not predicted by prior theories. First, responders are more likely to disclose matching failures (failures in response to failures) than matching successes (successes in response to successes). Second, when experiencing non-matching outcomes, responders are more likely to disclose failures in response to successes than they are to disclose successes in response to failures. These patterns reflect other-focused attempts to comfort those who have failed and avoid exacerbating their distress. Beyond whether they disclosed, responders also adjusted how they disclosed, for instance, softening success disclosures in response to failures with consolation or apologies. These effects generalized across domains (e.g., health, career, financial), across relationships varying in closeness and status, and emerged in choices between pre-written responses, self-generated responses, and live conversations involving actual interpersonal disclosures. Disclosure decisions were moderated by factors such as liking and domain relevance. By demonstrating that responders’ outcome disclosures are systematically shaped by concern for the wellbeing of others, this work reframes disclosure as an intended conversational tool for protecting others’ emotions rather than managing self-presentation.
title_cn: 结果披露的反应：人们不对称地披露或隐藏他们的结果，以保护他人的情感
abstract_cn: 本论文探讨了人们关于成功或失败的披露与他人披露内容之间的关系。我们提出，这些决策受自我导向动机的影响较小，更大程度上受到对自己言辞将如何影响他人情感的关注。在九项研究中（总参与人数N = 8,229，包括预注册实验、2,216份自写反应和473对真实的对话），我们发现回应者在披露匹配结果（例如，对失败的反应是失败）时，比披露不匹配结果（例如，对成功的反应是失败）更为一致，但出现了两个之前理论未曾预测的非对称性。首先，回应者更可能披露匹配的失败（对失败的反应是失败），而不是匹配的成功（对成功的反应是成功）。其次，当经历不匹配结果时，回应者更倾向于在对成功的反应中披露失败，而不是在对失败的反应中披露成功。这些模式反映了关心他人、试图安慰失败者并避免加剧他们痛苦的倾向。除了披露的内容外，回应者在披露方式上也进行了调整，例如，在对失败的反应中用安慰或道歉来软化成功的披露。这些效应在不同领域（例如，健康、职业、财务）、不同亲密度和地位的关系中具有普遍性，并且在预写反应、自我生成的反应以及涉及实际人际披露的现场对话中均体现出来。披露决策受到诸如喜好和领域相关性等因素的调节。通过展示回应者的结果披露系统性地受到对他人福祉的关注的影响，本研究重新框架了披露，视其为保护他人情感的意图性交谈工具，而非单纯的自我呈现管理。

title: Unpacking the Paradoxes of Trust in Uncertain Times
abstract: Trust has been recognized as a foundational pillar underpinning the functioning of organizations and society. However, contemporary developments have unleashed unprecedented uncertainty, challenging established notions of social order and raising urgent questions about how trust will operate in the years to come. A deeper understanding of the interface between uncertainty and trust is needed, elaborating how institutions and advanced technologies offer pathways for building and maintaining trust. Our analysis identifies three core paradoxes: trust–uncertainty, trust–institution, and trust–technology. These paradoxes highlight that trust proves indispensable where it is hardest to build, that trusted institutions falter when uncertainty is high and they are needed most, and that technologies designed to reduce uncertainty can in fact increase it. This special issue curates five studies that illuminate these paradoxes. A qualitative study of whistleblowing reveals tensions in how organizations signal ability, benevolence, integrity, transparency, and identification across stakeholders and over time (trust–uncertainty). A mixed‑methods study of a high court theorizes fidelity mechanisms—recognition, selection, socialization—that stabilize the production of “trust objects” (trust–institution). A multilevel network analysis of a corporate top‑management team shows that shared organizational vocabularies foster trust; when those words align with organizational identity, trust ties traverse unit boundaries (trust–institution). A study of a Covid‑19 mutual‑aid platform shows how digital affordances catalyze institution‑based trust that seeds emotional trust among strangers (trust–technology). Finally, a study of a peer‑to‑peer market shows that accreditation (technology verification) and reputation have opposite effects as cultural distance grows—accreditation narrows trust gaps while reputation can widen them—with implications for inequality (trust–technology). Building on these insights, our editorial articulates across the piece a forward-looking research agenda emphasizing the recursive interplay between trust and uncertainty and calling for research to illuminate the emergent, paradoxical, and often nonlinear patterns of trust development.
title_cn: 解读动荡时代信任的悖论
abstract_cn: 信任被公认为是支持组织和社会运作的基础支柱。然而，当代的发展引发了前所未有的不确定性，挑战了既定的社会秩序理念，并提出了关于未来信任如何运作的紧迫问题。因此，需要更深入地理解不确定性与信任之间的关系，阐明机构和先进技术如何为建立和维护信任提供途径。我们的分析识别出三个核心悖论：信任–不确定性、信任–机构和信任–技术。这些悖论突显了在最难建立信任的地方，信任是不可或缺的；当不确定性高涨、对信任的需求最迫切时，受信任的机构往往会动摇；而旨在减少不确定性的技术实际上可能会增加不确定性。本特刊汇集了五项研究，揭示了这些悖论。一项关于举报的定性研究揭示了组织在不同利益相关者之间以及随着时间的推移如何传达能力、善意、诚信、透明度和认同感的紧张关系（信任–不确定性）。一项对高级法院的混合方法研究理论化了促进“信任对象”生产的忠诚机制——识别、选择和社会化（信任–机构）。一项对企业高管团队的多层次网络分析表明，共享的组织词汇促进了信任；当这些词与组织身份一致时，信任关系跨越了单位边界（信任–机构）。对一个COVID-19互助平台的研究显示，数字工具如何催化以机构为基础的信任，进而在陌生人之间播撒情感信任（信任–技术）。最后，一项关于点对点市场的研究表明，认证（技术验证）和声誉在文化距离加大时产生相反的效果——认证缩小信任差距，而声誉却可能扩大信任差距，这对不平等有影响（信任–技术）。基于这些洞见，我们的编辑在整篇文章中提出了一个前瞻性的研究议程，强调信任与不确定性之间的递归互动，并呼吁研究揭示信任发展中的新兴、矛盾和往往非线性的模式。

title: The making of a funding call text: How funding professionals craft interdisciplinary research opportunities for Social Sciences and Humanities
abstract: Whilst it is well-known that research funding significantly shapes research landscapes, there is too little known about the processes that sit behind the funding opportunities — and specifically the publicly-shared funding call texts. The aim of this paper is therefore to investigate the processes experienced by EU funding professionals in authoring and operationalising funding call texts, to surface the different ways in which interdisciplinarity is understood. In seeing these texts as artefacts of situated practices, we conducted a case study on the European Union (EU) Cluster 5 Work Programmes (on climate, energy, mobility) as part of Horizon Europe, including its predecessor calls in Horizon2020. From our analysis of 15 semi-structured interviews, we identified 10 roles that funding professionals adopt, across three stages of a funding call text lifetime: within the Call Creation stage (led by European Commission Policy Officers), there was Steering, Feedback Integration, Quality Control, and Disruption; the Call Dissemination stage (led by EU National Contact Points) involved Awareness-raising, Matchmaking, and Gap-spotting; and the Proposal Selection stage (led by Commission Project Officers overseeing evaluations) involved Expertise Cultivation, Consensus-building, and being a Critical Friend. This study provides empirically-driven insights into the dynamic social processes and institutional interactions, through which funding calls are negotiated, interpreted and ultimately travel. As such, we also contribute to literature on interdisciplinarity, by examining the ways in which different forms of interdisciplinarity are imagined, designed-in, rewarded and excluded by funders. We make clear how integrating Social Sciences and Humanities, and doing interdisciplinarity, consistently represents hard work by funding professionals. • How funding professionals produce and use funding call texts affects research landscapes. • Horizon Europe Pillar 2 funding is especially complex as it is driven by EU policy priorities. • 10 professional roles directly shaped the forms of interdisciplinarity being funded. • Professionals must work hard to ensure opportunities for Social Sciences and Humanities. • Professionals demonstrate partial agency in steering funding processes.
title_cn: 资金申请文本的制作：资助专业人员如何为社会科学和人文学科编写跨学科研究机会
abstract_cn:
虽然众所周知，研究资金在很大程度上影响了研究生态，但关于资金机会背后流程的了解仍然较少，特别是公开共享的资助申请文本。本文的目的在于探讨欧盟资助专业人员在撰写和运作资助申请文本过程中所经历的流程，以揭示对跨学科性不同的理解。将这些文本视为情境实践的产物，我们对作为“地平线欧洲”一部分的欧盟第五类工作计划（涵盖气候、能源和移动性）进行了案例研究，包括其在“地平线2020”中的前身申请。通过对15个半结构化访谈的分析，我们识别出资助专业人员所承担的10种角色，这些角色贯穿资助申请文本生命周期的三个阶段：在申请创建阶段（由欧盟委员会政策官员主导），包括指导、反馈整合、质量控制和干预；在申请传播阶段（由欧盟国家联系人主导），涉及意识提升、资源匹配和差距识别；在提案选择阶段（由负责评估的委员会项目官员主导），则包括专业能力培养、达成共识和作为批判性朋友的角色。该研究提供了关于资助申请如何被协商、解读并最终传播的动态社会过程和制度互动的实证驱动见解。因此，我们也对跨学科领域的文献做出了贡献，通过考察不同形式的跨学科性是如何被资助者想象、设计、奖励和排除的。我们明确了社会科学和人文学科的整合及跨学科工作的艰巨性，反映了资助专业人员的辛勤付出。

- 资助专业人员的工作方式影响研究生态。
- “地平线欧洲”第二支柱的资助特别复杂，因为它由欧盟政策优先事项驱动。
- 10个专业角色直接影响了资助的跨学科性形式。
- 专业人员必须努力确保社会科学和人文学科的机会。
- 专业人员在引导资助流程中展现出部分自主性。

title: The Effects of Generative AI on High-Skilled Work: Evidence from Three Field Experiments with Software Developers
abstract: This study evaluates the effect of generative artificial intelligence (AI) on software developer productivity via randomized controlled trials at Microsoft, Accenture, and an anonymous Fortune 100 company. These field experiments, run by the companies as part of their ordinary course of business, provided a random subset of developers with access to an AI-based coding assistant suggesting intelligent code completions. Although each experiment is noisy and results vary across experiments, when data are combined across three experiments and 4,867 developers, our analysis reveals a 26.08% increase (standard error: 10.3%) in completed tasks among developers using the AI tool. Notably, less experienced developers had higher adoption rates and greater productivity gains. This paper was accepted by Jean-Pierre Dube, marketing. Funding: M. Demirer and T. Salz thank the MIT GenAI Initiative for funding. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00535 .
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 生成性人工智能对高技能工作的影响：来自三项针对软件开发人员的实地实验的证据
abstract_cn: 本研究通过在微软、埃森哲和一家匿名财富100强公司进行随机对照试验，评估生成人工智能（AI）对软件开发人员生产力的影响。这些实地实验作为公司日常业务的一部分，向随机选取的开发人员提供了基于AI的编码助手的访问权限，该助手能够建议智能代码补全。尽管每个实验都存在噪声，结果因实验而异，但当将来自三个实验和4,867名开发人员的数据结合分析时，我们的分析显示使用AI工具的开发人员完成任务的数量增加了26.08%（标准误差：10.3%）。值得注意的是，经验较少的开发人员具有更高的采用率和更大的生产力提升。本文已由Jean-Pierre Dube接受，属于市场营销领域。资助：M. Demirer和T. Salz感谢MIT GenAI倡议的资助。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00535 访问。

title: Managerial Intervention, Employee Motivation, and Collaboration
abstract: The economic literature on delegation focuses on the subordinate’s improved motivation when liberated from managerial intervention in decision making. However, many managers motivate employees while proactively intervening in the decision-making process. We build a principal-agent model to analyze when managerial intervention is, and is not, motivational to the agent. Although managerial intervention may demotivate the agent when leading to actions that waste employee effort, managerial intervention can also motivate the agent by incentivizing principal effort that complements the agent’s effort. In fact, delegation may demotivate the agent when the principal and agent work collaboratively. Our results speak to understanding the role of strategic complementarity in determining when various managerial practices do, and do not, motivate employees. This paper was accepted by Maria Guadalupe, business strategy.
title_cn: 管理干预、员工激励与协作
abstract_cn: 关于委派的经济文献主要集中于当下属在决策过程中摆脱管理干预时其动机的提升。然而，许多管理者在主动介入决策过程中时仍能激励员工。我们建立了一个委托-代理模型，以分析何时管理干预对代理人是有激励作用的，何时不是。尽管管理干预可能在导致浪费员工努力的行为时使代理人感到失去动力，但它也可以通过激励委托人付出努力以补充代理人的努力来激励代理人。实际上，当委托人和代理人协作工作时，委派可能会使代理人失去动力。我们的研究结果有助于理解战略互补性在确定各种管理实践何时激励员工、何时不激励员工中的作用。本文已被商业战略领域的Maria Guadalupe接受。

title: Internal Proactive Learning or External Technology Acquisition: ICT-Enabled Promotion in Assembly Operations
abstract: Recently, leading manufacturers have started adopting information and communication technologies (ICTs) to assist operators in capturing assembly operational errors. These manufacturers choose to develop internal ICTs and decide whether to implement proactive experiential learning to continuously improve the rate of recognizing assembly operational errors, or acquire external ICTs from third-party technology providers that increase the rate of recognizing assembly operational errors but fail to achieve experiential learning. These two ICT adoption models may cause different effects on assembly operations, which subsequently affects manufacturers’ profitability. However, there is a limited body of relevant research that focuses on this topic. Hence, our study aims to bridge this gap by examining a manufacturer’s decisions for the ICT adoption, internal experiential learning, and subsequent pricing strategy. First, we reveal that it is sometimes beneficial for the manufacturer to forgo ICTs rather than adopt ICTs. This is because the lower recognition capability leads to a weaker scale effect, reducing the positive effect of ICTs on operational error losses. Next, we find that even if the internal learning effect is stronger, the manufacturer may still choose to acquire external ICTs. Moreover, as the operational error loss increases, the manufacturer or third-party technology provider may sometimes invest less in ICTs. Further, our results show that the ICT adoption benefits consumer surplus and social welfare, and external ICTs sometimes generate more social welfare but less consumer surplus than internal ICTs. Additionally, we find that the ICT adoption changes the relationship between the assembly operational accuracy and product demand. Following the ICT adoption, our study offers invaluable insights to managers on how ICTs can yield better assembly operational outcomes.
title_cn: 内部主动学习与外部技术获取：组装操作中的信息与通讯技术促进策略
abstract_cn: 最近，领先的制造商开始采用信息与通信技术（ICT）来协助操作员捕捉装配操作错误。这些制造商选择开发内部ICT，并决定是否实施主动的经验学习，以持续提高识别装配操作错误的能力，或者从第三方技术供应商那里获取外部ICT，这虽然提高了识别装配操作错误的速率，但未能实现经验学习。这两种ICT采用模式可能会对装配操作产生不同的影响，进而影响制造商的盈利能力。然而，针对这一主题的相关研究相对有限。因此，我们的研究旨在填补这一空白，通过考察制造商在ICT采用、内部经验学习及随后的定价策略方面的决策。首先，我们揭示，有时制造商放弃ICT比采用ICT更具优势。这是因为较低的识别能力导致规模效应减弱，从而降低了ICT对操作错误损失的正面影响。接着，我们发现，即使内部学习效应更强，制造商仍可能选择获取外部ICT。此外，随着操作错误损失的增加，制造商或第三方技术供应商有时可能会减少在ICT上的投资。此外，我们的研究结果表明，ICT的采用有利于消费者剩余和社会福利，且外部ICT有时会产生比内部ICT更多的社会福利但较少的消费者剩余。此外，我们发现ICT的采用改变了装配操作精度与产品需求之间的关系。在ICT采用之后，我们的研究为管理者提供了关于ICT如何带来更好装配操作结果的宝贵见解。

title: The Impacts of Electronic Health Record Note Usage by Physicians on Efficiency and Quality of Care: An Analysis Using EHR Audit Logs
abstract: Electronic health record (EHR) clinical notes constitute a core documentation subsystem through which physicians externalize clinical assessments and care plans in narrative form. Yet clinical documentation is time intensive and is frequently viewed as an administrative burden, leaving limited evidence on whether and how physician note usage improves inpatient operational efficiency and downstream quality outcomes. This study examines the impact of lead physician note activity on discharge efficiency and post discharge outcomes using granular EHR audit logs from a major U.S. teaching hospital. Leveraging more than 6.8 million audit log access events across 30 services, we model discharge as a time to event outcome at an hourly resolution and address endogeneity in documentation intensity using an instrumental variable strategy. We find that increased lead physician note activity predicts faster discharge. Specifically, a 1% increase in lead physician note activity measured 12 h earlier is associated with approximately a 0.075% decrease in expected remaining time to discharge, and the result is directionally consistent under alternative lag specifications. We further test an operational mechanism grounded in knowledge transfer and care team coordination. Higher lead physician note activity is followed by greater near-term nurse information access, operationalized as nurse non-note chart activity within a short response window after physician documentation, and this timely information access is associated with shorter time to discharge in the mediated survival specification. In an additional analysis, we model time to readmission within 30 days using a time to event framework and find that greater lead physician documentation during the index stay is associated with a longer expected time to readmission, providing complementary evidence that documentation practices are linked to downstream outcomes. Collectively, the results advance healthcare operations and information systems research by identifying physician note activity as an operationally consequential form of clinical work and by clarifying a coordination mechanism through timely care team information access in the EHR. This study contributes to healthcare operations management literature and practical implications include optimizing EHR note utilization, implementing tailored training programs, and investing in user-friendly EHR infrastructure to balance efficiency and quality of care improvements and time constraints.
title_cn: 电子健康记录中医师笔记使用对效率和护理质量的影响：基于电子健康记录审计日志的分析
abstract_cn: 电子健康记录（EHR）临床笔记构成了医生以叙述形式外化临床评估和护理计划的核心文档子系统。然而，临床文档的编写过程耗时较长，常常被视为一种行政负担，因此对医生笔记使用如何改善住院病人的操作效率和后续质量结果，证据相对有限。本研究利用一家美国主要教学医院的细粒度EHR审计日志，考察了主治医生笔记活动对出院效率和出院后结果的影响。通过分析超过680万次跨越30个科室的审计日志访问事件，我们将出院建模为以小时为单位的事件时间结果，并使用工具变量策略解决文档强度的内生性问题。研究发现，主治医生笔记活动的增加与更快的出院预测相关。具体而言，提前12小时测得的主治医生笔记活动增加1%与预计剩余出院时间大约0.075%的减少相关，并且该结果在替代滞后模型中方向一致。我们进一步测试了基于知识转移和护理团队协调的操作机制。较高的主治医生笔记活动后，伴随有更高的短期护士信息访问量，这一量通过护士在医生文档编写后短时间内的非笔记图表活动来量化，并且这种及时的信息访问与较短的出院时间在中介生存模型中相关联。在进一步的分析中，我们采用时间事件框架建模了30天内的再入院时间，并发现主住院期间更高的主治医生文件记录与更长的期望再入院时间相关，为文档实践与后续结果之间的关联提供了补充证据。总体而言，这些结果推动了医疗运营和信息系统研究，通过确定医生笔记活动作为一种具有操作性后果的临床工作形式，并通过EHR中的及时护理团队信息访问阐明了协调机制。本研究对医疗运营管理文献做出了贡献，实践意义包括优化EHR笔记利用、实施定制培训项目以及投资于用户友好的EHR基础设施，以平衡效率、护理质量改善及时间限制。

title: Editor’s Comments
abstract: This year marks MIS Quarterly's 50th year in operation.The editorials in Volume 50 will pay tribute to the journal's 50 years in multiple ways.We begin by taking a journey through the history of the journal through the lens of the editorials. 1 In writing this editorial, I cannot help but feel a bit nostalgic as I think about the people who paved the path for us to be able to have conversations about shifting research topics, new and improved research methods, or how to solve the latest "crisis" in the discipline.In the late 1960s, some very visionary scholars were planning the future of a discipline-a discipline they felt would be important to the future of organizations, but one about which no one knew.And, so, the journal's history does not start in 1977, but rather a decade before.A great deal of work had to go on behind the scenes prior to launching such an endeavor.First and foremost, we had to have a discipline. A Discipline Is BornIn the late 1960s, Gordon Davis, Gary Dickson, and Tom Hoffman were planning a new degree program that would focus on how organizations used information systems.In 1968, they started the first formal degree program in MIS at the University of Minnesota.In 1974, Gordon wrote the first textbook for MIS-Management Information Systems: Conceptual Foundations, Structure and Development (Davis, 1974).Gordon's foundational work served as a model for other programs, and between 1968 and 1977, new MIS programs were launched in schools including the University of Georgia in 1971 and the University of Arizona in 1974. 2 We take for granted that MIS programs around the world exist to train the next generation of IS scholars, but that was not the case in those early times.In the 1980s, the University of Minnesota and Indiana University ran summer institutes to train people in MIS and provide a mechanism for transitioning scholars from other disciplines to teach and perform research in MIS. The First Journal for the FieldAfter years of planning and preparation, a new journal was born in March 1977.It was made possible by a joint venture of the MIS Research Center and the Society for Management Information Systems (SMIS), which today is the Society for Information Management (SIM). 3Due to the relationship with SMIS, it was important that there was content in the journal for practitioners; at the same time, the journal was supposed to be a place for researchers to communicate their results.Prior to the launch of MIS Quarterly, the work of MIS academics was published in various places, and also often rejected from those places due to lack of fit.The need for a journal was significant, but funding would prove to be a challenge: "Recognize that we wanted a journal in which MIS Academics could publish while our primary source of funding was a society primarily of information systems practitioners.As a result, the vast majority of our readers would be practitioners.The task was to define a product that could satisfy both groups. One feature we used in the early days to build circulation was interviews with CEOs" (Dickson, 1982, pp.vi-vii).1 Although there will be occasional acknowledgement of events happening outside of MIS Quarterly, I apologize for any omission of people, programs, or publications.Please recognize that this is my personal journey, and your experience may be different.
title_cn: 编辑评论
abstract_cn:
今年标志着《管理信息系统季刊》（MIS Quarterly）运营的第50个年头。第50卷的社论将以多种方式向期刊50年的历程致敬。我们将通过社论的视角，回顾该期刊的历史。在撰写这篇社论时，我不禁感到一丝怀旧，因为我想起了那些为我们能够讨论研究主题转变、新的和改进的研究方法，或者如何解决学科内最新“危机”的人们。在20世纪60年代末，一些富有远见的学者正在规划一个学科的未来——他们认为这个学科对组织的未来至关重要，但当时却无人知晓。因此，该期刊的历史并不始于1977年，而是十年前就已开始。在发起这样的事业之前，幕后的工作必须进行大量的筹备。首先，我们必须建立一个学科。

一个学科的诞生在20世纪60年代末，戈登·戴维斯（Gordon Davis）、加里·迪克森（Gary Dickson）和汤姆·霍夫曼（Tom Hoffman）正在规划一个新的学位项目，专注于组织如何使用信息系统。1968年，他们在明尼苏达大学开设了第一个正式的管理信息系统学位项目。1974年，戈登撰写了第一本管理信息系统教材——《管理信息系统：概念基础、结构与发展》（Davis, 1974）。戈登的基础性工作为其他项目提供了模型，1968至1977年间，新开的管理信息系统项目相继出现在乔治亚大学（1971年）和亚利桑那大学（1974年）等院校。我们理所当然地认为，全球范围内的管理信息系统项目旨在培养下一代的信息系统学者，但在早期并非如此。在20世纪80年代，明尼苏达大学和印第安纳大学举办夏季研讨会，培训管理信息系统领域的人才，并为其他学科的学者提供机制，以便其能够转变到管理信息系统领域进行教学和研究。

该领域的第一本期刊经过多年规划与准备于1977年3月问世。这一成果得益于管理信息系统研究中心与管理信息系统学会（SMIS）的联合努力，今天的SMIS已改名为信息管理学会（SIM）。由于与SMIS的关系，该期刊必须包含面向从业者的内容；同时，该期刊也应成为研究人员交流研究成果的地方。在《管理信息系统季刊》创刊之前，管理信息系统学者的研究成果发表在各种刊物上，但因缺乏适配性，经常被拒绝。期刊的需求十分迫切，但资助问题则是一个挑战：“请认识到，我们希望有一本期刊，使管理信息系统学者能够发表文章，而我们主要的资金来源来自一个主要由信息系统从业者组成的学会。因此，我们的读者绝大多数为从业者。我们的任务是定义一种能够满足这两个群体需求的产品。我们在早期用来扩大读者群的一项举措是与首席执行官的采访”（Dickson, 1982, pp.vi-vii）。虽然偶尔会提及《管理信息系统季刊》之外发生的事件，但我为任何可能遗漏的人物、项目或出版物表示歉意。请理解这是我个人的经历，而您的体验可能会有所不同。

title: Regulated versus unregulated competition: How drug shortages boost illegal pharmacy sales
abstract: Abstract Research Summary This study examines how product shortages among legal firms create competitive opportunities for illegal firms. We analyze 713 drug shortages in the United States between 2017 and 2023 and show that shortages substantially increase illicit pharmacies’ sales of affected drugs, which rise by 40.5% during shortages and remain 32.8% higher in the six months after shortages are resolved. The effects are strongest for drugs treating chronic conditions, drugs with fewer substitutes, and drugs experiencing more intense shortages. We also find spillover effects, as illegal sales of drugs typically consumed alongside the shortage drug also increase during shortages and remain higher after shortages are resolved. This evidence underscores how regulatory constraints that limit legal firms’ flexibility create opportunities for illegal competitors to capture unmet demand. Managerial Summary We examine how product shortages reshape competition between legal and illegal firms in highly regulated markets. Looking at prescription drug shortages in the United States, we show that illicit pharmacies experience substantial and lasting increases in sales when legal firms are unable to meet demand. These gains extend beyond the drugs in shortage to related medications, indicating both direct and spillover effects. The results reveal a paradox: regulatory frameworks designed to ensure consumer safety may also restrict legal firms’ flexibility, strengthening illegal competitors. These findings highlight the importance of designing regulatory systems and supply chains that safeguard consumer safety without undermining the competitiveness of compliant firms. Coordination between regulatory policy, supply resilience, and enforcement is essential to prevent illicit actors from exploiting market disruptions.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 管制与非管制竞争：药品短缺如何推动非法药房销售
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究总结 本研究探讨了法律公司产品短缺如何为非法公司创造竞争机会。我们分析了2017年至2023年间在美国发生的713种药物短缺情况，结果表明，短缺显著增加了受影响药物的非法药房销售，在短缺期间销量上升了40.5%，而在短缺解决后的六个月内仍保持32.8%的增幅。这些影响在治疗慢性病的药物、替代品较少的药物以及短缺程度更为严重的药物中最为显著。我们还发现溢出效应，因为通常与短缺药物一起消费的其他药物在短缺期间的非法销售也有所增加，并在短缺解决后保持上升。这些证据强调了监管限制法律公司的灵活性如何为非法竞争者获得未满足的需求创造了机会。

管理总结 我们研究了产品短缺如何重新塑造高度监管市场中法律公司与非法公司的竞争关系。通过观察美国处方药短缺的情况，我们发现，当法律公司无法满足需求时，非法药房的销售大幅且持久地增加。这种增长不仅限于短缺药物，还扩展到相关药物，表明存在直接和溢出效应。研究结果揭示了一个悖论：旨在确保消费者安全的监管框架可能也会限制法律公司的灵活性，从而强化非法竞争者。这些发现突显了设计监管系统和供应链的重要性，既要保护消费者安全，又不削弱合法公司的竞争力。协调监管政策、供应的韧性和执法至关重要，以防止非法行为者利用市场干扰。

title: The Price of War
abstract: We assemble a new dataset spanning 150 years and 60 countries to study the economic toll of war. A war of average intensity is associated with an output drop of close to 10 percent in the war-site economy, while consumer prices rise by approximately 20 percent. The capital stock, total factor productivity, and equity returns all decline sharply. The economic ramifications of war are not confined to the war site. The evidence points to adverse economic outcomes in other belligerent and third-party countries if they are exposed to the war site through trade linkages or share a common border. (JEL D74, E23, E32, F43, F51, N40)
title_cn: 战争的代价
abstract_cn: 我们组建了一个涵盖150年和60个国家的新数据集，以研究战争的经济代价。平均强度的战争与战争地区经济产出下降近10%相关，同时消费者价格上涨约20%。资本存量、全要素生产率和股权回报均大幅下降。战争的经济影响并不限于战争发生地。证据表明，如果其他交战国或第三方国家通过贸易联系与战争地区相连，或与之共享边界，它们也会面临不利的经济后果。（JEL D74, E23, E32, F43, F51, N40）

title: Sequential Cursed Equilibrium
abstract: We propose an extensive-form solution concept, with players who neglect information from hypothetical events but make inferences from observed events. Our concept modifies cursed equilibrium (Eyster and Rabin 2005) and allows that players can be cursed about endogenous information. (JEL C73, D44, D71, D81, D83, D91)
title_cn: 顺序诅咒均衡
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种扩展形式的解概念，其中玩家忽视来自假想事件的信息，但从观察到的事件中做出推断。我们的概念对被诅咒的均衡（Eyster 和 Rabin 2005）进行了修改，并允许玩家对内生信息存在被诅咒的情况。（JEL C73, D44, D71, D81, D83, D91）

title: Temporary Layoffs, Loss-of-Recall, and Cyclical Unemployment Dynamics
abstract: We revisit the role of temporary layoffs in the business cycle. While some have emphasized a stabilizing effect due to recall hiring, we quantify from the data an important countercyclical destabilizing effect due to “loss-of-recall,” whereby workers in temporary-layoff unemployment lose their job permanently. We develop a quantitative model allowing for endogenous flows of workers across employment and both temporary-layoff and jobless unemployment. The model captures both pre- and post-pandemic unemployment dynamics, including the contractionary role of loss-of-recall. We use our structural model to show that the Paycheck Protection Program generated sizable employment gains, in part by significantly reducing loss-of-recall. (JEL E24, E32, I12, J41, J63, J64)
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 临时裁员、失去再聘权与周期性失业动态
abstract_cn: 我们重新审视临时裁员在经济周期中的作用。尽管一些研究强调了因召回招聘而产生的稳定性作用，但我们从数据中量化了一个重要的反周期性不稳定作用，即“失去召回”，即暂时裁员失业的工人永久失去工作的现象。我们开发了一个定量模型，允许工人在就业、临时裁员和无业失业之间进行内生流动。该模型捕捉了疫情前后失业动态，包括失去召回的收缩性作用。我们利用我们的结构模型表明，薪资保护计划产生了显著的就业增长，部分原因是显著减少了失去召回的现象。（JEL E24, E32, I12, J41, J63, J64）

title: Zero-Sum Thinking and the Roots of US Political Differences
abstract: We investigate the origins and implications of zero-sum thinking: the belief that gains for one individual or group tend to come at the cost of others. Using a new survey of 20,400 US residents, we measure zero-sum thinking, political preferences, policy views, and a rich array of ancestral information spanning four generations. We find that a more zero-sum mindset is strongly associated with more support for government redistribution, race- and gender-based affirmative action, and more restrictive immigration policies. Zero-sum thinking can be traced back to the experiences of both the individual and their ancestors, encompassing factors such as the degree of intergenerational upward mobility they experienced, whether they immigrated to the United States or lived in a location with more immigrants, and whether they were enslaved or lived in a location with more enslavement. (JEL C83, D72, D91, H23, J15, J16, Z13)
title_cn: 零和思维与美国政治差异的根源
abstract_cn: 我们研究了零和思维的起源及其影响：一种认为某个人或群体的利益往往以他人的利益为代价的信念。通过对20,400名美国居民的新调查，我们测量了零和思维、政治倾向、政策观和跨越四代的丰富祖先信息。我们的发现表明，零和思维的思维方式与对政府再分配、基于种族和性别的平权行动以及更严格的移民政策的支持度有着强烈的关联。零和思维可以追溯到个人及其祖先的经历，包括他们所经历的代际向上流动的程度、他们是否移民到美国或生活在移民较多的地区，以及他们是否曾遭受奴役或生活在奴役较多的地方。(JEL C83, D72, D91, H23, J15, J16, Z13)

title: Equal Pay for Similar Work
abstract: Equal pay laws increasingly require that workers with different group identities doing “similar” work are paid equal wages within firm. We study such “equal pay for similar work” (EPSW) policies theoretically and test our models’ predictions empirically using evidence from a 2009 gender-based Chilean EPSW. Under EPSW, firms segregate their workforce by gender. When there are more men than women in a labor market, EPSW increases the gender wage gap. (JEL J16, J31, J38, K31, O15)
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 同工同酬
abstract_cn: 平等薪酬法日益要求在同一公司内，不同群体身份的工人从事“相似”工作时获得相同的薪资。我们从理论上研究了这种“相似工作的平等薪酬”（EPSW）政策，并利用2009年基于性别的智利EPSW的证据实证检验了模型的预测。在EPSW政策下，企业按性别对员工进行划分。当劳动市场上男性人数多于女性时，EPSW会加大性别工资差距。（JEL J16, J31, J38, K31, O15）

title: Can Reward Uncertainty Encourage Social Referrals? Evidence from a Large-Scale Field Experiment
abstract: Social referral programs, in which individuals recommend products or services within their networks in return for rewards, have been widely adopted across digital platforms. This study explores the impact of incorporating uncertainty into the rewards of such programs, focusing on how senders and recipients perceive and react to uncertain rewards. We run a randomized experiment involving more than 160,000 users of a telecommunications operator in China and examine the effectiveness of different referral reward schemes. We find that referral programs are most successful when senders are incentivized with uncertain rewards and recipients are guaranteed certain rewards. Specifically, introducing uncertainty in the sender’s reward leads to a 20.9% increase in total referrals with recipients of these invitations more likely to engage in subsequent referrals and profitable in-app activities. In contrast, uncertainty in the recipient’s reward results in a 12.3% decrease in total referrals with invited recipients showing a lower propensity to make further referrals and reduced postreferral engagement. Additional online experiments identify distinct mechanisms driving these asymmetric effects: For senders, the uncertainty alleviates feelings of guilt, enhancing referral sharing and, thus, increasing the total number of referrals. For recipients, the adverse effects of uncertainty stem primarily from diminished perceptions of fairness and social pressure, and these deter engagement in the referral process. Our study sheds light on the complex dynamics of reward uncertainty in referral programs, offering novel insights into how it can be optimized to foster more engaged referral networks. This paper was accepted by Anindya Ghose, information systems. Funding: A.T. Li acknowledges support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72301269 and 72332007] and the Fundamental Research Funds for the Central Universities [Grant WK2040000085]. R. Belo acknowledges funding by Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia (UID/00124/2025, UID/PRR/124/2025, Nova School of Business and Economics, DOI: https://doi.org/10.54499/UID/00124/2025 ) and LISBOA2030 (DataLab2030 - LISBOA2030-FEDER-01314200). T. Li acknowledges support from the Erasmus Research Institute of Management (ERIM) Convergence AI, Data & Digitalisation (Convergence AI Lab – Immersive Tech) Gravitation Program Public Values in the Algorithmic Society (AlgoSoc). Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05685 .
title_cn: 奖励不确定性能否促进社会推荐？来自大规模实地实验的证据
abstract_cn: 社交推荐程序是指个人在其网络中推荐产品或服务以获取奖励，这种程序已在数字平台上被广泛采用。本研究探讨了将不确定性纳入此类程序的奖励中对发送者和接收者的感知与反应的影响。我们进行了一项随机实验，参与者超过160,000名中国一家电信运营商的用户，检验不同推荐奖励机制的有效性。研究发现，当发送者的奖励具有不确定性而接收者的奖励是确定的时，推荐程序最为成功。具体而言，发送者奖励的不确定性导致总推荐量增加20.9%，而接收这些邀请的接收者更有可能进行后续推荐和有利的应用内活动。相比之下，接收者奖励的不确定性则导致总推荐量减少12.3%，而被邀请的接收者在进一步推荐时显示出较低的倾向，并减少了后续参与度。额外的在线实验识别出驱动这些不对称效应的不同机制：对于发送者，不确定性减轻了内疚感，增强了推荐分享，从而增加了总推荐数量。对于接收者，不确定性的负面影响主要源于公平感和社会压力的下降，这抑制了他们参与推荐过程的意愿。我们的研究揭示了推荐程序中奖励不确定性的复杂动态，为如何优化这一机制以促进更活跃的推荐网络提供了新见解。本文由信息系统领域的Anindya Ghose接受。资助信息：A.T. Li感谢中国国家自然科学基金（资助号72301269和72332007）以及中央高校基本科研业务费（资助号WK2040000085）的支持。R. Belo感谢科学与技术基金会（UID/00124/2025，UID/PRR/124/2025，诺瓦商学院，DOI: https://doi.org/10.54499/UID/00124/2025）和LISBOA2030（DataLab2030 - LISBOA2030-FEDER-01314200）的资助。T. Li感谢埃拉斯姆斯管理研究所（ERIM）融合AI、数据与数字化（融合AI实验室-沉浸式技术）重力项目“算法社会中的公共价值”的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05685 获得。

title: Regime-Dependent Approximations for the Single-Item Dynamic Pricing Problem
abstract: Optimizing Prices for Viral Demand and Scarcity Dynamic pricing models often assume that inventory and demand scale proportionally, but this “fluid” view breaks down when products go viral. In “Regime-Dependent Approximations for the Single-Item Dynamic Pricing Problem,” Tarek Abdallah and Josh Reed investigate market extremes, specifically the “large market regime,” where inventory is scarce relative to surging demand. Their analysis reveals critical pitfalls in common heuristic approaches. The authors demonstrate that intuitive “price high and wait” policies are ineffective and, remarkably, that fluid static policies are not even first-order optimal in this context. Instead, they establish that a dynamic run-out-rate policy is essential to achieve both first- and second-order asymptotic optimality. Leveraging Extreme Value Theory, this research provides a robust framework for managing severe supply-demand imbalances, ensuring that firms can effectively capture value in inventory-constrained environments.
title_cn: 基于制度的单一商品动态定价问题的近似方法
abstract_cn: 优化病毒性需求和稀缺性的定价策略 动态定价模型通常假设库存和需求成比例变化，但当产品传播迅速时，这种“流动”的观点会失效。在《单一商品动态定价问题的政态依赖近似》中，Tarek Abdallah和Josh Reed研究了市场极端情况，特别是“大型市场政态”，在该政态中，库存相较于激增的需求显得稀缺。他们的分析揭示了常见启发式方法中的关键陷阱。作者表明，直观的“高价等待”政策是无效的，并且显著的是，在这种情况下，流体静态政策甚至不是一阶最优的。相反，他们确立了一种动态耗尽率政策是实现一阶和二阶渐近最优性的必要条件。利用极值理论，本研究为管理严重的供需失衡提供了一个稳健的框架，确保企业能够在库存受限的环境中有效捕捉价值。

title: Strategic Data Analytics Under Supplier Encroachment
abstract: Problem definition: To enhance supply chain collaboration, major retailers increasingly grant suppliers access to their data platforms, leveraging data analytics to deliver valuable demand insights. However, such access raises the risk of channel encroachment by suppliers. This paper examines the retailer’s strategy for deploying data analytics in the presence of supplier encroachment. Methodology/results: Under the Bayesian persuasion framework, the retailer’s data analytics strategy is formulated as a signaling rule that maps market states into predictions with partial informational granularity. We further compare two organizational structures of data governance: a shared data platform, which delivers identical demand predictions to both the retailer and the supplier, and a separate data platform, which provides accurate predictions for the retailer, offering less precise insights to the supplier. On a shared data platform, the retailer adopts perfectly accurate analytics when the supplier’s encroachment cost is either very high or very low. At moderate encroachment costs, the shared platform generates informative yet biased forecasts, which surprisingly benefit both firms because of the ease of double marginalization. By contrast, under a separate platform, no informative predictions are generated for the supplier at moderate encroachment costs. Overall, comparing the two organizational structures, the retailer prefers a shared platform when the supplier’s encroachment cost is relatively high. Managerial implications: Our findings reveal a nonmonotonic relationship between the accuracy of data analytics and suppliers’ encroachment efficiency, offering practical guidance for retailers in implementing effective learning algorithms. Moreover, we highlight the benefits of transparent and integrated data analytics within vertical distribution channels, providing managerial insights into the organizational choices underpinning retailers’ data governance. Funding: This work was partially supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72571122] and the Research Grants Council of Hong Kong [Grants C6020-21GF, GRF 16501722]. The authors also acknowledge support from the Southern Key Laboratory of Technology Finance (Guangdong) at the Southern University of Science and Technology (Shenzhen, China). Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0412 .
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 供应商侵占下的战略数据分析
abstract_cn: 问题定义：为了增强供应链协作，主要零售商越来越多地允许供应商访问其数据平台，通过数据分析提供有价值的需求洞察。然而，这种访问也增加了供应商对渠道的侵占风险。本文探讨了在存在供应商侵占的情况下，零售商部署数据分析的策略。方法论/结果：在贝叶斯劝说框架下，零售商的数据分析策略被形式化为一种信号规则，该规则将市场状态映射为具有部分信息颗粒度的预测。我们进一步比较了两种数据治理的组织结构：共享数据平台，该平台为零售商和供应商提供相同的需求预测，以及独立数据平台，该平台为零售商提供准确的预测，而为供应商提供较不精确的洞察。在共享数据平台上，当供应商的侵占成本非常高或非常低时，零售商采用完全准确的分析。在中等侵占成本下，共享平台生成的信息丰富但偏颇的预测，这意外地使两家公司受益，因为避免了双重边际化的困难。相比之下，在独立平台下，在中等侵占成本情况下，供应商不会生成有信息量的预测。总体而言，在比较这两种组织结构时，当供应商的侵占成本相对较高时，零售商更倾向于选择共享平台。管理启示：我们的发现揭示了数据分析准确性与供应商侵占效率之间的非单调关系，为零售商实施有效的学习算法提供了实际指导。此外，我们强调在垂直分销渠道中透明和集成数据分析的好处，为管理层提供了关于支持零售商数据治理的组织选择的见解。资助：本研究部分得到了中国国家自然科学基金（资助号72571122）和香港研究资助局（资助号C6020-21GF, GRF 16501722）的支持。作者还感谢南方科技大学（中国深圳）南方技术金融重点实验室的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0412获取。

title: The Role of Product Quality in Marketplaces
abstract: Problem definition: Online retailers who operated as traditional resellers have also started to adopt the marketplace approach, wherein the retailer charges a commission, and the suppliers determine the retail price. We model the interactions between a retailer and two suppliers, who offer products of differing qualities, face loyal consumers, and enjoy quality- and price-dependent demand functions. We identify what contract type—only marketplace, only wholesale, or a combination of marketplace and wholesale (i.e., hybrid)—will prevail. Methodology/results: In contrast to marketplace’s dominance when there is a single supplier, depending on the heterogeneity in the suppliers’ product quality, operating only a marketplace may result in either a suboptimal commission rate or the exclusion of the supplier offering the high-quality product from the contract. We find that the retailer may then choose a hybrid contract to better tailor the contract to each supplier type. We show that the hybrid contract can emerge under four realistic scenarios: when suppliers determine quality level endogenously; suppliers select the contract type; the retailer is dominant and proposes tiered commission rates; and a continuum of supplier types. Moreover, in all these cases, when the hybrid contract is adopted, the lower quality product is sold via marketplace, whereas the higher quality product is sold via wholesale. Using data from a leading U.S.-based retailer, we also provide empirical support for this specific equilibrium outcome. Managerial implications: Our findings provide guidance to retail managers who are transitioning into marketplaces on when and what type of hybrid contract would be advisable to offer. By introducing heterogeneity in the suppliers’ product quality, our work also contributes to the literature by uncovering new driving forces for why the hybrid contract emerges as an equilibrium outcome. Funding: A. Jain’s work on this research was supported by Professional Staff Congress - the City University of New York Award jointly funded by The Professional Staff Congress and The City University of New York. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0921 .
title_cn: 产品质量在市场中的作用
abstract_cn: 问题定义：传统零售商在线上运营时也开始采用市场平台模式，即零售商收取佣金，而供应商决定零售价格。我们对零售商与两位供应商之间的互动进行了建模，供应商提供不同质量的产品，面对忠诚的消费者，并享有质量和价格依赖的需求函数。我们确定了哪种合同类型——仅市场平台、仅批发，或市场平台和批发的组合（即混合模式）将占主导地位。 方法论/结果：与单一供应商时市场平台的主导地位形成对比，取决于供应商产品质量的异质性，仅运营市场平台可能会导致佣金率不理想或高质量产品的供应商被排除在合同之外。我们发现，零售商可能会选择混合合同，以更好地针对每种供应商类型量身定制合同。我们表明，在以下四种现实场景下，混合合同能够出现：供应商内生决定质量水平；供应商选择合同类型；零售商处于主导地位并提出分级佣金率；以及供应商类型的连续性。此外，在所有这些情况下，采用混合合同时，低质量产品通过市场平台销售，而高质量产品通过批发销售。通过使用一家领先的美国零售商的数据，我们还为这一特定均衡结果提供了实证支持。 管理启示：我们的研究结果为转型为市场平台的零售管理者提供了有关何时以及什么类型的混合合同是可取的建议。通过引入供应商产品质量的异质性，我们的工作还为文献贡献了新的推动力，揭示了混合合同作为均衡结果出现的原因。资助：A. Jain 在这项研究中的工作得到了纽约市立大学专业员工国会奖的支持，该奖项由专业员工国会和纽约市立大学共同资助。 附加材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0921 获取。

title: Comanaging in Multisubsidiary Firms: The Role of Complementary and Substitutive Interdependencies
abstract: We examine the formal authority structure in multisubsidiary firms, focusing on comanaged subsidiaries owned by two or more subsidiaries that belong to the same firm. We argue that a subsidiary is more likely to be comanaged when its need for intrafirm coordination and thus, the need for information processing are high. Accordingly, the likelihood that a subsidiary will be comanaged by other subsidiaries is positively associated with the extent of its relatedness and multimarket contact. Furthermore, the turbulence of the subsidiary’s environment moderates these relationships; it amplifies the relatedness and comanagement link but attenuates the multimarket contact and comanagement link, reflecting the complementary and substitutive nature of these interdependencies, respectively. Results of analyses based on the population of subsidiaries of manufacturing firms operating in France between 1999 and 2004 support the predictions. Our theory and findings have implications for the study of multiauthority structures more broadly, including project-based and matrix organizations, where similar demands shape the design of formal authority relationships across multiple superiors.
title_cn: 在多子公司企业中的共同管理：互补性和替代性相互依赖的作用
abstract_cn: 我们研究了多子公司企业中的正式权威结构，重点关注由两个或多个属于同一公司的子公司共同管理的子公司。我们认为，当子公司对公司内部协调的需求较高以及信息处理的需求较高时，其更有可能被共同管理。因此，子公司被其他子公司共同管理的可能性与其相关性和多市场接触的程度呈正相关。此外，子公司环境的动荡程度在这些关系中起到调节作用；它会放大相关性与共同管理之间的联系，但会减弱多市场接触与共同管理之间的联系，反映了这些相互依赖关系的互补性和替代性。基于1999年至2004年间在法国运营的制造企业子公司的总体数据分析结果支持了这一预测。我们的理论和发现对更广泛的多权威结构研究具有重要意义，包括项目型和矩阵组织，在这些组织中，相似的需求塑造了多个上级之间正式权威关系的设计。

title: Harnessing Star Power: The Distinct Effects of Star Inventors on Radical and Incremental Innovation
abstract: Abstract Star inventors are highly valuable resources, offering scarce knowledge and expertise that significantly enhance a firm's innovation performance. Beyond their expertise, what sets star inventors apart is their star status – a role that prescribes them high positions in organizational hierarchy and the power to steer resource allocation within the organization. The status‐based perspective suggests that star inventors pursue activities that align with and reinforce their high‐status. Integrating these insights, we explore how star inventors distinctively influence incremental innovation and radical innovation of firms. Specifically, we propose that the effect of star inventors on incremental innovation follows an inverted U‐shaped relationship, whereas their effect on radical innovation is continuously positive. Further, we posit that collaboration intensity between star inventors enhances radical innovation but does not similarly benefit incremental innovation. Analysing data from publicly traded, R&D‐active US firms and their more than one million patents, we broadly find support for our hypotheses. Our primary contribution lies in explaining how status shapes star inventors' distinct contributions to incremental and radical innovations, offering insights to support strategic decision‐making in managing star talent.
title_cn: 利用明星效应：明星发明家对激进创新和渐进创新的不同影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 明星发明者是极其珍贵的资源，他们提供的稀缺知识和专业技能显著提升了企业的创新绩效。除了他们的专业能力，明星发明者的明星地位也使他们与众不同——这种角色为他们在组织层级中设定了高位，同时赋予他们在资源分配中具有引导权。基于地位的视角认为，明星发明者会追求与他们的高地位相符并强化该地位的活动。结合这些见解，我们探讨了明星发明者如何独特地影响企业的渐进创新和突破创新。具体而言，我们提出明星发明者对渐进创新的影响呈倒U型关系，而他们对突破创新的影响则持续为正。此外，我们认为，明星发明者之间的合作强度能够增强突破创新，但对渐进创新则没有类似的积极影响。通过分析来自美国上市公司且积极进行研发的企业及其超过一百万项专利的数据，我们广泛地发现支持我们的假设。我们的主要贡献在于解释了地位如何塑造明星发明者对渐进与突破创新的独特贡献，为在管理明星人才中的战略决策提供了见解。

title: From Welfare to Well-Groomed: How Income Conditions Influence Moral Perception of Beauty Consumption
abstract: While consumers across all income conditions participate in beauty consumption, how people view such consumption made by consumers from different income conditions remains unclear. Across eight experiments (including two supplementary studies), this research identifies income condition as a key factor shaping moral judgments of beauty consumption. Specifically, we found that a consumer’s income condition and consumption choice on beauty interactively shape how others evaluate his or her perceived morality, such that welfare recipients are judged as less moral when purchasing beauty products (vs. daily necessities), whereas no such effect emerges for middle-income earners. This effect is mediated by perceived deservingness, such that welfare recipients are viewed as less deserving of spending freedom than middle-income earners. Such evaluations are indirectly linked to reduced financial support to welfare recipients who engage in beauty consumption compared to those who do not. Furthermore, when welfare recipients’ beauty consumption is framed as driven by utilitarian (vs. hedonic) motives, they are perceived as more deserving and, in turn, more moral. Finally, debiasing interventions that increase perceived deservingness were shown to be effective in alleviating moral condemnation toward welfare recipients’ beauty consumption. Together, this research provides insights for consumers and beauty industry firms seeking to understand biases toward welfare recipients’ beauty spending and foster a more inclusive marketplace.
topics: Consumer Behavior in Brand Consumption and Identification
Psychology of Moral and Emotional Judgment
title_cn: 从福利到精致：收入条件如何影响对美容消费的道德认知
abstract_cn: 尽管所有收入水平的消费者都参与美妆消费，但人们对来自不同收入条件的消费者的这种消费看法仍不清晰。通过八个实验（包括两个补充研究），本研究确定收入条件是影响人们对美妆消费道德评判的关键因素。具体而言，我们发现消费的收入条件和美妆选择相互作用，影响他人对其被视道德水平的评估，即福利接受者在购买美妆产品时（与日常必需品相比）被评判为道德水准较低，而中产阶级则没有这种效果。该效应通过被视为应得程度来中介，即福利接受者被认为拥有的支出自由不如中产阶级。对福利接受者从事美妆消费的负面评价与减少对其经济支持之间存在间接联系。此外，当福利接受者的美妆消费被框定为出于功利动机（与享乐动机相比）时，他们被视为更应得，从而显得更加道德。最后，增加应得感的去偏见干预被证明有效缓解了对福利接受者美妆消费的道德谴责。总之，本研究为消费者和美妆行业公司提供了洞察，帮助他们理解对福利接受者美妆消费的偏见，并促进更具包容性的市场环境。

title: How Do Content Producers Respond to Engagement on Social Media Platforms?
abstract: We examine how receiving engagement affects users’ subsequent behavior on social media platform, using a large-scale field experiment from Twitter.
title_cn: 内容生产者如何回应社交媒体平台上的互动？
abstract_cn: 我们研究了接收到互动如何影响用户在社交媒体平台上的后续行为，采用了来自Twitter的大规模实地实验。

title: Organizations as Stages: A Dramaturgical Theory of the Societal Integration of Stigmatized Groups
abstract: This paper theorizes how organizations enable the societal integration of stigmatized groups. Drawing on Goffman’s relational perspective on stigma and his dramaturgical metaphors, we conceptualize organizations as “stages” on which stigmatized groups are presented to diverse audiences. We identify two fundamental forms of staging—concealing and normalizing—through which organizations can reduce sanctions from stigmatizing audiences and elicit acceptance among more supportive ones, thereby ultimately enabling societal integration. Our model specifies the structural antecedents that shape the likelihood of each form of staging, offering a nuanced understanding of when organizations adopt them as well as the tensions that may arise from doing so. Based on this, we extend research on organizations’ management of stigma by advancing a dramaturgical theory of the societal integration of stigmatized groups. Whereas prior work has largely assumed that managing the stigmatized attributes of groups is central (and often sufficient) for their broader integration, we demonstrate that integration ultimately depends on the management of audiences and must therefore be understood as an inherently audience-focused process.
title_cn: 组织作为舞台：污名化群体社会整合的戏剧理论
abstract_cn: 本文理论化探讨了组织如何促进边缘群体的社会融入。借鉴戈夫曼关于污名的关系视角及其戏剧性隐喻，我们将组织概念化为“舞台”，在这些舞台上边缘群体向不同的观众呈现。我们识别出两种基本的呈现形式——隐藏和正常化——通过这两种形式，组织可以减少来自污名观众的制裁，并在更具支持性的观众中获得接受，从而最终实现社会融入。我们的模型明确了影响每种呈现形式可能性的结构先行因素，提供了对组织何时采用这些形式以及由此可能引发的紧张关系的细致理解。基于此，我们扩展了关于组织管理污名的研究，提出了一种关于边缘群体社会融入的戏剧理论。尽管以往的研究大多假设管理群体的污名属性是其更广泛融入的核心（且通常足够），我们证明了融入最终依赖于观众的管理，因此必须理解为一个固有以观众为中心的过程。

title: Pulling the Trigger Hurts: How Family CEOs Use Sensemaking to Overcome Hesitancy to Dismiss Managers
abstract: Managerial dismissal decisions are a common yet challenging task for CEOs, particularly those joining as new CEOs in organizations characterized by strong values. The purpose of this research is to shift the perspective on such decisions from being a quick rational cost–benefit analysis to being value-based and relational, thus creating an ambiguous and often time-consuming decision situation. We take a sensemaking perspective to understand how new CEOs make sense of potential managerial dismissals and how such sensemaking affects their ultimate dismissal decisions. We investigate this question through a multi-case approach, drawing on evidence from six family firms, which represent an extreme context of value-based organizations. We present a model of how dyadic and prospective sensemaking mechanisms shape whether CEOs are able to overcome their hesitancy to engage in managerial dismissals and, thus, engage in reasoned or rejected dismissals. Our findings extend knowledge on managerial dismissals, provide new insights into how new CEOs build their managerial teams, and explain how CEOs of family firms and other value-based organizations balance non-financial goals in difficult decisions.
title_cn: 扣动扳机的痛苦：家庭首席执行官如何利用意义构建克服解雇经理的犹豫心理
abstract_cn: 高管解雇决策对首席执行官来说是一项普遍却富有挑战性的任务，尤其是对那些在具有强烈价值观的组织中新任的首席执行官而言。本研究的目的是将对这些决策的视角从快速的理性成本-效益分析转变为以价值为基础和关系导向，从而形成一个模糊且通常耗时的决策情境。我们采用了意义建构的视角来理解新任首席执行官如何理解潜在的高管解雇，并探讨这种意义建构如何影响他们最终的解雇决策。我们通过多案例研究的方法，对六家体现价值导向的家族企业进行了实证研究，这些企业代表了极端的价值基础组织情境。我们提出了一个模型，阐述双重及前瞻性意义建构机制如何影响首席执行官克服对高管解雇的犹豫，从而进行理性或拒绝的解雇。我们的研究结果丰富了关于高管解雇的知识，提供了关于新任首席执行官如何组建管理团队的新见解，并解释了家族企业及其他价值导向组织的首席执行官在困难决策中如何平衡非财务目标。

title: Learning to Optimally Stop Diffusion Processes, with Financial Applications
abstract: We study optimal stopping for diffusion processes with unknown model primitives within the continuous-time reinforcement learning (RL) framework Wang, Zariphopoulou and Zhou [Wang H, Zariphopoulou T, Zhou XY (2020), J. Machine Learn. Res. 21(198):1-34], and present applications to option pricing and portfolio choice. By penalizing the corresponding variational inequality formulation, we transform the stopping problem into a stochastic optimal control problem with two actions. We then randomize controls into Bernoulli distributions and add an entropy regularizer to encourage exploration. We derive a semianalytical optimal Bernoulli distribution, based on which we devise RL algorithms using the martingale approach Jia and Zhou [Jia Y, Zhou XY (2022a) J. Machine Learn. Res. 23(154):1–55]. We establish a policy improvement theorem and prove the fast convergence of the resulting policy iterations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the algorithms in pricing finite-horizon American put options, solving Merton’s problem with transaction costs, and scaling to high-dimensional optimal stopping problems. In particular, we show that both the offline and online algorithms achieve high accuracy in learning the value functions and characterizing the associated free boundaries. This paper has been accepted by Kay Giesecke for the Special Issue on AI for Finance and Business Decisions. Funding: M. Dai was supported by the Hong Kong Research Grants Council [15212324, 15217123, 15213422, and T32-615/24-R], the Hong Kong Polytechnic University [P0042708, P0042456, and P0039114], and the Key Project of National Natural Science Foundation of China [72432005]. Y. Sun acknowledges financial support from a start-up fund at Peking University HSBC Business School. Z. Xu acknowledges financial support from The Hong Kong RGC [GRF 15204622, 15203423], NSFC 12571517, the PolyU-SDU Joint Research Center on Financial Mathematics, the CAS AMSS-PolyU Joint Laboratory of Applied Mathematics, the Research Centre for Quantitative Finance (1-CE03), and internal grants from The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. X. Zhou was supported by the Nie Center for Intelligent Asset Management at Columbia University. This work was also part of a Columbia-CityU/HK collaborative project that was supported by the InnoHK Initiative, the Government of the HKSAR, and the AIFT Lab. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07614 .
title_cn: 学习最佳停止扩散过程及其金融应用
abstract_cn: 我们研究了在连续时间强化学习（RL）框架内，针对具有未知模型原始参数的扩散过程的最优停止问题，参考了Wang、Zariphopoulou和Zhou的研究 [Wang H, Zariphopoulou T, Zhou XY (2020), J. Machine Learn. Res. 21(198):1-34]，并展示了其在期权定价和投资组合选择中的应用。通过惩罚相应的变分不等式形式，我们将停止问题转化为一个具有两种动作的随机最优控制问题。然后，我们将控制随机化为伯努利分布，并添加熵正则化项以鼓励探索。我们推导出半解析最优伯努利分布，基于此设计了使用鞅方法的强化学习算法，参考了Jia和Zhou的研究 [Jia Y, Zhou XY (2022a) J. Machine Learn. Res. 23(154):1-55]。我们建立了政策改善定理，并证明了所得到的政策迭代的快速收敛性。我们展示了算法在定价有限期限美式看跌期权、解决考虑交易成本的Merton问题、以及扩展到高维最优停止问题中的有效性。特别地，我们表明，离线和在线算法在学习价值函数及描述相关自由边界方面均达到了较高的准确性。本文已被Kay Giesecke接受用于《人工智能与金融及商业决策特刊》。资助信息：Dai M.获得了香港研究资助局的支持 [15212324、15217123、15213422和T32-615/24-R]，香港理工大学的支持 [P0042708、P0042456和P0039114]，以及国家自然科学基金重点项目的支持 [72432005]。Sun Y.认可了来自北京大学汇丰商学院启动基金的财务支持。Xu Z.获得了香港研究资助局的支持 [GRF 15204622、15203423]、国家自然科学基金12571517、理工大学-山东大学金融数学联合研究中心、科学院应用数学所与理工大学联合实验室、定量金融研究中心(1-CE03)以及香港理工大学的内部资助。Zhou X.得到了哥伦比亚大学智能资产管理中心的支持。本研究也是哥伦比亚大学与城市大学（香港）合作项目的一部分，得到了香港特别行政区政府创新香港计划、AIFT实验室的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07614 获取。

title: Transportation and Inventory Planning in Serial Supply Chain with Heterogeneous Capacitated Vehicles
abstract: We study serial supply chain problems where a product is transported from a supplier to a warehouse (inbound transportation), and then from the warehouse (outbound transportation) to a retailer such that demand for a given planning horizon is satisfied. We consider heterogeneous vehicles of varying capacities for transportation in each time period, and the objective is to plan inbound and outbound transportation along with inventory in each time period so that overall inventory and transportation costs are minimized. These problems belong to the class of two-echelon lot-sizing (2-ELS) problems with the warehouse and retailer as the first and second echelons, respectively. We address an open question raised in van Hoesel et al. [van Hoesel S, Romeijn HE, Morales DR, Wagelmans APM (2005) Integrated lot sizing in serial supply chains with production capacities. Management Sci. 51(11):1706–1719]: Does there exist a polynomial-time algorithm for 2-ELS with a single capacitated vehicle for each of the inbound and outbound transportation? Specifically, we introduce polynomial-time algorithms for this problem and its three generalizations with multiple capacitated vehicles for inbound and/or outbound transportation, thereby generalizing the results of Kaminsky and Simchi-Levi [Kaminsky P, Simchi-Levi D (2003) Production and distribution lot sizing in a two stage supply chain. IIE Trans. 35(11):1065–1075] and Sargut and Romeijn [Sargut FZ, Romeijn HE (2007) Capacitated production and subcontracting in a serial supply chain. IIE Trans. 39(11):1031–1043] for 2-ELS with a single capacitated vehicle for inbound transportation and uncapacitated outbound transportation. We showcase the practical applications of these approaches in efficiently solving discrete two- and multiechelon lot-sizing problems that arise in freight transportation, the international shipping industry, and the tire manufacturing industry. Based on our computational experiments, we observe that the algorithm for discrete 2-ELS with a capacitated vehicle for inbound and outbound transportation is computationally efficient in comparison with solving the mixed binary formulations of two- and multiechelon lot-sizing problems using an off-the-shelf optimization solver. This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization and decision analytics. Funding: This work was supported by the Division of Civil, Mechanical and Manufacturing Innovation of National Science Foundation [Grants 1824897 and 2034503]. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.04106 .
title_cn: 异构能力车辆的串联供应链中的运输与库存规划
abstract_cn: 我们研究了串联供应链问题，其中产品从供应商运输到仓库（入境运输），然后再从仓库运输到零售商（出境运输），以满足给定规划期限内的需求。我们考虑在每个时间段内运输所使用的具有不同容量的异构车辆，目标是规划每个时间段内的入境和出境运输及库存，从而使总体库存和运输成本最低。这些问题属于二级批量规划（2-ELS）问题类，其中仓库和零售商分别为第一和第二级。我们解决了van Hoesel等人提出的一个开放问题 [van Hoesel S, Romeijn HE, Morales DR, Wagelmans APM (2005) 在具有生产能力的串联供应链中进行集成批量规划. 《管理科学》 51(11):1706–1719]：是否存在一个针对每个入境和出境运输都有单个受限车辆的2-ELS的多项式时间算法？具体而言，我们引入了针对该问题及其三个广义问题的多项式时间算法，涉及多个受限车辆的入境和/或出境运输，从而推广了Kaminsky和Simchi-Levi [Kaminsky P, Simchi-Levi D (2003) 在两级供应链中的生产和配送批量规划. 《IIE期刊》 35(11):1065–1075]和Sargut与Romeijn [Sargut FZ, Romeijn HE (2007) 在串联供应链中考虑能力限制的生产和外包. 《IIE期刊》 39(11):1031–1043]的结果，这些结果适用于单个受限车辆的入境运输和不受限的出境运输。我们展示了这些方法在高效解决在货运、国际航运行业和轮胎制造行业中出现的离散的两级和多级批量规划问题中的实际应用。基于我们的计算实验，我们观察到，针对具有入境和出境运输的受限车辆的离散2-ELS的算法在计算上具有更高的效率，相比于使用现成的优化求解器解决双重和多重批量规划问题的混合二元公式。本文由优化与决策分析领域的Chung Piaw Teo接受。资助信息：本研究得到国家科学基金会土木、机械与制造创新部门的支持 [资助号1824897和2034503]。补充材料：数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.04106 获取。

title: The Power of Two in Token Systems
abstract: In economies without monetary transfers, token systems serve as an alternative to sustain cooperation and increase efficiency. This paper studies whether a token-based economy can be effective in marketplaces with thin exogenous supply. We consider a marketplace in which at each time period one agent requests a service, one agent provides the service, and one token (artificial currency) is used to pay for service provision. The number of tokens each agent has represents the difference between the amount of service provisions and service requests by the agent. We are interested in the behavior of this economy when very few agents are available to provide the requested service. Because balancing the number of tokens across agents is key to sustain cooperation, the agent with the minimum number of tokens is selected to provide service among the available agents. When exactly one random agent is available to provide service, we show that the token distribution is unstable. However, already when just two random agents are available to provide service, the token distribution is stable, in the sense that agents’ token balance is unlikely to deviate much from their initial endowment, and agents return to their initial endowment in finite expected time. Our results mirror the power-of-two-choices paradigm in load balancing problems. Supported by numerical simulations using kidney exchange data, our findings suggest that token systems may generate efficient outcomes in kidney exchange marketplaces by sustaining cooperation between hospitals. This paper was accepted by Peng Sun, optimization and decision analytics. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06176 .
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 代币系统中的二的力量
abstract_cn: 在没有货币转移的经济体中，代币系统作为一种替代方案，用于维持合作并提高效率。本文研究了代币经济体在外生供应稀薄的市场中是否能够有效运作。我们考虑一个市场，在每个时间段内，一个代理请求服务，另一个代理提供服务，并使用一种代币（人工货币）支付服务的提供。每个代理拥有的代币数量代表该代理提供的服务量与请求的服务量之间的差异。我们关注的是在可提供请求服务的代理非常少的情况下，这种经济体的行为。由于在代理之间平衡代币数量是维持合作的关键，因此在可用代理中选择代币数量最少的代理提供服务。当恰好有一个随机代理可以提供服务时，我们表明代币分配是不稳定的。然而，当正好有两个随机代理可以提供服务时，代币分配稳定，代理的代币余额不太可能大幅偏离其初始供给，并且代理在有限的期望时间内会恢复到初始供给。我们的结果反映了负载平衡问题中的“两选一”范式。通过使用肾脏交换数据的数值模拟支持，我们的发现表明，代币系统可能通过维持医院之间的合作，在肾脏交换市场中产生有效的结果。本文被彭巩接受，属于优化与决策分析领域。补充材料：数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06176 获取。

title: On the Complexity of Finding Locally Optimal Solutions in Bilevel Linear Optimization
abstract: On the Complexity of Finding Locally Optimal Solutions in Bilevel Linear Optimization
title_cn: 双层线性优化中寻找局部最优解的复杂性
abstract_cn: 关于双层线性优化中寻找局部最优解的复杂性

title: Decision Threshold Setting in Binary Classification Problems—A Behavioral Lens
abstract: ABSTRACT When binary classification models are wrong, managers face misclassification costs. Although false positive outcomes imply unnecessary mitigation efforts, false negative outcomes imply overlooking the class of interest. Humans calibrate these ai models supporting operational systems by adjusting the decision threshold that translates prediction probability into either class. Results of our controlled laboratory experiment show that, despite all relevant information being available, decision makers systematically deviate from the optimal cost‐efficient threshold. We observe a significant interaction effect of class and cost imbalance on this deviation, which increases in high‐stakes settings where more extreme thresholds are optimal. When unit costs are different, we find that participants anchor on the threshold where expected misclassification costs for false alarms and missed hits are equal, whereas mean anchoring cannot explain the pull‐to‐center behavior sufficiently. Surprisingly, we confirm that this impulse balance equilibrium also serves as attractive anchor in our setting, where decisions are made ex ante without loss aversion. To debias decision makers, simulated responses with behavior‐aware costs show that subjects are nudged to make choices closer to the optimum. Managers should be aware of this boundedly rational behavior and complementary debiasing techniques, as sub‐optimal threshold setting results in 53% higher misclassification costs, on average.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 二元分类问题中的决策阈值设置——一种行为视角
abstract_cn: 摘要 当二元分类模型出现错误时，管理者面临误分类成本。尽管假阳性结果意味着不必要的缓解努力，但假阴性结果则意味着忽视了感兴趣的类别。人类通过调整决策阈值，在可用的预测概率与类别之间进行映射，从而校准这些支持操作系统的人工智能模型。我们的控制实验室实验结果显示，尽管所有相关信息都可用，决策者在系统性偏离最优成本效率阈值方面存在显著现象。我们观察到类别与成本不平衡之间的显著交互效应，这种偏离在高风险环境中增加，因为在那里更极端的阈值是最优的。当单位成本不同時，我们发现参与者会锚定在期望的误分类成本相等的阈值上，而均值锚定则不能充分解释向中心靠拢的行为。令人惊讶的是，我们确认这种冲动平衡的均衡在我们的研究环境中也作为了一个有吸引力的锚点，决策是在没有损失厌恶的情况下进行的。为了消除决策者的偏见，基于行为意识的成本模拟响应表明，受试者被推动去做出更接近最优的选择。管理者应意识到这种有限理性行为及其补充的去偏见技术，因为次优的阈值设定平均导致53%的误分类成本增加。

title: When Yes Is a No: Navigating the Façade of Conformity in Continuous Improvement
abstract: ABSTRACT Continuous Improvement (CI) initiatives are central to operational excellence, emphasizing bottom‐up, team‐based problem‐solving. In practice, however, they are embedded within hierarchical systems that require managerial oversight. This duality introduces a structural tension between empowerment and control, giving rise to a behavioral dynamic that we conceptualize as the façade of conformity (FC) in CI, a defensive impression‐management behavior where team members outwardly express agreement with CI decisions while privately withholding dissent. We argue that FC in CI affects operational performance. We further theorize that collective team identification (CTI), a shared sense of belonging and commitment to goals, moderates this negative relationship. We test our theory in two complementary studies: a laboratory experiment involving 71 teams (284 participants) simulating ad‐hoc CI, and a field study of 330 structured CI projects within a large financial services firm. Across both settings, we find that FC has a negative impact on operational performance, while a strong CTI mitigates this effect. We conduct extensive robustness and supplementary analyses to validate our results. This research contributes to behavioral operations and continuous improvement bodies of knowledge by introducing FC in CI as a distinct behavioral failure mode and identifying CTI as a boundary condition, providing managers with guidance on recognizing and addressing FC to safeguard CI efforts and investments.
title_cn: 当“是”成了“否”：在持续改进中的从众表象导航
abstract_cn: 摘要 持续改进（CI）举措是运营卓越的核心，强调自下而上的团队问题解决。然而，在实践中，它们嵌入在需要管理监督的等级制度中。这种双重性在赋权与控制之间引入了结构性紧张，形成了我们概念化的持续改进中的顺应外表（FC）的行为动态，这是一种防御性印象管理行为，团队成员在表面上对CI决策表示同意，而在私下里却保持异议。我们认为，持续改进中的FC对运营绩效产生影响。我们进一步理论化集体团队认同（CTI），即对目标的共同归属感和承诺，调节这种负面关系。我们在两项互补研究中测试我们的理论：一项涉及71个团队（284名参与者）的实验室实验，模拟临时CI，以及在一家大型金融服务公司中对330个结构性CI项目的实地研究。我们在这两个环境中发现，FC对运营绩效有负面影响，而强烈的CTI则减轻了这种影响。我们进行了广泛的稳健性和补充分析来验证我们的结果。本研究通过将CI中的FC引入为一种独特的行为失效模式，并识别CTI作为边界条件，为行为运营和持续改进的知识体系作出了贡献，为管理者提供了识别和应对FC的指导，以保护CI的努力和投资。

title: To Collect or to Purchase? Collaboration Between Manufacturer and E-Commerce Platform on Customization
abstract: More manufacturers are combining novel customer-to-manufacturer (C2M) with traditional make-to-order (MTO) customization to deliver tailored products. However, they face a critical choice between collecting data independently and purchasing data-driven insights from e-commerce platforms. This key decision remains ambiguous in practice and understudied in the information systems literature, with little rigorous analysis on data acquisition ways and their interaction with hybrid customization. This study addresses this gap by investigating firms’ data acquisition strategies in the context of hybrid customization. We find that when the marginal cost of data acquisition is high for both the manufacturer and the e-commerce platform, and customers have a stronger bias against tailored products, the manufacturer should still prefer collecting market data independently rather than purchasing data-driven insights. The e-commerce platform should not always provide insight support. Moreover, manufacturer-collected C2M may sometimes lead to a higher effort level of acquiring informative data and more customer welfare than platform-initiated C2M. These results provide valuable guidelines to manufacturers on choosing an appropriate data acquisition way, to e-commerce platforms on offering data-driven insights, and to policymakers on improving customer welfare. These results also contribute to the emerging literature in IS and related disciplines on data-driven production models.
title_cn: 收集还是购买？制造商与电子商务平台在定制化上的合作
abstract_cn: 越来越多的制造商将新型的客户到制造商（C2M）模式与传统的按订单生产（MTO）定制相结合，以提供个性化产品。然而，他们面临一个关键的选择，即是独立收集数据还是从电子商务平台购买数据驱动的洞见。这一关键决策在实践中仍然模糊，并且在信息系统文献中未得到充分研究，关于数据获取方式及其与混合定制的互动的严谨分析较少。本研究通过探讨企业在混合定制背景下的数据获取策略来填补这一空白。我们发现，当数据获取的边际成本对于制造商和电子商务平台都较高，并且客户对个性化产品存在较强的偏见时，制造商仍然应优先选择独立收集市场数据，而不是购买数据驱动的洞见。电子商务平台并不总是应该提供洞见支持。此外，制造商收集的C2M有时可能导致更高的获取信息数据的努力水平以及更多的客户福利，而不是平台发起的C2M。这些结果为制造商选择合适的数据获取方式、为电子商务平台提供数据驱动洞见以及为政策制定者改善客户福利提供了宝贵的指导。这些结果还为信息系统及相关学科中新兴的关于数据驱动生产模型的文献做出了贡献。

title: Supervisory Support Shift: The Impact of Disability Inclusion on Coworker Productivity
abstract: A growing number of organizations hire employees with visible physical disabilities into jobs where they can perform as effectively as their nondisabled counterparts. Many practitioners expect such inclusion to positively impact nondisabled coworkers. Yet, the consequences for nondisabled coworkers’ productivity remain unclear. We focus on an underexplored mechanism: frontline managers’ discretionary allocation of supervisory support. Drawing on research on benevolent ableism and finite managerial capacity, we theorize that adding an employee with a visible physical disability—even one fully capable of performing the task—can shift supervisory support toward the disabled employee, reducing the support available to nondisabled coworkers. We test this theory using a natural experiment in a teleservice company that randomly assigned recruits, including individuals with visible physical disabilities, to project teams. We analyze 40,334 employee-month productivity bonus records, a standardized, nondiscretionary measure consolidating multiple performance indicators and net of supervisor evaluations. Supplemented with interviews with 15 frontline managers and 28 subordinate agents, our analyses show that managers allocated more supervisory support to disabled employees and that this reallocation dampened nondisabled coworkers’ productivity. Our study advances understanding of how disability inclusion shapes supervisory support patterns and its implications for coworker performance. Funding: X. Zhou gratefully acknowledges financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72102145] and Shanghai Oriental Talents Program. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19036 .
title_cn: 监督支持转变：残疾包容性对同事生产力的影响
abstract_cn: 越来越多的组织雇佣具有明显身体残疾的员工，安排他们在能够与非残疾同事同样有效地履行工作的岗位上。许多从业者期望这种包容性能够对非残疾同事产生积极影响。然而，非残疾同事的生产力受到的影响仍不明确。我们关注一个尚未深入探讨的机制：一线经理对监督支持的自由分配。基于对仁慈的能力歧视和有限管理能力的研究，我们理论化地认为，增加一名具有明显身体残疾的员工——即使该员工完全有能力完成任务——可能会使监督支持向该残疾员工倾斜，从而减少可供非残疾同事使用的支持。我们通过在一家远程服务公司进行的自然实验来验证这一理论，该公司随机将招聘人员，包括具有明显身体残疾的个体，分配到项目团队中。我们分析了40,334份员工月度生产力奖金记录，这是一种标准化的、非自由裁量的衡量方式，整合了多个绩效指标，并剔除了主管评估的影响。结合对15位一线经理和28位下属代理的访谈，我们的分析显示，经理们对残疾员工分配了更多的监督支持，而这种重新分配抑制了非残疾同事的生产力。我们的研究深化了对残疾包容如何塑造监督支持模式及其对同事绩效影响的理解。资助：周晓感谢中国国家自然科学基金[资助编号72102145]和上海东方人才计划的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19036获取。

title: Passive information blockade and proactive information sharing: impact of asymmetric digitalization on supply chain financing risks and role of governance
abstract: Purpose Asymmetric level of supply chain digitalization (SCD) is particularly prevalent between core companies and enterprises using supply chain finance (SCF enterprises), while the interactions between them are the operational foundation and process carrier of SCF. Based on resource dependence theory (RDT), this study aims to explore the impact of SCD asymmetry on supply chain financing risks (SCFR), and the mechanism of hindering information sharing which put SCF enterprises into passive information blockade. Also, we investigate the effectiveness of governance, which act as proactive information sharing behaviors in weakening the impact of SCD asymmetry. Design/methodology/approach The authors collect dyadic survey data from 412 matched SCF enterprises and core companies in China and analyzed them using multiple regression models. Findings SCD asymmetry exacerbates SCFR by hindering information sharing. Relational governance weakens the negative impact of SCD asymmetry on information sharing, and moderates the mediation effect of SCD asymmetry on SCFR. Contractual governance only works when risk management culture is strong. Originality/value This study takes the perspective of inter-organizational relationship to break through the individual perspective and focuses on the reconstructive effect of digital resource on SCF dependence relationships. By deconstructing RDT, the authors provide unique insights for the mechanism of RDT and the governance logic in SCF context to understand how SCF enterprises use resource, rely on resource and adjust dependency to facilitate information sharing and reduce SCFR.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 被动信息封锁与主动信息共享：不对称数字化对供应链融资风险的影响及治理角色
