abstract_cn: 目的 供应链数字化（SCD）水平的不对称性在核心企业与使用供应链金融的企业（SCF企业）之间尤为突出，而二者之间的互动是供应链金融的运营基础和过程载体。本研究基于资源依赖理论（RDT），旨在探讨SCD不对称对供应链融资风险（SCFR）的影响，以及信息共享受阻的机制，这使得SCF企业处于被动的信息封锁中。此外，我们还研究了治理的有效性，作为主动信息共享行为，以减弱SCD不对称的影响。 设计/方法论/方法 研究者收集了来自中国412对核心企业与SCF企业的双边调查数据，并使用多重回归模型进行分析。 发现 SCD不对称通过阻碍信息共享加剧了SCFR。关系治理减弱了SCD不对称对信息共享的负面影响，并调节了SCD不对称对SCFR的中介效应。合同治理只有在风险管理文化强时才有效。 原创性/价值 本研究从跨组织关系的视角出发，打破了个体视角，重点关注数字资源对供应链金融依赖关系的重构效应。通过解构RDT，研究者为理解SCF企业如何利用资源、依赖资源及调整依赖以促进信息共享和降低SCFR提供了独特的见解，以及在SCF背景下治理逻辑的机制。

title: Media Review: The Past as a Safe House, and the Afterlives of Clandestine Organizing AndersonPaul ThomasOne Battle after AnotherWarner Bros. Pictures

媒体评论：过去作为安全屋，秘密组织的余生

一场接一场的战斗

title: Building Careers in Project-Based Organizations: Breadth, Fit, and the Path to Advancement
abstract: Project-based organizations allow employees in ostensibly similar roles to acquire very different experiences by working on different kinds of projects. We study how people build careers in these contexts, examining when employees choose to diversify their experience—both in terms of project content and collaborators—and how the resulting diversification affects their career advancement. Using longitudinal project data from a services organization, our results suggest that employees initially explore different kinds of work by moving across project types, but then go on to find their fit in a particular area. This process is quicker for high-performing employees and for those with longer tenure and more diverse collaborator networks. We also find that promotion rates and compensation are lower for employees who worked on a broader portfolio of content types and collaborators in the most recent year, but higher for employees who had worked on broader project portfolios in prior years. This paper was accepted by Lamar Pierce, organizations. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02622 .
title_cn: 在项目型组织中构建职业生涯：广度、适配性与晋升路径
abstract_cn: 基于项目的组织允许在看似相似的角色中的员工通过参与不同类型的项目来获得截然不同的经历。我们研究人在这些环境中如何构建职业生涯，考察员工何时选择多元化他们的经验——无论是项目内容还是合作者——以及随之而来的多元化如何影响他们的职业晋升。利用来自一家服务组织的纵向项目数据，我们的研究结果表明，员工最初通过跨项目类型的方式探索不同类型的工作，但随后会在特定领域找到适合自己的方向。这一过程对高绩效员工及那些任期较长且合作者网络更具多样性的员工来说速度更快。我们还发现，最近一年中，处理更广泛的内容类型和合作者组合的员工的晋升率和薪酬较低，而在之前年份中参与更广泛项目组合的员工则相对较高。本文由拉马尔·皮尔斯接受，组织学。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02622获取。

title: Two-Stage Learning to Branch in Branch-Price-and-Cut Algorithms for Solving Vehicle Routing Problems Exactly
abstract: Smarter Branching Speeds Up Leading Exact Vehicle Routing Solvers Researchers have introduced a learning-based branching strategy that substantially accelerates exact algorithms for vehicle routing problems, a core challenge in logistics and transportation systems. The study proposes the first learning-to-branch framework tailored for branch-price-and-cut methods, where dynamic variables and dense constraints make traditional branching decisions computationally expensive. The novel two-stage learning-based branching (2LBB) approach effectively filters promising candidates using inexpensive features and then applies selective, partial testing to reduce costly evaluations. A theoretical model further guides dynamic adjustment of branching effort, balancing decision time with solution quality. Extensive experiments show runtime reductions of 45%–50% on standard CVRP and VRPTW benchmarks and a 47% speedup over the state-of-the-art VRPSolver when integrated into the open-source RouteOpt. These results highlight the growing potential of disciplined machine learning to enhance exact optimization algorithms.
title_cn: 两阶段学习在分支-定价-剪切算法中的分支过程，用于精确解决车辆路线问题
abstract_cn:
智能分支加速领先的精确车辆路径求解器

研究人员提出了一种基于学习的分支策略，显著加速了车辆路径问题的精确算法，这是物流和运输系统中的核心挑战。本研究提出了首个针对分支定价与切割方法的学习-分支框架，在该框架中，动态变量和密集约束使得传统的分支决策在计算上成本高昂。新颖的两阶段基于学习的分支（2LBB）方法有效地利用廉价特征过滤出有前景的候选者，并随后应用选择性、部分测试以减少高成本的评估。一种理论模型进一步指导分支努力的动态调整，在决策时间与解的质量之间取得平衡。大量实验表明，在标准的CVRP和VRPTW基准上，运行时间减少了45%至50%，并且在集成到开源的RouteOpt时，相较于最先进的VRPSolver速度提高了47%。这些结果凸显了严谨的机器学习在增强精确优化算法方面日益增长的潜力。

title: Distributionally Robust Monopoly Pricing: Switching from Low to High Prices in Volatile Markets
abstract: Problem definition: Traditional monopoly pricing assumes sellers have full information about consumer valuations. We consider monopoly pricing under limited information when a seller only knows the mean, variance, and support of the valuation distribution. The objective is to maximize expected revenue by selecting the optimal fixed price. Methodology/results: We adopt a distributionally robust framework, in which the seller considers all valuation distributions that comply with the limited information. We formulate a maximin problem that seeks to maximize expected revenue for the worst case valuation distribution. The minimization problem that identifies the worst case valuation distribution is solved using primal-dual methods and, in turn, leads to an explicitly solvable maximization problem. This yields a closed-form optimal pricing policy and a new fundamental principle prescribing when to use low and high robust prices. Managerial implications: We show that the optimal policy switches from low to high prices when variance becomes sufficiently large, yielding significant performance gains compared with existing robust prices that generally decay with market uncertainty. This presents guidelines for when the seller should switch from targeting mass markets to niche markets. Similar guidelines are obtained for delay-prone services with rational utility-maximizing customers, underlining the universality and wide applicability of the novel pricing policy. Funding: This research was supported by the Nederlandse Organisatie voor Wetenschappelijk Onderzoek (NWO), Vici [Grant 202.068]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0952 .
title_cn: 分布稳健的垄断定价：在波动市场中从低价转向高价
abstract_cn: 问题定义：传统的垄断定价假设卖方对消费者的价值评估拥有充分的信息。我们考虑在有限信息下的垄断定价情形，其中卖方仅了解价值分布的均值、方差和支持集。我们的目标是通过选择最优的固定价格来最大化期望收入。 方法论/结果：我们采用了一种分布鲁棒框架，卖方考虑所有符合有限信息的价值分布。我们构建了一个极大最小问题，旨在为最恶劣的价值分布最大化期望收入。识别最恶劣价值分布的最小化问题通过原始-对偶方法求解，从而导致一个可以显式求解的最大化问题。这提供了一个封闭形式的最优定价政策以及一个新的基本原则，指明何时使用低价和高价的鲁棒定价。 管理启示：我们表明，当方差达到足够大时，最优政策会从低价切换到高价，与现有在市场不确定性下普遍衰减的鲁棒价格相比，产生显著的绩效提升。这为卖方何时应从目标大众市场转向细分市场提供了指导。在延迟较多的服务中，同样为理性效用最大化客户的指导原则也得以获取，突显了这一新型定价政策的普遍性和广泛适用性。 资助：本研究得到了荷兰科学研究组织（NWO）Vici项目（资助号202.068）的支持。 补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0952获取。

title: How Forced Intervention Facilitates AI Adoption
abstract: Problem definition: Whereas artificial intelligence (AI) technologies are increasingly becoming powerful and useful in operations, human workers often resist adopting algorithms, known as algorithm aversion. This aversion can undermine the algorithm performance in practice. Whereas numerous studies explore short-term mitigation strategies for such aversion, this paper investigates whether and why forced interventions can promote AI adoption and reduce algorithm aversion in practice. Methodology/results: Data from a leading online education company reveal that sales workers underutilize a new matching algorithm and often selectively use it on low-quality leads. The company conducted a field experiment in which sales workers were forced to use or not use the algorithm for three weeks. Experimental results show that forcing workers to use the algorithm during the experiment causally increases their algorithm usage over the month after the experiment by 15.8 percentage points. We develop a theoretical model to derive empirical strategies for exploring the mechanisms behind this improvement. Contrary to the traditional literature focusing on habit formation, our findings suggest learning is a key driver for algorithm adoption among workers over the month after the experiment. Specifically, forced algorithm use allows workers to experience the unbiased algorithm performance and positively adjust their beliefs about it. Consequently, after the experiment, workers use the algorithm not only more frequently but also more on high-quality leads. Managerial implications: The study empirically shows that forced intervention can effectively improve persistent algorithm use after the intervention, which is crucial for continuous development of the algorithm. More importantly, forced intervention breaks the vicious cycle of biased beliefs and selective usage by enabling workers to form unbiased evaluation of the algorithm efficacy and mitigate selective adoption on low-quality cases. This suggests that firms can implement extrinsic interventions or educational programs to help workers recognize the benefits of algorithms and develop unbiased beliefs about their capabilities, thus facilitating sustained algorithm usage. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1137 .
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 强制干预如何促进人工智能的采用
abstract_cn: 问题定义：尽管人工智能（AI）技术在运营中日益强大和有用，但人类工作者常常抗拒采用算法，这种现象被称为算法厌恶。这种厌恶可能在实践中削弱算法的表现。尽管许多研究探讨了应对这种厌恶的短期缓解策略，本文则研究了强制干预是否及为何能够促进AI的采用并减少实践中的算法厌恶。 方法论/结果：来自一家领先在线教育公司的数据表明，销售人员低度使用新匹配算法，并且往往只选择在低质量线索上使用它。该公司进行了一个野外实验，让销售人员在三周内被强制使用或不使用该算法。实验结果显示，在实验期间强制工作者使用算法使得他们在实验后一个月的算法使用率因果性地提高了15.8个百分点。我们开发了一个理论模型，以推导探索这一改进背后机制的实证策略。与传统文献专注于习惯形成不同，我们的研究发现学习是实验后一个月内工作者采用算法的关键驱动因素。具体而言，强制使用算法使工作者能够体验到无偏见的算法表现，并积极调整对算法的信念。因此，在实验之后，工作者不仅更频繁地使用算法，而且在高质量线索上的使用也更多。 管理启示：该研究实证表明，强制干预能有效改善介入后持续使用算法的情况，这对于算法的持续发展至关重要。更重要的是，强制干预打破了偏见信念和选择性使用的恶性循环，使工作者能够对算法效果形成无偏的评估，从而减少在低质量案件上的选择性采用。这表明企业可以实施外部干预或教育项目，以帮助工作者认识到算法的好处并发展对其能力的无偏见信念，从而促进持续的算法使用。 附录材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1137 获取。

title: Postdoctoral mobility and returnees' careers in Italian academia
abstract: This paper investigates the relationship between international postdoctoral stays and academic career advancement among researchers returning to the Italian university system. Using a unique dataset of Italian PhD holders observed over a 30-year period, we analyze how international postdoctoral stays are associated with two key career outcomes: (i) the time between PhD completion and first appointment as Assistant Professor ( time-to-entry ), and (ii) the time between Assistant Professor appointment and promotion to Associate Professor ( time-to-promotion ). We identify international postdoctoral stays by tracing foreign affiliations in researchers' publication records and examine how their association with career progression is moderated by institutional inbreeding, home-country linkages, and the persistence of international research networks. To explore these relationships, we apply a Cox proportional hazards model combined with entropy balancing. Our findings were validated by using curriculum vitae information for a subsample of researchers. We found that international postdoctoral stays are associated with slower entry into the academic system but are positively related to shorter time-to-promotion. Notably, this association is strongest for researchers promoted at universities other than their alma mater . We also observe that maintaining a strong home-country publishing network is associated with quicker entry as Assistant Professor, while sustained collaboration in postdoc-period co-author networks is linked to faster promotion to Associate Professor. • Postdocs returnees to the Italian academic system take longer time to get an Assistant Professorship position. • Controlling for productivity, postdocs returnees get promoted faster. • Postdoctoral stays longer than 18 months at prestigious foreign host institutions are associated with faster promotion in “non-inbreeding” universities. • The Italian academic labor market has increasingly rewarded quality and mobility among recent PhD cohorts.
title_cn: 意大利学术界的博士后流动性与归国者的职业发展
abstract_cn: 本文研究了国际博士后经历与回归意大利大学系统的研究人员学术职业发展的关系。利用一个涵盖30年期间的意大利博士学位持有者的独特数据集，我们分析了国际博士后经历如何与两项关键职业结果相关： (i) 从博士完成到首次担任助理教授的时间（入职时间），以及 (ii) 从助理教授任命到晋升为副教授的时间（晋升时间）。我们通过追踪研究人员发表记录中的国际 affiliations 来识别国际博士后经历，并考察这些经历与职业进展的关联如何受机构内生、母国联系以及国际研究网络持续性的调节。为了探讨这些关系，我们应用了Cox比例风险模型并结合熵平衡法。通过对一部分研究人员的简历信息进行验证，我们发现国际博士后经历与学术系统的入职时间较慢相关，但与晋升时间较短呈正相关。特别是这种关联在被提升至非母校大学的研究人员中最为显著。我们还观察到，保持强大的母国出版网络与更快地入职助理教授职位相关，而在博士后阶段的共同作者网络中持续合作则与更快晋升为副教授相关。 • 回归意大利学术系统的博士后花费更长时间获得助理教授职位。 • 控制生产力后，回归的博士后晋升更快。 • 在知名外国接收机构逗留超过18个月的博士后与在“非内生”大学中更快晋升相关。 • 意大利学术劳动力市场对最近的博士群体越来越重视质量和流动性。

title: When venture capital comes to town: Local ecosystem effects beyond funded ventures
abstract: When venture capital (VC) investment flows into a local economy, does it yield economic activity beyond the receiving ventures? While a large literature studies the effect of VC investments on venture-level activity, its consequences for broader economic activity are less well understood. We study the effect of VC investment flows on destination county employment, wages, and venture creation, using a novel instrument based on the ‘social connectedness’ of counties to major non-local sources of VC investment. Using detailed data on investor-to-venture VC flows, we find substantial positive effects: using instrumental-variable estimates, each million dollars invested into a county yields approximately one new venture, 41 jobs, and seven million dollars in payroll. We also document positive spillovers across industries, particularly toward those supplying VC-backed ventures—thereby contributing to the resource munificence of the local economy and its entrepreneurial ecosystem. • We study effects of VC flows across the US on destination-county economic activity. • We combine FE with a novel IV: social connectedness to major non-local sources of VC. • Each million $ invested yields at least 1 venture, 41 jobs, and 7 mln $ in payroll. • Effects spread beyond VC-receiving ventures to other industries through spillovers. • Supplier services benefit, helping to grow the local entrepreneurial ecosystem.
title_cn: 当风险投资进入城市：超越资助企业的地方生态系统影响
abstract_cn: 当风险投资（VC）资金流入地方经济时，它是否会产生超出接受企业的经济活动？虽然已有大量文献研究了风险投资对企业层面活动的影响，但其对更广泛经济活动的影响仍不太清楚。我们利用基于县与主要非本地风险投资来源的“社会联系度”的新工具，研究了风险投资流对目的地县的就业、工资和企业创办的影响。通过详细的数据分析投资者与企业之间的风险投资流动，我们发现了显著的正面效应：利用工具变量估计，每投资一百万美元到一个县，大约可以创造一个新企业、41个就业岗位和七百万美元的工资支出。我们还记录了跨行业的正外溢效应，特别是对支持风险投资企业的行业——从而有助于提升地方经济的资源丰富性及其创业生态系统。 • 我们研究了风险投资流对美国各地目的县经济活动的影响。 • 我们结合了固定效应（FE）和一种新型工具变量：对主要非本地风险投资源的社会联系度。 • 每投资一百万美元，至少可以创造一个企业、41个就业和七百万美元的工资。 • 影响通过外溢效应扩展至接收风险投资的企业以外的其他行业。 • 供应商服务受益，有助于发展地方创业生态系统。

title: Getting on the Map: The Impact of Online Listings on Business Performance
abstract: We evaluate the extent to which small businesses maintain an online presence and estimate the impact of digital representation on business performance. Looking at a review platform, we find that roughly 18% of bars and restaurants in our sample do not have a listing as of the end of 2017, even though creating one is free. We then estimate the effect of adding a new listing using tax records on revenues combined with temporal variation in listing activity as well as a natural experiment that added over a thousand businesses to the platform via a data acquisition. The results suggest that new listings increase revenues in the range of 5%–10%; however, these effects vary substantially across establishments. Establishments that struggle to develop a reputation (e.g., nonchains or those in tourist areas) and those with a higher quality of product (e.g., larger restaurants or those with good reviews) experience larger increases after being listed. This paper was accepted by Duncan Simester, marketing. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04716 .
title_cn: 登上地图：在线列表对商业绩效的影响
abstract_cn: 我们评估了小型企业维持在线存在的程度，并估算了数字展示对商业绩效的影响。在一个评价平台上的研究中，我们发现截至2017年底，我们样本中大约18%的酒吧和餐厅没有列出其信息，即使创建一个列表是免费的。随后，我们使用税收记录和列表活动的时间变动，以及通过数据收购将超过一千家企业添加到该平台的自然实验，来估计新增列表的效果。结果表明，新上市的企业收入增加幅度在5%至10%之间；然而，这些效果在不同的企业之间差异显著。那些在建立声誉方面面临困难的企业（例如非连锁企业或位于旅游区的企业），以及产品质量较高的企业（例如大型餐厅或评价良好的企业）在被列出后收入增长更为显著。本文被邓肯·西梅斯特（Duncan Simester）接受，属于市场营销领域。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04716 获取。

title: Start-Up Firms and Corporate Culture: Evidence from Advertised Corporate Culture
abstract: I document the advertised corporate culture among start-up firms from an online job board. Two corporate culture types emerge: one that concerns the well-being of employees (worker-centered culture) and another that emphasizes other values, such as customers, firms, and markets (firm-centered culture). The worker-centered culture attracts 20% more applications than the other culture type. Firms advertising the worker-centered culture pay 5% lower salaries than measurably similar jobs. Outcomes do not significantly differ among firms that promote different types of corporate culture. To assess whether a worker-centered culture is adopted to reduce labor costs or enhance productivity, I develop an equilibrium model. The model implies that many firms adopt a worker-centered culture primarily for cost savings. This paper was accepted by Ashish Arora, entrepreneurship and innovation. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00254 .
title_cn: 创业公司与企业文化：来自广告企业文化的证据
abstract_cn: 我对从在线招聘网站上发布的初创公司的企业文化进行了记录。由此出现了两种企业文化类型：一种关注员工福祉（以员工为中心的文化），另一种则强调其他价值观，例如客户、公司和市场（以公司为中心的文化）。以员工为中心的文化吸引了比另一种文化类型多20%的求职申请。发布以员工为中心文化的公司支付的工资比可测量的类似职位低5%。不同类型企业文化的公司在结果上没有显著差异。为了评估以员工为中心的文化是为降低劳动力成本还是提高生产力而采用的，我开发了一个均衡模型。该模型暗示，许多公司采用以员工为中心的文化主要是为了节省成本。本文被阿希什·阿罗拉（Ashish Arora）接受，涉及创业与创新。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00254 获取。

title: Macroeconomic Announcements and the News That Matters Most to Investors
abstract: Studying a large set of macroeconomic announcements (MAs) and disentangling their news content, we show that a portfolio of stocks that pays off around MAs that negatively impact the aggregate stock market commands a positive risk premium. Adding this portfolio to a position in the aggregate market substantially increases Sharpe ratio while reducing MA risk exposure, which implies a rejection of the CAPM. Using state-of-the-art measures of cash flow and discount rate news and consistent with prominent intertemporal CAPM specifications, we argue that the portfolio’s risk premium compensates investors for large reinvestment risk. Thus, we conclude that the MA news that matters most to investors is discount rate news and not cash flows news. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Funding: This paper is based upon work supported by the Dutch Research Council [NWO Vidi Grant 201005], Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia [UID/ECO/00124/2020], and POR Lisboa and POR Norte [Social Sciences DataLab, Project 22209]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07650 .
title_cn: 宏观经济公告及对投资者最重要的信息
abstract_cn: 通过研究大量宏观经济公告（MAs）并剖析其新闻内容，我们展示了一个投资组合，该组合在对整体股市产生负面影响的MAs周围获利，能够获得正的风险溢价。将该投资组合添加到整体市场的持仓中，显著提高了夏普比率，同时降低了对MA风险的暴露，这意味着对资本资产定价模型（CAPM）的拒绝。利用最先进的现金流和折现率新闻的测量方法，并与显著的跨期CAPM规范一致，我们认为该投资组合的风险溢价补偿了投资者面临的较大再投资风险。因此，我们得出结论，最重要的MA新闻是折现率新闻，而非现金流新闻。本文已被Lukas Schmid（金融学）接受。资助：本文基于荷兰研究委员会[NWO Vidi Grant 201005]、科学与技术基金会[UID/ECO/00124/2020]以及POR Lisboa和POR Norte[社会科学数据实验室，项目22209]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07650获取。

title: A Note on Piecewise Affine Decision Rules for Robust, Stochastic, and Data-Driven Optimization
abstract: Sharper Approximation for Multistage Decisions Under Uncertainty In “A Note on Piecewise Affine Decision Rules for Robust, Stochastic, and Data-Driven Optimization,” Thomä, Schiffer, and Wiesemann revisit piecewise affine decision rules, a widely used approximation for multistage stochastic programs. Building on the framework of Georghiou et al. (2015), the authors propose an algorithmic refinement that yields strictly better policies in stochastic settings while retaining tractability. Beyond stochastic programming, the framework naturally extends to multistage robust optimization and to modern data-driven models based on Wasserstein ambiguity sets. The paper shows how the resulting policies can be computed efficiently and provides numerical evidence demonstrating consistent performance improvements.
title_cn: 关于鲁棒、随机及数据驱动优化的分段仿射决策规则的备注
abstract_cn: 更尖锐的近似用于不确定性下的多阶段决策 在“关于用于稳健、随机和数据驱动优化的分段仿射决策规则的说明”一文中，Thomä、Schiffer和Wiesemann重新审视了分段仿射决策规则，这是一种广泛应用于多阶段随机规划的近似方法。在Georghiou等人（2015）的框架基础上，作者提出了一种算法上的改进，在随机环境中产生严格更好的决策，同时保持可处理性。除了随机规划，该框架还自然扩展到多阶段稳健优化以及基于Wasserstein模糊集的现代数据驱动模型。本文展示了如何高效地计算所得到的策略，并提供了数值证据以证明性能的持续改善。

title: Discrete Choice Models with Piecewise Linear Utility: Modeling, Estimation, and Pricing
abstract: Problem definition: This paper incorporates a piecewise linear structure into the utility-price relationship of the classic multinomial logit (MNL) model and studies the associated operations problems such as estimation and pricing. Methodology/results: The derived model is referred to as the piecewise MNL model. We study its model identification and further propose a maximum likelihood estimator (MLE) for its calibration by real data. Because of the presence of inflection points, the log-likelihood function is nondifferentiable, which poses major challenges to both numerical and statistical analyses. We then propose a novel profile-based numerical optimization procedure that locates the MLE efficiently and further establish statistical guarantees for the MLE based on the empirical process theory. We fully characterize the price optimization problem under the piecewise MNL and show that the optimal pricing policy can be quite different from the standard MNL. In particular, the equal-(adjusted-)markup policy is no longer optimal, and the optimal solution may not even be unique. Furthermore, we propose an efficient approximation algorithm for the pricing problem that accounts for consumer heterogeneity within the piecewise MNL framework. Managerial implications: Our extensive numerical experiments on synthetic and real data suggest that the piecewise MNL can provide greater modeling flexibility, improve model fitting and prediction accuracy compared with popular choice models in the literature, and ignoring varying price sensitivities could lead to suboptimal solutions or even substantial losses for firms. Funding: C. Ke acknowledges financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72101113]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0169 .
title_cn: 分段线性效用的离散选择模型：建模、估计与定价
abstract_cn: 问题定义：本文将分段线性结构纳入经典多项式Logit（MNL）模型的效用-价格关系中，并研究相关的操作问题，如估计和定价。 方法论/结果：所推导的模型称为分段MNL模型。我们研究其模型识别，并进一步提出了一种最大似然估计量（MLE），用于通过真实数据进行标定。由于存在拐点，对数似然函数是不可微的，这给数值和统计分析带来了重大挑战。然后，我们提出了一种基于轮廓的数值优化程序，能够高效地定位MLE，并进一步根据实证过程理论建立MLE的统计保障。我们全面描述了分段MNL下的定价优化问题，并表明最佳定价政策可能与标准MNL大相径庭。尤其是，等（调整）加价政策不再是最优的，最优解甚至可能不是唯一的。此外，我们提出了一种有效的近似算法，用于考虑分段MNL框架内消费者异质性的定价问题。 管理启示：我们在合成和真实数据上的广泛数值实验表明，分段MNL可以提供更大的建模灵活性，提高模型拟合和预测准确性，与文献中流行的选择模型相比，忽视价格敏感性的变化可能导致亚最优解甚至给公司造成重大损失。 资助：C. Ke 感谢中国国家自然科学基金的财务支持[资助号72101113]。 附加材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0169 找到。

title: Supply Chain Nearshoring in Response to Regional Value Content Requirements
abstract: Problem definition: Global supply chains are currently experiencing unprecedented challenges arising from a shift toward deglobalization in international trade policies. This trend has resulted in the tightening of rules of origin (ROOs) within regional trade agreements, placing pressure on firms to localize or nearshore their production activities. In this paper, we explore how firms’ global sourcing decisions respond to these changes in trade policies by utilizing the tightening of automotive ROOs due to the renegotiation of North American Free Trade Agreement into the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA), resulting in increases to both the stringency and scope of regional value content (RVC) requirements for several classes of automotive products. Methodology/results: We empirically show that firms in the U.S. automotive industry significantly increase the share of their imported automotive products originating from Mexico and Canada, with no corresponding change for other products that do not face an increase in RVC requirements. Our results indicate that in response to the stricter RVC requirements, U.S. automotive firms increasingly source from the USMCA region instead of from outside the regional trade agreement bloc. This nearshoring response is most significant for complementary components, a class of products affected by RVC changes and requiring simpler manufacturing processes, suggesting that automotive firms adopt a gradual nearshoring strategy by initially focusing on less costly supply chain changes. This strategy, although effective in meeting compliance requirements, may lead to unintended consequences of the policy, because it does not fully align with the goal of promoting more regional trade of core parts. We observe that firms with higher property, plant, and equipment and leverage ratios exhibit intensified nearshoring activity. Furthermore, nearshoring is associated with a decrease in inventory level, an increase in inventory turnover and average cost, and a decline in gross margin. Managerial implications: Our findings provide some of the first empirical evidence on how international trade policies influence firms’ global sourcing decisions. In particular, RVC requirements are proven effective in bringing supply chains near home. Funding: This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72201230] and the General Research Fund by Hong Kong Research Grants Council [Grant 14505325]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1555 .
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 针对区域价值内容要求的供应链近岸外包
abstract_cn: 问题定义：全球供应链目前正面临前所未有的挑战，这些挑战源于国际贸易政策向去全球化的转变。这一趋势导致区域贸易协议中的原产地规则（ROOs）趋于严格，给企业在本地化或邻近岸生产活动方面施加了压力。在本文中，我们探讨企业的全球采购决策如何响应这些贸易政策的变化，利用北美自由贸易协定重新谈判成美墨加协定（USMCA）所导致的汽车ROOs收紧，从而增加了多个类别汽车产品的区域价值内容（RVC）要求的严格性和范围。方法论/结果：我们通过实证分析表明，美国汽车行业的企业显著增加了自墨西哥和加拿大进口的汽车产品比例，而对于那些不面临RVC要求增加的其他产品则没有相应变化。我们的结果表明，作为对更严格RVC要求的应对，美国汽车企业越来越多地从USMCA地区采购，而不是从区域贸易协议集团之外采购。这种邻近岸响应对于互补零部件（受RVC变化影响并需要较简单制造流程的一类产品）尤为显著，这表明汽车企业采取了一种渐进的邻近岸战略，最初专注于较低成本的供应链变更。这一战略虽然在满足合规要求方面有效，但可能导致政策的意想不到后果，因为它未能完全与促进核心部件更多区域贸易的目标一致。我们观察到，具有较高固定资产和杠杆比率的企业表现出更为明显的邻近岸活动。此外，邻近岸供应链与库存水平的降低、库存周转率和平均成本的提高以及毛利率的下降相关联。管理意义：我们的发现提供了关于国际贸易政策如何影响企业全球采购决策的一些首批实证证据。特别是，RVC要求在将供应链转向本土方面被证明是有效的。资助：本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金 [资助号 72201230] 和香港研究资助局的一般研究基金 [资助号 14505325] 的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1555 获得。

title: Analytics with Robust Epidemiological Compartmental Optimization Models
abstract: Problem definition: During pandemics, policymakers must make critical decisions about public health interventions and allocations of scarce resources in response to rapidly evolving diseases under high levels of uncertainty. Epidemiological models, such as the Susceptible-Exposed-Infectious-Recovered-type (SEIR-type) compartmental model, are indispensable tools for predicting how a pandemic may spread over time and how different public health interventions could affect the outcome. Based on such predictions, deterministic compartmental optimization models can be adopted to attain effective public health intervention decisions. However, deterministic models often neglect parameter uncertainty and the risks inherent in the stochastic compartment dynamics, leading to less robust solutions. Methodology/results: To address these issues, we develop an epidemiological analytics framework based on the ambiguity tolerance measure and stochastic compartmental models. We introduce a robust epidemiological optimization model that lexicographically minimizes the ambiguity tolerances associated with violating healthcare resource constraints. Leveraging the asymptotic Gaussian property, we employ Gaussian approximation to enhance the efficiency of evaluating robust epidemiological constraints. To streamline and automate its application for practitioners and policymakers, we develop a Python-based robust epidemiological analytics modeling (REALM) toolkit. Managerial implications: Employing real-world data from Singapore, we investigate various resource management scenarios, including testing, bed, and vaccine capacity allocations. Our numerical results showcase that our robust epidemiological analytics models outperform deterministic counterpart benchmarks, particularly in the number of hospitalized cases and deaths, given healthcare resource capacity constraints. The results demonstrate the benefits of accounting for risk and ambiguity in disease propagation when addressing epidemiological optimization models. Funding: The research of C. Fu was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72401229, 72310107003, and 72271201]. The research of M. Zhou was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72301075 and 72293564/72293560]. The research of J. Xie was supported by the Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft [Grant 543063591]. The research of M. Sim was supported by the Ministry of Education, Singapore under its 2019 Academic Research Fund Tier 3 [Grant MOE-2019-T3-1-010]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0984 .
title_cn: 具有稳健流行病学分区优化模型的分析
abstract_cn: 问题定义：在疫情期间，政策制定者必须在高度不确定的情况下，针对快速发展的疾病做出关于公共卫生干预和稀缺资源分配的关键决策。流行病学模型，如易感-暴露-感染-恢复（SEIR）型分隔模型，是预测疫情如何随时间传播以及不同公共卫生干预措施如何影响结果的重要工具。基于这些预测，可以采用确定性分隔优化模型来实现有效的公共卫生干预决策。然而，确定性模型往往忽视参数的不确定性和随机分隔动态中固有的风险，导致解决方案的稳健性不足。方法/结果：为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种基于模糊容忍度测量和随机分隔模型的流行病学分析框架。我们引入了一种稳健的流行病学优化模型，该模型以词典顺序最小化与违反医疗资源约束相关的模糊容忍度。利用渐近高斯特性，我们采用高斯近似来提高评估稳健流行病学约束的效率。为了简化和自动化其在实践者和政策制定者中的应用，我们开发了一个基于Python的稳健流行病学分析建模工具包（REALM）。管理启示：利用来自新加坡的真实数据，我们研究了各种资源管理情景，包括检测、病床和疫苗容量分配。我们的数值结果表明，稳健的流行病学分析模型在住院病例和死亡人数方面优于确定性对照基准，尤其是在医疗资源容量约束下。结果表明，在处理流行病学优化模型时，考虑疾病传播中的风险和模糊性具有显著的好处。资助：C. Fu的研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号72401229、72310107003和72271201]。M. Zhou的研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号72301075和72293564/72293560]。J. Xie的研究得到了德国研究基金会的支持 [资助号543063591]。M. Sim的研究得到了新加坡教育部2019年学术研究基金三级的支持 [资助号MOE-2019-T3-1-010]。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0984获取。

title: Predictive Hotspot Mapping for Data-Driven Crime Prediction
abstract: Predictive hotspot mapping is an important problem in crime prediction and control. An accurate hotspot mapping helps in appropriately targeting the available resources to manage crime in cities. With an aim to make data-driven decisions and automate policing and patrolling operations, police departments across the world are moving toward predictive approaches relying on historical data. In this paper, we create a nonparametric model using a spatiotemporal kernel density formulation for the purpose of crime prediction based on historical data. The proposed approach is also able to incorporate expert inputs coming from humans through alternate sources. The approach has been extensively evaluated in a real-world setting by collaborating with the Delhi police department to make crime predictions that would help in effective assignment of patrol vehicles to control street crime. The results obtained in the paper are promising and can be easily applied in other settings. We release the algorithm and the dataset (masked) used in our study to support future research that will be useful in achieving further improvements.
title_cn: 基于数据的犯罪预测的预测热点映射
abstract_cn: 预测热点映射是犯罪预测与控制中的一个重要问题。准确的热点映射有助于合理配置可用资源以管理城市中的犯罪。为了实现基于数据的决策并自动化警务和巡逻作业，全球各地的警察部门正转向依赖历史数据的预测方法。本文基于历史数据创建了一个无参数模型，使用时空核密度公式进行犯罪预测。所提出的方法还能够通过替代来源整合来自专家的意见。该方法已在真实环境中进行广泛评估，与德里警察部门合作进行犯罪预测，以帮助有效分配巡逻车辆以控制街头犯罪。本文获得的结果令人鼓舞，并且可以轻松应用于其他环境。我们发布了在研究中使用的算法和数据集（已匿名化），以支持未来的研究，这将有助于进一步改进。

title: Getting to the Green: Should a Profit-Maximizing Firm Buy Carbon Offsets or Invite Consumers to Buy Them?
abstract: Many firms, such as American Airlines, Patagonia, Google, and Apple, have publicly stated their goal of becoming carbon neutral at some point in the future. These firms are pursuing multiple emissions reduction initiatives within their value chains, such as the use of renewable energy, zero-emissions vehicles, and low-carbon materials and supplies. But despite these efforts, some residual emissions cannot be further reduced, necessitating the purchase of carbon offsets, which increase firms’ costs. While environmentally conscious consumers may be willing to pay a higher price for a low-emissions product or service, a significant segment of climate change–disengaged consumers is not willing to do so, as demonstrated by multiple studies. In this article, we identify when it is optimal for a profit-maximizing firm to offer its consumers carbon-reduction offsets for purchase with the product, in addition to potentially purchasing offsets at the firm level. Through a stylized analytical model, we show that it is not optimal for firms to both buy offsets at the firm level and offer them to consumers for purchase at the same time. Rather, when the offset cost is low enough, the firm buys enough offsets to compensate for all of its emissions at the firm level, resulting in a higher overall product price; when the offset cost is in the middle range, the firm offers offsets to consumers for purchase at an offset price lower than offset cost, ensuring that green consumers buy offsets; and when the offset cost is high, offsets cannot be optimally used in any way. The thresholds depend on the green-segment size and disutility from emissions (at the consumer-consumption and firm levels), and on the product’s own carbon footprint. Providing offsets for purchase to consumers allows consumers to self-select into their preferred product/price bundle, thus providing the firm with a market-segmentation and price-discrimination mechanism that increases profits and reduces the firm’s carbon footprint.
title_cn: 走向绿色：一家追求利润最大化的公司应该购买碳抵消额度，还是邀请消费者购买？
abstract_cn: 许多公司，如美国航空、巴塔哥尼亚、谷歌和苹果，已公开表明其在未来某个时刻实现碳中和的目标。这些公司在其价值链中追求多种减排举措，例如使用可再生能源、零排放车辆以及低碳材料和供应品。然而，尽管有这些努力，仍然存在一些无法进一步减少的残余排放，这就需要购买碳抵消，这增加了公司的成本。虽然关注环境的消费者可能愿意为低排放的产品或服务支付更高的价格，但大量对气候变化漠不关心的消费者并不愿意这样做，这一点在多项研究中得到了证明。本文中，我们确定了一个利润最大化的公司在何种情况下最优地向消费者提供碳减排抵消的购买选项，同时可能在公司层面购买抵消。通过一个简化的分析模型，我们表明，企业同时在公司层面购买抵消并向消费者提供购买选项并不是最优的。相反，当抵消成本足够低时，公司会购买足够的抵消来补偿其所有的排放，从而导致整体产品价格提高；当抵消成本处于中等范围时，公司会以低于抵消成本的价格向消费者提供抵消，确保绿色消费者购买抵消；而当抵消成本较高时，抵消无法以任何方式得到最优使用。这些阈值依赖于绿色细分市场的规模和排放带来的不适（在消费者消费和公司层面），以及产品自身的碳足迹。向消费者提供购买抵消的选项使消费者能够自我选择其偏好的产品/价格组合，从而为公司提供了一种市场细分和价格歧视机制，增加利润并减少公司的碳足迹。

title: Political Signaling via Equity Ownership: Impacts on Supplier Financial Performance
abstract: ABSTRACT This study offers a new application of signaling theory to better understand the role of equity linkages and political influence on buyer–supplier relationships (BSRs). We examine the signaling effects of a politician's personal equity investment in a buyer firm on the financial performance of the supplier firms located in the politician's constituency, that is, “constituent suppliers.” Our results show that constituent suppliers' financial performance increases with the home politician ownership of their principal buyers, consistent with home politicians' incentives to benefit their constituencies and gain the support of local voters through promoting supplier–buyer relationships. Interestingly, such positive signaling effects on the financial performances of constituent suppliers vary with interdependence relationships between the home politician, investee buyer, and constituent supplier. The positive performance effect is stronger when investee buyers have greater political engagement, when politician owners hold more powerful congressional positions, and when the economic condition of the politician's constituency is poorer. In contrast, the positive performance effect is attenuated when buyers have higher economic dependence and switching costs vis‐à‐vis their suppliers. Our mechanism analyses reveal that the likelihood of increased sales as well as lowered operating and sales support costs partially mediate the relationship between supplier financial performance and home politician ownership in buyers, representing investee buyers' munificence. The investee buyers are also more likely to select firms located in their politician shareholders' constituencies as new suppliers, another mechanism of promoting business relationships with constituent firms. We further find that buyers with politician shareholders from their suppliers' constituencies receive more valuable government contract awards, and smaller firms exhibit significant performance gains. A series of endogeneity checks based on exogenous shocks and alternative measures highlight the robustness of our results. Our findings suggest that politicians' stock ownership in buyer firms signals secondary stakeholder influence and information sharing that shapes BSRs, promoting profitable business relationships for constituent suppliers.
title_cn: 通过股权所有权进行政治信号传递：对供应商财务绩效的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究提供了一个信号理论的新应用，以更好地理解股权联系和政治影响在买方与供应商关系（BSRs）中的作用。我们考察了一位政治家在买方公司中的个人股权投资对位于该政治家选区内的供应商公司的财务表现，即“选区供应商”的信号效应。我们的结果表明，选区供应商的财务表现随着其主要买方的本地政治家持股而增加，这与本地政治家有意通过促进供应商-买方关系来惠利其选区并获得地方选民的支持的激励相一致。有趣的是，这种对选区供应商财务表现的积极信号效应与本地政治家、投资买方及选区供应商之间的相互依存关系有关。当投资买方的政治参与度更高，政治家持股者在国会中担任更强大的职位，以及政治家所在选区的经济状况较差时，正向表现效应更强。相反，当买方对其供应商的经济依赖和转换成本较高时，这种正向表现效应则减弱。我们的机制分析表明，销售增加的可能性以及操作和销售支持成本降低在供应商财务表现与买方中的本地政治家持股之间的关系中部分起到了中介作用，反映了投资买方的慷慨。投资买方更可能选择位于其政治家股东选区内的公司作为新供应商，这是进一步促进与选区公司的商业关系的另一种机制。我们进一步发现，来自供应商选区的政治家股东的买方能够获得更有价值的政府合同奖励，且小型公司表现出显著的绩效提升。一系列基于外生冲击和替代测量的内生性检验突显了我们结果的稳健性。我们的发现表明，政治家在买方公司的股票持有信号着次级利益相关者的影响和信息共享，这塑造了买方与供应商的关系，促进了选区供应商的盈利商业关系。

title: SUVA: A Probabilistic Framework for Auditing LLMs with an Application to Social Preferences
abstract: Organizations are increasingly deploying large language models (LLMs) as customer service agents, decision aids, and semiautonomous agents. We develop State–Understanding–Value–Action (SUVA), a probabilistic auditing framework that turns an LLM’s response into structured evidence about how its decision was produced. SUVA treats the prompt as the state, codes the model’s reasoning to extract its understanding and stated values using a transparent codebook, and then estimates how these elements statistically predict the eventual action. We demonstrate SUVA on social preference games from behavioral economics and show how the same workflow can audit other delegated decisions by using domain-specific prompts and value codebooks. Across eight widely used LLMs, SUVA reveals systematic prosocial and reciprocity patterns and shows how posttraining alignment reshapes them. For practice and policy, SUVA supports a repeatable audit, align, and reaudit workflow for model selection, compliance, and ongoing monitoring of deployed LLM systems.
title_cn: SUVA：一种用于审计大型语言模型的概率框架及其在社会偏好中的应用
abstract_cn: 组织越来越多地将大型语言模型（LLM）作为客户服务代理、决策辅助工具和半自主代理进行部署。我们开发了状态–理解–价值–行动（SUVA）这一概率审计框架，将LLM的回应转化为关于其决策生成过程的结构化证据。SUVA将提示视为状态，使用透明的编码手册对模型的推理进行编码，以提取其理解和陈述的价值观，然后估计这些元素如何在统计上预测最终的行动。我们在行为经济学的社会偏好游戏中演示了SUVA，并展示了如何通过使用特定领域的提示和价值编码手册审计其他委托决策。通过对八种广泛使用的LLM的测试，SUVA揭示了系统的亲社会和互惠模式，并展示了后训练对齐如何重塑这些模式。对于实践和政策而言，SUVA支持一种可重复的审计、对齐和重新审计的工作流程，以便于模型选择、合规性以及对已部署LLM系统的持续监测。

title: Rethinking scientific progress in the social sciences: disruptive or cumulative?
abstract: This paper offers a critical reassessment of claims that scientific progress is best understood through the disruptiveness of new research. Park, Leahey and Funk in Nature (2023) have re-opened the debate by presenting results using the citation-based ‘CD index’ to assess the extent to which individual academic publications are consolidating or disruptive. Analyzing Park et al. as a focal point of these claims, we challenge the adequacy of this approach to capture both genuine scientific disruption and scientific progress, particularly within the social sciences. Drawing on philosophy and sociology of science, we show that scientific progress is predominantly cumulative rather than disruptive, and that papers’ high disruptiveness scores may often reflect phenomena such as pseudo-novelty or fragmentation rather than true epistemic breakthroughs. Our analysis demonstrates that in fields marked by intellectual pluralism and weak paradigmatic consensus, apparent disruptiveness may be an artifact of scholarly practices rather than an indication of substantive innovation. Hence, measures of disruptiveness appear ill-suited as a marker of scientific progress – as used in individual and collective research evaluations. Instead, we advance a constructive agenda by proposing that scientific progress is best conceptualized not as a dichotomy between cumulation and disruptiveness, but as a multi-dimensional process embracing elements of both disruption and consolidation within an overarching cumulative trajectory, whereby established knowledge is iteratively refined, rejected, or recombined in the light of new evidence or insight. By rethinking how scientific advancement is measured and cultivated, and suggesting ways to foster cumulative scientific progress, this article contributes to the theory and practice of research evaluation. • Citation metrics misrepresent progress in fragmented social science fields. • Disruption scores may often reflect novelty theatre, not real breakthroughs. • Social science progress is largely cumulative, seldom driven by disruption. • Scientific progress is multi-dimensional, covering both disruption and cumulation. • Research policy should reward cumulative knowledge-building, not only novelty.
title_cn: 重新思考社会科学中的科学进步：是颠覆性的还是累积性的？
abstract_cn: 本文对科学进步的主张进行了批判性重新评估，认为科学进步更应通过新研究的破坏性来理解。Park、Leahey和Funk在《自然》杂志（2023年）中重新开启了这一辩论，展示了使用基于引用的“CD指数”来评估个别学术出版物的巩固或破坏程度的结果。通过分析Park等人的研究作为这些主张的切入点，我们质疑这一方法是否足够能捕捉真正的科学破坏和科学进步，特别是在社会科学领域。借助科学哲学和社会学的理论，我们表明科学进步在很大程度上是累积性的，而非破坏性的，并且论文的高破坏性评分往往可能反映诸如伪新颖性或碎片化等现象，而非真正的知识突破。我们的分析表明，在知识多元化和范式共识薄弱的领域，明显的破坏性可能只是学术实践的产物，而不是实质性创新的标志。因此，破坏性指标似乎不适合用作科学进步的标志—如在个体和集体研究评估中使用的那样。相反，我们提出了一项建设性的议程，认为科学进步最佳的概念化方式不是将其视为累积与破坏之间的二元对立，而是作为一个多维过程，包含了破坏和巩固的元素，沿着一个整体的累积轨迹，通过新证据或新的见解对既有知识进行反复的完善、否定或重组。通过重新思考科学进步的衡量和培养方式，并提出促进累积科学进步的方法，本文为研究评估的理论和实践作出了贡献。 • 引用指标在分散的社会科学领域中误表述了进步。 • 破坏评分往往反映的是新颖表演，而非真正的突破。 • 社会科学的进步基本上是累积的，鲜有由破坏驱动。 • 科学进步是多维的，涵盖了破坏与累积。 • 研究政策应奖励累积知识的构建，而不仅仅是新颖性。

title: Hold or hurry? Speed of imitation of rivals' innovations in changing technological landscapes
abstract: Firms seeking fast-mover advantages often confront a critical challenge: not only whether to imitate rivals' innovations but also how quickly to do so. Fast imitation, however, entails risks, particularly in highly uncertain environments. By bridging information-based and rivalry-based theories of imitation with the technological change literature, we investigate how firms adjust their speed of imitation of rivals' technological innovations during periods of technological transition and technological stability. Using a database of 9060 mobile phones and 156 mobile-phone-related technological innovations introduced from 1992 to 2019, we find that a firm's speed of imitation is lower during periods of technological transition following a technological discontinuity compared to periods of technological stability where a dominant design is established. Furthermore, we find that the relationship between technological transitions and a firm's speed of imitation is shaped by three moderating factors: the firm's pioneering orientation, the relative market share position of the technology pioneer, and the visibility of the technological innovation. Our study contributes to the imitation and technological change literature by providing a nuanced understanding of the trade-offs associated with speed of imitation in the context of industry-wide technological shifts. • Technological transitions slow imitation as firms face greater uncertainty. • Pioneering firms pursue faster imitation even amid transitional periods. • The pioneer–focal firm market share gap affects imitation speed during transitions. • Technology visibility reduces uncertainty, accelerating imitation during transitions. • Imitation speed reflects rivalry or information motives under varying uncertainty.
title_cn: 保持还是急于追赶？在变化的技术环境中模仿竞争对手创新的速度
abstract_cn: 寻求快速追随优势的企业常常面临一个关键挑战：不仅要考虑是否模仿竞争对手的创新，还要考虑多快进行模仿。然而，快速模仿在高度不确定的环境中带来了风险。通过将基于信息的模仿理论与基于竞争的理论以及技术变革文献相结合，我们研究了企业在技术过渡和技术稳定期间如何调整其对竞争对手技术创新的模仿速度。利用从1992年至2019年间引入的9060款手机和156项与手机相关的技术创新的数据库，我们发现，在经历技术中断后的技术过渡期，企业的模仿速度低于在主导设计已确立的技术稳定期。此外，我们发现技术过渡与企业模仿速度之间的关系受到三个调节因素的影响：企业的先行者导向、技术先行者的相对市场份额位置以及技术创新的可见性。我们的研究通过提供关于行业范围内技术变革背景下模仿速度相关权衡的细致理解，丰富了模仿与技术变革的文献。 • 技术过渡减缓了模仿速度，因为企业面临更大的不确定性。 • 先行企业即使在过渡期也追求更快的模仿。 • 先行企业与重点企业之间的市场份额差距影响过渡期间的模仿速度。 • 技术的可见性降低了不确定性，从而加速了过渡期间的模仿。 • 模仿速度在不同的不确定性下反映了竞争或信息动机。

title: The Goldilocks Effect of Ethical Climate: How ‘Just Right’ Levels Drive Service Innovation
abstract: Abstract Eliciting employees’ service innovation is crucial for service firms to meet diverse customer needs, foster customer loyalty, and enhance competitiveness. Although ethical climate is often presumed to facilitate service innovation, its influence may not be uniformly positive. Excessive ethical pressure can suppress innovative behavior, suggesting a curvilinear relationship that warrants further investigation. Drawing on social learning theory and behavioral plasticity theory, this study proposed and tested a multilevel model examining the curvilinear effect of ethical climate on service innovation. Two independent studies were conducted using paired data from the Chinese hospitality industry (Study 1) and the Chinese high-tech service industry (Study 2). Results from both studies revealed that ethical climate had a curvilinear (inverted U-shaped) relationship with service innovation. Ethical climate was positively related to ethical efficacy, which in turn exhibited a curvilinear (inverted U-shaped) relationship with service innovation. Ethical efficacy mediated the curvilinear association between ethical climate and service innovation. Additionally, openness moderated the curvilinear relationship between ethical climate and service innovation. Although openness moderated the linear impact of ethical climate on ethical efficacy in Study 1, this moderating effect was not observed in Study 2. Theoretical and practical implications are discussed accordingly.
title_cn: 伦理气候的金发姑娘效应：怎样的“恰到好处”水平推动服务创新
abstract_cn: 摘要 吸引员工进行服务创新对服务企业而言至关重要，以满足多样化的客户需求、培养客户忠诚度并增强竞争力。尽管伦理气候通常被认为有助于服务创新，但其影响可能并非总是积极的。过度的伦理压力可能会抑制创新行为，这暗示了伦理气候与服务创新之间存在曲线关系，值得进一步研究。本研究依据社会学习理论和行为可塑性理论，提出并测试了一个多层次模型，考察伦理气候对服务创新的曲线效应。研究1和研究2分别采用来自中国酒店业和中国高科技服务行业的配对数据进行独立研究。两项研究的结果表明，伦理气候与服务创新之间存在曲线（倒U型）关系。伦理气候与伦理效能呈正相关，而伦理效能与服务创新之间也表现出曲线（倒U型）关系。伦理效能在伦理气候与服务创新之间的曲线关联中起到中介作用。此外，开放性在伦理气候与服务创新之间的曲线关系中起到调节作用。尽管在研究1中，开放性调节了伦理气候对伦理效能的线性影响，但在研究2中未观察到这种调节效应。相应地讨论了理论和实践的意义。

title: Bargaining and Network Effects in Two-Sided Platforms: Evidence from Online Healthcare
abstract: A generalizable modeling framework integrating bargaining and participant-specific network effects to guide growth strategies for platforms built on negotiated partnerships.
title_cn: 双边平台中的议价与网络效应：来自在线医疗的证据
abstract_cn: 一个可推广的建模框架，结合了议价和参与者特定的网络效应，为基于协商合作伙伴关系的平台提供增长策略指导。

title: Detachment and Attachment: A Dual-Pathway Model of Leader Succession Rituals
abstract: Leader succession, the transition of a leadership position from a former leader to a new one, is a common yet potentially disruptive organizational process. Leader succession inherently carries risks and uncertainties, while rituals are often employed to instill order and provide stability. Building on this theoretical link between leader succession and rituals, we explored different types of leader succession rituals and investigated their impacts on succession outcomes. In a qualitative study (Study 1), we identified six types of leader succession rituals: artifact adoption, endorsement act, welcome ceremony, artifact return, closure act, and farewell ceremony. A duality emerged in our data: The first three ritual types focus on building attachment to the new leader, while the other three emphasize detachment from the former leader. Based on the findings from Study 1, we conducted a quantitative field study (Study 2) in a technology firm undergoing large-scale leader succession following an acquisition, as well as an experiment (Study 3) with full-time working adults from diverse organizational contexts via an online platform. Across Studies 2 and 3, we tested the dual-pathway model. The results not only confirm that the effects are transmitted through new leader attachment and former leader detachment but also reveal differential effectiveness among ritual types, with endorsement act, welcome ceremony, and farewell ceremony proving more effective in influencing succession outcomes.
title_cn: 分离与附着：领导者继任仪式的双路径模型
abstract_cn: 领导继任，即从前任领导者向新领导者过渡的过程，是一种常见但潜在破坏性的组织过程。领导继任本质上带有风险和不确定性，而仪式常常被用来建立秩序和提供稳定。在这一领导继任与仪式之间的理论联系基础上，我们探讨了不同类型的领导继任仪式，并研究了它们对继任结果的影响。在一项定性研究（研究1）中，我们识别出了六种类型的领导继任仪式：物品采用、支持行为、欢迎仪式、物品归还、结束行为和告别仪式。我们的数据中出现了一种二元性：前三种仪式类型关注于增强与新领导者的联系，而后面三种则强调与前领导者的脱离。基于研究1的发现，我们在一家经历大规模领导继任的科技公司进行了定量现场研究（研究2），并通过在线平台对来自不同组织背景的全职工作成人进行了实验（研究3）。在研究2和研究3中，我们检验了双路径模型。结果不仅证实了影响是通过新领导者的依附和前领导者的分离传递的，还揭示了不同仪式类型之间的有效性差异，其中支持行为、欢迎仪式和告别仪式在影响继任结果方面更为有效。

title: The human side of self-managing organizations: Unlearning the learned helplessness
abstract: Why do so many attempts to distribute authority fail—even in organizations deeply committed to decentralization of authority? In this article, I argue that the answer lies in the cognitive, motivational, and emotional residues of learned helplessness shaped by prolonged exposure to hierarchical conditioning. From this perspective, I conceptualize the adoption of distributed authority as a process of unlearning the learned helplessness . Drawing on ethnographic action research into the adoption of Holacracy as a specific form of a self-managing organization, my study demonstrates how learned helplessness inhibits individuals from acknowledging, internalizing, and enacting the authority embedded in distributed authority frameworks—and how this cycle can be broken through deliberate practices. I identify three human-centered boundary conditions— clarity of role boundaries and responsibilities, purpose-driven proactive behavior , and complex social interaction —that interrupt habitual patterns of deference and managerial intervention. These conditions enable the overarching process of unlearning the learned helplessness, allowing self-organization to emerge. Theoretically, the study reveals why distributed authority so often collapses in practice and outlines the human-centered boundary conditions required for its long-term viability. Practically, it highlights the need to address the psychological effects of learned helplessness—not just redesign formal structures—to implement and sustain distributed authority.
title_cn: 自我管理组织的人性面：打破习得性无助
abstract_cn: 为什么许多分权尝试失败，尽管组织对权力的分散有着深入的承诺？在本文中，我认为答案在于长期暴露于等级条件下所形成的认知、动机和情感残留的习得性无助。从这个角度来看，我将分布式权力的采用概念化为一个消除习得性无助的过程。我的研究基于对Holacracy这一自我管理组织特定形式采用的民族志行动研究，展示了习得性无助如何阻碍个体承认、内化和执行嵌入分布式权力框架中的权力，以及如何通过有意的实践打破这一循环。我确定了三个以人为本的边界条件——角色界限和责任的明确性、以目标驱动的主动行为和复杂的社会互动——这些条件可以打断习惯性屈从和管理干预的模式。这些条件使消除习得性无助的整体过程得以进行，从而让自我组织得以出现。从理论上，研究揭示了为什么分权在实践中如此频繁地崩溃，并概述了其长期可行性所需的以人为本的边界条件。从实践层面来看，研究强调了需要应对习得性无助的心理影响，而不仅仅是重新设计正式结构，以实施和维持分布式权力。

title: Correction to ‘The Devil is in the Details: Zooming out in Leadership Research’
abstract: This Thematic Collection contained errors relating to the references.During the process of finalizing the reference list, AI support (i.e., Microsoft Copilot) was used, which contributed to the errors.The first author takes full responsibility for these errors.The corrections below do not affect the substance of the article.
title_cn: 对《细节决定成败：领导力研究中的宏观视角》一文的更正
abstract_cn: 本专题集包含与参考文献相关的错误。在最终确定参考文献列表的过程中，使用了人工智能支持（即 Microsoft Copilot），这导致了错误的出现。第一作者对此错误承担全部责任。以下更正不影响文章的实质内容。

title: Trust and fairness in platform–supplier contracts: Navigating supplier concerns in the sharing economy
abstract: Abstract Trust and fairness are critical to the sustainable development of the sharing economy, particularly in platform–supplier relationships, where numerous individual suppliers offer access to their durable assets without transferring ownership. Motivated by the real‐world phenomenon of personalized wages and informed through direct interactions with relevant constituents, this study examines a contracting problem between a share‐based platform and its supplier, where the platform designs contracts that differ in information‐sharing and revenue‐sharing structures. The supplier evaluates these contracts based on their expected utility, incorporating trust in the information shared and fairness concerns over revenue sharing. In addition to trust and fairness, we incorporate deception cost for both parties: for the platform, they operationalize trustworthiness as a reluctance to misrepresent information, while for the supplier, they constrain opportunism such as underreporting revenue. Using a game‐theoretical model, we derive the optimal contracting mechanism under different conditions. Our results reveal that trustworthiness, rather than trust alone, shapes optimal contracting outcomes. Under platform‐managed contracts, the revenue‐sharing ratio increases with either trust or fairness—but not both simultaneously. For supplier‐managed contracts, dishonesty leads to a vicious cycle between commission fees and underreporting and the supplier who seeks to be treated fairly will cheat more, resembling fairness‐driven supplier opportunism. Our findings offer actionable insights for platforms in designing contracts that consider suppliers' trust and fairness, ensure compliance, and mitigate opportunism, contributing to sustainable and ethical supplier relationships.
title_cn: 平台与供应商合同中的信任与公平：应对共享经济中的供应商担忧
abstract_cn: 摘要 信任与公平是共享经济可持续发展的关键，特别是在平台与供应商的关系中，众多个体供应商提供对其耐用资产的使用权而不转让所有权。受个性化工资的现实现象启发，并通过与相关利益相关者的直接互动获得信息，本研究考察了共享平台与其供应商之间的合同问题，平台设计的信息共享和收益共享结构不同的合同。供应商根据其预期效用评估这些合同，考虑到对共享信息的信任和对收益分享的公平关注。除了信任与公平，我们还为双方引入了欺骗成本：对平台而言，信任度表现为不愿意歪曲信息，而对供应商而言，则限制了如低报收入等机会主义行为。通过博弈理论模型，我们在不同条件下推导出最优合同机制。我们的结果显示，信任度而非仅仅信任塑造了最优合同结果。在平台管理的合同下，收益分享比例随着信任或公平的增加而增加，但不能同时增加。对于供应商管理的合同，不诚实导致佣金费用与低报之间的恶性循环，寻求公平对待的供应商更易于作弊，呈现出以公平为驱动的供应商机会主义。我们的研究结果为平台在设计考虑供应商信任与公平的合同时提供了可操作的见解，确保合规并减轻机会主义，进而促进可持续和伦理的供应商关系。

title: Are language models intelligent enough for entrepreneurial work? A language-centered perspective
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are poised to fundamentally reshape entrepreneurial work, but it remains unclear whether this technology can support judgment-intensive entrepreneurial tasks. Prevailing skepticism holds that LLMs are inherently unreliable for such deep augmentation because, despite their language competence, they do not think. In contrast, we draw on Ludwig Wittgenstein and Alan Turing to advance a language-centered perspective on entrepreneurial work. Wittgenstein demystifies thought as linguistic activity and treats reasoning and understanding as linguistic abilities exercised in thinking. Extending this stance to the domain of machine intelligence, Turing grounds claims about intelligence in testable performances of language use. Together, they enable us to (1) conceptualize LLMs as an epistemic technology whose linguistic competence may suffice for the deep augmentation of entrepreneurship and (2) reorient research from skepticism toward fine-grained Turing tests of entrepreneurial work. We illustrate and support the language-centered perspective through two studies on crafting effective entrepreneurial narratives, a judgment-intensive task. Initially, we document that the LLM competently blends expert rhetorical strategies to create and refine narratives that effectively align with stakeholder needs. We then experimentally demonstrate that, when coupled with stakeholder-guided iterations, LLMs produce measurable improvements in narratives tailored to distinct stakeholder priorities. More broadly, our rethinking of entrepreneurial work through language-centered lenses helps theoretically support bold predictions about what entrepreneurs can accomplish with a nonhuman intelligence that has “only” mastered human language. • Challenges the philosophical underpinnings of skepticism about LLMs in entrepreneurial judgment • Positions LLMs as epistemic technologies for deep augmentation in entrepreneurship • Proposes a research program of fine-grained, task-specific Turing tests for entrepreneurial work • Demonstrates LLMs can craft and iteratively refine effective entrepreneurial narratives across diverse stakeholder priorities • Documents that LLMs help remove a key entry barrier to entrepreneurship
title_cn: 语言模型是否足够智能以从事创业工作？一种以语言为中心的视角
abstract_cn:
大型语言模型（LLMs）有潜力从根本上重塑创业工作，但目前尚不清楚这一技术是否能够支持判断密集型的创业任务。普遍存在的怀疑论认为，尽管LLMs在语言能力方面表现出色，但由于它们并不具备思考能力，因此在深度增强方面 inherently 不可靠。相反，我们借鉴路德维希·维特根斯坦和艾伦·图灵的理论，提出了一种以语言为中心的创业工作视角。维特根斯坦将思维阐释为语言活动，并将推理和理解视为在思考中运用的语言能力。将这种立场扩展到机器智能领域，图灵通过可测试的语言使用表现来定义智能的相关主张。二者共同使我们能够（1）将LLMs概念化为一种认识论技术，其语言能力足以实现对创业的深度增强，以及（2）将研究的方向从怀疑转向对创业工作的细致化图灵测试。我们通过两项关于有效创业叙事构建的研究，阐明并支持这种以语言为中心的视角，这是一项判断密集型的任务。最初，我们记录到LLM能够熟练地融合专业的修辞策略，以创建和完善与利益相关者需求有效对接的叙事。随后，我们通过实验性的方法证明，当与利益相关者指导下的迭代结合时，LLMs在针对不同利益相关者优先事项量身定制叙事方面能够产生可测量的改进。更广泛地说，通过以语言为中心的视角重新思考创业工作，有助于理论上支持大胆的预测，即创业者能够利用一种“仅仅”掌握人类语言的非人类智能来实现的成就。

• 挑战了对LLMs在创业判断中的怀疑论的哲学基础
• 将LLMs定位为用于深度增强创业的认识论技术
• 提出了针对创业工作的细致化、任务特定的图灵测试研究计划
• 证明LLMs能够跨越多种利益相关者优先事项，构建和迭代完善有效的创业叙事
• 记录LLMs在消除创业的关键入门障碍方面的作用

title: Ivory tower or transdisciplinarity? Measuring the preferences of scientists at public research institutes regarding academic engagement
abstract: Increasingly complex societal challenges require more transdisciplinary collaboration between researchers and practitioners. Previous studies measured and categorized motivations driving researchers to choose projects involving practitioners and provided empirical evidence for the existence of the ‘puzzle-ribbon‑gold’ typology. However, neither well-known decision factors such as research funding and societal impact nor preferences on the terms of collaboration have yet been integrated in any researcher typology. Here, we use a discrete choice experiment to elicit the preferences of 862 researchers employed at German public research institutes (PRIs) over research project alternatives that vary in six attributes (funding volume, academic success, societal impact, knowledge transfer, knowledge co-production, and practitioner type), of which most had three levels (low, medium, high). We determine that scientists in our sample, on average, attach positive value to engaging with practitioners. However, their preferences are not homogeneous. We find that PRI researchers can be categorized in three latent classes: ‘changemakers’, who prioritise creating societal impact via public-sector knowledge co-production; ‘fundraisers’, who focus on acquiring financial resources by transferring knowledge to the private sector; and ‘scholars’, who concentrate on academic success and avoid practitioners. Thus, we derive inductively a researcher typology that accounts for so far neglected but demonstrably decision-relevant aspects, that is impact, funding, collaboration form, and partner type. Interestingly, various observable individual and contextual variables do not offer much additional information in terms of explaining preference heterogeneity. We conclude by discussing policy instruments to foster academic engagement as well as future research directions. • Many scientists inherently value to collaborate with practitioners. • A choice experiment and latent class analysis measure researcher preferences and identify a researcher typology. • Researchers may be categorized into impact-seeking changemakers, knowledge-transferring fundraisers, and reclusive scholars. • Organisational context explains small parts of researcher preference heterogeneity, but most of it is unobserved.
title_cn: 象牙塔还是跨学科性？测量公共研究机构科学家在学术参与方面的偏好
abstract_cn: 日益复杂的社会挑战需要研究人员与实践者之间更为跨学科的合作。之前的研究测量并分类了驱动研究人员选择与实践者合作项目的动机，并为“拼图-带子-金子”类型的存在提供了实证证据。然而，诸如研究资金和社会影响等知名决策因素，以及对合作条款的偏好，尚未被纳入任何研究人员类型中。在此，我们使用离散选择实验来引导882名在德国公共研究机构（PRI）工作的研究人员对六个属性（资金规模、学术成功、社会影响、知识转移、知识共同生产和实践者类型）不同的研究项目选择偏好，其中大多数属性具有三个水平（低、中、高）。我们确定，在我们的样本中，科学家平均上对与实践者合作赋予了积极的价值。然而，他们的偏好并不均匀。我们发现PRI研究人员可以被分类为三种潜在类别：优先通过公共部门知识共同生产创造社会影响的“变革者”；专注于通过将知识转移到私营部门来获取资金的“筹款者”；以及专注于学术成功并避免与实践者互动的“学者”。因此，我们归纳出一种研究人员类型，考虑了迄今尚未被重视但明显与决策相关的方面，即影响、资金、合作形式和合作伙伴类型。有趣的是，各种可观察的个体和情境变量在解释偏好异质性方面并没有提供太多额外信息。我们最后讨论了促进学术参与的政策工具以及未来的研究方向。 • 许多科学家本质上重视与实践者的合作。 • 选择实验和潜在类别分析测量研究人员的偏好并识别研究人员类型。 • 研究人员可被分类为寻求影响的变革者、知识转移的筹款者和隐秘的学者。 • 组织环境仅能解释研究人员偏好异质性的小部分，但大部分是未被观察到的。

title: Damned If You Do, Damned If You Don’t: How Counterfactuals Shape Early-Stage Investment Decision-Making
abstract: This study explores the role of investors’ counterfactual thinking regarding errors of commission and omission and how these relate to willingness to invest in new ventures. Drawing from behavioral economics and psychology, we focus on the salience of prospective counterfactuals at the screening stage. Our experimental findings demonstrate that increasing the salience of commission-related counterfactuals, particularly social counterfactuals, significantly reduces investors’ willingness to invest. This effect underscores the influence of anticipated regret, social comparison, and emotional responses in shaping investment behavior. By contrast, omission-related counterfactuals show no measurable impact, suggesting a prevailing not-investing norm and limited effect of potential fear of missing out among new-venture investors. Our results provide a deeper understanding of how investors navigate the tension between avoiding missed opportunities and minimizing losses, emphasizing the salience of situational triggers as opposed to stable traits or market-wide factors. These insights highlight the importance of counterfactual thinking as a theoretical lens for studying decision-making in the high-risk, high-reward context of new-venture investing.
title_cn: 做也不对，不做也不对：反事实如何影响早期投资决策
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了投资者对主动错误和遗漏错误的反事实思维的作用，以及这种思维如何与投资新项目的意愿相关。我们借鉴了行为经济学和心理学，重点关注筛选阶段未来反事实的显著性。我们的实验发现，增强与主动错误相关的反事实的显著性，特别是社会反事实，显著降低了投资者的投资意愿。该效应强调了预期后悔、社会比较和情感反应在塑造投资行为中的影响。相比之下，遗漏相关的反事实没有显示出可衡量的影响，表明在新项目投资者中普遍存在一种不投资的规范，以及对错失良机的潜在恐惧的有限影响。我们的结果提供了更深入的理解，揭示了投资者如何在避免错失机会与最小化损失之间进行权衡，强调了情境触发因素的显著性，而非稳定特征或市场整体因素。这些洞察突出反事实思维作为研究高风险、高回报投资决策的重要理论视角的重要性。

title: Evaluating the Efficacy of Providers’ Compensation Contracts in Improving Participant Retention for Clinical Studies
abstract: In this work, we aim to analyze a clinical study sponsor’s decisions regarding monetary payments to participants and compensation for providers (investigators and coordinators) for their efforts to improve participant retention in the study. To this end, we first consider a centralized model where the sponsor decides the monetary payments to participants and the providers’ efforts. We then identify the optimal contracts for the providers under the two decentralized team structures: the sponsor-investigator (SI) model and the outsourcing (OM) model. We further analyze three widely adopted compensation contracts for the providers: fixed (FC), linear (LC), and conditional linear (CLC) given a decentralized structure. Our theoretical analysis shows that the expected retention cost with optimal contracts under decentralized structures is at most 40% higher than that under the centralized model. However, in practical instances, this cost increase is, at the most, 8% on average. A comparison of the FC, LC, and CLC contracts reveals that it is sufficient for the sponsor to choose between the FC and the LC contracts under the SI model, whereas under the OM model, there exist cases where the sponsor is better off adopting the CLC contract. Furthermore, the sponsor’s expected retention cost when choosing the best of the three contracts is at most 6% (10%) higher on average relative to that for the optimal compensation contract under the SI (OM) model. Given a decentralized structure, we also identify cases where the optimal contract offers significant benefit over the three contracts observed in practice. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02973 .
topics: Health Systems, Economic Evaluations, Quality of Life
title_cn: 评估提供者薪酬合同在提高临床研究参与者留存率方面的有效性
abstract_cn: 在本研究中，我们旨在分析临床研究赞助方关于参与者的货币支付和对提供者（研究者和协调员）在提高参与者留存率方面努力的补偿决策。为此，我们首先考虑一个集中式模型，在该模型中，赞助方决定对参与者的货币支付和提供者的努力。接着，我们确定在两种分散团队结构下提供者的最佳合同：赞助-研究者（SI）模型和外包（OM）模型。我们进一步分析了在分散结构下三种广泛采用的提供者补偿合同：固定合同（FC）、线性合同（LC）和条件线性合同（CLC）。我们的理论分析表明，在分散结构下，采用最佳合同的预期留存成本最多比集中模型高出40%。然而，在实际情况下，这一成本增加平均最多也只有8%。对FC、LC和CLC合同的比较显示，在SI模型下，赞助方需要在FC和LC合同之间进行选择，而在OM模型下，存在赞助方采用CLC合同可能更有利的情况。此外，选择三种合同中最佳合同时，赞助方的预期留存成本相较于SI（OM）模型下的最佳补偿合同平均最多高出6%（10%）。在分散结构下，我们还确定了最优合同在实践中相较于三种观察到的合同带来显著益处的情况。本文已被运筹管理领域的Elena Katok接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02973 获取。

title: Fair Fares for Vehicle Sharing Systems
abstract: Vehicle sharing systems—such as bike, scooter, and car sharing—play a key role in urban transportation, yet algorithmic pricing can lead to inequalities across locations. This paper studies how platforms can incorporate fairness into pricing decisions and the resulting outcomes. We propose two notions of fairness: price fairness, which limits price differences across locations, and access fairness, which equalizes the proportion of demand at each location that has access to the system, determined by affordability and availability. Using a stylized two-location model, the paper analyzes how fairness constraints affect platform revenue, consumer surplus, and social welfare. Although price fairness can sometimes increase consumer surplus at both locations, access fairness always reduces consumer surplus at both locations. A convex relaxation approach is developed for larger networks, and a case study using New York City data illustrates the tradeoffs between fairness and efficiency in practice.
title_cn: 车辆共享系统的公正费用
abstract_cn: 共享车辆系统——如自行车、滑板车和汽车共享——在城市交通中发挥着关键作用，但算法定价可能导致不同区域之间的不平等。本文研究了平台如何在定价决策中融入公平性及其产生的结果。我们提出两种公平性概念：价格公平性，旨在限制不同区域之间的价格差异；以及准入公平性，旨在平衡每个区域能够使用系统的需求比例，该比例由可负担性和可用性决定。通过一个简化的双区域模型，本文分析了公平性约束对平台收入、消费者剩余和社会福利的影响。尽管价格公平性有时可以在两个区域增加消费者剩余，但准入公平性总是会减少两个区域的消费者剩余。针对更大网络提出了一种凸松弛方法，并通过使用纽约市数据的案例研究展示了在实际操作中公平性与效率之间的权衡。

title: Raise the Expectation Bar and Lower the Tolerance? Effects of Being Listed in a Restaurant Guide on Customers’ Online Rating Behavior
abstract: Creating curated guides or lists (e.g., Top 100 Places to Eat) is a common operational strategy employed by platforms as part of their reputation systems to assist customers in decision-making. Prior research has largely highlighted the effects of such guides on customer word-of-mouth (WOM) volume and valence. Moving beyond these aggregate WOM metrics, we extend this stream to examine how being listed in a guide (BLG) influences customers’ likelihood of providing ratings and rating composition across valence types (compliments, complaints, and neutral ratings), drawing on the zone of tolerance framework. Using large-scale empirical data, we find that BLG increases customers’ likelihood of rating but reduces overall valence, with a higher proportion of complaints and neutral ratings and a lower proportion of compliments. The effect is particularly pronounced among merchants with additional high-quality signals (e.g., higher prices, greater popularity, and superior prior ratings). Evidence from both observational data and a randomized experiment further reveals the underlying mechanisms, showing that BLG increases customer involvement and raises desired expectations more dramatically than adequate ones. These triangulated findings contribute to the literature by providing in-depth insights into how and why BLG affects customer rating behaviors and thus, merchants’ WOM. Our findings underscore the importance of strategic operations management for platforms when designing and managing their reputation systems, with significant implications for technology management.
title_cn: 提高期望标准与降低容忍度？被列入餐厅指南对顾客在线评价行为的影响
abstract_cn: 创建策划指南或列表（例如，最佳100家餐厅）是平台作为其声誉系统的一种常见运营策略，用以帮助客户做出决策。以往的研究主要强调了这些指南对客户口碑（WOM）数量和倾向的影响。超越这些总体的口碑指标，我们扩展了这一研究方向，探讨了被列入指南（BLG）如何影响客户提供评分的可能性及其评分构成在不同倾向类型（赞美、抱怨和中性评分）上的变化，借鉴了容忍区框架。通过大规模的实证数据，我们发现BLG增加了客户评分的可能性，但降低了总体倾向，客观上呈现出更高比例的抱怨和中性评分以及更低比例的赞美。此效应在具有额外高质量信号的商家（例如，更高的价格、更大的受欢迎程度和更优的历史评分）中尤为明显。来自观察数据和随机实验的证据进一步揭示了其内部机制，显示BLG在提高客户参与度和设定期望方面比适度的期望更为显著。这些三角测量的发现为文献提供了深入的见解，帮助理解BLG如何以及为何影响客户评分行为，从而影响商家的口碑。我们的发现强调了平台在设计和管理其声誉系统时战略运营管理的重要性，对技术管理具有重要的启示意义。

title: Effects of Peer Voting and Followers on User Contribution to Online Knowledge Sharing Platforms: Evidence From a Field Experiment
abstract: Online knowledge-sharing platforms such as Quora and Zhihu (a leading knowledge-sharing platform in China) often use both peer voting and followers to encourage user knowledge contributions. However, these platforms diverge in whether they highlight followers, upvotes, or both as reputation symbols. To better understand the consequences of these platform design choices, we conduct a field experiment with 1,696 focal users on Zhihu where we exogenously increase upvotes or/and followers for treated users over a 53-day intervention period. We monitor focal users’ activities for 303 days, covering both pre- and post-intervention periods. We further use a large language model to gauge the quality of 12,998 answers contributed by these users during this time. We find that increasing upvotes significantly boosts users’ answer contributions (in volume, total length, and quality), while increasing followers has mostly no overall effect on contributions. Additionally, increasing upvotes can encourage contribution for up to 100 days, particularly among lower-reputation (i.e., with fewer upvotes or followers), less active, female users, and those answering soft topic questions. In contrast, increasing followers only reduces contribution volume (not length or quality) for higher-reputation, more active, and male users. Moreover, while peer voting primarily only affects answer contributions, the follower treatment leads to negative spillovers, reducing users’ upvoting on fellow users’ answers, following fellow users, or purchasing Zhihu Lives hosted by fellow users. Our research suggests the possibility that users on knowledge-sharing platforms may associate peer voting with contributions, treating it as peer recognition that offers intrinsic motivation. In contrast, users may interpret additional followers as a symbol of status enhancement, which could, in some cases, dampen their motivation to contribute. Overall, our study suggests that platforms aiming to foster active, high-quality contributions should highlight upvotes rather than followers as a reputation symbol. To our knowledge, this study is among the first field experiments to identify and compare the causal effects of peer voting and followers on user contribution to knowledge-sharing platforms.
title_cn: 同伴投票和关注者对用户在在线知识共享平台贡献的影响：来自一项实地实验的证据
abstract_cn: 在线知识共享平台如Quora和知乎（中国领先的知识共享平台）通常使用同伴投票和关注者来鼓励用户的知识贡献。然而，这些平台在强调关注者、点赞或两者作为声誉象征方面存在分歧。为了更好地理解这些平台设计选择的后果，我们在知乎进行了一项田野实验，对1,696名焦点用户进行了干预，在53天的干预期间，外部增加了处理用户的点赞和/或关注者。我们监测了焦点用户的活动，持续了303天，涵盖了干预前后两个时期。我们进一步使用大型语言模型来评估在此期间这些用户贡献的12,998个答案的质量。我们发现，增加点赞显著提高了用户的答案贡献（在数量、总长度和质量上），而增加关注者对贡献几乎没有整体影响。此外，增加点赞可以在长达100天内激励贡献，特别是对于声誉较低（即，自身点赞或关注者较少）、活跃程度较低的女性用户以及回答软性话题的问题的用户。相较之下，增加关注者反而减少了较高声誉、较为活跃的男性用户的贡献量（但不影响长度或质量）。此外，尽管同伴投票主要只影响答案贡献，但关注者的处理会导致负面溢出效应，减少用户对其他用户答案的点赞、关注其他用户或购买由其他用户主持的知乎Live的行为。我们的研究表明，知识共享平台上的用户可能将同伴投票与贡献联系在一起，将其视为提供内在动机的同行认可。相对而言，用户可能将额外的关注者视为地位提升的象征，这在某些情况下可能会抑制他们的贡献动机。总体而言，我们的研究表明，旨在促进活跃、高质量贡献的平台应强调点赞而不是关注者作为声誉象征。根据我们所知，这项研究是首次田野实验，识别并比较了同伴投票和关注者对用户在知识共享平台上的贡献的因果影响。

title: AI Governance and the Decentralization of Technology Production: An Investigation of AI-Based IPA Bots
abstract: We revisit the centralization–decentralization tension in the context of decentralized technology production at the AI frontier, focusing on Intelligent Process Automation (IPA) bots as a salient manifestation of the democratization of AI. IPA bots combine robotic process automation with AI technologies and process mining based on deep, mindful domain expertise. We collaborate with a Fortune 200 multinational to study how IPA projects yield successful governance outcomes of utilization and repeatability. Our research reveals that traditional centralized mandates, when paired with the unique learning and adaptive capabilities of AI systems, can actively suppress utilization and stifle organizational reuse of the bots. Conversely, democratization is no panacea. While empowerment of business users through decentralization usually leads to successful outcomes for the deployed bots, when certain boundary conditions are crossed, these same decentralized efforts can produce fragmentation in the form of one-off solutions. Our research challenges core tenets of the IT governance canon, demonstrating that centralization–decentralization logic at the AI frontier must expand to account for the evolution of governance, process, and technological characteristics to realize effective AI governance.
title_cn: 人工智能治理与技术生产的去中心化：基于人工智能的智能过程自动化（IPA）机器人研究
abstract_cn: 我们重新审视了在人工智能前沿的去中心化技术生产背景下，中心化与去中心化之间的张力，特别关注智能流程自动化（IPA）机器人作为人工智能民主化的显著表现。IPA机器人结合了机器人流程自动化、人工智能技术和基于深厚、细致的领域专业知识的流程挖掘。我们与一家《财富》200强跨国公司合作，研究IPA项目如何实现成功的利用和重复性治理结果。我们的研究表明，当传统的中心化管理与人工智能系统独特的学习和适应能力相结合时，可能会积极抑制利用率，并阻碍组织对机器人技术的重复使用。相反，民主化也不是万能的。虽然通过去中心化赋权给业务用户通常会导致部署的机器人取得成功，但当某些边界条件被突破时，这些同样的去中心化努力可能会导致碎片化，表现为一次性解决方案。我们的研究挑战了IT治理经典的核心原则，表明在人工智能前沿的中心化与去中心化逻辑必须扩展，以考虑治理、流程和技术特征的演变，从而实现有效的人工智能治理。

title: They Saw It Coming: Executive Experience and Foresight in Competitor Identification
abstract: How can a firm increase its chances of spotting an up-and-coming competitor? I examine how the experience of top management teams (TMTs) relates to the foresight needed to spot “rising stars”—that is, competitors that are currently ignored by other firms in a market but later grow to become prominent threats. My theory hinges on the primacy of relational versus categorical reasoning in mental models of competition. Firm mental models conceptualize competition through a relational lens, such that deep experience within the focal firm encourages fixation on familiar, proximate rivals while varied experience across firms redirects attention to the competitive periphery. In contrast, industry mental models rely on categorical reasoning, such that varied experience across industries yields a shallow understanding of divergent—and often irrelevant—categorical logics while deep experience in the focal industry builds the expertise to see which competitors will break out in the future. I further show that deep industry experience enables the TMT to draw more useful insights from varied firm experience, while a combination of varied firm and industry experience creates harmful information overload. I find support for my theory using a hand-collected dataset on competitor identification and TMTs in the enterprise software industry.
title_cn: 他们预见了这一点：高管经验与竞争者识别中的前瞻性
abstract_cn: 企业如何增加识别新兴竞争对手的机会？我考察了高管团队（TMTs）的经验与识别“新星”——即目前被市场上其他公司忽视但随后成长为显著威胁的竞争对手——所需的前瞻性之间的关系。我的理论依赖于竞争认知中关系推理与类别推理的优先性。企业的心理模型通过关系视角来概念化竞争，这种深厚的企业内部经验促使高管们固守于熟悉且接近的竞争对手，而跨公司多样化的经验则将注意力转向竞争的边缘。相反，行业心理模型则依赖于类别推理，因此，跨行业的多样化经验导致了对不同类别的浅显理解——这些类别往往是无关的——而在特定行业的深厚经验则培养了识别未来将崭露头角的竞争对手所需的专业知识。我进一步表明，深厚的行业经验使得高管团队能够从多样的企业经验中获得更有价值的见解，而多样化的企业经验与行业经验的结合则会导致有害的信息过载。我通过手工收集的关于竞争对手识别和企业软件行业高管团队的数据集，找到了对我理论的支持。

title: Micro‐Processes of Constrained Innovation: A Field Study of Constraint‐Handling Practices in Base of the Pyramid Innovation Projects
abstract: Abstract This study addresses the problem of handling constraints in innovative projects. Using a qualitative research design on base of the pyramid (BOP) innovation projects, we examine how creativity emerges from constraints. By investigating responses to experienced constraints from 60 BOP innovation projects, we identify specific micro‐processes used to deal with constraints, which we introduce as constraint‐handling practices. Moreover, we investigate the interplay between these constraint‐handling practices and the nature of the constraints in the resultant sequence of such micro‐processes, distinguishing between goal and task constraints. Drawing from theory on effectuation and causation, we explain how different constraint‐handling practices are implemented in innovation projects in response to these constraints. We demonstrate that instead of relying on an either/or mode of effectuation versus causation, actors in constrained BOP innovation projects exhibit repeated cycles of both effectuation‐ and causation‐based constraint‐handling practices.
title_cn: 受限创新的微观过程：对金字塔底层创新项目中的约束处理实践的实地研究
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究探讨了创新项目中处理约束的问题。我们基于金字塔底层（BOP）创新项目的定性研究设计，考察了创造力如何在约束中产生。通过对60个BOP创新项目中所经历约束的响应进行研究，我们识别出用于应对约束的特定微观过程，称之为约束处理实践。此外，我们还调查了这些约束处理实践与约束性质之间的相互作用，分析了这些微观过程的后续序列，并区分目标约束和任务约束。借鉴效应化与因果化理论，我们解释了在应对这些约束时，创新项目中不同的约束处理实践是如何被实施的。研究表明，在受到约束的BOP创新项目中，参与者并不是单纯依赖效应化或因果化的单一模式，而是展示出基于效应化和因果化的约束处理实践的反复循环。

title: Banking system stability: a global analysis of cybercrime laws
abstract: Abstract We examine the role of cybercrime legislation globally in shaping the stability of the banking system. We compile a novel dataset covering the enactment of cybercrime legislation in 132 developed and developing countries to test this research question empirically. We find that the enactment of cybercrime laws enhances the stability of the banking sector. This key finding holds across a comprehensive suite of robustness tests, including alternative measures of bank stability and model specifications. We document significant cross-sectional heterogeneity, with the effect being more pronounced in countries with heavier penalties for illegal cyber activities and legal frameworks that hold banks accountable for their cybersecurity practices. Moreover, the positive impact is stronger in jurisdictions with greater international legal cooperation and effective enforcement mechanisms. We further investigate two channels (i.e., funding liquidity and operational risk) through which cybercrime laws may influence bank stability. Our results indicate that these laws can significantly bolster bank stability by enhancing funding liquidity and mitigating operational risk. Overall, our study provides evidence of the crucial role of cybercrime legislation in fostering a secure and resilient banking environment. It offers new insights into how these laws contribute to bank stability on both individual and systemic levels.
title_cn: 银行系统稳定性：全球网络犯罪法律的分析
abstract_cn: 摘要 我们研究了全球网络犯罪立法在塑造银行系统稳定性方面的作用。我们编制了一个新颖的数据集，涵盖132个发达国家和发展中国家的网络犯罪立法实施情况，以实证检验这一研究问题。我们发现，网络犯罪法律的实施增强了银行部门的稳定性。这个关键发现通过一系列全面的稳健性测试得到了验证，包括银行稳定性的替代测量和模型规格。我们记录了显著的横向异质性，在对非法网络活动处以更重罚款的国家以及对银行的网络安全实践负责的法律框架中，这一效应更加明显。此外，在国际法律合作更为密切和有效执法机制更强的司法管辖区，这一积极影响更为显著。我们进一步探讨了网络犯罪法律可能影响银行稳定性的两个渠道（即资金流动性和操作风险）。我们的结果表明，这些法律可以通过增强资金流动性和减轻操作风险显著提升银行的稳定性。总体而言，我们的研究提供了网络犯罪立法在促进安全和韧性银行环境方面的关键作用的证据，并为这些法律如何在个体和系统层面上促进银行稳定提供了新的见解。

title: Transaction Sequencing and House Price Pressures
abstract: We use a unique data set of individual housing transaction histories from Norway and a novel shift-share design to show that temporary changes in the transaction sequencing decisions of moving homeowners—whether to buy first and then sell or vice versa—cause temporary local increases in house prices and seller liquidity. Our findings are consistent with a simple theory of how transaction sequencing decisions impact house prices in a frictional housing market. We also provide the first causal estimate of the elasticity of house prices to market tightness, which is around 0.1. Overall, our findings highlight the importance of trading frictions and supply-demand imbalances for housing market dynamics. This paper was accepted by Bo Becker, finance. Funding: This work was supported by Norges Forskningsråd [Grant 274678: Frictions in the Housing Market].
