Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.08149 .
title_cn: 交易排序与房价压力
abstract_cn: 我们使用了一组来自挪威的独特个体住房交易历史数据，并采用新颖的转移-份额设计，展示了临时性变动的搬家业主交易顺序决策——是先购买再出售，还是反之——造成了房价和卖方流动性的暂时性地方性上升。我们的发现与一种简单理论相一致，该理论阐述了交易顺序决策如何影响摩擦性住房市场中的房价。我们还提供了房价对市场紧张程度弹性的首个因果估计，约为0.1。总体而言，我们的研究结果突显了交易摩擦和供需失衡对住房市场动态的重要性。本文由Bo Becker接受，财经领域。资助信息：本研究得到了挪威研究委员会的支持 [资助编号274678：住房市场的摩擦]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.08149获取。

title: Time Variation in Extrapolation and Anomalies
abstract: We find that the degree of extrapolative weighting in investors’ beliefs (DOX) has strong predictive power for a broad set of overreaction-related anomalies in the stock market. The average return spread of these anomalies is about [Formula: see text] per month following high DOX periods and [Formula: see text] per month following low DOX periods. In sharp contrast, DOX has opposite, but weaker, predictive power for underreaction-related anomalies. In addition, the predictive power of DOX is robust after controlling for a broad set of economic forces. Moreover, most of the DOX effect on long-short anomaly returns derives from the short legs of these overreaction-related anomalies, suggesting that time variation in DOX leads to more time variation in overpricing than in underpricing, probably because of short-sale impediments. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Funding: Z. Su received financial support from Lingnan University [Faculty Research Grants DB25A5 and 103664]. Y. Wang received financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72503264]. J. Yu received financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72141304 and 72342020]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06850 .
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 外推中的时间变化与异常现象
abstract_cn: 我们发现，投资者信念中的外推加权程度（DOX）对一系列与市场过度反应相关的异常现象具有强大的预测能力。在高DOX时期，这些异常现象的平均收益差约为每月[公式：见文本]，而在低DOX时期则为每月[公式：见文本]。相比之下，DOX对与市场低反应相关的异常现象具有相反但较弱的预测能力。此外，在控制了广泛的经济因素后，DOX的预测能力仍然稳健。此外，DOX对多空异常收益的影响主要源于这些与过度反应相关的异常现象的空头部分，这表明DOX的时间变动导致了过度定价的时间变动大于低估，这可能是由于卖空障碍造成的。本文由Lukas Schmid接受，金融学。资助：Z. Su获得岭南大学的资金支持[教职研究资助DB25A5和103664]。Y. Wang获得中国国家自然科学基金的资金支持[资助编号72503264]。J. Yu获得中国国家自然科学基金的资金支持[资助编号72141304和72342020]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06850获取。

title: In Search of Shares: Benchmarked Ownership, Short Covering, and Price Efficiency
abstract: We examine whether ownership by benchmarked investors constrains short sellers’ ability to quickly cover their positions following positive earnings news and thereby exacerbates price pressure from short covering. We find that high benchmarked ownership is related to greater price overshooting in highly shorted stocks at positive earnings announcements. This effect is driven by benchmarked ownership amplifying both price and volume impacts of short covering. Exploring shocks from Russell index reconstitutions and examining other settings such as management guidance and analyst recommendation revisions yield similar inferences. Overall, our findings highlight a novel mechanism that benchmarked ownership can constrain short-selling activities. This paper was accepted by Eric So, accounting. Funding: The authors acknowledge financial assistance from their respective schools. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07231 .
title_cn: 寻求股份：基准化所有权、短期回补与价格效率
abstract_cn: 我们研究了基准投资者的持股是否限制了空头在正面财报发布后迅速平仓的能力，从而加剧了空头回补带来的价格压力。我们发现，高基准持股与在正面财报发布时高度被做空股票的价格超调程度相关。这一效应是由于基准持股放大了空头回补对价格和交易量的影响。通过探讨罗素指数重构带来的冲击，并考察管理层指导和分析师推荐修订等其他情境，得出的结论相似。总体而言，我们的研究结果突显了基准持股可以限制空头交易活动的一种新机制。本文已被会计领域的Eric So接受。资助：作者感谢各自学校的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07231获取。

title: Bond Risk Characteristics and Factor Risk Premia
abstract: Assuming no arbitrage and that a polynomial in the time to maturity approximates spot-rate increments, we develop a consistent approach to estimate factor risk premia in the bond market. This approach is attractive, as the underlying risk factors are the time-varying coefficients of the polynomial specification, and the factor loadings correspond to familiar bond risk characteristics, such as duration and convexity. Our two-factor model—with a positive (negative) duration-factor (convexity-factor) risk premium—is easy to estimate and provides straightforward economic intuition for the concave term structure of bond risk premia and the downward-sloping term structure of bond Sharpe ratios. Our model decomposes the conditional factor risk premia into a “status quo” component—the expected factors’ realizations when expected spot-rate increments are zero—and the factors’ forecasts. The status quo factor risk premia provide measures of the state of fixed income markets that both outperform alternative measures and are easily estimated in real time; moreover, the underlying risk factors and their loadings are familiar to and readily interpreted by investors and traders. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00212 .
title_cn: 债券风险特征与因子风险溢价
abstract_cn: 假设不存在套利机会，并且一个关于到期时间的多项式可以近似现货利率的增量，我们开发了一种一致的方法来估计债券市场中的因子风险溢价。这种方法具有吸引力，因为其基础风险因子是多项式规范的时间变化系数，而因子负载对应于熟悉的债券风险特征，如久期和凸性。我们的双因子模型——具有正（负）久期因子（凸性因子）风险溢价——易于估计，并为债券风险溢价的凹形期限结构和债券夏普比率的向下倾斜期限结构提供了直接的经济直觉。我们的模型将条件因子风险溢价分解为“现状”成分——当预期现货利率增量为零时，预期因子的实现——以及因子的预测。现状因子风险溢价提供了固定收益市场状态的衡量标准，既优于替代测量，又易于实时估计；此外，基础风险因子及其负载对投资者和交易者来说是熟悉且易于解读的。本文已被Lukas Schmid接受，领域为金融。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00212 获取。

title: Quality Signaling in Rewards-Based Crowdfunding: The Role of Deferred Payments
abstract: Problem definition: The rise of crowdfunding hides a flaw: creators’ private information that is unobservable enables them to exploit backers, stalling the sector. To shield backers, platforms now escrow part of raised funds as deferred-payment insurance. We explore whether the implementation of deferred payment (DePay) shapes quality signaling under private information and how to utilize DePay for better campaign outcomes. Methodology/results: We build a stylized signaling game with a representative creator. In current practice, DePay is mandatory, and the creator can only signal quality by raising the funding target (instrument T) or cutting the reward price (instrument P). We instead propose to let DePay be voluntary: the creator decides whether to adopt it and even how large a share to defer, thereby creating a novel signaling instrument D. In the “all-or-nothing” funding, the implementation of DePay guarantees a separating equilibrium, and any of T, P, or D may be effective. Contrary to the literature that crowns T as the unique optimal instrument, we show that (i) P dominates T when the platform sets a low reserve ratio under DePay, and (ii) D outperforms both T and P when the creator determines the reserve ratio, yielding a win-win for backers and the creator. In the “keep-it-all” funding, DePay is indispensable for a (preferred) separating equilibrium because T collapses; nevertheless, voluntary DePay does not always outperform mandatory DePay. Managerial implications: Our results support the implementation of suitably designed DePay by crowdfunding platforms to protect backers, specifying when DePay should be mandatory or voluntary. We also illustrate how creators leverage DePay to signal quality, offering guidance for their campaign design. Funding: J. Lyu acknowledges financial support from the Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72401270] and the Fundamental Research Funds for the Central Universities [Grant WK2040000098]. X. Shen acknowledges financial support from the Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72222015, 72571260, 72171215]. The research of X. Kong is supported by the Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72471213 and 72101243] and the USTC Research Funds of the Double First-Class Initiative [Grant YD2040002025]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0402 .
title_cn: 基于奖励的众筹中的质量信号：延期支付的作用
abstract_cn: 问题定义：众筹的兴起隐藏了一个缺陷：创作者的私密信息不可观测，使他们能够利用资助者，这阻碍了该行业的发展。为了保护资助者，平台现在会将部分筹集的资金作为延后支付保险预留。我们探讨了延后支付（DePay）的实施是否影响在私密信息下的质量信号传递，以及如何利用DePay以改善项目成果。 方法论/结果：我们构建了一个具有代表性的创作者的样式化信号游戏。在目前的实践中，DePay是强制性的，而创作者只能通过提高融资目标（工具T）或降低奖励价格（工具P）来传递质量信号。我们建议将DePay设为自愿：创作者决定是否采用DePay，甚至可以决定推迟多大比例的资金，从而创造出一种新颖的信号工具D。在“全额筹资”中，DePay的实施能够保证一个分离均衡，而T、P或D中的任何一个都可能有效。与文献将T视为唯一最佳工具的观点相反，我们表明：（i）当平台在DePay下设定低准备金比率时，P优于T；（ii）当创作者决定准备金比率时，D优于T和P，从而实现资助者和创作者的双赢。在“全保留”筹资中，DePay对（首选）分离均衡是不可或缺的，因为T崩溃；然而，自愿的DePay并不总是强于强制的DePay。 管理启示：我们的结果支持众筹平台实施适当设计的DePay以保护资助者，并明确了DePay应何时为强制或自愿。我们还说明了创作者如何利用DePay传递质量信号，为他们的项目设计提供指导。 资助：J. Lyu感谢中国自然科学基金（资助编号72401270）及中央高校基本科研业务费（资助编号WK2040000098）的资助。X. Shen感谢中国自然科学基金（资助编号72222015、72571260、72171215）的资助。X. Kong的研究得到了中国自然科学基金（资助编号72471213和72101243）以及中国科技大学“双一流”建设研究基金（资助编号YD2040002025）的支持。附加材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0402获取。

title: NFT Disruption in Platform Competition: Evidence from Trading Card Collectibles
abstract: The rise of blockchain-based platforms is reshaping how digital and physical products interact, with important consequences for platform strategy and market regulation. Evidence from the introduction of NBA Top Shot shows that digital collectibles can directly reduce prices, sales volume, and market value in adjacent physical markets, indicating a clear cannibalization effect. However, the impact is highly uneven: Physical products with close digital substitutes and low digital scarcity become especially vulnerable, whereas low-cost items in certain segments can experience market expansion as new collectors enter through digital channels. These patterns demonstrate that digital transformation alters competition not only between platforms but also across product categories, making strategic decisions around scarcity, product design, and release timing critical for firms managing multiformat ecosystems. For practice, the findings highlight the need for companies to anticipate cross-market spillovers when launching digital offerings and to manage physical and digital product lines in an integrated way. For policy, the results underscore the importance of establishing transparent standards for digital collectibles and providing clear consumer guidance, while recognizing that many NFTs function as collectible goods rather than financial securities and may warrant distinct regulatory treatment.
title_cn: 平台竞争中的NFT扰动：来自交易卡收藏品的证据
abstract_cn: 区块链平台的兴起正在重塑数字产品与实体产品之间的互动，这对平台战略和市场监管产生了重要影响。NBA Top Shot的引入证据表明，数字收藏品可以直接降低相邻实体市场的价格、销售量和市场价值，显示出明显的内耗效应。然而，这种影响非常不均衡：与数字替代品紧密相关且数字稀缺性低的实体产品尤其脆弱，而某些细分市场中的低价商品可能会因新收藏者通过数字渠道进入而经历市场扩张。这些模式表明，数字转型不仅改变了平台之间的竞争，还影响了产品类别之间的竞争，使得在管理多格式生态系统时，围绕稀缺性、产品设计和发布时机的战略决策变得至关重要。对于实践而言，这些发现强调了公司在推出数字产品时需预见跨市场溢出效应，并以综合方式管理实体和数字产品线的必要性。对于政策而言，结果强调了建立数字收藏品透明标准和提供明确消费者指导的重要性，同时认识到许多NFT作为收藏品而非金融证券运作，可能需要不同的监管对待。

title: To Be or Not To Be (Aligned with Elites): Navigating Systemic Power within Informal Institutions
abstract: Social intermediaries play a critical role in addressing exclusion, but must navigate entrenched power relations within informal institutions. Drawing on comparative case studies of three social intermediaries, this study examines how intermediaries negotiate systemic power—manifested through domination and discipline—across intersecting caste–gender hierarchies. We identify three distinct approaches to elite engagement: elite delegation, elite co-optation, and creative accommodation. Each of these reflects a specific combination of communal positioning and power frame adopted by intermediaries. Elite delegation, grounded in a detached communal positioning and a zero-sum power frame, prioritizes rapid scaling but reproduces existing hierarchies. Elite co-optation, marked by pragmatic communal positioning and a conditional positive-sum power frame, fosters short-term cooperation yet achieves only partial inclusion. Creative accommodation, characterized by embedded communal positioning and a positive-sum power frame, enables social transformation by simultaneously empowering marginalized groups and constructively engaging elites. By demonstrating how communal positioning and power frames shape these approaches, the study advances understanding of how systemic power sustains exclusion and how it can be reconfigured from within. We contribute to research on informal institutions and inclusion by elucidating how intermediaries can leverage positive-sum engagements to reshape domination and discipline, fostering more equitable and enduring informal institutional change.
title_cn: 是否与精英对齐：在非正式制度中驾驭系统性权力
abstract_cn: 社会中介在应对排斥方面发挥着关键作用，但必须在非正式机构内应对根深蒂固的权力关系。本研究通过对三个社会中介的比较案例研究，考察这些中介如何在相互交织的种姓和性别等级中谈判系统性的权力—这一权力通过控制和规范表现出来。我们识别出三种对精英参与的不同策略：精英授权、精英合作和创造性适应。这三种策略反映了中介所采用的社区定位和权力框架的特定组合。精英授权建立在冷漠的社区定位和零和的权力框架之上，优先追求快速扩展，但复现了现有的等级。精英合作则以务实的社区定位和有条件的正和权力框架为特征，促进短期合作但仅实现部分包容。创造性适应，特征是嵌入式的社区定位和正和的权力框架，通过同时赋权于边缘化群体和积极参与精英，实现社会变革。通过展示社区定位和权力框架如何塑造这些策略，本研究深化了对系统性权力如何维持排斥以及如何在内部重新配置的理解。我们通过阐明中介如何利用正和的互动重塑控制和规范，从而推动更公平和持久的非正式制度变革，为非正式机构和包容性研究做出了贡献。

title: High-investment human resource practices and firm performance in the context of national education systems and labor markets: A cross-national meta-analysis
abstract: Abstract Organizations—especially multinational corporations (MNCs)—do not always realize comparable performance gains from investing in people across national borders. Prior research has attempted to explain such variation in the effects of high-investment human resource practices (HIHRPs) by emphasizing their fit with national cultural values, yet empirical support for this cultural fit perspective has been limited. To address this gap, we focus on national institutional factors that more directly shape how HIHRPs influence performance. Drawing on human capital resources (HCR) theory and institutional perspectives in International Business (IB), we identify two institutional conditions—national education quality and labor market flexibility—that moderate HIHRP effectiveness. We theorize that high-quality education systems enhance the HIHRPs–performance relationship by supplying workers with strong general human capital and that this effect is amplified in flexible labor markets where employees are motivated to contribute. A meta-analysis of 1,285 effect sizes from 170,938 organizations across 29 countries offers nuanced evidence: HIHRPs were more effective when national education quality and labor market flexibility were both high or both low than when they were mismatched. These findings advance comparative and strategic HRM research and guide organizations about how comprehensively or selectively to invest in managing people in what institutional contexts.
title_cn: 高投资人力资源实践与公司绩效在国家教育系统和劳动市场背景下的关系：一项跨国元分析
abstract_cn: 摘要 组织，尤其是跨国公司（MNCs），并不总是能够通过跨国投资人力实现相当的绩效提升。以往的研究试图通过强调高投资人力资源实践（HIHRPs）与国家文化价值观的契合来解释这种绩效差异，然而，对这一文化契合视角的实证支持却有限。为了解决这一问题，我们关注国家制度因素，这些因素更直接地影响HIHRPs影响绩效的方式。基于人力资本资源（HCR）理论和国际商务（IB）的制度视角，我们识别出两种制度条件——国家教育质量和劳动力市场灵活性——它们在一定程度上调节HIHRP的有效性。我们理论化认为，高质量的教育体系通过为员工提供强大的一般人力资本，从而增强HIHRPs与绩效之间的关系；而在灵活的劳动力市场中，这种效应会进一步增强，因为员工更有动力去贡献。一项涵盖29个国家、涉及170,938个组织的1,285个效应值的元分析提供了细致的证据：当国家教育质量和劳动力市场灵活性都高或都低时，HIHRPs的效果更佳，而当二者不匹配时效果较差。这些发现推动了比较与战略人力资源管理研究，指导组织在不同的制度背景下，关于在人力管理上应当多么全面或选择性地进行投资。

title: Interpreting Violence: How Community Context Shapes Corporate Responses to Street Protests
abstract: Violence that erupts in communities invites complex interpretations that can create a dilemma for business leaders about how to respond. Investigating how organizations respond to violence in protests, we build on the community embeddedness literature and propose that business leaders’ responses to protest violence depend on their perceptions of whether the violence is justified. Leaders may view reported protest violence as evidence of either social disorder or a valid grievance in the community where the violence occurs and where their companies are headquartered. We theorize that business leaders’ interpretations of violence are influenced by their community’s recent history: A history of protest violence unrelated to the social cause underlying the current protest weakens the managerial perception that the social issue is relevant to the community, while a history of grievance-validating events strengthens this perception. Using hand-collected data on corporate announcements following the 2020 Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement, we find that firms are less likely to announce diversity actions in response to reported protest violence in communities marked by persistent violence in previous non-BLM protests, but they are more likely to do so in communities with records of more police shootings. These same community conditions also shape the effect of violence on whether firms decide to publicly endorse the movement when they announce their corporate actions. Demonstrating that violence reshapes the ways that organizations respond to protests, we discuss the implications of our findings for research on violence, social movements, and corporate activism.
title_cn: 解读暴力：社区背景如何影响企业对街头抗议的反应
abstract_cn: 社区中爆发的暴力事件引发了复杂的解读，这可能使商业领袖面临如何应对的困境。通过调查组织如何回应抗议中的暴力事件，我们基于社区嵌入文献提出，商业领袖对抗议暴力的反应取决于他们对该暴力是否合理的看法。领导者可能将报道的抗议暴力视为社会失序的证据，或视为发生暴力的社区（即其公司总部所在的社区）中的有效诉求。我们推测，商业领袖对暴力的解读受到其社区近期历史的影响：与当前抗议所涉及的社会问题无关的抗议暴力历史削弱了管理层对该社会问题在社区内相关性的认知，而有效诉求事件的历史则增强了这一认知。利用收集的关于2020年“黑人的命也重要”（BLM）运动后公司公告的数据，我们发现，企业在报告社区中发生抗议暴力时，不太可能宣布多样性行动，特别是在那些在以往非BLM抗议中持续发生暴力的社区中；而在警方枪击事件较多的社区中，企业则更可能这样做。这些相同的社区条件也影响了暴力对企业在宣布其公司行动时是否决定公开支持该运动的影响。我们的研究表明，暴力重新塑造了组织响应抗议的方式，并讨论了我们的发现对暴力、社会运动和企业积极主义研究的意义。

title: Perceived Pain or Gain: Role Identity, Gratification, and the Well-Being of Hybrid Entrepreneurs
abstract: Hybrid entrepreneurship—pursuing a venture while maintaining paid employment—can enhance or undermine well-being. Based on a longitudinal, qualitative study, we identify two distinct trajectories shaped by envisioned future selves: delayed entrepreneurial gratification with cumulative strains on well-being, and present gratification with supportive effects on well-being. Drawing on role identity theory, we theorize how role internalization and identity centrality relate to the well-being experiences of hybrid entrepreneurs and introduce gratification and rationalization as ways to handle strains on well-being. Our findings offer a deeper understanding of the divergent well-being experiences in hybrid entrepreneurship.
title_cn: 感知的痛苦或收获：角色认同、满足感与混合型企业家的福祉
abstract_cn: 混合创业—在保持有偿就业的同时追求创业—可能增强或削弱个人的幸福感。基于一项纵向质性研究，我们识别出两种由预想的未来自我形塑的不同发展轨迹：延迟的创业满足感伴随对幸福感的累积压力，以及即时的满足感对幸福感的支持性影响。根据角色身份理论，我们理论化了角色内化和身份中心性与混合创业者幸福感体验之间的关系，并将满足感和合理化引入作为应对幸福感压力的方式。我们的研究结果为理解混合创业中不同的幸福感体验提供了更深入的洞见。

title: The effects of food insecurity on work outcomes.
abstract: Food insecurity-insufficient access to safe and nutritious foods-is one of the most crucial societal grand challenges the world faces today. It affects 2.3 billion people globally, and addressing it is one of the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals of 2030 (Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations et al., 2025). Despite its prevalence and importance, the field of applied psychology has ignored this problem with the implicit assumption that food insecurity is not an issue relevant to the workplace. Contrary to this view, we hypothesize and demonstrate that food insecurity is detrimental to the three core work outcomes: task performance, work engagement, and organizational citizenship behaviors. To test our hypotheses, we employed a multimethod design across three empirical studies: (a) an experimental recall study, (b) a within-person diary study, and (c) a field experiment. Our findings consistently demonstrate that food insecurity leads to higher anxiety, which subsequently has a negative effect on task performance, work engagement, and organizational citizenship behavior. In our field experiment, we further demonstrated that providing food to those experiencing food insecurity can improve work outcomes. This research highlights that food insecurity is a significant issue with important implications for the workplace that requires greater attention from both researchers and business leaders. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Food Security and Health in Diverse Populations
title_cn: 食物不安全对工作结果的影响。
abstract_cn: 食品安全问题——即对安全和营养食品的获取不足——是当今世界面临的最重要的社会重大挑战之一。全球有23亿人受到影响，而解决这一问题是联合国2030可持续发展目标之一（联合国粮食及农业组织等，2025）。尽管其普遍性和重要性，应用心理学领域却忽视了这一问题，隐含着食品安全与职场无关的假设。与这种观点相反，我们假设并证明食品安全问题对三项核心工作结果具有危害：任务表现、工作投入和组织公民行为。为了验证我们的假设，我们采用了多方法的设计，通过三项实证研究进行测试：（a）实验回忆研究，（b）个体内日记研究，以及（c）现场实验。我们的研究结果始终表明，食品安全问题导致更高的焦虑感，进而对任务表现、工作投入和组织公民行为产生负面影响。在我们的现场实验中，我们进一步证明，为经历食品安全问题的人提供食物可以改善工作结果。这项研究强调，食品安全问题是一个重大议题，对职场具有重要影响，亟需研究人员和企业领导者给予更多关注。（PsycInfo数据库记录(c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利）。

title: The hidden cost of courage: How oppositional courage shapes trans employees’ diminished image belief.
abstract: Fulfilling the promise of greater workplace inclusion increasingly hinges on advantaged group employees' oppositional courage (OC)-a nonnormative form of allyship involving significant risk to the actor. Research suggests OC may not only offer instrumental benefits to marginalized employees but also convey a powerful "message of value" from the actor. Yet these courageous acts do not occur in a vacuum, suggesting they may carry social consequences for marginalized employees. Drawing from theory on helping relations and research on social cognition, we argue these risky acts can inadvertently signal unique strength in the actor, triggering marginalized employees' diminished image belief-a concern others see them as weak and unable to stand up for themselves. We further propose that this perceived "image cost" depends on the actor's humility as it relates to OC-what we term OC-specific humility-and that these dynamics have implications for marginalized employees' avoidance reactions. Our investigation utilized data from 959 trans employees. In Study 1, a qualitative analysis identified three behavioral themes reflecting humility in relation to OC (i.e., OC-specific humility) and provided initial support for its role in shaping how OC is perceived. In Study 2, we tested our hypotheses experimentally. In Study 3, we sought to replicate the results with a time-lagged survey. Three supplemental studies included a scale development effort aimed at validating a measure of OC-specific humility and two additional experiments. Overall, results provided partial support for our model. We conclude by discussing the implications of our research, as well as avenues for future work. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 勇气的隐秘代价：对立勇气如何塑造跨性别员工的自我形象信念削弱。
abstract_cn: 实现更大工作场所包容性的承诺日益依赖于优势群体员工的对立勇气（OC）——一种涉及行动者显著风险的非常规盟友行为。研究表明，OC不仅可以为边缘化员工提供工具性利益，还可以向行动者传达强烈的“价值信息”。然而，这些勇敢的行为并非在真空中发生，这表明它们可能会对边缘化员工产生社会后果。基于帮助关系理论和社会认知研究，我们认为这些冒险行为可能无意中向边缘化员工传递行动者的独特优势，这会引发边缘化员工对自身形象的贬值信念——即其他人认为他们软弱无力，无法为自己辩护。我们进一步提出，这种被感知的“形象成本”取决于行动者与OC相关的谦逊程度——我们称之为OC特定的谦逊——而这一动态对边缘化员工的回避反应有影响。我们的研究利用了959名跨性别员工的数据。在研究1中，定性分析确定了三个与OC相关的谦逊的行为主题（即OC特定的谦逊），并初步支持其在塑造OC感知中的作用。在研究2中，我们通过实验检验了我们的假设。在研究3中，我们试图通过时间滞后调查复制结果。三项补充研究包括了一项旨在验证OC特定谦逊量表的开发工作和两个额外的实验。总体而言，结果部分支持了我们的模型。最后，我们讨论了研究的意义以及未来研究的方向。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）

title: Personal self-disclosure as a mixed blessing in teams: Effects through relational and cognitive mechanisms.
abstract: Although personal self-disclosure has been increasingly encouraged in organizations and teams to enhance authenticity and workplace effectiveness, the nature of its impact in team contexts remains debated. Existing literature predominantly focuses on the relational effects of receiving personal self-disclosure but ignores its cognitive effects and key contextual contingencies that help elucidate when it has positive versus negative consequences. This study provides a more comprehensive theoretical account of the effects of self-disclosure in team contexts by combining social penetration and information processing perspectives into a multilevel theoretical framework. We tested our theoretical model in two team samples. Supporting our hypotheses, we found that personal self-disclosure had complex, countervailing impacts on team members receiving disclosure through relational and cognitive mechanisms. In addition, team self-disclosure norms were found to moderate the effects of receiving personal self-disclosure, buffering the relational and cognitive costs. Our research lays the foundation for future research on personal self-disclosure in teams and offers practical implications for teams and organizations seeking to maximize the utility of personal self-disclosure in the workplace. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 团队中的个人自我披露作为一种双刃剑：通过关系和认知机制的影响。
abstract_cn: 尽管在组织和团队中，个人自我披露日益受到鼓励，以增强真实性和工作效能，但其在团队环境中的影响性质仍然存在争议。现有文献主要关注接收个人自我披露的关系效应，却忽视了其认知效应以及有助于阐明何时产生正面与负面后果的关键情境变量。本研究通过将社会渗透理论和信息处理视角结合成一个多级理论框架，提供了对团队环境中自我披露影响的更全面的理论解释。我们在两个团队样本中测试了我们的理论模型。支持我们的假设，我们发现个人自我披露通过关系和认知机制对接收披露的团队成员产生了复杂且相互抵消的影响。此外，团队自我披露规范被发现能够调节接收个人自我披露的效果，缓冲了关系和认知上的成本。我们的研究为未来关于团队中个人自我披露的研究奠定了基础，并为希望最大化个人自我披露在工作场所效用的团队和组织提供了实践启示。(PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利)。

title: Clusters of general counterproductive behavior and associated personality profiles.
abstract: Counterproductive behavior (e.g., aggression, theft, dishonesty) is a persistent societal problem with a substantial dispositional basis. Despite broad interest in the subject, little scholarship has studied relations of variables associated with counterproductive behavior and their dispositional antecedents across work and nonwork domains. Drawing on cybernetic theories of personality, we posit that personality malfunction (an imbalance between cybernetic processes responsible for maintaining homeostasis and facilitating change) contributes to general counterproductive behavior (GCB). To test this theory, we conduct a quantitative review and synthesis of meta-analyses that report Big Five personality trait relations to variables indicative of GCB. Overall, we locate 46 articles reporting associations with 62 variables, which represent k > 1,200 studies and N > 850,000 participants. First, we examine the extent to which GCB variables are predicted by Big Five traits. Then, we use meta-analytic criterion profile analysis (Wiernik et al., 2021) to determine how much of the prediction from personality is due to profile-level effects (elevation of traits) or profile-pattern effects (configuration of traits). Finding that configurations indicative of personality malfunction dominate prediction, finally, we cluster analyze similarity coefficients among personality profiles across GCB variables. We discover two metaclusters and four subordinate clusters. These clusters may represent archetypical forms of GCB, and their related profiles may reflect archetypical forms of personality malfunction. Clusters also strongly parallel the externalizing superspectrum of psychopathology, suggesting a potential general taxonomy of GCB. We conclude by discussing implications for theory and practice, as well as limitations and future research directions. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 一般反生产行为的聚类及其相关的人格特征。
abstract_cn: 反生产行为（例如，攻击性、盗窃、不诚实）是一个持续存在的社会问题，具有显著的个性基础。尽管对该主题的广泛关注，关于反生产行为相关变量及其个性前因在工作和非工作领域的关系的学术研究仍然较少。基于个性网络理论，我们认为个性故障（维持稳态与促进变化所需的网络过程之间的不平衡）会助长一般反生产行为（GCB）。为测试这一理论，我们对报告“大五”个性特征与指示GCB的变量关系的元分析进行了定量回顾和综合。总体而言，我们发现46篇文章报道了62个变量的关联，这些变量代表了超过1200项研究和超过850,000名参与者的数据。首先，我们考察了大五特征在多大程度上能够预测GCB变量。然后，我们使用元分析标准特征轮廓分析（Wiernik等，2021）来确定个性预测的多少是由于特征水平效应（特征的提升）或轮廓模式效应（特征的配置）。结果发现，指示个性故障的配置主导了预测，最后，我们对GCB变量之间的个性特征轮廓的相似性系数进行了聚类分析。我们发现了两个元聚类和四个子聚类。这些聚类可能代表了GCB的原型形式，其相关轮廓可能反映了个性故障的原型形式。这些聚类也与精神病理学的外化超谱系有很强的对应关系，暗示了一种潜在的GCB通用分类法。最后，我们讨论了理论和实践的启示，以及局限性和未来研究方向。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: Investigating measurement invariance for multiple covariates in organizational research using exploratory factor analysis and confirmatory factor analysis trees.
abstract: Organizational research often deals with unobservable (latent) variables such as, for example, job satisfaction or leadership styles. When comparing these latent variables across groups, a comparability of the measurements is important-so-called measurement invariance (MI) considered a prerequisite. Common methodology to test whether MI holds or to explore noninvariance can only be used with established measurement models and specific hypotheses about potential violations of MI in mind. Therefore, exploratory factor analysis trees and confirmatory factor analysis trees have recently been developed. They promise to be an effective tool for early investigations of MI during the development of measurement models (e.g., scale development) and with many (continuous) covariates defining countless groups for which MI may be violated. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 在组织研究中使用探索性因子分析和确认性因子分析树探讨多个协变量的测量不变性。
abstract_cn: 组织研究通常涉及不可观察（潜在）变量，例如工作满意度或领导风格。在比较这些潜在变量时，各组之间测量的可比性非常重要，即所谓的测量不变性（MI），被视为一种先决条件。测试MI是否成立或探索非不变性的方法通常只能在已有测量模型和关于可能违反MI的具体假设的情况下使用。因此，最近开发了探索性因子分析树和验证性因子分析树。它们有望成为在测量模型开发（如量表开发）期间早期调查MI的有效工具，并且可以处理许多（连续）协变量，这些协变量定义了无数可能违反MI的组别。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: Nudging Green-but-Slow Shipping Choices in Online Retail
abstract: Faster e-commerce fulfillment often comes at a cost to the environment because of energy-intensive transportation modes and more frequent, less consolidated last-mile deliveries. Despite these environmental implications, most retailers feel pressure to provide fast fulfillment to remain competitive. But what if consumers could be nudged to voluntarily choose green-but-slow shipping? In practice, a variety of information strategies are used to nudge such decisions, but it is unclear which strategy is best and why. This study examines these questions in two logistical contexts, each involving a different type of process change to support green-but-slow shipping: shipping mode and order consolidation. We first introduce a conceptual framework for selecting information strategies based on their influence on customer perceptions related to key stakeholders in each context: delivery convenience (self), environmental impact (society), and sustainability intention (retailer). Then, drawing on behavioral research and industry practices, we identify and test the effect of a comprehensive set of information strategies (i.e., Process, Green Label, Green Process, and Green Outcome) through controlled experiments involving 3,800 participants. Experimental results suggest that different logistical contexts require distinct nudging strategies, aligning with our conceptual framework. We find that including a green label is particularly effective for the shipping mode context, especially when combined with outcome information. In contrast, process information is more promising in the order consolidation context. Also, adding financial incentives can enhance the effectiveness of information strategies without a clear environmental signal, whereas pairing them with a simple green label may be effective for low eco-conscious individuals. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Funding: This work was supported by the Institute on the Environment, University of Minnesota [MF-0009-23]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00239 .
title_cn: 在在线零售中促使绿色但缓慢的运输选择
abstract_cn: 更快的电子商务履行通常会对环境造成影响，因为运输模式能耗高，且最后一公里的交付频率较高、聚合度较低。尽管存在这些环境影响，大多数零售商仍感受到提供快速履行的压力，以保持竞争力。但是，如果消费者能够被引导自愿选择绿色综合但较慢的运输方式呢？在实践中，采用了多种信息策略来引导这种选择，但尚不清楚哪种策略最优，以及原因。在本研究中，我们围绕两个物流背景进行探讨，每个背景涉及不同类型的过程变化，以支持绿色但缓慢的运输：运输模式和订单整合。我们首先提出了一个概念框架，用以基于信息策略对与每个背景中关键利益相关者相关的客户感知影响进行选择：交付便利性（自我）、环境影响（社会）和可持续性意图（零售商）。随后，基于行为研究和行业实践，我们确定并测试了一整套综合的信息策略（即，过程策略、绿色标签、绿色过程和绿色结果），通过涉及3800名参与者的控制实验进行。实验结果表明，不同的物流背景需要不同的引导策略，这与我们的概念框架相一致。我们发现，在运输模式背景下，包含绿色标签尤其有效，尤其是当与结果信息结合时。相比之下，在订单整合背景下，过程信息的前景更为可观。此外，增加经济激励可以增强信息策略的有效性，即使没有明确的环境信号，而将其与简单的绿色标签结合可能对生态意识较低的个体有效。本文被运筹管理领域的Elena Katok接受。资助：这项工作得到了明尼苏达大学环境研究所的支持 [MF-0009-23]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00239 获取。

title: Gender Gap in Debt Renegotiation
abstract: We study the role of gender in corporate debt renegotiation. Using in-court reorganizations from Brazil, we find that male-led creditors are more likely to reject plans put forward by female-led debtors. Although we cannot definitively identify the underlying mechanism driving this pattern, our findings align more consistently with gender-based discrimination compared with alternative explanations. This behavior may be costly: Female-led debtors deliver higher recoveries under reorganization than under liquidation, implying that rejections potentially create deadweight losses. Supporting a miscalibrated-beliefs explanation, we observe that the gender-based rejection gap narrows when male creditors have prior exposure to successful female-led businesses, pointing to a potential path for mitigation. This paper was accepted by Bo Becker, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05802 .
title_cn: 债务重组中的性别差距
abstract_cn: 我们研究了性别在企业债务重组中的作用。通过分析巴西的法庭重组案例，我们发现男性主导的债权人更可能拒绝女性主导的债务人提出的重组计划。尽管我们无法明确识别导致这一模式的潜在机制，但我们的发现与基于性别的歧视解释相比，更加一致。这种行为可能是有成本的：女性主导的债务人在重组中所获得的回收率高于清算，这意味着拒绝可能会造成无谓损失。支持错误校准信念解释的证据显示，当男性债权人之前接触过成功的女性主导企业时，基于性别的拒绝差距会缩小，这指向了一条潜在的缓解路径。本文由博·贝克尔（Bo Becker）接受，属于金融领域。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05802 获取。

title: Can Autonomous Vehicles Solve the Commuter Parking Problem?
abstract: This paper investigates how autonomous vehicles (AVs) may reshape morning commute travel patterns and impact parking in a central business district (CBD). We develop a continuous-time game-theoretic traffic model that takes into account key economic deterrents to driving, such as parking fees and traffic congestion, and characterize the departure time and parking location (inside or outside the CBD parking area) patterns of commuters in equilibrium. Our analysis shows that all AV commuters may choose to park outside the CBD in equilibrium, increasing both vehicle hours and vehicle miles traveled as compared with the case with all human-driven vehicles. This change increases the total system cost and suggests a potential for CBD land use changes (e.g., repurposing CBD parking spots as commercial and residential areas) after the mass adoption of AVs. To reduce the total system cost, an urban planner may regulate commuters’ decisions by adjusting parking fees and/or imposing congestion tolls as a short-term measure, or adjusting infrastructure, for example, converting CBD parking spaces to drop-off spots for AVs. Our results indicate that these measures can reduce the total system cost substantially (e.g., up to [Formula: see text] when calibrating our model to data from Pittsburgh). This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization and decision analytics. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01213 .
title_cn: 自动驾驶汽车能否解决通勤停车问题？
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了自主驾驶汽车（AVs）如何重塑早高峰通勤出行模式以及对中央商务区（CBD）停车的影响。我们开发了一个连续时间博弈论交通模型，该模型考虑了驾驶的关键经济障碍，如停车费用和交通拥堵，并在均衡状态下描述了通勤者的出发时间和停车位置（CBD停车区内或外）的模式。我们的分析表明，在均衡状态下，所有AV通勤者可能选择在CBD外停车，与全人驾驶车辆的情况相比，这将增加车辆行驶时间和行驶里程。这一变化增加了总系统成本，并暗示在AVs大规模普及后，CBD土地使用的潜在变化（例如，将CBD停车位改作商业和住宅区域）。为了降低总系统成本，城市规划者可以通过调整停车费用和/或征收拥堵费来规范通勤者的决策，作为短期措施，或者调整基础设施，例如，将CBD停车位改为AV的上下车点。我们的结果表明，这些措施可以显著降低总系统成本（例如，当将我们的模型校准到匹兹堡的数据时，降低幅度可达[公式：见文本]）。本文由Chung Piaw Teo接受，主题为优化与决策分析。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01213获取。

title: The Impacts of “Baby-Friendly” Hospital Designations
abstract: This study considers a voluntary hospital certification program and how it shapes patient health outcomes. The Baby-Friendly Hospital Initiative designates participating hospitals as “Baby-Friendly” if they adhere to various practices thought to promote breastfeeding. We estimate the effect of being born in a Baby-Friendly hospital on breastfeeding initiation and infant health. Identification relies on a within-mother analysis that compares siblings who were born in the same hospital: one when the hospital was not certified and another when the hospital was certified. Data come from South Carolina birth certificates from 2010 to 2019 linked to subsequent emergency department records, hospital records, and death certificates. The results indicate that Baby-Friendly accreditation has no widespread effects on breastfeeding initiation. It does, however, increase breastfeeding rates among a subset of Black mothers with a history of bottle-feeding. Infants exposed to the designation are more likely to leave the hospital in under two days, and there is also some evidence of subsequent reductions in healthcare utilization in the next year. We do not find precise changes in all-cause one-year mortality, although we do observe a marginally significant reduction in deaths caused by “extreme immaturity.” This paper was accepted by Anita Carson, healthcare management. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06422 .
title_cn: “婴儿友好型”医院认证的影响
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了一项自愿医院认证项目及其对患者健康结果的影响。婴儿友好医院倡议将参与医院指定为“婴儿友好”，前提是它们遵循被认为有助于促进母乳喂养的各种做法。我们估计在婴儿友好医院出生对母乳喂养启动和婴儿健康的影响。识别方法依赖于母亲内部分析，比较在同一家医院出生的兄弟姐妹：一位在医院未获认证时出生，另一位在医院获得认证时出生。数据来源于2010年至2019年南卡罗来纳州的出生证明，链接后续的急诊记录、医院记录和死亡证明。结果表明，婴儿友好认证对母乳喂养启动没有广泛影响。然而，它确实提高了部分有瓶喂历史的黑人母亲的母乳喂养率。接受该认证的婴儿更有可能在两天内出院，并且在接下来的一年中，医疗利用率也有一定的减少证据。我们没有发现全因一岁死亡率的精确变化，尽管我们观察到“极度早产”导致的死亡有边际显著的减少。本文由安妮塔·卡森（Anita Carson）接受，涉及医疗管理。补充材料：数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06422 获取。

title: Eliciting Supplier Cooperation for Value Chain Decarbonization: A Field Experiment with Smallholder Farmers in India
abstract: Many firms are pledging to reduce greenhouse gas emissions across their value chains. However, this requires their suppliers to also adopt more climate-friendly practices for decarbonization. This can involve addressing gaps in not only the suppliers’ ability but also, their willingness to adopt such practices, which can be challenging if the suppliers perceive the practices as risky or potentially detrimental to their economic well-being. We examine the effectiveness of relational investments to help mitigate this challenge, arguing that such investments can serve as a signal of the firm’s commitment toward joint value creation. In a field experiment conducted with supplier farmers in a multinational firm’s agricultural supply chain in India, we examine the impact of two kinds of relational investments in providing the farmers with customized agricultural services that they valued. In the first intervention, the firm’s field officers offered the farmers support specific to the crop that the firm sourced from them. The second intervention additionally involved bringing in expert agronomists to also provide the farmers with support on broader agricultural matters of interest to them. Relative to a control condition in which the farmers only received training on the relevant climate-friendly practices, both interventions improved the farmers’ adoption of the recommended practices. The second intervention was more impactful than the first in improving the farmers’ practice adoption as well as their retention with the firm. Exploratory mediation analysis and post-experiment field interviews suggest that these findings are partly driven by the farmers’ positive perception of the firm’s relational investments. This paper was accepted by Anita McGahan, business strategy. Funding: The authors acknowledge financial support from INSEAD [Kurt Björklund Research Fund]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05744 .
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 引导供应商合作实现价值链脱碳：与印度小农户的实地实验
abstract_cn: 许多企业承诺减少其价值链中的温室气体排放。然而，这要求其供应商也采用更具气候友好的脱碳实践。这可能涉及到不仅是供应商能力的差距，还包括他们愿意采用这些实践的意愿，这在供应商将这些实践视为有风险或可能对其经济福祉产生不利影响时可能会面临挑战。我们研究了关系投资在帮助缓解这一挑战方面的有效性，认为这种投资可以作为企业对共同价值创造承诺的信号。在印度一家跨国公司的农业供应链中，我们对与供应商农民进行的现场实验考察了两种关系投资对农民提供他们所重视的定制农业服务的影响。在第一次干预中，公司的现场工作人员为农民提供了与公司从他们那里采购的作物相关的支持。第二次干预还引入了专家农艺师，为农民提供他们感兴趣的更广泛的农业问题的支持。与仅接受相关气候友好实践培训的对照组相比，这两种干预均提高了农民对推荐实践的采纳。第二次干预在改善农民的实践采纳及其与公司的留存方面比第一次干预更具影响力。探索性中介分析和实验后现场访谈表明，这些发现部分源于农民对公司关系投资的积极看法。本文由安妮塔·麦高汉接受，属于商业战略领域。资助：作者感谢INSEAD [库尔特·比约克伦研究基金] 的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05744 获取。

title: Online Learning and Optimization for Queues with Unknown Arrival Rate and Service Distribution
abstract: End-to-End Optimization for Queues Beyond PTO Most queueing optimization methods rely on a predict-then-optimize (PTO) paradigm, which first estimates key model primitives (e.g., demand rates and service-time distributions) and then optimizes system decisions using these estimates as if they were exact. In practice, however, queueing performance formulas are often highly sensitive to estimation errors, especially under congestion, making such approaches fragile and potentially misleading. In “Online Learning and Optimization for Queues with Unknown Arrival Rate and Service Distribution,” X. Chen, G. Hong, and Y. Liu develop a new end-to-end online learning framework for jointly optimizing pricing and capacity decisions in service systems, called LiQUAR (learning in queue with unknown arrival rate). LiQUAR is specialized to queueing systems by explicitly leveraging workload dynamics and transient behavior, allowing it to learn directly from arrival and service data without requiring prior knowledge of the demand function or the service-time distribution. Designing online learning algorithms for queues poses unique challenges: Data are temporally correlated, system dynamics are disrupted by policy updates, and performance is highly sensitive to congestion. LiQUAR addresses these challenges through queue-aware algorithm design and analysis, establishing regret bounds that capture the effect of traffic intensity and demonstrating superior performance to PTO and gradient-based reinforcement learning methods, particularly in heavily loaded systems.
title_cn: 未知到达率和服务分布的排队系统的在线学习与优化
abstract_cn:
端到端优化超越预测再优化的排队系统

大多数排队优化方法依赖于预测再优化（PTO）范式，该方法首先估计关键模型原始参数（例如，需求速率和服务时间分布），然后使用这些估计值作为准确值来优化系统决策。然而，在实际情况中，排队性能公式常常对估计误差高度敏感，尤其在拥堵情况下，使得这种方法显得脆弱且可能具有误导性。在“具有未知到达率和服务分布的排队系统的在线学习与优化”一文中，X. Chen、G. Hong和Y. Liu开发了一种新的端到端在线学习框架，旨在联合优化服务系统中的定价和容量决策，称为LiQUAR（在未知到达率的排队中学习）。LiQUAR专门针对排队系统，通过显式利用工作负载动态和瞬态行为，允许其直接从到达和服务数据中学习，而无需事先了解需求函数或服务时间分布。为排队系统设计在线学习算法面临独特挑战：数据在时间上是相关的，系统动态因政策更新而被扰动，且性能对拥堵高度敏感。LiQUAR通过考虑排队特点的算法设计和分析来应对这些挑战，建立了捕捉交通强度影响的遗憾界限，并展示了在重载系统中相较于PTO和基于梯度的强化学习方法的优越性能。

title: Frontiers in Operations: Show-Up Profiles for Scheduled Services: Estimation and Applications
abstract: Problem definition: Motivated by passenger arrivals at the security checkpoint of the Raleigh-Durham International Airport, we develop methods to study arrivals to a system in which they are tied to scheduled events, such as flights. A key concept for modeling arrivals in such systems is the “show-up profile,” a probability distribution describing how far in advance passengers arrive for their flights. These profiles can be combined based on a known flight schedule to yield an aggregate passenger arrival forecast. Existing industry practice and academic work estimate show-up profiles using surveys or other data that are typically not available to U.S. airports. This motivates our study of an easy to implement and dynamic method for estimating show-up profiles. Methodology/results: We introduce an innovative solution for estimating show-up profiles using infrared-beam people-counting sensors and a structural estimation approach that does not require a mapping of passengers to flights. A direct maximum likelihood approach is intractable, but we propose a tractable approximation and prove that it yields consistent estimates of the underlying show-up profile parameters. Our approach produces forecasting results comparable to pure machine learning methods, yields significantly improved adaptive forecasts when combined with machine learning methods, and reveals empirical insights about passenger behavior variations across different times of day and flight destinations. Managerial implications: Our work presents a novel application of Internet of Things technology to service operations with incomplete data and demonstrates the value of integrating known operational structure with black box forecasting approaches. Show-up profiles are used at airports for decision making, for example, for crowd management, and our methodology has the potential to drive significant improvements in airport operations. The methods we develop can be readily applied at U.S. airports and other transportation hubs, and they can be adapted to other event-driven service environments such as theaters, healthcare facilities, and museums. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Funding: This work was supported by the 2021 Triangle Impact Challenge. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1575 .
title_cn: 运作前沿：预定服务的到达特征：估计与应用
abstract_cn: 问题定义：受到罗利-达勒姆国际机场安检口旅客到达情况的启发，我们开发了研究与定期事件（如航班）相关的系统到达的方法。建模此类系统中到达的关键概念是“到达模式”，即描述旅客提前多久到达航班的概率分布。这些模式可以根据已知的航班时间表进行组合，以产生总体的旅客到达预测。现有的行业实践和学术研究通常通过调查或其他通常不为美国机场所拥有的数据来估计到达模式。这促使我们研究一种易于实施且动态的估计到达模式的方法。 方法论/结果：我们提出了一种创新的解决方案，用于利用红外线计数传感器和一种不需要将旅客映射到航班的结构估计方法来估计到达模式。直接的最大似然方法是不可行的，但我们提出了一种可行的近似方法，并证明它可以提供潜在的到达模式参数的一致估计。我们的方法产生的预测结果与纯机学习方法相当，在与机学习方法结合时显著改善了自适应预测，并揭示了旅客在不同时间和航班目的地之间的行为变化的实证见解。 管理意义：我们的工作展示了物联网技术在数据不完全的服务运营中的一种新颖应用，并证明了将已知的操作结构与黑箱预测方法相结合的价值。到达模式在机场用于决策，例如进行人群管理，我们的方法有潜力推动机场运营的显著改善。我们开发的方法可以在美国机场和其他交通枢纽中迅速应用，并且可以适应其他事件驱动的服务环境，如剧院、医疗机构和博物馆。 历史：本文已被《制造与服务运营管理》前沿运营研究倡议接受。 资助：本研究得到了2021年三角洲影响挑战的支持。 附加材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1575 中获取。

title: Product Information Display Optimization with Quality Uncertainty and Returns
abstract: Problem definition: Display quality refers to product information such as the images and textual descriptions of product quality presented to consumers shopping online and can directly influence market demand during the sales phase and returns during the postsales phase. In this paper, we investigate the optimization problem on assortment planning, display quality, and pricing, taking into account the actual quality uncertainty and consumer returns. Methodology/results: We employ the widely used multinomial logit (MNL) model to investigate the impact of display quality on consumer choices. In particular, we incorporate display quality into the utility function regarding consumers’ purchase and return behavior, which is significantly affected by display quality. We then conduct a joint optimization analysis on assortment planning, display quality, and pricing; characterize the optimal policy; and propose an efficient method to find the optimal offer set that includes all the products with positive conservative adjusted keep rates. Moreover, we investigate the estimation problem and conduct a comprehensive empirical validation with real data. Our results reveal that model misspecification and optimization on display quality could result in substantial losses. Managerial implications: Because of its high impact on both consumer choices and returns, display quality alters the structure of the optimal pricing and assortment decisions. We demonstrate the robustness of our optimal policy in various scenarios, including continuous optimization, consumer reviews, alternative return modeling, heterogeneous consumer markets, and discrete optimization, under both exogenous and endogenous pricing policies. In addition, we investigate return policy design and the impact with display quality considerations. Funding: X. Yan was supported in part by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72571256]. Y. Yu was supported in part by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72091215/72091210 and 72188101]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1147 .
title_cn: 产品信息展示优化：考虑质量不确定性与退货因素
abstract_cn: 问题定义：展示质量指的是在线购物时向消费者呈现的产品信息，如产品质量的图像和文本描述，直接影响销售阶段的市场需求和售后阶段的退货。在本文中，我们研究了在考虑实际质量不确定性和消费者退货的情况下，关于产品组合规划、展示质量和定价的优化问题。方法论/结果：我们采用广泛使用的多项式逻辑回归（MNL）模型来研究展示质量对消费者选择的影响。特别地，我们将展示质量纳入消费者购买和退货行为的效用函数中，而这一行为显著受到展示质量的影响。随后，我们对产品组合规划、展示质量和定价进行了联合优化分析；描述了最优政策；并提出了一种有效的方法来找到包含所有正向保留率的产品的最优报价集。此外，我们还研究了估计问题，并使用真实数据进行了全面的实证验证。我们的结果表明，模型误设和展示质量的优化可能导致显著损失。管理启示：由于展示质量对消费者选择和退货的重大影响，它改变了最优定价和产品组合决策的结构。我们展示了在各种情境下，包括连续优化、消费者评价、替代退货建模、异质消费者市场和离散优化下，最优政策的稳健性，适用于外生和内生定价政策。此外，我们还研究了退货政策设计及其在考虑展示质量时的影响。资助：X. Yan 部分得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号 72571256]。Y. Yu 部分得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号 72091215/72091210 和 72188101]。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1147 获取。

title: Order Ahead for Pickup: Promise or Peril?
abstract: Problem definition: Mobile technologies have increasingly enabled remote customers to order ahead at quick-service restaurants. As customers travel to the service facility to pick up their orders, their orders also advance in the food preparation queue. It is widely believed that the ability to order ahead reduces customers’ total delay and, therefore, allows restaurants to attract more orders and achieve higher throughput than if customers must order onsite. Methodology/results: We build a queueing game–theoretic model to study a mixed ordering scheme in which some customers order ahead and some order on-site. Our analysis shows that the common practice of accepting all orders as they come in and requiring all orders to be irrevocable can cause a mixed ordering scheme to surprisingly achieve lower throughput than an on-site–only ordering scheme. The throughput shortfall can persist even when the service provider freely chooses whether to share queue-length information with remote customers. However, if remote customers who order ahead are allowed to cancel unprepared orders when they arrive at the service facility, then such a mixed ordering scheme with cancellation achieves higher throughput than the on-site–only ordering scheme even though it does not uniformly dominate the original mixed ordering scheme (without cancellations). We then study a capped ordering scheme in which the service provider stops accepting new remote orders if the number of outstanding orders reaches a certain threshold. When the service provider optimally sets the cap, the mixed–capped ordering scheme outperforms both the mixed ordering scheme without capping and the on-site–only ordering scheme in throughput but not necessarily the cancellation scheme. Finally, we propose an optimal mechanism in which the service provider determines both the capping and cancellation thresholds subject to customers’ individual rationality constraints. Managerial implications: Our paper highlights the unintended consequences of ordering ahead and provides prescriptive guidance for managing such a service system. Funding: The work of K. Sun was supported by the Beijing Natural Science Foundation, China [Grant 9244031]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0865 .
title_cn: 提前下单自取：承诺还是危险？
abstract_cn: 问题定义：移动技术日益使远程客户能够在快餐店提前下单。当客户前往服务设施取餐时，他们的订单也会在食品准备队列中提前处理。人们普遍认为，提前下单的能力可以减少客户的总延迟，因此使餐厅能够吸引更多订单，并实现比客户现场下单时更高的吞吐量。方法论/结果：我们建立了一个排队博弈理论模型，以研究一种混合下单方案，其中部分客户提前下单，部分客户现场下单。我们的分析表明，接受所有订单并要求所有订单不可撤销的常见做法，可能导致混合下单方案的吞吐量意外低于仅现场下单方案。即使服务提供者自由选择是否与远程客户共享队列长度信息，这种吞吐量不足的情况仍然会持续。然而，如果允许提前下单的远程客户在到达服务设施时取消未准备的订单，那么这种允许取消的混合下单方案的吞吐量将高于仅现场下单方案，尽管它并不总是优于原始的混合下单方案（不允许取消）。随后，我们研究了一种限额下单方案，其中服务提供者在未完成订单数量达到一定阈值时停止接受新的远程订单。当服务提供者最优设置限额时，混合限额下单方案的吞吐量优于不设限的混合下单方案和仅现场下单方案，但不一定优于取消方案。最后，我们提出了一种最优机制，其中服务提供者根据客户的个体理性约束来确定限额和取消阈值。管理启示：我们的论文强调了提前下单的意外后果，并为管理这种服务系统提供了指导建议。资助：K. Sun的研究得到了中国北京市自然科学基金的支持 [资助编号 9244031]。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0865 获取。

title: Frontiers in Operations: Operational Overload: The Impact of Workload on High-Skilled Workforce Attrition
abstract: Problem definition: Worker attrition is critical and costly, disrupting operations across industries and leading to significant productivity losses. In healthcare, nurse attrition poses even greater challenges, which are exacerbated by persistent shortages and increasing burnout. Despite its importance, nurse attrition remains underexplored in operations management (OM) literature, particularly concerning how different workload dimensions influence voluntary attrition. This study aims to address this gap by investigating how various workload dimensions, including nurse responsibility, overtime shift, emotional toll, and cumulative workload, affect voluntary attrition among ICU nurses. Methodology/results: Utilizing high-resolution data from a large U.S. hospital system, we analyze 26 months of operational, clinical, and HR records, capturing nurses’ dimensions of workload leading up to voluntary attrition decisions. Our findings reveal a nuanced relationship; whereas greater nurse responsibility during a shift reduces the likelihood of voluntary attrition, cumulative workload over time shows a U-shaped relationship with the likelihood of voluntary attrition. Additionally, both the emotional fatigue from handling patient death events and the burnout from attending overtime shifts heighten the likelihood of voluntary attrition. One more incident of emotional fatigue increases the odds of voluntary attrition by 54.3%. One more overtime shift increases the odds of voluntary attrition by 58.5%. However, supportive coworkers can help mitigate some negative effects, highlighting the importance of collaborative environments. Managerial implications: This research makes several contributions. First, we estimate the distinct effects of workload dimensions on voluntary attrition. Second, we demonstrate how supportive coworkers act as a buffer against burnout-induced attrition. Finally, we offer actionable strategies for managers to enhance workforce retention: monitoring workloads to prevent fatigue-driven attrition, implementing flexible scheduling to allow recovery, and fostering peer support systems. By addressing a critical issue in high-stakes environments like healthcare, this study enriches OM literature and provides practical insights for organizations seeking to retain talent in knowledge-intensive fields. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0037 .
title_cn: 运营前沿：操作过载：工作负荷对高技能劳动力流失的影响
abstract_cn:
问题定义：员工流失是一个关键且昂贵的问题，它扰乱了各行业的运营，并导致了显著的生产力损失。在医疗行业中，护士流失带来了更大的挑战，这些挑战因持续的短缺和日益增长的职业倦怠而加剧。尽管护士流失的重要性不容忽视，但在运营管理（OM）文献中，这一问题仍未得到充分探讨，特别是在不同工作负荷维度如何影响自愿流失方面。本研究旨在填补这一空白，调查包括护士责任、加班、情感负担和累积工作负荷等各个工作负荷维度如何影响重症监护病房（ICU）护士的自愿流失。

方法/结果：我们利用来自美国某大型医院系统的高分辨率数据，分析了26个月的运营、临床和人力资源记录，捕捉护士在自愿流失决策前的工作负荷维度。我们的研究结果揭示了一个微妙的关系；在一个班次中增加护士责任会降低自愿流失的可能性，而随着时间的推移，累积工作负荷与自愿流失的可能性呈现出U型关系。此外，处理患者死亡事件所导致的情感疲惫以及因加班造成的倦怠都会增加自愿流失的可能性。情感疲惫再增加一次将使自愿流失的几率增加54.3%。再增加一次加班将使自愿流失的几率增加58.5%。然而，支持性的同事可以帮助缓解一些负面影响，这突显了协作环境的重要性。

管理意义：本研究作出了几项重要贡献。首先，我们评估了工作负荷维度对自愿流失的独特影响。其次，我们展示了支持性同事如何作为缓冲，抵御因倦怠而导致的流失。最后，我们为管理者提供了提高员工留存率的可行策略：监测工作负荷以防止因疲劳驱动的流失，实施灵活排班以允许恢复，以及培养同伴支持系统。通过解决医疗等高风险环境中的关键问题，本研究丰富了运营管理文献，并为寻求留住知识密集型领域人才的组织提供了实践性的见解。

历史：本文已被《制造与服务运营管理》前沿运营倡议接受。补充材料：在线附录可在以下网址获得：https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0037。

title: A Behavioral Study of Assortment Planning
abstract: Problem definition: We investigate the performance of human decision makers selecting which products to offer in a retail category, also known as assortment planning. In theory, this task requires the understanding of product interaction effects, such as cannibalization and inventory pooling benefits, and it involves solving a complex mathematical problem with stochastic and combinatorial components. Despite its practical importance, assortment planning is often performed by managers without any decision support system. In the academic literature, there have been no systematic studies of assortment planners’ behavior. Methodology/results: We develop a computer simulation of a market environment and conduct a behavioral experiment where subjects act as assortment planners. We analyze subjects’ decisions in different treatments by varying the decision support systems provided to them, the number of possible products to offer, the size of the expected-profit-maximizing assortment, and the default assortment. We observe systematic patterns in the subjects’ decisions; their variety choices appear to anchor at a value equal to half the size of the choice set (mean-anchoring bias) and to the size of the default assortment (status quo bias). Finally, we document some interesting effects of decision support information; its impact on performance appears to depend on how easily it can be interpreted. Managerial implications: Retailers should recognize that the size of the choice set influences the chosen assortment, leading to excessive variety when large and insufficient variety when small relative to optimal variety. Funding: This work was supported by the Naveen Jindal School of Management at the University of Texas at Dallas. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2020.0256 .
title_cn: 一种关于选择计划的行为研究
abstract_cn: 问题定义：我们研究人类决策者在零售类目中选择提供哪些产品的表现，这也被称为品类规划。理论上，这一任务需要理解产品之间的互动效应，例如自我竞争和库存共享的好处，并涉及解决一个包含随机和组合成分的复杂数学问题。尽管这一任务在实践中至关重要，但品类规划通常由管理者在没有任何决策支持系统的情况下进行。在学术文献中，尚未对品类规划者的行为进行系统的研究。 方法论/结果：我们开发了一个市场环境的计算机模拟，并进行了一项行为实验，让参与者作为品类规划者。我们通过变化提供给他们的决策支持系统、可选择的产品数量、期望利润最大化的品类规模以及默认品类的大小，分析参与者在不同处理条件下的决策。我们观察到参与者决策中的系统模式；他们的多样性选择似乎以选择集大小的一半（均值锚定偏差）和默认品类的大小（现状偏差）为锚点。最后，我们记录了一些决策支持信息的有趣效果；其对绩效的影响似乎取决于信息的可解释性。 管理启示：零售商应该意识到，选择集的大小会影响所选品类的形成，当选择集较大时会导致多样性过剩，而当较小且低于最佳多样性时则会导致多样性不足。 资助：本研究得到了德克萨斯大学达拉斯分校纳韦恩·金达尔管理学院的支持。 附件材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2020.0256 获得。

title: From Shield to Sword: How Data Privacy Can Undermine Data Security
abstract: What is the point in hacking computer systems when organizations voluntarily disclose personal data to anyone who asks convincingly? We show that the European GDPR is paradoxically exploitable for identity theft despite being designed to protect personal data. Subject access requests (SARs) according to its “right of access” (Article 15) can be weaponized by impersonating a victim and submitting fraudulent SARs in their name. We task attackers with stealing the personal data of three volunteers (highly privacy aware person, average user, and semipublic figure) in a real-world setting. These attacks could be replicated by just about anyone. Yet, they obtained sensitive personal data, including addresses, phone numbers, national ID and bank account information, and insurance data. Based on 718 submitted SARs and 21 interviews with data protection officers, we tell a frightening, yet fascinating story of how these identity thefts unfold, expose flaws in how organizations process SARs, and uncover a systemic weakness in the GDPR. We analyze the underlying factors enabling such attacks, assess their real-world impact, and explore mitigation options for individuals, organizations, and lawmakers. Our insights have important implications for how data privacy and data security interrelate and how we manage and regulate them.
title_cn: 从保护盾到利剑：数据隐私如何削弱数据安全
abstract_cn: 当组织自愿向任何可信请求者披露个人数据时，黑客入侵计算机系统有什么意义呢？我们展示了尽管欧洲通用数据保护条例（GDPR）旨在保护个人数据，但却在悖论中被利用于身份盗窃。根据其“访问权”（第15条）的信息请求（SAR），攻击者可以通过冒充受害者并以其名义提交欺诈性的SAR来武器化此权利。我们任务攻击者在现实环境中盗取三位志愿者的个人数据（高度关注隐私的人、普通用户和半公众人物）。这些攻击几乎可以被任何人复制。然而，他们获得了敏感的个人数据，包括地址、电话号码、国家身份证和银行账户信息以及保险数据。基于718份提交的SAR和21次与数据保护官的访谈，我们讲述了一则惊人而引人入胜的故事，揭示了这些身份盗窃是如何展开的，暴露了组织处理SAR的缺陷，并揭示了GDPR中的系统性漏洞。我们分析了使这种攻击得以实施的潜在因素，评估其在现实世界中的影响，并探讨个人、组织和立法者的缓解选项。我们的见解对数据隐私和数据安全的相互关系，以及我们如何管理和监管它们，具有重要意义。

title: Collision in the boardroom: Director skill <scp>interdependence</scp> and corporate entrepreneurship in technology‐intensive firms
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Board human capital theory posits that directors' skills shape firm behavior. Most studies, however, examine one skill type at a time, assuming that each director contributes independently of the other skills represented on the board. We introduce the concept of director skill interdependence , theorizing that a director's influence depends on the skills of fellow directors and their committee assignments. Focusing on entrepreneurial directors in technology‐intensive firms, we find that they increase resource allocation toward corporate entrepreneurship (CE); however, this effect diminishes as the number of finance‐skilled directors increases, whether on the board or on its corporate development committee. These findings challenge the view of directors' skills as isolated inputs. Instead, the effects of directors' skills are contingent on the board's skill composition and committee structure. Managerial Summary In technology‐intensive firms, directors with entrepreneurial skills are often expected to stimulate corporate entrepreneurship (CE). Our findings suggest this relationship is less straightforward. While entrepreneurial directors do increase investment in CE, their impact weakens when directors with finance skills are prevalent on the board or its corporate development committee. These results underscore the importance of director skill interdependence —the idea that a director's influence depends on the skills and roles of fellow directors. Boards should therefore consider not only who is appointed, but also how directors' skills align with one another and how those skills are deployed through committee assignments. Preventing the dominance of conflicting skill sets may enhance the board's ability to support innovation, venturing, and long‐term strategic renewal.
title_cn: 董事会中的冲突：董事技能的相互依赖与技术密集型企业中的企业家精神
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 董事人力资本理论认为，董事的技能会影响公司的行为。然而，大多数研究通常一次只考察一种技能类型，假设每位董事的贡献是独立于董事会中其他技能的。我们引入了董事技能相互依赖的概念，理论化地认为，董事的影响力取决于其他董事的技能及其委员会分配。我们关注技术密集型企业中的创业董事，发现他们会增加对企业创业（CE）的资源配置；然而，随着财务技能董事数量的增加，无论是在董事会还是在企业发展委员会中，这一影响会减弱。这些发现挑战了将董事技能视为孤立输入的观点。相反，董事技能的影响依赖于董事会的技能构成和委员会结构。 管理总结 在技术密集型企业中，具备创业技能的董事通常被期望能够刺激企业创业（CE）。我们的研究结果表明，这一关系并不简单。虽然创业董事确实增加了对CE的投资，但当董事会或其企业发展委员会中财务技能董事占主导时，他们的影响力会减弱。这些结果强调了董事技能相互依赖的重要性——即董事的影响力取决于其他董事的技能和角色。因此，董事会在考虑任命时，不仅要关注谁被任命，还要考虑董事的技能如何相互协调，以及这些技能如何通过委员会分配进行运用。防止冲突技能的主导地位可能增强董事会支持创新、创业和长期战略更新的能力。

title: Knowing Enough to Be Dangerous: The Problem of “Artificial Certainty” for Expert Authority When Using AI for Decision Making and Planning
abstract: This study examines how experts who use advanced artificial intelligence (AI) technologies that generate highly detailed and realistic representations can create what we term “artificial certainty,” which we define as the illusion that complex future outcomes are definitively knowable, even though they are inherently uncertain. Through a comparative study of two urban planning organizations using the same AI simulation tool, we show how this artificial certainty emerges from the ways process experts create and deploy AI-generated representations. The findings reveal three interconnected representational practices that shape how laypeople perceive the certainty of a representation: controlling the level of detail, shaping stakeholder engagement, and constructing the model’s meaning. We find that when process experts emphasize enhancement—amplifying technological capabilities within these practices—stakeholders mistake representations for reality, undermining expert authority. Conversely, when process experts engage in modulation—tempering how AI outputs are presented and integrated into decision making—they preserve the authority necessary to keep uncertainty alive. These findings reconceptualize process expertise as a distinct form of interpretive work that helps maintain useful levels of uncertainty in the face of growing pressures toward artificial certainty. Based on these insights, we develop a critical distinction between representations of the future versus representations for the future, offering new ways to theorize decision making under uncertainty as organizations increasingly deploy sophisticated AI systems. Funding: This work was supported by the National Science Foundation [Grants SES-1057148 and SES-2051896].
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 了解足够以致危险：在使用人工智能进行决策和规划时，“人工确定性”对专家权威的问题
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了使用先进人工智能（AI）技术的专家是如何创造我们所称之为“人工确定性”的现象的。我们将其定义为这样一种错觉：复杂的未来结果是可以明确知道的，即便它们本质上是不可预测的。通过对两家城市规划组织使用相同AI仿真工具的比较研究，我们展示了这种人工确定性如何从过程专家创造和部署AI生成表示的方式中产生。研究结果揭示了三种相互关联的表现实践，这些实践塑造了普通人对表现确定性的感知：控制细节水平、塑造利益相关者参与以及构建模型的意义。我们发现，当过程专家强调增强——在这些实践中放大技术能力时，利益相关者往往会误将表现视为现实，从而削弱了专家的权威。相反，当过程专家进行调适——谨慎调整AI输出的呈现方式以及在决策中整合这些输出时，他们能够保持必要的权威，以持有不确定性。这些发现重新概念化了过程专业知识，作为一种独特的解释性工作，帮助在日益迫在眉睫的人工确定性压力下，维持有用的不确定性水平。基于这些见解，我们提出了未来的表现与面向未来的表现之间的一个关键区分，为在组织越来越多地部署复杂AI系统的情况下，理论化不确定性下的决策提供了新思路。资助：本研究得到了国家科学基金会的支持【资助号SES-1057148和SES-2051896】。

title: Qualitative Research on Incumbents’ Responses to Discontinuous Technologies: Distilling an Integrative Framework of Context
abstract: Scholars have long and effectively used qualitative-inductive methodologies to understand the heterogeneous responses of established organizations—so-called incumbents—to emerging discontinuous technologies. However, after nearly 30 years of nuanced, contextualized qualitative research in this area, there is a unique opportunity—and essentially a need—for its distillation, integration, and critical reflection. In particular, while qualitative studies on heterogeneous incumbent responses aspire to develop “theories of the middle range,” and, thus, to acknowledge boundary conditions and contextual nuances, in practice, they rarely discuss a given theory’s range systematically. This disconnect limits the comparability, generalizability, and integration of findings. To address this instability, we inductively and critically review 127 qualitative studies on incumbents’ responses to discontinuous technologies published between 1998 and 2024. The central outcome of our review is an integrative framework of core contextual dimensions of incumbent responses to emerging discontinuous technologies, organized along six attributes related to the overarching domains of technology, market, and organization and institutions. Our distilled framework provides a taxonomic map for systematically comparing different empirical contexts of incumbent adaptation to discontinuous technologies and critically considering the boundary conditions of qualitatively induced theorizing in this regard. Our framework also enables us to present an encompassing program for future qualitative research on incumbent heterogeneity, one of the core phenomena underlying the overall process of creative destruction.
title_cn: 对现有企业对非连续性技术反应的定性研究：提炼一个综合的背景框架
abstract_cn: 学者们长期以来有效地使用定性-归纳的方法论来理解既有组织（即所谓的 incumbents）对新兴不连续技术的异质性反应。然而，在这个领域经过近30年的细致和背景化的定性研究后，存在着独特的机会——其实质上也是一种需求——对这些研究进行提炼、整合和批判性反思。特别是，尽管关于异质性 incumbents 反应的定性研究旨在发展“中介理论”，并因此承认边界条件和情境细微差别，但在实践中，它们很少系统性地讨论某一理论的适用范围。这一脱节限制了研究结果的可比性、普遍性和整合性。为了应对这一不稳定性，我们对1998年至2024年间关于 incumbents 对不连续技术反应的127项定性研究进行了归纳和批判性回顾。我们回顾的主要结果是一个关于既有组织对新兴不连续技术反应的核心情境维度的整合框架，该框架围绕技术、市场、组织和制度等六个属性进行组织。我们提炼出的框架为系统比较既有组织对不连续技术适应的不同实证情境提供了一个分类地图，并批判性地考虑了在这方面定性理论构建的边界条件。我们的框架还使我们能够提出一个全面的未来定性研究计划，关于 incumbents 的异质性，这是整体创造性破坏过程中的核心现象之一。

title: The Need for Fees at a DEX: How Increases in Fees Can Increase DEX Trading Volume
abstract: We model endogenous trading and liquidity provision at a decentralized exchange (DEX) and demonstrate that increasing DEX trading fees can increase DEX trading volume. DEXs employ a mechanical pricing rule whereby price impacts decrease with inventory that DEXs acquire by offering fee revenues to investors. Consequently, higher DEX fees can incentivize higher inventory, thereby reducing price impacts. Moreover, the reduction of price impact can offset the increase in fees so that the marginal cost of DEX trading declines despite charging a higher trading fee. In turn, lower DEX marginal trading costs lead to an increase in DEX trading volume. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance.
title_cn: 去中心化交易所中的费用需求：费用增加如何促进去中心化交易所的交易量
abstract_cn: 我们对去中心化交易所（DEX）的内生交易和流动性提供进行了建模，并证明增加DEX交易费用可以提高DEX交易量。DEX采用一种机械定价规则，即价格影响随着DEX通过向投资者提供手续费收入所获得的库存而减少。因此，更高的DEX费用可以激励更高的库存，从而减少价格影响。此外，价格影响的降低可以抵消费用的增加，使得尽管收取更高的交易费用，但DEX交易的边际成本仍然下降。反过来，较低的DEX边际交易成本促进了DEX交易量的增加。该论文已被阿戈斯蒂诺·卡波尼（Agostino Capponi）接受，涉及金融领域。

title: Survey of Data-driven Newsvendor: Unified Analysis and Spectrum of Achievable Regrets
abstract: Unifying the Regret Spectrum in Data-Driven Newsvendor The data-driven newsvendor problem seeks to optimize inventory decisions using samples from an unknown demand distribution. Although this problem has attracted significant attention, previous studies have typically analyzed specific distribution classes or regret definitions in isolation. In “Survey of the Data-Driven Newsvendor Problem: Unified Analysis and Spectrum of Achievable Regrets,” Chen and Ma present a unified analysis that synthesizes these settings and simplifies existing proofs. The study utilizes a notion of clustered distributions defined via the cumulative distribution function (CDF). This approach demonstrates that the achievable regret covers the entire spectrum of convergence rates between $1/\sqrt{n}$ and $1/n$. Beyond the theoretical unification, the authors show through simulations that this CDF-based notion accurately predicts the empirical regret and captures how the difficulty of the problem evolves with sample size. This work provides insights into understanding the value of data in the newsvendor problem and, more broadly, decision making under uncertainty.
title_cn: 数据驱动新闻贩子的调研：统一分析及可实现的遗憾范围
abstract_cn: 统一数据驱动的新型销售商的遗憾谱 数据驱动的新型销售商问题旨在利用未知需求分布的样本来优化库存决策。尽管这一问题引起了广泛关注，但以往研究通常孤立地分析特定的分布类别或遗憾定义。在“数据驱动的新型销售商问题调查：统一分析与可实现遗憾的谱”一文中，陈和马提出了一种统一分析方法，将这些设置进行了综合，并简化了现有的证明。该研究利用通过累积分布函数（CDF）定义的聚类分布的概念。该方法表明，所能实现的遗憾涵盖了从$1/\sqrt{n}$到$1/n$的整个收敛速率谱。除了理论上的统一，作者还通过模拟展示了基于CDF的概念准确预测了经验遗憾，并捕捉了问题的难度如何随着样本大小的发展。该工作为理解数据在新型销售商问题中的价值以及更广泛的不确定性决策提供了深刻的见解。

title: Knowledge Bridging: How Acquirers Leverage the Knowledge of Their Targets’ Prior Alliance Partners
abstract: Extensive research has examined how firms rely on alliances and acquisitions for sourcing technological knowledge, but we do not know whether acquirers can benefit from the technological knowledge of their targets’ pre-acquisition alliance partners. This study demonstrates that acquirers leverage relational assets inherited from their targets to access knowledge from the targets’ prior partners—knowledge that the target itself did not absorb during the alliance, including knowledge developed by the partner post-alliance. We term this form of knowledge absorption “knowledge bridging.” We reveal that knowledge bridging enables acquirers to more effectively absorb knowledge from their targets’ prior partners, compared to similar firms without prior alliances with the target. Knowledge bridging intensifies with the target’s previous knowledge absorption from its partners. Yet, this effect is weakened by the relatedness between the knowledge bases and business domains of the acquirer and the target’s partners and strengthened by the target’s post-acquisition autonomy.
title_cn: 知识桥接：收购方如何利用其目标公司之前联盟合作伙伴的知识
abstract_cn: 大量研究探讨了企业如何依赖联盟和收购来获取技术知识，但我们尚不清楚收购方是否能够从目标公司收购前的联盟伙伴那里受益于技术知识。本研究表明，收购方利用从目标公司继承的关系资产，以获取目标公司之前合作伙伴的知识——这些知识是目标公司在联盟期间未能吸收的，包括合作伙伴在联盟后开发的知识。我们将这种知识吸收形式称为“知识桥接”。研究揭示，知识桥接使收购方能够比没有与目标公司建立过联盟的类似企业更有效地吸收来自目标公司之前合作伙伴的知识。知识桥接随着目标公司从其合作伙伴的先前知识吸收而加剧。然而，这一效应会因收购方与目标公司合作伙伴之间知识基础和业务领域的相关性而减弱，同时因目标公司在收购后的自主性而增强。

title: Technological diversification and the growth of regions in the short and long run
abstract: Technological diversification is crucial for regions to foster innovation and, therefore, to support economic growth. In this paper, we study how different types of technological diversification affect the performance of regional economies. We focus on the effect of changes in technological relatedness and unconventionality – as indicators of related and unrelated diversification – on GDP and employment growth in European regions. Leveraging information on regional economic performances and patents filed at the European Patent Office, we estimate Panel Vector Autoregression models and generate Impulse Response Functions to assess to what extent and with what persistence relatedness and unconventionality affect regional economic performances. Our findings, which have implications for the design of new place-based innovation policies, reveal that increases in technological relatedness have a short-term positive effect on employment growth but a negative effect on GDP growth. Conversely, increases in technological unconventionality have a higher and long-lasting positive impact on GDP growth but no effect on employment growth. • Technological capabilities are essential in building regional competitive advantage. • Regions should combine different forms of regional technological diversification. • These forms have heterogeneous effects on regional economic performance. • Technological Relatedness has a short-term positive effect on Employment growth. • Technological Unconventionality has a long-term positive effect on GDP growth.
title_cn: 技术多样化与地区短期和长期增长
abstract_cn:
技术多样化对地区推动创新和支持经济增长至关重要。本文研究了不同类型的技术多样化如何影响区域经济的表现。我们重点关注技术相关性和非传统性变化对欧洲地区GDP和就业增长的影响，作为相关多样化和无关多样化的指标。利用关于地区经济表现和在欧洲专利局申请的专利的信息，我们估计了面板向量自回归模型，并生成脉冲响应函数，以评估相关性和非传统性在多大程度上及持续多久地影响区域经济表现。我们的研究结果对新型基于地域的创新政策的设计具有重要启示，表明技术相关性的增加在短期内对就业增长产生积极影响，但对GDP增长产生负面影响。相反，技术非传统性的增加对GDP增长产生更高且持久的积极影响，但对就业增长没有影响。

- 技术能力对于建立区域竞争优势至关重要。
- 各地区应结合不同形式的区域技术多样化。
- 这些形式对区域经济表现的影响存在异质性。
- 技术相关性对就业增长具有短期积极影响。
- 技术非传统性对GDP增长具有长期积极影响。

title: Acquirer Strategic Orientations, Integration Decisions, and Performance
abstract: Abstract Integration decisions are not isolated, as they are embedded in an organizational context. Using a multi‐country sample (Nordics, German speaking Europe, and China) of small‐ and medium‐sized acquirers, we explore the influence of firm strategic orientations on how managers conceptualize acquisitions, make integration decisions, and impact acquisition performance. Both market‐ and entrepreneurial‐oriented firms coordinate activities following an acquisition, but they do so differently. Entrepreneurial‐oriented acquirers use human integration to align target managers with common goals and reinforce their decision‐making autonomy. In contrast, market‐oriented acquirers strive for functional integration and use human integration to reduce target firm managers' decision‐making autonomy. Thus, achieving coordination after an acquisition can follow different paths that are closely aligned with the strategic orientation of the acquirer. In other words, different strategic orientations guide managers' decisions, resulting in different paths to acquisition success.
title_cn: 收购方的战略导向、整合决策与绩效
abstract_cn: 摘要 整合决策并非孤立存在，而是嵌入在组织背景中。通过对小型和中型收购方在北欧、德语区和中国的跨国样本进行研究，我们探讨了企业战略导向对管理者如何概念化收购、作出整合决策及其对收购绩效影响的作用。无论是市场导向还是创业导向的公司，在收购后都协调活动，但其方式各异。创业导向的收购方通过人力整合使目标公司的管理者与共同目标保持一致，并增强他们的决策自主权。相反，市场导向的收购方则追求功能整合，并利用人力整合来降低目标公司管理者的决策自主权。因此，在收购后的协调过程中，可能会有不同的路径，这些路径与收购方的战略导向紧密相关。换句话说，不同的战略导向引导管理者的决策，从而导致收购成功的路径各异。

title: The Double-Edged Sword of Entrepreneurial Orientation: Product Recalls and the Role of COO Power
abstract: This study examines how entrepreneurial orientation (EO) influences firms’ likelihood of product recalls. Integrating EO and upper echelons theory, we first argue that EO’s bold, variance-enhancing actions increase a firm’s product recall risk by diverting managerial attention away from quality control. Using 23 years of data on U.S. public firms, we find that EO increases recall likelihood. Second, we argue that this relationship is moderated by chief operating officer (COO) power, and the effectiveness of COO power is contingent on the firm’s product life cycle context. Empirical analyses support our theory and offer new insights about EO’s potential downsides.
title_cn: 企业导向的双刃剑：产品召回与首席运营官权力的作用
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了企业家导向（EO）如何影响企业产品召回的可能性。通过整合企业家导向和高管理论，我们首先论证了EO的大胆、变异增强行为通过转移管理层对质量控制的关注，从而增加了企业的产品召回风险。利用23年美国上市公司的数据，我们发现EO确实增加了召回的可能性。其次，我们认为这一关系受首席运营官（COO）权力的调节，并且COO权力的有效性取决于企业产品生命周期的背景。实证分析支持了我们的理论，并提供了关于EO潜在缺陷的新见解。

title: Mediated Reference Point Shifts: Breaking Free of the Family DNA
abstract: Institutional alignment comprises the integration of sanctioned organizational models and standardized managerial roles, thus reconstructing traditional organizations as contemporary actors with homogenous global identities. We adopt this perspective to illuminate the processes by which a business family homogenizes to conform to the global world order, through extensive use of advisors and management consultants. To do so, we narrate the experience of a third-generation Israeli-based multinational enterprise. We find that the cumulative adoption of standardized corporate organizational models periodically shifts the family’s decision-making reference points, enabling it to expand its product and geographic scope and act as a global player.
title_cn: 媒介化的参考点转变：摆脱家族遗传的束缚
abstract_cn: 制度对齐包括被认可的组织模型和标准化的管理角色的整合，从而将传统组织重塑为具有同质全球身份的现代参与者。我们采用这一视角来阐明一个商业家族如何通过广泛使用顾问和管理咨询师，实现同质化以符合全球秩序的过程。为此，我们叙述了一个以色列第三代跨国企业的经验。我们发现，标准化企业组织模型的累积采用，周期性地改变了家族的决策参考点，使其能够扩大产品和地理范围，并作为全球参与者发挥作用。

title: Simple and (Approximately) Optimal Mechanism in Efficiency and Equality Tradeoff
abstract: Many large cities have adopted a policy of restricting the number of new vehicle licenses in order to address the challenges of traffic and air pollution problems. An important question that then arises is how to allocate these limited new license quotas among a large set of demanders while taking both social efficiency and equality into consideration. Inspired by this practical problem, we study the problem of designing simple and optimal mechanisms to tradeoff between efficiency and equality in a similar public goods allocation problem. We first propose a truthful two-group mechanism framework that is both general and simple and then use it to compute the optimal solution that maximizes social efficiency while guaranteeing a certain level of equality. Interestingly and surprisingly, under some natural conditions regarding the players’ private values, we show that the optimal mechanisms within the proposed framework are always the mechanisms that first run an auction and then run a lottery (ATL for short). In addition, beyond the framework and those conditions, we prove that the ATL mechanism can always guarantee at least [Formula: see text] ([Formula: see text] is the minimum equality level) of the optimal solution efficiency. This approximation ratio can in practice be further improved to near-optimal when resources are scarce and the natural conditions hold. We further establish a theoretical connection between these natural conditions and common value distributions, demonstrating that these conditions are widely satisfied in practice. Finally, we implement several experiments to verify the ATL mechanism’s optimality and robustness. This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization. Funding: This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72401252, 72192830, 72192832, 62472428, 72192804, 72301235, 72394360 and 72394363]; the Public Computing Cloud, Renmin University of China, the fund for building world-class universities (disciplines) of Renmin University of China; the Beijing Natural Science Foundation [Grant Z220001]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02785 .
title_cn: 效率与平等权衡中的简单且（近似）最优机制
