abstract_cn: 摘要 在供应链中，企业常常意识到其合作伙伴所犯的非法行为，这引发了一个关键问题：那些知道真相的人何时以及为何会成为采取行动的人？通过分析供应链欺诈的行业案例，我们引入了供应链监护的概念，以研究企业如何应对潜在的由合作伙伴所犯的欺诈行为。我们识别了影响供应链监护的关键因素，并将这些见解细化为假设，针对四个行为实验进行了测试（n = 1000）。研究A发现，组织的高层语气能够促进供应链监护，而国家道德脱离与之呈负相关关系。研究B操控了过程道德脱离，发现其降低了监护行为。尽管在行业案例中，供应链监护者的网络地位被认为非常重要，但在实验中我们并没有发现显著的影响。我们在研究C和D中复制并验证了这些发现。本研究为供应链中企业间欺诈反应的行为理论提供了初步基础，并为企业如何在宏观、 mesos 和微观层面上提高供应链监护提供了实用见解。

title: A CEO-Driven Process Model of Firm Responsiveness to Secondary Stakeholder Demands: The Roles of CEO Values and Passion
abstract: Secondary stakeholder demands represent increasingly important strategic issues for firms. However, the principal drivers of firm response remain poorly understood. We extend research on firm responsiveness to secondary stakeholders by introducing a new theoretical perspective to detail the cognitive processes through which key CEO attributes—namely, personal values and passion—shape the trajectories of firm responsiveness. We first outline key aspects of secondary stakeholder demands to explain why CEO values and passion are important determinants of a firm’s response to secondary stakeholder demands. We then explain how a CEO’s values and passion influence the process of firm responsiveness. Finally, we extend our arguments to illustrate how values and passion-infused responses may influence social (dis)approval among key organizational stakeholders. By focusing on the cognitive processes of CEOs, we offer novel theoretical contributions to stakeholder theory, strategic leadership research, and the literature on firm social evaluations.
title_cn: 一种由首席执行官驱动的企业对次级利益相关者需求响应的过程模型：首席执行官价值观和热情的作用
abstract_cn: 次要利益相关者的需求日益成为企业战略中的重要议题。然而，企业对这些需求的反应的主要驱动因素仍然未被充分理解。我们通过引入一个新的理论视角，扩展了关于企业对次要利益相关者响应的研究，详细阐述了关键CEO属性——即个人价值观和热情——如何塑造企业响应的轨迹。首先，我们概述了次要利益相关者需求的关键方面，以解释为何CEO的价值观和热情是企业响应次要利益相关者需求的重要决定因素。接着，我们解释了CEO的价值观和热情如何影响企业响应的过程。最后，我们扩展我们的论点，以说明如何融入价值观和热情的响应可能会影响关键组织利益相关者的社会（不）认可。通过关注CEO的认知过程，我们为利益相关者理论、战略领导研究以及企业社会评价文献提供了新的理论贡献。

title: Family socioeconomic status and job search: Pathways to job quality improvement for young adults without college degrees.
abstract: Improving job quality through job transitions is crucial in early adulthood. However, young adults without college degrees, particularly those from lower socioeconomic status (SES) families, can struggle to break out of lower quality jobs. Integrating socioeconomic and psychological perspectives, this research examines how family SES impacts job quality improvement through job search among young adults without college degrees when they transition from one job to another. We develop and test a model that explicates how family SES influences job quality improvement through constraints and resources for job search and self-regulated job search processes. Partnering with a Midwest state government agency, we collected data from young job seekers without college degrees through four longitudinal surveys over 6 months. Our findings revealed that job seekers from lower (vs. higher) SES families faced more basic needs constraints and had fewer college degree holders in their job search networks. These factors, in turn, influenced job seekers' wage increase goals and their job search metacognition. We also found that job seekers with higher wage increase goals achieved larger wage improvement between their previous and new jobs, and those who engaged in more job search metacognition were more likely to secure improvements in benefits, find new jobs with promotion opportunities, and perceive improvements in working conditions. These findings extend the literature on job quality, job search, socioeconomic mobility, and inequality and provide practical implications for multiple stakeholder groups. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 家庭社会经济地位与求职：改善没有大学学位的年轻人就业质量的途径。
abstract_cn: 通过职业转变改善工作质量在早期成年阶段至关重要。然而，特别是来自低社会经济地位（SES）家庭的年轻成人，缺乏大学学位的人往往难以摆脱低质量的工作。结合社会经济和心理学的视角，本研究探讨了家庭SES如何影响未获得大学学位的年轻成人在职业转变时通过求职过程改善工作质量。我们开发并测试了一个模型，阐明家庭SES如何通过对求职的限制与资源以及自我调节的求职过程影响工作质量的改善。我们与中西部某州政府机构合作，通过四次为期6个月的纵向调查收集了来自没有大学学位的年轻求职者的数据。我们的研究发现，相比于来自高SES家庭的求职者，来自低SES家庭的求职者面临更多的基本需求限制，且在他们的求职网络中，有大学学位的人较少。这些因素反过来影响了求职者的工资增长目标和其求职的元认知。我们还发现，设定更高工资增长目标的求职者在之前和新工作之间实现了更大的工资提升，而进行更多求职元认知的求职者更有可能获得福利改善、找到有晋升机会的新工作，并感知工作条件的改善。这些发现扩展了关于工作质量、求职、社会经济流动性和不平等的文献，并为多个利益相关者群体提供了实际意义。 (PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利)。

title: Amicable rivalries and hostile rivalries: Divergent profiles of motivation and unethical conduct.
abstract: Rivalries motivate competitive performance but can also increase unethical intentions. Although extant theorizing treats this moral-motivational trade-off as inevitable, we show that rivalry's effect on unethical intentions depends on the tenor of the rivalry. Colder competitive relationships (hostile rivalries) exhibit the competitive profile documented in the literature: stronger motivation and increased unethical intentions. But warmer competitive relationships (amicable rivalries) involve a different competitive profile: stronger motivation without increased unethical intentions. Study 1 supported the assumption that participants could identify both amicable and hostile rivalries in their lives. These different rivalries evoked different judgments of warmth, but they did not differ in relationship duration, importance, or competitive domain. Study 2 demonstrated that amicable and hostile rivalries involve higher motivation compared to nonrival competition, but only hostile rivalries provoked stronger unethical intentions. This divergence can be partly explained by individuals' relative focus on the outcome of winning versus the process of competing against hostile (relative to amicable) rivals (Studies 2 and 3). Prompting participants to reflect on the value they derive from the process of competing against their hostile rival significantly reduced unethical intentions (Study 3). These findings encourage more nuanced theorizing about rivalry and identify pathways for organizations to leverage the motivational benefits of rivalry without the ethical trade-offs. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 友好的竞争与敌对的竞争：动机与不道德行为的不同特征。
abstract_cn: 竞争心理会激励竞争表现，但也可能增加不道德意图。尽管现有理论将这种道德动机权衡视为不可避免，我们展示了竞争关系对不道德意图的影响取决于竞争关系的性质。冷淡的竞争关系（敌对竞争）展现了文献中所记录的竞争特征：更强的动机和增加的不道德意图。而温暖的竞争关系（友好竞争）则涉及不同的竞争特征：更强的动机而没有增加的不道德意图。研究1支持了参与者能够识别自己生活中的友好与敌对竞争关系的假设。这些不同的竞争关系唤起了对温暖程度的不同判断，但在关系持续时间、重要性或竞争领域上并没有差异。研究2表明，与非竞争对手相比，友好和敌对竞争关系都涉及更高的动机，但只有敌对竞争关系引发了更强的不道德意图。这种差异部分可以通过个体在赢得结果与与敌对（相对于友好）竞争对手竞争的过程之间的相对关注来解释（研究2和3）。促使参与者反思他们从与敌对竞争对手竞争的过程中获得的价值显著减少了不道德意图（研究3）。这些发现鼓励对竞争关系进行更细致的理论探讨，并确立组织在不牺牲伦理底线的情况下，利用竞争关系的动机利益的路径。

title: Sharing is ethicizing: Examining the impact of sharing observed unethical behavior with family members on ethical voice at work.
abstract: "It takes a village" to build an ethical workplace, and employees who witness unethical behavior in the workplace play a crucial role in alerting organizations to wrongdoing and preventing its recurrence. While prior research has primarily focused on personal and intraorganizational factors shaping observer responses to workplace unethical behavior, the potential influence of extraorganizational factors has been largely overlooked. Recognizing that employees often share workplace experiences with close others, such as their family members, we explore how the extent of sharing with family members influences employee responses to observed unethical behavior. Integrating the functional perspective of rumination and social sharing research, we theorize that the extent of sharing with family members increases observer reflective rumination about the unethical behavior and their tendency to engage in ethical voice at work. We found empirical evidence in two critical incident surveys (Studies 1 and 4), an experiment (Study 2), and a cross-lagged panel survey (Study 3). Finally, we discuss the theoretical and practical implications of this research. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 分享即伦理化：探讨与家人分享观察到的不道德行为对工作中伦理表达的影响。
abstract_cn: “建立一个道德的工作场所需要大家共同努力”，目击工作场所的不道德行为的员工在提醒组织不当行为和防止其再次发生方面发挥着至关重要的作用。尽管以往的研究主要集中在个人和内部组织因素如何影响观察者对工作场所不道德行为的反应，但外部组织因素的潜在影响尚未得到充分重视。认识到员工往往会与家人等亲密他人分享工作经历，我们探讨了与家人分享的程度如何影响员工对观察到的不道德行为的反应。结合反思性沉思和社会分享研究的功能视角，我们理论化认为，与家人分享的程度会增加观察者对不道德行为的反思性沉思，并增强他们在工作中表达道德声音的倾向。我们在两项关键事件调查（研究1和研究4）、一项实验（研究2）以及一项跨滞后面板调查（研究3）中发现了实证证据。最后，我们讨论了这项研究的理论和实际意义。

title: What’s your 5 to 9? Antecedents and outcomes of profiles of daily recovery experience trajectories across the evening.
abstract: Every day at work employees are faced with resource depleting demands, necessitating recovery after work to avoid health and well-being detriments. Recovery theory and empirical results suggest that the four main recovery experiences that underlie employee recovery-psychological detachment, relaxation, mastery, and control-can occur concurrently. At the same time, each of these recovery experiences are dynamic and change across the evening. However, previous recovery research has not investigated and empirically examined both notions at the same time. Using a combined person-centered, dynamic approach across two experience sampling studies, we examine daily profiles of trajectories of all four recovery experiences across an entire evening after work. We also examine how daily job demands and resources relate to these profiles, and how profile membership relates to next-day work and well-being outcomes. Results revealed three profiles of recovery experience trajectory combinations that were predicted by job demands and resources. Results also revealed that having psychological detachment, relaxation, and control experiences early and often across the evening results in the most optimal daily recovery process for next-day well-being. This work represents an important stride forward as it is the first to examine how the recovery process unfolds, along with providing practical recommendations for how employees should best recover daily. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 你的5到9是什么？日常恢复体验轨迹在晚上跨越的先前因素和结果。
abstract_cn: 在工作中，员工每天都面临消耗资源的需求，这使得在工作后需要进行恢复，以避免对健康和福祉产生负面影响。恢复理论和实证研究表明，支持员工恢复的四种主要恢复体验——心理脱离、放松、掌控和精通——可以同时发生。同时，这些恢复体验是动态的，随着夜晚的推移而变化。然而，以前的恢复研究并没有同时调查和实证检验这两个概念。通过采用结合个人中心的动态方法，进行两项体验取样研究，我们考察了下班后整个晚上所有四种恢复体验的日常轨迹特征。我们还研究了日常工作需求和资源与这些特征之间的关系，以及特征成员资格与次日工作和福祉结果之间的关系。结果揭示了三种由工作需求和资源预测的恢复体验轨迹组合特征。此外，结果还表明，在晚上早期和频繁获得心理脱离、放松和掌控体验，有助于实现最优的日常恢复过程，从而提升次日的福祉。该研究代表了一个重要的进步，因为它首次考察了恢复过程是如何展开的，并提供了员工日常恢复的实际建议。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）

title: Translating human capital amid varying intentions to stay: An integrative conceptual review of the immigrant employment attainment process.
abstract: Immigrants face a unique challenge in translating their home country human capital to secure employment in their host country's labor market, potentially leading to underemployment. In this integrative conceptual review, we formalize a framework to explain the process of human capital translation for immigrants, specifically laborers and professionals. Synthesizing findings across disciplines, we explicitly model and consider the theoretical role of intended duration of stay, which refers to the amount of time an immigrant desires to stay in their host country. We derive this notion from socioemotional selectivity theory to theorize that an immigrant's intended duration of stay influences proximal social goals central to human capital translation, and in turn, employment speed (i.e., how quickly they attain a job) and quality (i.e., the extent to which the job aligns with their knowledge, skills, and abilities). We contribute to scholarship by (a) enhancing the conceptual accessibility and precision of the "immigrant" construct for future organizational psychology and management scholarship; (b) synthesizing and integrating multidisciplinary literature on the labor and professional immigrants' employment attainment process to advance a foundational framework that explains human capital translation and how underemployment may occur for these immigrants; and (c) generating a future research agenda and delineating practical implications for practitioners. We also develop and showcase a novel approach for using supervised machine learning, unsupervised machine learning, and large language models to conduct high quality, multidisciplinary systematic reviews more efficiently. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 在不同留任意图下的人力资本转化：移民就业获得过程的综合概念评述。
abstract_cn: 移民在将其家乡的人力资本转化为在东道国劳动市场中获得就业方面面临独特挑战，这可能会导致就业不足。在本次综合性概念评审中，我们正式构建了一个框架，以解释移民，特别是劳动者和专业人士的人力资本转化过程。通过综合各学科的研究成果，我们明确地建模并考虑了“预期停留时间”的理论角色，即移民期望在东道国停留的时间。我们从社会情感选择理论中衍生出这一概念，推测移民的预期停留时间影响了与人力资本转化密切相关的近端社会目标，进而影响就业速度（即他们获得工作的速度）和质量（即工作的程度与他们的知识、技能和能力的对齐程度）。我们的研究为学术界作出贡献，具体体现在：(a) 提升了“移民”构念的概念可达性和准确性，以便为未来的组织心理学和管理学研究奠定基础；(b) 综合和整合多学科文献，阐明劳动力移民和专业移民的就业获取过程，以推动构建解释人力资本转化及其可能导致的就业不足的基础框架；(c) 制定未来研究议程并明确对从业者的实际应用影响。此外，我们还开发并展示了一种新颖的方法，利用监督机器学习、非监督机器学习和大型语言模型，更高效地进行高质量的多学科系统评审。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: Roadblocks: Evaluating the impact of fines-related driver’s license suspension on work-related outcomes for socioeconomically disadvantaged workers.
abstract: Loss of transportation access is likely to compromise individuals' ability to get to work. Taking an interdisciplinary approach, we triangulate across complementary methodologies to examine the far-reaching impact of driver's license suspension for nonpayment of court-ordered legal fees. Reflexive thematic analysis of preliminary qualitative interview data (N = 21) yielded themes related to compromised social mobility and well-being, with subthemes indicative of job/income loss and un(der)employment resulting from unpaid fines and license suspension, inability to afford additional fees, subsequent transportation challenges, resource acquisition beyond the formal workforce, and a desire for betterment. We build on this qualitative richness via a two-study approach. In Study 1, we draw on quantitative survey data (N = 879), evidencing a positive association between license suspension and unemployment, and indicating that this relationship is mediated by compromised access to transportation. License suspension was also positively associated with turning toward the informal shadow economy for employment, with some individuals reporting turning to sex work and crime to make ends meet. Data bore out a number of employment- and well-being-related consequences of nonpayment policies, and suggested that effects may function differentially by race, with Black individuals experiencing disproportionately negative effects. In Study 2, archival data indicated that enforcement of license suspensions is likely to result in a net loss to state revenue, incentivizing policy revision. Collectively, our data suggest that fine and fee imposition, and associated driver's license suspension, are likely to have a number of negative effects for individuals, employers, and society alike. We offer policy and practice implications related to reevaluating license suspension for nonpayment of court-ordered legal financial obligations. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 障碍：评估因罚款导致的驾驶执照吊销对社会经济弱势工人工作相关结果的影响。
abstract_cn: 失去交通出行的机会可能会影响个人的工作能力。我们采取跨学科的方法，通过互补的方法论进行三角验证，以考察因未支付法院命令的法律费用而导致的驾照吊销的深远影响。对初步定性访谈数据的反思性主题分析（N = 21）揭示了与社会流动性和福祉受损相关的主题，子主题表明因未支付罚款和驾照吊销而导致的失业/收入损失和不完全就业、无法承担额外费用、随之而来的交通挑战、超越正式劳动力的资源获取，以及对改善现状的渴望。我们通过两项研究的方法进一步丰富了这一定性研究。在研究1中，我们利用定量调查数据（N = 879），证实了驾照吊销与失业之间存在正相关关系，并表明这一关系受到交通出行受限的中介影响。驾照吊销还与转向非正式阴影经济寻找就业机会呈正相关，一些个体报告称为维持生计而转向性工作和犯罪。数据揭示了未支付政策对就业和福祉的多种后果，并暗示这些影响可能因种族而异，黑人个体经历了不成比例的负面影响。在研究2中，档案数据表明，执行驾照吊销可能导致州收入的净损失，从而激励政策修订。总体而言，我们的数据表明，罚款和费用的征收及相关的驾照吊销可能对个人、雇主和社会产生多种负面影响。我们提出了与重新评估因未支付法院命令的法律财务义务而导致的驾照吊销相关的政策和实践启示。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: An integrative conceptual review of gender bias in leader evaluations: An observer-focused motive-driven process model.
abstract: Over the past decades, research on gender bias in leader evaluations has proliferated across multiple disciplines, significantly expanding contexts, outcomes, and theoretical perspectives examined. Despite these valuable contributions, the literature remains fragmented in explaining the persistent variability in how and why gender bias manifests, from severe penalties against women leaders in certain contexts to evaluative advantages in others. To resolve these discrepancies, we shift the focus from leaders to the motivated processes driving observer evaluations. We begin with an integrative review of research, revealing that observers, ranging from supervisors and subordinates to clients and investors, are not conduits of stereotypes but active evaluators whose motives shape how they selectively appraise women leaders. Drawing on motivated cognition theory, we develop a novel motive-driven process model that identifies three core directional motives: identity protection, value alignment, and resource dependence. Using this model, we integrate the literature by highlighting individual-level and contextual antecedents of each motive and explicating how motives drive distinct selective appraisal processes. By unpacking "why" and "how" observers evaluate women leaders through motivated processes, our model also offers targeted interventions that address observer motives rather than changing women's behaviors, underscoring a pressing need to engage various stakeholders in addressing gender bias in leader evaluations. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 关于领导者评估中的性别偏见的综合概念性综述：一种以观察者为中心的动机驱动过程模型。
abstract_cn: 在过去几十年中，关于领导者评估中的性别偏见的研究在多个学科中迅速增加，显著扩展了研究的背景、结果和理论视角。尽管这些贡献非常宝贵，但文献在解释性别偏见如何及为何持续变异方面仍显得支离破碎，从某些情境中对女性领导者的严重惩罚到其他情境中的评估优势，均未能得到有效解释。为了解决这些不一致性，我们将焦点从领导者转向驱动观察者评估的动机过程。我们首先进行了一项综合性的研究回顾，揭示了观察者——包括主管、下属、客户和投资者——并不是刻板印象的传导者，而是活跃的评估者，他们的动机塑造了他们如何有选择性地评价女性领导者。基于动机认知理论，我们开发了一个新的动机驱动过程模型，识别出三个核心方向性动机：身份保护、价值协调和资源依赖。利用该模型，我们整合了文献，强调了每个动机的个体层面和情境前因，并阐明了动机如何驱动不同的选择性评估过程。通过拆解观察者为何及如何通过动机过程评价女性领导者，我们的模型还提供了针对性干预措施，这些干预措施关注观察者的动机，而不是改变女性的行为，强调了让各利益相关者参与解决领导者评估中的性别偏见的迫切需求。(PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利)。

title: Is Multicloud the Future? Desirability of Compatibility in Cloud Computing Market
abstract: Leading online service providers, as major customers of cloud computing services, are increasingly adopting a multicloud strategy to enhance service delivery across different locations. However, compatibility issues among various cloud platforms complicate the implementation of this strategy. To address this challenge, cloud providers can offer a multicloud management platform that acts as a bridge between distinct cloud environments. Although such a platform can enhance customers’ multicloud experience, it also entails additional costs for the cloud providers. Our paper examines cloud providers’ compatibility decisions and the impact of compatibility on competing cloud providers and their customers. Our findings reveal that, when compatibility is established in equilibrium, cloud providers consistently set higher prices for their resources than when compatibility is absent. Additionally, we find that a cloud provider with greater market dominance always attracts more demand, whereas the rival with smaller market dominance may experience a demand decrease. Interestingly, when a cloud provider establishes compatibility in equilibrium, the competitor’s profit always increases, although customer welfare can decline under compatibility. These insights, along with other findings presented in the paper, can support cloud providers in deciding when to establish compatibility and how to price their resources effectively. Furthermore, we provide guidelines for policymakers on when compatibility could enhance customer welfare, supporting effective implementation of compatibility strategies. This paper was accepted by D. J. Wu, information systems. Funding: S. Kumar thanks Temple Center for International Business Education and Research for partially supporting this research. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01359 .
title_cn: 多云是未来吗？云计算市场中兼容性的可取性
abstract_cn: 领先的在线服务提供商作为云计算服务的主要客户，越来越多地采用多云战略，以增强在不同地点的服务交付。然而，各种云平台之间的兼容性问题使得这一战略的实施变得复杂。为了解决这一挑战，云服务提供商可以提供一个多云管理平台，充当不同云环境之间的桥梁。尽管这样的平台可以提升客户的多云体验，但也会给云服务提供商带来额外的成本。我们的论文研究了云服务提供商的兼容性决策及其对竞争云服务提供商和客户的影响。我们的研究结果表明，当兼容性在均衡状态下建立时，云服务提供商对其资源的定价始终高于缺乏兼容性时的定价。此外，我们发现市场主导地位更强的云服务提供商总是能吸引更多的需求，而市场主导地位较小的竞争对手可能会经历需求下降。有趣的是，当云服务提供商在均衡状态下建立兼容性时，竞争对手的利润总是会增加，尽管在兼容性下客户福利可能会下降。这些见解以及论文中提出的其他发现，可以帮助云服务提供商决定何时建立兼容性以及如何有效定价其资源。此外，我们还为政策制定者提供了关于何时兼容性可能提升客户福利的指导，以支持兼容性战略的有效实施。本文已被D. J. Wu，信息系统接受。资助：S. Kumar感谢坦普尔国际商业教育与研究中心对本研究的部分支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01359获取。

title: A Note on “Corporate Provision of Public Goods”
abstract: Morgan and Tumlinson (2019, Management Science 65(10), 4489–4504) study a game in which citizens first fund a company venture or purchase bonds, and then bondholders and the firm’s manager, acting on behalf of the shareholders, contribute to a public good. One of their major results is that the venture is funded with positive probability in all trembling-hand perfect Nash equilibria. The purpose of this note is to prove the existence of economies in which the venture is not funded in all trembling-hand perfect Nash equilibria. This paper was accepted by Joshua Gans, business strategy.
title_cn: 关于“企业提供公共物品”的一则说明
abstract_cn: Morgan和Tumlinson（2019年，《管理科学》65(10)，4489–4504）研究了一种博弈，在这种博弈中，公民首先为一项公司风险投资提供资金或购买债券，然后债券持有者和公司的经理代表股东共同为公共物品作出贡献。他们的主要结果之一是，在所有抖动手完美纳什均衡中，该风险投资都有正概率获得资金。本文的目的是证明存在一些经济体，在这些经济体中，所有抖动手完美纳什均衡下该风险投资并未获得资金。该论文已由商业战略领域的乔舒亚·甘斯接受。

title: Mapping the landscape of research findings: Generalization across contexts in strategic management research
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Knowledge accumulation requires that we understand whether and when relationships identified in any research setting generalize to others—that is, suggesting domains where results hold (or not). Strategy scholars carefully identify how theoretical mechanisms operate in their chosen research contexts, but attend less to whether their findings apply in other contexts. Accordingly, we recommend reframing empirical contexts, typically described in terms of nominal categories (e.g., industries, countries, or time periods), by highlighting contextual attributes of the nominal settings (e.g., industry concentration or technological modularity), which in turn reflect more abstract conceptual categories (e.g., uncertainty, interdependence, and variance) across potential research contexts. This approach can help integrate prior findings and suggest future study contexts to better enhance our understanding of the research landscape. Managerial Summary Academic research in strategic management tends to derive findings in very specific nominal settings—particular industries, years, and regions. Since strategy practitioners operate across a wide variety of industries and regions, they need to assess whether available research findings are applicable in their own settings. We suggest that understanding whether and when research findings apply to unstudied settings can be facilitated by categorizing research settings using more abstract conceptual constructs (such as environment uncertainty, variance across firms, or interdependence between firms), rather than by the traditional emphasis on nominal settings. We discuss a variety of research setting attributes (such as industry concentration and technological modularity) that can aid the translation of extant research findings to settings where practitioners are operating.
title_cn: 研究成果的地图绘制：战略管理研究背景下的概括性分析
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 知识积累要求我们理解所识别的关系是否以及何时能够推广到其他研究环境——这意味着要指出结果适用（或不适用）的领域。战略学者通常认真识别其所选择研究环境中理论机制的运作方式，但对于其研究发现是否适用于其他环境关注较少。因此，我们建议通过突出名义设置的上下文属性（例如，行业集中度或技术模块化），而不是通常以名义类别（例如，行业、国家或时间段）描述的经验环境，来重新构建这些研究环境，这些属性反过来又反映了潜在研究环境中的更抽象的概念类别（例如，不确定性、相互依赖性和方差）。这种方法可以帮助整合之前的研究发现，并建议未来的研究环境，以更好地增强我们对研究领域的理解。 管理总结 学术研究中的战略管理往往在非常特定的名义环境中得出结论——特定的行业、年份和地区。由于战略从业者在各种各样的行业和地区中运作，他们需要评估现有的研究发现是否适用于他们自己的环境。我们建议，通过使用更抽象的概念构建（如环境不确定性、公司之间的方差或公司之间的相互依赖性）来对研究环境进行分类，而不是传统上强调的名义环境，可以有助于理解研究发现何时适用于未被研究的环境。我们讨论了一些研究设置属性（如行业集中度和技术模块化），这些属性可以帮助将现有的研究发现转化为战略从业者所处的环境。

title: Team Iungens Practice: A Behavioural Perspective to Bridge Demographic Faultlines and Relationship Conflicts for Team Creativity
abstract: Abstract Although employee diversity can contribute to team creativity, extant research has shown that, when diverse employees form strong demographic faultlines, subgroup identity separation and intensified relationship conflicts may be harmful to team creativity. Therefore, effective remedies in managing relationships and bridging identities between subgroups are urgently needed in these teams. Building on brokering research, we introduce team iungens practice (TIP) – so named from a Latin phrase meaning ‘joins or unites’ – as a new team process that team members or leaders can engage to forge and strengthen connections or facilitate new coordination among team members. We propose that teams can effectively utilize this behavioural strategy to bridge structural (faultline) and process (conflict) divides rooted in subgroup identity separation, thereby mitigating their negative impacts on team creativity. In Study 1, we developed and validated a scale to measure TIP. In Study 2, we found that TIPs effectively mitigated the positive effect of demographic faultline strength on relationship conflict and attenuated the negative impact of relationship conflict on team creativity from a multisource and multistage survey study. We demonstrate the value of TIPs as a behavioural strategy for managing demographic faultlines and relationship conflicts in teams.
title_cn: Iungens团队实践：从行为角度弥合人口断层和关系冲突以促进团队创造力
abstract_cn: 摘要 尽管员工多样性可以促进团队创造力，但现有研究表明，当多样化的员工形成强烈的人口断层时，子群体身份的分离和加剧的关系冲突可能对团队创造力产生负面影响。因此，迫切需要有效的措施来管理这些团队中的关系并弥合子群体之间的身份差异。基于中介研究，我们引入了团队联合实践（TIP）——这一名称源自拉丁语，意为“连接或团结”——作为一种新的团队过程，团队成员或领导者可以参与其中，以建立和加强团队成员之间的联系或促进新的协调。我们提出，团队可以有效利用这一行为策略来弥合根植于子群体身份分离的结构（断层）和过程（冲突）之间的鸿沟，从而减轻其对团队创造力的负面影响。在研究1中，我们开发并验证了一个用于测量TIP的量表。在研究2中，我们发现TIP有效减轻了人口断层强度对关系冲突的积极影响，并减弱了关系冲突对团队创造力的负面影响，这一发现来自于多来源和多阶段的调查研究。我们展示了TIP作为一种管理团队中人口断层和关系冲突的行为策略的价值。

title: The vertical governance of modern slavery risks in supply chains: a social exchange theory perspective
abstract: Purpose The purpose of this study is to explore the form vertical supply chain governance has taken in response to the Modern Slavery Act 2015. Specifically, this study asks whether relational governance has developed to counteract the shortcomings of using contractual governance to address modern slavery risks. Design/methodology/approach A qualitative methodology is used via a case study of the UK construction industry. In all, 50 interviews were conducted, primarily with actors working at different levels of the supply chain, from principal contractors to small subcontractors, among others. The Social Exchange Theory is used to identify the dimensions of social exchange present in vertical governance. Findings This study finds two dimensions of social exchange that act as inhibitors of relational governance – mutual mistrust and conflictual relations – and one as a promoter – collaborative commitment. These mixed results represent tentative forms of collaboration, which are undermined by the largely antagonistic nature of supply chain relations. Originality/value In terms of responses to modern slavery legislation, this study reveals tensions and conflict between firms, rather than within them, by including firms from different points in supply chains rather than only those at the top. In doing so, the findings of this study problematise the focus on, and value of, horizontal collaboration where this does not translate into effective vertical governance. Finally, to the best of the author’s knowledge, this is the first application of Social Exchange Theory to understand how modern slavery risks are being managed in supply chains.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 现代奴隶制风险在供应链中的垂直治理：社会交换理论视角
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在探讨自2015年《现代奴隶制法》实施以来，垂直供应链治理所采取的形式。具体而言，本研究询问关系治理是否已发展起来，以应对使用合同治理解决现代奴隶制风险的不足之处。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究采用定性方法，通过对英国建筑行业的案例研究进行分析。共进行了50次访谈，主要对象为供应链不同层级的参与者，包括主要承包商和小型分包商等。研究使用社会交换理论来识别垂直治理中存在的社会交换维度。 研究结果 本研究发现了两种作为关系治理抑制因素的社会交换维度——相互不信任和冲突关系，以及一种作为促进因素的维度——协作承诺。这些混合结果代表了初步的合作形式，但由于供应链关系的对抗性本质而受到削弱。 原创性/价值 在对现代奴隶制立法的响应方面，本研究揭示了不同企业之间的紧张关系和冲突，而非企业内部的冲突，通过纳入供应链不同环节的企业，而不仅仅是位于顶端的企业。通过这样做，本研究的发现质疑了横向合作的关注点及其价值，尤其是在这种合作未能转化为有效的垂直治理时。最后，据作者所知，这是首次应用社会交换理论来理解现代奴隶制风险在供应链中的管理方式。

title: What are waste-to-resource supply chains: exploring their unique dynamics and implications for circular economy
abstract: Purpose Circularity requires that materials never become waste and remain in productive activities. This necessitates the creation of new supply chains (SCs), where discarded waste items are transformed into secondary resources. The author refers to these as waste-to-resource SCs. This study aims to explore how material, finance and information flow in these waste-to-resource SCs. Design/methodology/approach Presenting evidence from a unique single case, an organisation established to receive waste consumer items for repair or refurbishment and resale to new consumers. Findings The study findings indicate the upstream supply of material, finance and information flow to be unique to waste-to-resource SCs. Here, the author identifies supply push with a lack of control over incoming waste material and seasonal fluctuations. This was complemented by a disrupted information flow and consequently a need to recreate information by the focal organisation through detailed inspection of the waste items. The author compares these findings to flows in forward and reverse SCs and identify the uniqueness of waste-to-resource SCs. Originality/value This research contributes to the discussion on implementing circularity by identifying the unique characteristics of waste-to-resource SCs, which form a missing link for transforming waste into valuable resources and keep it from leaving the cycles of productive activities. The author also details types of waste-to-resource SCs based on the type of involved actors and the value of material streams.
title_cn: 废物转资源供应链是什么：探讨其独特的动态及对循环经济的影响
abstract_cn: 目的 循环经济要求材料永不成为废物，而是保持在生产活动中。这需要建立新的供应链（SCs），在这些供应链中，废弃物品被转化为二次资源。作者称这些为废物转资源供应链。本研究旨在探讨这些废物转资源供应链中的材料、资金和信息流动情况。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究通过一个独特的单一案例提供证据，该组织成立的目的是接收废弃消费品进行修理或翻新，并转售给新的消费者。 发现 研究结果表明，材料、资金和信息流的上游供应在废物转资源供应链中具有独特性。在这里，作者识别出供应推动与对进入废物材料缺乏控制以及季节性波动的情况。这种情况伴随着信息流的中断，因此需要通过对废物品的详细检查，由核心组织重新创建信息。作者将这些发现与正向和反向供应链中的流动进行比较，并识别出废物转资源供应链的独特性。 原创性/价值 本研究通过识别废物转资源供应链的独特特征，为实施循环经济的讨论做出了贡献，这些特征构成了将废物转化为有价值资源的缺失环节，并防止其脱离生产活动的循环。作者还根据参与者的类型和材料流的价值详细描述了废物转资源供应链的类型。

title: Marginalized Stakeholder Theory: A Normative Foundation for Decolonization
abstract: Abstract Whether they address issues of marginalization or study organizations in general, traditional management and business ethics scholars predominantly focus on firms’ engagement with powerful stakeholders. This represents a severe problem globally, manifesting acutely in postcolonial contexts, as firms’ engagement with marginalized stakeholders is either neglected or ignored. This neglect also highlights the problem of epistemic obfuscation in management and business ethics scholarship, through which existing works on decolonization and marginalized stakeholders are either overlooked or co-opted by the mainstream. To advance decolonial organizational scholarship and counter epistemic obfuscation, I propose marginalized stakeholder theory. This theory establishes new pathways for firms to revise their normative principles and decolonize their corporate activities. It enables firms to overcome colonial legacies, reject neocolonial logics embedded in instrumental approaches, and develop decolonial engagement with marginalized stakeholders. To this end, I reconceptualize three engagement approaches—proactive, reactive, and defensive—which are generally used by firms for instrumental purposes. I argue that this reconceptualization provides a starting point for the necessary structural and agentic transformation toward decolonization in epistemic and organizational practices.
title_cn: 边缘化利益相关者理论：去殖民化的规范基础
abstract_cn: 摘要 无论是针对边缘化问题，还是一般性研究组织，传统的管理与商业伦理学者主要关注企业与强势利益相关者的互动。这在全球范围内代表着一个严重的问题，在后殖民背景下表现得尤为明显，因为企业与边缘化利益相关者的互动要么被忽视，要么被遗忘。这一忽视同样突显了管理与商业伦理学研究中的知识混淆问题，现有关于去殖民化和边缘化利益相关者的研究往往被主流所忽略或同化。为了推进去殖民化的组织研究并对抗知识混淆，我提出了边缘化利益相关者理论。该理论为企业修订其规范原则和去殖民化的企业活动提供了新路径，使企业能够克服殖民遗产，拒绝嵌入工具性方法中的新殖民逻辑，并与边缘化利益相关者建立去殖民化的互动。为此，我重新概念化了企业通常用于工具性目的的三种互动方式——主动、反应和防御。我认为，这一重新概念化为实现知识和组织实践中去殖民化所需的结构性和能动性转变提供了一个起点。

title: Privacy trade-offs in international markets
abstract: Abstract Even as data privacy regulations expand globally, their strategic implications for international business remain underexplored. Prior research mostly treats data privacy regulation as a compliance issue, overlooking how firms strategically manage cross-border variations and respond to stakeholder pressures. Drawing on institutional economics and stakeholder theory, this article conceptualizes two trade-offs generated by data privacy regulations: (1) a regulatory, cost–benefit trade-off between privacy compliance costs and customer privacy empowerment and (2) a firm performance, temporal trade-off in which early compliance costs undermine short-term outcomes, before longer-term, trust-based benefits emerge. An international event study of ten regulations across 24 countries affirms that data privacy regulations impose short-term financial setbacks but generate long-term gains. These effects vary across contexts: At regulation, industry, and firm levels, conditions in which internal pressures to minimize risk dominate (intense privacy regulation, strong data dependence, limited resources) intensify early losses. At national levels, environments dominated by external pressures for credible compliance (high formal and informal institutional effectiveness) offset short-term losses and magnify long-term benefits. For international business theory, this study reframes data privacy regulation as a strategic opportunity and highlights how internal versus external legitimacy pressures shape trade-offs that firms must balance to navigate cross-border compliance demands.
title_cn: 国际市场中的隐私权权衡
abstract_cn: 摘要 尽管数据隐私法规在全球范围内不断扩展，但其对国际商业的战略影响仍未得到充分探讨。先前的研究大多将数据隐私法规视为合规问题，忽视了企业如何战略性地管理跨境差异以及回应利益相关者的压力。本文基于制度经济学和利益相关者理论，概念化了数据隐私法规产生的两个权衡：（1）监管上的成本-效益权衡，即隐私合规成本与客户隐私赋权之间的关系；（2）企业绩效的时间权衡，即早期合规成本对短期结果的削弱，随后出现长期基于信任的收益。对24个国家10项法规的国际事件研究证实，数据隐私法规会带来短期的财务损失，但会产生长期收益。这些影响在不同背景下存在差异：在监管、行业和企业层面，内部压力以最小化风险为主的条件（如强烈的隐私法规、较强的数据依赖、有限的资源）会加剧早期损失。在国家层面，由外部压力主导的令人信服的合规环境（如高效的正式和非正式制度）则会抵消短期损失并放大长期收益。对于国际商业理论，本研究重新框定数据隐私法规为一种战略机会，并强调内部与外部合法性压力如何塑造企业必须平衡的权衡，以应对跨境合规要求。

title: Mean-Risk Traffic Assignment Under the Continuously Distributed Risk-Aversion Factor
abstract: From Discrete to Continuum: Risk Preference Heterogeneity in Traffic Equilibrium How do travelers with heterogeneous risk preferences choose routes in congested networks with uncertain travel times? Conventional models characterize risk preference heterogeneity using a small number of discrete user classes. In “Mean-Risk Traffic Assignment Under the Continuously Distributed Risk-Aversion Factor,” Xu, Li, Xie, Chen, and Liu develop a new traffic equilibrium framework that directly accommodates a continuous distribution of risk aversion. The resulting model generalizes the classical Wardrop equilibrium to settings with both stochastic travel times and continuous preference heterogeneity, providing a more refined representation of real-world routing behavior. This study demonstrates that the continuous approach outperforms the discrete approach by not only eliminating the inherent discretization bias—that can mislead infrastructure investment decisions—but also delivers superior computational performance, requiring less run time and memory. More broadly, the framework could be potentially applied to a wide range of biobjective congestion routing games where user preferences are continuously distributed.
title_cn: 基于连续分布的风险厌恶因子的均值风险交通分配
abstract_cn: 从离散到连续：交通均衡中的风险偏好异质性 在拥堵网络中，具有不同风险偏好的旅行者如何选择路线，以应对不确定的旅行时间？传统模型通过少量的离散用户类别来描述风险偏好的异质性。在《基于连续分布的风险厌恶因子的均值-风险交通分配》中，Xu、Li、Xie、Chen和Liu提出了一个新的交通均衡框架，直接适应风险厌恶的连续分布。所建立的模型将经典的Wardrop均衡推广至包括随机旅行时间和连续偏好异质性的情境，从而更细致地反映现实中的路线选择行为。该研究表明，连续方法优于离散方法，不仅消除了固有的离散化偏差——这一偏差可能误导基础设施投资决策——而且提供了更好的计算性能，所需的运行时间和内存更少。更广泛地说，这一框架可以潜在地应用于广泛的双目标拥堵路由博弈中，其中用户偏好呈连续分布。

title: Optimal Feature-Based Market Segmentation and Pricing
abstract: Operationalizing Semipersonalized Pricing How can modern firms leverage feature information to set prices in way that is both profitable and practical? A new study in Operations Research addresses this question by analyzing feature-based market segmentation and pricing (FBMSP), a semipersonalized approach to pricing where firms use customer characteristics to group buyers and set segment-specific prices. Although businesses often rely on heuristic “segment-then-price” methods, in their article the authors show that under realistic statistical assumptions, the jointly optimal segmentation and pricing policy can be computed efficiently. Further, using structural results about the optimal FBMSP, the authors prove that semipersonalized pricing quickly converges to the performance of fully personalized pricing, motivating its use in practice. Finally, in a case study on U.S. home mortgage data, they apply their method and show it significantly outperforms traditional heuristics, achieving near-maximal revenue with only a few segments. This research offers both practical tools and theoretical insights for firms navigating the balance between personalization and implementability in pricing.
title_cn: 基于特征的最佳市场细分与定价
abstract_cn: 实现半个性化定价：现代企业如何利用特征信息以盈利且实用的方式设定价格？一项发表在《运营研究》中的新研究探讨了这个问题，分析了基于特征的市场细分和定价（FBMSP），这是一种半个性化的定价方法，企业通过客户特征对买家进行分组并设定细分特定价格。尽管企业通常依靠启发式的“先细分再定价”方法，作者在其文章中展示了在现实的统计假设下，联合最优的细分与定价策略可以高效计算。此外，作者利用有关最优FBMSP的结构性结果证明，半个性化定价迅速接近完全个性化定价的性能，这激励了其在实践中的应用。最后，通过对美国住房抵押贷款数据的案例研究，他们应用此方法并显示其显著优于传统启发式方法，仅用少数细分就实现了近乎最大化的收入。这项研究为在定价中在个性化与可实施性之间寻求平衡的企业提供了实用工具和理论见解。

title: Substitution or Emergency Order? Averting O-Negative Blood Shortages
abstract: Blood type substitution is an effective policy for improving the blood supply chain resilience in responding to shortages at hospitals. However, while compatibility of certain blood types provides an opportunity to better manage volatility in supply (donation) and demand (transfusion), in practice, it remains challenging to decide whether to use a compatible blood unit from the on-hand inventory (substitution) or to place an urgent or emergency order. Available evidence indicates that, in Australia, current practices for deciding on blood type substitution over emergency orders result in a significant imbalance in supply and demand for the most widely compatible units: O-negative blood units. This challenge is particularly critical in blood inventory management and represents a significant research opportunity for the operations management community. It can be addressed using state-of-the-art methodologies in data-driven decision making and perishable inventory under stochastic supply and demand. This study proposes a stochastic optimization model based on sample-average approximation (SAA) to aid the blood type substitution decisions at hospitals. We take into account the historical demand data, the type and age of blood units in the inventory, as well as the shelf-life variability of the units arriving at hospitals. We compare the SAA results with several policies, including a single-period myopic model, no-substitution, over-order practice, and an empirical guideline. Results indicate that the proposed SAA model outperforms all the above policies. It thus creates significant opportunities for improvement in the management of blood units, as it reduces the imbalance in the supply and demand of O-negative blood units, allowing practitioners to benefit from substitution while avoiding the over-ordering of O-negative units.
title_cn: 替代还是紧急命令？避免O型阴性血液短缺
abstract_cn: 血型替代是一项有效的政策，可以提高血液供应链在应对医院短缺时的韧性。然而，尽管某些血型的兼容性为更好地管理供应（捐赠）和需求（输血）的波动提供了机会，但在实践中，决定是使用手头库存中的兼容血液单元（替代）还是下达紧急或急需订单仍然具有挑战性。现有证据表明，在澳大利亚，决定血型替代与紧急订单的当前做法导致了供应和需求之间在最广泛兼容的血液单元——O型阴性血液单元上存在显著的不平衡。这个挑战在血液库存管理中尤为关键，并为运营管理领域提供了重要的研究机会。可以利用数据驱动决策和在随机供应与需求下的易腐烂库存的先进方法来解决这一问题。本研究提出了一种基于样本平均近似（SAA）的随机优化模型，以帮助医院进行血型替代决策。我们考虑了历史需求数据、库存中血液单元的类型和年龄，以及到达医院的单元的保质期变异性。我们将SAA结果与几种政策进行比较，包括单周期短视模型、不替代、过量订购实践和经验指导。结果表明，所提出的SAA模型优于上述所有政策。因此，它为血液单元的管理创造了显著的改进机会，因为它减少了O型阴性血液单元的供需不平衡，使从业者能够在避免过量订购O型阴性单元的同时受益于替代。

title: Prosocial Project Management in Conflict Areas
abstract: Armed conflicts, terrorism, and political instability disrupt the implementation of thousands of prosocial projects in the developing world. In this unstable, fast-paced environment, managers may need to change course and adapt projects to new circumstances. Could adaptive management be a solution? Leveraging a groundbreaking pilot run by the World Bank, we evaluate the performance of all 429 adaptive projects implemented between 1998 and 2013, when the Bank launched the “adaptable program loan.” Our study—covering 91 countries, 25 development sectors, and approximately $55 billion in funding resources—examines how armed conflict and adaptability influence project performance. We find that adaptability, reinforced by experience and learning, counteracts conflict’s negative effect on project performance. However, this moderating effect diminishes as project complexity increases and reverses in non-conflict areas due to cost overruns and overoptimistic formulations .
title_cn: 冲突地区的亲社会项目管理
abstract_cn: 武装冲突、恐怖主义和政治不稳定破坏了发展中国家数千个亲社会项目的实施。在这种不稳定且快速变化的环境中，管理者可能需要改变方向并根据新情况调整项目。那么，适应性管理是否能成为解决方案？借助世界银行开展的一个开创性试点项目，我们评估了1998年至2013年间实施的429个适应性项目的表现，当时银行启动了“适应性程序贷款”。我们的研究覆盖了91个国家、25个发展领域和约550亿美元的资金资源，探讨了武装冲突和适应性如何影响项目绩效。我们发现，适应性通过经验和学习的增强，抵消了冲突对项目绩效的负面影响。然而，随着项目复杂性的增加，这种调节效应减弱，并且在非冲突地区由于成本超支和过于乐观的项目制定而发生逆转。

title: Equity-Driven Workload Allocation for Crowdsourced Last-Mile Delivery
abstract: Crowdshipping, a rapidly growing approach in Last-Mile Delivery (LMD), relies on independent crowdworkers to fulfill delivery orders. Building a sustainable network of crowdshippers is crucial for the long-term success of such systems, as participation is primarily driven by fair compensation. This is especially important for workers who rely on crowdwork as their main source of income, making equitable pay not just a matter of fairness but of financial well-being. In this study, we address several key questions that gig-economy platforms concerned with fair pay may ask: How can equity be measured? What are the associated cost implications? And how can potential drawbacks be managed? Our main contribution is the development of a practical, equity-oriented framework tailored to crowdshipping within an LMD environment. Inspired by the real-world operations of several crowdshipping platforms, the framework operates in real time and is built around a bi-objective optimization model that balances equity and cost. This allows us to systematically explore trade-offs and identify the equity measures that most effectively capture this balance. We demonstrate that even a modest reduction in cost efficiency (e.g., 2.5%) can lead to substantial improvements in equity; potentially up to 65%. Our results provide actionable insights for practitioners, including guidance on selecting appropriate equity measures. We also find that the best equity outcomes occur when the crowdshipper pool is kept relatively small. Furthermore, we quantify the performance loss of high- and low-performing crowdshippers as the pool size increases, offering valuable insights for workforce planning and management. Along similar lines, we demonstrate that our framework remains effective in managing vehicle shortages in dynamic environments while achieving comparable levels of equity improvement.
title_cn: 以公平为驱动的众包最后一公里配送工作量分配
abstract_cn: 众包配送是一种在最后一公里配送（LMD）中快速发展的方法，它依赖于独立的众包工作者来完成配送订单。建立一个可持续的众包配送网络对于此类系统的长期成功至关重要，因为参与的主要驱动力是公平的补偿。对于那些将众包工作视为主要收入来源的工人来说，这一点尤为重要，公平的薪酬不仅是公正问题，更关乎经济福祉。在本研究中，我们探讨了几个关于公平薪酬的临时经济平台可能关注的关键问题：如何衡量公平？相关的成本影响是什么？以及如何管理潜在的缺点？我们的主要贡献是开发了一个实用的、面向公平的框架，专门针对LMD环境中的众包配送。该框架受多家众包配送平台的实际运营启发，实时运行，并围绕一个双目标优化模型构建，该模型在公平与成本之间取得平衡。这使我们能够系统性地探讨权衡，并识别出最有效捕捉这一平衡的公平衡量指标。我们的研究表明，即使在成本效率略微降低（例如2.5%）的情况下，也可以大幅提高公平性；潜在提高幅度可达65%。我们的结果为从业者提供了可行的见解，包括选择合适的公平衡量指标的指导。我们还发现，当众包配送者池相对较小时，最佳的公平结果发生。此外，我们量化了高绩效和低绩效众包配送者在池规模增加时的表现损失，为劳动力规划和管理提供了宝贵的见解。类似地，我们也证明了我们的框架在动态环境中有效管理车辆短缺，同时实现了类似水平的公平性改善。

title: Exploring the Divide Between Retail Apps and Light Apps: Insights and Implications
abstract: The proliferation of mobile commerce channels has fundamentally reshaped retail ecosystems, particularly in digital markets like China where smartphone adoption approaches saturation among internet users. While extant literature has extensively examined the impact of new channel introductions (e.g., online, offline, mobile) on firm performance, less attention has been paid to consumer behavioral nuances within established digital interfaces. Addressing this gap, our study pioneers a comparative analysis of purchasing dynamics across two dominant yet technologically distinct channels: native apps versus light-app channels (e.g., WeChat mini-programs). While both channels share core mobile attributes (e.g., small screen sizes, on-the-go accessibility), their divergent technological architectures (Swift, Kotlin, and Java vs. HTML, CSS, WXML, and WXSS) create systematically differentiated consumer experiences. Through econometric analysis of 185,437 transaction records from a multichannel B2C platform, we reveal that consumers tend to spend more, purchase more items, and exhibit a lower likelihood of product returns when shopping through the light-app channel compared to native apps. More importantly, these behavioral divergences are moderated by product categories, price levels, and discount depths. Our findings contribute to the multichannel retailing literature by providing new insights into consumers’ behavioral differences between the two popular, yet distinct, mobile channels. Based on these insights, we suggest that multichannel retailers should prioritize channel convenience and accessibility and reconsider their investments in mobile native apps. Additionally, retailers should tailor assortments, pricing, and discount strategies to each channel to effectively engage consumers and stimulate purchases. Our research also emphasizes the importance of aligning marketing, operations, and finance strategies in multichannel retailing.
title_cn: 探索零售应用与轻量应用之间的差异：见解及其影响
abstract_cn: 移动商务渠道的普及从根本上重塑了零售生态系统，特别是在中国等数字市场中，智能手机的普及率已接近互联网用户的饱和状态。尽管现有文献广泛探讨了新渠道引入（如在线、离线和移动）对企业绩效的影响，但对已建立数字界面中消费者行为细微差别的关注相对较少。为了填补这一空白，我们的研究首创性地对两种主导但技术上不同的渠道——原生应用和轻应用渠道（如微信小程序）的购买动态进行了比较分析。尽管这两种渠道共享核心的移动属性（如小屏幕尺寸、随时随地可访问性），但由于其不同的技术架构（Swift、Kotlin和Java与HTML、CSS、WXML和WXSS），导致了系统性差异化的消费者体验。通过对来自一个多渠道B2C平台的185,437条交易记录进行计量经济学分析，我们发现，与原生应用相比，消费者在轻应用渠道购物时往往会花费更多、购买更多商品，并且退货的可能性较低。更重要的是，这些行为差异受到产品类别、价格水平和折扣深度的调节。我们的研究为多渠道零售文献提供了新的见解，揭示了消费者在这两种流行但不同的移动渠道之间的行为差异。基于这些见解，我们建议多渠道零售商应优先考虑渠道的便利性和可访问性，并重新考虑对移动原生应用的投资。此外，零售商应根据每个渠道量身定制商品组合、定价和折扣策略，以有效吸引消费者并刺激购买。我们的研究还强调了在多渠道零售中对营销、运营和财务策略进行协调的重要性。

title: Conform or Workaround? A Multilevel Analysis of the Effect of Group Cultural Tightness on Enterprise System Use
abstract: Enterprise systems (ESs) embed industrial best practices into adopting organizations through their system features, but employees frequently “work around” the system to get work done—sometimes in helpful ways, sometimes in risky ones. Our research shows that group cultural tightness (strongly enforced norms within a team) is a powerful lever for ES governance: tighter groups reliably increase conforming use while reducing both internal and external workarounds, and this pattern holds across Chinese and U.S. contexts and multiple organizational settings. Importantly, not all workarounds are equal. Evidence from multisourced, longitudinal field data indicates that conforming use and internal workarounds can improve job performance, whereas external workarounds harm performance—likely by creating fragmented processes, data gaps, and compliance and security exposure. For practice and policy, the message is clear: organizations should strengthen team-level norms and accountability to curb harmful “outside-the-system” behaviors, while simultaneously creating safe, sanctioned channels to surface, evaluate, and integrate beneficial internal workarounds (e.g., controlled extensions, approved templates, and rapid governance reviews). This balanced approach supports performance, compliance, and continuous improvement without shutting down frontline problem-solving.
title_cn: 遵循还是变通？关于群体文化紧密度对企业系统使用影响的多层次分析
abstract_cn: 企业系统（ES）通过其系统特性将行业最佳实践嵌入采用这些系统的组织中，但员工往往会“绕过”系统以完成工作——有时是有益的方式，有时则存在风险。我们的研究表明，团队文化的紧密性（团队内规范的严格执行）是企业系统治理的一个强有力杠杆：更紧密的团队可靠地提高了合规使用，并减少了内部和外部的变通措施，这一模式在中国和美国的不同背景及多种组织环境中都得到了验证。重要的是，并非所有的变通措施都是相同的。来自多源的长期现场数据的证据表明，合规使用和内部变通可以提高工作绩效，而外部变通则会损害绩效——可能是由于造成了流程碎片化、数据缺口以及合规和安全的暴露。对于实践和政策而言，信息明确：组织应加强团队层面的规范和问责，以抑制有害的“系统外”行为，同时创建安全、被认可的渠道来提出、评估和整合有益的内部变通措施（例如控制扩展、批准模板以及快速的治理审查）。这种平衡的方法支持绩效、合规和持续改进，而不会削弱前线问题解决的能力。

title: Analyzing Consumer Footprints on E-Commerce Platforms: A Multichannel Sequential Search Model with Reference Price
abstract: Accompanied by the popularity of mini-programs, consumers can easily browse products across both the e-commerce native app channel and the mini-program channel, leaving behind extensive click-through and purchase records across various channels. These multichannel footprints contain rich information about consumers’ search preferences, which offer great potential for optimizing platforms’ multichannel management. However, prior studies predominantly focus on single-channel contexts, which may not directly apply to analyzing consumers’ multichannel footprints. This research develops a multichannel sequential search (MSS) model to characterize consumers’ multichannel footprints as a threefold search process consisting of cross-channel, cross-product, and cross-page search, where consumers dynamically update their cross-channel reference prices as they navigate their search journeys. The estimation results of the MSS model reveal that consumers exhibit significant heterogeneity in channel preferences, cross-channel costs, and sensitivity to cross-channel reference prices, contributing to their diverse multichannel footprints. Drawing on a comprehensive understanding of the MSS process, our optimal policy recommends that the platform implement a promotion gap with an average discount percentage of 32% between the app and mini-program channels. The channel-specific promotion strategy fosters a strong cross-channel reference price effect, which uses a smaller promotion to achieve a significant profit improvement over the state-of-the-art model.
title_cn: 分析电子商务平台上的消费者足迹：一个带有参考价格的多渠道序贯搜索模型
abstract_cn: 随着小程序的普及，消费者可以轻松浏览电商原生应用和小程序渠道的产品，在不同渠道上留下大量的点击和购买记录。这些多渠道的足迹包含了关于消费者搜索偏好的丰富信息，为优化平台的多渠道管理提供了巨大潜力。然而，之前的研究主要集中于单一渠道的背景，这可能无法直接用于分析消费者的多渠道足迹。本研究开发了一种多渠道序列搜索（MSS）模型，将消费者的多渠道足迹表征为一个由跨渠道、跨产品和跨页面搜索组成的三重搜索过程，消费者在搜索旅程中动态更新他们的跨渠道参考价格。MSS模型的估计结果显示，消费者在渠道偏好、跨渠道成本和对跨渠道参考价格的敏感性方面表现出显著的异质性，这导致他们的多渠道足迹多样化。基于对MSS过程的全面理解，我们提出的最优政策建议平台在应用程序和小程序渠道之间实施平均折扣百分比为32%的促销差距。这种针对渠道的促销策略加强了跨渠道参考价格的强效应，通过较小的促销实现了相较于最先进模型显著的利润提升。

title: Do weak intellectual property rights regimes affect foreign multinational firms' technology exploration? The moderating role of function-related and location-related experience
abstract: Existing literature suggests that weak intellectual property rights (IPR) regimes are not conducive to innovation intensive activities. However, evidence of technology exploration activities by multinational companies (MNCs) in emerging countries challenges this view. We address this puzzle by examining how host-country IPR regimes influence MNCs' technology exploration, distinguishing between technology-seeking (TS) and home-base augmenting (HBA) activities. Drawing on organizational experience and learning theories, we also test the moderating role of MNCs' function-related (innovation function-specific and function-generic) and location-related (host country-specific and country-generic) international experience. Using PATSTAT patent data for 91 U.S. computer and electronics firms in the period 2001–2018, we find that weaker IPR protection is associated with a higher proportion of HBA initiatives. This challenges the conventional view that strong IPR regimes are indispensable for technology exploration. Moreover, we show that MNCs with extensive function-specific experience in the host and other foreign countries better navigate diverse IPR environments, making their technology exploration activities less affected by the strength of the host-country IPR regime. • We study how host-country IPR regimes affect MNCs’ technology exploration: Technology-seeking and home-base-augmenting (HBA). • MNCs are more likely to pursue technology exploration, especially HBA, in weak IPR regimes. • We challenge the conventional view that strong IPR regimes are indispensable for technology exploration. • Function (innovation)-specific international experience enables MNCs to pursue HBA also in strong IPR regimes.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 薄弱的知识产权保护制度是否会影响外资跨国公司的技术探索？与职能相关和地点相关经验的调节作用
abstract_cn:
现有文献表明，较弱的知识产权（IPR）制度不利于创新密集型活动。然而，跨国公司（MNCs）在新兴国家开展技术探索活动的证据则对这一观点提出了挑战。我们通过考察东道国的IPR制度如何影响MNCs的技术探索来解决这一难题，区分技术寻求（TS）和本土基地增强（HBA）活动。基于组织经验和学习理论，我们还测试了MNCs的功能相关（特定创新功能和通用功能）及地理位置相关（特定东道国和通用国家）国际经验的调节作用。利用2001年至2018年期间91家美国计算机和电子公司的PATSTAT专利数据，我们发现较弱的IPR保护与HBA举措的比例更高相关。这挑战了传统观点，即强大的IPR制度对技术探索是不可或缺的。此外，我们表明，拥有丰富的功能特定经验的跨国公司在东道国和其他外国更能有效应对多样化的IPR环境，使其技术探索活动受到东道国IPR制度强度影响的程度降低。  
• 我们研究东道国IPR制度如何影响MNCs的技术探索：技术寻求与本土基地增强（HBA）。  
• MNCs在较弱的IPR制度中更可能追求技术探索，特别是HBA。  
• 我们挑战传统观点，即强大的IPR制度对技术探索是不可或缺的。  
• 功能（创新）特定的国际经验使MNCs能够在强IPR制度下也追求HBA。

title: The Acceleration of Artificial Intelligence: Rethinking Organization and Work in an Era of Rapid Technological Change
abstract: Abstract Artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming the epistemic, interactional, and institutional foundations of contemporary organizations, yet management and organization studies are only beginning to theorise the implications of this shift. Existing research often treats “AI” as a singular construct, despite the fact that predictive, generative, agentic, and embodied systems rely on different logics and produce distinct organizational outcomes. This article interrogates the limits of this conceptual flattening and argues that cumulative theorising requires more precise specification of the technological systems under study. Drawing on developments across the field, we demonstrate how different modes of AI reshape core organizational constructs, including expertise, judgement, coordination, authority, and institutional adaptation. We advance a heuristic framework that differentiates among contemporary AI systems and clarifies their distinct affordances. The article concludes by outlining a research agenda that focusses on the shifting loci of agency, new decision architectures, and the normative and institutional challenges introduced by increasingly powerful AI systems.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 人工智能的加速：在快速技术变革时代重新思考组织与工作
abstract_cn: 摘要 人工智能（AI）正在改变当代组织的认知、互动和制度基础，但管理与组织研究才刚刚开始理论化这一转变的影响。现有研究通常将“AI”视为一个单一构造，尽管预测性、生成性、代理性和具身系统依赖于不同的逻辑并产生不同的组织结果。本文质疑这种概念简化的局限，认为累积理论化需要对所研究的技术系统进行更精确的规范。通过对该领域发展动态的借鉴，我们展示了不同的AI模式如何重塑核心组织构造，包括专业知识、判断、协调、权威和制度适应。我们提出了一个启发式框架，以区分当代AI系统并阐明其独特的可供性。文章最后概述了一项研究议程，集中关注代理权的转移、新的决策架构，以及日益强大的AI系统所引入的规范和制度挑战。

title: Operational efficiency as a contingent, not universal mechanism: evidence from Pakistani SME supply chains
abstract: Purpose This study aims to critically investigate the presumed universal mediating role of operational efficiency between core supply chain capabilities integration, agility, adaptability and overall performance. It questions the established paradigm that positions operational efficiency as an indispensable conduit to competitive advantage, particularly within the volatile context of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in an emerging economy Pakistan. Design/methodology/approach To empirically test this theoretical contention, a quantitative, positivist approach using a cross-sectional survey of 400 Pakistani SMEs was employed. This design was chosen to objectively measure the complex relationships between latent constructs within a population facing significant volatility and resource constraints, a context that provides a critical test for universal mechanism. Established scales were rigorously adapted and pretested for contextual relevance. Data were analyzed using partial least squares structural equation modeling in R. This method was specifically selected for its ability to model complex mediation pathways without strict distributional assumptions, making it ideal for an exploratory test of the hypothesized contingencies in this emerging economy setting. Findings The results reveal a critical contingency; operational efficiency does not universally mediate the capability performance relationship. While it transmits the effects of supplier and internal integration to performance, it fails to be a significant mediator for supply chain adaptability and agility. Furthermore, customer integration, while improving operational efficiency, does not directly enhance overall performance. This demonstrates that the efficacy of operational efficiency is not automatic but is instead bounded by the type of capability deployed and the firm’s specific contextual constraints. Originality/value This research provides a significant practical recalibration by challenging the universal application of operational efficiency as a core mediator in supply chain models. To the best of the authors’ knowledge, it is the first study to empirically demonstrate that this mechanism can fail in specific, high importance contexts. The findings offer a crucial contingency perspective, emphasizing that the path to supply chain performance in emerging economies is more nuanced than prevailing theories suggest, requiring a move beyond one size fits all, efficiency centric strategies.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 操作效率作为一种有条件的机制，而非普遍适用的机制：来自巴基斯坦中小企业供应链的证据
abstract_cn:
目的 本研究旨在批判性地调查操作效率在核心供应链能力整合、敏捷性、适应性与整体绩效之间的假定普遍中介作用。它质疑将操作效率视为竞争优势不可或缺通道的既定范式，特别是在新兴经济体巴基斯坦的小型和中型企业（SMEs）这一不稳定的背景下。 

设计/方法论/路径 为了实证检验这一理论论断，采用了定量的实证主义方法，通过对400家巴基斯坦SME的横断面调查进行研究。选择这一设计是为了客观测量面临显著波动和资源限制的群体内潜在构念之间复杂关系的影响，这是对普遍机制的关键检验。现有量表经过严格调整并进行了预测试，以确保其与背景的相关性。数据通过R中的偏最小二乘结构方程模型进行分析。选择该方法的原因在于其能够在不严格分布假设的情况下建模复杂的中介路径，这使得它非常适合在新兴经济背景下对假设情况进行探索性测试。 

发现 结果揭示了一个关键的偶然性：操作效率并不普遍中介能力与绩效之间的关系。虽然它能够传递供应商和内部整合对绩效的影响，但它未能成为供应链适应性和敏捷性的显著中介。此外，客户整合虽然能改善操作效率，但并未直接提升整体绩效。这表明，操作效率的效能并非自然而然，而是受所部署能力类型和企业特定情境限制的制约。 

原创性/价值 本研究通过挑战操作效率作为供应链模型核心中介的普遍适用性，提供了显著的实务再校准。据作者所知，这是第一项实证证明这一机制在特定且高度重要的背景下可能失效的研究。研究结果提供了一个关键的偶然性视角，强调在新兴经济体中，通向供应链绩效的路径比现有理论所暗示的要复杂得多，亟需超越“一刀切”的效率中心策略。

title: Let’s Talk Stigma Out: An Interaction-Based Process of Stigma Recognition and Removal within Organizational Fields
abstract: Stigma is relational and intersubjective, as it depends on how stigmatizing audiences and stigmatized actors make sense of it. However, little research has investigated the nuances of the interaction process through which stigma comes to be recognized and eventually removed. We address this puzzle by studying stigma in the field of cooperatives in the Lazio region of Italy. Following the involvement of one cooperative in illegal activities, cooperatives in the region were stigmatized by its exchange partners: nonprofit organizations and local governments. Cooperatives’ initial strategy to remove stigma led their exchange partners to change their perception of the root causes of the stigma affecting cooperatives. Cooperatives recognized this change through interaction with their exchange partners and therefore adapted their stigma-related strategy. This process successfully removed the stigma and transformed the way in which cooperatives engaged in exchanges with their partners. Building on this evidence, we develop an interaction-based process model of stigma recognition and removal that reconnects and extends the research streams on stigma and organizational fields.
title_cn: 让我们谈谈耻辱：组织领域中基于互动的耻辱识别与消除过程
abstract_cn: 污名是关系性的和互主体的，因为它取决于污名化的受众和被污名化的行为者如何理解它。然而，关于污名被认知和最终被消除的互动过程中细微差别的研究仍然很少。我们通过研究意大利拉齐奥地区合作社中的污名现象来解决这一难题。在一家合作社涉及非法活动后，该地区的合作社受到其交换伙伴，即非营利组织和地方政府的污名化。合作社最初消除污名的策略促使其交换伙伴改变对影响合作社污名根本原因的看法。合作社通过与交换伙伴的互动意识到了这种变化，因此调整了与污名相关的策略。这个过程成功地消除了污名，并改变了合作社与其伙伴进行交换的方式。基于这些证据，我们建立了一个基于互动的污名认知和消除的过程模型，重新连接并扩展了关于污名和组织领域的研究方向。

title: Debiasing entrepreneurial careers: A field experiment on female role model effects on entrepreneurial self-efficacy and early-stage career choices
abstract: Women remain underrepresented not only as founders but also as employees – or "joiners" – in young and small firms, limiting their exposure to entrepreneurial environments that often serve as critical pathways to venture creation. To address this gap, we investigate whether introducing female entrepreneur role models in educational settings can shape young women's entrepreneurial self-efficacy and early career choices. Drawing on role congruity theory and social cognitive career theory (SCCT), we conducted a field experiment involving over 430 university students and 98 early-stage entrepreneurs. Using a pre-test/post-test design and longitudinal tracking of early career choices, we explore the causal effects of exogenously assigned female role models on students' decisions to join a young or small firm. We find that exposure to social interactions with female entrepreneurs significantly boosts female students' entrepreneurial self-efficacy. More importantly, women who were paired with a female entrepreneur were over 10% more likely to join a young firm after graduation compared to those assigned to a male entrepreneur. Mediation analysis confirms that entrepreneurial self-efficacy is a key mechanism linking exposure to same-sex role models with women's decision to join a young firm. These findings highlight the potential of targeted role model interventions to reduce gender disparities in entrepreneurial entry pathways and expand the diversity of entrepreneurial ecosystems.
title_cn: 去偏见化创业职业：关于女性榜样对创业自我效能及早期职业选择影响的实地实验
abstract_cn: 女性不仅在创业者中代表性不足，在年轻和小型企业中的员工（或“加入者”）中也同样如此，这限制了她们接触创业环境的机会，而这些环境往往是通往企业创立的重要路径。为了解决这一问题，我们研究了在教育环境中引入女性创业者榜样是否能够塑造年轻女性的创业自我效能感和早期职业选择。基于角色一致性理论和社会认知职业理论（SCCT），我们开展了一项包含430多名大学生和98名早期创业者的实地实验。通过前测/后测设计和对早期职业选择的纵向追踪，我们探讨了外生分配的女性榜样对学生选择加入年轻或小型企业的因果影响。研究发现，与女性创业者的社交互动显著提升了女性学生的创业自我效能感。更重要的是，与女性创业者配对的女性在毕业后加入年轻企业的可能性超过10%，相比之下，配对男性创业者的女性则可能性较低。中介分析确认，创业自我效能感是将接触同性榜样与女性选择加入年轻企业之间联系起来的关键机制。这些发现突显了有针对性的榜样干预在减少创业进入路径中的性别差异和扩大创业生态系统多样性方面的潜力。

title: Sustainability-Oriented Institutions and the Success of Green Reward-Based Crowdfunding Campaigns
abstract: Previous research has produced mixed evidence on the success of green crowdfunding campaigns. We investigate whether country-level environmental institutions help explain these inconsistencies by moderating backers’ responses. While such institutions may enhance campaign legitimacy, they can also reduce the perceived urgency to contribute by offering alternative support channels. Analyzing a large Kickstarter dataset with machine learning, we find that green campaigns are less likely to succeed, particularly in countries with stronger environmental institutions. Post-hoc analyses point to a crowding-out effect of institutional support, which dampens individual backing, and suggest that omitted variable bias may partly account for prior conflicting results.
title_cn: 面向可持续发展的机构与绿色奖励型众筹活动的成功
abstract_cn: 先前的研究对绿色众筹活动成功与否的证据显示出混杂的结果。我们探讨了国家层面的环境制度是否有助于解释这些不一致性，通过调节支持者的反应。虽然这些制度可能增强活动的合法性，但也可能通过提供替代支持渠道而降低人们贡献的迫切感。通过对一个大型Kickstarter数据集进行机器学习分析，我们发现绿色众筹活动的成功率较低，特别是在环境制度较强的国家。事后分析指出了制度支持的挤出效应，这抑制了个人的支持，并建议被忽略的变量偏差可能部分解释了先前结果的冲突。

title: Forecasting Earnings from Home
abstract: We examine the impact of working from home (WFH) practices on the financial services industry, focusing on sell-side equity analysts. We find that analysts who previously benefited from access to in-person interactions with other informed parties experience a greater decline in earnings forecast accuracy following the COVID lockdown and the shift to WFH. Notably, the informational advantage associated with the in-person access disappears during the lockdown and returns once restrictions are lifted. Our results are stronger for all-star analysts and analysts with shorter coverage periods, suggesting that all-star analysts rely relatively more on access to in-person interactions prelockdown and that accumulated firm-specific knowledge mitigates the loss of in-person interactions. Our results remain robust across alternative analyst performance measures. We conclude that, despite recent advances in communications technology, AI, and machine learning, in-person interactions remain a unique and difficult to substitute information channel for sell-side research providers and that WFH impedes information flows between market participants in capital markets. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04637 .
title_cn: 家庭收入预测
abstract_cn: 我们研究了居家办公（WFH）实践对金融服务行业的影响，重点关注卖方股票分析师。我们发现，之前能够与其他知情方进行面对面互动的分析师，在COVID封锁和转向居家办公后，盈利预测准确性下降幅度更大。值得注意的是，与面对面接触相关的信息优势在封锁期间消失，并在限制解除后恢复。我们的结果在明星分析师和覆盖期较短的分析师中更为显著，这表明明星分析师在封锁前相对更依赖于面对面互动，而积累的公司特定知识则减轻了面对面互动缺失带来的影响。我们的结果在不同的分析师绩效衡量标准下依然稳健。我们得出结论，尽管通信技术、人工智能和机器学习近年来取得了进展，面对面互动仍然是卖方研究提供者独特且难以替代的信息渠道，而居家办公阻碍了资本市场参与者之间的信息流动。本文已被会计领域的Suraj Srinivasan接受。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04637获取。

title: Online Tensor Inference
abstract: From Big Data to Real-Time Decisions: Online Tensor Inference Modern digital platforms, from e-commerce and online advertising to mobile health, generate massive streams of high-dimensional data that must be analyzed in real time. In their paper “Online Tensor Inference,” Xin Wen, Will Wei Sun, and Yichen Zhang develop a new statistical framework that enables both efficient learning and rigorous inference for streaming tensor data. The authors propose an online low-rank tensor estimation method based on stochastic gradient descent that processes observations sequentially without storing historical data, overcoming the memory and scalability limitations of traditional offline approaches. Beyond estimation, the paper introduces a novel online debiasing technique that delivers valid confidence intervals and hypothesis tests on the fly without data splitting. Theoretical results establish near-minimax-optimal convergence rates and asymptotic normality for general linear functionals of tensors. Together, these advances provide a principled foundation for real-time, statistically grounded decision making in fast-changing, data-rich environments.
title_cn: 在线张量推理
abstract_cn: 从大数据到实时决策：在线张量推断 现代数字平台，从电子商务和在线广告到移动健康，生成大量高维数据流，这些数据必须实时分析。在他们的论文《在线张量推断》中，Xin Wen、Will Wei Sun 和 Yichen Zhang 开发了一种新的统计框架，使得对流式张量数据进行高效学习和严谨推断成为可能。作者提出了一种基于随机梯度下降的在线低秩张量估计方法，该方法可以顺序处理观察数据，而无需存储历史数据，从而克服了传统离线方法在内存和扩展性方面的限制。除了估计，论文还引入了一种新颖的在线去偏技术，能够实时提供有效的置信区间和假设检验，而无需进行数据拆分。理论结果确立了张量一般线性泛函的接近最小极大优化收敛速率和渐近正态性。这些进展为快速变化、数据丰富的环境中基于统计的实时决策提供了有原则的基础。

title: Frontiers in Operations: Bounding Counterfactual Outcomes of Health Insurance Delay-and-Deny Practices
abstract: Problem definition: Health insurance delay-and-deny practices, such as requiring prior authorization, frequently restrict access to timely and necessary medical care. These policies can have severe consequences, including delayed diagnosis and treatment, leading to poor patient outcomes or even death. Counterfactual analysis offers a way to assess the impact of these practices by bounding the likelihood that a patient would have survived under alternative policies given the severe consequence under the original policy (probability of necessity). However, quantifying counterfactual probabilities is challenging in dynamic systems, such as those arising in healthcare, where disease progression is often latent and evolves over time. Methodology and results: We develop a principled framework to bound counterfactual probabilities, specifically the probability of necessity (PN), in generalized hidden Markov models (GHMMs). Our approach leverages the structure of GHMMs to construct a feasible space of structural causal models and employs polynomial optimization to compute tight bounds on PN. We integrate domain-specific knowledge to further refine these bounds. A data-driven case study on breast cancer screening and treatment demonstrates the power of our framework. We show that incorporating domain-specific knowledge can reduce the width of PN bounds significantly, thus providing actionable insights. Our computational techniques are scalable, enabling high-quality solutions for time horizons as large as 100 periods within a few hours. Managerial implications: Our framework offers a rigorous tool for evaluating the impact of healthcare policies, such as requiring prior authorization or incorrectly denying a medical screening, on patient outcomes. The ability to estimate counterfactual probabilities has applications in policy and legal analysis and healthcare management. For instance, the bounds on PN can inform court cases by quantifying the impact of an (incorrect) delay-and-deny insurance policy on a particular patient who experienced a detrimental outcome. Beyond healthcare, our methodology is applicable to dynamic latent-state systems in other domains. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0030 .
title_cn: 运营前沿：界定健康保险延迟与拒绝实践的反事实结果
abstract_cn: 问题定义：健康保险的延迟和拒绝做法，例如要求事先授权，通常限制了及时和必要医疗服务的获取。这些政策可能导致严重后果，包括延误诊断和治疗，最终导致患者不良结果或甚至死亡。反事实分析提供了一种评估这些做法影响的方式，即通过界定患者在原政策下严重后果（必要性概率）下，在替代政策下生存的可能性。然而，在动态系统中量化反事实概率具有挑战性，例如在医疗保健中，疾病进展往往是潜在的，且随时间变化而演变。方法论和结果：我们开发了一个原则性框架，以界定反事实概率，特别是必要性概率（PN），在广义隐马尔可夫模型（GHMMs）中。我们的方法利用GHMMs的结构构建结构性因果模型的可行空间，并采用多项式优化技术计算PN的紧界限。我们整合了领域特定知识以进一步细化这些界限。一项关于乳腺癌筛查和治疗的数据驱动案例研究展示了我们框架的强大功能。我们表明，整合领域特定知识可以显著减少PN界限的宽度，从而提供可行的洞察。我们的计算技术具有可扩展性，使得在几小时内为长达100个时间期的高质量解决方案提供支持。管理启示：我们的框架为评估医疗政策（例如要求事先授权或不正确地拒绝医疗筛查）对患者结果的影响提供了一种严格的工具。估计反事实概率的能力在政策和法律分析以及医疗管理中具有应用。例如，PN的界限可以通过量化一次（不正确的）延迟和拒绝保险政策对经历不良结果的特定患者的影响，从而为法庭案件提供参考。除了医疗保健外，我们的方法论也适用于其他领域的动态潜态系统。历史：本文已被《制造与服务运营管理》前沿操作计划接受。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0030查看。

title: A Study of the Attributes of Production and Operations Management Society (POMS) Members and Conference Registrants
abstract: This study examines the composition of attributes among members of the Production and Operations Management Society (POMS). We analyze POMS membership data from 2017 to 2023 and conference registration data from 2011 to 2024. Specifically, the study seeks to: (1) describe the current composition of POMS members and conference registrants in terms of gender, academic rank, and country of affiliation, and (2) provide recommendations for improving representation within professional societies.
title_cn: 对生产与运营管理学会（POMS）成员及会议注册者属性的研究
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了生产与运营管理学会（POMS）成员的属性构成。我们分析了2017年至2023年的POMS会员数据以及2011年至2024年的会议注册数据。具体而言，本研究旨在：(1) 描述当前POMS成员和会议注册者在性别、学术职称和所在国家方面的组成情况，以及(2) 提出提升专业学会中代表性的方法建议。

title: Calling It Quits: A Behavioral Perspective on Exploration and Exploitation in R&D Project Termination
abstract: ABSTRACT Not every R&D project will succeed, necessitating a careful selection of which R&D projects to pursue and which to terminate. Timely termination decisions free up scarce resources for more promising projects. Yet, prior research has yielded inconclusive results on how firms terminate exploratory versus exploitative R&D projects. Given that early‐stage R&D project termination is a decision made under high uncertainty, we adopt a behavioral perspective to reconcile the inconsistent findings. We propose that a firm's preference for terminating exploratory versus exploitative projects depends on three sources of contextual feedback: parallel projects, prior collaboration experience, and firm performance. We test our hypotheses using drug development projects from pharmaceutical firms over 11 years, finding that exploratory projects are less likely to be terminated relative to exploitative ones when the number of parallel projects is limited, when they are conducted with an existing partner, or when firm performance falls below aspiration.
title_cn: 结束探索：从行为视角看研发项目终止中的探索与利用
abstract_cn: 摘要 并非所有的研发项目都会成功，因此需要仔细选择哪些研发项目应继续推进，哪些应终止。及时的终止决策可以为更有前景的项目释放稀缺资源。然而，以往的研究在企业如何终止探索性与开发性研发项目方面的结果并不一致。考虑到早期研发项目的终止是在高度不确定的情况下做出的决策，我们采用行为学视角来调和这些不一致的发现。我们提出，企业对终止探索性项目与开发性项目的偏好取决于三种情境反馈来源：平行项目、先前的合作经验和企业绩效。我们利用制药公司在11年间的药物开发项目来检验我们的假设，发现当平行项目数量有限、与现有合作伙伴共同进行时，或当企业绩效低于期望时，探索性项目相较于开发性项目更不容易被终止。

title: Human-Algorithm Collaboration in Gig Work: The Role of Experience, Skill Level, and Task Complexity
abstract: In this paper, we contribute to recent studies on human-algorithm collaboration by examining how experience, skill level, workload, and task complexity shape the impact of an algorithm-enabled decision-support tool for gig workers. We leverage a large-scale randomized field experiment on the Instacart platform from June 2022 to September 2022. The algorithm-enabled technology aims to revolutionize item picking by helping shoppers locate and collect items more efficiently, reducing picking time while maintaining service quality, as reflected by refund rates. We find that the technology complements experience: rather than diminishing the value of experience, it yields larger improvements for more experienced shoppers. We also find that it substitutes for skill levels by helping lower-skilled workers bridge the performance gap with higher-skilled peers, but lower-skilled workers need experience to fully benefit from the tool. Finally, treatment effects vary with workload and task complexity, clarifying when algorithmic guidance is most valuable. For policymakers, our findings suggest a simple rule: give workers some baseline experience before introducing AI tools, using a staggered rollout with basic training. We also show that these tools can make service more consistent by closing the gap between high performers and lower performers, reducing performance dispersion, and helping standardize quality.
title_cn: 人机协作在零工工作的作用：经验、技能水平和任务复杂性的影响
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们通过考察经验、技能水平、工作负荷和任务复杂度如何影响算法支持决策工具对临时工的影响，来为最近关于人类与算法协作的研究作出贡献。我们利用了从2022年6月到2022年9月在Instacart平台上进行的大规模随机实地实验。该算法支持的技术旨在通过帮助购物者更高效地定位和收集物品，革命性地改进物品挑选，从而减少挑选时间同时保持服务质量，这一点可以通过退款率反映出来。我们发现，这项技术与经验相辅相成：它不仅没有削弱经验的价值，反而为更有经验的购物者带来了更大的改进。我们还发现，它可以替代技能水平，通过帮助低技能工人缩小与高技能同伴之间的表现差距，但低技能工人需要经验才能充分利用该工具。最后，处理效应会因工作负荷和任务复杂度而异，阐明了算法指导最有价值的情境。对政策制定者而言，我们的发现表明一个简单的原则：在引入AI工具之前，给予工人一些基础经验，可以采用分阶段推广和基本培训的方法。我们还展示了这些工具可以通过缩小高绩效者与低绩效者之间的差距，从而减少表现分散性并帮助标准化质量，来使服务更加一致。

title: Role Rectification: How Hybrid Entrepreneurship Turns Entrepreneur Roles from Liability to Advantage in Hiring
abstract: Research shows that certain work roles constrain labor market success when individuals transition to new work roles, as they are viewed as discrediting by potential role partners. However, workers increasingly hold multiple roles simultaneously, which may alter the inferences drawn from roles that are discrediting in isolation. Building on role accumulation theory, we theorize that work roles that are net liabilities in isolation, such as the entrepreneur role, can become net assets as part of a compensatory role set, and we identify a new theoretical mechanism of role rectification through which this effect occurs. Mobilizing verbal protocol, experimental, and archival data sources, we find evidence for role rectification using the case of hybrid entrepreneurs, but we also find that the benefits of role rectification are attenuated in contexts where role accumulation magnifies role nonconformity risks.
title_cn: 角色矫正：混合创业如何将企业家角色从招聘中的负担转变为优势
abstract_cn: 研究表明，在个人转换到新工作角色时，某些工作角色会限制其在劳动力市场的成功，因为这些角色在潜在角色伙伴中被视为不利因素。然而，工人们越来越多地同时担任多个角色，这可能会改变对孤立角色所产生的负面推论。基于角色积累理论，我们提出，孤立来看被视为净负担的工作角色，例如创业者角色，作为补偿性角色集合的一部分时，可以转变为净资产，并且我们识别出了一种新的理论机制——角色整改，通过该机制实现这一效应。利用语言协议、实验和档案数据来源，我们通过混合型企业家的案例找到了角色整改的证据，但我们也发现，在角色积累放大角色不合规风险的背景下，角色整改的益处会减弱。

title: Tied in or Tied Up? The Contrasting Effects of Social Ties on Employee Turnover
abstract: A key theoretical tension in organizational network research lies in understanding how interpersonal connections shape employee turnover. While extensive workplace networks can reduce turnover by granting access to valuable information and resources, they can also increase it by exposing employees to information overload, leading to cognitive strain and disengagement. Drawing on process theory, we bridge these two previously disconnected mechanisms—information access and information overload—to uncover how they jointly influence turnover. We propose that an intermediate number of instrumental workplace connections maximizes retention, as it balances the benefits of information access with the burdens of overload. Specifically, we theorize that information access exhibits diminishing marginal returns in mitigating turnover as additional connections provide less value, while information overload accelerates as employees struggle to process a growing volume of inputs, resulting in a U-shaped relationship between the size of an employee’s network and turnover. We test these arguments across four studies: two preregistered experiments and two field studies of employees in large organizations. Our findings challenge conventional wisdom that larger networks are universally beneficial, providing insights into how the structure of informal networks drives turnover dynamics.
title_cn: 被束缚还是被绑住？社会关系对员工流失的对比影响
abstract_cn: 组织网络研究中的一个关键理论张力在于理解人际关系如何影响员工流动。虽然广泛的工作场所网络通过提供获取有价值信息和资源的机会可以降低流动率，但它们也可能通过使员工面临信息过载而导致认知压力和脱离感，从而提高流动率。基于过程理论，我们将这两个以往无关的机制——信息获取和信息过载——结合起来，以揭示它们如何共同影响员工流动。我们提出，适度数量的工具性工作关系能够最大化员工留任，因为它在信息获取的好处与过载的负担之间取得了平衡。具体而言，我们理论化信息获取在缓解流动率方面呈现递减边际效应，因为额外的关系提供的价值较少，而信息过载会加速增长，因为员工在处理日益增加的信息量时会遇到困难，从而导致员工网络规模与流动率之间呈现U型关系。我们在四项研究中测试了这些论点：两项预注册实验和两项针对大型组织员工的实地研究。我们的发现挑战了更大网络普遍有利的传统观念，提供了对非正式网络结构如何驱动流动动态的深入见解。

title: Congruence of digital technology adoption level and supply chain resilience: a resource orchestration and re-institutionalization perspective
abstract: Purpose Based on socio-technical systems theory, this research aims to explore how (in)congruence between technological intelligence level (TIL) and supply chain cooperation level (SCCL) influences supply chain resilience (SCR). The study further analyzes the mediating role of resource orchestration (REO) and the moderating effect of re-institutionalization (REI). Design/methodology/approach The polynomial regression combined with a response surface analysis was conducted to analyze the survey data from 318 Chinese firms. Additionally, a block variable approach was used to examine the mediating mechanism of REO. Findings The empirical analysis shows that the congruence between TIL and SCCL enhances SCR. Moreover, high−high congruence of TIL and SCCL leads to a greater enhancement of SCR than low−low congruence. In cases of incongruence, high SCCL/low TIL matching patterns result in greater SCR, whereas high TIL/low SCCL patterns do not. Originality/value By overcoming the limitations of traditional single-technology or collaborative perspectives, this study offers a more nuanced understanding of digital technology adoption levels.
