It also systematically examines the joint effects of TIL/SCCL congruence (or incongruence) from a socio-technical systems perspective for the first time. This study contributes to the body of knowledge on SCR driven by digital technology and provides valuable insights for managers on how to leverage supply chain cooperation and technological resources.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 数字技术采用水平与供应链韧性的协同性：资源调度与再制度化视角
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究基于社会技术系统理论，旨在探讨技术智能水平（TIL）与供应链合作水平（SCCL）之间的（不）一致性如何影响供应链韧性（SCR）。该研究进一步分析了资源协调（REO）的中介作用和再制度化（REI）的调节效应。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究采用多项式回归结合响应面分析，对318家中国公司的调查数据进行了分析。此外，采用块变量方法来检验REO的中介机制。 结果 实证分析表明，TIL与SCCL之间的一致性能够增强SCR。此外，TIL和SCCL之间的高−高一致性比低−低一致性对SCR的增强效果更显著。在不一致的情况下，高SCCL/低TIL的匹配模式会导致更大的SCR，而高TIL/低SCCL的模式则没有。 原创性/价值 本研究通过克服传统单一技术或合作视角的局限性，提供了对数字技术采纳水平更为细致的理解。同时，本研究首次从社会技术系统的视角系统性地考察了TIL/SCCL一致性（或不一致性）的联合效应。本研究为数字技术驱动的SCR相关知识体系贡献了一份力量，并为管理者如何利用供应链合作和技术资源提供了有价值的见解。

title: Competitive Externalities in Acquisitions
abstract: While acquisitions are a popular means of corporate development, it is often uncertain whether acquirers capture positive value. This uncertainty is further compounded by the profound competitive implications associated with acquisitions. To shed more light on these implications, we develop the concepts of negative and positive competitive externalities in acquisitions in more detail and outline a framework that explains which acquisitions give rise to which competitive externalities. We then predict their impact on acquirers’ and rivals’ value capture under different synergy and information conditions, providing several insights: First, when negative competitive externalities exist, when no bidder can create unique synergies and bidders are aware of the synergies and externalities, bidders engage in value-destroying acquisitions to avoid negative externalities. A bidder with unique synergies only captures positive value if the unique synergies exceed a rival’s negative competitive externalities. Second, information advantages of one bidder over others are a key factor enabling positive value capture even when competitive externalities exist. Third, faced with positive competitive externalities, bidders may lack incentives to acquire even if further synergies exist, and the most capable acquirer may not capture the most value. Our paper sheds light on competitive externalities in acquisitions and provides important insights for strategic management research.
title_cn: 收购中的竞争外部性
abstract_cn: 尽管收购是企业发展的一个流行手段，但收购方是否能够捕获正向价值常常存在不确定性。这种不确定性因收购所带来的深远竞争影响而进一步加剧。为了更清楚地阐明这些影响，我们对收购中的负向与正向竞争外部性进行了更详细的概念梳理，并提出了一个框架，以解释哪些收购会产生哪些竞争外部性。接着，我们预测了这些外部性在不同协同效应和信息条件下对收购方和竞争对手价值捕获的影响，提供了几个见解：首先，当存在负向竞争外部性时，当没有竞标者能够创造独特的协同效应且竞标者意识到这些协同效应和外部性时，竞标者会进行破坏价值的收购以避免负向外部性。只有当独特的协同效应超过竞争对手的负向竞争外部性时，具有独特协同效应的竞标者才能捕获正向价值。其次，一个竞标者相对于其他竞标者的信息优势是即使在存在竞争外部性的情况下也能够实现正向价值捕获的关键因素。第三，面对正向竞争外部性，竞标者可能缺乏收购的动力，即使存在进一步的协同效应，而最强大的收购者也可能无法捕获最多的价值。我们的论文揭示了收购中的竞争外部性，并为战略管理研究提供了重要见解。

title: Designing Dual-Purpose Organizations: The Role of Soft Governance
abstract: Although the phenomenon of dual-purpose organizations (DPOs)—market-based organizations that pursue both private (commercial) and broader social objectives simultaneously—has been explored extensively in prior literature, the role of organization design in addressing the distinct coordination problems inherent to DPOs has been largely overlooked. We develop a theoretical framework that conceptualizes how design considerations can influence organizational outcomes for DPOs. We identify two central coordination challenges faced by DPOs: an aggregation problem, in which heterogeneous individual preferences and organizational goals must be effectively aligned; and a consolidation problem, in which the dual-purpose nature of DPOs prevents the consolidation of goals into a single organizational meta-goal, resulting in nonhierarchical decision-making structures. We argue that formal organization design processes and mechanisms alone may fail to resolve these coordination problems, and we conceptualize the role and notion of soft governance, which we define as the agentic deployment of informal design mechanisms that shape an organization’s informal decision-making structure. Our core contribution lies in developing an integrative model of dual-purpose organizing that demonstrates how soft governance may complement formal organization design in alleviating the coordination problems inherent in DPOs, thereby supporting their stability and growth.
title_cn: 设计双重目的组织：软治理的角色
abstract_cn: 尽管双重目的组织（DPOs）这一现象——基于市场的组织同时追求私人（商业）和更广泛社会目标——在先前文献中得到了广泛探讨，但组织设计在解决DPOs所固有的不同协调问题方面的作用却 largely overlooked。我们提出了一个理论框架，概念化了设计考虑如何影响DPOs的组织成果。我们识别出DPOs面临的两个核心协调挑战：一是聚合问题，即异质个体偏好和组织目标必须有效对齐；二是整合问题，即DPOs的双重目的特性阻碍了目标的整合为单一的组织元目标，导致非等级的决策结构。我们认为，单凭正式的组织设计流程和机制可能无法解决这些协调问题，并且我们概念化了软治理的角色和概念，我们将其定义为代理性地运用非正式设计机制来塑造组织的非正式决策结构。我们的核心贡献在于发展出一个整合的双重目的组织模型，展示了软治理如何与正式组织设计相辅相成，缓解DPOs的内在协调问题，从而支持其稳定与发展。

title: The Role of Deliberate Silence in Institutional Change
abstract: In this article, I develop insights into deliberate silence as a facilitator of institutional change. I argue that deliberate silence constitutes a form of text that can influence dynamics of discourse positions and discourse content, thereby affecting relationships among relevant actors as well as institutional dynamics. This makes it a useful resource for change proponents located at the center of fields to inconspicuously shift voice toward more peripheral allies, facilitate the visibility of problematizations and novel theorizations, and mitigate the effect of defense strategies from central opponents of change. Starting from a basic discourse-based model of institutional change, I show how a systematic acknowledgment of deliberate silence facilitates a better understanding of discursive dynamics. Specifically, I synthesize four types of deliberate silence—activating, suppressing, affirming, and concealing—in institutional change processes, and model a set of communication strategies based on these types of silence that support change in various ways. These ideas contribute to existing literature by suggesting novel ways of understanding how actors navigate barriers to institutional change, and how interactions between different types of actors during institutional dynamics unfold.
title_cn: 深思熟虑的沉默在制度变革中的作用
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我探讨了故意沉默作为制度变革的推动因素。我认为，故意沉默构成了一种文本形式，能够影响话语位置和话语内容的动态，从而影响相关参与者之间的关系以及制度动态。这使得它成为位于领域核心的变革倡导者的有用资源，可以不明显地将声音转向更边缘的盟友，促进问题化和新理论的可见性，并减轻来自变革中央对手的防御策略的影响。基于一个基本的话语型制度变革模型，我展示了对故意沉默的系统性承认如何促进对话语动态的更好理解。具体而言，我在制度变革过程中合成了四种类型的故意沉默——激活、抑制、确认和隐蔽——并基于这些沉默类型模型了一套支持变革的沟通策略。这些观点对现有文献作出了贡献，提出了理解参与者如何克服制度变革障碍的新方法，以及在制度动态中不同类型参与者之间的互动如何展开。

title: Transaction Governance: Firm-Level Influences and the Organizational Identity Paradox
abstract: We propose a conceptual framework of transaction governance that augments the existing transaction cost economics (TCE) model with research on organizational identity orientation. Our focus is on how particular identity orientations imply preferences for formal versus informal governance mechanisms. These preferences, in turn, are activated when a firm faces particular transaction hazards. In general, the identity orientation construct augments the current perspective on governance choice and helps expand the current TCE model. We also discuss how a firm’s identity orientation is itself systematically shaped (strengthened or weakened) by transactional outcomes. These feedback processes involve certain paradoxes. For instance, even successfully governed transactions may actually weaken a firm’s identity orientation, to the extent that the governance choice is incompatible with the firm’s prevailing identity orientation.
title_cn: 交易治理：企业层面影响与组织身份悖论
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一个交易治理的概念框架，该框架在现有交易成本经济学（TCE）模型的基础上，结合了对组织身份导向的研究。我们关注的是特定的身份导向如何暗示对正式与非正式治理机制的偏好。这些偏好在公司面临特定交易风险时被激活。一般而言，身份导向构念增强了当前对治理选择的视角，帮助扩展了现有的 TCE 模型。我们还讨论了公司的身份导向本身如何系统性地受到交易结果的塑造（强化或削弱）。这些反馈过程涉及某些悖论。例如，即使是成功治理的交易，实际上也可能削弱公司的身份导向，前提是治理选择与公司的主导身份导向不兼容。

title: The psychology of following: Conceptualizing and validating the Fundamental Follower Needs Inventory.
abstract: Humans possess an evolved followership psychology that enables them to identify and endorse different types of leaders depending on situational demands. But what fundamental needs guide these follower endorsements? Across a preliminary study and five validation studies (N = 3,514), we developed and validated the Fundamental Follower Needs Inventory (FFNI)-a psychometrically robust measure that identifies six core follower needs: protection, affiliation, status, guidance (including vision and expertise), and fairness. In Studies 1 and 2, we conducted content validation, tested reliability, and confirmed the factor structure of the FFNI across three domains (general, political, and workplace), three countries (the United States, the United Kingdom, and China), and multiple time points. Study 3 demonstrated FFNI's convergent and discriminant validity. Studies 4 and 5 explored the nomological network, examining its antecedents, consequences, and both predictive and incremental validity. The FFNI provides a novel tool for researchers to investigate how follower needs vary across contexts and cultures and how these needs shape leader endorsements and perceptions of leadership effectiveness. Practically, the FFNI offers leaders a framework to better understand and respond to the psychological needs of those they lead. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 跟随心理学：构思与验证基本跟随者需求清单。
abstract_cn: 人类具备一种进化的追随者心理，这使得他们能够根据情境需求识别和支持不同类型的领导者。但是，哪些基本需求引导这些追随者的支持呢？通过一项初步研究和五项验证研究（N = 3,514），我们开发并验证了基本追随者需求清单（FFNI）——一种在心理测量学上具有良好可靠性的工具，能够识别出六种核心追随者需求：保护、归属、地位、指导（包括愿景和专业知识）以及公平。在研究1和研究2中，我们进行了内容验证，测试了可靠性，并确认了FFNI在三个领域（普通、政治和工作场所）、三个国家（美国、英国和中国）以及多个时间点上的因子结构。研究3证明了FFNI的收敛效度和区分效度。研究4和5探索了名义网络，考察了其前因、后果及预测效度和增量效度。FFNI为研究人员提供了一种新颖的工具，以调查追随者需求如何在不同背景和文化中变化，以及这些需求如何影响领导者的支持和对领导有效性的认知。从实践角度来看，FFNI为领导者提供了一个框架，以更好地理解和回应他们所领导的人的心理需求。（PsycInfo数据库记录 © 2026 APA，版权所有）

title: If it does not kill you, does it make me stronger? The double-edged consequences of observing resilience in the workplace.
abstract: The literature on resilience has focused predominantly on the consequences of resilience for the resilient individuals themselves. Yet, current theorizing on workplace events suggests that the critical and eye-catching nature of demonstrating resilience is likely to draw the attention of other employees. We explore these interpersonal dynamics surrounding resilience by developing and testing a model that delves into the consequences of employees observing their coworkers' resilience. Drawing from social comparison theory, we explain how observing resilience is related to both positive (inspiration) and negative (anxiety) social comparison emotions, based on perceptions of similarity with the resilient individual. We further theorize about the downstream consequences of these emotions for the observer's attitudes (positive mindset about stress) and behavior (adaptive performance). Across a combination of lab and field studies, we found that observing resilience is related to feelings of anxiety when the observer perceives themselves as being dissimilar to the resilient individual. However, the significant positive effect of observing resilience on inspiration was not conditional upon similarity perceptions. In turn, these feelings of inspiration and anxiety were associated with the observer having a more, or less, positive attitude toward stress, respectively, which was ultimately related to helping or hindering their adaptive performance in the workplace. We discuss how our research provides a rich avenue for future studies on the social dynamics surrounding employee resilience. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 如果它不致你于死地，它会让我更强大吗？在职场中观察韧性的双重影响。
abstract_cn: 关于韧性的文献主要集中在韧性对韧性个体自身的影响。然而，目前对工作场所事件的理论探讨表明，展现韧性的关键性和引人注目的特质可能会吸引其他员工的注意。我们通过开发和测试一个模型，探索围绕韧性的这些人际动态，深入研究员工观察同事韧性的后果。根据社会比较理论，我们解释了观察韧性与积极（激励）和消极（焦虑）社会比较情绪之间的关系，这取决于观察者与韧性个体的相似性感知。我们进一步推测这些情绪对观察者态度（对压力的积极心态）和行为（适应性表现）的下游影响。在结合实验室和实地研究的多个案例中，我们发现，当观察者感知与韧性个体存在差异时，观察韧性与焦虑感相关。然而，观察韧性对激励的显著积极影响并不以相似性感知为条件。反过来，这些激励和焦虑感与观察者对压力的态度（积极或消极）相关，最终影响其在工作场所的适应性表现。我们讨论了我们的研究为未来关于员工韧性的社会动态研究提供了丰富的探索方向。

title: The Tragedy of Cemeterial Work: Exploring Ethics Between Polis, Kinship, and Genos
abstract: Abstract Working in a cemetery carries ethical weight – getting it ‘right’ matters. How might tragedy help us to illuminate the meaning, nature, and ethical significance of this work? This paper draws from a feminist reading of the Greek tragedy Antigone, via the theoretical work of Adriana Cavarero, to show what we can learn about the ethico-political significance of cemeterial work as an enactment of grievability. It showcases the power of tragedy through vignettes drawn from a research project on cemeterial work in the UK and Italy, offering valuable insight into the ethical challenges such work entails, as well as its ethical importance. Bringing the empirical and philosophical concerns of the paper together, the analysis shows how cemeterial work is simultaneously ‘dirty’ and meaningful, imbued with ethical responsibility. In so doing, the paper contributes to debates surrounding the relationship between tragedy and business ethics, while also providing insights into a socially and culturally significant yet under-researched type of work.
title_cn: 墓地工作的悲剧：探索城邦、亲属关系与民族之间的伦理关系
abstract_cn: 摘要 在墓地工作带有伦理重担——做到“正确”是重要的。悲剧如何帮助我们揭示这项工作的意义、性质和伦理重要性？本文通过阿德里安娜·卡瓦雷罗的理论，基于对希腊悲剧《安提戈涅》的女性主义解读，展示了我们可以从中学到关于墓地工作作为一种哀悼行为的伦理政治意义。文章通过来自英国和意大利的墓地工作研究项目中的片段，展示了悲剧的力量，提供了对这种工作所涉及的伦理挑战及其伦理重要性的宝贵见解。通过将实证与哲学关切结合，分析表明，墓地工作既“肮脏”又充满意义，承载着伦理责任。通过这一点，本文为悲剧与商业伦理之间关系的辩论作出了贡献，同时也提供了对一种社会和文化上重要但研究不足的工作类型的见解。

title: When Overconfident CEOs Deliver Higher Returns: Evidence From Acquisition Waves
abstract: Overconfident CEOs are frequently criticized for making value-destroying corporate acquisitions in which they acquire excessively and overpay for their acquisitions. By contrast, we argue that overconfident CEOs can deliver higher returns in acquisition waves because the motivation and the requirement for action speed that occur in acquisition waves are different from other acquisition contexts. Specifically, we hypothesize and find that overconfident CEOs are more likely to capture preemption opportunities by acting earlier in acquisition waves, and such rapid moves enable overconfident CEOs to achieve higher acquisition returns. In addition, drawing upon organizational learning research, we hypothesize and find that in acquisition waves, pre-wave experience with large and related acquisitions facilitates overconfident CEOs to pursue acquisitions even more quickly during acquisition waves, which further enhances acquisition returns. Contributions to the acquisitions and CEO overconfidence literatures are discussed.
title_cn: 当过于自信的首席执行官实现更高回报时：来自收购潮的证据
abstract_cn: 过于自信的CEO常常因进行破坏价值的企业收购而受到批评，他们在收购中过度出价并支付过高的价格。相较之下，我们认为过于自信的CEO在收购潮中能够提供更高的回报，因为在收购潮中出现的动机和行动迅速的要求与其他收购情境有所不同。具体而言，我们假设并发现，过于自信的CEO更有可能通过在收购潮中提前行动来捕捉抢先机，而这种快速行动使得过于自信的CEO能够实现更高的收购回报。此外，基于组织学习研究，我们假设并发现，在收购潮中，对大型相关收购的前期经验能够促进过于自信的CEO在收购潮中更加快速地推进收购，从而进一步提升收购回报。我们讨论了对收购及CEO过度自信文献的贡献。

title: Platform competition and strategic trade‐offs for complementors: Heterogeneous reactions to the entry of a new platform
abstract: Abstract Research Summary We study how the entry of a rival platform affects the strategies of the incumbent's complementors. The latter face a trade‐off: While the entry threatens their benefits from indirect network effects, it also allows them to escape intense within‐platform competition. Studying Epic Games' entry into the PC video game market—until then dominated by Steam—we show that this trade‐off does not resolve uniformly, driving heterogeneity in strategic reactions. Complementors with weaker strategic resources (independent developers) were more likely to multihome and became less responsive to the incumbent's attempts to orchestrate collective action through platform‐wide sales promotions. In contrast, complementors more reliant on indirect network effects (multiplayer developers) were less likely to multihome and became more responsive to orchestration attempts. Managerial Summary As competition between digital platforms intensifies, complementors—firms that provide complementary products or services—must adjust how they engage with platform owners. The entry of a rival platform creates both opportunities and risks: it offers an alternative with less intense competition but also fragments the user base that underpins network benefits. We find that these opposing effects shape complementors' behavior differently. Those with fewer strategic resources are more likely to join the new platform and become less willing to follow the incumbent's coordinated initiatives. In contrast, complementors whose products rely strongly on network effects tend to remain with the incumbent and cooperate more closely with its orchestration efforts. For managers, this highlights that platform competition not only shifts market dynamics but also reshapes the motivations and strategies of heterogeneous complementors.
title_cn: 平台竞争与互补者的战略权衡：对新平台入驻的异质反应
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 本研究探讨了竞争平台的进入如何影响现有平台的补充商策略。这些补充商面临一个权衡：虽然竞争者的进入威胁到他们从间接网络效应中获得的利益，但它也使他们有机会逃避平台内的激烈竞争。通过研究Epic Games进入当时由Steam主导的PC视频游戏市场，我们发现这种权衡并非均匀解决，导致战略反应的异质性。战略资源较弱的补充商（独立开发者）更可能跨多个平台运营，并且对现有平台通过全平台促销活动协调集体行动的尝试反应较弱。相反，依赖于间接网络效应的补充商（多人游戏开发者）则不太可能跨多个平台运营，对协调尝试的反应更加积极。 管理总结 随着数字平台之间竞争的加剧，补充商——提供补充产品或服务的公司——必须调整他们与平台所有者的互动方式。竞争平台的进入既带来了机遇也带来了风险：它提供了一个竞争较小的替代选择，但也会导致支撑网络效益的用户基础分散。我们发现，这些对立的影响会以不同的方式塑造补充商的行为。资源较少的补充商更可能转向新平台，并且不太愿意追随现有平台的协调举措。相对而言，那些产品强烈依赖于网络效应的补充商倾向于留在现有平台，并与其协调努力更紧密合作。对于管理者来说，这强调了平台竞争不仅改变市场动态，也重塑了各种补充商的动机和策略。

title: Multidimensional Signaling with Supplier Credit Guarantees
abstract: This paper investigates credit guarantees in a supply chain setting involving a supplier, a capital-constrained buyer, and a bank. We find that under complete information, credit guarantees increase order quantities but paradoxically raise wholesale prices, overall rendering the credit guarantee not useful for improving the operational efficiency. However, under information asymmetry, either a partial or full guarantee emerges in equilibrium, with the wholesale price maintained at its optimal full-information level. This underscores the pivotal role of credit guarantees in effective signaling and delineates the distinct functions of the wholesale price and the guarantee—the former on operational efficiency and the latter on signaling efficacy. Further comparative analysis of the supplier and buyer performances under the two contract types reveals that credit guarantees do not always benefit both parties. This paper was accepted by Jayashankar Swaminathan, operations management. Funding: H. Liu was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72272149 and 72394374]. H. Song was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72501259 and W2411062]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07052 .
title_cn: 多维信号传递与供应商信用担保
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了在供应链环境中涉及供应商、受资本约束的买方和银行的信用担保问题。我们发现，在完全信息下，信用担保虽然能够增加订单量，但却 paradoxically 提高了批发价格，整体上使得信用担保在提高运营效率方面的作用不明显。然而，在信息不对称的情况下，均衡状态下会出现部分或完全担保，同时批发价格保持在最优的完全信息水平。这强调了信用担保在有效信号传递中的关键作用，并描绘了批发价格与担保的不同功能——前者与运营效率相关，后者与信号有效性相关。对两种合同类型下供应商和买方表现的进一步比较分析表明，信用担保并不总是惠及双方。本文由运营管理领域的Jayashankar Swaminathan接收。资助信息：刘赫获得了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助编号 72272149 和 72394374]。宋浩获得了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助编号 72501259 和 W2411062]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07052 获取。

title: Matchmaking Strategies for Maximizing Player Engagement in Video Games
abstract: Managing player engagement is vital to the online gaming industry, given that many games generate revenue through subscription models and microtransactions. We scrutinize engagement management in the prevalent category of competitive video games, where players are frequently matched against one another, and matchmaking systems substantially impact engagement. We propose a dynamic model to analyze player dynamics and optimize matchmaking policies for maximum engagement. Our model takes into account two essential factors in competitive games: heterogeneous skill levels and players’ aversion to losing. Additionally, the model enables us to consider pay-to-win strategies and AI-powered bots, which are contentious methods of influencing player engagement and endogenously affect the optimal matchmaking policy. To provide sharp insights, we analyze a specific case where there are two skill levels, and players churn only after experiencing a losing streak. The optimal matchmaking policy considers both short-term rewards by matching players myopically and long-term rewards by adjusting skill distribution. The pay-to-win system can positively impact player engagement when the majority of players are low-skilled, because adopting pay-to-win also affects skill distribution. This result challenges the conventional wisdom that typically regards pay-to-win as trading player experience for revenue. When incorporating AI-powered bots, we demonstrate that optimizing the matchmaking policy can significantly reduce the number of required bots. We then extend our model and conduct a case study with real data from an online chess platform. The optimal policy can improve engagement by 4%–6% or reduce the percentage of bots by 3% in comparison with skill-based matchmaking. This paper was accepted by Jeannette Song, operations management. Funding: A. N. Elmachtoub is partially supported by NSF [Grant CMMI-1944428]. X. Lei is partially supported by the Hong Kong Research Grants Council [Early Career Scheme 27503123]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02957 .
title_cn: 最大化玩家参与度的游戏 matchmaking 策略
abstract_cn: 有效管理玩家参与度对于在线游戏产业至关重要，因为许多游戏通过订阅模式和微交易生成收入。我们对竞争类视频游戏中的参与度管理进行了深入研究，在这些游戏中，玩家经常彼此对战，而匹配系统对参与度产生了重大影响。我们提出了一种动态模型来分析玩家动态并优化匹配政策，以实现最大参与度。我们的模型考虑了竞争游戏中的两个基本因素：技能水平的异质性和玩家的失落厌恶。此外，该模型使我们能够考虑“付费获胜”策略和AI驱动的机器人，这些都是影响玩家参与度的有争议的方法，并且内生地影响最佳匹配政策。为了提供明确的见解，我们分析了一个特定案例，其中有两种技能水平，并且玩家仅在经历连败后才会流失。最佳匹配政策既考虑了通过目光短浅的方式匹配玩家来获得短期奖励，也考虑了通过调整技能分布来获取长期奖励。当大多数玩家的技能水平较低时，“付费获胜”系统可以对玩家参与度产生积极影响，因为采用“付费获胜”也会影响技能分布。这个结果挑战了传统观念，通常认为“付费获胜”是以牺牲玩家体验换取收入。当引入AI驱动的机器人时，我们展示了优化匹配政策可以显著减少所需机器人数量。随后，我们扩展了我们的模型，并使用来自在线国际象棋平台的真实数据进行了案例研究。与基于技能的匹配相比，最佳政策可以将参与度提高4%–6%或将机器人比例降低3%。该论文被运营管理领域的Jeannette Song接受。资助信息：A. N. Elmachtoub部分获得NSF [资助号CMMI-1944428]的支持。X. Lei部分获得香港研究资助局 [早期职业计划27503123]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02957获取。

title: An Economic Analysis of Online Ad Fraud Deterrence
abstract: Ad fraud is increasingly becoming a major concern in online advertising, with publishers being one of the key sources of fraudulent ad traffic. Although ad fraud deterrence is a critical problem from both technical and economic perspectives, past research has not considered their interplay. Our paper fills this critical gap by building a game-theoretic model wherein an ad network (an intermediary between publishers and advertisers) strategically leverages its technological tool (the configuration of a given fraud detection technology) and economic tool (the payment to publishers) to deter ad fraud and maximize profits effectively. Our analysis generates several interesting findings. For example, as the fraud detection technology and fraud generation techniques improve, we show that although the ad network needs to respond by making the technology configuration stricter to dampen fraud motives and admit less ad traffic, it may sometimes need to increase the payment. Furthermore, although many stakeholders advocate instituting strict legislation and policies to reduce malicious publishers, we show that this may sometimes fail to reduce fraud traffic and even hurt an ad network’s profit. In addition, our results provide other useful implications that present a new theoretical perspective on the incentive problems in ad fraud generation and detection. Our study also draws valuable insights for ad networks into implementing effective ad fraud deterrence policies and for advertisers to audit and monitor their ad campaign performance. This paper was accepted by Hemant Bhargava, information systems. Funding: S. Kumar thanks the Temple Center for International Business Education and Research for partially supporting this research. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02201 .
title_cn: 在线广告欺诈威慑的经济分析
abstract_cn: 广告欺诈在在线广告中日益成为一个主要问题，而出版商是欺诈广告流量的一个关键来源。尽管从技术和经济的角度来看，广告欺诈的防范是一个至关重要的问题，但以往的研究并未考虑二者的相互作用。我们的论文填补了这一重要空白，通过建立一个博弈论模型，在该模型中，广告网络（作为出版商和广告主之间的中介）战略性地利用其技术工具（特定欺诈检测技术的配置）和经济工具（对出版商的支付），以有效地遏制广告欺诈并最大化利润。我们的分析产生了若干有趣的发现。例如，随着欺诈检测技术和欺诈生成技术的进步，我们展示了尽管广告网络需要通过严格技术配置来抑制欺诈动机并减少广告流量，有时它可能还需要增加对出版商的支付。此外，尽管许多利益相关者主张制定严格的立法和政策以减少恶意出版商，但我们表明这在某些情况下可能无法减少欺诈流量，甚至可能损害广告网络的利润。此外，我们的结果提供了其他有用的启示，为广告欺诈生成和检测中的激励问题提供了新的理论视角。我们的研究也为广告网络在实施有效的广告欺诈防范政策以及广告主审计和监控其广告活动表现提供了宝贵的见解。本文由信息系统领域的Hemant Bhargava接受。资助：S. Kumar感谢天普国际商业教育与研究中心对本研究的部分支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02201 获取。

title: An Integer Programming Approach for Quick-Commerce Assortment Planning
abstract: In this paper, we explore the challenge of assortment planning in the context of quick commerce, a rapidly growing business model that aims to deliver time-sensitive products. In order to achieve quick delivery to satisfy the immediate demands of online customers in close proximity, personalized online assortments need to be included in brick-and-mortar store offerings. With the presence of this physical linkage requirement and distinct multinomial logit choice models for online consumer segments, the firm seeks to maximize overall revenue by selecting an optimal assortment of products for local stores and by tailoring a personalized assortment for each online consumer segment. We employ an integer programming approach to solve this NP-hard problem to global optimality. In particular, we derive convex hull results to represent the consumer choice of each online segment under a general class of operational constraints, and to characterize the relation between assortment decisions and choice probabilities of products. Our convex hull results, coupled with a modified choice probability–ordered separation algorithm, yield formulations that provide a significant computational advantage over existing methods. Finally, we illustrate how our convex hull results can be used to address other assortment optimization problems. This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization. Funding: Y. Rong’s work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72025201 and 72221001]. T. He’s work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72101146 and 72231003], and Y. Wang’s work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72331006]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02996 .
title_cn: 一种用于快速商业商品组合规划的整数规划方法
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们探讨了快速商业背景下的商品组合规划挑战。快速商业是一种迅速发展的商业模式，旨在提供时间敏感的产品。为了实现快速交付，以满足附近在线客户的即时需求，个性化的在线商品组合需要融入实体店的产品供应中。鉴于这一物理链接要求以及针对在线消费者细分市场的独特多项式对数选择模型，企业寻求通过为本地商店选择最佳商品组合，并为每个在线消费者细分市场量身定制个性化组合，从而最大化整体收入。我们采用整数规划方法来解决这个 NP-难题，以实现全局最优性。具体而言，我们推导出凸包结果，以表示在一般运行约束条件下每个在线细分市场消费者的选择，并描述商品组合决策与产品选择概率之间的关系。我们的凸包结果结合经过修改的选择概率有序分离算法，提供了显著的计算优势，超越了现有方法。最后，我们说明了我们的凸包结果如何用于解决其他商品组合优化问题。本文由 Chung Piaw Teo 接受，主题为优化。资助：Y. Rong 的研究得到中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号 72025201 和 72221001]。T. He 的研究得到中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号 72101146 和 72231003]，Y. Wang 的研究也得到中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号 72331006]。附加材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02996 获取。

title: A User Purchase Motivation-Aware Product Recommender System
abstract: Retailers struggle to match recommendations to why customers buy. We introduce a practical framework that distinguishes two core, actionable purchase motivations, stable preference and exploratory intent, and present STB, a data-efficient measure that infers which motivation drives each item purchase using only transaction sequences and item attributes. Building on STB, we develop UPSTAR, a motivation-aware recommender that separates users’ behavior into stable-preference and exploratory subsequences and fuses their signals for next-item prediction. Across three real-world e-commerce data sets, UPSTAR substantially improves accuracy and, importantly, advances the system’s ability to surface genuinely exploratory items that drive discovery and cross-category sales. For practitioners, our method enables more targeted marketing: promote reliable items to preference-driven buyers while exposing exploratory buyers to curated novelty, improving conversion and long-term engagement. For platform policy and operations, motivation-aware recommendations support inventory planning, personalized promotions, and responsible diversification of exposure without requiring surveys or extensive auxiliary data. Implementation requires only existing transaction logs and item metadata, making it immediately deployable for large-scale retail systems.
title_cn: 用户购买动机感知的产品推荐系统
abstract_cn: 零售商在匹配顾客购买原因和推荐时面临困难。我们提出了一个实用框架，区分两种核心的可操作购买动机：稳定偏好和探索意图，并提出了STB，这是一种数据高效的度量方式，仅使用交易序列和商品属性，推断出推动每个商品购买的动机。在STB的基础上，我们开发了UPSTAR，一种考虑动机的推荐系统，该系统将用户的行为分为稳定偏好和探索子序列，并融合它们的信息以进行下一个项目的预测。在三组真实的电子商务数据集上，UPSTAR显著提高了准确性，并且重要的是，增强了系统发现真正探索性商品以推动发现和跨类别销售的能力。对于从业者来说，我们的方法能够实现更有针对性的营销：向以偏好驱动的买家推广可靠商品，同时向探索型买家展示精心策划的新奇商品，从而提高转化率和长期参与度。对于平台政策和运营，基于动机的推荐支持库存规划、个性化促销以及负责任的曝光多样化，而无需进行调查或大量辅助数据。实施仅需现有的交易记录和商品元数据，使其可以立即在大规模零售系统中部署。

title: Who Invests, Who Gets Funded: Gender and Racial Bias in LLM-Generated Investment Advice
abstract: Abstract Do large language models (LLMs) generate unbiased financial advice across investor and fund manager demographics? We develop a two-sided audit framework to evaluate demographic bias in LLM-generated investment advice and apply it to multiple large language models, with GPT-4 Turbo as the primary baseline. On the investor side, fund selections are similar across demographic groups and rely on financial criteria, but recommended investment amounts vary when investor names signal race or gender, despite identical age and income. On the fund manager side, capital allocations favor non-Black and male managers: racial disparities persist even under explicit disclosure, while gender-related differences are more pronounced under name-based cues. Bias patterns are qualitatively similar across models, with differences in magnitude between implicit and explicit demographic signaling. These results suggest that, even when LLMs incorporate core financial reasoning, demographic signals can affect allocation decisions, with effects that tend to be stronger under implicit signaling, potentially replicating existing market inequalities and raising concerns about impartiality in financial advising. The proposed audit framework provides a generalizable approach for identifying and evaluating demographic bias in AI-driven financial advisory systems.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 谁在投资，谁获得资金：大语言模型生成的投资建议中的性别和种族偏见
abstract_cn: 摘要 大型语言模型（LLMs）在不同投资者和基金经理人口统计特征中是否能够生成无偏见的财务建议？我们开发了一个双向审计框架，以评估LLM生成的投资建议中的人口统计偏见，并将其应用于多个大型语言模型，以GPT-4 Turbo为主要基准。在投资者方面，基金选择在不同人口统计群体中相似，并依赖于财务标准，但当投资者姓名暗示种族或性别时，推荐的投资金额会有所不同，这在年龄和收入相同的情况下尤为明显。在基金经理方面，资本配置更倾向于非黑人和男性管理者：即使在明确披露的情况下，种族差距仍然存在，而与性别相关的差异在基于姓名的线索中更为明显。模型之间的偏见模式在质上相似，但隐性和显性人口统计信号之间的幅度差异则有所不同。这些结果表明，即便LLMs纳入了核心财务推理，人口统计信号仍然会影响分配决策，在隐性信号下，影响效果往往更强，可能会复制现有的市场不平等，并引发对财务咨询公正性的担忧。所提出的审计框架为识别和评估AI驱动财务咨询系统中的人口统计偏见提供了一种可推广的方法。

title: Platonic Business Ethics: A Survey of the Past and a Discussion of the Future
abstract: Abstract This paper discusses the achievements, the possibilities, and the challenges of Platonic business ethics. Through a systematic scoping review of 695 articles published in 13 business and management journals, it undertakes a knowledge-stock analysis of the almost complete range of Plato’s written texts that have influenced business ethicists and identifies five prominent ways in which they have applied his work. It finds that Plato’s Republic has had the most enduring influence throughout the history of the discipline and details how Plato’s work has been applied to ethical, philosophical, political, managerial, and methodological considerations. Through a brief reading of Protagoras , we highlight the ambiguity of Plato’s dialogical approach to contemporary business ethicists. We then close with Plato’s Ion , indicating difficulties in initiating such dialogues.
title_cn: 柏拉图式商业伦理：过去的回顾与未来的讨论
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文讨论了柏拉图商业伦理的成就、可能性和挑战。通过对发表在13个商业与管理期刊上的695篇文章进行系统性的范围审查，本文对几乎完整的影响商业伦理学家的柏拉图著作进行了知识储备分析，并识别出五种主要的应用方式。研究发现，《共和国》在整个学科历史中具有最持久的影响，并详细说明了柏拉图的著作如何应用于伦理、哲学、政治、管理和方法论的考量中。通过对《普罗泰戈拉》的简要解读，我们强调了柏拉图对当代商业伦理学家的对话式方法的模糊性。最后，我们以柏拉图的《伊昂》作结，指出启动此类对话的困难。

title: Pre-hedging
abstract: The paper “Pre-hedging” studies a dealer that pre-hedges an anticipated potential trade and analyses how this affects the client’s overall execution outcome. It shows that pre-hedging can benefit both parties: Improved risk management over an extended horizon then enables the dealer to charge reduced spreads that more than offset any adverse impact the pre-hedging activity has on the execution price. However, when a dealer pre-hedges too aggressively, this can be detrimental to the client. Timing uncertainty of the potential trade is an effective control held by the client to mitigate any counterproductive pre-hedging. Our results are robust to a setting where competing dealers simultaneously pre-hedge.
title_cn: 预对冲
abstract_cn: 论文“预对冲”研究了一位交易商如何对预期的潜在交易进行预对冲，并分析了这对客户整体执行结果的影响。研究表明，预对冲可以使双方受益：在较长时间范围内改善风险管理使得交易商能够收取降低的价差，从而抵消预对冲活动对执行价格的不利影响。然而，当交易商预对冲过于激进时，这可能对客户造成损害。潜在交易的时机不确定性是客户用以防范任何适得其反的预对冲行为的有效控制手段。我们的研究结果在竞争交易商同时进行预对冲的情境下也是稳健的。

title: Deep Learning for High-Dimensional Continuous-Time Stochastic Optimal Control Without Explicit Solution
abstract: Multiasset Optimal Execution via Deep Learning for High-Dimensional Continuous-Time Stochastic Control In “Deep Learning for High-Dimensional Continuous-Time Stochastic Optimal Control Without Explicit Solution,” Dupret and Hainaut introduce the generalized policy iteration physics-informed neural network, a novel deep learning algorithm for solving high-dimensional continuous-time stochastic optimal control problems even when the optimal control does not admit explicit solution. The method combines physics-informed neural networks with an actor-critic structure based on generalized policy iteration and uses separate networks to approximate both the value function and the multidimensional optimal control. This approach provides a global approximation of the solution across time and space, enabling fast online evaluation. Theoretical guarantees on convergence and optimality are provided, whereas its accuracy and efficacy are empirically validated through two important numerical examples from operations research. Thereby, the authors generalize the Almgren–Chriss framework arising from optimal execution in finance by allowing both temporary and permanent price impacts to be fully nonlinear and by considering a multidimensional setting with multiple cointegrated assets.
title_cn: 无显式解的高维连续时间随机最优控制的深度学习
abstract_cn: 多资产最优执行：基于深度学习的高维连续时间随机控制 在《无显式解的高维连续时间随机最优控制的深度学习》中，Dupret 和 Hainaut 引入了一种广义策略迭代的物理信息神经网络，这是一种新颖的深度学习算法，用于解决高维连续时间随机最优控制问题，即使在最优控制没有显式解的情况下。这种方法结合了基于广义策略迭代的物理信息神经网络和演员-批评者结构，并使用独立的网络来近似价值函数和多维最优控制。该方法在时间和空间上提供了解的全局近似，使得快速在线评估成为可能。研究提供了收敛性和最优性的理论保证，同时通过两例来自运筹学的重要数值示例验证了其准确性和有效性。因此，作者通过允许暂时性和永久性价格影响完全非线性，且考虑多个协整资产的多维环境，推广了源于金融最优执行的Almgren–Chriss框架。

title: Content Exclusivity on Advertising Revenue–Sharing Platforms
abstract: Digital content platforms such as YouTube, TikTok, and Twitch rely on third-party providers and share advertising revenue to incentivize content production. Yet, as providers increasingly distribute content across multiple platforms, competition intensifies and platforms consider exclusive contracts to restrict providers’ multihoming behavior. Our research develops an analytical model to examine when exclusive contracts benefit or harm platforms, providers, consumers, and overall welfare. We find that exclusivity has two key forces: it limits the number of providers on each platform, reducing same-side crowding, but it also weakens the effectiveness of revenue sharing as a competitive tool for attracting providers. As a result, exclusivity benefits platforms only when consumers place low marginal value on content, leading platforms to offer lower sharing rates and earn higher profits. When consumer valuation is high, exclusivity can backfire, reducing platform profits. Importantly, exclusivity can increase provider surplus and even generate win–win outcomes for both platforms and providers at intermediate valuation levels. Although exclusivity reduces consumer surplus because of fewer providers, total social welfare may still increase because of reduced competition costs among providers. These findings suggest policymakers should take a nuanced stance toward regulating content exclusivity.
title_cn: 广告收入共享平台上的内容独占性
abstract_cn: 数字内容平台如YouTube、抖音和Twitch依赖于第三方提供商，并通过分享广告收入来激励内容生产。然而，随着提供商越来越多地在多个平台上分发内容，竞争加剧，各个平台考虑通过独占合同来限制提供商的多平台行为。我们的研究开发了一个分析模型，以考察独占合同何时对平台、提供商、消费者以及整体福利有利或有害。我们发现独占性有两个关键作用：它限制了每个平台上的提供商数量，从而减少同侧拥挤，但同时也削弱了收入分享作为吸引提供商的竞争工具的有效性。因此，只有在消费者对内容的边际价值较低时，独占性才对平台有利，这导致平台提供较低的分享率并获得更高的利润。当消费者的价值评估较高时，独占性可能适得其反，减少平台利润。值得注意的是，在中等价值评估水平下，独占性可以增加提供商的剩余，甚至为平台和提供商创造双赢的结果。尽管独占性因提供商减少而降低了消费者剩余，但由于提供商之间的竞争成本减少，总社会福利仍可能增加。这些发现表明，政策制定者在监管内容独占性时应采取细致的态度。

title: Trustworthiness in Computational Theory Construction: Dimensionalization and Category Surfacing1
abstract: In this methods article, we unpack how researchers can foster trustworthiness in dimensionalization and category surfacing (DCS), a key method family within the genre of computational theory construction (CTC). Information systems (IS), management, and organizational scholars are increasingly leveraging DCS tools such as topic modeling, word embeddings, and clustering to surface latent categories and dimensions from textual data for theory construction. Yet they struggle because evaluations of such research often default to transparency, operationalized as replicability and accountability, which obscures the analytical choices that actually make DCS research rigorous. In this study, we recast transparency as a means toward trustworthiness. We treat researchers’ analytical moves as the primary unit of methodological reasoning in how they design, conduct, and disclose their choices across research phases. We develop a framework that authors, reviewers, and editors can use to construct and evaluate DCS research. The framework specifies how trustworthiness arises from the interplay of two research design choices: primacy to theoretical versus practice lexicons, and whether the content of texts or the structure of the corpus carries the theoretical load. We articulate expectations for conduct and disclosure across these design choices, clarifying how proportionate reasoning anchors trustworthiness. We conclude with implications for advancing trustworthiness within the broader CTC community and across other computational approaches to research.
title_cn: 计算理论构建中的可信度：维度化与类别表面化
abstract_cn: 在这篇方法文章中，我们探讨了研究人员如何在维度化和类别呈现（DCS）中提升可信度，这是一种计算理论构建（CTC）领域内的关键方法系列。信息系统（IS）、管理和组织学者们越来越多地利用DCS工具，如主题建模、词嵌入和聚类，从文本数据中呈现潜在的类别和维度，以进行理论构建。然而，他们面临挑战，因为这类研究的评估往往默认透明性，透明性被操作化为可复制性和问责制，这掩盖了实际上使DCS研究严谨的分析选择。在本研究中，我们重新定义透明性为建立可信度的一种手段。我们将研究人员的分析举措视为方法论推理的主要单元，探讨他们如何在研究的不同阶段设计、实施和披露其选择。我们开发了一个框架，供作者、评审者和编辑使用，以构建和评估DCS研究。该框架具体说明了可信度如何源于两项研究设计选择的相互作用：优先考虑理论词汇与实践词汇，以及文本内容或语料库的结构是否承载理论负担。我们明确了在这些设计选择中的行为和披露期望，阐述了如何通过相称的推理来支撑可信度。最后，我们总结了在更广泛的CTC社区和其他计算研究方法中推进可信度的启示。

title: Sovereignty as a site of innovation: Institutional entrepreneurship in Native American tribal nations
abstract: The sovereign right of self-governance for Native nations has been both contentious and unevenly applied throughout its deeply rooted history in the United States. As a vital aspect of tribal sovereignty, this research explores the outcomes of entrepreneurial self-determination of Native American Tribes. Using a mixed methods approach, our study leans on qualitative interviews of 18 tribal leaders to catalyze a quantitative analysis consisting of data from 161 Native American Tribes collected from the US Federal Register, the National Indian Gaming Commission, and from a Freedom of Information Act request of the US Department of Interior. Data are used to better understand the role that entrepreneurial self-determination plays in Native American Tribes and its effects on economic and cultural sovereignty. What we find is that the institution of sovereignty itself is a site of innovation, where tribal leaders are not only defending but innovating it, reinterpreting what it means and how it functions through modern entrepreneurial mechanisms. The research contributes to innovation policy and institutional theory by theorizing sovereignty as a contested institution that is reshaped by entrepreneurial self-determination under conditions of institutional multiplicity. • Sovereignty is an evolving institution continually shaped through innovation and tribal governance. • Entrepreneurial self-determination reshapes sovereignty’s boundaries and highlights sovereignty-as-innovation. • Tribal leaders work in institutional voids, adapting dominant economic models to local realities. • Institutional entrepreneurship in Native Nations tests boundaries through bricolage and hybridized logics. • Innovating sovereignty can bring economic gains but may involve significant cultural tradeoffs for tribes.
title_cn: 主权作为创新的场所：美洲原住民部落民族的制度性企业家精神
abstract_cn: 土著国家的自我治理主权在美国的悠久历史中一直是一个有争议且应用不均的议题。作为部落主权的一个重要方面，本研究探讨了美洲原住民部落的创业自我决定的结果。我们采用混合方法的研究设计，依托对18位部落领导者的定性访谈，推动了基于来自美国联邦公报、国家印第安人博彩委员会以及美国内政部信息自由法请求的数据的定量分析。数据用于更好地理解创业自我决定在美洲原住民部落中的作用及其对经济和文化主权的影响。我们的研究发现，主权本身就是一个创新的场所，部落领导者不仅在捍卫主权，还在通过现代创业机制对其进行创新，重新诠释主权的意义及其运作方式。该研究为创新政策和制度理论作出了贡献，提出主权作为一个有争议的制度，在制度多元化的条件下被创业自我决定所重塑。 • 主权是一个不断演变的制度，通过创新和部落治理持续塑造。 • 创业自我决定重塑主权的边界，并突显主权作为创新的特性。 • 部落领导者在制度空白中工作，将主流经济模型适应于当地现实。 • 土著国家的制度创业通过拼凑和混合逻辑测试边界。 • 创新主权可以带来经济收益，但可能涉及部落重大的文化权衡。

title: Network‐Enabled Responses to Deglobalization: Examining How Firms Strategize During Eras of Global Disruption
abstract: Abstract Recent research has shown how cycles of globalization and deglobalization can disrupt firms and networks. Understanding this process requires a historical perspective on how firms and networks coordinate, strategize, and respond to the effects of deglobalization. This paper examines firm‐level, network‐enabled strategic responses to deglobalization by analysing a selection of key firms operating within the Liverpool (UK) and New York (USA) networks at the turn of the nineteenth century. The case study analyses firms within a broader network structure through network visualization, supplemented by various archival data sources. We explore the strategic responses of multiple firms and demonstrate how the network supported them, enabling them to address the challenges posed by deglobalization. We identify five categories of network‐enabled strategic responses to deglobalization: reinforcement, adaptation, shared risk, lobbying, and exit.
title_cn: 网络驱动的去全球化响应：考察企业在全球性扰动时期如何制定战略
abstract_cn: 摘要 最近的研究表明，全球化与去全球化的周期会对企业和网络产生干扰。理解这一过程需要历史视角，以观察企业和网络如何协调、制定战略以及回应去全球化的影响。本文通过分析19世纪末利物浦（英国）和纽约（美国）网络中若干关键企业，探讨企业层面的、网络支持的去全球化战略响应。案例研究通过网络可视化分析了企业在更广泛网络结构中的表现，并辅以多种档案数据源。我们探讨了多个企业的战略响应，并展示了网络如何支持它们，使其能够应对去全球化带来的挑战。我们确定了五类网络支持的去全球化战略响应：增强、适应、共享风险、游说和退出。

title: Correction to “Build or buy? The individual and unit-level performance of internally versus externally selected managers over time” by DeOrtentiis et al. (2018).
abstract: Reports an error in "Build or buy? The individual and unit-level performance of internally versus externally selected managers over time" by Philip S. DeOrtentiis, Chad H. Van Iddekinge, Robert E. Ployhart and Tom D. Heetderks (Journal of Applied Psychology, 2018[Aug], Vol 103[8], 916-928; see record 2018-16525-001). In the article, in Table 1, most of the values in the columns for Variables 2 and 3 were incorrectly transposed. The columns with the corrected values are shown in the erratum. (The following abstract of the original article appeared in record 2018-16525-001). At some point, hiring managers in all organizations face the decision of whether to fill open positions with internal candidates (e.g., through promotions) or to hire external candidates (e.g., from competitors or new entrants into the labor market). Despite this ubiquitous choice, surprisingly little research has compared the effectiveness of internal and external selection or has identified situations in which 1 approach may be better than the other. The authors use theory on human capital resources to predict differences between internal and external hires on manager- and unit-level outcomes. Analysis of data from a quick-service retail organization (N = 3,697) suggested that internally hired managers demonstrated higher levels of individual job performance and commanded lower starting salaries than externally hired managers. At the unit-level, operations led by internal hires demonstrated higher performance on organization-specific criteria (i.e., service performance), whereas no internal-external differences were found on more general criteria (i.e., financial performance). They also found some evidence that differences in unit service performance decreased over time (but did not diminish completely) as external hires improved at a slightly faster rate than internal hires. Overall, these findings underscore the complexity of the recurring "build or buy" decision. The results also suggest that internal hires generally outperform external hires, both individually and collectively, and they do so for less money. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 对DeOrtentiis等人（2018）《是自建还是外购？内部选拔与外部选拔经理的个体和单位绩效随时间变化的比较》的更正。
abstract_cn: 报告了Philip S. DeOrtentiis、Chad H. Van Iddekinge、Robert E. Ployhart和Tom D. Heetderks在《应用心理学期刊》（2018年8月，第103卷，第8期，916-928）中发表的文章“建造还是购买？内部与外部选拔经理的个人与单位层面表现随时间的变化”的错误（见记录2018-16525-001）。在文章的表1中，变量2和3列中的大多数数值被错误地交换。更正后的数值列在勘误表中进行了展示。（原文章的摘要如下，出现在记录2018-16525-001中）。在某个时刻，所有组织的招聘经理都面临着是否用内部候选人（例如，通过晋升）填补空缺职位，或者雇佣外部候选人（例如，从竞争对手或新进入劳动力市场的人士）的问题。尽管这一普遍选择，令人惊讶的是，关于内部和外部选拔有效性比较的研究却很少，或者确定何种情况下某种方法可能优于另一种的研究也少之又少。作者利用人力资本资源理论预测内部与外部招聘在经理和单位层面结果上的差异。对一家快餐零售组织（N = 3,697）数据的分析表明，内部招聘的经理表现出更高的个人工作绩效，并且起薪低于外部招聘的经理。在单位层面，内部招聘的运营在特定于组织的标准（即服务绩效）上表现更高，而在更一般的标准（即财务绩效）上则未发现内部与外部之间的差异。他们还发现了一些证据表明，随着外部招聘的提升速度略快于内部招聘，单位服务绩效的差异随时间有所减小（但并未完全消失）。总体而言，这些发现强调了“建造还是购买”这一反复出现的决策的复杂性。结果还表明，内部招聘通常在个人和集体层面上均优于外部招聘，而且其成本也更低。（PsycInfo数据库记录(c) 2026 APA，版权所有）

title: Short-term fit, long-term trap: The career development lock of low-skilled gig workers
abstract: Why do low-skilled gig workers remain stuck in work they originally intended as temporary? Although gig work is widely portrayed as flexible and temporary, our study shows that platforms can gradually trap workers in place. Drawing on grounded theory and fieldwork—including 70 interviews with 42 food delivery riders and 14 ride-hailing drivers, 30 hours of firsthand riding experience, and observations of online communities totalling 820 riders—this study develops a conceptual framework of career development lock, identifying four interrelated forms: lock-out, lock-in, lock-up, and lock-down. We find that career development lock stems from a structural conflict between workers’ long-term aspirations, grounded in a continuous temporal narrative, and platform algorithms’ need for flexible, on-demand labor that operates through a fragmented temporal logic. This conflict generates short-term person–career fit but long-term misfit. Under the structural constraints of algorithmic management, workers turn to adaptive self-exploitation, intensifying short-term fit while undermining long-term misfit, which ultimately traps them in their roles. The study advances understanding of non-linear careers in non-standard employment and reframes algorithmic control as a career-structuring force beyond a day-to-day control mechanism. It also offers practical implications for platforms and policymakers to prevent new forms of career entrapment in the gig economy.
title_cn: 短期适应，长期陷阱：低技能零工工人的职业发展锁定情况
abstract_cn: 为什么低技能的临时工会陷入他们最初打算作为临时工作的岗位？尽管临时工作通常被描绘为灵活和短暂，但我们的研究表明，平台可以逐渐将工人困住。基于扎根理论和实地调研——包括对42名外卖骑手和14名打车司机进行的70次访谈，以及30小时的亲身骑行体验和对820名骑手的在线社区观察——本研究构建了一个职业发展锁定的概念框架，识别出四种相关的形式：锁定、锁定、锁闭和封锁。我们发现，职业发展锁定源于工人长期愿望与平台算法对于灵活、按需劳动的需求之间的结构性冲突，这种按需劳动通过零散的时间逻辑运作。这种冲突产生了短期的人职匹配，但长期不匹配。在算法管理的结构性约束下，工人开始适应性自我剥削，增强短期匹配而削弱长期不匹配，最终将他们困住在自身的角色中。这项研究推动了对非标准就业中非线性职业的理解，并将算法控制重新框定为一种超越日常控制机制的职业结构力量。它还为平台和政策制定者提供了实用建议，以防止在共享经济中出现新的职业困境。

title: The Value of Flexibility from Opaque Selling
abstract: An opaque product refers to a subset of products that only differ in some secondary attribute (such as color or style). After a customer purchases an opaque product, one of the products in the subset is then allocated to the customer. Selling opaque products has become popular on e-commerce platforms, because it is a source of flexibility that reduces demand variability and hence inventory cost. In this paper, we seek to understand how the design of opaque product configurations and the fraction of customers choosing opaque products impact the value of flexibility arising from opaque selling. The key finding from our study is the following insight: A modest opaque selling strategy where (i) the opaque options contain small subsets and (ii) only a small fraction of customers buy opaque products achieves substantial cost savings (compared with nonopaque traditional selling). Moreover, the cost savings of this modest opaque strategy is on the same order as a fully flexible scenario where all customers buy an opaque product. Our analysis relies on exploring a novel connection of multiproduct inventory management to the balls-into-bins framework along with a simple balancing policy for opaque selling. As a byproduct of our analysis, we show that the simple balancing policy is asymptotically optimal. For extensions outside of our theoretical analysis, we conduct extensive numerical experiments to show that our core insights continue to hold. This paper was accepted by Jayashankar Swaminathan, operations management. Funding: This work was supported by the Division of Civil, Mechanical and Manufacturing Innovation [Grant 1944428]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2019.02983 .
title_cn: 不透明销售的灵活性价值
abstract_cn: 不透明产品是指一种子集，产品之间仅在某些次要属性（如颜色或风格）上有所不同。在客户购买不透明产品后，会在该子集中分配其中一款产品给客户。在电子商务平台上销售不透明产品变得越来越流行，因为它为企业提供了一种灵活性，能够降低需求波动，从而减少库存成本。本文旨在探讨不透明产品配置的设计以及选择不透明产品的客户比例如何影响不透明销售带来的灵活性价值。我们的研究关键发现为：一种谦逊的不透明销售战略，其中（i）不透明选项包含小子集以及（ii）仅有少量客户购买不透明产品，能够实现显著的成本节约（与传统的非不透明销售相比）。此外，这一谦逊不透明战略的成本节约与完全灵活的情境相当，即所有客户均购买不透明产品。我们的分析通过探索多产品库存管理与“球进箱”框架之间的新联系，以及针对不透明销售的简单平衡政策来进行。作为我们分析的副产品，我们展示了简单平衡政策在渐近意义上是最优的。对于超出我们理论分析的扩展，我们进行了广泛的数值实验，以证明我们的核心见解依然有效。本文由运营管理领域的Jayashankar Swaminathan接受。资助：本研究得到了土木、机械与制造创新部的支持 [资助号1944428]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2019.02983 获取。

title: Joint Assortment and Inventory Planning Under the Markov Chain Choice Model
abstract: We address the joint assortment and inventory optimization problem for an online retailer facing a set of N substitutable products. The retailer must determine both the assortment and inventories of these products before the start of the selling season to maximize the expected profit. We consider a setting with dynamic SOBS, where consumers’ choices follow the Markov chain choice model. This is a challenging problem, and even computing the expected profit for a given assortment and inventory solution requires solving an intractable dynamic program. We present a sample average approximation-based algorithm for the problem that achieves a regret of [Formula: see text] with respect to an linear program (LP) upper bound. Our algorithm first selects an assortment by balancing the expected revenue (from a single consumer) and the inventory cost. We do this by identifying a subset of products that can pool demand from the universe of substitutable products without significantly cannibalizing the revenue in the presence of dynamic substitution behavior of consumers. We then use a sample average approximation-based LP to decide on the inventory level for each item in the selected assortment. We numerically show that our algorithm considerably improves the performance over standard approaches from the literature on a wide range of instances of the Markov chain choice model and demonstrate that it carefully handles the inventory of products in the long tail (i.e., products with small mean total demand). This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization. Funding: This work was supported by Amazon [Research Award (V. Goyal and O. El Housni)] and the National Science Foundation [Grants CMMI 1636046 (V. Goyal) and 2226900 (O. El Housni)]. The research was partially supported by RGC from Hong Kong [Grant 16215820 (G. Gallego)]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01322 .
title_cn: 马尔可夫链选择模型下的联合品种与库存规划
abstract_cn: 我们针对一个面临N个可替代产品的在线零售商的联合产品组合和库存优化问题进行了研究。零售商必须在销售季节开始之前确定这些产品的组合和库存，以最大化预期利润。我们考虑的是一个动态SOBS环境，其中消费者的选择遵循马尔可夫链选择模型。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，即使计算给定组合和库存解决方案的预期利润也需要解决一个难以处理的动态规划问题。我们提出了一种基于样本平均近似的算法，能够在与线性规划（LP）上界的关系上实现[公式：见文本]的悔恨。我们的算法首先通过平衡单个消费者的预期收入和库存成本来选择产品组合。我们通过识别可以从可替代产品总类中聚合需求的产品子集而不会在消费者的动态替代行为中显著蚕食收入来实现这一目标。然后，我们利用基于样本平均近似的线性规划来决定所选产品组合中每个项目的库存水平。我们通过数值方法表明，针对马尔可夫链选择模型的多种实例，我们的算法显著提高了相对于文献中标准方法的性能，并证明了它能够妥善处理长尾产品的库存（即需求总量较小的产品）。本文被Chung Piaw Teo接受，主题为优化。资助：本研究由亚马逊支持 [研究奖（V. Goyal 和 O. El Housni）] 和国家科学基金会 [资助 CMMI 1636046（V. Goyal）和 2226900（O. El Housni）] 。研究部分得到了香港RGC的支持 [资助 16215820（G. Gallego）] 。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01322 上获得。

title: Optimal Contests with Negative Prizes: Theory and Experiment
abstract: This paper examines the optimal design of contests in the presence of negative prizes and establishes the optimality of a modified all-pay auction with entry fee and reserve. The entry fee always equals the contestants’ liability, and the reserve is weakly higher than in contests without negative prizes. The modification involves awarding all contestants a strictly positive prize if none meet the reserve. This optimal contest better incentivizes high-ability contestants by offering them a higher prize augmented by entry fees, while still ensuring full participation from low-ability contestants. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that when contestants’ liability is sufficiently high, the same contest maximizes both the expected total effort and winner’s effort, with both measures increasing with liability. Numerical simulations show that even with low liability, predictions from the two optimal contests are closely aligned. To test these predictions, we conduct an experiment comparing optimal contests across different liability levels, confirming the “killing-two-birds-with-one-stone” prediction. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Funding: The authors gratefully acknowledge the financial support of the UTS Business School Research Grant, UTS Behavioural Lab Grant and National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72192842, 72203099, 72422018]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03580 .
title_cn: 负奖金的最优竞赛：理论与实验
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了在存在负奖励情况下竞赛的最佳设计，并确立了改进版全付拍卖的最佳性，该拍卖设定了入场费和保底奖励。入场费始终等于参赛者的责任，而保底奖励则弱于没有负奖励的竞赛。所做的修改包括，如果没有参赛者达到保底奖励，则所有参赛者将获得一个严格正的奖励。这种最佳竞赛通过为高能力参赛者提供更高的奖励（由入场费增加）来更好地激励他们，同时仍确保低能力参赛者的全面参与。理论分析表明，当参赛者的责任足够高时，同一竞赛能够最大化预期的总努力和获胜者的努力，且这两项指标均随着责任的增加而上升。数值模拟显示，即使在责任较低的情况下，两个最佳竞赛的预测结果也非常接近。为了验证这些预测，我们进行了比较不同责任水平的最佳竞赛的实验，确认了“事半功倍”的预测。本文由Elena Katok接收，属于运营管理领域。资助：作者诚挚感谢悉尼科技大学商学院研究基金、悉尼科技大学行为实验室资助和中国国家自然科学基金的财务支持[资助号72192842、72203099、72422018]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03580 获取。

title: Forced Ranking Systems and Gender Gaps in Job Tenure
abstract: Using career history data from employees’ online profiles, we provide empirical evidence regarding how human resources systems can affect the gender gap in job tenure. Our results indicate that female workers experience shorter average job tenure than male workers. Our results further show that abandoning forced ranking systems helps to narrow this gender gap. We present experimental evidence indicating that in forced ranking environments, women experience shorter tenure than men and are more likely to exit their roles. This is true even when women are on equal footing with men. Finally, we present survey evidence that under forced ranking systems, more women resign as compared with men. In sum, our empirical, experimental, and survey results indicate that forced ranking systems may contribute to a gender gap in job tenure. Accordingly, abandoning such systems may help promote workplace gender equality. This paper was accepted by Yan Chen, behavioral economics and decision analysis. Funding: This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72472068, 72422022, 72272055, 72321001, 72342009, 72325010, and 72172085], the Key Project of Philosophy and Social Science Research of the Chinese Ministry of Education [Grant 22JZD012], Shenzhen Natural Science Foundation [Grant JCYJ20250604144252069], and Macau University of Science and Technology (MUST) Faculty Research Grant [Project No. FRG-25-013-MSB]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03264 .
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 强制排名系统与性别差距在职位任期中的影响
abstract_cn: 利用员工在线档案的职业历史数据，我们提供了关于人力资源系统如何影响职位任期性别差距的实证证据。我们的结果表明，女性员工的平均职位任期短于男性员工。进一步的结果显示，废除强制排名制度有助于缩小这一性别差距。我们提供的实验证据表明，在强制排名环境中，女性的任期短于男性，并且更有可能退出自己的岗位。这种情况即使在男女处于平等地位时也依然存在。最后，我们呈现的调查证据表明，在强制排名制度下，女性的辞职率高于男性。总之，我们的实证、实验和调查结果表明，强制排名制度可能导致职位任期的性别差距。因此，废除此类制度可能有助于促进职场性别平等。本文已被行为经济学和决策分析领域的Yan Chen接受。资助信息：本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号72472068、72422022、72272055、72321001、72342009、72325010和72172085]、中国教育部哲学社会科学研究重点项目[资助号22JZD012]、深圳市自然科学基金[资助号JCYJ20250604144252069]以及澳门科技大学(MUST)的科研资助[项目编号FRG-25-013-MSB]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03264获取。

title: Algorithms for Loot Box Design
abstract: From Loot Boxes to Better Design: Pricing Randomized Products Randomized rewards—often described as “mystery packs” or “blind-box” mechanics—are now a familiar feature in many video games. Yet choosing a loot box’s price and the odds of each possible drop is not just a design decision; it is a challenging optimization problem. In their accepted Operations Research paper, “Algorithms for loot box design” (Han, Ryan, and Tong, forthcoming), the authors develop an algorithmic framework for designing loot boxes by selecting a purchase price and item drop probabilities to maximize expected revenue under player choice behavior. They show that the general problem is computationally hard, but also identify economically motivated restrictions on player utilities that make the design problem tractable. When the number of items is fixed, the paper provides an exact polynomial-time algorithm under one class of utility structures and efficient approximation algorithms with provable guarantees under another. The analysis also links loot-box design to classic pricing ideas, offering guidance on how to translate item-level values and rarity into transparent, well-performing randomized reward systems.
title_cn: 战利品箱设计的算法
abstract_cn:
从战利品箱到更好的设计：随机产品的定价  
随机奖励——通常被称为“神秘包”或“盲盒”机制——现在已成为许多视频游戏中常见的特征。然而，选择战利品箱的价格和各个可能掉落物品的概率不仅仅是一个设计决策；这是一项具有挑战性的优化问题。在他们即将发表的运营研究论文《战利品箱设计的算法》（Han, Ryan, 和 Tong, 待出版）中，作者开发了一种算法框架，通过选择购买价格和物品掉落概率来最大化玩家选择行为下的预期收入。他们展示了一般问题在计算上是困难的，但也识别出对玩家效用的经济激励限制，使得设计问题变得可处理。当物品数量固定时，论文提供了一种在一类效用结构下的精确多项式时间算法，以及在另一类结构下具有可证明保证的高效近似算法。分析还将战利品箱设计与经典定价理念联系起来，为如何将单个物品的价值和稀有度转化为透明且表现良好的随机奖励系统提供了指导。

title: The Economics of Bestsellers: Consumer Search, Sales Ranking, and Social Learning
abstract: Problem definition: Motivated by major e-commerce platforms’ diverse practices in bestseller information provision, this paper examines consumers’ learning, searching, and purchasing behavior under uncertainty about products’ values, whereas a revenue-maximizing platform strategically decides whether and, if so, how to disclose products’ past sales information to consumers. Methodology/results: We analyze a two-period Bayesian learning model that embeds consumers’ sequential product search in a social learning framework and shows how the interaction between bestseller information and consumer search impacts sales and welfare. We find that a bestseller list constitutes an informative yet noisy signal about the products’ values. The informativeness of the signal is determined by the granularity of the bestseller information. By evaluating bestseller information of two levels of granularity, sales ranking and sales volume, we discover that, although consumers benefit more from information of a higher granularity (i.e., sales volume), the platform may prefer providing information of a lower granularity (i.e., sales ranking), suggesting that the platform may withhold information at the cost of consumers. In particular, an inference effect unique to multiproduct Bayesian learning gives rise to the possibility that disclosure of sales volume backfires and hurts the platform. We demonstrate significant sales implications of bestseller information granularity and show that concave distribution functions for consumers’ search cost, a stochastic increase in product values, or a growth in consumer population can tilt the platform’s preference toward displaying bestseller rankings without revealing sales volumes. Furthermore, we show that bestseller information may lead to lower purchased value or higher search cost, the latter implying that public learning may stimulate rather than substitute private learning. Managerial implications: The paper cautions retail platform practitioners about a pitfall associated with disclosing bestseller sales volume and presents guidelines on the timing and granularity of sales information provision. The findings also suggest e-commerce platforms with consumer-centric goals enhance bestseller information transparency on their marketplaces. Funding: W. Lu gratefully acknowledges support from Johns Hopkins Carey Business School throughout his postdoctoral appointment. The work of M. Yu was partially supported by the Hong Kong Research Grant Council [Grant 16505020] and the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72022023]. Supplemental Material: The online supplement is available at https://isom.hkust.edu.hk/sites/isom/files/people/sales_ranking_supplement_final.pdf .
title_cn: 畅销书的经济学：消费者搜索、销售排名与社会学习
abstract_cn: 问题定义：受主要电子商务平台在畅销产品信息提供方面多样化做法的启发，本文研究了消费者在产品价值不确定情况下的学习、搜索和购买行为，同时考察了一个以收入最大化为目标的平台如何策略性地决定是否以及如何向消费者披露产品的历史销售信息。方法论/结果：我们分析了一个两期的贝叶斯学习模型，该模型嵌入了消费者的顺序产品搜索于社会学习框架中，并展示了畅销信息与消费者搜索之间的互动如何影响销售和福利。我们发现，畅销榜是一种关于产品价值的信息信号，尽管这种信号具有噪声。信号的有效性由畅销信息的细化程度决定。通过评估两种细化程度的畅销信息——销售排名和销售量，我们发现，尽管消费者从更高细化程度的信息（即销售量）中获益更多，但平台可能更倾向于提供较低细化程度的信息（即销售排名），这表明平台可能在消费者利益上有所保留的信息。特别是，独特于多产品贝叶斯学习的推理效应产生了销售量披露反作用并对平台造成损害的可能性。我们展示了畅销信息细化程度对销售的重大影响，并指出，消费者搜索成本的凹形分布函数、产品价值的随机增长或消费者群体的增长都可能使平台的偏好倾向于展示畅销排名而不透露销售量。此外，我们表明，畅销信息可能导致更低的购买价值或更高的搜索成本，后者暗示公共学习可能刺激而非替代私人学习。管理启示：本文提醒零售平台从业者注意与披露畅销销售量相关的陷阱，并提供销售信息提供的时机和细化程度的指导。研究结果还建议，具有以消费者为中心目标的电子商务平台应增强其市场上畅销信息的透明度。资助：W. Lu 感谢约翰霍普金斯大学凯瑞商学院在整个博士后任期内的支持。M. Yu 的工作部分得到了香港研究资助局[资助编号 16505020]和中国国家自然科学基金[资助编号 72022023]的支持。补充材料：在线补充材料可在 https://isom.hkust.edu.hk/sites/isom/files/people/sales_ranking_supplement_final.pdf获取。

title: Revenue Management With Nonparametric Demand Learning and Product Returns
abstract: Product returns are prevalent in practice. Many retailers provide lenient free return policies but with specific return window within which customers are allowed to return products. Motivated by this phenomenon, we consider a single-product online learning and pricing problem with stochastic product returns. A salient feature is that the demand function, depending on price and return window decisions, is initially unknown and must be learned on the fly. The retailer thus faces the classic exploration–exploitation trade-off. Moreover, we consider an inventory constraint, introducing an additional trade-off between earning revenue and managing inventory. We propose a modeling framework to integrate pricing and return window decisions, and develop a deterministic fluid model that serves as the full-information benchmark. To tackle the learning problem, we design a novel nonparametric learning algorithm that seamlessly integrates inverse stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) methods. Under mild assumptions on demand and revenue functions, we establish a regret upper bound for our learning algorithm as <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>O</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">(</mml:mo> <mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>log</mml:mi> <mml:mspace width="0.2em"/> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">)</mml:mo> </mml:math> , where <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> </mml:math> denotes the number of return window candidates and <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:math> denotes the time horizon. This result aligns with lower bounds established in both online pricing and multi-armed bandit (MAB) literature. Numerical experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness and robustness of our algorithm across various environments. From an operational standpoint, retailers can use our learning framework as a decision-support tool to identify the optimal price and return window.
title_cn: 非参数需求学习与产品退货的收益管理
abstract_cn: 产品退货在实际中十分普遍。许多零售商提供宽松的免费退货政策，但设定了特定的退货时间窗口，客户只能在该时间内退货。受这一现象的启发，我们考虑了一个具有随机产品退货的单一产品在线学习和定价问题。一个显著特征是，该需求函数根据价格和退货窗口的决策最初未知，必须动态学习。因此，零售商面临经典的探索与利用的权衡。此外，我们还考虑了库存约束，引入了在获取收益和管理库存之间的额外权衡。我们提出了一种模型框架，以整合定价和退货窗口决策，并开发了一个确定性流体模型，作为全信息基准。为了解决学习问题，我们设计了一种新颖的非参数学习算法，该算法无缝结合了逆随机梯度下降（SGD）和上置信界（UCB）方法。在对需求和收益函数的温和假设下，我们为我们的学习算法建立了一个悔恨的上界为 <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>O</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">(</mml:mo> <mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>log</mml:mi> <mml:mspace width="0.2em"/> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">)</mml:mo> </mml:math>，其中 <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> </mml:math> 表示退货窗口候选的数量，<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:math> 表示时间范围。该结果与在线定价和多臂老虎机（MAB）文献中建立的下界相一致。我们进行了数值实验，以验证我们的算法在各种环境中的有效性和鲁棒性。从运营的角度来看，零售商可以将我们的学习框架作为决策支持工具，以识别最佳价格和退货窗口。

title: Multiproduct Dynamic Pricing With Popularity Bias
abstract: Popularity bias reflects the positive impact of popularity information on consumer choices. There are two common display formats for popularity information on online retail platforms: the total-based cumulative sales format, where the total sales of a product are displayed since its launch, and the period-based cumulative sales format, where only sales within a specific recent period are shown. Both types of popularity information are continuously updated. This paper focuses on the multiproduct dynamic pricing problem with popularity bias. We employ the widely used multinomial logit model to investigate the impact of popularity bias on consumer choices. In particular, we examine how popularity bias affects marginal revenue, pricing decisions, and market shares. Moreover, we highlight that ignoring popularity bias can lead to a suboptimal outcome. As the multiproduct dynamic pricing problem suffers from the curse of dimensionality, we propose a semi-myopic pricing policy, which is computationally tractable, and demonstrate its asymptotic optimality under both formats. Our numerical simulations further indicate that ignoring popularity bias can result in substantial revenue losses, while the semi-myopic pricing policy consistently outperforms other heuristics under both formats. Finally, empirical tests on real data provide a comprehensive procedure for identifying the most appropriate choice models, which offer practical insights for implementation.
title_cn: 多产品动态定价与受欢迎程度偏差
abstract_cn: 流行偏见反映了流行信息对消费者选择的积极影响。有两种常见的流行信息展示格式在在线零售平台上：一种是基于总量的累计销售格式，展示产品自推出以来的总销售额；另一种是基于时间段的累计销售格式，仅显示特定近期内的销售额。这两种流行信息类型会不断更新。本文着重讨论带有流行偏见的多产品动态定价问题。我们采用广泛使用的多项逻辑回归模型研究流行偏见对消费者选择的影响。特别是，我们考察了流行偏见如何影响边际收益、定价决策和市场份额。此外，我们强调忽视流行偏见可能导致次优结果。由于多产品动态定价问题受维度诅咒的影响，我们提出了一种半近视定价策略，该策略在计算上是可处理的，并在这两种格式下证明了其渐近最优性。我们的数值模拟进一步表明，忽视流行偏见可能导致显著的收入损失，而在这两种格式下，半近视定价策略始终优于其他启发式方法。最后，基于实际数据的实证测试提供了一套全面的程序，以识别最适合的选择模型，为实施提供了实际见解。

title: EXPRESS: Offline Learning and Optimization for Multi-product Inventory Management with Stockout-based Substitution
abstract: We deal with a retailer’s multi-product inventory system where customers randomly seek acceptable substitutes if their initial requests are not satisfied. Unsuccessful quests for substitutes would result in lost sales. Motivated by a consulting project as well as other real practices, we also choose to deal with further challenges posed by initially unknown base demand distributions and substitution probabilities; moreover, we aim to develop an offline learning method that (i) takes advantage of given data derived from bygone decisions rather than of any learning-while-doing opportunity, (ii) makes inferences about base-demand distributions and pairwise substitution probabilities without knowing whether there have been demand arrivals after inventory depletions, and (iii) is unhindered by the lack of knowledge about the assortments faced by customers and their purchase-or-no-purchase decisions at their individual arrivals. To address these challenges, we propose an innovative approach based on the Kaplan-Meier estimator that circumvents unrealistic data requirements. Our substitution probability estimates employ carefully designed weighting schemes to facilitate rigorous theoretical analysis through tools such as the Cauchy-Schwartz inequality. Both one-time substitution scenarios and more complex Markov-chain substitution patterns would be accommodated. Using large deviation tools, we establish provably optimal convergence rates of our estimates on top of consistency. The precision in parameter estimates would translate into accuracy in replenishment decisions. For inventory management, we take advantage of a submodularity property to obtain an exact algorithm for the two-product case and a good heuristic for the general multi-product problem. Computational studies based on simulated and actual data confirm the merits of our approach.
title_cn: EXPRESS：基于缺货替代的多产品库存管理的离线学习与优化
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一种零售商的多产品库存系统，在该系统中，客户在初始请求未得到满足时会随机寻找可接受的替代品。对替代品的无果探索将导致销售损失。受到咨询项目以及其他实际案例的启发，我们选择进一步应对初始未知的基本需求分布和替代概率所带来的挑战；此外，我们旨在开发一种离线学习方法，该方法 (i) 利用来自过去决策的已有数据，而不是任何边做边学的机会，(ii) 在不知道库存耗尽后是否有需求到达的情况下，对基本需求分布和成对替代概率进行推断，以及 (iii) 不受客户面临的产品组合及其在各自到达时的购买或不购买决策缺乏知识的限制。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于Kaplan-Meier估计量的创新方法，避免了不切实际的数据要求。我们的替代概率估计采用精心设计的加权方案，以便通过Cauchy-Schwartz不等式等工具进行严格的理论分析。我们将同时考虑一次性替代场景和更复杂的马尔可夫链替代模式。利用大偏差工具，我们建立了在一致性基础上可证明的最优收敛速率。参数估计的精确性将转化为补货决策的准确性。在库存管理方面，我们利用次模性特性为两产品案例获得了精确算法，并为一般多产品问题提供了良好的启发式方法。基于模拟和实际数据的计算研究证实了我们方法的优点。

title: Reactions by Actual Data Breach Victims over Time: Evidence from Facebook’s Cambridge Analytica Breach
abstract: When a data breach happens, both victims, whose data were breached, and nonvictims react negatively but not equally so. In this study, we used Facebook’s Cambridge Analytica data breach to identify to what extent reactions of data breach victims go beyond those of nonvictims. Our findings reveal that victims initially lose more trust, feel more violated, feel more strongly that a psychological contract has been breached, feel less belonging on Facebook, and intend to continue using Facebook less. However, these effects are short-lived, disappearing within six months. Intuitively, one might assume that this is because people are locked in on Facebook and are forced to change their attitudes because they cannot change their behavior by leaving it. Surprisingly, a follow-up experiment shows that this is not the case as we found people who are less locked in to improve their attitudes more over time. Our study adds to the mounting evidence that consumers are unable to act when their data are breached and their privacy is violated and that regulation may be needed to better protect data. The short-lived nature of victims’ reactions we identified in this case also raises questions about the role of postbreach compensation in different contexts.
title_cn: 实际数据泄露受害者的反应随时间变化的证据：来自Facebook剑桥分析公司泄露事件的研究
abstract_cn: 当数据泄露发生时，受害者（其数据被泄露）和非受害者都会产生负面反应，但程度并不相等。在本研究中，我们利用Facebook的剑桥分析数据泄露事件，以识别数据泄露受害者的反应在多大程度上超出非受害者的反应。我们的研究发现，受害者最初失去的信任感更强，感受到的侵犯感更明显，更强烈地觉得心理契约被破坏，在Facebook上感到的归属感更低，并且打算减少使用Facebook的时间。然而，这些影响是短暂的，六个月内便消失了。直观上，人们可能会假设这是因为用户在Facebook上受到束缚，无法通过离开来改变他们的态度。令人惊讶的是，后续实验显示情况并非如此，因为我们发现那些在Facebook上锁定程度较低的人，随着时间的推移其态度改善更明显。我们的研究进一步增加了证据，表明消费者在其数据受到泄露、隐私被侵犯时无法采取行动，并且可能需要加强监管来更好地保护数据。在这个案例中，我们识别出的受害者反应的短暂性也引发了关于不同情境中数据泄露后补偿角色的疑问。

title: Managerial actions using historical values for tackling hyper‐competitive environments: The case of Toyota
abstract: Abstract Research Summary This study provides a causal explanation concerning how managerial actions using historical values contribute to dynamic capabilities, or sustaining competitive advantage in changing environments. Based on historical methods that consist mainly of hermeneutics, contextualization, and source criticism, it analyzes sources and data on how Toyota strategically responded to the competitive dynamics of the automotive industry centered around modularization. This resulted in the identification of three types of managerial action using historical values— filtering , integrating , and modifying —which have a rhetorical influence on the processes of strategic diagnosis, choice, and action respectively in ways that strengthen the microfoundations of dynamic capabilities. This enables the firm to adapt to hyper‐competitive environments while maintaining the idiosyncrasies of its core capabilities. Managerial Summary Toyota has sustained its competitive advantage for decades by consistently relying on its core capabilities, especially the Toyota Production System and its longstanding supplier relations. How has Toyota been able to do so while facing rapidly changing environments? This paper seeks to explore this question by comparing Toyota's and Nissan's strategies in response to modularization in the automotive industry in the 1990s and 2000s. It uncovers how a firm's managers can utilize historical values in ways that influence the processes of strategy formation and implementation. This allows the firm to incorporate key elements of new strategies that its rivals introduce in the marketplace alongside the firm's strategies based on its core capabilities, thereby adapting to hyper‐competitive environments while sustaining its idiosyncrasies and competitive advantage.
title_cn: 利用历史价值应对超竞争环境的管理行动：以丰田为例
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 本研究提供了一种因果解释，阐明管理者如何利用历史价值观促进动态能力的形成，或在变化环境中维持竞争优势。基于主要由解释学、情境化和来源批评构成的历史方法，分析了丰田如何在围绕模块化的汽车行业竞争动态中进行战略响应的来源和数据。这导致识别出三种利用历史价值观的管理行动——过滤、整合和修改——这些行动在战略诊断、选择和行动的过程中分别产生修辞影响，从而增强动态能力的微观基础。这使得企业能够在超竞争环境中适应，同时保持其核心能力的特性。 管理总结 丰田通过持续依赖其核心能力，尤其是丰田生产系统及其长期供应商关系，维持了数十年的竞争优势。面对快速变化的环境，丰田是如何做到这一点的？本文旨在通过比较丰田与日产在1990年代和2000年代对汽车行业模块化的战略响应，探讨这一问题。研究揭示了企业管理者如何利用历史价值观影响战略形成和实施的过程。这使得企业能够将竞争对手在市场上引入的新战略的关键元素与基于其核心能力的企业战略相结合，从而在超竞争环境中适应，同时维持其特性和竞争优势。

title: Knowledge Behind Firewalls: How Rivalry Among Alliance Partners Constrains Innovation Inside Firms
abstract: Organizations can gain substantial knowledge synergies from their alliance portfolios, and research suggests firms may benefit even more when their partners compete directly with each other. However, firms can only capture such synergies if their own inventors are allowed to freely exchange knowledge obtained from these partners to create novel combinations. We challenge this premise and argue that, because partners in such configurations are more concerned about the risks of knowledge leakage to their rivals, they will pressure the focal firm into imposing credible safeguards that restrict the access and handling of knowledge inside its organization. We predict that the constraints imposed by these safeguards will be reflected in a higher disconnectedness in the focal firm’s inventor collaboration network, with the extent of these constraints tied to the relative technological bargaining power the focal firm holds over its partners. Importantly, these safeguards are not costless, and we predict that the disconnectedness induced will affect the focal firm’s innovation performance by undermining its ability to create and appropriate inventive value. Using a longitudinal sample of pharmaceutical firms, we find consistent support for these arguments. Our study contributes to research on interfirm alliances, intraorganizational networks, and innovation while offering practical insights for managers. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.17230 .
title_cn: 防火墙背后的知识：联盟伙伴之间的竞争如何制约企业内部的创新
abstract_cn: 组织可以从其联盟组合中获得显著的知识协同效应，研究表明，当其合作伙伴之间直接竞争时，企业可能会受益更多。然而，企业只有在其自身的发明者可以自由交流从这些合作伙伴获得的知识，以创造新颖的组合时，才能捕捉到这种协同效应。我们挑战这一前提，认为由于在这种配置中，合作伙伴更关注知识泄露给竞争对手的风险，他们将迫使核心企业施加可信的保护措施，以限制其内部对知识的访问和处理。我们预测，这些保护措施施加的限制将反映在核心企业的发明者合作网络中更高的孤立度，而这种限制的程度与核心企业在其合作伙伴中的相对技术谈判能力相关。重要的是，这些保护措施并非没有成本，我们预测，由此产生的孤立度将影响核心企业的创新绩效，削弱其创造和获得发明价值的能力。通过对制药公司的纵向样本分析，我们发现这些观点得到了持续的支持。我们的研究为跨企业联盟、内部组织网络和创新研究做出了贡献，同时为管理者提供了实用见解。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.17230 获取。

title: Understanding Why and When Coworkers Undermine Employees Who Have Friends in High Places
abstract: This research examines why and when coworkers undermine employees who have social capital through high-level friends (i.e., friendship contact status). Drawing on appraisal theory, we theorize that coworkers envy—and subsequently undermine—such employees when they hold unfavorable core evaluations of the employees and perceive these employees’ friendship networks as sparse. For coworkers, unfavorable core evaluations of an employee signal that the person is undeserving of high-level friends, and sparse employee friendship networks signal a lack of guardian protection that increases coworkers’ own dominance-based control potential. These three components—high employee friendship contact status, low core evaluations (low employee deservingness) and low friendship network density (high coworker dominance-based control potential)—jointly drive the envy that fuels coworker undermining. We tested our theory and hypotheses across three studies. Study 1 supports our premise that coworkers negatively appraise employees’ high friendship contact status. Study 2 shows that coworkers’ core evaluations of employees and perceived friendship network density jointly moderate the effects of employee friendship contact status on coworker envy and undermining.
