Study 3 confirms that envy and undermining arise in response to high friendship contact status only when appraised employee deservingness is low and coworker dominance-based control potential is high. Our work highlights the liabilities of social capital, the role of perpetrator predation in workplace mistreatment, and how appraisal processes drive envy in organizations.
title_cn: 理解同事为何以及何时会削弱那些在高层有朋友的员工
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了同事为何以及何时会削弱拥有社会资本的员工，这些员工通过高层次的朋友（即友谊接触状态）建立联系。基于评估理论，我们推测，当同事对员工持有不利的核心评价，并且认为这些员工的友谊网络稀疏时，他们会对这些员工产生嫉妒并随后进行削弱。对于同事而言，不利的核心评价表明该员工不配拥有高层次的朋友，而稀疏的友谊网络则暗示缺乏保护，这增加了同事基于主导地位的控制潜力。这三个要素——高员工友谊接触状态、低核心评价（低员工应得性）和低友谊网络密度（高同事基于主导地位的控制潜力）——共同驱动了促使同事削弱的嫉妒情绪。我们在三项研究中测试了我们的理论和假设。研究1支持我们的前提，即同事对员工的高友谊接触状态持负面评价。研究2显示，同事对员工的核心评价和对友谊网络密度的感知共同调节了员工友谊接触状态对同事嫉妒和削弱的影响。研究3确认，嫉妒和削弱仅在评估的员工应得性低且同事基于主导地位的控制潜力高时，才会对高友谊接触状态产生反应。我们的研究突显了社会资本的负面影响、施害者在职场虐待中的掠夺角色，以及评估过程如何驱动组织中的嫉妒情绪。

title: Fading Memories: The Role of Machine Learning in Organizational Knowledge Depreciation
abstract: Organizational knowledge is essential for sustained competitive advantage, yet it naturally depreciates over time. Traditional rule-based technologies help counter this erosion by serving as stable repositories of knowledge. In contrast, machine learning (ML) systems—an increasingly prevalent and relied-upon technology—introduce new risks. Because their predictive models depend on historical training data, ML systems are vulnerable to model drift: a gradual misalignment with evolving operational realities that creates recurring needs for human-led repair. We develop a multilevel process model showing how and when repeated cycles of ML use and repair can unintentionally accelerate organizational knowledge depreciation. In doing so, we highlight the distinct vulnerabilities of ML systems, challenge the conventional view of technologies as stable repositories of knowledge, and emphasize the importance of deliberate human engagement alongside automation to sustain organizational knowledge over time.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
Personal Information Management and User Behavior
title_cn: 逐渐消逝的记忆：机器学习在组织知识贬值中的作用
abstract_cn: 组织知识对于持续的竞争优势至关重要，但它随着时间的推移自然会贬值。传统的基于规则的技术通过作为知识的稳定存储库来帮助抵御这种贬值。相比之下，机器学习（ML）系统——一种日益普及和依赖的技术——则引入了新的风险。由于其预测模型依赖于历史训练数据，机器学习系统容易受到模型漂移的影响：即与不断变化的操作现实之间的逐渐不协调，从而造成对人力修复的持续需求。我们开发了一个多层次的过程模型，展示了反复使用和修复机器学习的循环如何在不经意间加速组织知识的贬值。在此过程中，我们强调了机器学习系统的独特脆弱性，质疑了技术作为知识稳定存储库的传统观念，并强调了在自动化过程中有意识地进行人类参与的重要性，以维护组织知识的持续性。

title: Searching for Rewards
abstract: Loyalty programs are widespread across various markets, offering members rewards based on their past purchases for future benefits. This study offers new insights into the strategic use of loyalty programs and their impact on market competition by exploring the dynamics of loyalty programs within a repeated ordered search framework, in which consumers sequentially search for the optimal product across multiple firms over two periods. Our findings highlight distinct roles for price discounts and rewards in influencing consumer decisions. Price discounts discourage further search in the current shopping period, whereas rewards encourage consumer loyalty by inducing prominence in subsequent visits. As search costs increase, firms tend to offer lower price discounts but higher rewards, and this results in a higher industry profit but lower consumer surplus. Compared with their absence, loyalty programs decrease both industry profit and consumer welfare, leading to a lose–lose outcome. Moreover, we demonstrate that, when the firms are heterogeneous in terms of their network sizes, those with larger networks tend to offer lower rewards yet achieve greater consumer loyalty in contrast to the firms with smaller networks, which compensate with higher rewards. This paper was accepted by Dmitri Kuksov, marketing. Funding: T.T. Ke acknowledges financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72422003 and 72394395] and the Hong Kong Research Grants Council [Grant 14503122]. X. Zhu acknowledges support from INFORMS Society for Marketing Science Doctoral Early Stage Research Grant (awarded in 2023). Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05203 .
title_cn: 寻求奖励
abstract_cn: 忠诚度计划在各个市场中普遍存在，为会员提供基于其过去购买行为的未来奖励。本研究通过探索重复有序搜索框架内忠诚度计划的动态，提供了关于忠诚度计划的战略使用及其对市场竞争影响的新见解。在这一框架中，消费者在两个时期内依次寻找多家公司中最佳产品。我们的发现突显了价格折扣和奖励在影响消费者决策中的不同作用。价格折扣在当前购物期间抑制进一步搜索，而奖励则通过在随后的访问中增加显著性来鼓励消费者忠诚。随着搜索成本的增加，公司倾向于提供较低的价格折扣但较高的奖励，这导致行业利润提高但消费者剩余减少。与没有忠诚度计划相比，忠诚度计划使行业利润和消费者福利均下降，导致双输的结果。此外，我们还表明，当公司在网络规模上存在异质性时，网络较大的公司倾向于提供较低的奖励，但能获得更高的消费者忠诚度，相较于网络较小的公司，后者则通过提供较高的奖励来弥补。本文经市场学的Dmitri Kuksov接受。资助：T.T. Ke感谢中国国家自然科学基金（资助号72422003和72394395）及香港研究资助局（资助号14503122）的财政支持。X. Zhu感谢INFORMS市场科学学会博士早期研究资助（获奖于2023年）。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05203获得。

title: Female Equity Analysts and Corporate Environmental and Social Performance
abstract: This paper examines the impact of female analyst coverage on firms’ environmental and social (E&S) performance. Exploiting broker closures as a quasi-exogenous shock to analyst coverage, we find that firms experiencing an exogenous decline in female analyst coverage subsequently show a significantly larger drop in E&S scores than those experiencing an equivalent decline in male analyst coverage. To explore the underlying mechanisms, we develop novel machine-learning models to analyze more than 2.4 million analyst reports and 120,000 earnings call transcripts. Our analysis shows that, compared with their male counterparts, female analysts are more likely to address E&S issues, particularly those involving regulatory compliance, stakeholders, and the environment, in both research reports and earnings conference calls. They also display distinct cognitive and linguistic patterns when discussing E&S issues. Furthermore, female analysts are more likely to issue lower stock recommendations and target prices (lower stock recommendations) following negative E&S discussions in their reports (E&S incidents) than male analysts. Finally, investors respond more strongly to female analysts’ negative tones when discussing E&S issues. Overall, our findings suggest that gender diversity among analysts plays a significant role in shaping corporate E&S practices and provide new insights into the origins of gender differences in skills within the equity analyst profession. This paper was accepted by Will Cong, finance. Funding: We acknowledge financial support from the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council of Canada [Grant 435-2022-0285] and the Sauder Exploratory Research Grants Program. K. Li acknowledges financial support from the Canada Research Chair in Corporate Governance. T. Zhang acknowledges data support from the Whitcomb Center for Research in Financial Services at Rutgers University. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06429 .
topics: Impact of AI and Big Data on Business and Society
title_cn: 女性股权分析师与企业环境与社会表现
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了女性分析师覆盖对企业环境与社会（E&S）绩效的影响。通过利用经纪商关闭作为分析师覆盖的准外生冲击，我们发现经历女性分析师覆盖外生下降的公司，其E&S评分的下降幅度显著大于经历男性分析师覆盖相应下降的公司。为了探索其潜在机制，我们开发了新型机器学习模型，分析了超过240万份分析师报告和12万份财报电话会议记录。我们的分析显示，与男性同行相比，女性分析师在研究报告和财报电话会议中更可能提及E&S问题，特别是涉及合规、利益相关者和环境的议题。她们在讨论E&S问题时还表现出 distinct 的认知和语言模式。此外，女性分析师在其报告中对E&S事件进行负面讨论后，更可能给出较低的股票推荐和目标价，而男性分析师则较少如此。最后，投资者对女性分析师在讨论E&S问题时的负面言辞反应更加明显。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，分析师之间的性别多样性在塑造企业E&S实践方面发挥了重要作用，并为理解股权分析师职业中的性别技能差异的来源提供了新视角。本文由Will Cong（金融学）接受。资助：我们感谢加拿大社会科学与人文学科研究委员会的财务支持[拨款编号435-2022-0285]和Sauder探索性研究项目的资助。K. Li感谢加拿大公司治理研究主席的资助。T. Zhang感谢罗格斯大学Whitcomb金融服务研究中心提供的数据支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06429获取。

title: Economics of Multitier Supply Chain Financing
abstract: Problem definition: Supply chain financing solutions allow financially weaker suppliers to secure funding based on the stronger financial standing of their buyers, presenting an alternative to conventional financing. This paper explores the preferences between immediate-tier financing (involving a direct buyer of the supplier) and remote-tier financing (involving a buyer’s buyer). Methodology/results: Using a model of a three-tier supply chain and a financial market, we solve for the subgame-perfect Nash equilibrium for a game comprising supply chain financing supergame and financing subgames between a firm and investors, subject to equilibrium pricing of firms’ assets-in-place and moral hazard frictions. The game is dynamic and stochastic because production shocks and financing subgames occur over time, coinciding with trade transactions between firms, and because of the stochastic evolution of information about firms’ assets-in-place affecting demand for products of each firm. We identify three economic mechanisms that stem from the relative position of firms in the supply chain and that work against remote-tier financing: risk spillover, noise accumulation, and loss of hedging options. Risk spillover occurs when a firm’s pledge of assets to secure supplier financing increases its own financing risk, affecting upstream firms and transactions. Noise accumulation refers to the greater uncertainty in forecasts of asset values, which are realized later for remote-tier buyers. The loss of the hedging option occurs because, by helping the supplier initially, the remote-tier buyer loses some of the capacity to help the immediate-tier buyer later. These mechanisms may explain challenges faced by remote-tier supply chain financing in practice. Managerial implications: The paper highlights the challenges faced by remote-tier financing and identifies conditions under which it can be favorable. It extends traditional finance models to incorporate supply chain considerations, demonstrating the importance of these factors in economic and financial decision making. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1262 .
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 多层供应链融资的经济学
abstract_cn: 问题定义：供应链融资解决方案使财务状况较弱的供应商能够基于其买方的较强财务状况获得资金，这为传统融资提供了一种替代方案。本文探讨了直接融资（涉及供应商的直接买方）和远程融资（涉及买方的买方）之间的偏好。方法论/结果：通过构建一个三层供应链和金融市场的模型，我们为一个包含供应链融资超博弈和融资子博弈的博弈求解出了子博弈完美纳什均衡，该博弈涵盖了公司与投资者之间的互动，并考虑了企业现有资产的均衡定价和道德风险摩擦。该博弈是动态的和随机的，因为生产冲击和融资子博弈随时间发生，并与企业之间的贸易交易相重叠，且由于企业现有资产信息的随机演变影响了每个企业产品的需求。我们识别出三种经济机制，这些机制源于企业在供应链中的相对位置，并且对远程融资产生阻碍：风险溢出、噪音积累和对冲选项的丧失。风险溢出发生在一家公司为确保供应商融资而质押资产时，增加了其自身的融资风险，从而影响上游企业和交易。噪音积累指的是对资产价值预测的不确定性增加，这些预测最终在远程买方中实现。对冲选项的丧失表明，通过最初帮助供应商，远程买方失去了一定程度上对后续帮助直接买方的能力。这些机制可能解释了远程供应链融资在实践中面临的挑战。管理启示：本文强调了远程融资面临的挑战，并识别了在何种条件下其可能是有利的。它扩展了传统金融模型，将供应链的考虑融入其中，展示了这些因素在经济和财务决策中的重要性。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1262 获取。

title: Online Facility Location: Running Stores on Wheels with Spatial Demand Learning
abstract: Problem definition: A shift toward shopping at (autonomous) wheeled vending stores is redefining urban retail. Compared with traditional brick-and-mortar stores, such mobile stores are cost efficient to deploy and adaptive to fast-evolving business environments. However, mobile stores are confronted with unknown demand and limited capacity. Store mobility enables demand learning and profit maximization, yet an optimal dynamic store location policy remains unclear. Methodology/results: We model this “learning-and-earning” problem by taking optimistic actions under parameter uncertainty. The joint optimization over parameter and action set is complicated by the combinatorial nature and infinite choices within the action set. We overcome these challenges by leveraging continuous-approximation methods, and then, we propose a continuous-approximation optimistic (CA-O) learning framework under some special problem structures. Nevertheless, for more general scenarios, the problem remains intricate because of the nonconvexity in unknown parameters. We alternatively propose a CA-O faster learning algorithm by utilizing first-order approximation techniques and further proving a closed-form gradient to guarantee computational efficiency. We theoretically analyze and numerically validate the regret for the proposed algorithms. Managerial implications: In a Toronto case study, our algorithm significantly outperforms baselines. Mobile stores earn higher profits than brick-and-mortar stores through demand learning and store mobility. More broadly, this paper envisions the future landscape of urban retail enhanced by omnipresent mobile facilities. Funding: W. Qi acknowledges the support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72242106, 72188101, and 72521001]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1244 .
title_cn: 在线设施选址：通过空间需求学习运营移动商店
abstract_cn: 问题定义：向（自动化）轮式自助贩卖店购物的转变正在重新定义城市零售。与传统的实体店相比，这种移动商店在部署成本上更具效率，并且能够适应快速变化的商业环境。然而，移动商店面临着需求未知和容量有限的问题。商店的灵活性使得需求学习和利润最大化成为可能，但最佳的动态店铺选址策略尚不明确。 方法论/结果：我们通过在参数不确定性下采取乐观的行动来对这一“学习与收益”问题进行建模。对参数和行动集合的联合优化因组合性质和行动集合内的无限选择而变得复杂。我们通过利用连续逼近方法克服了这些挑战，随后提出了一种在某些特定问题结构下的连续逼近乐观（CA-O）学习框架。然而，对于更一般的场景，由于未知参数的非凸性，问题依然复杂。我们另外提出了一种CA-O快速学习算法，通过利用一阶逼近技术，并进一步证明了封闭形式梯度以确保计算效率。我们对所提出算法的悔恨进行理论分析和数值验证。 管理启示：在多伦多的案例研究中，我们的算法显著超越了基线。移动商店通过需求学习和商店的灵活性实现了比实体店更高的利润。更广泛地说，本文展望了通过无处不在的移动设施改善的城市零售未来格局。 资助：W. Qi 感谢中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号 72242106、72188101 和 72521001]。附加材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1244 获取。

title: From evidence to impact: The use of scientific research in policy documents
abstract: We examine the use of scientific research in the development of policy documents within the context of clinical practice guidelines (CPGs) for diagnosing, treating, and managing diabetes. Using natural language processing, we identify “hidden citations” (i.e., textual credit without formal citations) and “token citations” (i.e., formal citations without textual credit) to scientific research within CPGs to understand how scientific evidence is selected and integrated. We find that both types of citations are pervasive, calling into question the use of formal citations alone in understanding the societal impact of scientific research. Using data on scholarly citations and expert ratings, we find that hidden citations are positively associated with the actual impact of the research on patients and caregivers while token citations associate positively with scientific impact. Qualitative insights gathered from interviews with senior guideline writers further illustrate the reasons for certain functions of scientific research, which involve balancing scientific rigor with practical demands in the guideline writing process, the need for local adaptations, political dynamics on the organizational level, and individual preferences towards certain types of studies or the use of experiential knowledge. Our work underscores the critical role of research utilization in translating scientific evidence into policy, showing that policymaker decisions shape societal impact as much as the engagement efforts of scientists, and extends institutional accounts of symbolic and substantive knowledge use. • We examine the utilization patterns of scientific research in policy documents. • We focus on how scientific evidence is selected and integrated in the context of clinical practice guidelines (CPGs) for the diagnosis, treatment, and management of diabetes. • We identify “hidden citations” (i.e., textual credit without formal citations) and “token citations” (i.e., formal citations without textual credit) to scientific research within CPGs. • Both types of citations are pervasive, calling into question the use of formal citations alone in understanding the societal impact of scientific research. • Qualitative insights further illustrate the reasons for certain use patterns of scientific research.
title_cn: 从证据到影响：科学研究在政策文件中的应用
abstract_cn: 我们研究了科学研究在临床实践指南（CPGs）中用于诊断、治疗和管理糖尿病政策文件发展的应用。通过自然语言处理，我们识别了CPGs中文献研究的“隐藏引用”（即没有正式引用的文本信用）和“象征性引用”（即没有文本信用的正式引用），以理解科学证据是如何被选择和整合的。我们发现这两种类型的引用随处可见，这使得单靠正式引用来理解科学研究的社会影响受到质疑。利用学术引用和专家评分的数据，我们发现隐藏引用与研究对患者和护理人员的实际影响呈正相关，而象征性引用则与科学影响呈正相关。通过对高级指南撰写者的访谈收集的定性见解进一步阐明了科学研究某些功能的原因，这涉及在指南撰写过程中平衡科学严谨性与实际需求、地方适应性的需要、组织层面的政治动态，以及个人对某些类型研究或经验知识使用的偏好。我们的研究强调了研究利用在将科学证据转化为政策中的关键角色，表明政策制定者的决策在塑造社会影响方面与科学家的参与努力同样重要，并扩展了关于象征性和实质性知识使用的制度性论述。 • 我们考察了政策文件中科学研究的利用模式。 • 我们重点关注科学证据在糖尿病的诊断、治疗和管理的临床实践指南（CPGs）中的选择和整合。 • 我们识别了CPGs中文献研究的“隐藏引用”（即没有正式引用的文本信用）和“象征性引用”（即没有文本信用的正式引用）。 • 这两种类型的引用广泛存在，使得单纯依赖正式引用来理解科学研究的社会影响受到质疑。 • 定性见解进一步阐明了科学研究某些使用模式的原因。

title_cn: 更正：通过人工智能驱动的风险缓解和自主韧性实现供应链的认知韧性

title: Why Do Companies Engage in the Creation of Private Governance? A Systematic Literature Review and Research Agenda
abstract: Abstract Many companies create private governance—collectively designed arrangements such as ecological or social standards that guide corporate conduct. Yet explanations for why firms engage in such governance creation remain fragmented across a wide range of studies and disciplines. This article synthesizes existing research into a comprehensive framework that integrates macro-level institutional conditions with meso- and micro-level drivers and barriers, thereby clarifying the antecedents of corporate engagement in the creation of private governance. We also develop a research agenda addressing these gaps within debates on political corporate social responsibility (PCSR). While PCSR articulates normative ideals of legitimate corporate engagement, empirical findings show governance creation often serves instrumental reasons. Our framework clarifies why and under what conditions firms engage in the creation of private governance.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 为什么公司参与私人治理的建立？一项系统文献综述与研究议程
abstract_cn: 摘要 许多公司创建私人治理——共同设计的安排，如引导企业行为的生态或社会标准。然而，关于公司为何参与此类治理创造的解释在众多研究和学科中依然零散。本文将现有研究综合成一个全面框架，将宏观层面的制度条件与中观和微观层面的驱动因素及障碍整合在一起，从而明确企业参与私人治理创造的先决条件。我们还制定了一个研究议程，以解决在政治企业社会责任（PCSR）辩论中存在的这些空白。虽然PCSR阐明了合法企业参与的规范理想，但实证研究表明，治理创造往往服务于工具性理由。我们的框架阐明了企业为何以及在何种条件下参与私人治理的创造。

title: The unintended consequences of state policies on entrepreneurial activity and quality of work life: A social impact study.
abstract: The United States and other countries enacted various policies aimed at containing the spread of COVID-19. Though the pandemic itself took a physical, psychological, and economic toll on society, it is unclear how specific containment policies influenced longer term aspects of employment. Taking up this challenge, this research uses human agency theory to study the effects of U.S. state policy COVID-19 strictness, defined along the spectrum from the absence to the presence (e.g., none, recommended, and mandated) of nine containment policies, on critical macro and micro outcomes. Study 1, using an objective measure of public containment policies enacted during 2020, finds stricter policies (i.e., more restrictions) negatively related to opportunity-based entrepreneurship in 2021. Study 2, using the same public policy strictness measure and a national sample of 801 participants, finds strict policies in 2020 negatively related to residents' entrepreneurial self-efficacy (ESE) in 2024, which in turn related to their entrepreneurial intentions and quality of work life (QWL). The hypothesized interaction between state policy and sex on ESE was not significant, but post hoc analysis reveals that women residing in states with stricter policies reported lower life and career satisfaction than women in states with less strict policies and that the effects of state policy strictness on career and life satisfaction were more negative for women than for men. A supplemental preregistered experimental vignette study reinforced Study 2 findings such that manipulated state policy strictness caused a decrease in ESE, entrepreneurial intentions, and QWL; manipulated ESE also had a significant effect on entrepreneurial intentions and QWL. We discuss the broader implications of these results for theory and policymaking. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Impact of AI and Big Data on Business and Society
title_cn: 国家政策对创业活动和工作生活质量的意外影响：一项社会影响研究。
abstract_cn: 美国及其他国家出台了各种政策，以遏制COVID-19的传播。尽管疫情在身体、心理和经济上对社会造成了影响，但具体的遏制政策如何影响长期就业方面尚不明确。针对这一挑战，本研究使用人类能动性理论，研究美国各州政策对COVID-19严格性（定义为九项遏制政策的缺失到存在的光谱，包括无、建议和强制）的影响，以及这些政策对关键宏观和微观结果的影响。研究1通过对2020年实施的公共遏制政策进行客观测量，发现更严格的政策（即更多限制）与2021年基于机会的企业家精神呈负相关。研究2使用相同的公共政策严格性测量和801名参与者的全国样本，发现2020年实施的严格政策与2024年居民的企业家自我效能感（ESE）呈负相关，而ESE又与他们的企业创业意向和工作生活质量（QWL）相关。州政策与性别对ESE的假设性交互作用并不显著，但事后分析表明，居住在政策更严格州的女性报告的生活和职业满意度低于居住在政策不那么严格州的女性，并且州政策严格性对职业和生活满意度的负面影响在女性中大于男性。一项补充的预注册实验性情境研究进一步证实了研究2的发现：操控的州政策严格性导致ESE、企业家意向和QWL的下降；操控的ESE对企业家意向和QWL也产生了显著影响。我们讨论了这些结果对理论和政策制定的更广泛影响。(PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利)。

title: “I Hold On”: How Country Music Songwriters Cope With the Precarity of Craft Work
abstract: Careers in creative crafts are perceived to be precarious: workers face constant rejection and receive low and erratic pay. Yet, some creative craft workers handle these challenges better than others. Precarity sometimes subsides as careers progress, and the core-periphery structure that typifies creative craft production systems is navigable. This raises the question of how creative craft workers can cope productively with the precarity of craft work. We research a prominent creative craft worker collective: country music songwriters. Our study captures the voices of 90 creative craft workers, drawing on secondary interviews with 66 songwriters working at the core of Nashville’s highly corporatized country music production system, and 24 operating at its social and spatial periphery. We find that the key to coping with precarity lies in achieving supportive patterns of social embeddedness by investing in primary craft skills, advancing higher-order vocational skills, and navigating the core-periphery structure of the creative craft production system. As apprentice songwriters practice their craft and learn how to organize their songwriting routines, they become increasingly vested in the system. Once they become master songwriters, they broaden their networks by liaising more with other industry stakeholders and engage with the system more reflexively to ensure their continued relevance. Peripheral workers engage in allyship and develop ties with workers positioned at the system’s core. We incorporate these social strategies in a grounded theoretical model capturing how songwriters cope with precarity. We conjecture that elements of the model generalize theoretically towards other corporatized creative craft production systems.
title_cn: “我坚持”：乡村音乐词曲作者如何应对创作工作的脆弱性
abstract_cn: 创意工艺职业被认为是具有不稳定性的：从业者面临持续的拒绝，收入低且不稳定。然而，一些创意工艺工作者比其他人更好地应对这些挑战。随着职业的发展，不稳定性有时会有所减弱，而典型的创意工艺生产系统的核心-边缘结构是可以被掌握的。这引发了一个问题，即创意工艺工作者如何能够以积极的方式应对工艺工作的不稳定性。我们对一个知名的创意工艺工作者集体进行了研究：乡村音乐作曲家。我们的研究捕捉了90位创意工艺工作者的声音，基于对66位在纳什维尔高度公司化的乡村音乐生产系统核心工作的作曲家的次级访谈，以及对24位在其社会和空间边缘操作的作曲家的访谈。我们发现，应对不稳定性的关键在于通过投资于基础工艺技能、提高高级职业技能以及掌握创意工艺生产系统的核心-边缘结构，实现支持性的社会嵌入模式。作为学徒的作曲家在实践他们的工艺并学习如何组织他们的作曲日常时，逐渐对系统产生依赖。一旦他们成为大师级作曲家，他们通过与其他行业利益相关者的交流来拓宽网络，并更反思性地参与系统，以确保自己持续的相关性。边缘工人则通过建立合作关系，与处于系统核心的工人发展联系。我们将这些社会策略纳入一个扎根的理论模型，描绘作曲者如何应对不稳定性。我们推测，该模型的元素在理论上可以普遍适用于其他公司化的创意工艺生产系统。

title: When Opposites Don’t Attract: The New Information Environment, Polarization, and What Happens to Social Evaluations When ‘The World Goes to Hell in a Handbasket’
abstract: Abstract Organizations today operate in a new information environment, where changing technologies have enabled fundamentally different forms and pathways of information creation and dissemination while also generating unintended consequences – chief among them increased polarization. In combination, the new information environment and polarization have profoundly altered the social processes underpinning social evaluations. To animate social evaluations research on these issues, we consider how information environment shifts and increased polarization affect the value and durability of five social evaluation types – legitimacy, reputation, status, celebrity/infamy, and stigma/esteem. We highlight the implications for both theorizing about and empirically studying social evaluations in an ever more polarized world.
title_cn: 当对立不再吸引：新的信息环境、极化现象，以及当“世界陷入绝境”时社会评价的变化
abstract_cn: 摘要 当今组织在一个新的信息环境中运作，变化的技术使得信息创建和传播的基本形式与途径发生了根本性变化，同时也产生了意想不到的后果——其中最主要的就是日益加剧的极化现象。新的信息环境与极化现象的结合，深刻改变了支撑社会评估的社会过程。为了推动针对这些问题的社会评估研究，我们考虑信息环境的变化和极化加强如何影响五种社会评估类型的价值和持久性——合法性、声誉、地位、名人/恶名，以及污名/荣誉。我们强调了在日益极化的世界中，对社会评估进行理论研究和实证研究的意义。

title: Against Spiritual Leadership in (For-Profit) Organizations
abstract: Abstract Spiritual leadership has become a prominent approach within the family of horizontal and non-hierarchical leadership styles, aiming to integrate employees’ spiritual needs into organizational life. While existing literature often highlights benefits such as increased well-being, cooperation, and performance, this paper critically examines the ethical and conceptual implications of spiritual leadership in for-profit contexts. It argues that current models tend to emphasize the instrumental value of spirituality, using it as a means to align employees’ motivations with organizational goals, typically centered on productivity and profitability. Building on the philosophy of Gabriel Marcel, the paper contends that spirituality and transcendence inherently resist objectification and measurement, and their integration into the workplace should preserve their depth. Two core problems are identified: the alignment problem , in which spirituality is subordinated to organizational objectives; and the conceptual problem , where reductive definitions obscure its essential qualities. Ultimately, this paper suggests abandoning the leader–follower model when considering spirituality in for-profit organizations.
title_cn: 反对营利组织中的精神领导力
abstract_cn: 摘要 精神领导在水平和非等级领导风格的家族中已成为一种突出的方法，旨在将员工的精神需求融入组织生活。尽管现有文献常常强调如提高幸福感、合作及绩效等好处，但本文对利润导向情境下精神领导的伦理和概念影响进行了批判性审视。文章认为，当前的模型往往强调精神性的工具价值，将其作为一种手段，以使员工的动机与组织目标对齐，通常这些目标集中在生产力和盈利能力上。基于加布里埃尔·马赛尔的哲学，本文主张精神性和超越性本质上抵制物化和量化，其在工作场所的整合应保留其深度。文章识别出两个核心问题：首先是对齐问题，即精神性被降为组织目标的附属品；其次是概念问题，简化的定义遮蔽了其本质特质。最终，本文建议在考虑利润导向组织中的精神性时，放弃领导者—跟随者模型。

title: Organizational telework access dispersion and firm performance
abstract: This study investigates how disparities in access to telework arrangements within organizations influence collective outcomes. By incorporating social identity with justice theories, we develop a conceptual model and hypothesize that greater dispersion in organizational telework access correlates with diminished organizational performance, primarily due to its association with lower collective positive affective tone. However, we argue that collective organizational identification can mitigate this negative impact. Our empirical analysis, leveraging a multisource dataset of 26,783 employees across 186 companies, substantiates this model. These findings advocate for the importance of intra-organizational variation of telework access in enriching our understanding of both the advantages and disadvantages associated with this prevalent work modality.
title_cn: 组织远程办公接入分散与企业绩效
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了组织内部远程工作安排获取的差异如何影响集体结果。通过结合社会身份理论与公正理论，我们建立了一个概念模型，并假设组织内远程工作获取的更大差异与组织绩效的下降相关，主要是因为它与集体积极情感基调的降低相关。然而，我们认为集体组织认同感可以缓解这一负面影响。我们的实证分析利用了来自186家公司、26,783名员工的多来源数据集，支持了这一模型。这些发现强调了组织内部远程工作获取差异的重要性，以丰富我们对这种普遍工作方式相关优势和劣势的理解。

title: Earnings Conference Calls and the SEC Comment Letter Process
abstract: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) reviews firms’ financial reports and issues comment letters to ensure compliance with applicable disclosure and accounting requirements. We explore the nature, determinants, and consequences of SEC comment letters that refer to information disclosed in voluntary earnings conference calls. Using hand-collected data, we document that the SEC primarily references these voluntary disclosures to illustrate insufficiencies and, less commonly, inconsistencies in mandatory filings across a wide range of topics. These letters are more likely to be issued when filing reviews are more complex, SEC staff are less resource constrained, and for firms with more institutional investors and analysts. Conference call–related comments tend to occur during higher-quality review processes and require greater remediation costs than other comments. The SEC’s use of call disclosures also leads to more pronounced changes in firms’ subsequent mandatory filings, particularly when the firm indicates agreement with SEC comments. However, we observe a mixed effect on the overall information environment, consistent with possible unintended consequences for the quality of firms’ voluntary disclosures. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02065 .
title_cn: 收益电话会议与美国证券交易委员会评论信函流程
abstract_cn: 美国证券交易委员会（SEC）对公司的财务报告进行审查，并发出评论函，以确保符合适用的披露和会计要求。我们探讨了 SEC 评论函的性质、决定因素及其后果，这些评论函涉及自愿性盈余电话会议中披露的信息。通过手工收集的数据，我们记录到 SEC 主要参考这些自愿性披露，以说明在一系列主题中强制性文件的不足之处，较少提及不一致性。当文件审查更为复杂、SEC 员工资源较少受限，以及针对拥有更多机构投资者和分析师的公司时，这些评论函更有可能被发出。与会议电话相关的评论往往发生在质量较高的审查过程中，并且所需的补救成本高于其他评论。SEC 对电话披露的使用也导致公司随后强制性文件的显著变化，尤其是在公司表明同意 SEC 评论时。然而，我们观察到对整体信息环境的影响是复杂的，这与公司自愿披露质量可能存在的意想不到后果一致。本文由 Suraj Srinivasan 接受，属于会计领域。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02065 获取。

title: Dynamic Unraveling
abstract: This paper studies price and liquidity dynamics in the presence of costly short-selling when uninformed traders have limited willingness-to-pay to trade securities. In this setting, unraveling and Bayesian social learning interact to produce a novel mechanism, dynamic unraveling: Unraveling that generates signals that lead to future unraveling. Applying the theory, I show how dynamic unraveling explains low-volume crashes: falls in the prices of securities on low or declining trading volume. In this context, short-selling restrictions can make low-volume crashes more likely by intensifying dynamic unraveling, but liquidity injections have the opposite effect. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02412 .
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 动态解构
abstract_cn: 本文研究了在无信息交易者对证券交易的支付意愿有限情况下，成本昂贵的卖空对价格和流动性动态的影响。在这种背景下，解构与贝叶斯社会学习相互作用，产生了一种新机制：动态解构。这种解构会生成信号，导致未来的解构。应用该理论，我展示了动态解构如何解释低交易量崩盘：在低或下降的交易量下，证券价格的下跌。在这种情况下，卖空限制可能通过加剧动态解构，使低交易量崩盘的发生更为可能，而流动性注入则产生相反的效果。本文由Agostino Capponi接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02412获取。

title: Trajectory Normalizing Work in Unstable Production Environments: When Adapting Production Means Appearing Authentic
abstract: Organizations emphasize specific production practices to deal with authenticity pressures, but the practices that signal authenticity to audiences must be continually adapted when production environments are unstable. Changes in the environment can make production practices suddenly infeasible, compelling organizations to perform in different ways the highly visible practices that audiences have come to associate with authenticity. However, authenticity research tends to take the continuity of production practices for granted, focusing on whether certain practices are made visible or not, and leaving unexamined how practices are made legible as they are adapted. Drawing on 16 months of ethnographic fieldwork at a renowned winery (Cal-Cru), I identify a novel form of authenticity work—trajectory normalizing work—that Cal-Cru’s production team performed internally, out of view from external audiences, to guide production changes. Specifically, the team created contrast cues to inform their actions. They avoided changes that would noticeably alter parts of production visible to audiences, or that clashed with their own understanding of authenticity. Doing so created a reassuring sense among the team that they were departing from audience expectations to sustain, not compromise, the practices that conveyed authenticity. My study highlights the backstage tensions constructing authenticity in unstable production environments.
title_cn: 在不稳定的生产环境中规范化工作轨迹：当调整生产手段显得真实时
abstract_cn: 组织强调特定的生产实践以应对真实性压力，但在生产环境不稳定时，向观众传达真实性的实践必须不断适应。环境的变化可能使某些生产实践突然变得不可行，迫使组织以不同的方式执行那些观众已经习惯于与真实性相关联的高度可见的实践。然而，真实性研究往往理所当然地假设生产实践的连续性，关注某些实践是否被显现出来，而未能探讨这些实践在适应过程中是如何被理解的。通过在一家著名酒庄（Cal-Cru）进行16个月的民族志田野研究，我识别出一种新型的真实性工作——轨迹规范化工作——这是Cal-Cru的生产团队在内部进行的，未向外部观众展示，以指导生产变更。具体而言，团队创造了对比线索来指导他们的行动。他们避免做出会显著改变观众可见的生产部分或与他们自身对真实性理解相冲突的变更。这样做在团队中营造了一种安慰感，使他们相信自己是在偏离观众期望，以维持而非妥协传达真实性的实践。我的研究突显了在不稳定的生产环境中构建真实性的后台紧张关系。

title: When Women Stick Together: Network Dynamics and Shared Resources Following Disruptive Events
abstract: Social networks play a role in exacerbating or ameliorating inequality. The persistence of network-based inequality is well documented. However, the mechanisms that disrupt this unequal access to resources remain poorly understood. This study investigates how structurally disruptive events, such as mergers and acquisitions (M&As), reshape gender homophily and resource sharing in networks. We examine how 59 M&As shape the evolution of 82,064 physicians’ referral and patient-sharing networks. We find that disruptive events enhance women’s access to resources by altering gender-homophily dynamics in formation, and maintenance. Specifically, acquisitions intensify men’s tendency to form ties with other men. In contrast, women are more likely to preserve ties with other women, with all-women dyads exhibiting greater resilience and higher maintenance rates than mixed-gender or all-men dyads. This dynamic results in richer networks for women, shielding them from the adverse effects of organizational disruption. These results highlight contrasting network behaviors following disruption: women winnow their networks, reinforcing stable, trust-based relationships with women, while men widen theirs, forming new distant ties with men. By demonstrating how gendered network dynamics evolve in response to disruptions, this study contributes to scholarship on gender inequality, network resilience, and conditions under which homophilous ties can mitigate disparities.
title_cn: 当女性团结一致时：网络动态与破坏性事件后共享资源的研究
abstract_cn: 社交网络在加剧或缓解不平等方面发挥着作用。网络基础的不平等现象持续存在，已有大量文献对此进行了记录。然而，打破这种不平等资源获取的机制仍然不够清晰。本研究探讨了结构性破坏事件（如并购）如何重塑网络中的性别同质性和资源分享。我们分析了59起并购事件如何影响82,064名医生的转诊和患者共享网络的演变。研究发现，破坏性事件通过改变性别同质性动态，增强了女性对资源的获取。具体而言，并购加剧了男性与其他男性建立联系的倾向。相比之下，女性更有可能与其他女性保持关系，所有女性的二元组展现出比混合性别或全男性的二元组更强的韧性和更高的关系维持率。这种动态导致女性建立更丰富的网络，从而保护她们免受组织破裂的负面影响。这些结果突显了在破坏之后网络行为的对比：女性在精简她们的网络，强化与其他女性的稳定、基于信任的关系，而男性则在拓宽他们的网络，与其他男性建立新的远距离联系。通过展示性别化网络动态如何在破坏的影响下演变，本研究为性别不平等、网络韧性以及同质性联系能够缓解差距的条件提供了新的学术贡献。

title: Shelter in scholarship: Evidence from a global survey of hosts for displaced Ukrainian scientists
abstract: In response to Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine in February 2022, the global scientific community launched a range of support offers for displaced Ukrainian scientists. This paper examines the characteristics of these offers that attracted the most interest from Ukrainian scholars. We conduct a survey of hosts offering 2416 support opportunities registered in the #ScienceForUkraine database (22.3% participation rate). 56.9% support offers received at least one eligible application and 47.4% helped at least one Ukrainian scientist. Our analysis reveals that scholarships were more in demand than academic positions, joint applications for funding, or access to resources, and that offers connected to the Humanities were more popular than other disciplines. For hosts, solidarity was the primary motivation to offer help, and the availability of suitable funding was the second most common reason. Focusing on future policy design, our findings imply that support programmes for displaced scientists play a role in motivating hosts to help refugee scholars, and that these programmes should emphasise flexibility and consider the disciplinary composition of the affected academic community. • Reports of a survey among academic hosts of help offers for Ukrainians. • Questions included motivations, distribution channels, number of applications received and Ukrainians assisted. • Results are discussed and compared with recent and historic emergency responses of the academic community. • Possible causes for observed patterns (high effectiveness of offers in Humanities as well as Scholarship offers) are discussed.
topics: Environmental and Biological Research in Conflict Zones
title_cn: 学术庇护：来自全球对乌克兰流亡科学家的接待者调查的证据
abstract_cn: 针对2022年2月俄罗斯对乌克兰的全面入侵，全球科学界启动了一系列支持举措，以帮助流离失所的乌克兰科学家。本文考察了这些支持举措中最受乌克兰学者关注的特点。我们对注册在#ScienceForUkraine数据库中的2416个支持机会进行了调查（参与率为22.3%）。56.9%的支持举措收到了至少一份合格的申请，而47.4%的举措帮助了至少一位乌克兰科学家。我们的分析揭示，奖学金的需求高于学术职位、联合资助申请或资源访问，而与人文学科相关的支持举措比其他学科更受欢迎。对于提供帮助的组织，团结是提供支持的主要动机，适当资金的可获得性是第二大原因。针对未来政策设计，我们的发现暗示，流离失所科学家的支持项目在激励提供帮助的组织帮助难民学者方面发挥了作用，这些项目应强调灵活性并考虑受影响学术社群的学科构成。 • 介绍了对提供帮助的学术组织的调查报告。 • 调查问题包括动机、分发渠道、收到的申请数量和协助的乌克兰人数量。 • 结果进行了讨论，并与学术界最近及历史上的紧急响应进行比较。 • 讨论了观察到的模式（人文学科的支持举措以及奖学金提供的高有效性）的可能原因。

title: Leadership and the Virtue of Humanity: Conceptual Clarity, Systematic Review, and Future Research Agenda
abstract: Abstract Humanity – the virtue enabling meaningful human connection – is vital to the leadership we need to survive our polycrisis context. As a prerequisite to sustainable human community, the virtue of humanity is considered universal. It has been claimed as a ‘higher‐order virtue’, comprised of and enacted by – but irreducible to – a suite of ‘lower‐order virtues’ such as compassion and kindness. This claim is evident in widely‐adopted virtues catalogues, but we lack consensus on how humanity is defined, and which attributes qualify as its virtuous dimensions. To address this, we develop a robust definition of humanity and apply criteria distilled from virtue ethics to theorize the lower‐order virtues that comprise its virtuous dimensions. We thus determine the virtuous dimensions of humanity include empathy, compassion, forgiveness, love, kindness, and generosity. Our processual model illustrates how, when expressed by leaders and followers, these virtuous dimensions represent the fullest expression of the higher‐order virtue of humanity and sustain human community. Our systematic review details what is known empirically about each virtuous dimension of humanity in relation to leadership. Drawing on this, we propose a research agenda to advance understanding of how the virtue of humanity might enable the leadership needed today and into the future.
title_cn: 领导力与人性的美德：概念清晰性、系统性综述与未来研究议程
abstract_cn: 摘要 人性——这一促进有意义人际连接的美德——对我们在多重危机背景下所需的领导力至关重要。作为可持续人类共同体的前提，人性被认为是普遍存在的。它被视为一种“高阶美德”，由一系列“低阶美德”如同情和善良构成并体现，但并不可以简化为这些低阶美德。这一点在广泛采用的美德分类中得到了体现，但我们对人性的定义以及哪些特质可归类为其美德维度缺乏共识。为此，我们制定了人性的稳健定义，并运用从美德伦理中提炼的标准来理论化构成其美德维度的低阶美德。因此，我们确定人性包括同理心、同情、宽恕、爱、善良和慷慨等美德维度。我们的过程模型阐明了这些美德维度在领导者和追随者的表达下，如何代表人性这一高阶美德的最充分表达，并维持人类共同体的存在。我们的系统评审详细列出了与领导力相关的人性的每个美德维度在实证上的已知情况。在此基础上，我们提出了一个研究议程，以促进对人性美德如何在当今及未来促进所需领导力的理解。

title: Thinking-Being With a Garden: Developing Ecocentric Ethics for Sustainable Organising
abstract: Abstract In this paper, we turn to gardens to offer a new ethics of being with the world that can inform sustainable organising. For this, we develop an ecocentric ethics perspective informed by the writing of Karen Barad, in particular her notion of ‘agential cuts’. By reviewing gardening literatures, and exploring our embodied gardening practices, we attempt to ‘step out’ of institutionalised ways of thinking and working to reach for different embodied and relational ways of being with earth-others. We contribute to debates by: (a) tracing multispecies mutualities of ‘cutting-together apart’ within the gardens we tend, to show how such cutting can develop understandings of an entangled ethics in which human involvement can at times be peripheral; and, (b) showing how garden(ing)s can help enrich understandings of ‘ethico-onto-epistemologies’ by situating embodied practices of organising within planetary processes and rhythms which are variously consequential for sustaining forms of life. These contributions stemming from garden(ing)s can help to inform ecocentric thinking-being in business organisations by developing possibilities for (re)conceptualising: how businesses practices, and connected imaginaries, are entangled in creating conditions that can diminish and enhance earth-others existences; and, how the fluidities and temporalities of specifically located webs of life in which businesses activities are part necessitate sensitivities to working with unknowing.
topics: Environmental and Cultural Studies in Latin America and Beyond
title_cn: 与花园的思考—为可持续组织发展生态中心伦理
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了花园，提出了一种新的与世界共处的伦理观，能够为可持续组织提供指导。为此，我们发展了一种以生态中心主义伦理为视角，受卡伦·巴拉德（Karen Barad）著作启发，特别是她的“代理切割”概念。通过回顾园艺文献并探讨我们身体化的园艺实践，我们试图超越制度化的思维和工作方式，寻求与地球他者共生的不同身体性和关系方式。我们的贡献在于：（a）追溯我们所照料的花园中的“共同切割”多物种相互性，以展示这种切割如何发展对一种纠缠伦理的理解，在这种伦理中人类的参与有时可以是边缘化的；（b）展示园艺如何通过将组织的身体化实践置于与各种后果相关的行星过程和节奏中，帮助丰富对“伦理-存在-知识论”的理解。这些源于园艺的贡献有助于在商业组织中形成生态中心思维的实践，发展重新概念化的可能性：即企业实践及其关联想象如何纠缠在创造可能减少和增强地球他者生存条件的过程中；以及特定地点生命网的流动性和时间性如何要求对未知的敏感性。

title: ESG Controversies and Non-Audit Service Fees: European Evidence
abstract: Lapses in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) conduct often manifest through controversies like environmental violations, social misconduct, or governance failures, creating reputational and informational risks for firms and their auditors. While many studies focus on how ESG performance influences audit and assurance outcomes, few examine how adverse ESG events, particularly controversies, shape auditor behavior and market pricing. This study examines whether such controversies affect non-audit services (NAS) pricing and explores how auditors incorporate ESG-related reputational risks into advisory engagements. Drawing on a panel of 4,552 firm-year observations from European listed firms between 2014 and 2023, ESG controversy data from Refinitiv Eikon are analyzed with two-way fixed-effects and instrumental variable (IV) estimations. The findings suggest that ESG controversies and NAS fees are positive and significantly correlated only for severe controversies, indicating that auditors selectively respond to material ethical risks. Supplementary analyses indicate that, in Europe, this relationship is not systematically conditioned by cross-country institutional strength or firm-level governance characteristics, suggesting their limited moderating role. The IV analysis reveals a weak instrumental relationship, implying the observed associations may partially reflect correlated omitted factors rather than definitive causal effects. Overall, the findings suggest ESG controversies have economic repercussions for firms through advisory cost adjustments, particularly when reputational risk is salient. The study enhances understanding of how auditors price ethical and reputational risks, contributing to ongoing debates regarding auditor independence, ESG accountability, and corporate ethics in assurance markets, while offering insights for regulators, managers, and auditors regarding pricing of ESG-related advisory risk.
title_cn: ESG争议与非审计服务费用：欧洲证据
abstract_cn: 环境、社会和治理（ESG）行为的失误常常表现为环境违规、社会不当行为或治理失败等争议，为企业及其审计师带来了声誉和信息风险。虽然许多研究集中于ESG表现如何影响审计和鉴证结果，但很少有研究探讨不利的ESG事件，尤其是争议，如何影响审计师行为和市场定价。本研究考察这些争议是否影响非审计服务（NAS）的定价，并探讨审计师如何将与ESG相关的声誉风险纳入咨询业务中。研究基于2014至2023年间4,552个欧洲上市公司的年度面板数据，分析了来自Refinitiv Eikon的ESG争议数据，并采用双向固定效应和工具变量（IV）估计。结果表明，ESG争议与NAS费用之间仅在严重争议的情况下呈现正向且显著的相关性，这表明审计师对重大伦理风险采取了选择性回应。补充分析表明，在欧洲，该关系并不系统地受国家间制度强度或企业层面治理特征的调节，暗示其有限的调节作用。工具变量分析揭示了较弱的工具关系，意味着观察到的关联可能部分反映了相关的遗漏因素，而非明确的因果效应。总体而言，研究结果表明，当声誉风险显著时，ESG争议对企业具有经济影响，体现在咨询成本的调整上。本研究增进了对审计师如何定价伦理和声誉风险的理解，为审计师独立性、ESG问责制和市场中的企业伦理等持续辩论贡献了观点，同时为监管机构、管理者和审计师提供了有关ESG相关咨询风险定价的见解。

title: Work from Home and the Office Real Estate Apocalypse
abstract: We show remote work led to large drops in lease revenues, occupancy, and market rents in the commercial office sector. We revalue New York City office buildings, taking into account both the cash flow and discount rate implications of these shocks, and find a 46 percent decline in long-run value. For all US office markets combined, we find a $556.8 billion value destruction. Higher-quality buildings were buffered against these trends due to a flight to quality, while lower-quality offices are at risk of becoming a stranded asset. These valuation changes have repercussions for financial stability and local public finances. (JEL E31, E32, G12, J22, M51, R33)
title_cn: 居家办公与办公房地产的末日浩劫
abstract_cn: 我们展示了远程办公导致商业办公领域的租赁收入、入住率和市场租金大幅下降。我们在重新评估纽约市办公楼时，考虑了这些冲击对现金流和折现率的影响，发现长期价值下降了46%。对于整个美国办公市场，我们发现价值损失达5568亿美元。由于对高质量资产的青睐，高质量建筑在这些趋势中受到了缓冲，而低质量办公室则面临成为滞留资产的风险。这些估值变化对金融稳定性和地方公共财政产生了深远影响。（JEL E31, E32, G12, J22, M51, R33）

title: “Potential” and the Gender Promotion Gap
abstract: We show that subjective assessments of employee “potential” contribute to gender gaps in promotion and pay. Using data on 29,809 management-track employees from a large retail chain, we find that women receive substantially lower potential ratings despite receiving higher performance ratings. Differences in potential ratings account for approximately half of the gender promotion gap. Women’s lower potential ratings do not reflect accurate forecasts of future performance: Women subsequently outperform male colleagues, both on average and on the margin of promotion. We highlight two mechanisms driving the gender potential gap: strategic retention and stereotyping. (JEL J16, J31, J71, L81, M12, M51)
title_cn: “潜力”与性别晋升差距
abstract_cn: 我们显示了员工“潜力”的主观评估如何导致晋升和薪酬的性别差距。通过对一大型零售连锁店29,809名管理职位员工的数据分析，我们发现，女性的潜力评分明显低于男性，尽管她们的绩效评估更高。潜力评分的差异构成了性别晋升差距的约一半。女性较低的潜力评分并未能准确预测未来的表现：女性在晋升的平均表现和边际表现上都优于男性同事。我们强调了推动性别潜力差距的两个机制：战略性留任和刻板印象。 (JEL J16, J31, J71, L81, M12, M51)

title: Evaluating the Impact of Urban Transit Infrastructure: Evidence from Bogotá’s TransMilenio
abstract: This paper estimates the effects of improving public transit infrastructure on city structure and welfare. It develops a quantitative urban model with multiple worker groups and transit modes, and derives a special case yielding sufficient statistics for aggregate welfare in a broad class of models. The paper estimates reduced-form elasticities to implement the approach using data spanning construction of the world’s largest Bus Rapid Transit system in Bogotá, Colombia. This class of models explains observed adjustments in economic activity. Standard value-of-time calculations capture only 52 percent of welfare gains. Accounting for reallocation and general equilibrium effects, distributional impacts are modest. (JEL H76, L92, L98, O18, R42, R53)
title_cn: 评估城市交通基础设施的影响：来自波哥大TransMilenio的证据
abstract_cn: 本文估计了改善公共交通基础设施对城市结构和福利的影响。它开发了一个包含多个工人群体和交通模式的定量城市模型，并推导出一个特例，为广泛类别模型中的总福利提供了充分统计量。本文利用覆盖哥伦比亚波哥大世界最大快速公交系统建设的数据，估计了简化形式的弹性，以实施该方法。这类模型解释了经济活动的观察调整。标准的时间价值计算仅捕捉到福利增益的52%。考虑到资源重新配置和一般均衡效应，分配影响相对温和。 (JEL H76, L92, L98, O18, R42, R53)

title: Financial Frictions: Micro versus Macro Volatility
abstract: We argue that consumer credit spreads matter for household choices and that time-varying spreads have important distributional consequences. Studying Danish household data, we show that consumer credit spreads have heterogeneous impact on asset dynamics and consumption choices across the wealth distribution and that time-varying spreads induce a countercyclical marginal propensity to consume. We study a HANK model where banks provide consumer credit and corporate loans. Through countercyclical credit spreads, frictional finance amplifies aggregate shocks and induces consumption inequality. Economies with less leveraged banks experience reduced aggregate volatility but may face higher volatility and lower welfare at the household level. (JEL D12, D31, E12, E21, E32, E52, G51)
topics: Italy: Economic History and Contemporary Issues
title_cn: 金融摩擦：微观与宏观波动性
abstract_cn: 我们认为消费者信贷利差对家庭选择具有重要影响，并且时变利差会带来显著的分配后果。通过研究丹麦家庭数据，我们发现消费者信贷利差对财富分布中的资产动态和消费选择具有异质性影响，并且时变利差会导致边际消费倾向呈反周期性。我们研究了一个HANK模型，其中银行提供消费者信贷和企业贷款。通过反周期信贷利差，摩擦性金融放大了总量冲击，并引发消费不平等。在杠杆水平较低的银行体系中，经济体经历的总量波动性较小，但家庭层面可能面临更高的波动性和较低的福利。 (JEL D12, D31, E12, E21, E32, E52, G51)

title: Competition under Incomplete Contracts and the Design of Procurement Policies
abstract: We study the effects of intensifying competition for contracts in the context of US Defense procurement. Leveraging a discontinuous regulation that mandates agencies to publicize certain contract opportunities, we document that expanding the set of bidders reduces award prices but deteriorates post-award performance in terms of cost overruns and delays. We develop and estimate an auction model with endogenous entry and stochastic execution performance, in which the buyer endogenously chooses the intensity of competition. Model estimates indicate substantial heterogeneity in performance across contractors and show that simple adjustments to the current regulation could provide significant savings in procurement spending. (JEL D22, D24, D44, D82, D86, H56, H57)
title_cn: 不完全合同下的竞争与采购政策的设计
abstract_cn: 我们研究了美国国防采购中，合同竞争加剧的影响。利用一项不连续的法规，该法规要求各机构公开某些合同机会，我们记录到，扩大竞标者的范围减少了授予价格，但在费用超支和延期方面却恶化了保后表现。我们开发并估计了一个具有内生性进入和随机执行表现的拍卖模型，其中买方内生性地选择竞争强度。模型估计表明，承包商之间的表现存在显著差异，并显示对现行法规进行简单调整可能会在采购支出中带来可观的节省。（JEL D22, D24, D44, D82, D86, H56, H57）

title: A Theory of Supply Function Choice and Aggregate Supply
abstract: Modern theories of aggregate supply are built on the foundation that firms set prices and commit to producing whatever the market demands. We remove this strategic restriction and allow firms to choose supply functions, mappings that describe the prices charged at each quantity of production. Theoretically, we characterize firms’ optimal supply function choices in general equilibrium and study the resulting implications for aggregate supply. Aggregate supply flattens under lower inflation uncertainty, higher idiosyncratic demand uncertainty, and less elastic demand. Quantitatively, our theory can rationalize the flattening of aggregate supply during the Great Moderation and steepening during the 1970s and 2020s. (JEL D21, D43, E13, E23, E31, E32)
title_cn: 供给函数选择与总供给理论
abstract_cn: 现代的总供给理论建立在企业设定价格并承诺生产市场所需产品的基础上。我们去除了这一战略限制，允许企业选择供应函数，即描述在每一生产数量下所收取价格的映射。从理论上讲，我们在一般均衡中刻画了企业的最优供应函数选择，并研究了这一选择对总供给的影响。在较低的通货膨胀不确定性、更高的个体需求不确定性以及需求弹性较低的情况下，总供给趋于平坦。从定量分析来看，我们的理论能够解释大温和时期总供给的平坦化，以及在1970年代和2020年代的陡峭化现象。（JEL D21, D43, E13, E23, E31, E32）

title: Raising the Stakes: Physician Facility Investments and Provider Agency
abstract: Principal-agent problems often extend beyond what can be directly addressed through conventional incentive arrangements. We examine a context where physicians are likely under-incentivized to minimize total medical costs until their private financial interests align with those of patients. Leveraging novel data on physician ownership of ambulatory surgery centers——that is, same-day facilities——we show that these equity holdings cause a substitution away from higher cost, rival settings that lowers Medicare spending by 10–40 percent per physician. We find no clear evidence of perverse behavior following these investments. Instead, our findings demonstrate how entrepreneurial activity can indirectly limit principal-agent problems and improve efficiency. (JEL D82, D91, G51, I11, I18, L84)
title_cn: 提高赌注：医生设施投资与提供者代理性
abstract_cn: 委托-代理问题往往超出了传统激励安排能够直接解决的范围。我们研究一个背景，其中医生在个人财务利益与患者利益不一致的情况下，往往未能获得激励以降低总体医疗成本。利用关于医生拥有日间手术中心——即同日服务设施——的新数据，我们表明这些股权持有促使医生从更高成本的竞争环境中转移，从而每位医生降低医疗保险支出10-40%。我们没有发现这些投资后出现扭曲行为的明确证据。相反，我们的研究结果展示了创业活动如何间接限制委托-代理问题并提高效率。（JEL D82, D91, G51, I11, I18, L84）

title: Consumer Credit and the Incidence of Tariffs: Evidence from the Auto Industry
abstract: Captive finance subsidiaries create a channel for trade policy to affect consumer credit. Examining the impact of the Trump administration’s metal tariffs on captive automobile lenders, we find that consumers received higher interest rates from captive lenders after the tariffs relative to unaffected noncaptive lenders. Further, we document a disparate impact on low-income borrowers and in areas with less lending competition. Our results suggest that tariffs may impact not only the price of goods but also the financing terms of purchases. Thus, focusing solely on directly affected product prices may underestimate tariff pass-through significantly. (JEL F13, F14, G21, L22, L61, L62)
title_cn: 消费者信贷与关税的发生率：来自汽车行业的证据
abstract_cn: captive融资子公司为贸易政策影响消费信贷创造了一个渠道。通过考察特朗普政府的金属关税对汽车融资子公司的影响，我们发现，关税实施后，消费者在融资子公司获得的利率高于未受影响的非融资子公司。此外，我们记录到低收入借款人及竞争较少地区受到的不成比例影响。我们的结果表明，关税可能不仅影响商品的价格，还可能影响购买的融资条款。因此，仅关注直接受影响的产品价格可能会显著低估关税的传递效应。（JEL F13, F14, G21, L22, L61, L62）

title: Gender Differences in Economics Seminars
abstract: We assess whether men and women are treated differently when presenting their economics research. We collected data across thousands of seminars, job market talks, and conference presentations, leveraging human judgment and audio-processing algorithms to measure the number, tone, and type of interruptions. Within a seminar series, women are interrupted more than men. This holds when controlling for characteristics of the presenter, paper, and audience. Interruptions that are negative in tenor or tone or cut off the presenter mid-sentence increase for women presenters. We also find greater engagement of female audience members with female presenters, suggesting a potential role model effect. (JEL A11, C45, J16, J44)
title_cn: 经济研讨会中的性别差异
abstract_cn: 我们评估男性和女性在呈现经济研究时是否受到不同的对待。我们收集了数千场研讨会、求职演讲和会议演示的数据，利用人类判断和音频处理算法来测量干扰的数量、语气和类型。在研讨会系列中，女性被打断的频率高于男性。这一点在控制了演讲者、论文和听众的特征后依然成立。对于女性演讲者来说，那些语气或语调负面、或在演讲者未结束句子时打断的干扰有所增加。我们还发现女性观众与女性演讲者之间的互动更为频繁，表明可能存在榜样效应。 (JEL A11, C45, J16, J44)

title: Take the Goods and Run: Contracting Frictions and Market Power in Supply Chains
abstract: This paper studies the efficiency of self-enforced relational agreements, a common solution to contracting frictions, when sellers have market power and contracts cannot be externally enforced. To this end, I develop a dynamic contracting model with limited enforcement in which buyers can default on their trade credit debt and estimate it using a novel dataset from the Ecuadorian manufacturing supply chain. The key empirical finding is that bilateral trade is inefficiently low in early periods of the relationship, but converges toward efficiency over time, despite sellers’ market power. Counterfactual simulations imply that both market power and enforcement contribute to inefficiencies in trade. (JEL D86, G32, K12, L14, L60, O14)
title_cn: 拿走货物并逃跑：供应链中的合同摩擦与市场权力
abstract_cn: 本文研究了在卖方拥有市场力量且合同无法得到外部强制执行的情况下，自我执行关系协议的效率，这是应对合同摩擦的一种常见解决方案。为此，我构建了一个具有有限执行力的动态合同模型，其中买方可以违约其贸易信贷债务，并利用一组来自厄瓜多尔制造业供应链的新数据对其进行了估计。关键的实证发现是，在关系的早期阶段，双边贸易效率低下，但随着时间推移逐渐趋向有效，尽管卖方具有市场力量。反事实模拟表明，市场力量和执行力均对贸易中的低效率产生影响。(JEL D86, G32, K12, L14, L60, O14)

title: Blockchain-Enabled Supply Chain Financing (BCF)
abstract: Blockchain technology holds promise for improving access to financing within supply chains, especially for small and under-financed suppliers. Yet, the specific ways in which blockchain technology mitigates financing frictions and the features that contribute to successful platform implementations remain unclear. Following a theory elaboration approach, we close that gap by studying which financing frictions the blockchain-enabled supply chain financing (BCF) solutions aim to address, which blockchain features they use, and the association between the frictions and features. In our analysis, we examine 312 documents with unstructured text describing 11 BCF solutions, both successful and failed. Using AI-based large language models, we identify patterns connecting seven types of financing frictions and three key blockchain features. We find that the transactional friction is the most prominent, despite receiving limited attention in the academic literature, while bankruptcy costs and taxes—frictions that are commonly discussed in the literature—are rarely associated with blockchain features in our sample. Among blockchain features, tokenization is used sparingly; and, unlike other features, it appears in successful BCF solutions only. Moreover, connections between frictions and features are not random: while transactional and hidden actions frictions are linked to all three blockchain features, other frictions are typically associated with only one. Our findings offer a deeper understanding of the mechanisms through which blockchain adds value in supply chain finance, suggesting that aligning blockchain features with specific frictions may enhance the chances of success. We also demonstrate a method for using AI to evaluate large amounts of unstructured data in operations management research.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 区块链驱动的供应链融资（BCF）
abstract_cn: 区块链技术在改善供应链融资渠道的可及性方面具有潜力，尤其是对小型和资金不足的供应商而言。然而，区块链技术在减轻融资摩擦方面的具体作用以及成功平台实施的关键特征仍然不明确。通过理论完善的方法，我们填补了这一空白，研究区块链驱动的供应链融资（BCF）解决方案旨在解决哪些融资摩擦，使用了哪些区块链特征，以及这些摩擦与特征之间的关联。在我们的分析中，我们审查了312个描述11种BCF解决方案（包括成功和失败案例）的非结构化文本文件。利用基于人工智能的大型语言模型，我们识别出七种融资摩擦和三种关键区块链特征之间的联系模式。我们发现，尽管在学术文献中得到的关注有限，交易摩擦是最突出的问题，而破产成本和税费——这些在文献中常被讨论的摩擦——在我们的样本中与区块链特征的关联却很少。区块链特征中的代币化的使用相对稀少；而且，与其他特征不同，它仅出现在成功的BCF解决方案中。此外，摩擦与特征之间的关联并非随机：虽然交易摩擦和隐性行为摩擦与所有三种区块链特征相关，但其他摩擦通常仅与一种特征相关。我们的研究结果为理解区块链在供应链融资中增值的机制提供了更深刻的见解，表明将区块链特征与特定摩擦对接可能会提高成功的机会。我们还展示了一种利用人工智能评估运作管理研究中大量非结构化数据的方法。

title: Joint or Independent? Sourcing and Inspection Decisions in Emerging Economies
abstract: In the presence of supplier quality risk, offering suppliers a higher procurement price or increasing inspection effort are two approaches to motivate a supplier to invest in higher quality. In this paper, we consider three sourcing and inspection strategies for a brand with two branch shops facing supplier quality risk: joint, mixed, and independent strategies. Under the joint strategy, the brand jointly sources for its two shops by offering a uniform procurement price and inspects both shops in a centralized way (joint sourcing and joint inspection). Under the mixed strategy, the brand jointly sources for its two shops by offering a procurement price, and then each shop decides its own inspection probability (joint sourcing and independent inspection). Under the independent strategy, each shop decides its own procurement price and inspection probability (independent sourcing and independent inspection). We find that among the three strategies, the joint strategy mostly relies on the inspection tool to motivate suppliers’ high-quality effort, and the mixed strategy mainly utilizes the procurement price tool by offering the highest price for suppliers’ high quality. We further find that, no matter whether the brand is purely profit-driven or cares about the quantity of low-quality products sold to the market, the mixed strategy is always preferred to the independent strategy. The preference between mixed and joint strategies is jointly determined by the fixed cost incurred in joint sourcing and inspection accuracy. For intermediate fixed cost, if the inspection accuracy is sufficiently high, the mixed strategy is preferred to the joint strategy; otherwise, the joint strategy is preferred to the mixed strategy. Interestingly, when a brand becomes more socially responsible (i.e., it cares more about the quantity of low-quality products sold to the market), it may switch from a reliable supplier to a risky supplier, leading to more low-quality products being sold to the market. This is because with a greater level of social responsibility, the brand’s higher inspection efforts become more credible, which motivates the risky supplier’s higher quality effort.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 联合还是独立？新兴经济体中的采购和检验决策
abstract_cn: 在供应商质量风险的情况下，提供更高的采购价格或增加检验力度是激励供应商投资于更高质量的两种方法。本文考虑了一种品牌在面临供应商质量风险时的三种采购和检验策略：联合策略、混合策略和独立策略。在联合策略下，品牌为其两个门店共同采购，提供统一的采购价格，并以集中方式对两个门店进行检验（联合采购和联合检验）。在混合策略下，品牌为其两个门店共同采购，提供一个采购价格，然后每个门店决定自己的检验概率（联合采购和独立检验）。在独立策略下，每个门店决定自己的采购价格和检验概率（独立采购和独立检验）。我们发现，在这三种策略中，联合策略主要依赖检验工具来激励供应商的高质量努力，而混合策略则主要通过提供最高价格来利用采购价格工具以激励供应商提供高质量。我们进一步发现，无论品牌是纯粹追求利润还是关心市场上低质量产品的数量，混合策略总是优于独立策略。混合策略与联合策略之间的偏好则由联合采购所产生的固定成本和检验准确性共同决定。在固定成本处于中等水平的情况下，如果检验准确性足够高，混合策略优于联合策略；否则，联合策略优于混合策略。有趣的是，当品牌变得更加社会责任感强（即更关心市场上低质量产品的数量）时，它可能会从一个可靠的供应商转向一个风险较高的供应商，导致更多低质量产品被销售到市场。这是因为在更高的社会责任水平下，品牌的更高检验力度变得更具可信度，从而激励风险供应商提供更高质量的产品。

title: Risk Aversion in a Data-Driven Multi-period Inventory Control Problem
abstract: We study multi-period risk-averse inventory control in a data-driven setting. In this problem, a risk-averse retailer makes periodic decisions on inventory levels based only on historical demand observations without full knowledge of the demand distribution. We adopt the popular nested formulation for risk-averse programs to formulate this multi-period problem and its data-driven counterpart under a coherent risk measure. Our objective is to study the sample complexity bound such that with high probability, the data-driven policy is near-optimal, that is, the relative error of risk under the data-driven policy compared with the optimal risk is arbitrarily small. Analysis of this problem is inherently challenging, because the multi-period nature requires solving the risk-averse program and its data-driven version recursively backward in time, while the (empirical) risk-to-go functions in this process do not have closed-form derivatives for most risk measures, which renders existing first-order methods for the risk-neutral newsvendor model invalid. In this study, we develop a zeroth-order framework to establish the complexity bound on sample sizes to guarantee near-optimality of the data-driven policy with given accuracy levels. Instead of using first-order derivative information on the risk-to-go function, our analysis directly examines the class of functions that underpins each cumulative risk function and derives maximum inequalities for this functional class by computing the covering numbers. Finite-sample complexity bounds are then used to establish asymptotic properties of the estimated risk, including consistency and convergence rate. Computationally, the time complexity for solving the data-driven policy, which is essentially an empirical dynamic programming (EDP) estimator of the optimal policy, increases exponentially in the length of the planning horizon. To speed up computation, we propose an approximation scheme that recursively approximates the empirical cumulative risk function with a convex piecewise linear function and then minimize it to obtain a modified data-driven inventory policy. We show that with proper control for approximation error, the modified data-driven policy is also near-optimal, and it has the same order of sample complexity bound as that for the original EDP policy.
title_cn: 数据驱动的多期库存控制问题中的风险规避
abstract_cn: 我们研究在数据驱动环境下的多期风险厌恶库存控制问题。在这个问题中，风险厌恶的零售商仅基于历史需求观察做出定期库存水平决策，而对于需求分布并没有完全的了解。我们采用流行的嵌套形式来制定该多期问题及其数据驱动对应模型，基于一致性风险度量进行建模。我们的目标是研究样本复杂度的界限，以便以高概率保证数据驱动策略近似最优，即数据驱动策略下的风险相对于最优风险的相对误差可以任意小。分析这个问题本身具有挑战性，因为多期特性要求递归地向后求解风险厌恶方案及其数据驱动版本，而在这一过程中（经验）前景风险函数对于大多数风险度量并没有封闭形式的导数，这使得现有的对于风险中立新闻贩子模型的first-order方法失效。在本研究中，我们发展了一个零阶框架，建立样本量的复杂度界限，以确保在给定精度水平下数据驱动策略的近似最优性。我们的分析直接检验支撑每个累积风险函数的函数类，并通过计算覆盖数得出该函数类的最优不等式，而不是使用风险前景函数的一阶导数信息。然后利用有限样本复杂度界限来确立估计风险的渐近性质，包括一致性和收敛速率。在计算上，解决数据驱动策略（本质上是最优策略的经验动态规划（EDP）估计器）的时间复杂度在规划时间范围的长度上呈指数级增加。为了加快计算，我们提出了一种近似方案，该方案递归地用一段凸的分段线性函数来近似经验累积风险函数，然后通过最小化该函数获得修改后的数据驱动库存策略。我们展示了在对近似误差进行适当控制的情况下，修改后的数据驱动策略同样近似最优，并且它的样本复杂度界限与原始EDP策略相同。

title: Overcoming barriers? The mixed results of social innovation accelerator programs for women entrepreneurs
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Entrepreneurship accelerators are increasingly promoted as structural interventions to close gender gaps, yet studies have not established a differential impact of participation for women. This prior evidence—drawn from high‐tech, male‐dominated settings—may overlook how outcomes differ in more feminized domains such as social innovation. Using unique multi‐level data from 1417 ventures applying to 33 accelerators, we examine whether average effects conceal variation across institutional environments and program designs. We find that in more gender‐egalitarian countries, women‐led ventures performed better than peers after participating, especially in programs aiming to support women. In less egalitarian environments, however, participation offered negative or no such advantages even in gender supportive programs. These results suggest that well‐intended interventions to advance women entrepreneurs are context‐dependent and may sometimes reinforce the very disparities they intended to diminish. Managerial Summary Social innovation accelerators are often championed as a way to help women entrepreneurs thrive. But our analysis of 1417 ventures applying to 33 programs shows that results vary—and context matters. In more egalitarian countries, participation is associated with improved performance for women‐led ventures, especially when programs are explicitly designed to support them. Surprisingly, the pattern flips in less egalitarian environments: women founders who join even women‐focused programs often see no performance gains—or even declines—relative to peers. These findings suggest that well‐intentioned support can backfire if it doesn't fit the local institutional environment. For program designers and leaders, this is a call to move beyond one‐size‐fits‐all approaches and carefully align equity goals with the realities of the ecosystems they operate in.
title_cn: 克服障碍？面向女性创业者的社会创新加速器项目的混合成果
abstract_cn: 摘要研究概述 创业加速器越来越被视为缩小性别差距的结构性干预措施，但研究尚未确立女性参与的差异性影响。这些先前的证据主要来自高科技、男性主导的环境，可能忽视了在社会创新等更女性化领域中结果的差异。借助1417个申请33个加速器的项目的独特多层次数据，我们探讨了平均效应是否掩盖了不同制度环境和项目设计之间的变化。我们的研究发现，在性别平等程度更高的国家，女性主导的项目在参与后表现优于同行，特别是在旨在支持女性的项目中。然而，在性别平等程度较低的环境中，即使在支持女性的项目中，参与也可能没有带来积极的效果，甚至表现出负面影响。这些结果表明，旨在推动女性创业者发展的良好意图的干预措施是依赖于上下文的，有时可能会加剧其旨在减少的不平等现象。管理者摘要 社会创新加速器常常被视为帮助女性企业家蓬勃发展的方式。但我们对1417个申请33个项目的分析显示，结果因环境而异，情境因素至关重要。在性别平等程度更高的国家，参与与女性主导项目的表现改善相关联，尤其是在显著旨在支持她们的项目中。令人惊讶的是，在性别平等程度较低的环境中，即使是专注于女性的项目，女性创始人通常也未能相对于同行实现表现提升，甚至可能出现下降。这些发现表明，如果支持措施不符合当地制度环境，良好的意图可能会适得其反。对于项目设计者和领导者而言，这是一个呼吁：超越一刀切的方法，仔细将平等目标与他们所处生态系统的现实对接。

title: Whom Should Entrepreneurs Approach? The Effect of Contact Status on Referring New Ventures for Acquisition
abstract: Abstract Prior entrepreneurial network literature has primarily examined how entrepreneurs’ networking efforts facilitate interorganizational exchanges, while giving little attention to the agency of their contacts. In this study, we investigate how contacts’ intra‐organizational status shapes their actions of referring entrepreneurs to their organizations for acquisition. Drawing on middle‐status conformity theory and interviews, we argue that, compared to high‐ or low‐status actors, middle‐status actors are more concerned about status loss and face a higher likelihood of such loss; therefore, they have a lower tendency to connect entrepreneurs with their organizations, resulting in a U‐shaped effect of contact status on referring actions including quantity, quality, and efficiency. Furthermore, this U‐shaped effect is moderated by organizational ownership and norms. The results based on 12,103 venture‐acquirer dyads support most of our hypotheses. Our study contributes to the entrepreneurial network literature by identifying the agency of contacts and their specific referring actions. It also adds to the network agency literature by highlighting the organizational context in which the contacts are situated as a critical enabler or inhibitor of such agency. In addition, it enriches the mergers and acquisitions literature by revealing the roles of actors at various organizational levels in facilitating corporate engagement with new ventures.
title_cn: 企业家应接触谁？联系状态对推荐新创企业进行收购的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 以往的创业网络文献主要关注创业者的网络努力如何促进组织间的交流，而较少关注其联系人所具备的主动性。在本研究中，我们探讨了联系人组织内部地位如何影响他们为创业者推荐进入自己组织的行为。基于中等地位遵从理论和访谈研究，我们认为，相较于高地位或低地位的参与者，中等地位的参与者更担心地位丧失，并面临更高的地位丧失可能性；因此，他们将创业者与其组织联系的倾向较低，这导致联系人地位对推荐行为（包括数量、质量和效率）产生U型效应。此外，组织所有权和规范对这一U型效应起到调节作用。基于12,103对风险投资与收购者的数据结果支持了我们大部分假设。我们的研究通过识别联系人主动性及其特定的推荐行为，丰富了创业网络文献。同时，它也通过突出联系人所处的组织背景作为这种主动性的关键促进因素或抑制因素，进一步丰富了网络主动性文献。此外，它还通过揭示不同组织层次的参与者在促进企业与新创企业互动中的角色，丰富了并购文献。

title: The implications of additive manufacturing for hospital supply chain operations: an exploratory study
abstract: Purpose Grounded in the resource-based view, this study aims to explore the implications of adopting additive manufacturing (AM), also known as three-dimensional (3D) printing, for hospital supply chain operations in Norway. Design/methodology/approach An exploratory qualitative approach is used. Comparative design is used to explore the implications of using AM for two of the largest hospitals in Norway. Semistructured interviews are conducted to collect primary data from experts involved in AM technology and hospital supply chain operations. Inductive thematic analysis is used to examine, organize and interpret the data. Findings Major implications of AM adoption for hospital supply chain operations in Norway are identified and discussed. The findings suggest that AM can reduce supply risks and provide hospitals with greater control over medical part availability. AM offers diversification benefits, enabling hospitals to produce a wide range of products in-house and reduce reliance on foreign suppliers. However, for hospitals to fully leverage AM’s potential, critical barriers such as quality assurance, cost-effectiveness and regulatory compliance should be addressed. Research limitations/implications The focus of the study is on Norwegian hospital supply chains. Future research is required to validate the findings in other supply chain settings for generalizability. Practical implications Practitioners can draw on the findings to assess the advantages and challenges of AM technology adoption in the context of hospital supply chain operations. Originality/value To the best of the authors’ knowledge, this is among the first studies to empirically examine the effects of AM technology adoption on hospital supply chain operations.
title_cn: 增材制造对医院供应链运营的影响：一项探索性研究
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究基于资源基础视角，旨在探讨在挪威医院供应链运营中采用增材制造（AM），即三维（3D）打印的影响。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究采用探索性定性方法。通过比较设计，探讨在挪威两家最大的医院中使用AM的影响。通过半结构化访谈收集参与AM技术和医院供应链运营的专家的主要数据。采用归纳主题分析法对数据进行审查、组织和解释。 研究结果 确定并讨论了AM在挪威医院供应链运营中的主要影响。研究结果表明，AM可以降低供应风险，并为医院提供更大的医疗部件可用性控制。AM提供了多样化的好处，使医院能够在内部生产多种产品，减少对外国供应商的依赖。然而，为了使医院充分发挥AM的潜力，必须解决质量保证、成本效益和合规性等关键障碍。 研究局限性/影响 本研究的重点是挪威医院的供应链。未来的研究需要在其他供应链环境中验证研究结果的普遍性。 实践意义 从业者可以借鉴研究结果，评估在医院供应链运营中采用AM技术的优势和挑战。 原创性/价值 据作者所知，这是首批实证研究AM技术在医院供应链运营中影响的研究之一。

title: Structural Choices at Alliance Formation: Accounting for Partner Asymmetry in Industry Distance
abstract: Parties in an alliance aim to capture both common and private benefits. As they transfer and jointly create knowledge to generate common gains, differences in private benefits can arise due to asymmetric knowledge spillovers. Our model of alliance structural choices incorporates the alliance itself—the channel through which partner knowledge flows—to reflect the fact that partners and the alliance may operate in different industry contexts. We propose that partners select structural governance mechanisms (equity governance and alliance scope) to enable valuable knowledge flows while protecting themselves from unwanted spillovers. Analyzing a large sample of U.S. alliances from 1985 to 2024, we find that asymmetric distance predicts these governance choices and that it is linked to the simultaneous use of multiple structural safeguards, including equity governance and a narrow alliance scope.
title_cn: 联盟形成中的结构选择：考虑行业距离中的伙伴不对称性
abstract_cn: 联盟中的各方旨在获取共同利益和私有利益。在共同创造知识以产生共同收益的过程中，由于知识溢出的非对称性，可能会出现私有利益的差异。我们的联盟结构选择模型将联盟本身纳入考虑——作为合作伙伴知识流动的渠道——以反映合作伙伴及联盟可能处于不同的行业背景。我们提出，合作伙伴选择结构治理机制（股权治理和联盟范围）以促进有价值的知识流动，同时保护自身免受不必要的知识溢出影响。通过分析1985年至2024年间大量美国联盟的样本，我们发现非对称距离预测了这些治理选择，并且与同时使用多种结构性保障措施（包括股权治理和狭义联盟范围）相关联。

title: Social Media and Organizations: An Integrative Review and Future Research Directions
abstract: Social media have fundamentally reshaped how organizations and audiences interact, challenging theoretical assumptions in the management literature. With this integrative literature review, we take stock of a fragmented body of research, based on an analysis of 647 articles across 9 disciplines. Our synthesis identifies three dominant perspectives: an organization-centric perspective that views social media as tools for strategic action; an audience-centric perspective that emphasizes audience empowerment and contestation; and a platform-centric perspective that highlights how platform features and algorithms condition organizational outcomes and audience interactions. Building on these perspectives, we develop an integrative framework of organizational enablement, audience empowerment, and platform mediation that captures how social media extend and redirect established theories. We distill five major research areas—identity and community, social evaluations, corporate social responsibility, false narratives, and organizational outcome drivers—that capture the core themes of management scholarship to date. Our analysis shows how social media distinctiveness—heightened emotionality, many-to-many diffusion, and expanded actor visibility—has generated theoretical extensions while leaving key debates unresolved. We argue that management research must better integrate across perspectives, expand attention to platform mediation, and incorporate insights from related fields. We conclude with a bold future research agenda for researchers who aim to advance theorizing on organization audience relationships in a complex media ecosystem.
title_cn: 社交媒体与组织：综合评述及未来研究方向
abstract_cn: 社交媒体从根本上改变了组织与受众之间的互动，挑战了管理文献中的理论假设。通过这项综合性文献综述，我们对一个碎片化的研究体系进行了梳理，基于对来自9个学科的647篇文章的分析。我们的综合分析识别出三种主导视角：一种以组织为中心的视角，将社交媒体视为战略行动的工具；一种以受众为中心的视角，强调受众的赋权与争议；以及一种以平台为中心的视角，突出平台特性和算法如何影响组织结果与受众互动。基于这些视角，我们提出了一个综合框架，涵盖组织赋能、受众赋权和平台调解，捕捉社交媒体如何延伸和重定向既有理论。我们提炼出五个主要研究领域——身份与社区、社会评价、企业社会责任、虚假叙事以及组织结果驱动因素——这些领域反映了迄今为止管理学术研究的核心主题。我们的分析表明，社交媒体的独特性——增强的情感性、多对多的传播以及扩展的参与者可见性——产生了理论扩展，同时留下了关键辩论未得到解决。我们认为，管理研究必须更好地整合不同的视角，扩大对平台调解的关注，并吸纳相关领域的洞见。我们最后提出了一项大胆的未来研究议程，旨在推动研究者在复杂的媒体生态系统中深化组织与受众关系的理论构建。

title: Convergence and Inference of Stream Stochastic Gradient Descent, with Applications to Queueing Systems and Inventory Control
abstract: Stream SGD: Fast Learning and Valid Inference from Dependent Data Many online optimization problems in operations research rely on data generated by Markovian systems whose dynamics depend on the decision parameters, creating both statistical dependence and biased gradient information. This paper, “Convergence and Inference of Stream Stochastic Gradient Descent, with Applications to Queueing Systems and Inventory Control,” develops a unified theory for stream stochastic gradient descent (SGD), a sample-efficient method that uses just one observation per iteration. Using Poisson-equation techniques, the authors quantify and control gradient bias and dependence, proving an optimal [Formula: see text] convergence rate and a state-of-the-art O(log T) regret bound. Beyond optimization performance, the paper introduces an online inference framework for uncertainty quantification and establishes a functional central limit theorem that underpins valid asymptotic inference. A new Wasserstein-type divergence yields verifiable conditions via coupling arguments tailored to operations research models. Applications to queueing and inventory problems demonstrate how the theory translates into practical, scalable algorithms.
title_cn: 流量随机梯度下降的收敛性与推断，及其在排队系统和库存控制中的应用
abstract_cn: 流式随机梯度下降：从依赖数据中实现快速学习和有效推断 许多运筹学中的在线优化问题依赖于马尔可夫系统生成的数据，其动态受决策参数的影响，从而产生统计依赖性和偏差的梯度信息。本文“流式随机梯度下降的收敛性与推断，以及在排队系统与库存控制中的应用”建立了一种统一的流式随机梯度下降（SGD）理论，这是一种每次迭代仅使用一次观察的样本高效方法。通过使用泊松方程技术，作者量化和控制了梯度偏差和依赖性，证明了最佳的 [公式：见文本] 收敛速率以及先进的 O(log T) 后悔界限。除了优化性能，该论文还引入了一种用于不确定性量化的在线推断框架，并建立了一个功能性中心极限定理，以支撑有效的渐进推断。一种新的 Wasserstein 类型的散度通过与运筹学模型量身定制的耦合论证提供了可验证的条件。对排队和库存问题的应用展示了该理论如何转化为实际的、可扩展的算法。

title: The Ebbs and Flows of Reputation as Meaningful Signals: Market Reactions to Firms’ Reputation Instability
abstract: Abstract While prior studies typically treat firm reputation as a stable, intangible resource reflecting cumulative competence, we extend a socio‐constructionist perspective by shifting the focus to reputation instability – erratic fluctuations in a firm’s reputation over time relative to its industry peers. We argue that reputation instability functions as a distinct and often overlooked market signal by introducing ambiguities that influence investor valuation of a firm in a stock market context. Crucially, the impact of reputation instability is further shaped by contextual cues that anchor investor expectations. A firm’s current reputation and industry dynamism condition how instability may be regarded, either as a warning sign or a potential indication of improvement. Using panel data across four major US industry groups over 21 years, we find evidence consistent with our theoretical framework and identify critical boundary conditions under which reputation instability is penalized or rewarded by the market. By reframing reputation as a dynamic and unstable construct, our study advances theory on reputation signals, offering novel insights into how reputational temporal dynamics – not just established levels – shape firms’ market outcomes.
title_cn: 声誉的 ebb 和 flow 作为有意义信号：市场对企业声誉不稳定性的反应
abstract_cn: 摘要 以往的研究通常将企业声誉视为一种稳定的、反映累积能力的无形资源，而我们则通过关注声誉的不稳定性，即相对于同行业企业声誉随时间的 erratic 波动，拓展了社会建构主义的视角。我们认为，声誉不稳定性作为一种独特且常被忽视的市场信号，能够通过引入不确定性影响投资者在股票市场中的企业估值。至关重要的是，声誉不稳定性的影响还受到情境线索的塑造，这些线索为投资者期望值提供锚定。企业当前的声誉和行业的动态特征影响了不稳定性被看作警示信号还是潜在改善迹象的方式。通过对21年来四个主要美国行业组的面板数据进行分析，我们发现了与我们的理论框架一致的证据，并识别出声誉不稳定性受到市场惩罚或奖励的关键边界条件。通过将声誉重新构建为一种动态且不稳定的概念，我们的研究推动了声誉信号理论的发展，提供了有关声誉时间动态如何影响企业市场结果的新见解。

title: Trapped in the MNE matrix: liminal identity at the local–corporate–global nexus
abstract: Abstract Managers’ identities in large matrixed MNE structures are complex and pliable. While research has examined the identities of individual actors located in headquarters (HQ) or local subsidiaries, the unique identity challenges faced by those operating outside these conventional units are less predictable. Our study explores how managers experience and manage a ‘liminal identity’—feeling ‘betwixt and between’ multiple identity positions. Focusing on US MNEs in the life sciences sector, we interviewed managers who assumed global responsibilities from corporate HQ while remaining situated in their local (Irish) subsidiary. We find that operating between corporate HQ, a global network, and the local subsidiary forged a liminal identity. Straddling this local–corporate–global nexus was a profoundly ambiguous, precarious, and destabilizing experience. Yet, individuals also sought to leverage their liminal identity by adopting multiple identities, depending on the audience. This involved ‘switching’ between renouncing a local identity, assimilating a corporate identity and co-constructing a global identity. However, this produced an intense identity struggle, eroding a clear sense of self and belonging. Our study cautions firms to be attentive when supporting managers in these ‘in-between’ spaces to avoid the trap of ‘identity limbo’, where individuals risk becoming disconnected and isolated.
title_cn: 困于跨国企业矩阵：地方—企业—全球交汇处的边缘身份
abstract_cn: 摘要 大型矩阵型跨国企业（MNE）结构中管理者的身份复杂而可塑。虽然已有研究考察了设在总部（HQ）或地方子公司的个体行为者的身份，但在这些传统单位之外运作的管理者所面临的独特身份挑战则较难预测。本研究探讨了管理者如何体验和管理“边缘身份”——在多重身份定位之间感到“介于两者之间”。我们关注生命科学行业的美国跨国企业，采访了那些承担来自企业总部全球职责的管理者，同时仍然位于其地方（爱尔兰）子公司的个体。我们发现，介于企业总部、全球网络和地方子公司之间的工作环境塑造了一种边缘身份。跨越这一地方—企业—全球的交汇点是一个极其模糊、危险且不稳定的经历。然而，个体也试图通过根据受众的不同来采纳多重身份，来利用他们的边缘身份。这涉及到在放弃地方身份、同化企业身份和共同构建全球身份之间进行“切换”。然而，这种情况导致了激烈的身份斗争，削弱了个体清晰的自我感和归属感。本研究提醒企业在支持管理者在这些“中间”空间时应保持警惕，以避免掉入“身份混沌”的陷阱，在这种情况下，个体可能面临失去联系和孤立的风险。

title: Delegation and Chief Financial Officer Retention: Evidence from Chief Accounting Officers on the Executive Team
abstract: In recent years, chief financial officer (CFO) responsibilities and resignations have increased.
