Given these trends, we examine whether delegating accounting is associated with CFO retention. We develop a methodology to identify voluntary CFO departures using the firm’s public messaging around the CFO’s exit. Our results suggest that CFOs are less likely to voluntarily depart when accounting is delegated. Further, we find evidence that the negative association between delegating accounting and voluntary CFO departures is stronger when accounting demands are higher. Moreover, we find evidence that delegating accounting increases the CFO’s human capital. When CFOs do leave, they are more likely to become a chief executive officer and less likely to make a lateral move to another CFO position. Taken together, this study finds evidence consistent with the delegation of accounting increasing CFO retention and human capital. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Funding: The authors appreciate research funding support from Coggin College of Business, University of North Florida and Tippie College of Business, University of Iowa. A. Rhodes gratefully acknowledges support from the Michael and Sandra Rocca Fellowship in Accounting. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06802 .
title_cn: 委派与首席财务官留任：来自财务团队首席会计官的证据
abstract_cn: 近年来，首席财务官（CFO）的职责和辞职现象有所增加。鉴于这些趋势，我们探讨了会计委托是否与CFO的留任有关。我们制定了一种方法来识别自愿辞职的CFO，这基于公司针对CFO离职的公开信息。我们的结果表明，当会计被委托时，CFO自愿离职的可能性较低。此外，我们发现，当会计需求较高时，会计委托与自愿CFO离职之间的负相关性更强。此外，我们还发现，会计委托增加了CFO的人力资本。当CFO离职时，他们更可能成为首席执行官，而较不可能跳槽到其他CFO职位。综合来看，这项研究提供了证据，支持会计委托提高CFO留任率和人力资本。本文由会计学领域的Suraj Srinivasan接受。资助：作者感谢北佛罗里达大学Coggin商学院和爱荷华大学Tippie商学院的研究资金支持。A. Rhodes特别感谢迈克尔和桑德拉·罗卡会计奖学金的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06802获取。

title: Identifying Demand Curves in Index Option Markets
abstract: We identify latent demands in index option markets using a sign-restricted vector autoregression (VAR) and highlight the bias from treating (equilibrium) net demand as exogenous. Market-maker and end-user demand curves are far from infinitely elastic as assumed by some models, but elasticities exceed existing estimates for equities. Characterizing demand curves provides insights into the structure of index option markets. Deteriorating market conditions are associated with right shifts of the latent demand curves. The at-the-money (ATM) (out-of-the-money (OTM)) markets for calls and puts are mainly driven by end-user (market-maker) demand, and end-user (market-maker) ATM (OTM) call option demand predicts S&P500 returns. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.04263 .
title_cn: 识别指数期权市场中的需求曲线
abstract_cn: 我们使用限制符号的向量自回归模型（VAR）识别指数期权市场中的潜在需求，并强调将（均衡）净需求视为外生变量所带来的偏差。市场做市商与最终用户的需求曲线远非某些模型假设的那样具有无限弹性，但其弹性超过了对股票的现有估计。对需求曲线的表征为我们提供了对指数期权市场结构的洞见。恶化的市场条件与潜在需求曲线的右移相关。平值（ATM）和虚值（OTM）看涨及看跌期权市场主要受到最终用户（做市商）需求的驱动，最终用户（做市商）对ATM（OTM）看涨期权的需求能够预测标准普尔500指数的回报。本篇论文由Lukas Schmid接受，研究领域为金融。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.04263 获取。

title: The Role of Success and Failure in Fluid Teams: Evidence from the Motion Picture Industry
abstract: Many business settings involve fluid teams, where team members come together to work on a project, after which the team is disbanded. It is well-known that coordination can be challenging and affect the performance outcomes of fluid teams. The literature has studied how several facets of experience can facilitate learning and improve outcomes for fluid teams. However, the role of experience with success and failure and its effect on improving outcomes for fluid teams has remained unexplored. In this study, we use data from the motion picture industry to examine how the experience with success and failure resident within key members of a movie production team affects profitability. Our analysis of the data for 2,091 movies released in the United States between 1999 and 2018 reveals that a movie’s profitability depends on the production team’s history with success and failure. Additionally, we find that teams with a history of success result in movies with higher profits, whereas teams with a history of failure result in movies with lower profits. We also find that increased relative dispersion in the team’s experience does not affect the movie’s profitability. Further analysis of the composition of movie teams indicates that financial performance can be significantly impacted when movie teams are predominantly composed of members with a history of success or failure. We contribute by illustrating a new measure of team experience relevant for fluid teams and by providing insights on how to compose teams based on members’ experience with success and failure. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03756 .
title_cn: 流动团队中成功与失败的作用：来自电影产业的证据
abstract_cn: 许多商业环境中存在流动团队，团队成员为了某个项目聚集在一起，完成后便解散。众所周知，协调工作可能会面临挑战，并影响流动团队的绩效结果。文献研究了多种经验方面如何促进学习并改善流动团队的结果。然而，有关成功和失败经验的作用及其对改善流动团队结果的影响仍未受到足够重视。在本研究中，我们利用电影行业的数据来探讨电影制作团队中关键成员的成功和失败经验如何影响盈利能力。我们对1999年至2018年期间在美国上映的2,091部电影的数据分析表明，一部电影的盈利能力与制作团队的成功和失败历史相关。此外，我们发现拥有成功历史的团队制作的电影利润更高，而拥有失败历史的团队制作的电影利润则较低。我们还发现，团队经验的相对分散度增加并不影响电影的盈利能力。对电影团队组成的进一步分析表明，当电影团队主要由拥有成功或失败历史的成员组成时，财务表现可能会受到显著影响。我们的贡献在于提出了一种与流动团队相关的新团队经验衡量方法，并提供了如何根据成员的成功和失败经验组成团队的见解。本文由埃琳娜·卡托克（Elena Katok）接受，主题为运营管理。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03756 获取。

title: Multichannel Experience, Product Attributes, and Consumer Return Behavior: An Empirical Analysis
abstract: Omnichannel retailing has changed the way consumers search for, evaluate, and purchase products. At the same time, product returns remain a costly and persistent operational challenge. Conventional wisdom holds that adding sales channels, particularly combining physical and non-physical touchpoints, should improve information about product fit and reduce return rates. However, it is unclear how the shopping experience across multiple channels influences what consumers buy and whether they return those purchases. There is also no clear consensus on why return rates increase in some omnichannel contexts but not others. We address this knowledge gap by focusing on consumers’ multichannel experience (MX) rather than mere channel adoption, and distinguishing two types of MX: remote-only (those who have used only non-physical channels such as online and catalog) versus hybrid (those who have used both non-physical and physical channels). We empirically analyze over 292,000 transactions from a European furniture retailer operating showroom, online, and catalog channels. Using a series of fixed-effects regressions with Heckman selection to address potential channel-selection bias, a control function approach to account for endogeneity due to omitted variable bias associated with MX, and a parallel mediation analysis, we find that consumers with MX are significantly more likely to return products than their counterparts with only single-channel experience (i.e., showroom, online, or catalog). This elevated return propensity is largely driven by MX shoppers’ greater tendency to buy niche products and experience goods, which carry higher uncertainty and return risk. Moreover, consumers with remote-only MX exhibit higher return rates than those with hybrid MX, and this gap is especially pronounced among consumers living farther from a physical showroom store. We conduct multiple robustness checks to verify the results. We also replicate the main findings with a new transaction data set from a U.S. retailer (leveraging a natural experiment). Theoretically, our work challenges assumptions that multichannel access inherently lowers returns, highlighting how MX can increase return risk through its effect on purchase behavior. Managerially, our findings inform product–channel matching strategies and omnichannel design, and point to targeted interventions based on consumer type (remote-only vs. hybrid) and geography (distance to stores) to ameliorate returns.
title_cn: 多渠道体验、产品属性与消费者退货行为：一项实证分析
abstract_cn: 全渠道零售改变了消费者搜索、评估和购买产品的方式。同时，产品退货仍然是一个成本高昂且持续存在的操作挑战。传统观点认为，增加销售渠道，特别是结合实体和非实体接触点，应该改善关于产品合适度的信息并降低退货率。然而，目前尚不清楚多渠道购物体验如何影响消费者的购买决策，以及他们是否会退回这些购买。此外，对于为何在某些全渠道环境中退货率上升而在其他环境中并非如此，尚无明确共识。我们通过关注消费者的多渠道体验（MX），而不仅仅是渠道的采用，解决了这一知识空白，并区分了两种类型的MX：仅远程（仅使用在线和目录等非实体渠道的消费者）与混合型（同时使用非实体和实体渠道的消费者）。我们对一家在欧洲运营的家具零售商超过292,000笔交易进行了实证分析，该商家经营展厅、在线和目录渠道。通过一系列固定效应回归分析，并使用赫克曼选择方法来应对潜在的渠道选择偏差，采用控制函数方法来考虑由于MX相关的遗漏变量偏差引起的内生性问题，以及并行中介分析，我们发现具有MX的消费者比只有单渠道体验（即展厅、在线或目录）的同类消费者更有可能退货。这种提升的退货倾向主要源于MX购物者更倾向于购买小众产品和体验商品，而这些商品通常伴随较高的不确定性和退货风险。此外，只有远程渠道体验的消费者的退货率高于混合型MX消费者，这一差距在距离实体展厅更远的消费者中尤其明显。我们进行了多项稳健性检验以验证结果。我们还通过利用来自美国零售商的新交易数据集（依托自然实验）来复制主要发现。在理论上，我们的研究挑战了多渠道接入自然而然降低退货的假设，突出了MX如何通过影响购买行为增加退货风险。在管理层面，我们的发现为产品与渠道匹配策略和全渠道设计提供了指导，并指出可以根据消费者类型（仅远程与混合）及地理位置（距离商店）采取针对性干预措施，以改善退货问题。

title: The Economics of Password Sharing
abstract: Password sharing is widespread across subscription-based industries, such as streaming services like Netflix. Although sharing reduces out-of-pocket costs for users, it also creates sharing-related burdens, such as privacy concerns and coordination hassles. We develop a game-theoretic model in which a firm serves two consumer segments—password sharers and nonsharers—to analyze how password sharing affects firm performance and consumer outcomes. Our results show that sharing enables groups of users to “self-bundle” by aggregating their valuations and subscribing through a single shared account. It also creates implicit price discrimination; sharers self-select between sharing and subscribing individually under a uniform price. These mechanisms can increase a firm’s revenue when sharing costs are low. In addition, password sharing reshapes the disparity between sharers and nonsharers. When nonsharers have sufficiently higher willingness to pay, the firm is even more likely to benefit from sharing. However, password sharing poses policy concerns. We find that it reduces social welfare and consumer surplus across a broad range of conditions—especially when sharing costs are moderate. Moreover, the firm’s profit-maximizing strategy, particularly when it chooses to accommodate sharing, often conflicts with what is best for consumers or society. These insights highlight the need for firms to carefully evaluate sharing policies and in some cases, for regulators to intervene to protect consumer welfare.
title_cn: 密码共享的经济学
abstract_cn: 密码共享在以订阅为基础的行业中广泛存在，例如Netflix等流媒体服务。尽管共享能够减少用户的直接支出，但它也带来了与共享相关的负担，如隐私问题和协调麻烦。我们开发了一个博弈理论模型，在该模型中，一家公司服务于两个消费者群体——密码共享者和非共享者，以分析密码共享如何影响公司业绩和消费者结果。我们的研究结果表明，共享使得用户群体能够通过聚合其价值评估并通过一个共享账户进行订阅，从而实现“自助捆绑”。它还产生了隐性价格歧视；共享者在统一定价下会自行选择是共享还是单独订阅。这些机制在共享成本较低时可以增加公司的收入。此外，密码共享重新塑造了共享者和非共享者之间的差距。当非共享者的支付意愿显著更高时，公司的利益更有可能从共享中获益。然而，密码共享也带来了政策方面的担忧。我们的研究发现，它在广泛条件下减少了社会福利和消费者剩余——尤其是在共享成本适中的情况下。此外，公司的利润最大化策略，特别是在选择适应共享时，往往与消费者或社会的最佳利益相冲突。这些见解强调了公司需要仔细评估共享政策，以及在某些情况下，监管者需要介入以保护消费者福利。

title: Searching together versus searching apart: Evidence from Kaggle
abstract: Abstract Research Summary How does the mode of search—independently or jointly—affect collective search, a central component of organizational adaptation and innovation? Using naturally occurring data from a strongly incentivized online competition platform, we find that compared to their counterfactuals that search apart, groups searching together exhibit less exploration in their search outcomes as noted in prior experimental and computational modeling studies. However, groups searching together stimulate a greater number of search attempts from their members than groups searching apart, an effect that has so far remained unnoticed. Further, both search attempts and exploration contribute positively to search performance. This suggests that the choice of search mode should depend on the demands of strategic contexts that make either the variety or volume of solutions relatively more important for collective search. Managerial Summary How members of a team interact when looking for solutions to problems shapes their success. Using evidence from online machine learning competitions, we find that looking for solutions together encourages members to examing more alternatives but narrows the range of these ideas, while working independently generates greater variety but fewer alternatives being examined. We propose that the choice between the two depends on context. When innovation requires novel, distinctive solutions, as in early‐stage R&D, independent work may be more effective. When speed and volume matter, as in patent races or crowded digital markets, searching for solutions together delivers faster iteration. Managers can improve innovation outcomes by aligning the mode of teamwork with the strategic demands of the problem.
title_cn: 一起搜索与分开搜索：来自Kaggle的证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究摘要 搜索模式——独立还是联合——如何影响集体搜索，这是组织适应和创新的核心组成部分？通过在一个高度激励的在线竞争平台上获取的自然数据，我们发现，与独立搜索的对照组相比，联合搜索的群体在搜索结果中的探索度较低，这一现象在之前的实验和计算模型研究中已有所注意。然而，联合搜索的群体比独立搜索的群体能够激发更多的搜索尝试，这一效果迄今为止尚未被注意。此外，搜索尝试和探索都对搜索表现产生积极影响。这表明，搜索模式的选择应依赖于战略背景的需求，相关情况使得解决方案的多样性或数量在集体搜索中相对更为重要。 管理摘要 团队成员在寻找解决方案时的互动方式影响他们的成功。根据在线机器学习竞赛的证据，我们发现共同寻找解决方案鼓励成员检查更多的替代方案，但缩小了这些想法的范围，而独立工作则产生了更大的多样性但审查的替代方案更少。我们建议这两者的选择取决于背景。当创新需要新颖、独特的解决方案时，如在早期研发阶段，独立工作可能更为有效。当速度和数量尤为重要时，如在专利竞赛或竞争激烈的数字市场中，联合搜索解决方案可以实现更快的迭代。管理者可以通过使团队工作模式与问题的战略需求相一致，从而改善创新结果。

title: These Are My (Micro)Confessions: An Episodic Theory of Employee Microconfessions
abstract: The trend of moralizing work presents a paradox for contemporary workers. Employees equate their failures to live up to “good employee” ideals (e.g., always available, highly motivated, passionate) with moral failings. Yet, consistently meeting these ideals is unattainable for most employees. This manuscript introduces and develops the phenomenon of microconfessions—informal, low-magnitude confessions—as an overlooked tactic that employees use to alleviate the ongoing moral dilemma of falling short on moralized work ideals. Integrating self-disclosure and work moralization scholarship with insights from fields that have explicitly studied confession, I build a theory of employee microconfessions. I suggest that microconfessions provide the sharer with a sense of relief and a restored sense of morality, which in turn, have downstream consequences. I also pinpoint guilt—an emotion particularly relevant to the moralization of work—as key to activating and strengthening the effects of microconfessions. Finally, I illuminate how the information shared and the setting in which it is shared jointly influence the effects that I outline. My work establishes microconfessions as a unique form of workplace self-disclosure and pivots existing theories to consider functions of disclosure historically overlooked in organizational scholarship. It also contributes new understanding to how employees may experience and offset the moralization of work as well as when it is most advantageous for them to do so.
title_cn: 这些是我的（微）忏悔：员工微忏悔的情节理论
abstract_cn: 道德化工作的趋势为当代员工带来了一个悖论。员工将未能达到“优秀员工”理想（如：随时可用、高度积极、充满热情）的失败与道德缺失等同起来。然而，对于大多数员工而言，持续满足这些理想是不可实现的。本文介绍并发展了“微忏悔”这一现象——一种员工用以缓解在道德化工作理想上不断失败所带来的道德困境的被忽视的策略。结合自我表露与工作道德化研究，以及来自明确研究忏悔领域的见解，我建立了员工微忏悔的理论。我认为，微忏悔为分享者提供了宽慰感和恢复的道德感，这反过来又带来了下游的影响。我还特别指出，负罪感——这一与工作道德化特别相关的情绪——是激活和加强微忏悔效应的关键。最后，我阐明了被分享的信息及其分享环境如何共同影响我所概述的效果。我的研究确立了微忏悔作为工作场所自我表露的一种独特形式，并推动现有理论考虑在组织研究中历来被忽视的表露功能。它还为员工如何体验和抵消工作道德化，及何时这样做最有利提供了新的理解。

title: Still Waiting for Rewards? User Entrepreneur’s Reward Delivery Performance in Crowdfunding
abstract: Research on crowdfunding has largely focused on fundraising success, overlooking post-success outcomes. Drawing on Self-Determination Theory, we hypothesize that user entrepreneurs show higher intrinsic but lower extrinsic motivation than non-users, with intrinsic motivation boosting delivery performance and extrinsic motivation hindering it. Using a mixed-method approach—an exploratory qualitative study and an analysis of 322 crowdfunded ventures—we find that user entrepreneurs deliver rewards more timely than non-user entrepreneurs, and that intrinsic motivation significantly mediates this relationship, while extrinsic motivation’s mediating role is insignificant. We contribute to the user entrepreneurship and crowdfunding literatures by highlighting drivers of post-campaign success.
title_cn: 仍在等待奖励？用户创业者在众筹中的奖励交付表现
abstract_cn: 对众筹的研究主要集中在筹款成功上，忽视了成功后的结果。基于自我决定理论，我们假设用户企业家的内在动机高于非用户企业家，而外在动机则较低，且内在动机促进交付表现，而外在动机则对其产生抑制作用。采用混合方法研究——一项探索性定性研究和对322个众筹项目的分析——我们发现用户企业家的回报交付比非用户企业家更为及时，并且内在动机在这一关系中显著起到中介作用，而外在动机的中介作用则不显著。我们通过强调活动后成功的驱动因素，为用户创业和众筹文献做出了贡献。

title: Values and visibility: How <scp>CEO</scp> activism influences private and public consumer choices
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Firms' and executives' stances on controversial issues affect consumer behavior. This “political consumerism” might be motivated by ideology and a desire to signal to peers, and thus vary for private and public purchases. We conduct an experiment with 1198 consumers to study how purchase visibility affects responses to CEO activism. Participants are randomly shown either generic product information or that plus a CEO statement supporting gun rights. They then choose between receiving the product or receiving cash, with half assigned to a condition where their choice is visible to someone they know. We find that CEO activism reduces demand among people who disagree with the CEO regardless of purchase visibility, indicating minimal signaling motives. Our results have implications for firms using politics to differentiate products. Managerial Summary Business leaders who speak out on controversial social and political issues may attract or repel consumers who agree or disagree with their stance. Consumers may react more intensely when others can observe their purchases or boycotts, allowing them to “signal” their beliefs. We experimentally manipulate whether the decision to purchase a product from a firm whose CEO vocally supports gun rights is observable and whether consumers are aware of the CEO's stance. We find that consumers change their behavior in response to CEO political activism regardless of whether their choices are visible to others. This suggests that CEO activism can impel boycotts and that firms can differentiate themselves by taking political positions even when their products are less known or consumed privately.
topics: Consumer Behavior in Brand Consumption and Identification
title_cn: 价值观与可见性：首席执行官（CEO）行动主义如何影响私人和公共消费选择
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究总结 企业及其高管在争议性问题上的立场会影响消费者行为。这种“政治消费主义”可能受到意识形态和向同龄人发信号的愿望驱动，因此在私人和公共购买中可能有所不同。我们对1198名消费者进行了实验，以研究购买可见性如何影响对首席执行官（CEO）激进主义的反应。参与者被随机展示一般产品信息或包含支持枪支权利的CEO声明的信息。随后，他们在选择接受产品或现金之间做出决定，其中一半被分配到一个条件下，他们的选择对他们认识的人是可见的。我们发现，无论购买可见性如何，CEO激进主义在与CEO意见不合的人群中减少了需求，这表明信号动机微乎其微。我们的结果对企业利用政治来区分产品具有重要启示。

管理总结 在争议性社会和政治问题上发声的商业领袖可能会吸引或排斥与其立场一致或不一致的消费者。当他人能够观察到他们的购买或抵制时，消费者可能会更强烈地反应，从而使他们能够“传达”自己的信念。我们实验性地操控了购买一家CEO公开支持枪支权利的公司的产品的决策是否可被观察，以及消费者是否意识到CEO的立场。我们发现，无论选择是否对他人可见，消费者都会根据CEO的政治激进主义改变行为。这表明，CEO的激进主义可能促使抵制，企业即使在产品不太知名或消费较为私密的情况下，也可以通过采取政治立场来实现差异化。

title: When are Customer Boycotts Permissible?
abstract: Abstract This paper examines ethical customer boycotts, instances where individuals choose to boycott for ethical reasons. By focusing on the commercial freedom of the customer, it offers a new framework for distinguishing between permissible and impermissible boycotts. It concludes that individual ethical boycotts are almost never morally impermissible. The scope of the paper is limited. It does not attempt to answer the important question of when an individual boycott decision is objectively good or bad. Rather, it attempts to answer the prior question of when a decision to boycott—made by someone who believes their decision is morally right—is doing something that is morally permissible . In defending this position, the paper distinguishes between “objective ought” and moral permissibility. The paper argues that focusing on the right of a consumer to choose is the best way to approach the question, “May I boycott this product?” The approach shifts the emphasis in the boycott debate from prevailing frameworks based on democratic values, intentional harm, and libertarianism, toward a customer’s right to choose. It proposes a cosmopolitan interpretation that relies on the default right of market participants to refrain from commercial exchanges except under extraordinary circumstances. Among other benefits, this approach addresses gaps in alternative accounts that overlook a significant portion of customer boycott decision-making. The paper explains why the threshold for boycott impermissibility is very high: (1) because any claim of impermissibility must overcome the default presumption of freedom in commercial exchange; (2) because an unusual “hard duty” follows from a determination of boycott impermissibility; (3) because a boycotter’s true intent is difficult to discern; and (4) because boycotts serve as alternatives to violence. The account offered here implies that even decisions to boycott that are objectively wrong may be morally permissible. Finally, the paper shows why certain kinds of anti-boycott laws threaten an individual’s moral right to boycott.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 顾客抵制何时是被允许的？
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了基于伦理原因的顾客抵制行为，即个人因为伦理原因选择抵制的情况。通过关注顾客的商业自由，本文提供了一个新的框架，用于区分可允许的抵制与不可允许的抵制。结论认为，个人的伦理抵制几乎在道德上不被视为不可接受。本文的范围有限，并未尝试回答关于个人抵制决策何时客观上是好或坏的重要问题。相反，本文试图回答一个先前的问题，即当一个人相信自己的决定在道德上是正确时，抵制的决定是否是道德上允许的。在支持这一立场时，本文区分了“客观应然”与道德允许性。文章认为，关注消费者的选择权是探讨“我可以抵制这个产品吗？”这一问题的最佳途径。这一方法将抵制辩论的重点从基于民主价值观、故意伤害和自由意志主义的现有框架转移到顾客的选择权上。它提出了一种国际主义的解读，依赖于市场参与者在非常规情况下自我放弃商业交易的默认权利。此方法的优势之一在于它填补了替代理论中的空白，后者往往忽视了顾客抵制决策中的重要部分。文章解释了为何抵制不可允许的门槛非常高：(1) 因为任何关于不可允许性的主张必须克服商业交易中自由的默认假设；(2) 因为一旦确定抵制不可允许，就会产生不寻常的“硬性义务”；(3) 因为抵制者的真实意图难以辨别；以及(4) 因为抵制可作为暴力的替代方式。本文阐述的观点意味着，即便是客观上错误的抵制决策，在道德上也可能是允许的。最后，文章指出，某些类型的反抵制法律威胁到个人的道德抵制权。

title: Do Financial Advisors Charge Sustainable Investors a Premium?
abstract: Despite growing regulatory concerns about potential overcharging of sustainable investors, empirical evidence is lacking. In two controlled laboratory-in-the-field experiments with 415 professional financial advisors from Europe and the United States and an incentivized survey, we identify two distinct but interacting effects. First, advisors charge sustainable investors a premium. This premium persists even when accounting for differences in skill, effort, and costs. Second, advisors impose higher fees on clients with low financial literacy. These factors interact. Sustainable investors with low financial literacy are charged the highest fee, whereas those with high financial literacy do not pay a sustainability premium. Our findings suggest that advisors extract additional fees for sustainable investment mandates but avoid overcharging sustainable investors with high financial literacy. This paper was accepted by Camelia Kuhnen, finance. Funding: P. Smeets was supported by the Nederlandse Organisatie voor Wetenschappelijk Onderzoek [Grant VI.Vidi.221E.011]. The experiments were financially supported by the Graduate School of Business and Economics at Maastricht University, Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, and Radboud University. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00232 .
title_cn: 金融顾问是否对可持续投资者收取溢价？
abstract_cn: 尽管对可持续投资者潜在过度收费的监管担忧日益增加，但目前缺乏实证证据。在对来自欧洲和美国的415名专业金融顾问进行的两项受控实验室实地实验和一项激励调查中，我们识别出了两种 distinct 但相互作用的效应。首先，顾问对可持续投资者收取溢价。即使考虑到技能、努力和成本的差异，这一溢价仍然存在。其次，顾问对金融素养低的客户收取更高的费用。这些因素相互作用。金融素养低的可持续投资者所支付的费用最高，而金融素养高的投资者则不需支付可持续性溢价。我们的研究发现，顾问在可持续投资委托中收取额外费用，但避免对金融素养高的可持续投资者过度收费。本文由Camelia Kuhnen，金融领域接受。资金支持：P. Smeets得到荷兰科学研究组织[资助VI.Vidi.221E.011]的支持。该实验得到了马斯特里赫特大学商学院、阿姆斯特丹自由大学和拉德布德大学的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00232获取。

title: When Bots Evaluate Humans: Delegation to Bots and the Reshaping of Authority
abstract: Information systems scholars typically frame the delegation of tasks to AI-based bots as a means of improving efficiency and supporting decision-making. Yet when evaluative tasks are delegated to supervisory bots, authority is transferred to them as well. This study examines how such authority, once conferred on bots, is contested and redistributed by the humans whose work is subject to the bot’s evaluation. We investigate this process in the context of Wikipedia, an online peer-production community in which an antivandalism bot was given the task of autonomously reverting vandalized, i.e., maliciously edited, contributions. Drawing on the concept of performative authority, we traced how community members negotiated the enactment of the bot’s newfound authority with the bot’s developers through authority-negotiation design moves. We found that these moves were the outcome of a recursive process marked by the redistribution of authority across actors in decisions on vandalism, the institutionalization of structures that shaped how authority was influenced, and the evolving actions of the bot itself, which triggered renewed contestation over time. Within the context of a peer-production community, our study offers fresh insight into how authority delegated to bots evolves as a dynamic cocreation process after delegation and how humans reclaim authority once it has been ceded to a supervisory bot. We shed light on how humans preserve authority, professional discretion, and the meaningfulness of their work in AI-mediated settings.
title_cn: 当机器人评估人类：对机器人的委托与权力的重塑
abstract_cn: 信息系统学者通常将任务委托给基于人工智能的机器人视为提高效率和支持决策的一种手段。然而，当评估任务委托给监督机器人时，权威也随之转移给它们。本研究考察了这种一旦赋予机器人的权威是如何受到挑战并在被机器人评估的工作者之间重新分配的。我们在维基百科这一在线同行生产社区的背景下研究这一过程，其中一款反破坏机器人被赋予自动撤回恶意编辑的贡献的任务。通过借鉴具有表演性权威的概念，我们追踪了社区成员如何通过权威谈判的设计举措，与机器人的开发者协商机器人的新获得的权威的行使。我们发现，这些举措是一个递归过程的结果，该过程以在对破坏行为决策中跨主体的权威重新分配为特征，制度化结构的形成影响了权威的施加方式，以及机器人的不断演变，这触发了随时间推移的持续争议。在一个同行生产社区的背景下，我们的研究为委托后机器人权威如何演变为一个动态共创过程提供了新视角，以及人类在权威被委托给监督机器人之后如何重新夺回权威。我们揭示了人类在人工智能介导的环境中如何维护权威、职业裁量权和工作意义。

title: How disruptive is financial technology?
abstract: We study whether Financial Technology (Fintech) disrupts the banking sector by intensifying competition for scarce deposits funds and raising deposit rates. Using difference-in-difference estimation around the exogenous removal of marketplace platform investing restrictions by US states, we show the cost of deposits increase by approximately 5.9% within small financial institutions. However, these price changes are effective in preventing a drain of liquidity. Size and geographical diversification through branch networks can mitigate the effects of Fintech competition by sourcing deposits from less competitive markets. The findings highlight the unintended consequences of the growing Fintech sector on banks and offer policy insights for regulators and managers into the ongoing development and impact of technology on the banking sector.
title_cn: 金融科技的颠覆性有多大？
abstract_cn: 我们研究金融科技（Fintech）是否通过加剧对稀缺存款资金的竞争并提高存款利率而扰乱银行业。通过对美国各州外生性解除市场平台投资限制进行差分中的差分估计，我们发现小型金融机构的存款成本大约增加了5.9%。然而，这些价格变化有效地防止了流动性的流失。通过分支网络实现规模和地理多样化，可以通过从竞争较弱的市场获取存款来减轻金融科技竞争的影响。研究结果突显了不断增长的金融科技领域对银行的意外影响，并为监管者和管理者提供了有关技术在银行业持续发展和影响的政策洞见。

title: Enhancing Transparency and Replicability in Entrepreneurship Research with Preregistrations, Registered Reports, and Registered Revisions: A Call for Papers
abstract: Entrepreneurship Theory and Practice ( ETP ) is committed to advancing transparency, replicability, credibility, and rigor in research. To support this commitment, we encourage authors to preregister their research plans, submit empirical studies as Registered Reports, and engage with our evolving editorial processes, such as Registered Revisions. Drawing on practices across multiple disciplines, we offer guidance for integrating these publication formats into our field. We also provide multiple resources to support authors in adopting these approaches and to address the unique challenges of applying such formats to, for example, secondary data. By more widely embracing the Registered Report approach, we envision a future for entrepreneurship research that is characterized by greater credibility, replicability, transparency, and scientific impact. In this editorial, we motivate and, hopefully, guide future work by making a specific call for manuscripts for a virtual special issue of ETP focused on Registered Reports, strengthening ETP ’s longstanding commitment to methodological innovation. We offer a prospective vision—what we believe would be good for future literature—and our aim is to empower scholars to proactively shape new theoretical and empirical foundations in entrepreneurship research that enhance the credibility and replicability of entrepreneurship research.
title_cn: 通过预注册、注册报告和注册修订提高创业研究的透明度和可复制性：征稿启事
abstract_cn: 《创业理论与实践》（ETP）致力于推动研究的透明性、可复制性、可信度和严谨性。为支持这一承诺，我们鼓励作者预注册他们的研究计划，提交实证研究作为注册报告，并参与我们不断发展的编辑流程，如注册修订。借鉴多个学科的实践，我们为将这些出版格式融入我们的领域提供指导。我们还提供多种资源，帮助作者采用这些方法，并应对将这些格式应用于例如二手数据等独特挑战。通过更广泛地接受注册报告的方式，我们设想创业研究的未来将具有更高的可信度、可复制性、透明性和科学影响力。在这篇社论中，我们激励并希望引导未来的研究，特别是针对注册报告发表EPT虚拟特刊的稿件，进一步加强ETP在方法创新方面的持久承诺。我们提供一个前瞻性的愿景——我们认为这将为未来文献打下良好的基础——我们的目标是赋能学者，积极塑造创业研究中新理论和实证基础，以提高创业研究的可信度和可复制性。

title: Transformational Family Leaders in Multi-Unit Complex Family Firms: A Multilevel Analysis
abstract: Transformational leadership is recognized for bringing family members together; however, its role in multi-unit complex family firms that rely on nonfamily managers is poorly theorized. We find that transformational family chief executive officers (CEOs) positively affect the performance of business units run by nonfamily managers, suggesting that transformational family CEOs significantly influence nonfamily managers’ behavior. But the efficacy of that influence matters. Political skill enhances the transformational family CEO’s impact on business unit entrepreneurial orientation and financial performance. Business unit entrepreneurial orientation also mediates the relationship between the transformational family CEO and business unit financial performance, particularly when CEO’s political skill is high.
title_cn: 多单元复杂家族企业中的变革型家庭领导者：一种多层次分析
abstract_cn: 变革型领导被认为能够将家庭成员聚集在一起；然而，它在依赖非家庭管理者的多单位复杂家族企业中的作用尚缺乏理论支持。我们的研究发现，变革型家庭首席执行官（CEO）对由非家庭管理者运营的业务单位的表现产生了积极的影响，这表明变革型家庭CEO对非家庭管理者的行为具有显著影响。然而，这种影响的有效性则显得尤为重要。政治技能增强了变革型家庭CEO对业务单位企业家精神取向和财务表现的影响。尤其在CEO的政治技能较高时，业务单位的企业家精神取向在变革型家庭CEO与业务单位财务表现之间的关系中发挥了中介作用。

title: ‘. . . All Stakeholders Are Equally Unhappy’: The politics of frame consensus
abstract: Consensus is often seen as a necessary condition for collaboration in multi-stakeholder initiatives and in multilateral settings. Yet, how the requirement of consensus shapes deliberations and negotiations of global governance issues – and at what costs – remains underexamined. This article raises the questions: How are contested frames revised for consensus in multilateral contexts, and what are the implications for the issues framed? We trace contestations over the framing of sustainable diets across diverse actors in the United Nations (UN). Based on a frame analysis of official policy documents, substantiated by insights from interviews with UN staff and experts on UN policy, we develop a processual model of frame revision in multilateral governance that explains how different forms of frame consensus – integrative, antagonistic and evasive – are reached. We advance framing research by theorizing how frames are revised for consensus through compartmentalization and subversion of contentious issues, thereby masking incommensurable differences. We also contribute to research on deliberative tensions through a processual take on consensus in multilateral settings. These contributions have wider implications for understanding global governance, highlighting why UN consensus politics are often associated with incremental rather than radical changes.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: “……所有利益相关者同样不满”：框架共识的政治学
abstract_cn: 共识常被视为多利益相关者倡议和多边环境中合作的必要条件。然而，关于共识要求如何塑造全球治理问题的审议和谈判——以及其代价——仍然未得到充分研究。本文提出了以下问题：在多边背景下，如何修订争议框架以达成共识，这对所框定的问题有什么影响？我们追踪了联合国（UN）中不同参与者对可持续饮食框架的争论。基于对官方政策文件的框架分析，并结合对联合国工作人员和政策专家的访谈见解，我们发展了一个多边治理中框架修订的过程模型，解释了如何达成不同形式的框架共识——整合性、对抗性和回避性。我们通过理论化框架如何通过对争议问题的分 compartmentalization 和颠覆进行修订以达成共识，从而掩盖不可调和的差异，推进了框架研究。我们还通过对多边环境中共识的过程性理解，为关于审议紧张关系的研究做出了贡献。这些贡献对理解全球治理具有更广泛的意义，突显了为何联合国的共识政治常常与渐进而非激进的变革相关联。

title: In the Name of Internationalization: Varied organizational actorhood of universities in the global higher education arena
abstract: Drawing on neo-institutional theories, this study explores how universities engage in internationalization as organizational actors embedded in national and global contexts. Using a mixed-method approach and based on a sample of 500 universities across 89 countries, we analyse how a country’s global competitiveness and liberal tendencies shape the ways its universities organize structures and activities around internationalization, particularly amid today’s intensified global competition among countries and universities and the resurgence of illiberalism. Our quantitative analyses show that national competitiveness is positively associated with internationalization activities, whereas national liberalism is positively associated with internationalization structures. Additionally, our qualitative analyses reveal variations in how universities motivate and emphasize different aspects of internationalization across the continuum of national competitiveness and liberalism. Together, our findings extend neo-institutionalist research by highlighting distinct aspects of organizational actorhood and the heterogeneity demonstrated across contexts.
title_cn: 国际化的名义：大学在全球高等教育舞台上的多元组织行为
abstract_cn: 本研究借鉴新制度理论，探讨大学作为嵌入国家和全球背景中的组织行为者如何参与国际化。我们采用混合方法，基于来自89个国家的500所大学样本，分析国家的全球竞争力和自由主义倾向如何影响其大学围绕国际化组织结构和活动的方式，特别是在当今国家和大学之间全球竞争加剧及非自由主义复兴的背景下。我们的定量分析表明，国家竞争力与国际化活动呈正相关，而国家自由主义则与国际化结构呈正相关。此外，我们的定性分析揭示了大学在国家竞争力和自由主义连续谱上，如何激励和强调国际化的不同方面存在变异。综合来看，我们的研究结果拓展了新制度主义研究，突出了组织行为者的不同特征及其在不同背景下表现出的异质性。

title: Collectively Committing to ‘What Is Interesting’ in Qualitative Research: A methodological application of interactional sociolinguistics
abstract: Selecting which aspects of empirical phenomena to investigate is a fundamental yet underexplored challenge in qualitative research. This paper introduces an interactional sociolinguistic methodology to examine how a qualitative research team navigated this challenge during a three-year project. By analysing real-life team discussions, we identify four types of interactionally co-constructed commitments – straightforward , uncertain , repeated and withheld commitments – that enable teams to balance exploratory openness with the need to narrow their focus within the interplay between the observed empirical field and academic discourse. Building on these insights, we propose an interactional sociolinguistic model of collective commitments to ‘what is interesting’ in qualitative research. Our study contributes to methodological scholarship by revealing how linguistic interaction shapes shared direction and methodological decision-making in team-based qualitative inquiries.
title_cn: 在定性研究中集体承诺于“什么是有趣的”：互动社会语言学的一个方法论应用
abstract_cn: 选择哪些经验现象进行调查是定性研究中的一个基本但未被充分探讨的挑战。本文引入了一种互动社会语言学的方法，旨在研究一个定性研究团队在三年项目中如何应对这一挑战。通过分析真实的团队讨论，我们识别出四种互动共建的承诺类型——直接承诺、不确定承诺、重复承诺和保留承诺——这些承诺使团队能够在观察到的经验领域与学术话语之间的互动中，平衡探索性开放与聚焦需求。基于这些见解，我们提出了一个互动社会语言学的集体承诺模型，以界定“在定性研究中什么是有趣的”。我们的研究通过揭示语言互动如何塑造共享方向和方法决策，为基于团队的定性研究中的方法论学术贡献提供了新的视角。

title: Technical Note—Error Noted in “Robust Contract Designs: Linear Contracts and Moral Hazard” by Yu and Kong (2020)
abstract: One of the key claims in the paper “Robust Contract Designs: Linear Contracts and Moral Hazard” by Yu and Kong (2020) is proposition 4. This proposition states that when designing the best robust contract—assuming the agent’s utility function is piecewise linear and concave—the optimal solution involves only progressive fixed payments and linear rewards with progressive commission rates. In this note, we provide a clear counterexample backed by a detailed proof to show that this claim is actually incorrect. We further use numerical examples to demonstrate that the contract design suggested by Yu and Kong can perform significantly worse than expected. Lastly, we identify and explain the specific mistakes in their mathematical proofs that led them to this incorrect conclusion.
title_cn: 技术注释——Yu和Kong（2020）“稳健合同设计：线性合同与道德风险”中的错误说明
abstract_cn: 在Yu和Kong（2020）的论文《稳健合同设计：线性合同与道德风险》中，关键的观点之一是命题4。该命题指出，在设计最佳稳健合同时——假设代理人的效用函数是分段线性且凹的——最优解决方案仅涉及逐步固定支付和具有逐步佣金率的线性奖励。在此笔记中，我们提供了一个清晰的反例，并附上详细的证明，以表明这个说法实际上是错误的。我们还通过数值示例进一步展示Yu和Kong建议的合同设计实际上可能表现得远不如预期。最后，我们识别并解释了他们数学证明中的具体错误，这些错误导致他们得出了这一不正确的结论。

title: Do More Services Lead to Better Buyer–Supplier Relationships? The Unintended Consequence of Manufacturing Firms Providing Customer Solutions
abstract: The literature has highlighted the value of the solution business model for manufacturing firms. In this research, we investigate the dark side of providing customer solutions and challenge an assumption held by extant research: That shifting from selling individual products to providing customer solutions enhances buyer–supplier relationships. Drawing on the frame problem view and expectation-(dis) confirmation theory, we examine the impact of provision of customer solutions on customer default. We also explore contingent factors that either magnify or mitigate this effect. Using a longitudinal dataset of 2,218 observations from 446 Chinese listed firms between 2012 and 2020, we find that provision of customer solutions increases the likelihood of customer default. Moreover, we show that this positive impact is stronger in industries with higher turbulence and for firms with greater advertising intensity, but weaker for firms with stronger operational capability. These findings suggest that provision of customer solutions can damage buyer–supplier relationships by reducing the likelihood of meeting customer expectations and increasing transaction disputes.
title_cn: 更多的服务是否会促进买方与供应商之间的关系？制造企业提供客户解决方案的意外后果
abstract_cn: 文献强调了解决方案商业模型对于制造企业的价值。在本研究中，我们探讨了提供客户解决方案的负面影响，并质疑现有研究中的一个假设：即从销售单一产品转向提供客户解决方案会增强买卖双方关系。基于框架问题视角和期望确认（不确认）理论，我们考察了提供客户解决方案对客户违约的影响，并探索了可能放大或减弱这一影响的相关因素。通过分析2012年至2020年间446家中国上市公司的2218个观察数据，我们发现提供客户解决方案增加了客户违约的可能性。此外，我们还发现，这一积极影响在动荡性较高的行业中以及广告投入强度较大的企业中更为明显，而在运营能力较强的企业中则较弱。这些发现表明，提供客户解决方案可能会通过降低客户期望的满足可能性和增加交易争议，损害买卖双方关系。

title: Cross-Platform Spillover Effect of Promotion: Evidence from the PC Game Market
abstract: Platform owners employ strategic promotions (e.g., platform-initiated penetration pricing) to enlarge their customer base. Under the conventional price-driven economic logic, such promotions are expected to divert demand for the identical goods away from competing platforms, as extensively documented in the conventional brick-and-mortar store context. However, they can also boost the demand. In environments where customers can easily access the identical goods on competing platforms, the increased awareness by strategic promotion, coupled with other non-price factors, can stimulate the purchases of such goods on competing platforms. As such, the effect of strategic promotions on competitive dynamics remains unclear despite their importance for platforms and today’s intensifying platform competition. We utilize the context of online PC game marketplaces where Steam and Epic Games Store dominate. Using the synthetic control approach, our analysis finds that the strategic promotion by Epic Games Store, which offers selected games for free for a week, rather increases the sales of the identical games on Steam substantially (by 59.2%) during that week. In essence, although consumers could obtain the games for free on the promoting platform, more consumers purchased the identical games on the competing platform than before. To comprehensively understand the drivers and conditions of this phenomenon, we perform complementary analysis based on the Attention-Interest-Desire-Action framework, following the progression of consumers’ cross-platform purchase decision process. Using consumer survey and product review data, along with the decomposition of the treatment effect, our results suggest that the effect is more prominent when the price gap between platforms is small and externalities between users or between goods offered by Steam are high. Taken together, our study unveils a unique aspect of strategic promotion in the context of platform competition and highlights the crucial role of externalities in shaping the competitive landscape of digital platforms.
title_cn: 跨平台促销溢出效应：来自PC游戏市场的证据
abstract_cn: 平台拥有者采用战略促销（例如，平台发起的渗透定价）来扩大客户基础。在传统的以价格驱动的经济逻辑下，这类促销预计会将对同类商品的需求从竞争平台转移，如同在传统的实体店环境中所广泛记录的那样。然而，它们也可以提升需求。在顾客能够轻松访问竞争平台上同类商品的环境中，战略促销带来的认知提升，加上其他非价格因素，可以刺激顾客在竞争平台上购买这些商品。因此，尽管战略促销对平台及当今日益激烈的平台竞争至关重要，但其对竞争动态的影响仍然不甚明晰。我们利用在线PC游戏市场的背景进行研究，在该市场中，Steam和Epic Games Store占据主导地位。通过合成控制方法，我们的分析发现Epic Games Store的战略促销（在一周内免费提供选定游戏）实质上在这一周内大大增加了Steam上同类游戏的销售（增长了59.2%）。从本质上讲，尽管消费者可以在促销平台上免费获得游戏，但购买竞争平台上同类游戏的消费者数量却超过了之前的水平。为了全面理解这一现象的驱动因素和条件，我们基于注意-兴趣-愿望-行动（AIDA）框架进行互补分析，跟踪消费者的跨平台购买决策过程。通过使用消费者调查和产品评价数据，以及对处理效应的分解，我们的结果表明，当平台间的价格差距较小时，用户之间或Steam提供的商品之间的外部性较高时，该效应更为明显。综上所述，我们的研究揭示了平台竞争背景下战略促销的独特方面，并强调了外部性在塑造数字平台竞争格局中的关键作用。

title: Behavior-Based Pricing and Delay Commitment in Congestion-Prone Systems
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the widespread use of data to recognize repeat and new consumers to offer them different prices, that is, behavior-based pricing (BBP). While extensive research has explored the market impacts of BBP, most studies overlook the congestion effects arising from increased demand. This study addresses this gap by investigating the impact of BBP in congestion-prone systems, such as food delivery, with a particular focus on how delay commitment strategies influence both firms and consumers. Employing a two-period game-theoretic duopoly model integrated with a queueing system, where service qualities can be dynamically adjusted in each period, our analysis shows that BBP consistently intensifies firm competition, leaving firms worse off while simultaneously benefiting consumers. To enable BBP as a viable equilibrium, we propose a delay commitment strategy. Our findings show that while BBP intensifies price competition, it further alleviates service competition when combined with delay commitment. Notably, when capacity costs are high, the moderating effect on service competition becomes dominant, thereby offsetting the adverse impact of BBP on firms and ultimately leading to higher profits. From a long-term perspective, we further confirm that adopting delay commitment constitutes a Pareto-dominant equilibrium for both firms, irrespective of whether BBP is implemented. We further show that BBP continues to mitigate service competition even under partial coverage and may help increase market coverage. Moreover, when firms differ in their capacity costs, our results show that BBP can enhance social welfare by alleviating the negative externalities associated with congestion, termed the load-balancing effect. In summary, our research highlights the potential drawbacks of BBP for firms in service systems, but suggests that adopting a delay commitment strategy can revitalize BBP.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 基于行为的定价与拥堵易发系统中的延迟承诺
abstract_cn: 近年来，数据的广泛使用使得企业能够识别重复和新顾客，从而对其进行不同定价，即基于行为的定价（BBP）。尽管已有大量研究探讨了BBP对市场的影响，但大多数研究忽略了因需求增加而产生的拥堵效应。本研究通过考察BBP在易拥堵系统（如食品配送）中的影响，特别关注延迟承诺策略如何影响企业和消费者，来填补这一空白。我们采用一个结合排队系统的两阶段博弈论双头垄断模型，在每个阶段中服务质量可以动态调整。分析结果显示，BBP始终加剧了企业竞争，使得企业处于不利地位，而同时惠及消费者。为了使BBP成为一种可行的均衡策略，我们提出了一种延迟承诺策略。我们的研究发现，虽然BBP加剧了价格竞争，但当与延迟承诺结合时，进一步减轻了服务竞争。值得注意的是，当容量成本较高时，延迟承诺对服务竞争的调节效应变得主导，从而抵消了BBP对企业的负面影响，并最终导致利润的提高。从长期来看，我们进一步确认，采用延迟承诺构成了企业的帕累托优势均衡，无论是否实施BBP。此外，我们还表明，即使在部分覆盖的情况下，BBP仍能继续减轻服务竞争，可能有助于增加市场覆盖率。此外，当企业的容量成本存在差异时，我们的结果表明，BBP能够通过减轻与拥堵相关的负外部性来提高社会福利，这种效应被称为负荷平衡效应。总之，我们的研究突显了BBP在服务系统中对企业潜在的负面影响，但建议采用延迟承诺策略可以复兴BBP。

title: Reckoning With the Ideal Worker Body: A Qualitative Study of Workers in Chronic Pain
abstract: Implicit in the ideal worker norm is the assumption of the ideal worker body, a body that is always ready and willing to meet work demands. Yet, bodies vary in their ability to meet this ideal. Through a qualitative study of 66 workers in chronic pain, we build theory on the experience of a chronic, stigmatized deviation from the ideal worker body. Our analysis uncovered that as informants’ pain interfered with their work, they attempted to pass as ideal-worker-bodied. However, attempting to pass ultimately increased their pain and its interference with their work, thus catapulting them into a vicious cycle. For two thirds of our informants, this cycle led to their pain becoming intolerable, forcing them to reckon with pervasive ableist norms as they turned to medical professionals for help. Informants who received validating cues from medical professionals were better able to relinquish, albeit with difficulty, the ideal worker body as necessary. They came to accept an alternative to the ideal worker body: a sufficient worker body. Informants who received invalidating cues continued in the vicious cycle of striving for the ideal worker body. Our findings contribute to scholarship on bodies at work, stigma at work, and the ideal worker norm.
title_cn: 应对理想工作者身体：一项关于慢性疼痛工人的定性研究
abstract_cn: 理想工作者规范隐含了一种理想工作者身体的假设，即一种始终准备好并愿意满足工作需求的身体。然而，身体在满足这一理想方面各有差异。通过对66名慢性疼痛工人的定性研究，我们构建了关于慢性、被污名化的偏离理想工作者身体的体验的理论。我们的分析发现，随着受访者的疼痛影响了他们的工作，他们试图伪装成理想工作者身体的样子。然而，这种伪装的尝试最终加剧了他们的疼痛及其对工作的干扰，使他们陷入了一个恶性循环。在我们的受访者中，约三分之二的人经历了这种循环，导致他们的疼痛变得难以忍受，迫使他们在寻求医疗帮助时不得不面对普遍存在的能力歧视规范。那些从医疗专业人士那里获得肯定信号的受访者较好地接受了理想工作者身体的放弃，尽管过程艰难。他们开始接受一种替代理想工作者身体的观念：一个足够的工作者身体。相反，接收到无效信号的受访者则继续在追求理想工作者身体的恶性循环中徘徊。我们的研究发现为关于工作场所中的身体、工作中的污名以及理想工作者规范的学术讨论作出了贡献。

title: When the Moon is Jealous of the Stars: Implications of Informal Leadership for Supervisor Downward Jealousy and Their Treatment of Other Subordinates
abstract: Informal leadership has received considerable attention over the last decade, yet the literature remains unclear about the interpersonal dynamics in teams where both informal and formal leadership coexist. Integrating the social functional view of emotions with recent theoretical advancements on workplace jealousy, we propose a theoretical model that explains how supervisors react emotionally and behaviorally to informal leadership. Specifically, we theorize that, when an informal leader is highly competent, their informal leadership will elicit supervisor downward jealousy stemming from the supervisor’s fear of losing valued relationships with the other subordinates; and this jealousy, in turn, will prompt more supervisor support and less abusive supervision toward the other subordinates who are also highly competent. We adopted a multiwave, multisource field study and an experiment using the critical incident technique to test our model and hypotheses. Results across these studies consistently supported our predictions. We discuss the theoretical and practical implications as well as future research directions of our work.
title_cn: 当月亮对星星心生嫉妒：非正式领导对主管向下嫉妒及其对其他下属处理方式的影响
abstract_cn: 非正式领导在过去十年中引起了相当大的关注，但文献对于非正式领导与正式领导共存的团队中人际动态仍不够清晰。我们将情感的社会功能视角与有关职场嫉妒的最新理论进展相结合，提出一个理论模型，解释主管如何在情感和行为上对非正式领导做出反应。具体而言，我们理论推测，当非正式领导者具备高水平的能力时，他们的非正式领导会引发主管的向下嫉妒，这种嫉妒源于主管对与其他下属的宝贵关系失去的恐惧；而这种嫉妒反过来会促使主管对其它同样高效的下属给予更多支持，减少恶劣的管理。我们采用多波次、多来源的实地研究和使用关键事件技术的实验来检验我们的模型和假设。这些研究的结果一致支持我们的预测。我们讨论了我们工作的理论和实践意义，以及未来研究的方向。

title: When Family Firm Reputation Backfires: The Role of Controllability in Consumer Responses to Negative CSR Incidents
abstract: We apply attribution theory to examine how family ownership status shapes consumer attitudes toward companies after negative corporate social responsibility incidents, focusing on incident controllability. Two longitudinal experiments reveal that, when controllability is unknown , consumers infer lower controllability for family firms and thus hold more favorable attitudes toward them than non-family firms. However, when controllability is known , low-controllability incidents lead to similar attitudes across firm types, whereas high-controllability incidents reverse the effect, resulting in more negative attitudes toward family firms than non-family firms. These findings challenge the prevailing assumption that family firms consistently benefit from their reputation and inform stakeholder communication strategies.
title_cn: 当家族企业声誉遭遇危机：可控性在消费者对负面企业社会责任事件反应中的作用
abstract_cn: 我们运用归因理论来研究家庭拥有状态如何影响消费者在公司发生负面企业社会责任事件后的态度，重点关注事件的可控性。通过两项纵向实验发现，当可控性未知时，消费者会推断家庭企业的可控性较低，因此对家庭企业的态度比对非家庭企业更加积极。然而，当可控性已知时，低可控性事件导致各类企业的态度相似，而高可控性事件则扭转了这种效果，导致消费者对家庭企业的态度比对非家庭企业更加消极。这些发现挑战了家庭企业始终受益于其声誉的主流假设，并为利益相关者沟通策略提供了指导。

title: Physical Disability in the Workplace: A Comprehensive Review and Unifying Framework
abstract: In the United States, more than a quarter of the working-age population experiences physical disabilities that shape workplace participation and career outcomes. Drawing on 168 articles, we synthesize the management literature to develop a unifying framework of focal mechanisms, workplace outcomes, and boundary conditions. In doing so, we offer a clear definition of physical disability, long absent from management research. We also highlight the fragmented theoretical and methodological landscape, in which most studies aggregate disability types, overlooking critical heterogeneity. Our review charts a path forward by identifying key gaps, outlining directions for future scholarship, and emphasizing the need for stronger theoretical grounding and methodological rigor. Finally, we discuss implications for policy and practice, underscoring how greater inclusion of persons with physical disabilities can advance various workplace outcomes.
title_cn: 工作场所的身体残疾：综合评审与统一框架
abstract_cn: 在美国，超过四分之一的工作年龄人口经历身体残疾，这影响了他们的职场参与和职业结果。我们基于168篇文章对管理文献进行了综合，制定了一个包含焦点机制、职场结果和边界条件的统一框架。通过这一过程，我们为长期缺乏的管理研究提供了身体残疾的明确定义。同时，我们还强调了理论和方法上的碎片化现状，大多数研究将残疾类型进行汇总，忽视了重要的异质性。我们的综述开辟了未来的研究路径，通过识别关键空白，勾勒未来研究的方向，并强调了更强的理论基础和方法论严谨性的必要性。最后，我们讨论了对政策和实践的影响，强调了更多地包容身体残疾人士如何推动各种职场结果的发展。

title: From information asymmetry to transparency: blockchain-enabled digital transformation in manufacturing supply chains
abstract: Purpose Blockchain serves as a vital technology for digital transformation within manufacturing supply chains through its improved security and transparent tracking capabilities. Blockchain technology emerges as a promising solution for supply chain stakeholders who face ongoing information asymmetries and trust deficits amidst growing demands for sustainable practices and ethical sourcing from consumers and regulators. This paper aims to explore the potential of blockchain technology to improve transparency within supply chain operations, particularly in the Australian electrical manufacturing industry. Design/methodology/approach This research uses a multimethod research design encompassing three phases: Phase 1, a comprehensive literature review; Phase 2, semistructured interviews; and Phase 3, a case study to explore the application of distributed ledger technology for secure real-time supply chain activity monitoring. Findings The results suggest that integrating blockchain with Internet of Things technologies and sensor-based data leads to substantial improvements in data integrity while reducing fraud risks and enabling more efficient supply chain actor collaboration. Practical implications Manufacturing firms can benefit from our research findings, which provide actionable steps for using blockchain to achieve sustainable operations and improved efficiency. The authors offer strategic guidance for firms to develop supply chains that ensure transparency and resilience, along with alignment to environmental, social and governance goals. Originality/value The study advances digital supply chain transformation research by showing how blockchain serves as an essential technology to improve transparency and trust while boosting performance in manufacturing supply chains.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 从信息不对称到透明：区块链驱动的制造供应链数字化转型
abstract_cn:
目的 区块链作为数字化转型的重要技术，通过其增强的安全性和透明的追踪能力，在制造供应链中发挥着关键作用。区块链技术为面临持续信息不对称和信任缺失的供应链利益相关者提供了一种有前景的解决方案，特别是在消费者和监管者对可持续实践和伦理采购日益增长的要求下。本文旨在探讨区块链技术在提高供应链运营透明度方面的潜力，特别是在澳大利亚电气制造行业中的应用。

设计/方法论/途径 本研究采用多方法研究设计，包括三个阶段：第一阶段进行全面的文献综述；第二阶段进行半结构化访谈；第三阶段进行案例研究，以探讨分布式账本技术在安全实时供应链活动监控中的应用。

研究结果 结果表明，将区块链与物联网技术及基于传感器的数据结合可以显著提高数据的完整性，同时降低欺诈风险，并促进供应链参与者之间的更高效合作。

实践意义 制造企业可以从我们的研究结果中受益，这些结果提供了通过区块链实现可持续运营和提高效率的可行步骤。作者为企业提供了战略指导，以发展确保透明性和韧性的供应链，并与环境、社会和治理目标保持一致。

创新/价值 本研究推动了数字供应链转型研究，展示了区块链如何作为关键技术来改善透明性和信任，同时提升制造供应链的绩效。

title: Examining the Importance of Accountability as a Virtue
abstract: Abstract Given the continued number and impact of governance and accountability failures, improving accountability and accountability systems is receiving increased attention. Instead of improving accountability systems , we examine the role a virtue of accountability can play in developing accountable individuals , and we provide an integrated analysis of the virtue of accountability’s prominent role and place in moral relationships, moral theory, and moral action. Individuals with a virtue of accountability internalize accountability, voluntarily embrace moral obligations to others, and welcome being accountable. We posit that developing a virtue of accountability can help individuals resolve the tension between self-interested autonomy and others-interested accountability in moral relationships by providing them with a moral mindset to willingly use their autonomy to fulfill responsibilities to others accountably. We theoretically consider the importance of accountability as a moral virtue using Adam Smith’s moral principles and the concept of imago Dei . We conceptually examine the virtue of accountability’s role in and impact on moral action by integrating virtue ethics theory with models of moral action and theories of intrinsic motivation, and we consider implications of our work for research, education, and practice. Crucially, the virtue of accountability makes important contributions to the richness and depth of business and accounting ethics by bringing attention to the role of accountability and moral motivation.
title_cn: 审视责任感作为一种美德的重要性
abstract_cn: 摘要 鉴于治理和问责失效的数量及其影响持续存在，提高问责和问责体系受到越来越多的关注。我们并不直接改善问责体系，而是考察问责美德在培养可问责个体方面所能发挥的作用，并对问责美德在道德关系、道德理论和道德行为中的重要角色及地位进行了综合分析。具备问责美德的个体能够内化问责，自愿承担对他人的道德义务，并乐于接受问责。我们认为，培养问责美德可以帮助个体在道德关系中缓解自利自治与他利问责之间的紧张关系，提供一种道德心态，使他们乐意运用自己的自治权来履行对他人的问责责任。我们通过亚当·斯密的道德原则和“神像”（imago Dei）这一概念，理论上探讨问责作为道德美德的重要性。我们概念性地考察问责美德在道德行为中的角色及影响，通过将美德伦理学理论与道德行为模型和内在动机理论相结合，探讨我们的研究对研究、教育和实践的影响。至关重要的是，问责美德通过强调问责和道德动机的角色，为商业与会计伦理的丰富性和深度作出了重要贡献。

title: The power of consumer solidarity framing in scaling up social impact
abstract: We study how a French social venture helped scale up social impact by selling fair-priced milk. Besides market success, the venture became a symbol of fair pricing for farmers, influencing public discourse and inspiring new laws. We develop a process model where energized consumer solidarity framing serves as a catalyst for mobilizing ecosystem actors, leading to the widespread adoption of the venture's solution to an economic and social crisis. This distributed process of scaling up social impact unfolds outside the venture's direct control, relying on community enactment as well as engagement and energizing from the media, incumbent retailers and competitors, as well as politicians. We contribute to research on scaling up social impact by explaining how and why entrepreneurial framing can mobilize diverse ecosystem actors. We also advance entrepreneurial framing research by offering a social-emotional explanation of how framing can enable change. • French co-op helping farmers scaled up social impact with limited resources • Social entrepreneur used energized consumer solidarity framing to engage ecosystem actors • Diagnostic, prognostic, and motivational frames mobilized ecosystem actors • Continuous energizing between the entrepreneur and ecosystem actors enabled scaling up • Positive and negative emotions can be regulated in entrepreneurial framing
title_cn: 消费者团结框架在扩大社会影响力中的力量
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一家法国社会企业如何通过销售公平价格的牛奶来扩大社会影响力。除了市场成功，该企业还成为了农民公平定价的象征，影响了公众讨论并激励了新法律的出台。我们发展了一个过程模型，其中以消费者团结的积极框架作为催化剂，动员生态系统中的参与者，从而推动了该企业解决经济和社会危机方案的广泛采用。这一分散的社会影响力扩展过程发生在企业的直接控制之外，依赖于社区的实施以及媒体、现有零售商、竞争对手和政治家的参与与激励。我们通过解释创业框架如何以及为什么能够动员多样的生态系统参与者，来为社会影响力扩展的研究做出贡献。我们还通过提供一种社会情感的解释，推动了创业框架研究，阐明了框架如何能够促进变革。 • 法国合作社以有限资源帮助农民扩大社会影响力 • 社会企业家利用积极的消费者团结框架来吸引生态系统参与者 • 诊断、预后和动机框架动员了生态系统参与者 • 企业家与生态系统参与者之间的持续激励使得扩展成为可能 • 积极和消极情绪可以在创业框架中进行调节

title: Family Political Embeddedness: A Double-Edged Sword For Entrepreneurial Entry in China
abstract: Political embeddedness and family embeddedness are two influential yet distinct areas of entrepreneurship research. In this study, we integrate these two streams of research to focus on family political embeddedness and its implications for new venture creation. Drawing on the social embeddedness perspective and utilizing a longitudinal dataset of 17,084 individuals from the China Family Panel Studies (2014–2022), complemented by 32 qualitative interviews, we examine the relationship between family political embeddedness and entrepreneurial entry, revealing a nuanced interplay. Our theory and related findings reveal a general negative relationship between family political embeddedness and entrepreneurial entry. However, we also unveil an indirect pathway through which family political embeddedness can foster entrepreneurial entry through political news consumption. Finally, we theorize and find that perceived government efficiency strengthens the relationship between political news consumption and entrepreneurial entry. Our work yields important theoretical and practical implications.
title_cn: 家庭政治嵌入：在中国创业进入的双刃剑
abstract_cn: 政治嵌入性和家庭嵌入性是创业研究中两个有影响力但又截然不同的领域。在本研究中，我们整合这两条研究路径，重点关注家庭政治嵌入性及其对新创企业创建的影响。基于社会嵌入性视角，并利用来自中国家庭追踪调查（2014-2022）的17,084个个体的纵向数据集，以及32次定性访谈，我们考察了家庭政治嵌入性与创业进入之间的关系，揭示了其复杂的相互作用。我们的理论及相关发现表明，家庭政治嵌入性与创业进入之间存在一般性的负相关关系。然而，我们也揭示了一条间接路径，即家庭政治嵌入性可以通过政治新闻消费促进创业进入。最后，我们理论化并发现，感知的政府效率增强了政治新闻消费与创业进入之间的关系。我们的研究为理论和实践提供了重要的启示。

title: Juggling Paradoxical Goals: Unpacking persisting dysfunctional dynamics
abstract: Paradoxical goals, such as demands in industrial R&D for exploratory learning and short-term business performance, may foster synergistic possibilities, but also surface tensions that can paralyse actors. Defensive responses can trigger vicious cycles, where over-focusing on one goal provides actors with temporary comfort, but intensifies the pull from the neglected goal. Paradox studies identify typical initiators of vicious cycles and have started to unpack managerial interventions to reverse into virtuous dynamics. Yet, we still know little about how dysfunctional dynamics drive persisting vicious cycles. Our in-depth longitudinal qualitative case study of an ICT corporate research lab reveals multifaceted and nested dysfunctional dynamics at the heart of persisting vicious cycles. Our study makes three interconnected contributions to the paradox literature. First, while extant studies suggest that managerial interventions can enable organizations to reverse vicious into virtuous cycles, our findings show that interventions may backfire and instead re-fuel dysfunctional dynamics. Particularly when paradoxical goals are almost impossible to attain in practice, managerial interventions that treat the symptoms of over-focusing on one goal instead of addressing the impossibility of the task, can feed dysfunctional dynamics. Second, our process model shows how defensive responses are continually ‘becoming’. Unpacking the shifting nature of defensive responses introduces granularity into current conceptualizations of paradox dynamics but also enriches our understanding of how the management of paradoxes may sometimes feature as an impossible task. Third, our model shows how dysfunctional dynamics are nested across organizational levels. Extending current insights on paradox nestedness, we show that persisting vicious cycles are fuelled by the interlocking effects of senior management interventions to restore dynamic equilibrium and counter-balancing defensive responses at lower organizational levels. We stress the key role of middle managers in contextualizing paradoxical demands into concrete everyday activities that employees can comprehend, while attending to employees’ concerns.
title_cn: 平衡矛盾目标：揭示持续存在的功能失调动态
abstract_cn: 矛盾性目标，例如工业研发中对探索性学习和短期业务绩效的需求，可能会促进协同的可能性，但也会显现出使行动者瘫痪的紧张关系。防御性反应可能会触发恶性循环，在这种情况下，过于关注一个目标可以让行动者获得暂时的安慰，但同时会加剧被忽视目标的拉动。矛盾研究揭示了恶性循环的典型启动因素，并开始探讨管理干预如何逆转为良性动态。然而，我们仍然对不良动态如何驱动持续的恶性循环知之甚少。我们对一家信息通信技术企业研究实验室的深入纵向定性案例研究揭示了持续恶性循环背后多方面且嵌套的不良动态。我们的研究对矛盾文献做出了三个相互关联的贡献。首先，尽管现有研究表明管理干预可以使组织逆转恶性循环为良性循环，但我们的发现表明，干预可能适得其反，反而重新激发不良动态。特别是当矛盾性目标在实践中几乎无法实现时，针对单一目标的过度关注的症状进行治疗的管理干预，可能会加剧不良动态。其次，我们的过程模型显示了防御性反应的持续“形成”过程。揭示防御性反应的变化性质为当前矛盾动态的概念化引入了细致的视角，同时也丰富了我们对管理矛盾如何有时会显得是一项不可能任务的理解。第三，我们的模型显示了不良动态在组织层面上的嵌套关系。扩展目前对矛盾嵌套性的见解，我们展示了持续的恶性循环是如何受到高层管理干预以恢复动态平衡与较低组织层面的反作用防御性反应之间相互影响的推动。我们强调中层管理者在将矛盾性需求具体化为员工能够理解的日常活动中的关键作用，同时关注员工的关切。

title: The dark side of illegitimate tasks: How revenge motives and moral identity shape deviant silence
abstract: Can illegitimate task assignments that go beyond what might be reasonably expected from employees lead to deviant silence in which employees withhold vital information to harm organizational functioning? Using stress-as-offense-to-self and retributive justice theories, our research explains how organizations produce employee silence and illuminates that employees’ revenge motives help explain the link between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence. We also propose that moral identity may serve as a boundary condition in the relationship between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence. We conduct two studies to test the hypothesized model. An experimental field study (Study 1) shows that illegitimate tasks are significantly related to deviant silence. A three-wave time-lagged study (Study 2) confirms the positive direct relationship between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence, as well as an indirect relationship through the revenge motives of employees. We argue that illegitimate tasks represent an indirect form of communicating incompetence and social devaluation and highlight how employees retaliate with a similarly covert punishment in the form of deviant silence, foregoing opportunities to improve working lives and discouraging future illegitimate task assignments. Also, we demonstrate that moral identity acts as a self-regulatory mechanism, which reduces the strength of the relationship between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence.
topics: Psychology of Moral and Emotional Judgment
title_cn: 非法任务的阴暗面：复仇动机与道德身份如何塑造偏差沉默
abstract_cn: 不合理的任务分配，超出员工合理预期的范围，是否会导致员工选择偏差沉默，从而隐瞒关键信息，影响组织功能？通过压力作为自我侵犯和报复性正义理论，我们的研究解释了组织如何产生员工沉默，并揭示了员工的报复动机在不合理任务与偏差沉默之间的联系中所起的作用。我们还提出，道德身份可能在不合理任务与偏差沉默之间的关系中充当边界条件。我们进行两项研究来检验假设模型。一项实验性实地研究（研究1）表明，不合理任务与偏差沉默显著相关。一个为期三波的时间延迟研究（研究2）确认了不合理任务与偏差沉默之间的正向直接关系，以及通过员工的报复动机所产生的间接关系。我们认为，不合理任务代表了一种间接的无能和社会贬值的传达方式，并强调员工如何通过类似隐蔽的惩罚形式——偏差沉默进行报复，从而放弃改善工作生活的机会，并打击未来的不合理任务分配。此外，我们证明了道德身份作为一种自我调节机制，降低了不合理任务与偏差沉默之间关系的强度。

title: The Rapid Adoption of Generative AI
abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (genAI) is a potentially important new technology, but its impact on the economy depends on the speed and intensity of adoption. This paper reports results from a series of nationally representative U.S. surveys of genAI use at work and at home. As of late 2024, 45% of the U.S. population age 18–64 uses genAI. Among employed respondents, 27% used genAI for work at least once in the previous week: 10% used it every workday and 17% on some but not all workdays. Relative to each technology’s first mass-market product launch, work adoption of genAI has been faster than the personal computer (PC), and overall adoption has outpaced both PCs and the internet by an even wider margin. Between 1% and 7% of all work hours are currently assisted by genAI, and respondents report time savings equivalent to 1.4% of total work hours. Potential productivity gains vary widely by industry, and firm climate and policies play an important role in adoption patterns. This paper was accepted by Alfonso Gambardello, business strategy. Funding: This work was supported by the Walmart Foundation [Grant 252882]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.02523 .
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 生成性人工智能的迅速普及
abstract_cn: 生成性人工智能（genAI）是一项具有潜在重要性的全新技术，但其对经济的影响取决于采用的速度和强度。本文报告了一系列具有全国代表性的美国调查结果，涉及在工作和家庭中使用genAI的情况。截至2024年底，45%的18至64岁美国人口使用genAI。在受雇的受访者中，27%的人在过去一周至少使用过一次genAI：10%的人在每个工作日使用，17%的人在某些工作日使用，但不是每个工作日。与每项技术首次面向大众市场推出的情况相比，genAI在工作场所的采用速度快于个人电脑（PC），整体采用速度则更是超越了PC和互联网，幅度更大。目前，1%至7%的所有工作时间都受到genAI的辅助，受访者报告的时间节省相当于总工作时间的1.4%。潜在的生产率提升在各个行业之间差异显著，企业气候和政策在采用模式中发挥着重要作用。本文已被商业策略领域的Alfonso Gambardello接收。资金支持：本研究得到了沃尔玛基金会的资助 [资助号 252882]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.02523 获取。

title: Task co‐use and product improvement: An organization design perspective
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Co‐using tasks—using the same task to produce more than one product—promises economies of scope. However, task co‐use also ties products together, changing a firm's task network by introducing cross‐product interdependencies. In light of these interdependencies, we identify an unrecognized downside of task co‐use for product reliability: Cross‐product interdependencies complicate task design and increase the risk of malfunctions. Hence, task co‐use may carry a reliability penalty. Second, we propose that the reliability penalty of task co‐use may shrink with experience as cross‐product interdependencies allow for cross‐improvements and therefore potentially higher improvement rates of task co‐using products. We study the US automotive industry and find our predictions supported, indicating that task co‐use is a critical design parameter with important consequences for reliability and product improvement. Managerial Summary Using the same tasks to produce multiple products can help firms lower costs and achieve economies of scope. However, this practice also links products more tightly together, creating interdependencies across product lines. These interdependencies can make tasks harder to design and manage, increasing the likelihood of errors or malfunctions. As a result, task co‐use may reduce product reliability—an important but often overlooked drawback. At the same time, co‐used tasks can enable portfolio‐wide improvements— improvements across products. As firms gain experience, problems identified in one product can lead to improvements that benefit others using the same tasks. Over time, these cross‐improvements accelerate product improvement for task co‐using products and can reduce the initial reliability disadvantage. Evidence from the U.S. automotive industry supports these arguments. The findings show that task co‐use is a key design decision that involves meaningful trade‐offs between cost savings, reliability, and improvement. For managers, this highlights the importance of carefully evaluating when and how tasks should be co‐used across products, as these choices have lasting implications for product quality and improvement.
title_cn: 任务共同使用与产品改进：组织设计视角
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 任务共用——使用同一任务生产多个产品——承诺带来范围经济。然而，任务共用也将产品联系在一起，改变了公司的任务网络，引入了跨产品的相互依赖关系。鉴于这些相互依赖关系，我们识别出任务共用对产品可靠性的一种未被认识的负面影响：跨产品的相互依赖关系使任务设计变得复杂，并增加了故障的风险。因此，任务共用可能会带来可靠性惩罚。其次，我们提出，随着经验的增加，任务共用的可靠性惩罚可能会缩小，因为跨产品的相互依赖关系可以促进跨产品的改进，从而可能提高任务共用产品的改进速度。我们研究了美国汽车产业，发现我们的预测得到了支持，这表明任务共用是一个关键的设计参数，对可靠性和产品改进具有重要影响。 管理总结 使用相同的任务来生产多个产品可以帮助企业降低成本并实现范围经济。然而，这种做法也使产品之间的联系更加紧密，创造了跨产品线的相互依赖关系。这些相互依赖关系会使任务的设计和管理变得更加困难，从而增加错误或故障的可能性。因此，任务共用可能降低产品的可靠性——这是一种重要但常被忽视的缺点。同时，共用的任务可以促使整个组合的改进——即跨产品的改进。随着企业经验的积累，在一个产品中识别出的问题可以导致对其他使用相同任务的产品的改进。随着时间的推移，这些跨产品的改进加速了任务共用产品的改进，并可能减少最初的可靠性劣势。来自美国汽车行业的证据支持了这些论点。研究结果表明，任务共用是一个关键的设计决策，涉及成本节约、可靠性和改进之间的有效权衡。对于管理者来说，这突显了在何时以及如何跨产品共用任务进行仔细评估的重要性，因为这些选择对产品质量和改进有着持久的影响。

title: Does entrepreneurship narrow the gender earnings gap?
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Prior research has examined whether individuals earn greater returns in entrepreneurship than in wage work but has paid little attention to gender differences in these returns. Using Swedish employee–employer data from 1990 to 2020, we compare individuals' earnings before and after they transitioned to entrepreneurship. We find that women founders earn less than men, yet this gap is smaller than in wage employment. Additionally, entrepreneurship yields disproportionately greater returns for (a) high‐ability women facing glass ceilings in salaried positions, and (b) women in male‐typed industries who encounter greater barriers to advancement in wage work. Together, these findings show that entrepreneurship can enable women to realize greater returns to their human capital, particularly when they face stronger constraints in paid employment. Managerial Summary This study examines whether entrepreneurship widens or narrows the gender earnings gap compared to wage work. Using comprehensive Swedish data that track individuals before and after founding new businesses, we show that, although women founders earn less than men in absolute terms, they experience substantially larger earnings gains than men when moving from wage work to entrepreneurship. This advantage is most pronounced for high‐ability women and for women in male‐dominated industries, who face stronger barriers to advancement in salaried work. Our findings indicate that entrepreneurship offers women a pathway to realize greater returns to their skills and experience, yielding disproportionately higher earnings compared to remaining in salaried jobs. For organizations, these results highlight how structural constraints in wage employment can push talented women toward entrepreneurship.
title_cn: 创业是否缩小性别收入差距？
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 先前的研究已探讨个人在创业中是否获得比工资工作更高的回报，但对这些回报的性别差异关注较少。通过使用1990年至2020年间的瑞典员工-雇主数据，我们比较了个人在转向创业前后的收入。我们发现，女性创始人的收入低于男性，但这一差距小于工资就业。此外，创业为（a）在受薪职位中面临玻璃天花板的高能力女性，以及（b）在男性主导行业中面临更大晋升障碍的女性，带来了不成比例的更大回报。这些发现表明，创业可以使女性实现更高的人力资本回报，尤其是在她们在有偿就业中面临更强约束时。 管理总结 本研究考察了创业是否扩大或缩小与工资工作相比的性别收入差距。通过使用全面的瑞典数据，追踪个人在创办新企业前后的表现，我们表明，尽管女性创始人的绝对收入低于男性，但她们在从工资工作转向创业时所经历的收入增长明显高于男性。对于高能力女性和在男性主导行业工作的女性而言，这一优势尤为明显，她们在受薪工作中面临更强的晋升障碍。我们的研究结果表明，创业为女性提供了一条实现技能和经验更高回报的途径，相较于留在受薪职位，所获得的收入明显更高。这些结果突出表明，工资就业中的结构性制约可能推动有才华的女性走向创业。

title: Firm training, automation, and wages: International worker-level evidence
abstract: Firm training is widely regarded as crucial for protecting workers from automation, yet there is a lack of empirical evidence to support this belief. Using internationally harmonized data from over 90,000 workers across 37 industrialized countries, we construct an individual-level measure of automation risk based on tasks performed at work. Our analysis reveals substantial within-occupation variation in automation risk, overlooked by existing occupation-level measures. To assess whether firm training mitigates automation risk, we exploit within-occupation and within-industry variation. Additionally, we employ entropy balancing to re-weight workers without firm training based on a rich set of background characteristics, including tested numeracy skills as a proxy for unobserved ability. We find that training reduces workers’ automation risk by 3.8 percentage points, equivalent to 8% of the average automation risk. The training-induced reduction in automation risk accounts for 15% of the wage returns to firm training. Firm training is effective in reducing automation risk and increasing wages across nearly all countries, underscoring the external validity of our findings. Training is similarly effective across gender, age, and education groups, suggesting widely shared benefits rather than gains concentrated in specific demographic segments. • Firm training reduces workers’ automation risk by 3.8 pp (8% of the average risk). • Training increases wages and improves digital skills. • Results hold across 37 industrialized countries. • Training is similarly effective across gender, age, and education groups. • Training helps workers turn towards less automatable tasks.
title_cn: 公司培训、自动化与工资：国际工人层面的证据
abstract_cn: 企业培训被广泛认为是保护员工免受自动化影响的重要手段，但缺乏实证证据来支持这一观点。通过使用来自37个工业化国家的超过90,000名工人的国际统一数据，我们构建了一个基于工作任务的个体化自动化风险衡量指标。我们的分析揭示了在同一职业内部自动化风险存在显著的变异性，这一现象在现有的职业层面衡量中被忽视。为了评估企业培训是否降低自动化风险，我们利用职业内部和行业内部的变异性。此外，我们采用熵平衡法对没有接受企业培训的工人进行重新加权，依据丰富的背景特征，包括以测试的算数技能作为未观察到能力的代理。我们发现，培训将工人的自动化风险降低了3.8个百分点，相当于平均自动化风险的8%。培训带来的自动化风险降低占企业培训工资回报的15%。企业培训在降低自动化风险和提高工资方面在几乎所有国家都有效，强调了我们发现的外部有效性。培训在性别、年龄和教育群体中同样有效，表明其益处广泛共享，而非集中于特定的人口细分群体。 • 企业培训将工人的自动化风险降低了3.8个百分点（占平均风险的8%）。 • 培训提高工资并改善数字技能。 • 结果在37个工业化国家中一致有效。 • 培训在性别、年龄和教育群体中同样有效。 • 培训帮助工人转向较少自动化的工作任务。

title: Addiction and Organization Studies
abstract: Addiction is not just an individual or public health issue. It is also embedded in organizational practices. We argue that addiction is engineered through the design of addictive goods and the structuring of habitual patterns of behaviour incentivized by organizations. We conceptualize how organizing sustains addictive behaviours by creating and reinventing what we term new objects and subjects of addiction. By conceptualizing addiction as an organizational phenomenon, we foreground its embeddedness in institutional, technological and economic arrangements. We then set out an agenda for further research on its organizational dimensions and the mechanisms that sustain and mitigate it.
title_cn: 成瘾与组织研究
abstract_cn: 成瘾不仅是一个个人或公共健康问题，它还深深植根于组织实践中。我们认为，成瘾是通过上瘾商品的设计和组织激励的习惯行为模式的构建而被人为制造的。我们概念化了组织如何通过创造和重塑我们所称的新成瘾对象和主体来维持成瘾行为。通过将成瘾视为一种组织现象，我们突出了其在制度、技术和经济安排中的嵌入性。接着，我们提出了一个关于其组织维度及维持和缓解成瘾机制的进一步研究议程。

title: Trade Credit with Costly Sales Revenue Verification
abstract: Problem definition: Trade credit is a common mechanism for financing retail inventories. A supplier who offers trade credit may not observe sales revenue and verification is costly. When a retailer offers to pay less than the full loan amount, the supplier may either accept the offered amount or initiate verification. We investigate the impact of costly sales revenue verification on the equilibrium wholesale price and loan limit, with the goal of determining whether the supplier’s profit is greater when verification is cost-free as opposed to when it is costly. Methodology/results: We formulate and analyze the interaction between a supplier, who is the shot caller, and a retailer within the confines of a wholesale-price net-terms contract via a game theoretic model and derive their in-equilibrium actions. Our key finding is that the presence of positive verification costs can increase the supplier’s expected profit compared with the setting where verification costs are zero. We show that this happens when the retailer’s assets and the verification costs are sufficiently high, but not too high. There exist parameters for which the retailer’s terminal wealth and the supply chain profit are also higher under positive verification costs. Managerial implications: Our paper provides assurance to suppliers that they need not be concerned about sales transparency when the retailer’s assets and the verification costs are in the midrange. Moreover, it shows how suppliers can utilize the levers of loan limit and wholesale price to extract most of the supply chain profit gains from positive verification costs. Our results are relevant in settings where suppliers have pricing power and dictate the contract terms. Funding: This work was supported by the Division of Civil, Mechanical and Manufacturing Innovation of the National Science Foundation of the United States [Grant 1755254]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0443 .
title_cn: 带有高成本销售收入验证的贸易信贷
abstract_cn: 问题定义：贸易信用是融资零售库存的常见机制。提供贸易信用的供应商可能无法观察到销售收入，而验证成本较高。当零售商提出支付低于全部贷款金额时，供应商可以选择接受所提议的金额或发起验证。我们研究了高成本销售收入验证对均衡批发价格和贷款限额的影响，旨在确定供应商的利润在验证无成本与有成本的情况下是否存在差异。 方法论/结果：我们通过一个博弈论模型来制定和分析供应商（决策者）与零售商之间在批发价格净条款合同下的互动，并推导出他们的均衡行为。我们的关键发现是，相较于验证成本为零的情形，正的验证成本的存在可以提高供应商的预期利润。我们表明，当零售商的资产和验证成本处于适中水平时，这种情况会发生，而不是过高或过低。存在某些参数，使得在正的验证成本下，零售商的终端财富和供应链利润也会更高。 管理启示：我们的研究为供应商提供了保障，即当零售商的资产和验证成本处于中等范围时，他们不必担心销售透明度。此外，这一研究表明供应商如何利用贷款限额和批发价格这两个杠杆，从正的验证成本中提取出大部分的供应链利润增长。我们的结果在供应商拥有定价权并主导合同条款的情境下具有相关性。 资金支持：本研究得到了美国国家科学基金会土木、机械与制造创新部的支持 [资助编号1755254]。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0443 获取。

title: How Frontline Employees’ Relational Communication in Online Service Interactions Drives Customer Satisfaction
abstract: Organizations lose billions of dollars due to inadequate customer service. To improve service, and enhance customer satisfaction, frontline employees’ (FLEs) use of relational communication may be key. During online customer service chats, FLEs provide key information and offer solutions, but they also can build customer relationships through conversations. In this article, we establish how relational perceptions get evoked in conversations and what influences they have for the outcomes of customer service interactions. Accordingly, we present an empirical field study that illustrates how FLEs influence customer satisfaction by mirroring or complementing four key themes, in line with relational communication theory: intimate communication, task orientation, assertiveness, and composure. Our results indicate that FLEs should mimic customers’ use of intimate communication and task orientation, complement their assertiveness, and exhibit high levels of composure. Moreover, FLEs should emphasize their task orientation at the conversation's outset, gradually incorporate more intimate communication as it progresses, and adopt assertiveness late in the service chat. These insights, corroborated by four experimental studies, underscore the significance of FLEs’ relational communication. Our findings highlight the value of training FLEs to tailor their word choices adeptly, and leverage the potential benefits of text-monitoring tools, which can help FLEs increase relational perceptions and satisfaction among their customers.
title_cn: 前线员工在在线服务互动中的关系沟通如何推动客户满意度
abstract_cn: 由于客户服务不足，组织损失数十亿美元。为了改善服务并提升客户满意度，一线员工（FLEs）在关系沟通中的运用可能是关键。在在线客户服务聊天中，一线员工不仅提供关键信息和解决方案，还可以通过对话建立与客户的关系。本文探讨了在对话中如何激发关系认知及其对客户服务互动结果的影响。因此，我们提供了一项实证研究，展示了FLEs如何通过与关系沟通理论一致的四个关键主题的模仿或互补，影响客户满意度：亲密沟通、任务导向、果断性和镇定性。我们的研究结果表明，一线员工应模仿客户的亲密沟通和任务导向，补充他们的果断性，并表现出高水平的镇定性。此外，一线员工应在对话开始时强调其任务导向，随着对话的进行逐渐融入更多的亲密沟通，并在服务聊天的后期展现果断性。这些通过四项实验研究得到证实的见解，强调了FLEs关系沟通的重要性。我们的研究结果突显了对FLEs进行培训的价值，使其能巧妙地调整用词选择，并利用文本监控工具的潜在好处，帮助FLEs提升与客户的关系认知和满意度。

title: Intent-Driven Machine Learning for Fake News Detection: A Referential Domain Adaptation Approach
abstract: Fake news negatively impacts business operations across various sectors, including healthcare, retail, and finance. One promising way to mitigate this problem is through automated content moderation using machine learning (ML). However, existing methodologies have struggled to identify fake news due to its inherent challenges—namely, class heterogeneity, concept drift, context dependency, and adversarial attacks. To address these challenges, we propose a novel strategy that focuses on the heterogeneous intentions behind fake news. Our approach builds on insights from prior social science research indicating that the intent behind creating fake news may differ from that behind disseminating it. This intent-driven variation influences the syntactic structures of fake news, leading to its heterogeneous nature. Accordingly, we argue that developing an ML model focused on the intent dimension of fake news can help overcome the issue of class heterogeneity, which often prevents effective model convergence.
