abstract_cn: 员工在雇主违反社会规范时是否愿意离职？我们提出了一个基于事件的框架，以理解员工在应对利益相关者违规行为时的流动性——指的是对利益相关者造成的公开宣布、受到监管机构制裁的损害。我们理论认为，严重的违规行为促使一些员工因声誉担忧重新评估自己的归属，尤其是在违规行为范围广泛、接连发生或偏离以往模式时。这些特征增加了观察者（包括同事和未来雇主）将这些不当行为视为系统性问题的可能性，从而提高了留任员工的声誉风险。通过利用来自Revelio Labs的LinkedIn数据，我们分析了735家大型美国上市公司的八年工作历史数据，发现公司年收入的5%违规行为导致员工流动率增加3.93%。当违规行为范围广泛、发生迅速或与历史情况不同寻常时，离职率进一步上升。离职员工往往选择加入违规记录较少的公司，表明了一种基于价值观的排序。我们还估算了这些违规行为导致的员工流失对我们样本中代表性公司的财务损失。我们的研究结果为将利益相关者违规视为推动组织间迁移的组织事件提供了新视角。

title: Who I Am Not: Enhancing Self-Clarity through Cultivating Not-Me Identities
abstract: How do people develop and leverage self-definitions of who and what they are not, or their “not-me” identities, to navigate their work lives? In contrast to dominant portrayals of not-me identities as negative or oppositional, we explore how they can serve as resources in identity work. Drawing on a grounded theory study of 80 interviews with independent workers and clients, we identify a process we call “identity filtering.” Through this process, individuals identify and disconfirm misaligned role or relational elements, cultivating not-me identity repertoires that serve as reference points for how they engage in and shape their role-relationships. We identify two distinct pathways: some individuals enact their not-me identities through setting boundaries and role screening, which in turn enhance their self-clarity. Others suppress their not-me identities by engaging in enmeshment, which generates emotional strain. These diverging paths emerge through distinct underlying mechanisms: self-worth and desire for control both enable enactment, while adaptability constrains it. By reconceptualizing not-me identities as resources, this study advances identity theory and deepens understanding of how (independent) workers navigate fluid role-relationships and uncertainty in contemporary work.
title_cn: 我不是谁：通过培养非我身份来增强自我清晰度
abstract_cn: 人们如何发展和利用自我定义，明确自己与他人或与自身不相符的身份，即“非我”身份，以便在工作生活中顺利前行？与主流对非我身份的负面或对立表述相对，我们探讨了非我身份如何成为身份工作的资源。基于对80次独立工作者和客户的访谈进行的扎根理论研究，我们确定了一个被称为“身份过滤”的过程。在这一过程中，个体识别并否定与自身角色或关系不相符的元素，培养出作为参考点的非我身份储备，指导他们如何参与并塑造角色关系。我们识别出两条不同的路径：一些个体通过设定界限和角色筛选来实施其非我身份，从而提高自我清晰度；而另一些个体则通过卷入他人关系来压抑自身的非我身份，这会造成情感压力。这两条截然不同的路径通过不同的潜在机制显现：自我价值感和对控制的渴望促进了身份的实施，而适应性则对其产生限制。通过重新构思非我身份作为资源，本研究推动了身份理论的发展，加深了对独立工作者如何在当代工作的流动角色关系和不确定性中导航的理解。

title: The Value of Silence: The Effect of UMG’s Licensing Dispute with TikTok on Music Demand
abstract: This study examines how the dispute between TikTok and Universal Music Group (UMG) impacted music demand on streaming platforms.
title_cn: 沉默的价值：UMG与TikTok的授权争议对音乐需求的影响
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了TikTok与环球音乐集团（UMG）之间的争端如何影响流媒体平台上的音乐需求。

title: Tackling the Complexity Challenge: When and How to Engage in Configurational and Hybrid Theorizing
abstract: Management phenomena are often causally complex, and management research has increasingly turned to a configurational perspective to better account for this complexity. Yet, despite recent attention to configurational theorizing, we still lack comprehensive guidance on when a configurational approach is most appropriate, leading to confusion and avoidable disputes in the review process. Moreover, despite growing calls for theoretical triangulation, our understanding of how configurational theorizing can be effectively combined with other theorizing approaches is limited, slowing the development of novel organizational theories and confining configurational inquiry to largely abductive research and ex post theorizing. We address these challenges in two ways. First, we articulate a framework of four key indications—causal conjunction, causal disjunction, outcome asymmetry, and outcome intentionality—that provide systematic guidance on when a configurational approach is warranted. Second, we introduce two configurational hybrid theorizing approaches that integrate configurational theorizing with propositional and process grammars. Specifically, we demonstrate how configurational-propositional theorizing can generate novel predictions about complex causal relationships, and how configurational-process theorizing can incorporate temporal dynamics through temporal-configurational layering. Together, these contributions broaden the theoretical toolkit for studying complexity and offer new ways to advance the configurational perspective and management theory more generally.
title_cn: 应对复杂性挑战：何时以及如何进行构型和混合理论的探讨
abstract_cn: 管理现象往往具有因果复杂性，因此管理研究逐渐转向配置视角，以更好地应对这种复杂性。然而，尽管近期对配置理论的关注增加，我们仍然缺乏关于何时采用配置方法的全面指导，这导致了审查过程中出现混乱和可避免的争议。此外，尽管对理论三角化的呼声日益高涨，但我们对于配置理论如何与其他理论方法有效结合的理解仍然有限，这减缓了新兴组织理论的发展，并将配置研究大多限制在排除性研究和事后理论的范畴内。对此，我们提出了两种应对策略。首先，我们阐述了一个包含四个关键指示的框架——因果结合、因果分离、结果非对称和结果意图性——为何时采取配置方法提供系统性指导。其次，我们介绍了两种将配置理论与命题和过程语法相结合的配置混合理论方法。具体而言，我们演示了配置-命题理论如何生成关于复杂因果关系的新预测，以及配置-过程理论如何通过时间-配置层次化融入时间动态。总之，这些贡献拓宽了研究复杂性的理论工具箱，并为推进配置视角及更广泛的管理理论提供了新途径。

title: Empirically Based Response Strategies: When and How Empirical Debate Allows Firms to Resist Stakeholders
abstract: While stakeholder support is essential for firm survival, when stakeholder pressures are at odds with firm interests, resistance becomes imperative for the firm. We theorize when and how empirically based responses enable firms to effectively resist stakeholders, without losing critical support, by following societal norms encouraging empirical debate. Extending arguments that stakeholder pressure progresses through phases, we argue that empirical debate is most influential before and after the phase when stakeholder deliberation occurs—that is, in the preceding phase, when issues are defined, and the subsequent phase, when remedies are debated. We detail two empirically based response strategies: (1) validity disputing and (2) validity promoting. While validity disputing sows doubt and uncertainty on the empirical elements of issues and remedies, validity promoting advances the empirical merits of the firm’s preferred remedy relative to stakeholders’ proposed remedy. Together, these strategies seek to mitigate stakeholder pressures by disrupting an issue’s rise to salience, and, failing that, to avoid remedies constituting more substantive concessions. We complete our model by examining three contingencies: firm dependence on stakeholders, causal complexity, and the strength of stakeholders’ values. Detailing empirical debate as a basis of response complements well-established, values-based approaches to address stakeholder pressures.
title_cn: 基于经验的应对策略：何时及如何通过经验性辩论使公司抵御利益相关者
abstract_cn: 虽然利益相关者的支持对企业生存至关重要，但当利益相关者的压力与企业利益相悖时，企业就必须采取抵制措施。我们理论化了何时以及如何通过基于实证的响应使企业有效抵制利益相关者，而不失去关键支持，方法是遵循鼓励实证辩论的社会规范。我们扩展了利益相关者压力通过阶段发展的论点，认为实证辩论在利益相关者审议发生的阶段之前和之后最具影响力——即在前一阶段，当问题被定义时，以及在随后的阶段，当补救措施被辩论时。我们详细阐述了两种基于实证的响应策略：（1）有效性争议和（2）有效性促进。有效性争议在问题和补救措施的实证要素上播下怀疑和不确定的种子，而有效性促进则相对推进企业所偏好的补救措施的实证优点，与利益相关者提出的补救措施进行比较。这两种策略共同旨在通过干扰问题的显著性上升来缓解利益相关者的压力，如果失败，则避免采取更具实质性让步的补救措施。我们通过考察三个应变因素来完善我们的模型：企业对利益相关者的依赖、因果复杂性以及利益相关者价值观的强度。将实证辩论作为响应的基础，补充了已建立的基于价值观的方法，以应对利益相关者的压力。

title: How to grow new applications out of old research? Evidence from firm cumulative investments in deep learning
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Firm technological research has the potential to spawn multiple applications. Despite recognizing such potential, past literature disagrees on the process through which firms discover and grow new applications out of their past technological research. I examine this question in the context of deep learning, taking a question‐driven approach. Difference‐in‐difference analysis suggests that firms radically increased cumulative investments in past deep learning research upon signals indicating elevated application potential of deep learning. Furthermore, rather than investing in proprietary efforts, firms disclosed their cumulative development trajectories to engage external innovation efforts from which they learn and build. Grounded in these findings, I propose that the discovery and growth of new applications of past research entails unfolding innovation interdependence which motivates firms to co‐evolve with external innovators. Managerial Summary Firm technological research has the potential to spawn multiple applications. This article examines how firms cumulatively invest in their past technological research to grow new applications in the context of deep learning. Employing a difference‐in‐difference approach, analysis suggests that firms radically increased cumulative investments in deep learning after a shock elevating the application potential of their past deep‐learning research. Furthermore, firms publicly disclosed their cumulative development trajectories to attract innovation efforts from application sectors while actively learning from the attracted efforts to innovate further. These findings suggest that firms engaged, leveraged and co‐evolved with external innovation efforts to discover and grow new applications of their past research.
title_cn: 如何从旧研究中发展新应用？来自企业在深度学习领域累计投资的证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 企业的技术研究有潜力衍生出多种应用。尽管认识到这种潜力，过去的文献对企业如何从其过去的技术研究中发现并发展新的应用存在分歧。本文在深度学习的背景下考察了这个问题，采取了以问题为导向的方法。差异在差异分析表明，当有信号指示深度学习的应用潜力提高时，企业在以往深度学习研究上的累积投资显著增加。此外，企业并未选择在专有工作上投资，而是公开其累积开发轨迹，以吸引外部创新努力，从中学习并进行构建。基于这些发现，我提出，旧研究的新应用的发现与增长涉及创新依赖关系的展开，这促使企业与外部创新者共同进化。 管理摘要 企业的技术研究有潜力衍生出多种应用。本文考察了企业如何在深度学习的背景下，逐步投资于其过去的技术研究以发展新的应用。采用差异在差异的方法，分析表明，企业在经历提高其过去深度学习研究的应用潜力的冲击后，显著增加了对深度学习的累积投资。此外，企业公开披露其累积开发轨迹，以吸引来自应用领域的创新努力，同时积极从吸引来的努力中学习以进一步创新。这些发现表明，企业与外部创新努力合作、利用并共同进化，以发现和发展其过去研究的新应用。

title: Dual Demands, Attention, and Organizational Learning: Spatial and Temporal Replication of Routines in Scaling Organizations
abstract: The replication of routines is fundamental to knowledge transfer and retention in organizations. Because research on routine replication has historically been divided, proceeding within knowledge transfer (spatial replication) or knowledge retention (temporal replication), respectively, our understanding of how replicating routines in new organizational units (knowledge transfer) affects an organization’s capacity to maintain adherence to those routines over time at existing units (knowledge retention) remains limited. Drawing on the organizational learning and related evolutionary economics literature on routines as well as the multiple goals literature and using data on a Fortune 100 franchise chain being scaled in the United States with thousands of outlets opened over a period of 10 years, we examine whether and how knowledge transfer affects knowledge retention. Our primary thesis is that knowledge transfer and knowledge retention create competing demands for limited attention and therefore the need to allocate attention between them. We posit that this gives rise to a negative relationship between the spatial (knowledge transfer) and temporal (knowledge retention) replication of routines, although the effect can be mitigated by organizational learning from experience. We find robust empirical support for our propositions, pointing to important attention and learning mechanisms that shape the organizational capacity to simultaneously navigate knowledge transfer and retention demands, that is, replicate routines across both space and time. Funding: This work was supported by Project PID2024-160548NB-I00 funded by MICIU/AEI /10.13039/501100011033 and by FEDER, EU as well as by by Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia [UID/00124/2025, UID/PRR/124/2025, Nova School of Business and Economics] and LISBOA2030 [DataLab2030 - LISBOA2030-FEDER 01314200]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.16528 .
title_cn: 双重需求、注意力与组织学习：在规模化组织中惯例的空间与时间复制
abstract_cn: 例行程序的重复对于知识在组织中的转移与保留至关重要。由于对例行程序重复的研究历史上通常被分为知识转移（空间复制）与知识保留（时间复制），因此我们对如何在新的组织单元中复制例行程序（知识转移）对现有单元在时间上维护这些例行程序的遵循能力（知识保留）的影响的理解仍然有限。基于组织学习及相关的进化经济学文献，考虑到例行程序的多重目标文献，并使用关于一家财富100强的特许经营连锁企业在美国扩张的数据，该企业在10年的时间内开设了数千个门店，我们研究了知识转移是如何影响知识保留的。我们的主要论点是，知识转移和知识保留为有限的注意力创造了相互竞争的需求，因此需要在两者之间分配注意力。我们假设这导致了例行程序的空间（知识转移）与时间（知识保留）复制之间存在负相关关系，尽管这一影响可以通过组织从经验中学习来减轻。我们发现对我们的命题有稳健的实证支持，指出了塑造组织能力以同时应对知识转移和保留需求的重要注意力和学习机制，即，在空间和时间上复制例行程序。资助：本研究得到了由MICIU/AEI /10.13039/501100011033资助的项目PID2024-160548NB-I00以及来自于欧盟的FEDER资金的支持，以及来自于科学与技术基金会[UID/00124/2025，UID/PRR/124/2025，诺瓦商学院]和LISBOA2030 [DataLab2030 - LISBOA2030-FEDER 01314200]的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.16528获取。

title: Roadmap or Compass? The Value of Prior Collaborative Experience in an Unfamiliar Task Environment
abstract: When a temporary team faces an unfamiliar task environment, it should particularly benefit from including members who have collaborated before. Although several studies have made this prediction, it has not been supported empirically. We reconcile this discrepancy by distinguishing between prior collaborations in tightly versus loosely coupled roles, defined by the degree of interdependence among collaborators during prior work. Both forms of prior collaboration can help teammates communicate effectively, aiding team adaptation in new contexts. However, prior collaboration in tightly coupled roles also fosters shared routines that may create inertia and impede adaptation. As a result, we argue that the value of tightly coupled experience declines in unfamiliar environments, whereas the value of loosely coupled experience increases. We test these ideas using data from esports, where professional players with varying collaborative histories are randomly assigned to temporary teams. Unanticipated changes to the game exogenously alter teams’ familiarity with their task environments. Consistent with our theory, we find that tightly coupled collaborative experience enhances team performance in familiar task environments but degrades it in unfamiliar ones. Loosely coupled experience provides modest benefits in familiar environments but substantially enhances performance in unfamiliar ones. Overall, our findings suggest that when environments change, tightly coupled experience can act as a faulty roadmap—anchoring teams to outdated routines—whereas loosely coupled experience can serve as a compass that promotes coordination and adaptation. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19399 .
title_cn: 路线图还是指南针？以往协作经验在陌生任务环境中的价值
abstract_cn: 当一个临时团队面临一个不熟悉的任务环境时，特别有可能从之前合作过的成员中受益。尽管已有多项研究做出了这样的预测，但这一观点并未得到实证支持。我们通过区分之前在紧密耦合角色和松散耦合角色中的合作，来调和这一差异，紧密耦合角色与松散耦合角色的定义基于协作者在先前工作中的相互依赖程度。两种形式的先前合作都可以帮助队友有效沟通，促进团队在新环境中的适应。然而，在紧密耦合角色中的先前合作也会培养共享的例行程序，这可能导致惰性并阻碍适应。因此，我们认为，在不熟悉的环境中，紧密耦合经验的价值下降，而松散耦合经验的价值则上升。我们使用电子竞技的数据来检验这些观点，其中职业选手们具有不同的合作历史，被随机分配到临时团队。游戏的意外变化外生性地改变了团队对其任务环境的熟悉度。与我们的理论一致，我们发现，紧密耦合的合作经验在熟悉的任务环境中提升了团队表现，但在不熟悉的环境中却降低了表现。松散耦合的经验在熟悉的环境中提供了适度的好处，但在不熟悉的环境中显著增强了表现。总体而言，我们的发现表明，当环境发生变化时，紧密耦合经验可能充当一条错误的路线图—将团队锁定在过时的例行程序中—而松散耦合经验则可以作为一把指南针，促进协调与适应。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19399获得。

title: The living lab and the cursed catalyst: Navigating the legitimacy challenges of innovation intermediaries for sustainable innovation
abstract: Sustainability challenges, such as water resource management, increasingly demand frontier technologies and the coordination of diverse stakeholders. Living labs have surged globally—often backed by public funding—as pivotal intermediaries in these contexts. Although their effectiveness is debated, little attention has been paid to how they address the challenges of implementing sustainability-oriented innovations that leverage advanced science and engage multiple stakeholders. Focusing on the project level, where operational complexities are most apparent, we examine the ‘MOSIS’ initiative to enhance water management along the Senegal River using a science-based Earth Observation system. This project involves academia, industry, governments, international organisations, and a living lab. Recognised at CoP26 and considered by the World Bank for broader scaling, MOSIS exemplifies the integration of cutting-edge technologies and multi-stakeholder coordination. We identify three roles—technological expert, stakeholder orchestrator, and end-user empowerer—each corresponding to one dimension of legitimacy (instrumental, relational, and moral). When combined, these roles create synergies that endow the living lab with strong active legitimacy, but also trigger dis-synergies that obscure the categorical cues required for passive cognitive legitimacy. We term this predicament the “Cursed Catalyst”: a situation whereby an intermediary's success yields an unbalanced legitimacy portfolio that, unless proactively rebalanced by efforts to strengthen cognitive legitimacy, ultimately constrains its perceived impact on sustainable innovation and jeopardises its long-term survival. These findings have significant implications for research policy and funding bodies, which rely on living labs to accelerate the transfer of frontier science into real-world sustainability contexts. • Highlights living labs' multiple roles in complex sustainability projects • Explores how overlapping roles cause stakeholder confusion and under-recognition. • Introduces “cursed catalyst” to explain the undermining of cognitive legitimacy. • Proposes strategies to foster appreciation of living labs' critical contributions.
topics: Innovative Approaches in Technology and Social Development
title_cn: 生活实验室与被诅咒的催化剂：应对可持续创新中创新中介的合法性挑战
abstract_cn: 可持续性挑战，例如水资源管理，日益需要前沿技术和多样利益相关者的协调。生活实验室在这些背景下迅速增长——通常得到公共资金的支持——作为关键的中介。尽管其有效性存在争议，但很少关注它们如何应对实施可持续创新的挑战，这些创新利用先进科学并且涉及多个利益相关者。我们聚焦于项目层面，在那里操作复杂性最为明显，研究了‘MOSIS’倡议，旨在使用基于科学的地球观测系统增强塞内加尔河沿岸的水管理。该项目涉及学术界、行业、政府、国际组织以及一个生活实验室。MOSIS在第26届缔约方会议上受到认可，并被世界银行考虑进行更广泛的推广，体现了尖端技术与多方利益相关者协调的结合。我们识别出三个角色——技术专家、利益相关者协调者和最终用户赋权者——每个角色对应于合法性的一个维度（工具性、关系性和道德性）。当这些角色结合时，产生的协同效应赋予生活实验室强大的积极合法性，但也会引发非协同效应，从而模糊被动认知合法性所需的类别信号。我们将这种困境称为“被诅咒的催化剂”：一种情况下，中介的成功导致不平衡的合法性组合，除非通过加强认知合法性的努力主动进行再平衡，否则最终会限制其在可持续创新中的感知影响，并危及其长期生存。这些发现对依赖生活实验室加速前沿科学向现实世界可持续性背景转化的研究政策和资助机构具有重要意义。 • 突出生活实验室在复杂可持续项目中的多重角色 • 探讨重叠角色如何造成利益相关者混淆和认知不足 • 引入“被诅咒的催化剂”以解释对认知合法性的削弱 • 提出策略以促进对生活实验室关键贡献的认可。

title: Certified Sustainability: Third-Party Certification of Sustainable Ventures and its Relationship to Venture Funding
abstract: Abstract This study explores how sustainability certifications help attract investor funding to sustainable ventures, depending on the venture’s stage at the time of certification. Sustainable ventures secure financing at every stage to build viable businesses and achieve ethical missions, such as addressing climate change and social inequalities. To signal their genuine commitment to sustainability efforts, these ventures seek third-party certifications. Research has investigated third-party certification as a means to reduce information asymmetries between ventures and investors. However, it has yielded ambiguous results regarding the financial implications of such certifications for sustainable ventures. In our study, we use propensity score matching on a sample of 748 certified and comparable non-certified sustainable ventures. We examine the role of sustainability certifications in attracting investor funding and the moderating role of venture stage at certification. Drawing on signaling theory, we show that the positive relationship between sustainability certification and funding weakens at later venture stages. Our findings highlight third-party sustainability certification as a key signal in venture financing, enabling sustainable ventures to prove the materiality of their sustainability efforts and increase funding. We thus advance the literature on business ethics and sustainable finance.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 认证可持续性：可持续企业的第三方认证及其与企业融资的关系
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究探讨了可持续性认证如何根据企业认证时的阶段帮助吸引投资者资金以支持可持续创业。可持续性企业在每个阶段都需要融资，以建立可行的商业模式并实现其伦理使命，如应对气候变化和社会不平等。为了体现对可持续性努力的真诚承诺，这些企业寻求第三方认证。已有研究将第三方认证视为减少企业与投资者之间信息不对称的一种手段。然而，这些研究在可持续性企业的财务影响方面得出了模糊的结果。在本研究中，我们对748个经过认证的可持续企业及相应的未认证企业样本进行了倾向得分匹配分析。我们考察了可持续性认证在吸引投资者资金方面的作用，以及企业认证时阶段的调节作用。基于信号理论，我们表明可持续性认证和融资之间的正向关系在企业的后期阶段减弱。我们的研究结果强调将第三方可持续性认证视为创业融资中的一个关键信号，使可持续创业能够证明其可持续努力的实质性并增加资金。因此，我们推动了商业伦理与可持续金融领域的文献发展。

title: Unequal in the Spotlight: Gender Differences in How Serving on Prominent Firms Affects Directors’ New Board Appointments
abstract: Does gaining a foothold in the upper echelons of the corporate landscape carry different implications for women and men? We address this question by examining gender differences in how serving on the boards of prominent firms leads to new board appointments. While prominent affiliations are widely recognized as advantageous, research has yet to ask whether these benefits vary by gender. Using data on the population of directors in the FTSE-100 between 2010 and 2017, we find that women are, on average, more likely than men to obtain additional board appointments, consistent with prior literature showing that pressures to increase diversity stimulate demand for incumbent women relative to men. However, serving on more-prominent boards within the FTSE-100 increases men’s likelihood of obtaining new appointments but decreases it for women. Thus, women’s advantage diminishes and eventually reverses, becoming a disadvantage, as firm prominence increases. Our systematic evaluation of potential demand- and supply-side explanations for this pattern finds limited support for both. We propose, instead, that women’s experiences of greater scrutiny and of informal demands on more-prominent boards may shape their willingness to pursue additional appointments. We highlight the dual role of prominent affiliations as sources of both opportunity and constraint, with implications for individual careers and organizational diversity.
title_cn: 在聚光灯下的不平等：担任知名公司的董事对董事新任董事会任命的性别差异影响
abstract_cn: 在企业高层中获得立足之地对女性和男性是否具有不同的意义？我们通过研究在知名公司的董事会任职如何影响新董事会任命中的性别差异来探讨这个问题。虽然知名的关联被广泛认可为有利因素，但研究尚未探讨这些好处是否因性别而异。利用2010年至2017年间FTSE-100公司董事人口的数据，我们发现女性在获得额外董事会任命方面的概率平均高于男性，这与之前的文献一致，显示出增加多样性的压力在刺激现任女性的需求相对于男性方面起到了作用。然而，在FTSE-100的更知名的董事会任职增加了男性获得新任命的可能性，反而降低了女性的可能性。因此，随着公司知名度的增加，女性的优势减弱，最终转变为劣势。我们对这一模式潜在的需求和供给侧解释进行了系统评估，发现支持的证据有限。相比之下，我们提出，女性在更知名的董事会中经历的更大监督和非正式要求可能会影响她们追求额外任命的意愿。我们强调知名关联在机会和约束这两方面的双重角色，这对个人职业发展和组织多样性具有重要影响。

title: The leisure crafting intervention: Effects on work and non-work outcomes and the moderating role of age
abstract: Leisure crafting (i.e. the proactive pursuit of leisure activities targeted at goal-setting, learning, and human connection) enhances people’s lives. Because employees are more than just workers, this study examines whether leisure crafting not only improves non-work outcomes but also spills over to benefit work, particularly for older employees. We conducted an online leisure crafting intervention among working adults, to examine its effects on non-work benefits (meaning in life, need satisfaction, affective well-being, and sense of community), work benefits (meaning at work, employee creativity, and work engagement), and the moderating role of age. A 5-week randomized controlled trial compared our intervention comprising 196 participants against a passive control group comprising 266 participants. Analyses revealed that the intervention group experienced a greater increase in leisure crafting (i.e. the manipulation check was significant), employee creativity, and meaning at work. In addition, the intervention positively impacted affective well-being but only for participants older than 61 years. The findings suggest that leisure crafting has the potential to positively affect people’s work lives and can serve as an effective organizational tool to help older employees sustain satisfactory affective well-being.
title_cn: 休闲工艺干预：对工作和非工作结果的影响以及年龄的调节作用
abstract_cn: 休闲创造（即有意识地追求针对目标设定、学习和人际联系的休闲活动）能够提升人们的生活质量。因为员工不仅仅是工作者，本研究探讨了休闲创造是否不仅能改善非工作结果，还能溢出到工作中，特别是对于older employees（老年员工）。我们在职场成年人中开展了一项在线休闲创造干预，以考察其对非工作益处（生活意义、需求满足、情感幸福感和社区感）、工作益处（工作意义、员工创造力和工作投入）以及年龄的调节作用的影响。我们进行了为期5周的随机对照试验，将196名参与者的干预组与266名参与者的被动对照组进行了比较。分析结果显示，干预组在休闲创造（即操控检查显著）、员工创造力和工作意义方面的增加更为显著。此外，干预对情感幸福感产生了积极影响，但仅限于61岁以上的参与者。研究结果表明，休闲创造有可能对人们的工作生活产生积极影响，并能够作为一种有效的组织工具，帮助老年员工维持令人满意的情感幸福感。

title: The Elephant and Donkey in the Room: Time-Varying Effects of Political Dissimilarity on Social Interactions at Work During U.S. Elections
abstract: Political polarization is recognized as a global risk. Although emerging studies on political dissimilarity at work highlight important implications for how employees behave and interact, findings are at times inconsistent. To provide a more nuanced understanding of when and why political dissimilarity disrupts workplace interactions, we draw on the social identity approach and threat processing to examine how political dissimilarity shapes perceptions of work relationships and behavior before and after election events. Across three studies, we demonstrate that political dissimilarity’s effects depend on political macro events and thus become temporally activated. Study 1, an experience sampling field study during the 2020 U.S. presidential election, showed no significant impact of political dissimilarity on negative interpersonal interactions before the election, but significance emerged on election day and persisted for six days after the election. In Study 2, an online experiment during the 2022 U.S. midterm elections, we found that actual political dissimilarity indirectly influenced negative interpersonal interactions via reduced social mindfulness after the election but not beforehand. Study 3, a longitudinal experiment over four weeks during the 2024 U.S. presidential election, replicated the election effect, demonstrating that these effects persisted for at least two weeks and were mediated by cognitive (i.e., perspective-taking) and affective (i.e., empathic concern) subdimensions of social mindfulness. Our findings highlight political orientation as a critical dimension of workplace dissimilarity. Although its impact may be subdued, it becomes pronounced during macro-political events, shaping workplace interactions in significant ways, with the political dissimilarity effects being more easily reactivated in the postelection phase. Funding: Data collection was partially supported by an Add-on Fellowship for Interdisciplinary Economics and Interdisciplinary Business Administration from the Joachim Herz Foundation, awarded to M. Reinwald. P. Bamberger’s involvement in this project was supported by a grant from the Henry Crown Institute of Business Research in Israel. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18538 .
title_cn: 房间里的大象与驴子：美国选举期间政治差异对工作场所社交互动的时变效应
abstract_cn: 政治两极化被视为一种全球风险。尽管关于工作中政治差异的新兴研究突显了员工行为和互动的重要影响，但结果有时存在不一致性。为了更深入地理解政治差异何时以及为何会干扰工作场所的互动，我们借助社会认同理论和威胁处理理论，考察政治差异如何在选举事件前后影响对工作关系的感知和行为。在三项研究中，我们证明了政治差异的影响依赖于政治宏观事件，因此在时间上会被激活。研究1是一项在2020年美国总统选举期间进行的经验取样现场研究，显示在选举前政治差异对负面人际互动没有显著影响，但在选举日显著性出现，并在选举后的六天内持续存在。研究2是2022年美国中期选举期间的在线实验，发现实际的政治差异在选举后通过降低社会正念间接影响负面人际互动，但在选举前并未表现出这种影响。研究3是一项在2024年美国总统选举期间为期四周的纵向实验，验证了选举效应，显示这些效应至少持续了两周，并且通过社会正念的认知（即观点采纳）和情感（即同理心关怀）两个子维度媒介化。我们的研究结果强调了政治取向作为职场差异的重要维度。尽管其影响可能较为微弱，但在宏观政治事件期间会变得显著，显著影响工作场所的互动，而政治差异的效应在选举后的阶段更容易被重新激活。资助信息：数据收集部分得到乔阿希姆·赫兹基金会颁发的跨学科经济学和跨学科商业管理附加奖学金的支持，该奖学金授予了M. Reinwald。P. Bamberger参与此项目得到了以色列亨利·克朗商业研究所的资助。补充材料：在线附录请访问https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18538。
